// - Verified frequency smoothing uses game-specific base probability prior
// - Verified random baseline math is game-specific
// - Verified component vectors are normalized before blending
// - Verified signal caps are relative to base probability
// - Verified learning proposal adjusts caps from evidence
// - Verified learning confidence gate compares improvement, not raw recall against zero
// - Verified combination builder uses scored numbers and set-quality metrics
// - Verified daily digit scoring is position-aware

if (!function_exists('skai_debug_log')) {
    function skai_debug_log($msg) {
        // Production no-op: debug log disabled to prevent web-accessible log exposure.
        // To re-enable during local debugging only, change the path to a directory
        // outside the web root (e.g. JPATH_ADMINISTRATOR . '/logs/skai_save_debug.log').
        return;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList')) {
    function mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList($value)
    {
        if (is_string($value)) {
            $decoded = json_decode($value, true);
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
                $value = $decoded;
            } else {
                $value = preg_split('/[^0-9]+/', $value);
            }
        }
        $out = array();
        foreach ((array)$value as $v) {
            $id = (int)$v;
            if ($id > 0) { $out[$id] = $id; }
        }
        ksort($out);
        return array_values($out);
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds')) {
    function mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId)
    {
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        if ($userId <= 0) { return array(); }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('profile_value'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('profile_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('mylotto.hidden_lottery_ids'))
            ->order($db->quoteName('ordering') . ' ASC')
            ->setLimit(1);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $raw = $db->loadResult();
        if ($raw === null || $raw === '') { return array(); }
        $decoded = json_decode((string)$raw, true);
        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
            if (is_string($decoded)) { $raw = $decoded; }
            elseif (is_array($decoded)) { return mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList($decoded); }
        }
        return mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList((string)$raw);
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds')) {
    function mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId, array $ids)
    {
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        if ($userId <= 0) { return false; }
        $value = json_encode(mylottoexpertNormalizeLotteryIdList($ids));
        $stored = json_encode((string)$value);
        $existsQ = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('COUNT(*)')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
            ->where($db->quoteName('profile_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('mylotto.hidden_lottery_ids'));
        $db->setQuery($existsQ);
        $exists = ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        if ($exists) {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->update($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
                ->set($db->quoteName('profile_value') . ' = ' . $db->quote($stored))
                ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $userId)
                ->where($db->quoteName('profile_key') . ' = ' . $db->quote('mylotto.hidden_lottery_ids'));
        } else {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_profiles'))
                ->columns(array($db->quoteName('user_id'), $db->quoteName('profile_key'), $db->quoteName('profile_value'), $db->quoteName('ordering')))
                ->values($userId . ',' . $db->quote('mylotto.hidden_lottery_ids') . ',' . $db->quote($stored) . ',0');
        }
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('mylottoexpertUnhideLotteryForUser')) {
    function mylottoexpertUnhideLotteryForUser($db, $userId, $lotteryId)
    {
        $userId = (int)$userId;
        $lotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
        if ($userId <= 0 || $lotteryId <= 0) { return false; }
        $hiddenIds = mylottoexpertGetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId);
        $changed = false;
        $next = array();
        foreach ((array)$hiddenIds as $id) {
            $id = (int)$id;
            if ($id <= 0) { continue; }
            if ($id === $lotteryId) {
                $changed = true;
                continue;
            }
            $next[$id] = $id;
        }
        if ($changed) { mylottoexpertSetHiddenLotteryIds($db, $userId, array_values($next)); }
        return $changed;
    }
}

        $src = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)$in->getString('src', 'skip_hit')) ?: 'skip_hit';
        $app->enqueueMessage('Saved to your dashboard - (' . $src . ')', 'message'); // cleaned separator
    }
} catch (\Throwable $__) { /* ignore */ }


// ========================================================================
// [STATE] KNOWN ISSUES / SYSTEM STATUS PANEL CONFIG
// Note: This file runs as a standalone Sourcerer-compatible production page,
// so true Joomla module XML backend params are not available from this single
// file alone. Keep all status-panel controls centralized here for safe edits.
// ========================================================================
$skaiEngineStatusConfig = array(
    'enabled'              => true,
    'collapsedDefault'     => true,
    'autoHideResolved'     => false,
    'title'                => 'SKAI Engine Status',
    'intro'                => 'SKAI is available for supported games. This panel reports known service issues and integration status; it does not guarantee lottery outcomes.',
    'lastUpdated'          => \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDate()->format('Y-m-d H:i:s T'),
    'footer'               => 'Backtests, saved-run scoring, and recommendations are decision-support tools. Lottery drawings remain random, and past results do not guarantee future outcomes.',
    'noIssuesMessage'      => 'No known service issues are currently posted.',
    'summary' => array(
        array(
            'label'    => 'Regular Lotteries',
            'status'   => 'Available',
            'state'    => 'green',
            'headline' => 'Single-run, batch, saved-result, and dashboard flows are available.',
            'detail'   => 'Monitor saved runs after each official draw and review scored evidence before relying on a setting.'
        ),
        array(
            'label'    => 'Daily Lotteries',
            'status'   => 'Available',
            'state'    => 'green',
            'headline' => 'Daily lottery workflows are available with separate optimization guidance.',
            'detail'   => 'Daily games use separate position-aware digit guidance and combo display.'
        ),
    ),
    'issues' => array()
);

// Derive active issues for Engine Status panel
$skaiEngStatusIssues = array();
if (!empty($skaiEngineStatusConfig['issues']) && is_array($skaiEngineStatusConfig['issues'])) {
    foreach ($skaiEngineStatusConfig['issues'] as $_engIssue) {
        if (!empty($_engIssue['enabled'])
            && (trim((string)($_engIssue['title'] ?? '')) !== '' || trim((string)($_engIssue['body'] ?? '')) !== '')) {
            $skaiEngStatusIssues[] = $_engIssue;
        }
    }
}
$skaiEngStatusHasIssues = !empty($skaiEngStatusIssues);
$skaiEngStatusShouldRender = !empty($skaiEngineStatusConfig['enabled'])
    && !(!empty($skaiEngineStatusConfig['autoHideResolved']) && !$skaiEngStatusHasIssues);

// ============================================================
// DESIGN B: Run-Snapshot AJAX handler
// Receives a JSON POST from JS after skai:done fires.
// Stores the effectiveRunConfig in the session keyed by userId+gameId.
// Responds with JSON so JS knows the store succeeded.
// Must run before any HTML output so that header() is still usable.
// ============================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '') === 'store_run_snapshot'
    && Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $_h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
    try {
        $snapshotUser   = Factory::getUser();
        $snapshotUserId = (int) ($snapshotUser->id ?? 0);
        if ($snapshotUserId <= 0) {
            echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
            exit;
        }
        $rawBody = (string)$in->get('snapshot_json', '', 'RAW');
        if ($rawBody === '') {
            echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'empty_snapshot']);
            exit;
        }
        $snap = json_decode($rawBody, true);
        if (!is_array($snap)) {
            echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_json']);
            exit;
        }
        // Validate and cast the 6 required fields
        $snapGameId  = isset($snap['gameId'])    ? (string) $snap['gameId']    : '';
        $skaiWin     = isset($snap['skai_window'])  ? (int)   $snap['skai_window']  : 0;
        $skipWin     = isset($snap['skip_window'])  ? (int)   $snap['skip_window']  : 0;
        $drawsUsed   = isset($snap['draws_used'])   ? (int)   $snap['draws_used']   : 0;
        $atSnap      = isset($snap['auto_tune'])    ? (int) (bool) $snap['auto_tune'] : 0;
        $tuneUsedSnap= isset($snap['tune_used'])    ? (int)   $snap['tune_used']    : 0;
        $topNCombos  = isset($snap['top_n_combos']) ? (int)   $snap['top_n_combos'] : 0;
        $snapPredMode   = isset($snap['predictionMode'])  ? preg_replace('/[^a-z_]/', '', (string)$snap['predictionMode']) : '';
        $snapPickMain   = isset($snap['pickMain'])         ? (int)$snap['pickMain']         : 0;
        $snapExtraCount = isset($snap['extraCount'])       ? (int)$snap['extraCount']       : 0;
        $snapComboCount = isset($snap['comboCountSaved'])  ? (int)$snap['comboCountSaved']  : 0;
        // Bounds validation
        if ($skaiWin  < 0 || $skaiWin  > 10000) { $skaiWin  = 0; }
        if ($skipWin  < 0 || $skipWin  > 10000) { $skipWin  = 0; }
        if ($drawsUsed < 0 || $drawsUsed > 1000000) { $drawsUsed = 0; }
        if ($topNCombos < 0 || $topNCombos > 10000) { $topNCombos = 0; }
        if ($snapPickMain < 0 || $snapPickMain > 20) { $snapPickMain = 0; }
        if ($snapExtraCount < 0 || $snapExtraCount > 10) { $snapExtraCount = 0; }
        if ($snapComboCount < 0 || $snapComboCount > 1000) { $snapComboCount = 0; }
        // Validate top_combos: array of objects each with a 'main' sub-array
        $snapTopCombos = [];
        if (isset($snap['top_combos']) && is_array($snap['top_combos'])) {
            foreach (array_slice($snap['top_combos'], 0, 5) as $cb) {
                if (is_array($cb) && isset($cb['main']) && is_array($cb['main'])) {
                    $cleanMain = array_map('intval', array_slice($cb['main'], 0, 10));
                    $snapTopCombos[] = ['main' => $cleanMain];
                }
            }
        }
        // Validate final_prediction_sets: ranked array [{rank, values:[...], score}]
        $snapFinalSets = [];
        if (isset($snap['final_prediction_sets']) && is_array($snap['final_prediction_sets'])) {
            foreach (array_slice($snap['final_prediction_sets'], 0, 5) as $fs) {
                if (is_array($fs)) {
                    $fsRank   = isset($fs['rank'])   ? (int)$fs['rank']   : 0;
                    $fsScore  = isset($fs['score'])  ? (float)$fs['score'] : 0.0;
                    $fsValues = (isset($fs['values']) && is_array($fs['values']))
                        ? array_map('intval', array_slice($fs['values'], 0, 10))
                        : (isset($fs['main']) && is_array($fs['main'])
                            ? array_map('intval', array_slice($fs['main'], 0, 10))
                            : []);
                    if (!empty($fsValues)) {
                        $snapFinalSets[] = ['rank' => $fsRank, 'values' => $fsValues, 'score' => $fsScore];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        // [[SKAI_V64_REGEX_SAFE_CLOSED_LOOP_SETTINGS_SNAPSHOT_BRIDGE]]
        // Capture a complete, sanitized runtime settings snapshot for MyLottoExpert's
        // full settings evidence mapper. This is read-only evidence enrichment; it does
        // not change prediction math, scoring math, saving behavior, or any existing DB records.
        $snapFullSettings = [];
        if (isset($snap['settings_full']) && is_array($snap['settings_full'])) {
            $snapFullSettings = $snap['settings_full'];
        } elseif (isset($snap['full_settings']) && is_array($snap['full_settings'])) {
            $snapFullSettings = $snap['full_settings'];
        } elseif (isset($snap['settings_snapshot']) && is_array($snap['settings_snapshot'])) {
            $snapFullSettings = $snap['settings_snapshot'];
        }
        $skaiV60SanitizeSettings = function($value, $depth = 0) use (&$skaiV60SanitizeSettings) {
            if ($depth > 4) { return null; }
            if (is_array($value)) {
                $out = [];
                $count = 0;
                foreach ($value as $k => $v) {
                    if ($count >= 160) { break; }
                    $key = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '_', substr((string)$k, 0, 80));
                    if ($key === '') { continue; }
                    $clean = $skaiV60SanitizeSettings($v, $depth + 1);
                    if ($clean !== null && $clean !== '') { $out[$key] = $clean; $count++; }
                }
                return $out;
            }
            if (is_bool($value)) { return $value ? 1 : 0; }
            if (is_int($value)) { return $value; }
            if (is_float($value)) { return is_finite($value) ? $value : null; }
            if (is_scalar($value)) {
                $txt = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', (string)$value);
                return substr($txt, 0, 220);
            }
            return null;
        };
        $snapFullSettings = $skaiV60SanitizeSettings($snapFullSettings);
        if (!is_array($snapFullSettings)) { $snapFullSettings = []; }

        // Build the validated snapshot
        // CHG: Also validate and pass through aiPredictedNumbers (display-string form of ranked sets).
        $snapRunUuid = isset($snap['run_uuid']) ? preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)$snap['run_uuid']) : '';
        $snapAiPN = [];
        if (isset($snap['aiPredictedNumbers']) && is_array($snap['aiPredictedNumbers'])) {
            foreach (array_slice($snap['aiPredictedNumbers'], 0, 5) as $apn) {
                if (is_array($apn)) {
                    $apnRank  = isset($apn['rank'])    ? (int)   $apn['rank']    : 0;
                    $apnScore = isset($apn['score'])   ? (float) $apn['score']   : 0.0;
                    $apnVal   = isset($apn['values'])  ? preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$apn['values']) : '';
                    $apnDisp  = isset($apn['display']) ? preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$apn['display']) : $apnVal;
                    if ($apnVal !== '') {
                        $snapAiPN[] = ['rank' => $apnRank, 'values' => $apnVal, 'score' => $apnScore, 'display' => $apnDisp];
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        $validated = [
            'gameId'         => $snapGameId,
            'userId'         => $snapshotUserId,
            'run_uuid'       => $snapRunUuid,
            'skai_window'    => $skaiWin,
            'skip_window'    => $skipWin,
            'draws_used'     => $drawsUsed,
            'auto_tune'      => $atSnap,
            'tune_used'      => $tuneUsedSnap,
            'top_n_combos'   => $topNCombos,
            'predictionMode' => $snapPredMode,
            'pickMain'       => $snapPickMain,
            'extraCount'     => $snapExtraCount,
            'comboCountSaved'=> $snapComboCount,
            'top_combos'     => $snapTopCombos,
            'final_prediction_sets' => $snapFinalSets,
            'final_prediction_set_count' => count($snapFinalSets),
            // CHG: Persist aiPredictedNumbers (canonical display-string key) for backward access.
            'aiPredictedNumbers'      => $snapAiPN,
            'aiPredictedNumbersCount' => count($snapAiPN),
            'primaryPrediction'       => !empty($snapAiPN) ? $snapAiPN[0] : null,
            // [[SKAI_V64_REGEX_SAFE_CLOSED_LOOP_SETTINGS_SNAPSHOT_BRIDGE]] Full runtime settings snapshot for MyLottoExpert v61.
            'settings_full'           => $snapFullSettings,
            'settings_snapshot'       => $snapFullSettings,
            'settings_snapshot_schema'=> 'skai_v61_closed_loop_settings_snapshot_v1',
            'settings_snapshot_keys'  => array_slice(array_keys($snapFullSettings), 0, 80),
            // Additional passthrough fields for full parity
            'sampling_temperature' => isset($snap['sampling_temperature']) ? (float)$snap['sampling_temperature'] : null,
            'diversity_penalty'    => isset($snap['diversity_penalty'])    ? (float)$snap['diversity_penalty']    : null,
            'gap_scale'            => isset($snap['gap_scale'])            ? (float)$snap['gap_scale']            : null,
            'laplace_k'            => isset($snap['laplace_k'])            ? (int)  $snap['laplace_k']            : null,
            'blend_ai_pct'         => isset($snap['blend_ai_pct'])         ? (int)  $snap['blend_ai_pct']         : null,
            'blend_pct'            => isset($snap['blend_ai_pct'])         ? (int)  $snap['blend_ai_pct']         : (isset($snap['blend_skip_pct']) ? max(0, min(100, 100 - (int)$snap['blend_skip_pct'])) : null),
            'blend_skip_pct'       => null,
            'window_size'          => isset($snap['window_size'])          ? (int)  $snap['window_size']          : null,
            'epochs'               => isset($snap['epochs'])               ? (int)  $snap['epochs']               : null,
            'batch_size'           => isset($snap['batch_size'])           ? (int)  $snap['batch_size']           : null,
            'risk_profile'         => isset($snap['risk_profile'])         ? preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)$snap['risk_profile']) : null,
            'strategy'             => isset($snap['strategy'])             ? preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)$snap['strategy'])     : null,
            'stored_at'            => time(),
        ];
        $sessionKey = 'skai.lastRunSnapshot.' . $snapGameId . '.' . $snapshotUserId;
        $app->setUserState($sessionKey, $validated);
        if (!empty($isDebug)) {
            error_log('[SKAI SNAPSHOT STORED] uid=' . $snapshotUserId . ' gameId=' . $snapGameId . ' ' . json_encode($validated));
        }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'stored_at' => $validated['stored_at']]);
    } catch (\Throwable $snapEx) {
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'exception']);
    }
    exit;
}

// [ADDED] Additional non-breaking security headers
$app->setHeader('X-Content-Type-Options', 'nosniff', true); // prevent MIME sniffing
$app->setHeader('Referrer-Policy', 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin', true); // privacy-friendly referrers
$app->setHeader('Permissions-Policy', "geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=(), fullscreen=(self)", true); // restrict powerful features explicitly (modern syntax)

// Secure session cookies (will only apply if PHP session not started; Joomla often starts it earlier)
if (session_status() === PHP_SESSION_NONE) {
    session_set_cookie_params([
        'lifetime' => 0,
        'path'     => '/',
        'domain'   => '',
        'secure'   => true,   // requires HTTPS; OK for lottoexpert.net
        'httponly' => true,
        'samesite' => 'Lax',
    ]);
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_GLOBAL_MAINTENANCE_LOCK_V1_2026_05_26]]
// Admin-controlled emergency stop for SKAI runs/saves.
// Storage is a JSON file outside the public web root: JPATH_ADMINISTRATOR/logs.
// Normal users see a maintenance message and cannot start/save SKAI runs while active.
// Super Users can optionally bypass the lock for testing.
// ========================================================================
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_path')) {
    function SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_path() {
        return JPATH_ADMINISTRATOR . '/logs/skai_maintenance_lock.json';
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_defaultState')) {
    function SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_defaultState() {
        return array(
            'enabled' => 0,
            'message' => 'SKAI is temporarily paused while we complete scheduled maintenance. Please check back shortly.',
            'admin_bypass' => 1,
            'updated_at' => '',
            'updated_by' => 0
        );
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_read')) {
    function SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_read() {
        $state = SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_defaultState();
        $path = SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_path();
        if (is_file($path)) {
            $raw = (string)@file_get_contents($path);
            $decoded = json_decode($raw, true);
            if (is_array($decoded)) {
                $state = array_merge($state, $decoded);
            }
        }
        $state['enabled'] = !empty($state['enabled']) ? 1 : 0;
        $state['admin_bypass'] = !empty($state['admin_bypass']) ? 1 : 0;
        $state['message'] = trim((string)($state['message'] ?? ''));
        if ($state['message'] === '') {
            $state['message'] = 'SKAI is temporarily paused while we complete scheduled maintenance. Please check back shortly.';
        }
        return $state;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_write')) {
    function SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_write(array $state) {
        $path = SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_path();
        $dir = dirname($path);
        if (!is_dir($dir)) { @mkdir($dir, 0755, true); }
        $payload = json_encode($state, JSON_PRETTY_PRINT | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        if ($payload === false) { return false; }
        return @file_put_contents($path, $payload, LOCK_EX) !== false;
    }
}

$skaiMaintenanceState = SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_read();
$skaiMaintenanceActive = !empty($skaiMaintenanceState['enabled']);
$skaiMaintenanceMessage = (string)$skaiMaintenanceState['message'];
$skaiMaintenanceAdminBypass = !empty($skaiMaintenanceState['admin_bypass']);
$skaiMaintenanceUser = Factory::getUser();
$skaiMaintenanceIsAdmin = (!$skaiMaintenanceUser->guest && $skaiMaintenanceUser->authorise('core.admin'));

if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST' && (string)$in->getString('skai_maintenance_action', '') !== '') {
    if (!$skaiMaintenanceIsAdmin) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('You are not authorized to change SKAI maintenance status.', 'error');
        $app->redirect(Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        $app->close();
    }
    if (!Session::checkToken('post')) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Your session expired. Please refresh and try again.', 'warning');
        $app->redirect(Uri::getInstance()->toString());
        $app->close();
    }
    $action = strtolower(trim((string)$in->getString('skai_maintenance_action', '')));
    $msg = trim((string)$in->get('skai_maintenance_message', '', 'RAW'));
    $msg = preg_replace('/[
	]+/', ' ', $msg);
    $msg = preg_replace('/\s+/', ' ', $msg);
    $msg = substr($msg, 0, 300);
    if ($msg === '') {
        $msg = 'SKAI is temporarily paused while we complete scheduled maintenance. Please check back shortly.';
    }
    $state = SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_read();
    if ($action === 'enable') {
        $state['enabled'] = 1;
        $state['message'] = $msg;
        $state['admin_bypass'] = ((int)$in->getInt('skai_maintenance_admin_bypass', 1) === 1) ? 1 : 0;
    } elseif ($action === 'disable') {
        $state['enabled'] = 0;
        $state['message'] = $msg;
        $state['admin_bypass'] = ((int)$in->getInt('skai_maintenance_admin_bypass', 1) === 1) ? 1 : 0;
    }
    $state['updated_at'] = gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s');
    $state['updated_by'] = (int)$skaiMaintenanceUser->id;
    SKAI_MAINT_LOCK_write($state);
    $app->enqueueMessage($action === 'enable' ? 'SKAI maintenance lock is ON.' : 'SKAI maintenance lock is OFF.', 'message');
    $app->redirect(Uri::getInstance()->toString());
    $app->close();
}

$skaiMaintenanceBlockCurrentUser = ($skaiMaintenanceActive && (!$skaiMaintenanceIsAdmin || !$skaiMaintenanceAdminBypass));
if ($skaiMaintenanceBlockCurrentUser && $in->getMethod() === 'POST') {
    $isSkaiMutation = ((int)$in->getInt('save_set', 0) === 1)
        || ((string)$in->getString('skai_action', '') !== '')
        || ((int)$in->getInt('batch_save_mode', 0) === 1);
    if ($isSkaiMutation) {
        try {
            $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
            $app->sendHeaders();
        } catch (\Throwable $_skaiMaintHeaderEx) {
            @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
        }
        echo json_encode(array(
            'ok' => false,
            'maintenance' => true,
            'error' => 'skai_maintenance_active',
            'message' => $skaiMaintenanceMessage
        ), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        exit;
    }
}

$doc->addStyleDeclaration(
    '.skai-maintenance-lock-banner{margin:12px 0;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #f59e0b;border-left:5px solid #f59e0b;border-radius:14px;background:#fff7ed;color:#7c2d12;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(124,45,18,0.10);}'
    . '.skai-maintenance-lock-banner strong{display:block;margin:0 0 4px 0;color:#7c2d12;font-weight:900;}'
    . '.skai-maintenance-admin-panel{margin:12px 0;padding:14px 16px;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-left:5px solid #2563eb;border-radius:14px;background:#eff6ff;color:#0f172a;}'
    . '.skai-maintenance-admin-panel textarea{width:100%;min-height:70px;margin:8px 0;padding:10px;border:1px solid #93c5fd;border-radius:10px;}'
    . '.skai-maintenance-admin-panel .skai-maintenance-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;}'
);
$doc->addScriptDeclaration(
    'window.SKAI_MAINTENANCE_MODE=' . ($skaiMaintenanceActive ? 'true' : 'false') . ';'
    . 'window.SKAI_MAINTENANCE_BLOCK_CURRENT_USER=' . ($skaiMaintenanceBlockCurrentUser ? 'true' : 'false') . ';'
    . 'window.SKAI_MAINTENANCE_MESSAGE=' . json_encode($skaiMaintenanceMessage, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE) . ';'
    . "(function(){function ready(fn){if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',fn);}else{fn();}}ready(function(){try{if(!window.SKAI_MAINTENANCE_MODE){return;}var msg=String(window.SKAI_MAINTENANCE_MESSAGE||'SKAI is temporarily paused for maintenance.');var root=document.getElementById('skai')||document.body;var b=document.getElementById('skai-maintenance-lock-banner');if(!b){b=document.createElement('div');b.id='skai-maintenance-lock-banner';b.className='skai-maintenance-lock-banner';b.setAttribute('role','status');b.setAttribute('aria-live','polite');var s=document.createElement('strong');s.appendChild(document.createTextNode('SKAI maintenance is active'));var p=document.createElement('span');p.appendChild(document.createTextNode(msg));b.appendChild(s);b.appendChild(p);if(root&&root.firstChild){root.insertBefore(b,root.firstChild);}else if(root){root.appendChild(b);}}if(!window.SKAI_MAINTENANCE_BLOCK_CURRENT_USER){return;}function block(ev){var t=ev.target||ev.srcElement;if(!t){return;}var hit=t.closest?t.closest('button,a,input[type=submit],form,[data-skai-run],#startPrediction,#skai-batch-launch,#skai-mle-batch-launch,#skai-mle-batch-launch-hero,#skai-ai-submit-save,#skai-submit-save'):null;if(!hit){return;}if(hit.tagName&&hit.tagName.toLowerCase()==='form'){return;}ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();alert(msg);return false;}document.addEventListener('click',block,true);document.addEventListener('submit',function(ev){ev.preventDefault();ev.stopPropagation();alert(msg);return false;},true);var qs='button,input[type=submit],#startPrediction,#skai-batch-launch,#skai-mle-batch-launch,#skai-mle-batch-launch-hero,#skai-ai-submit-save,#skai-submit-save,[data-skai-run]';var nodes=document.querySelectorAll(qs);for(var i=0;i<nodes.length;i++){nodes[i].disabled=true;nodes[i].setAttribute('aria-disabled','true');nodes[i].setAttribute('title',msg);}}catch(e){}});}());"
);

// A11y live region (polite). Output only during normal page renders.
// Do NOT emit this during save/AJAX requests or it contaminates JSON responses.
$skaiIsJsonLikeRequest = (
    $in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && (
        (int)$in->getInt('save_set', 0) === 1
        || (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '') !== ''
    )
);
if (!$skaiIsJsonLikeRequest) {
    echo '<div id="skai-live" class="skai-visually-hidden" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></div>';
    if (!empty($skaiMaintenanceActive)) {
        echo '<div class="skai-maintenance-lock-banner" role="status" aria-live="polite"><strong>SKAI maintenance is active</strong><span>' . htmlspecialchars($skaiMaintenanceMessage, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '</span></div>';
    }
    if (!empty($skaiMaintenanceIsAdmin)) {
        echo '<div class="skai-maintenance-admin-panel" role="region" aria-label="SKAI maintenance controls">';
        echo '<strong>Admin Only - SKAI Run Maintenance Lock</strong>';
        echo '<p style="margin:6px 0 8px 0;">Use this emergency switch to pause SKAI runs and saves while maintenance or data-integrity work is in progress.</p>';
        echo '<form method="post" action="' . htmlspecialchars(Uri::getInstance()->toString(), ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '">';
        echo '<label for="skai-maintenance-message"><strong>User message</strong></label>';
        echo '<textarea id="skai-maintenance-message" name="skai_maintenance_message">' . htmlspecialchars($skaiMaintenanceMessage, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_SUBSTITUTE, 'UTF-8') . '</textarea>';
        echo '<label style="display:block;margin:6px 0;"><input type="checkbox" name="skai_maintenance_admin_bypass" value="1" ' . (!empty($skaiMaintenanceAdminBypass) ? 'checked="checked"' : '') . '> Allow Super Users to bypass the maintenance lock for testing</label>';
        echo '<div class="skai-maintenance-actions">';
        echo '<button type="submit" name="skai_maintenance_action" value="enable" class="skai-btn skai-btn--primary">Turn SKAI Maintenance ON</button>';
        echo '<button type="submit" name="skai_maintenance_action" value="disable" class="skai-btn">Turn SKAI Maintenance OFF</button>';
        echo '<span>Status: <strong>' . (!empty($skaiMaintenanceActive) ? 'ON' : 'OFF') . '</strong></span>';
        echo '</div>';
        echo HTMLHelper::_('form.token');
        echo '</form></div>';
    }
}

/* SKAI: Access-control helper - determine if current user is allowed for this game */
$currUser   = Factory::getUser();
$userGroups = $currUser->groups ?? [];

// Current lottery game identifier (e.g. '801' = EuroMillions, '101' = FL3, 'AZ2' = Pick2).
// Support all URL param styles: game_id (snake_case), gameId (camelCase), gid (legacy short).
// Keep as string -- game_id is a string identifier ('FL3', '801'); casting to int loses 'FL3'.
// This variable is reassigned from the canonical config value at line ~10031 (after config loads).
$gameIdRaw = $in->getString('game_id', '');
if ($gameIdRaw === '') { $gameIdRaw = $in->getString('gameId', ''); }
if ($gameIdRaw === '') { $gameIdRaw = $in->getString('gid', ''); }
// Sanitize game_id at input boundary: allow only alphanumeric, hyphen, underscore, and dot.
// This preserves all valid identifiers (e.g. 'FL3', '801', 'AZ2', 'euro-millions') while
// rejecting any character that could contribute to injection in SQL, HTML, JS, or URL contexts.
$gameIdRaw = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_\.]/', '', substr((string)$gameIdRaw, 0, 50));
$gameId = $gameIdRaw; // string; do NOT cast to int here


// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_MLE_BATCH_BRIDGE]] MyLottoExpert recommended 9-run batch loader
// ------------------------------------------------------------------------
// When MyLottoExpert opens SKAI with ?mle_skai_batch=1&batch_id=###,
// SKAI loads the exact 9 saved batch runs from the MyLottoExpert batch
// tables for the logged-in user. This is the server-side source of truth
// when browser storage is not available after a redirect.
// ========================================================================
$skaiMleServerBatchPayload = null;
$skaiMleServerBatchStatus = array('requested' => false, 'guided_requested' => false, 'batch_id' => 0, 'loaded' => false, 'reason' => 'not_requested', 'row_count' => 0, 'required_action' => '', 'warning_message' => '');
try {
    $skaiMleGuidedMode = strtolower(trim((string)$in->getCmd('mle_guided_mode', '')));
    $skaiMleRequiredAction = strtolower(trim((string)$in->getCmd('mle_required_action', '')));
    $skaiMleBatchId = (int)$in->getInt('batch_id', 0);
    $skaiMleLotteryId = (int)$in->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
    $skaiMleBatchRequested = ((int)$in->getInt('mle_skai_batch', 0) === 1) || ($skaiMleBatchId > 0 && $skaiMleGuidedMode === 'required');
    $skaiMleGuidedRequested = ($skaiMleBatchId > 0 && $skaiMleGuidedMode === 'required');
    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['requested'] = (bool)$skaiMleBatchRequested;
    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['guided_requested'] = (bool)$skaiMleGuidedRequested;
    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['batch_id'] = (int)$skaiMleBatchId;
    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['required_action'] = (string)$skaiMleRequiredAction;
    if ($skaiMleBatchRequested) { $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'requested'; }
    if ($skaiMleBatchRequested && $skaiMleBatchId > 0 && !$currUser->guest) {
        $skaiMleDb = Factory::getDbo();
        $skaiMlePrefix = $skaiMleDb->getPrefix();
        $skaiMleHeaderRaw = $skaiMlePrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
        $skaiMleRunRaw = $skaiMlePrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
        $skaiMleTables = $skaiMleDb->getTableList();
        if (in_array($skaiMleHeaderRaw, $skaiMleTables, true) && in_array($skaiMleRunRaw, $skaiMleTables, true)) {
            $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'tables_found';
            $skaiMleHq = $skaiMleDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($skaiMleDb->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
                ->where($skaiMleDb->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiMleBatchId)
                ->where($skaiMleDb->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$currUser->id)
                ->setLimit(1);
            $skaiMleDb->setQuery($skaiMleHq);
            $skaiMleHeader = $skaiMleDb->loadAssoc();
            // [[MLE_BATCH_LOTTERY_GUARD]] Reject batch if its lottery_id does not match the
            // current page lottery_id supplied in the URL. This prevents a batch that belongs
            // to one lottery (e.g. Washington Hit 5, batch_id=59) from being loaded and used
            // on a SKAI session for a different lottery (e.g. Florida Fantasy 5).
            if (is_array($skaiMleHeader) && !empty($skaiMleHeader)) {
                $skaiMleHeaderLotIdCheck = (int)($skaiMleHeader['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                if ($skaiMleLotteryId > 0 && $skaiMleHeaderLotIdCheck > 0 && $skaiMleHeaderLotIdCheck !== $skaiMleLotteryId) {
                    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'lottery_id_mismatch';
                    $skaiMleHeader = null;
                }
            }
            if (is_array($skaiMleHeader) && !empty($skaiMleHeader)) {
                $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'header_found';
                // Header ownership above is the primary security gate. Child rows are
                // additionally validated below: user_id must match when present, batch_id
                // and lottery_id must be consistent, and legacy rows (user_id=0) are
                // allowed only when batch and lottery context match the header.
                $skaiMleRq = $skaiMleDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('*')
                    ->from($skaiMleDb->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                    ->where($skaiMleDb->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiMleBatchId)
                    ->order($skaiMleDb->quoteName('run_order') . ' ASC')
                    ->setLimit(9);
                $skaiMleDb->setQuery($skaiMleRq);
                $skaiMleRows = $skaiMleDb->loadAssocList();
                $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['row_count'] = is_array($skaiMleRows) ? count($skaiMleRows) : 0;
                $skaiMleChildInvalid = '';
                $skaiMleHeaderLotId = (int)($skaiMleHeader['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                if (is_array($skaiMleRows)) {
                    foreach ($skaiMleRows as $skaiMleValidRow) {
                        $skaiMleRowBatchId  = (int)($skaiMleValidRow['batch_id'] ?? 0);
                        $skaiMleRowLotId    = (int)($skaiMleValidRow['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                        $skaiMleRowUserRaw  = trim((string)($skaiMleValidRow['user_id'] ?? ''));
                        $skaiMleRowUserId   = ($skaiMleRowUserRaw === '') ? 0 : (int)$skaiMleRowUserRaw;
                        if ($skaiMleRowUserId > 0) {
                            if ($skaiMleRowUserId !== (int)$currUser->id) {
                                $skaiMleChildInvalid = 'child_user_mismatch';
                                break;
                            }
                            if ($skaiMleRowBatchId > 0 && $skaiMleRowBatchId !== (int)$skaiMleBatchId) {
                                $skaiMleChildInvalid = 'child_batch_mismatch';
                                break;
                            }
                            if ($skaiMleRowLotId > 0 && $skaiMleHeaderLotId > 0 && $skaiMleRowLotId !== $skaiMleHeaderLotId) {
                                $skaiMleChildInvalid = 'child_lottery_mismatch';
                                break;
                            }
                        } else {
                            $skaiMleLegacyOk = ($skaiMleRowBatchId > 0 && $skaiMleRowBatchId === (int)$skaiMleBatchId);
                            if ($skaiMleLegacyOk && $skaiMleHeaderLotId > 0 && $skaiMleRowLotId > 0 && $skaiMleRowLotId !== $skaiMleHeaderLotId) {
                                $skaiMleLegacyOk = false;
                            }
                            if (!$skaiMleLegacyOk) {
                                $skaiMleChildInvalid = 'legacy_child_context_failed';
                                break;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
                if ($skaiMleChildInvalid !== '') {
                    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = $skaiMleChildInvalid;
                } elseif (is_array($skaiMleRows) && count($skaiMleRows) >= 9) {
                    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'runs_found';
                    $skaiMleRows = array_slice($skaiMleRows, 0, 9);
                    $skaiMleRuns = array();
                    foreach ($skaiMleRows as $skaiMleRunRow) {
                        $skaiMleSettings = array();
                        $skaiMleRawSettings = (string)($skaiMleRunRow['full_settings_json'] ?? '');
                        if ($skaiMleRawSettings !== '') {
                            $skaiMleDecoded = json_decode($skaiMleRawSettings, true);
                            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($skaiMleDecoded)) {
                                $skaiMleSettings = $skaiMleDecoded;
                            }
                        }
                        $skaiMleRuns[] = array(
                            'batch_run_id' => (int)($skaiMleRunRow['id'] ?? 0),
                            'run_order' => (int)($skaiMleRunRow['run_order'] ?? 0),
                            'label' => (string)($skaiMleRunRow['run_name'] ?? ('Recommended Run ' . (int)($skaiMleRunRow['run_order'] ?? 0))),
                            'profile' => (string)($skaiMleSettings['profile'] ?? $skaiMleSettings['risk_profile'] ?? $skaiMleSettings['training_style'] ?? 'balanced'),
                            'strategy' => (string)($skaiMleSettings['strategy'] ?? $skaiMleSettings['skai_mode_method'] ?? 'hybrid'),
                            'is_control' => (int)($skaiMleRunRow['is_control'] ?? 0),
                            'test_variable' => (string)($skaiMleRunRow['test_variable'] ?? ''),
                            'test_value' => (string)($skaiMleRunRow['test_value'] ?? ''),
                            'settings' => $skaiMleSettings,
                        );
                    }
                    $skaiMleServerBatchPayload = array(
                        'schema' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch_v1',
                        'source' => 'mylottoexpert_server_bridge',
                        'created_at' => time(),
                        'batch_id' => (int)$skaiMleBatchId,
                        'lottery_id' => (int)($skaiMleHeader['lottery_id'] ?? 0),
                        'game_id' => (string)$gameId,
                        'lottery_name' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['lottery_name'] ?? ''),
                        'batch_name' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['batch_name'] ?? ''),
                        'batch_type' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['batch_type'] ?? 'MyLottoExpert Recommended SKAI Batch'),
                        'test_variable' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['test_variable'] ?? ''),
                        'range_min' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['range_min'] ?? ''),
                        'range_max' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['range_max'] ?? ''),
                        'recommended_value' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['recommended_value'] ?? ''),
                        'recommendation_level' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['recommendation_level'] ?? ''),
                        'precision_progress_level' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['precision_progress_level'] ?? ''),
                        'precision_lock_stage' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['precision_lock_stage'] ?? ''),
                        'evidence_summary' => (string)($skaiMleHeader['evidence_summary'] ?? ''),
                        'runs' => $skaiMleRuns,
                    );
                    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['loaded'] = true;
                    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'loaded';
                } else {
                    if ($skaiMleGuidedRequested) {
                        $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'incomplete_guided_batch';
                        $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['warning_message'] = 'The requested guided batch is incomplete and cannot be loaded safely. Please return to MyLottoExpert and create/open a fresh tracked 9-run batch.';
                    } else {
                        $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'run_count_not_9';
                    }
                }
            } else {
                $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'header_not_found_for_user';
            }
        } else {
            $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'batch_tables_missing';
        }
    } elseif ($skaiMleBatchRequested && $skaiMleBatchId <= 0) {
        $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'missing_batch_id';
    } elseif ($skaiMleBatchRequested && $currUser->guest) {
        $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'guest_user';
    }
} catch (\Throwable $skaiMleBridgeEx) {
    $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['reason'] = 'exception';
    error_log('[SKAI_MLE_BATCH_BRIDGE] Could not load MyLottoExpert batch: ' . $skaiMleBridgeEx->getMessage());
    $skaiMleServerBatchPayload = null;
}
if (!empty($skaiMleServerBatchStatus['guided_requested']) && empty($skaiMleServerBatchStatus['loaded'])) {
    if (empty($skaiMleServerBatchStatus['warning_message'])) {
        $skaiMleServerBatchStatus['warning_message'] = 'The requested guided batch was not loaded. Please return to MyLottoExpert and open a tracked 9-run batch again.';
    }
    try { Factory::getApplication()->enqueueMessage((string)$skaiMleServerBatchStatus['warning_message'], 'warning'); } catch (\Throwable $skaiMleWarnEx) { }
}
try {
    $doc->addScriptDeclaration('window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD = ' . json_encode($skaiMleServerBatchPayload, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) . '; window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS = ' . json_encode($skaiMleServerBatchStatus, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) . ';');
} catch (\Throwable $skaiMleDocEx) { }

// [[SKAI_MLE_RECOMMENDED_BATCH_BREATHING_BUTTON]]
// Only the currently visible recommended batch action should breathe.
// MyLottoExpert guided batch has priority. If no guided batch is loaded, the
// regular SKAI 9-combo batch button breathes when it is the active recommended action.
try {
    $doc->addScriptDeclaration(
        "(function(){"
        . "function skaiMleIsVisible(el){"
        . "if(!el){return false;}"
        . "var cs=window.getComputedStyle?window.getComputedStyle(el):null;"
        . "if(cs&&(cs.display==='none'||cs.visibility==='hidden'||cs.opacity==='0')){return false;}"
        . "return !!(el.offsetWidth||el.offsetHeight||el.getClientRects().length);"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleIsUsableButton(el){"
        . "if(!skaiMleIsVisible(el)){return false;}"
        . "if(el.disabled){return false;}"
        . "if(String(el.getAttribute('aria-disabled')||'').toLowerCase()==='true'){return false;}"
        . "if(String(el.className||'').indexOf('disabled')!==-1){return false;}"
        . "if(String(el.className||'').indexOf('skai-mle-action-started')!==-1){return false;}"
        . "return true;"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleRemoveRecommendedClass(el){"
        . "if(!el){return;}"
        . "el.className=String(el.className||'').replace(/\\bskai-mle-recommended-action\\b/g,'').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').replace(/^\\s+|\\s+$/g,'');"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleButtonStarted(el,label){"
        . "if(!el){return;}"
        . "skaiMleRemoveRecommendedClass(el);"
        . "if(String(el.className||'').indexOf('skai-mle-action-started')===-1){el.className=(String(el.className||'')+' skai-mle-action-started').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').replace(/^\\s+|\\s+$/g,'');}"
        . "if(!el.getAttribute('data-skai-original-label')){el.setAttribute('data-skai-original-label',String(el.textContent||''));}"
        . "if(label){el.textContent=label;}"
        . "el.setAttribute('aria-label',label||'Recommended batch has been started. SKAI is running.');"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleBindStartedState(){"
        . "if(window.__skaiMleRecommendedStartedBound){return;}"
        . "window.__skaiMleRecommendedStartedBound=true;"
        . "document.addEventListener('click',function(e){"
        . "var t=e.target||e.srcElement;"
        . "while(t&&t!==document){"
        . "if(t.id==='skai-mle-batch-launch-hero'||t.id==='skai-mle-batch-launch'){skaiMleButtonStarted(t,'Starting MyLottoExpert recommended batch...');return;}"
        . "if(t.id==='skai-batch-launch'){skaiMleButtonStarted(t,'Starting SKAI 9-combo batch...');return;}"
        . "t=t.parentNode;"
        . "}"
        . "},true);"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleRemoveBySelector(sel){"
        . "var list=document.querySelectorAll?document.querySelectorAll(sel):[];"
        . "var i;"
        . "for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){skaiMleRemoveRecommendedClass(list[i]);}"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleFirstUsableBySelector(sel){"
        . "var list=document.querySelectorAll?document.querySelectorAll(sel):[];"
        . "var i;"
        . "for(i=0;i<list.length;i++){if(skaiMleIsUsableButton(list[i])){return list[i];}}"
        . "return null;"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleApplyRecommendedClass(target,label){"
        . "if(!target){return;}"
        . "target.className=(String(target.className||'')+' skai-mle-recommended-action').replace(/\\s+/g,' ').replace(/^\\s+|\\s+$/g,'');"
        . "target.setAttribute('aria-label',label);"
        . "}"
        . "function skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton(){"
        . "var status=window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS||{};"
        . "var target=null;"
        . "skaiMleRemoveBySelector('#skai-mle-batch-launch-hero,#skai-mle-batch-launch,#skai-batch-launch');"
        . "if(status.loaded){"
        . "target=skaiMleFirstUsableBySelector('#skai-mle-batch-launch-hero,#skai-mle-batch-launch');"
        . "skaiMleApplyRecommendedClass(target,'Recommended MyLottoExpert batch action. Press this button to run the required guided 9-run batch.');"
        . "return;"
        . "}"
        . "target=skaiMleFirstUsableBySelector('#skai-batch-launch');"
        . "skaiMleApplyRecommendedClass(target,'Recommended SKAI batch action. Press this button to run the regular 9-combo batch.');"
        . "}"
        . "skaiMleBindStartedState();"
        . "if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){skaiMleBindStartedState();skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton();});}"
        . "else{skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton();}"
        . "window.setTimeout(skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton,500);"
        . "window.setTimeout(skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton,1500);"
        . "window.setTimeout(skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton,3000);"
        . "window.setInterval(skaiMleMarkRecommendedButton,2500);"
        . "})();"
    );
} catch (\Throwable $skaiMleBreathingEx) { }




// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_INTAKE_V1]]
// Automatic observed Hive intake for every successful SKAI save.
// This creates bounded Hive audit evidence for normal user and admin SKAI saves
// without requiring an admin page load. It is additive and non-fatal.
// ========================================================================
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText')) {
    function SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($value, $maxLen = 191) {
        $value = trim((string)$value);
        $value = preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/', '', $value);
        if ($maxLen > 0 && strlen($value) > $maxLen) { $value = substr($value, 0, $maxLen); }
        return $value;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_colExists')) {
    function SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_colExists($db, $rawTable, $col) {
        try {
            $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable) . ' AND COLUMN_NAME = ' . $db->quote($col));
            return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureCol')) {
    function SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureCol($db, $rawTable, $col, $definition) {
        try {
            if (!SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_colExists($db, $rawTable, $col)) {
                $db->setQuery('ALTER TABLE `' . str_replace('`', '', $rawTable) . '` ADD COLUMN `' . str_replace('`', '', $col) . '` ' . $definition);
                $db->execute();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[SKAI AUTO HIVE] add column failed ' . $col . ': ' . $e->getMessage()); }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureSchema')) {
    function SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureSchema($db) {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $queueRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        try {
            $db->setQuery("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$queueRaw}` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `campaign_uuid` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `campaign_label` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `lottery_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `target_draw_date` DATE DEFAULT NULL, `research_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'saved_waiting_for_draw', `research_type` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'observed_skai_save', `setting_family` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `setting_key` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `control_value` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `test_values_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `hold_constant_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `settings_fingerprint` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `settings_fingerprint_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `setting_fingerprint_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `priority_score` DECIMAL(12,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000, `assignment_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `max_assignments` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `replication_needed` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `created_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `assigned_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `scored_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `last_reconciled_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `result_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `result_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_auto_hive_fp` (`settings_fingerprint`), KEY `idx_auto_hive_game` (`game_id`,`target_draw_date`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci");
            $db->execute();
            $db->setQuery("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$assignRaw}` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `queue_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `user_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `lottery_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `batch_uuid` VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `batch_header_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `assigned_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'saved_waiting_for_draw', `assigned_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `opened_in_skai_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `assignment_settings_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `assignment_settings_fingerprint` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `saved_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `scored_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `completed_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `last_reconciled_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `result_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `result_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `runner_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `runner_started_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `runner_saved_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `runner_message` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_auto_hive_queue` (`queue_id`), KEY `idx_auto_hive_user_game` (`user_id`,`game_id`), KEY `idx_auto_hive_batch` (`batch_uuid`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci");
            $db->execute();
            $queueCols = array('campaign_uuid'=>"VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'campaign_label'=>"VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'lottery_id'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'game_id'=>"VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'target_draw_date'=>"DATE DEFAULT NULL", 'research_status'=>"VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'saved_waiting_for_draw'", 'research_type'=>"VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'observed_skai_save'", 'setting_family'=>"VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'setting_key'=>"VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'control_value'=>"VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'test_values_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'hold_constant_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'settings_fingerprint'=>"VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'settings_fingerprint_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'setting_fingerprint_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'priority_score'=>"DECIMAL(12,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000", 'assignment_count'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'max_assignments'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'replication_needed'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'created_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'assigned_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'scored_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'last_reconciled_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'result_status'=>"VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'result_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL");
            foreach ($queueCols as $c => $d) { SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureCol($db, $queueRaw, $c, $d); }
            $assignCols = array('queue_id'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'user_id'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'lottery_id'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'game_id'=>"VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'batch_uuid'=>"VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'batch_header_id'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'assigned_status'=>"VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'saved_waiting_for_draw'", 'assigned_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'opened_in_skai_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'assignment_settings_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'assignment_settings_fingerprint'=>"VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'saved_count'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'scored_count'=>"INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0", 'completed_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'last_reconciled_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'result_status'=>"VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'result_json'=>"MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'runner_status'=>"VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''", 'runner_started_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'runner_saved_at'=>"DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL", 'runner_message'=>"VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
            foreach ($assignCols as $c => $d) { SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureCol($db, $assignRaw, $c, $d); }
            return true;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[SKAI AUTO HIVE] schema ensure failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); return false; }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_afterSave')) {
    function SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_afterSave($db, array $payload) {
        $out = array('ok'=>false,'queue_id'=>0,'assignment_id'=>0,'reason'=>'not_started');
        try {
            $savedRowId = (int)($payload['saved_row_id'] ?? 0);
            $userId = (int)($payload['user_id'] ?? 0);
            $lotteryId = (int)($payload['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
            $gameId = SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['game_id'] ?? '', 50);
            $drawDate = SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['target_draw_date'] ?? '', 10);
            if ($drawDate !== '' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $drawDate)) { $drawDate = ''; }
            $runUuid = SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['run_uuid'] ?? '', 80);
            $batchUuid = SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['batch_uuid'] ?? '', 128);
            if ($batchUuid === '') { $batchUuid = $runUuid !== '' ? 'run-' . $runUuid : 'saved-row-' . $savedRowId; }
            $settingKey = SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['setting_key'] ?? 'complete_settings_snapshot', 128);
            $settingsJson = (string)($payload['settings_json'] ?? '');
            if ($savedRowId <= 0 || $userId <= 0 || ($lotteryId <= 0 && $gameId === '')) { $out['reason'] = 'missing_required_identity'; return $out; }
            if (!SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_ensureSchema($db)) { $out['reason'] = 'schema_unavailable'; return $out; }
            $now = gmdate('Y-m-d H:i:s');
            $fpPayload = array('version'=>'skai_auto_hive_v1','saved_row_id'=>$savedRowId,'user_id'=>$userId,'lottery_id'=>$lotteryId,'game_id'=>$gameId,'target_draw_date'=>$drawDate,'run_uuid'=>$runUuid,'batch_uuid'=>$batchUuid,'setting_key'=>$settingKey,'settings_hash'=>hash('sha256',$settingsJson));
            $fpJson = json_encode($fpPayload, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            $fingerprint = hash('sha256', (string)$fpJson);
            $resultJson = json_encode(array('version'=>'skai_auto_hive_v1','source_table'=>'user_saved_numbers','saved_row_id'=>$savedRowId,'run_uuid'=>$runUuid,'batch_uuid'=>$batchUuid,'saved_count'=>1,'scored_count'=>0,'contract_status'=>SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['hive_contract_status'] ?? '',64),'intake_mode'=>SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_safeText($payload['hive_intake_mode'] ?? '',64)), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($db->quoteName('id'))->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))->where($db->quoteName('settings_fingerprint') . ' = ' . $db->quote($fingerprint))->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
            $db->setQuery($q, 0, 1);
            $queueId = (int)$db->loadResult();
            if ($queueId <= 0) {
                $cols = array('campaign_uuid','campaign_label','lottery_id','game_id','target_draw_date','research_status','research_type','setting_family','setting_key','control_value','test_values_json','hold_constant_json','settings_fingerprint','settings_fingerprint_json','setting_fingerprint_json','priority_score','assignment_count','max_assignments','replication_needed','created_at','assigned_at','scored_at','last_reconciled_at','result_status','result_json');
                $vals = array($db->quote('skai-auto-hive-' . substr($fingerprint,0,16)), $db->quote('Observed SKAI save'), (int)$lotteryId, $db->quote($gameId), $drawDate !== '' ? $db->quote($drawDate) : 'NULL', $db->quote('saved_waiting_for_draw'), $db->quote('observed_skai_save'), $db->quote('observed_saved_activity'), $db->quote($settingKey), $db->quote(''), $db->quote(json_encode(array(), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)), $db->quote(json_encode(array('source'=>'skai_auto_hive','intake'=>'v1'), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES)), $db->quote($fingerprint), $db->quote((string)$fpJson), $db->quote((string)$fpJson), $db->quote('25.0000'), 1, 1, 0, $db->quote($now), $db->quote($now), 'NULL', $db->quote($now), $db->quote('waiting_for_draw'), $db->quote((string)$resultJson));
                $db->setQuery($db->getQuery(true)->insert($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))->columns(array_map(array($db,'quoteName'),$cols))->values(implode(',',$vals)));
                $db->execute();
                $queueId = (int)$db->insertid();
            }
            if ($queueId <= 0) { $out['reason'] = 'queue_not_created'; return $out; }
            $q2 = $db->getQuery(true)->select($db->quoteName('id'))->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'))->where($db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' = ' . (int)$queueId)->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$userId)->where($db->quoteName('batch_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($batchUuid))->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
            $db->setQuery($q2, 0, 1);
            $assignmentId = (int)$db->loadResult();
            if ($assignmentId > 0) {
                $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = GREATEST(COALESCE(' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ',0),1), ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('saved_waiting_for_draw') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('last_reconciled_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now) . ', ' . $db->quoteName('result_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('waiting_for_draw') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('result_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$resultJson) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$assignmentId);
                $db->execute();
            } else {
                $cols = array('queue_id','user_id','lottery_id','game_id','batch_uuid','batch_header_id','assigned_status','assigned_at','opened_in_skai_at','assignment_settings_json','assignment_settings_fingerprint','saved_count','scored_count','completed_at','last_reconciled_at','result_status','result_json','runner_status','runner_started_at','runner_saved_at','runner_message');
                $vals = array((int)$queueId,(int)$userId,(int)$lotteryId,$db->quote($gameId),$db->quote($batchUuid),0,$db->quote('saved_waiting_for_draw'),$db->quote($now),$db->quote($now),$db->quote($settingsJson),$db->quote($fingerprint),1,0,'NULL',$db->quote($now),$db->quote('waiting_for_draw'),$db->quote((string)$resultJson),$db->quote('observed'),'NULL',$db->quote($now),$db->quote('Automatic SKAI save intake recorded.'));
                $db->setQuery($db->getQuery(true)->insert($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments'))->columns(array_map(array($db,'quoteName'),$cols))->values(implode(',',$vals)));
                $db->execute();
                $assignmentId = (int)$db->insertid();
            }
            $out['ok'] = true; $out['queue_id'] = (int)$queueId; $out['assignment_id'] = (int)$assignmentId; $out['settings_fingerprint'] = (string)$fingerprint; $out['reason'] = 'recorded';
            return $out;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[SKAI AUTO HIVE] after-save intake failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); $out['reason']='exception'; return $out; }
    }
}

// Public games where guests can use SKAI (game IDs as strings for strict compare)
$publicGameIds = [];

// Master switch:
//   true  = SKAI is members-only (group 14 only, no public games for guests)
//   false = Guests can use SKAI on games in $publicGameIds, members on all.
$skaiMembersOnly = false;

// Is this game publicly accessible for guests?
$isPublicGame = in_array((string) $gameId, $publicGameIds, false);

// Configure which Joomla groups are allowed to use SKAI for *any* game.
// 14 = LottoExpert paid / full member group.
$allowedGroups = [14, 8];

if ($currUser->guest) {
    if ($skaiMembersOnly) {
        // Members-only mode: guests are never allowed.
        $userIsInAllowedGroup = false; // FIX: guests blocked when members-only is enabled
    } else {
        // Mixed mode: guests allowed only on explicitly public games.
        $userIsInAllowedGroup = $isPublicGame;
    }
} else {

    if ($skaiMembersOnly) {
        // Members-only mode: user must be in allowed group(s) (e.g. 14).
        $userIsInAllowedGroup = !empty(array_intersect($allowedGroups, $userGroups));
    } else {
        // Mixed mode: allowed if game is public OR user is in allowed group(s).
        $userIsInAllowedGroup =
            $isPublicGame || !empty(array_intersect($allowedGroups, $userGroups));
    }
}


// Flag: who can USE SKAI features on this page (run analysis, see results)
$skaiUsable = (bool) $userIsInAllowedGroup;
// Flag: who can SAVE to "My LottoExpert"
// Paid members in allowedGroups may save.
// Super Users / core.admin may also save even if they are not in group 14.
$skaiCanAdminSave = !$currUser->guest && $currUser->authorise('core.admin');
$saveable = !$currUser->guest && (
    $skaiCanAdminSave || !empty(array_intersect($allowedGroups, $userGroups))
);

// Conversion UI flags: render the full SKAI experience for non-members, but keep premium actions locked.
$skaiCanRun = (bool) $skaiUsable;
$skaiCanSave = (bool) $saveable;
if (!empty($skaiMaintenanceBlockCurrentUser)) {
    $skaiCanRun = false;
    $skaiCanSave = false;
    $saveable = false;
}
$skaiFullPreviewMode = !$skaiCanRun;
$skaiUiVisible = ($skaiCanRun || $skaiFullPreviewMode);

// Flag: enable the Generate 9-Run Batch button.
// Set to true to allow all eligible users to run the batch.
// Set to false to disable it for everyone (shows "Temporarily unavailable" notice).
// Admins (core.admin) can always run the batch regardless of this flag.
$skaiBatchEnabled = true;
$skaiIsAdmin = !$currUser->guest && $currUser->authorise('core.admin');
$skaiBatchAvailable = $skaiBatchEnabled || $skaiIsAdmin;


// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_V158_SKAI_OWNED_HIVE_RESEARCH_RUNNER_SERVER]] [[SKAI_V159_STRICT_JSON_REPAIR]]
// Admin-only server endpoints that let SKAI own the Hive research queue runner.
// MyLottoExpert creates/reports queues. SKAI claims queued assignments, runs them
// through the native batch save path, and records assignment status directly.
// ========================================================================
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_isAdminUser')) {
    function SKAI_V158_isAdminUser($user): bool {
        try { return is_object($user) && method_exists($user, 'authorise') && $user->authorise('core.admin'); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_json')) {
    function SKAI_V158_json(array $payload) {
        // [[SKAI_V159_STRICT_JSON_REPAIR]]
        // The research runner uses AJAX. Any PHP notice, template fragment, Joomla
        // message, or accidental whitespace before json_encode makes the browser
        // report bad_json. Clear buffered output before returning the payload so the
        // client receives only valid JSON.
        try {
            while (ob_get_level() > 0) { @ob_clean(); @ob_end_clean(); }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* output buffer cleanup is best effort */ }
        try {
            $app = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
            $app->setHeader('Content-Type','application/json; charset=utf-8',true);
            $app->setHeader('Cache-Control','no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0',true);
            $app->sendHeaders();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
        $json = json_encode($payload, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        if ($json === false || $json === '') { $json = '{"ok":false,"error":"json_encode_failed"}'; }
        echo $json;
        exit;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_colExists')) {
    function SKAI_V158_colExists($db, $rawTable, $col): bool {
        try { $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable) . ' AND COLUMN_NAME = ' . $db->quote($col)); return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_indexExists')) {
    function SKAI_V158_indexExists($db, $rawTable, $idx): bool {
        try { $db->setQuery('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.STATISTICS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = ' . $db->quote($rawTable) . ' AND INDEX_NAME = ' . $db->quote($idx)); return ((int)$db->loadResult() > 0); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { return false; }
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_ensureSchema')) {
    function SKAI_V158_ensureSchema($db): bool {
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $queueRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_queue';
        $assignRaw = $prefix . 'mle_lottery_research_assignments';
        $safe = function($raw, $col, $sql) use ($db) { try { if (!SKAI_V158_colExists($db, $raw, $col)) { $db->setQuery($sql); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[SKAI V158] schema add failed ' . $col . ': ' . $e->getMessage()); } };
        try { $db->setQuery("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$queueRaw}` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `campaign_uuid` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `campaign_label` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `lottery_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `target_draw_date` DATE DEFAULT NULL, `research_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'assigned', `research_type` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `admin_runner_mode` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `assignment_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `max_assignments` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `created_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_skai_v158_campaign` (`campaign_uuid`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        try { $db->setQuery("CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$assignRaw}` (`id` INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `queue_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `lottery_id` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `assigned_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'assigned', `assigned_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `assignment_settings_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `assignment_settings_fingerprint` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `runner_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `runner_started_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `runner_saved_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, `runner_message` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `runner_result_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL, `saved_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `completed_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_skai_v158_queue` (`queue_id`), KEY `idx_skai_v158_runner` (`runner_status`,`assigned_status`)) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        $safe($queueRaw, 'campaign_uuid', "ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD COLUMN `campaign_uuid` VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `id`");
        $safe($queueRaw, 'campaign_label', "ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD COLUMN `campaign_label` VARCHAR(191) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' AFTER `campaign_uuid`");
        $safe($queueRaw, 'admin_runner_mode', "ALTER TABLE `{$queueRaw}` ADD COLUMN `admin_runner_mode` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'assignment_settings_json', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `assignment_settings_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'assignment_settings_fingerprint', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `assignment_settings_fingerprint` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'runner_status', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_status` VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'runner_started_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_started_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'runner_saved_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_saved_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'runner_message', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_message` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'runner_result_json', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `runner_result_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'saved_count', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `saved_count` INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0");
        $safe($assignRaw, 'completed_at', "ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD COLUMN `completed_at` DATETIME NULL DEFAULT NULL");
        try { if (!SKAI_V158_indexExists($db, $assignRaw, 'idx_skai_v158_runner2')) { $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$assignRaw}` ADD KEY `idx_skai_v158_runner2` (`runner_status`,`assigned_status`)"); $db->execute(); } } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
        return true;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_campaignSummary')) {
    function SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($db, $campaignUuid): array {
        SKAI_V158_ensureSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)$campaignUuid);
        $out = ['campaign_uuid'=>$campaignUuid,'assignments'=>0,'saved'=>0,'running'=>0,'failed'=>0,'queued'=>0,'game_id'=>'','target_draw_date'=>'','campaign_label'=>''];
        if ($campaignUuid === '') { return $out; }
        try {
            $sql = 'SELECT q.campaign_uuid, MAX(q.campaign_label) AS campaign_label, MAX(q.game_id) AS game_id, MAX(q.target_draw_date) AS target_draw_date, COUNT(a.id) AS assignments, '
                 . 'SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('saved') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS saved, '
                 . 'SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('running') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS running, '
                 . 'SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status = ' . $db->quote('failed') . ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failed, '
                 . 'SUM(CASE WHEN a.runner_status IN (' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('') . ') OR a.runner_status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS queued '
                 . 'FROM ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue','q') . ' INNER JOIN ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments','a') . ' ON a.queue_id = q.id WHERE q.campaign_uuid = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid) . ' GROUP BY q.campaign_uuid';
            $db->setQuery($sql); $row = $db->loadAssoc(); if (is_array($row)) { $out = array_merge($out, $row); }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { error_log('[SKAI V158] summary failed: ' . $e->getMessage()); }
        foreach (['assignments','saved','running','failed','queued'] as $k) { $out[$k] = (int)($out[$k] ?? 0); }
        return $out;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_recentLedger')) {
    function SKAI_V158_recentLedger($db, $campaignUuid, $limit = 30): array {
        SKAI_V158_ensureSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)$campaignUuid);
        $limit = max(1, min(100, (int)$limit));
        $rows = [];
        if ($campaignUuid === '') { return $rows; }
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select([
                    'a.id AS assignment_id',
                    'a.queue_id',
                    'a.game_id',
                    'a.assigned_status',
                    'a.runner_status',
                    'a.runner_started_at',
                    'a.runner_saved_at',
                    'a.completed_at',
                    'a.runner_message',
                    'a.assignment_settings_fingerprint',
                    'a.runner_result_json',
                    'q.campaign_uuid',
                    'q.campaign_label',
                    'q.target_draw_date'
                ])
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a'))
                ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
                ->where('q.' . $db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid))
                ->where('(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' <> ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR a.' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('running') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('failed') . '))')
                ->order('a.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                ->setLimit($limit);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $rawRows = $db->loadAssocList();
            if (!is_array($rawRows)) { return []; }
            foreach ($rawRows as $r) {
                $result = [];
                if (!empty($r['runner_result_json'])) {
                    $decoded = json_decode((string)$r['runner_result_json'], true);
                    if (is_array($decoded)) { $result = $decoded; }
                }
                $main = [];
                $extra = [];
                if (isset($result['main_numbers']) && is_array($result['main_numbers'])) { $main = array_slice(array_map('intval', $result['main_numbers']), 0, 12); }
                if (isset($result['extra_numbers']) && is_array($result['extra_numbers'])) { $extra = array_slice(array_map('intval', $result['extra_numbers']), 0, 6); }
                $rows[] = [
                    'assignment_id' => (int)($r['assignment_id'] ?? 0),
                    'queue_id' => (int)($r['queue_id'] ?? 0),
                    'game_id' => (string)($r['game_id'] ?? ''),
                    'target_draw_date' => (string)($r['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                    'assigned_status' => (string)($r['assigned_status'] ?? ''),
                    'runner_status' => (string)($r['runner_status'] ?? ''),
