                    'runner_started_at' => (string)($r['runner_started_at'] ?? ''),
                    'runner_saved_at' => (string)($r['runner_saved_at'] ?? ''),
                    'completed_at' => (string)($r['completed_at'] ?? ''),
                    'runner_message' => (string)($r['runner_message'] ?? ''),
                    'settings_fingerprint' => (string)($r['assignment_settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''),
                    'main_numbers' => $main,
                    'extra_numbers' => $extra,
                ];
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[SKAI V161] recent ledger failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
        return $rows;
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_claimChunk')) {
    function SKAI_V158_claimChunk($db, $user, $campaignUuid = '', $chunkSize = 9): array {
        if (!SKAI_V158_isAdminUser($user)) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden']; }
        SKAI_V158_ensureSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)$campaignUuid);
        $chunkSize = max(1, min(9, (int)$chunkSize));
        if ($campaignUuid === '') { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_campaign_uuid']; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select(['a.*','q.campaign_uuid','q.target_draw_date','q.research_type','q.campaign_label'])
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments','a'))
            ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue','q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
            ->where('q.' . $db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid))
            ->where('a.' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('assigned') . ',' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('running') . ')')
            ->where('(a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('') . ' OR a.' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('queued') . ',' . $db->quote('retry') . '))')
            ->order('a.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' ASC')
            ->setLimit($chunkSize);
        $db->setQuery($q); $rows = $db->loadAssocList();
        $summaryBefore = SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($db, $campaignUuid);
        if (!is_array($rows) || empty($rows)) { return ['ok'=>true,'done'=>true,'message'=>'No queued assignments remain.','summary'=>$summaryBefore,'ledger'=>SKAI_V158_recentLedger($db,$campaignUuid,30)]; }
        $ids = []; foreach ($rows as $r) { $ids[] = (int)$r['id']; }
        $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        try { $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_started_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now) . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Claimed by SKAI-owned v158 research runner') . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' IN (' . implode(',', $ids) . ')'); $db->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $e) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'claim_update_failed','message'=>$e->getMessage()]; }
        $assignments = [];
        foreach ($rows as $row) {
            $settings = json_decode((string)($row['assignment_settings_json'] ?? ''), true); if (!is_array($settings)) { $settings = []; }
            $assignments[] = ['assignment_id'=>(int)$row['id'],'queue_id'=>(int)$row['queue_id'],'lottery_id'=>(int)$row['lottery_id'],'game_id'=>(string)$row['game_id'],'target_draw_date'=>(string)$row['target_draw_date'],'campaign_uuid'=>(string)$row['campaign_uuid'],'campaign_label'=>(string)$row['campaign_label'],'settings'=>$settings,'settings_fingerprint'=>(string)$row['assignment_settings_fingerprint']];
        }
        return ['ok'=>true,'done'=>false,'chunk_size'=>count($assignments),'assignments'=>$assignments,'summary'=>SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($db,$campaignUuid),'ledger'=>SKAI_V158_recentLedger($db,$campaignUuid,30)];
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_recordResult')) {
    function SKAI_V158_recordResult($db, $user, array $input): array {
        if (!SKAI_V158_isAdminUser($user)) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden']; }
        SKAI_V158_ensureSchema($db);
        $assignmentId = (int)($input['assignment_id'] ?? 0); if ($assignmentId <= 0) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_assignment_id']; }
        $ok = !empty($input['ok']); $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        $msg = trim((string)($input['message'] ?? ($ok ? 'Saved by SKAI-owned v158 runner.' : 'SKAI runner reported failure.')));
        if (strlen($msg) > 240) { $msg = substr($msg, 0, 240); }
        $resultJson = json_encode($input, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        $sets = [
            $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($ok ? 'saved' : 'failed'),
            $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($ok ? 'completed' : 'failed'),
            $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote($msg),
            $db->quoteName('runner_result_json') . ' = ' . $db->quote($resultJson),
            $db->quoteName('completed_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now),
            $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = ' . ($ok ? '1' : '0')
        ];
        if ($ok) { $sets[] = $db->quoteName('runner_saved_at') . ' = ' . $db->quote($now); }
        try { $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $sets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $assignmentId); $db->execute(); }
        catch (\Throwable $e) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()]; }
        $campaignUuid = '';
        try {
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('q.campaign_uuid')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments', 'a'))
                ->join('INNER', $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue', 'q') . ' ON q.id = a.queue_id')
                ->where('a.' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$assignmentId)
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $campaignUuid = (string)$db->loadResult();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $campaignUuid = ''; }
        return ['ok'=>true,'assignment_id'=>$assignmentId,'summary'=>SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($db,$campaignUuid),'ledger'=>SKAI_V158_recentLedger($db,$campaignUuid,30)];
    }
}
if (!function_exists('SKAI_V158_command')) {
    function SKAI_V158_command($db, $user, array $input): array {
        if (!SKAI_V158_isAdminUser($user)) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden']; }
        SKAI_V158_ensureSchema($db);
        $campaignUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($input['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $command = strtolower(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)($input['command'] ?? '')));
        if ($campaignUuid === '') { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'missing_campaign_uuid']; }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select($db->quoteName('id'))->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_queue'))->where($db->quoteName('campaign_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($campaignUuid));
        $db->setQuery($q); $ids = $db->loadColumn(); if (!is_array($ids) || empty($ids)) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'campaign_not_found']; }
        $idList = implode(',', array_map('intval', $ids)); $now = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        if ($command === 'reset_running' || $command === 'resume_prepare') {
            try { $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('assigned') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Reset from running by SKAI v158 on ' . $now) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ') AND ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('running')); $db->execute(); return ['ok'=>true,'changed'=>(int)$db->getAffectedRows(),'summary'=>SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($db,$campaignUuid)]; } catch (\Throwable $e) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()]; }
        }
        if ($command === 'retry_failed') {
            try { $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__mle_lottery_research_assignments') . ' SET ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('queued') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('assigned_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('assigned') . ', ' . $db->quoteName('runner_message') . ' = ' . $db->quote('Queued for retry by SKAI v158 on ' . $now) . ', ' . $db->quoteName('saved_count') . ' = 0 WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('queue_id') . ' IN (' . $idList . ') AND ' . $db->quoteName('runner_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('failed')); $db->execute(); return ['ok'=>true,'changed'=>(int)$db->getAffectedRows(),'summary'=>SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($db,$campaignUuid)]; } catch (\Throwable $e) { return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'db_error','message'=>$e->getMessage()]; }
        }
        return ['ok'=>false,'error'=>'unknown_command'];
    }
}
try {
    $skaiV158Action = (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '');
    if (in_array($skaiV158Action, ['hive_research_claim_chunk','hive_research_record_result','hive_research_summary','hive_research_ledger','hive_research_command'], true)) {
        if (!SKAI_V158_isAdminUser(Factory::getUser())) { SKAI_V158_json(['ok'=>false,'error'=>'forbidden']); }
        if ($in->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !Session::checkToken('post')) { SKAI_V158_json(['ok'=>false,'error'=>'csrf_failed']); }
        $payloadRaw = (string)$in->get('payload', '', 'RAW');
        $payload = $payloadRaw !== '' ? json_decode($payloadRaw, true) : [];
        if (!is_array($payload)) { $payload = []; }
        $skaiV158Db = Factory::getDbo();
        if ($skaiV158Action === 'hive_research_claim_chunk') { SKAI_V158_json(SKAI_V158_claimChunk($skaiV158Db, Factory::getUser(), (string)($payload['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), (int)($payload['chunk_size'] ?? 9))); }
        if ($skaiV158Action === 'hive_research_record_result') { SKAI_V158_json(SKAI_V158_recordResult($skaiV158Db, Factory::getUser(), $payload)); }
        if ($skaiV158Action === 'hive_research_summary') { SKAI_V158_json(['ok'=>true,'summary'=>SKAI_V158_campaignSummary($skaiV158Db, (string)($payload['campaign_uuid'] ?? '')),'ledger'=>SKAI_V158_recentLedger($skaiV158Db, (string)($payload['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), 30)]); }
        if ($skaiV158Action === 'hive_research_ledger') { SKAI_V158_json(['ok'=>true,'ledger'=>SKAI_V158_recentLedger($skaiV158Db, (string)($payload['campaign_uuid'] ?? ''), (int)($payload['limit'] ?? 30))]); }
        if ($skaiV158Action === 'hive_research_command') { SKAI_V158_json(SKAI_V158_command($skaiV158Db, Factory::getUser(), $payload)); }
    }
} catch (\Throwable $skaiV158Ex) {
    if (isset($skaiV158Action) && $skaiV158Action !== '') { SKAI_V158_json(['ok'=>false,'error'=>'exception','message'=>$skaiV158Ex->getMessage()]); }
}
// $skaiPreviewFreeAiUrl = '/picking-winning-numbers/artificial-intelligence/ai-powered-predictions?game_id=' . rawurlencode((string)($gameIdRaw !== '' ? $gameIdRaw : ($selectedGameId ?? (string)$gameId)));
$skaiPreviewFreeAiUrl = '/picking-winning-numbers/artificial-intelligence/ai-powered-predictions?game_id=' . rawurlencode((string)($gameIdRaw !== '' ? $gameIdRaw : ($selectedGameId ?? (string)$gameId)));

// Load config JSON (APCu-cached with auto-invalidation by filemtime)
$masterJsonPath = '/home/oscara/web/lottoexpert.net/public_html/lottery_skip_config.json';

// Daily digit-based lotteries live in a separate catalog JSON (do NOT merge schemas).
$dailyJsonPath  = '/home/oscara/web/lottoexpert.net/public_html/dailylotteries.json';

// Daily bridge (normalizes daily rows into SKAI canonical config shape)
$dailyBridgePath = '/home/oscara/web/lottoexpert.net/public_html/skai_daily_bridge.php';
if (is_file($dailyBridgePath)) {
    require_once $dailyBridgePath;
} else {
    // Non-fatal: SKAI can still operate on master config-only.
    if (!empty($isDebug)) {
        error_log('[SKAI] Missing daily bridge include: ' . $dailyBridgePath);
    }
}

// Daily helpers are loaded via skai_daily_bridge.php (Option 2).
// Do not duplicate the functions inline here; it increases merge risk and can trigger parse errors.

// ========================================================================
// [CONFIG] LOAD / NORMALIZE / VALIDATE CONFIG + RESOLVE IDS

// =====================================================================
// [EVALUATION] SKAI EVALUATION SYSTEM - FULLY INTEGRATED
// =====================================================================
// Complete evaluation-driven ranking system built directly into SKAI
// NO EXTERNAL FILES NEEDED - Everything in this single file
//
// QUICK START:
//   1. Replace your old SKAI file with this integrated version
//   2. Schema creation is handled automatically on first admin page load via POST migration.
//   3. Admin migration endpoint: POST skai_action=skai_admin_migrate with valid CSRF token.
//   4. Requires superuser (core.admin) access. No public GET-based install trigger is supported.
//
// FEATURES (All Built-In):
//   [+] Instrumentation - Per-number score breakdowns logged to DB
//   [+] Backtest - Walk-forward validation (Recall@20, NDCG@20, MWR)
//   [+] Attribution - Miss analysis with reason codes and sensitivity
//   [+] Calibration - Monotonic probability mapping for better ranking
//   [+] Pairwise - Co-occurrence lift statistics (set-aware inference)
//   [+] Gibbs - Optional MCMC sampling (enabled via flag)
//   [+] Tuning - Auto-parameter optimization via grid search
//   [+] Reports - Aggregate evaluation metrics and insights
//
// DATABASE TABLES (Created by installer):
//   1. skai_run_logs - Complete prediction runs with score_parts
//   2. skai_backtest_metrics - Per-draw validation metrics
//   3. skai_miss_attribution - Analysis of missed winners
//   4. skai_tuned_params - Optimal parameters per game
//   5. skai_pairwise_stats - Co-occurrence lift scores
//   6. skai_evaluation_reports - Aggregate summaries
//   7. skai_calibration_curves - Monotonic calibration mappings
//
// USAGE (After Installation):
//   All SKAI_* functions are available throughout this file:
//   - SKAI_logPredictionRun() - Log predictions with score breakdowns
//   - SKAI_runWalkForwardBacktest() - Run time-split validation
//   - SKAI_generateEvaluationReport() - Generate performance reports
//   - And ~80 more functions (see QUICK_REFERENCE.txt)
//
// Built on probabilities - not promises.
// =====================================================================



/**
 * SKAI_Evaluation_Install - Create 7 database tables for evaluation system
 * 
 * Run this via the admin migration POST endpoint (skai_action=skai_admin_migrate, requires core.admin + CSRF).
 * Schema is also created automatically on the first admin page load.
 *   Direct CLI: php -r "require 'thisfile.php'; print_r(SKAI_Evaluation_Install());"
 * 
 * @return array {success: bool, message: string, tables_created: int, errors: array}
 */
function SKAI_Evaluation_Install() {
    try {
        $db = Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $tablesCreated = 0;
        $errors = [];
        
        $tables = [
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_run_logs` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `run_date` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `draw_date` DATE NULL,
                `model_version` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'v1.0',
                `params_json` TEXT NULL,
                `ranked_list` MEDIUMTEXT NOT NULL,
                `top20_nums` VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
                `extras_json` TEXT NULL,
                `deterministic` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `seed` INT NULL,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_game_run` (`game_id`, `run_date`),
                INDEX `idx_draw_date` (`draw_date`),
                INDEX `idx_deterministic_seed` (`deterministic`, `seed`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_backtest_metrics` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `test_draw_date` DATE NOT NULL,
                `train_window_start` DATE NULL,
                `train_window_end` DATE NULL,
                `window_size` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `recall_at_20` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `mean_winner_rank` DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
                `ndcg_at_20` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `winners_json` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
                `missing_winners_json` VARCHAR(500) NULL,
                `params_hash` VARCHAR(64) NULL,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uniq_game_draw_params` (`game_id`, `test_draw_date`, `params_hash`),
                INDEX `idx_game_date` (`game_id`, `test_draw_date`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_miss_attribution` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `backtest_metric_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `test_draw_date` DATE NOT NULL,
                `missed_number` TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `rank_in_full_list` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `score_total` DECIMAL(10,6) NOT NULL,
                `score_parts_json` TEXT NOT NULL,
                `reason_codes` VARCHAR(500) NULL,
                `sensitivity_json` TEXT NULL,
                `top20_median_json` TEXT NULL,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_backtest` (`backtest_metric_id`),
                INDEX `idx_game_draw_num` (`game_id`, `test_draw_date`, `missed_number`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_tuned_params` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `tuned_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `validation_window_start` DATE NULL,
                `validation_window_end` DATE NULL,
                `num_validation_draws` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `objective_value` DECIMAL(10,6) NOT NULL,
                `recall_at_20` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `ndcg_at_20` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `mean_winner_rank` DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
                `params_json` TEXT NOT NULL,
                `is_active` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_game_active` (`game_id`, `is_active`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_pairwise_stats` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `ball_type` ENUM('main', 'extra') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'main',
                `computed_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `window_size` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `num_i` TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `num_j` TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `p_i` DECIMAL(10,8) NOT NULL,
                `p_j` DECIMAL(10,8) NOT NULL,
                `p_ij` DECIMAL(10,8) NOT NULL,
                `lift` DECIMAL(10,6) NOT NULL,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uniq_game_type_pair` (`game_id`, `ball_type`, `num_i`, `num_j`),
                INDEX `idx_game_type` (`game_id`, `ball_type`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_evaluation_reports` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `report_date` DATE NOT NULL,
                `evaluation_period_start` DATE NOT NULL,
                `evaluation_period_end` DATE NOT NULL,
                `num_draws_evaluated` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `avg_recall_at_20` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `avg_ndcg_at_20` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000,
                `avg_mean_winner_rank` DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.00,
                `top_miss_reasons_json` TEXT NULL,
                `before_after_json` TEXT NULL,
                `summary_text` TEXT NULL,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uniq_game_report` (`game_id`, `report_date`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_calibration_curves` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `computed_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `window_size` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `num_bins` TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 10,
                `calibration_map_json` TEXT NOT NULL,
                `is_active` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_game_active` (`game_id`, `is_active`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
            
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_component_weights` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `weights_json` TEXT NOT NULL COMMENT 'JSON with keys: frequency, skip, recency, cooccur, historical (optional)',
                `window_size` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT 'Rolling validation window size used for tuning',
                `metric` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'recall20' COMMENT 'Optimization metric (recall20, ndcg20)',
                `metric_value` DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0000 COMMENT 'Achieved metric value',
                `num_misses_analyzed` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT 'Number of miss records used',
                `top_reason_codes` VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT 'Most common reason codes',
                `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `created_at` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uniq_game` (`game_id`),
                INDEX `idx_metric` (`metric`, `metric_value`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
        ];
        
        foreach ($tables as $sql) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                $db->execute();
                $tablesCreated++;
            } catch (Exception $e) {
                $errors[] = $e->getMessage();
            }
        }
        
        return [
            'success' => (count($errors) === 0),
            'message' => count($errors) === 0 
                ? "Successfully created $tablesCreated evaluation tables" 
                : "Created $tablesCreated tables with " . count($errors) . " errors",
            'tables_created' => $tablesCreated,
            'errors' => $errors
        ];
        
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        return [
            'success' => false,
            'message' => 'Installation failed: ' . $e->getMessage(),
            'tables_created' => 0,
            'errors' => [$e->getMessage()]
        ];
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_PHASE5]] AJAX handlers -- insert_run_log and insert_runtime_audit
// ========================================================================
// Called by skaiInsertRunLog() and skaiInsertRuntimeAudit() in JS (Phase 5).
// Requires POST with valid CSRF token and a logged-in user.
// Writes into #__skai_run_log and #__skai_runtime_audit respectively.
// ========================================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && in_array((string)$in->getString('skai_action', ''), ['insert_run_log', 'insert_runtime_audit'], true)
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    $__ajaxUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if ($__ajaxUser->guest) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
        exit;
    }
    $__ajaxAction  = (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '');
    $__ajaxPayload = (string)$in->getString('payload', '');
    $__ajaxData    = json_decode($__ajaxPayload, true);
    try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
    if (!is_array($__ajaxData)) {
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']);
        exit;
    }
    try {
        $__ajaxDb  = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $__ajaxNow = (new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date())->toSql();
        if ($__ajaxAction === 'insert_run_log') {
            $__runUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9\-]/', '', (string)($__ajaxData['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
            if ($__runUuid !== '') {
                $__q = $__ajaxDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($__ajaxDb->quoteName('#__skai_run_log'))
                    ->columns($__ajaxDb->quoteName([
                        'run_uuid','user_id','game_id','lottery_slug','engine_version',
                        'config_version','tuning_mode','calibration_enabled',
                        'tail_recovery_enabled','pairwise_enabled','gibbs_enabled',
                        'runtime_status','final_rank_source','score_path_hash','created_at',
                    ]))
                    ->values(implode(',', [
                        $__ajaxDb->quote($__runUuid),
                        (int)($__ajaxUser->id ?? 0),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote((string)($__ajaxData['game_id'] ?? '')),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i',  '', (string)($__ajaxData['lottery_slug']     ?? ''))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_.\-]/i', '', (string)($__ajaxData['engine_version']   ?? '2.0'))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9]/i',     '', (string)($__ajaxData['config_version']   ?? ''))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i',  '', (string)($__ajaxData['tuning_mode']      ?? ''))),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['calibration_enabled']    ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['tail_recovery_enabled']  ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['pairwise_enabled']       ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['gibbs_enabled']          ?? 0),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i',  '', (string)($__ajaxData['runtime_status']   ?? 'complete'))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-+\/]/i','', (string)($__ajaxData['final_rank_source'] ?? ''))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9]/i',     '', (string)($__ajaxData['score_path_hash']  ?? ''))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote($__ajaxNow),
                    ]));
                $__ajaxDb->setQuery($__q);
                try {
                    $__ajaxDb->execute();
                } catch (\Throwable $__ie) {
                    // [[SKAI_PHASE_D]] Duplicate run_uuid is non-fatal -- treat as idempotent
                    $__iMsg = $__ie->getMessage();
                    if (strpos($__iMsg, 'Duplicate') !== false || strpos($__iMsg, '1062') !== false) {
                        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_D] insert_run_log duplicate run_uuid=' . $__runUuid . ' (non-fatal)');
                    } else {
                        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE5] insert_run_log DB error: ' . $__iMsg);
                    }
                }
            }
        } elseif ($__ajaxAction === 'insert_runtime_audit') {
            $__runUuidA = preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9\-]/', '', (string)($__ajaxData['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
            if ($__runUuidA !== '') {
                $__q = $__ajaxDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($__ajaxDb->quoteName('#__skai_runtime_audit'))
                    ->columns($__ajaxDb->quoteName([
                        'run_uuid','game_id','domain_verified','mode_verified','metrics_complete',
                        'display_matches_engine','snapshot_matches_engine','fallback_triggered',
                        'fallback_reason','audit_status','created_at',
                    ]))
                    ->values(implode(',', [
                        $__ajaxDb->quote($__runUuidA),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote((string)($__ajaxData['game_id'] ?? '')),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['domain_verified']         ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['mode_verified']            ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['metrics_complete']         ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['display_matches_engine']   ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['snapshot_matches_engine']  ?? 0),
                        (int)(bool)($__ajaxData['fallback_triggered']       ?? 0),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(substr(preg_replace('/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/u', '', (string)($__ajaxData['fallback_reason'] ?? '')), 0, 255)),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote(preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i',  '', (string)($__ajaxData['audit_status'] ?? 'complete'))),
                        $__ajaxDb->quote($__ajaxNow),
                    ]));
                $__ajaxDb->setQuery($__q);
                try { $__ajaxDb->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $__ie) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE5] insert_runtime_audit DB error: ' . $__ie->getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => true]);
    } catch (\Throwable $__ajaxEx) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE5] AJAX handler exception: ' . $__ajaxEx->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'server_exception']);
    }
    exit;
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_PHASE10]] AJAX handlers -- load_user_preferences / save_user_preferences
// ========================================================================
// Called by the JS Phase 10 bridge to persist/retrieve user preferences
// from #__skai_user_preferences.
// Requires POST with valid CSRF token and a logged-in user.
// ========================================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && in_array((string)$in->getString('skai_action', ''), ['load_user_preferences', 'save_user_preferences'], true)
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    $__upUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if ($__upUser->guest) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
        exit;
    }
    $__upAction  = (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '');
    $__upGameId  = (string)$in->getString('game_id', '');
    if ($__upGameId === '') { $__upGameId = (string)$in->getString('gameId', ''); }
    if ($__upGameId === '') { $__upGameId = (string)$in->getString('gid', ''); }
    $__upUserId  = (int)$__upUser->id;
    try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
    try {
        $__upDb = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        if ($__upAction === 'load_user_preferences') {
            $__upQ = $__upDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($__upDb->quoteName('#__skai_user_preferences'))
                ->where($__upDb->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $__upUserId)
                ->where($__upDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__upDb->quote($__upGameId));
            $__upDb->setQuery($__upQ);
            $__upRow = $__upDb->loadAssoc();
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'preferences' => $__upRow ?: null]);
        } elseif ($__upAction === 'save_user_preferences') {
            $__upPayload = (string)$in->getString('payload', '');
            $__upData    = json_decode($__upPayload, true);
            if (!is_array($__upData)) {
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']);
                exit;
            }
            $__upNow = (new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date())->toSql();
            // Upsert: update if exists, insert if not.
            $__upQ = $__upDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select($__upDb->quoteName('id'))
                ->from($__upDb->quoteName('#__skai_user_preferences'))
                ->where($__upDb->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . $__upUserId)
                ->where($__upDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__upDb->quote($__upGameId));
            $__upDb->setQuery($__upQ);
            $__upExisting = $__upDb->loadResult();
            $__upFields = [
                'risk_profile'           => preg_replace('/[^a-z_]/i', '', (string)($__upData['risk_profile']          ?? 'balanced')),
                'coverage_style'         => preg_replace('/[^a-z_]/i', '', (string)($__upData['coverage_style']        ?? 'balanced')),
                'combo_count_preference' => max(1, min(50, (int)($__upData['combo_count_preference']                   ?? 5))),
                'overlap_tolerance'      => preg_replace('/[^a-z_]/i', '', (string)($__upData['overlap_tolerance']     ?? 'medium')),
                'ui_density_preference'  => preg_replace('/[^a-z_]/i', '', (string)($__upData['ui_density_preference'] ?? 'comfortable')),
                'show_advanced_panels'   => (int)(bool)($__upData['show_advanced_panels']                              ?? 0),
            ];
            if ($__upExisting) {
                $__upQ = $__upDb->getQuery(true)->update($__upDb->quoteName('#__skai_user_preferences'));
                foreach ($__upFields as $__upCol => $__upVal) {
                    $__upQ->set($__upDb->quoteName($__upCol) . ' = ' . (is_int($__upVal) ? (int)$__upVal : $__upDb->quote($__upVal)));
                }
                $__upQ->set($__upDb->quoteName('updated_at') . ' = ' . $__upDb->quote($__upNow));
                $__upQ->where($__upDb->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__upExisting);
                $__upDb->setQuery($__upQ);
            } else {
                $__upQ = $__upDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($__upDb->quoteName('#__skai_user_preferences'))
                    ->columns($__upDb->quoteName(array_merge(['user_id', 'game_id'], array_keys($__upFields), ['created_at', 'updated_at'])))
                    ->values(implode(',', array_merge(
                        [$__upUserId, $__upDb->quote($__upGameId)],
                        array_map(function ($v) use ($__upDb) { return is_int($v) ? (int)$v : $__upDb->quote($v); }, array_values($__upFields)),
                        [$__upDb->quote($__upNow), $__upDb->quote($__upNow)]
                    )));
                $__upDb->setQuery($__upQ);
            }
            try { $__upDb->execute(); } catch (\Throwable $__upEx) {
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE10] save_user_preferences DB error: ' . $__upEx->getMessage());
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                exit;
            }
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true]);
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $__upEx2) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE10] user_preferences AJAX exception: ' . $__upEx2->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'server_exception']);
    }
    exit;
}


// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_PHASE1]] AJAX handlers -- save_backtest_summary / save_calibration_bins
//                                  save_tail_recovery_summary / save_parameter_set
//                                  load_lottery_settings
// ========================================================================
// These handlers persist engine-learning data from JS runtime into the
// dedicated SKAI tables.  All require POST + CSRF + authenticated user.
// Engine-learning data is NEVER stored in saved-number tables.
// ========================================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && in_array((string)$in->getString('skai_action', ''), [
        'save_backtest_summary', 'save_calibration_bins',
        'save_tail_recovery_summary', 'save_parameter_set',
        'save_best_settings', 'save_lottery_settings',
        'load_lottery_settings',
    ], true)
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    $__elUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if ($__elUser->guest) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
        exit;
    }
    $__elAction = (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '');
    $__elGameId = (string)$in->getString('game_id', '');
    if ($__elGameId === '') { $__elGameId = (string)$in->getString('gameId', ''); }
    if ($__elGameId === '') { $__elGameId = (string)$in->getString('gid', ''); }
    $__elRunUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]/', '', (string)$in->getString('run_uuid', ''));
    if ($__elRunUuid === '') {
        $__elRunUuid = sprintf('%04x%04x-%04x-%04x-%04x-%04x%04x%04x',
            mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff),
            mt_rand(0,0x0fff)|0x4000, mt_rand(0,0x3fff)|0x8000,
            mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff));
    }
    try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }

    // [[SKAI_PHASE_B]] Guard: check required tables exist before any write
    if ($__elAction !== 'load_lottery_settings') {
        $__elMissing = SKAI_checkRequiredTables();
        if (!empty($__elMissing)) {
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Required tables missing: ' . implode(', ', $__elMissing) . ' -- run admin migration.');
            $__isAdmin = false;
            try { $__isAdmin = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser()->authorise('core.admin'); } catch (\Throwable $__adminCheckEx) { $__isAdmin = false; }
            $__payload = ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'service_unavailable', 'message' => 'This feature is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.'];
            if ($__isAdmin) { $__payload['missing'] = $__elMissing; }
            echo json_encode($__payload, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            exit;
        }
    }

    if (!function_exists('SKAI_dynamicTableColumns')) {
        function SKAI_dynamicTableColumns($db, $table)
        {
            static $cache = [];
            if (isset($cache[$table])) { return $cache[$table]; }
            $cols = [];
            try {
                $rows = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
                if (is_array($rows)) {
                    foreach ($rows as $k => $v) { $cols[] = is_string($k) ? $k : (is_object($v) && !empty($v->Field) ? $v->Field : ''); }
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {}
            $cols = array_values(array_filter(array_unique($cols)));
            $cache[$table] = $cols;
            return $cols;
        }
    }
    if (!function_exists('SKAI_dynamicUpsertRow')) {
        function SKAI_dynamicUpsertRow($db, $table, array $match, array $data)
        {
            $cols = SKAI_dynamicTableColumns($db, $table);
            if (empty($cols)) { return ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'table_columns_unavailable']; }
            $filteredMatch = [];
            foreach ($match as $k => $v) { if (in_array($k, $cols, true)) { $filteredMatch[$k] = $v; } }
            $filteredData = [];
            foreach ($data as $k => $v) { if (in_array($k, $cols, true)) { $filteredData[$k] = $v; } }
            if (empty($filteredData)) { return ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'no_compatible_columns']; }
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)->select('*')->from($db->quoteName($table))->setLimit(1);
            foreach ($filteredMatch as $k => $v) {
                if ($v === null) { $q->where($db->quoteName($k) . ' IS NULL'); }
                else { $q->where($db->quoteName($k) . ' = ' . $db->quote($v)); }
            }
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $existing = $db->loadAssoc();
            $isUpdate = is_array($existing) && !empty($existing);
            if ($isUpdate && isset($existing['id']) && in_array('id', $cols, true)) {
                $uq = $db->getQuery(true)->update($db->quoteName($table));
                foreach ($filteredData as $k => $v) {
                    $uq->set($db->quoteName($k) . ' = ' . ($v === null ? 'NULL' : $db->quote($v)));
                }
                $uq->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$existing['id']);
                $db->setQuery($uq);
                $db->execute();
                return ['ok' => true, 'mode' => 'update', 'id' => (int)$existing['id'], 'columns' => array_keys($filteredData)];
            }
            $ins = $db->getQuery(true)->insert($db->quoteName($table))->columns(array_map([$db, 'quoteName'], array_keys($filteredData)));
            $vals = [];
            foreach ($filteredData as $v) { $vals[] = ($v === null ? 'NULL' : $db->quote($v)); }
            $ins->values(implode(',', $vals));
            $db->setQuery($ins);
            $db->execute();
            return ['ok' => true, 'mode' => 'insert', 'id' => (int)$db->insertid(), 'columns' => array_keys($filteredData)];
        }
    }

    try {
        $__elDb  = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $__elNow = (new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date())->toSql();

        if ($__elAction === 'load_lottery_settings') {
            // Load per-lottery settings for the PHP bridge so JS can consume them.
            // Also hydrate active calibration bins / active parameter set / active tail summary
            // so future runs can reload persisted learning instead of relying only on same-run memory.
            $__elQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_lottery_settings'))
                ->where($__elDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elGameId))
                ->setLimit(1);
            $__elDb->setQuery($__elQ);
            $__elRow = $__elDb->loadAssoc();
            if (!is_array($__elRow)) { $__elRow = null; }
            if (is_array($__elRow)) {
                $activeCalVersion = (string)($__elRow['active_calibration_version'] ?? '');
                if ($activeCalVersion !== '') {
                    $__elCalQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                        ->select('*')
                        ->from($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_calibration_bins'))
                        ->where($__elDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elGameId))
                        ->where($__elDb->quoteName('calibration_version') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($activeCalVersion))
                        ->order($__elDb->quoteName('bin_index') . ' ASC');
                    $__elDb->setQuery($__elCalQ);
                    $__elRow['active_calibration_bins'] = $__elDb->loadAssocList() ?: [];
                } else {
                    $__elRow['active_calibration_bins'] = [];
                }
                $__elParamQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->select('*')
                    ->from($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_parameter_sets'))
                    ->where($__elDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elGameId))
                    ->where($__elDb->quoteName('is_active') . ' = 1')
                    ->order($__elDb->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC')
                    ->setLimit(1);
                $__elDb->setQuery($__elParamQ);
                $__elRow['active_parameter_set'] = $__elDb->loadAssoc() ?: null;
                $activeTailVersion = (string)($__elRow['active_tail_version'] ?? '');
                if ($activeTailVersion !== '') {
                    $__elTailQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                        ->select('*')
                        ->from($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_tail_recovery_summary'))
                        ->where($__elDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elGameId))
                        ->where($__elDb->quoteName('tail_version') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($activeTailVersion))
                        ->order($__elDb->quoteName('created_at') . ' DESC')
                        ->setLimit(1);
                    $__elDb->setQuery($__elTailQ);
                    $__elRow['active_tail_summary'] = $__elDb->loadAssoc() ?: null;
                } else {
                    $__elRow['active_tail_summary'] = null;
                }
            }
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'settings' => $__elRow ?: null]);

        } elseif ($__elAction === 'save_lottery_settings') {
            $__elPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__elPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            $table = '#__skai_lottery_settings';
            $slug = (string)($__elPayload['lottery_slug'] ?? $__elPayload['slug'] ?? ('game_' . $__elGameId));
            $row = [
                'game_id' => $__elGameId,
                'lottery_slug' => $slug,
                'main_pool_size' => (int)($__elPayload['main_pool_size'] ?? $__elPayload['main_pool'] ?? 0),
                'bonus_pool_size' => (int)($__elPayload['bonus_pool_size'] ?? $__elPayload['bonus_pool'] ?? 0),
                'draw_count_main' => (int)($__elPayload['draw_count_main'] ?? $__elPayload['draw_count'] ?? $__elPayload['history_count'] ?? 0),
                'draw_count_bonus' => (int)($__elPayload['draw_count_bonus'] ?? 0),
                'is_multistate' => !empty($__elPayload['is_multistate']) ? 1 : 0,
                'is_multicountry' => !empty($__elPayload['is_multicountry']) ? 1 : 0,
                'supports_bonus' => !empty($__elPayload['supports_bonus']) ? 1 : 0,
                'supports_pairs' => array_key_exists('supports_pairs', $__elPayload) ? (!empty($__elPayload['supports_pairs']) ? 1 : 0) : 1,
                'supports_tail_recovery' => array_key_exists('supports_tail_recovery', $__elPayload) ? (!empty($__elPayload['supports_tail_recovery']) ? 1 : 0) : 1,
                'supports_calibration' => array_key_exists('supports_calibration', $__elPayload) ? (!empty($__elPayload['supports_calibration']) ? 1 : 0) : 1,
                'supports_gibbs' => array_key_exists('supports_gibbs', $__elPayload) ? (!empty($__elPayload['supports_gibbs']) ? 1 : 0) : 1,
                'active_parameter_set_id' => (int)($__elPayload['active_parameter_set_id'] ?? 0),
                'active_calibration_version' => (string)($__elPayload['active_calibration_version'] ?? ''),
                'active_tail_version' => (string)($__elPayload['active_tail_version'] ?? ''),
                'status' => (string)($__elPayload['status'] ?? 'active'),
                'created_at' => $__elNow,
                'updated_at' => $__elNow,
            ];
            try {
                $res = SKAI_dynamicUpsertRow($__elDb, $table, ['game_id' => $__elGameId], $row);
                if (!$res['ok']) { throw new \RuntimeException((string)$res['error']); }
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_lottery_settings ' . $res['mode'] . ' game_id=' . $__elGameId);
                echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'mode' => $res['mode'], 'id' => (int)$res['id']]);
            } catch (\Throwable $__elEx) {
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_lottery_settings DB error: ' . $__elEx->getMessage());
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
            }

        } elseif ($__elAction === 'save_best_settings') {
            $__elPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__elPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            $table = '#__skai_best_settings';
            $paramsJson = json_encode((array)($__elPayload['params'] ?? []));
            $recall = isset($__elPayload['avg_elite_objective_j']) && (float)$__elPayload['avg_elite_objective_j'] > 0
                ? (float)$__elPayload['avg_elite_objective_j']
                : (float)($__elPayload['avg_recall_at_20'] ?? $__elPayload['score'] ?? 0);
            $version = (string)($__elPayload['parameter_version'] ?? $__elRunUuid);
            $row = [
                'game_id' => $__elGameId,
                'parameter_version' => $version,
                'settings_json' => $paramsJson,
                'parameter_json' => $paramsJson,
                'best_params_json' => $paramsJson,
                'score' => $recall,
                'best_score' => $recall,
                'avg_recall_at_20' => $recall,
                'source_mode' => (string)($__elPayload['tuning_mode'] ?? 'canonical_grid'),
                'is_active' => 1,
                'status' => 'active',
                'created_at' => $__elNow,
                'updated_at' => $__elNow,
            ];
            try {
                $res = SKAI_dynamicUpsertRow($__elDb, $table, ['game_id' => $__elGameId], $row);
                if (!$res['ok']) { throw new \RuntimeException((string)$res['error']); }
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_best_settings ' . $res['mode'] . ' game_id=' . $__elGameId);
                echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'mode' => $res['mode'], 'id' => (int)$res['id']]);
            } catch (\Throwable $__elEx) {
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_best_settings DB error: ' . $__elEx->getMessage());
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
            }

        } elseif ($__elAction === 'save_backtest_summary') {
            // [[SKAI_PHASE_A]] Fixed: map payload to actual #__skai_backtest_summary schema
            $__elPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__elPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            // Derive window_start and window_end from current date and window_size
            $__elWindowSize  = max(1, (int)($__elPayload['window_size'] ?? 10));
            $__elWindowEnd   = date('Y-m-d');
            $__elWindowStart = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-' . $__elWindowSize . ' days'));
            $__elQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_backtest_summary'))
                ->columns($__elDb->quoteName([
                    'game_id','window_start','window_end','sample_size',
                    'recall_at_20','ndcg_at_20','mean_winner_rank','top_10_stability',
                    'benchmark_random_lift','benchmark_frequency_lift','benchmark_recency_lift',
                    'created_at',
                ]))
                ->values(implode(',', [
                    $__elDb->quote($__elGameId),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elWindowStart),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elWindowEnd),
                    (int)($__elPayload['total_windows']      ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['avg_recall_at_20'] ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['ndcg_at_20']       ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['mean_winner_rank'] ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['top_10_stability'] ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['benchmark_random_lift']    ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['benchmark_frequency_lift'] ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['benchmark_recency_lift']   ?? 0),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elNow),
                ]));
            $__elDb->setQuery($__elQ);
            try {
                $__elDb->execute();
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_backtest_summary ok game_id=' . $__elGameId);
                echo json_encode(['ok' => true]);
            } catch (\Throwable $__elEx) {
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_backtest_summary DB error: ' . $__elEx->getMessage());
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
            }

        } elseif ($__elAction === 'save_calibration_bins') {
            // [[SKAI_PHASE_A]] Persist only truthy calibration data and promote the saved version to active.
            $__elPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__elPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            $__elVersion = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($__elPayload['version'] ?? $__elRunUuid));
            $__elBins    = is_array($__elPayload['bins']) ? $__elPayload['bins'] : [];
            if ($__elVersion === '') { $__elVersion = $__elRunUuid ?: ('cal_' . date('Ymd_His')); }
            if (empty($__elBins)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'rows' => 0, 'skipped' => 'empty_bins']); exit; }
            $__elInserted = 0;
            $__elTruthyBinCount = 0;
            $__elTotalSamples = 0;
            $__elDb->transactionStart();
            try {
                $__elDelQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->delete($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_calibration_bins'))
                    ->where($__elDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elGameId))
                    ->where($__elDb->quoteName('calibration_version') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elVersion));
                $__elDb->setQuery($__elDelQ);
                $__elDb->execute();
                foreach ($__elBins as $__elIdx => $__elBin) {
                    if (!is_array($__elBin)) { continue; }
                    $__elScoreMin  = (float)($__elBin['score_min']  ?? $__elBin['min']  ?? 0);
                    $__elScoreMax  = (float)($__elBin['score_max']  ?? $__elBin['max']  ?? 0);
                    $__elObsHit    = (float)($__elBin['observed_hit_rate'] ?? $__elBin['hit_rate'] ?? 0);
                    $__elSmHit     = (float)($__elBin['smoothed_hit_rate'] ?? $__elBin['calibrated_prob'] ?? $__elObsHit);
                    $__elBinCount  = (int)($__elBin['sample_count'] ?? $__elPayload['sample_count'] ?? 0);
                    $__elTotalSamples += max(0, $__elBinCount);
                    if ($__elBinCount > 0 && ($__elObsHit > 0 || $__elSmHit > 0)) { $__elTruthyBinCount++; }
                    $__elBinQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                        ->insert($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_calibration_bins'))
                        ->columns($__elDb->quoteName([
                            'game_id','calibration_version','bin_index',
                            'score_min','score_max','sample_count',
                            'observed_hit_rate','smoothed_hit_rate','created_at',
                        ]))
                        ->values(implode(',', [
                            $__elDb->quote($__elGameId),
                            $__elDb->quote($__elVersion),
                            (int)$__elIdx,
                            $__elScoreMin,
                            $__elScoreMax,
                            $__elBinCount,
                            $__elObsHit,
                            $__elSmHit,
                            $__elDb->quote($__elNow),
                        ]));
                    $__elDb->setQuery($__elBinQ);
                    $__elDb->execute();
                    $__elInserted++;
                }
                if ($__elInserted > 0 && $__elTruthyBinCount > 0) {
                    SKAI_dynamicUpsertRow($__elDb, '#__skai_lottery_settings', ['game_id' => $__elGameId], [
                        'game_id' => $__elGameId,
                        'active_calibration_version' => $__elVersion,
                        'status' => 'active',
                        'created_at' => $__elNow,
                        'updated_at' => $__elNow,
                    ]);
                }
                $__elDb->transactionCommit();
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_calibration_bins ok game_id=' . $__elGameId . ' bins=' . $__elInserted . ' truthy=' . $__elTruthyBinCount . ' version=' . $__elVersion);
                echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'rows' => $__elInserted, 'truthy_bins' => $__elTruthyBinCount, 'version' => $__elVersion, 'sample_count' => $__elTotalSamples]);
            } catch (\Throwable $__elCalEx) {
                try { $__elDb->transactionRollback(); } catch (\Throwable $_) {}
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_calibration_bins DB error: ' . $__elCalEx->getMessage());
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
            }

        } elseif ($__elAction === 'save_tail_recovery_summary') {
            // [[SKAI_PHASE_A]] Fixed: map to actual #__skai_tail_recovery_summary schema
            $__elPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__elPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            // Use run_uuid as tail_version, or generate one
            $__elTailVersion = $__elRunUuid ?: sprintf('tv_%s', date('Ymd_His'));
            $__elWinEnd      = date('Y-m-d');
            $__elWinStart    = date('Y-m-d', strtotime('-30 days'));
            $__elQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_tail_recovery_summary'))
                ->columns($__elDb->quoteName([
                    'game_id','tail_version','window_start','window_end',
                    'tail_miss_reduction_rate','near_miss_promotion_rate',
                    'tail_gain_score','protected_core_regression_rate',
                    'sample_count','created_at',
                ]))
                ->values(implode(',', [
                    $__elDb->quote($__elGameId),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elTailVersion),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elWinStart),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elWinEnd),
                    (float)($__elPayload['tail_miss_reduction_rate']       ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['near_miss_promotion_rate']       ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['tail_gain_score']                ?? 0),
                    (float)($__elPayload['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0),
                    (int)($__elPayload['sample_count']                     ?? 0),
                    $__elDb->quote($__elNow),
                ]));
            $__elDb->setQuery($__elQ);
            try {
                $__elDb->execute();
                SKAI_dynamicUpsertRow($__elDb, '#__skai_lottery_settings', ['game_id' => $__elGameId], [
                    'game_id' => $__elGameId,
                    'active_tail_version' => $__elTailVersion,
                    'status' => 'active',
                    'created_at' => $__elNow,
                    'updated_at' => $__elNow,
                ]);
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_tail_recovery_summary ok game_id=' . $__elGameId);
                echo json_encode(['ok' => true]);
            } catch (\Throwable $__elEx) {
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_tail_recovery_summary DB error: ' . $__elEx->getMessage());
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
            }

        } elseif ($__elAction === 'save_parameter_set') {
            // [[SKAI_PHASE_A]] Fixed: map to actual #__skai_parameter_sets schema; upsert on game_id+parameter_version
            $__elPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__elPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            $__elParamVersion = $__elRunUuid ?: sprintf('pv_%s', date('Ymd_His'));
            $__elParamsJson   = json_encode($__elPayload['params'] ?? [], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            $__elSourceMode   = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', (string)($__elPayload['tuning_mode'] ?? 'canonical_grid'));
            $__elScoreHash    = preg_replace('/[^a-f0-9]/i', '', (string)($__elPayload['score_path_hash'] ?? ''));
            // Check if same game_id + parameter_version already exists
            $__elChkQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('id')
                ->from($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_parameter_sets'))
                ->where($__elDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elGameId))
                ->where($__elDb->quoteName('parameter_version') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elParamVersion))
                ->setLimit(1);
            $__elDb->setQuery($__elChkQ);
            $__elExistId = (int)$__elDb->loadResult();
            if ($__elExistId > 0) {
                // Update existing row
                $__elUpQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_parameter_sets'))
                    ->set([
                        $__elDb->quoteName('parameter_json') . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elParamsJson),
                        $__elDb->quoteName('source_mode')    . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elSourceMode),
                        $__elDb->quoteName('score_path_hash'). ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elScoreHash),
                        $__elDb->quoteName('updated_at')     . ' = ' . $__elDb->quote($__elNow),
                    ])
                    ->where($__elDb->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . $__elExistId);
                $__elDb->setQuery($__elUpQ);
                try {
                    $__elDb->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_parameter_set updated id=' . $__elExistId);
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'action' => 'updated']);
                } catch (\Throwable $__elEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_parameter_set update error: ' . $__elEx->getMessage());
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                }
            } else {
                // Insert new row
                $__elInQ = $__elDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($__elDb->quoteName('#__skai_parameter_sets'))
                    ->columns($__elDb->quoteName([
                        'game_id','parameter_version','parameter_json','source_mode',
                        'is_live_path','is_active','score_path_hash','created_at','updated_at',
                    ]))
                    ->values(implode(',', [
                        $__elDb->quote($__elGameId),
                        $__elDb->quote($__elParamVersion),
                        $__elDb->quote($__elParamsJson),
                        $__elDb->quote($__elSourceMode),
                        0, 1,
                        $__elDb->quote($__elScoreHash),
                        $__elDb->quote($__elNow),
                        $__elDb->quote($__elNow),
                    ]));
                $__elDb->setQuery($__elInQ);
                try {
                    $__elDb->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_parameter_set inserted game_id=' . $__elGameId);
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'action' => 'inserted']);
                } catch (\Throwable $__elEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_A] save_parameter_set insert error: ' . $__elEx->getMessage());
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $__elEx2) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] engine-learning AJAX exception: ' . $__elEx2->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'server_exception']);
    }
    exit;
}


// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_PHASE_B]] Helper: check required SKAI learning tables exist
// Returns array of missing table names (empty = all present)
// ========================================================================
function SKAI_checkRequiredTables(): array
{
    static $__sktCache = null;
    if ($__sktCache !== null) { return $__sktCache; }
    try {
        $db     = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $required = [
            'skai_run_log', 'skai_backtest_summary', 'skai_calibration_bins',
            'skai_tail_recovery_summary', 'skai_parameter_sets',
            'skai_runtime_audit', 'skai_shared_learning', 'skai_learning_events',
            'skai_best_settings',
        ];
        $existing = [];
        foreach ($db->getTableList() as $tbl) {
            $existing[] = str_replace($prefix, '', $tbl);
        }
        $missing = [];
        foreach ($required as $t) {
            if (!in_array($t, $existing, true)) { $missing[] = $prefix . $t; }
        }
        $__sktCache = $missing;
        return $missing;
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_B] checkRequiredTables error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [];
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_PHASE_C+D]] AJAX handlers for shared learning + run log (hardened)
// Actions: load_shared_learning, save_shared_learning,
//          merge_shared_learning_after_result
// ========================================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && in_array((string)$in->getString('skai_action', ''), [
        'load_shared_learning', 'save_shared_learning',
        'merge_shared_learning_after_result',
    ], true)
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    $__slUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if ($__slUser->guest) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
        exit;
    }
    try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
    $__slAction  = (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '');
    $__slGameId  = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('game_id', ''));
    $__slRunUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_]/', '', (string)$in->getString('run_uuid', ''));
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Reject empty/invalid game_id before any DB write.
    // game_id is the canonical string identifier (e.g. "101", "AZ2") -- never cast to int,
    // never substitute lottery_id. Empty game_id means the caller has no valid game context.
    if ($__slGameId === '') {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] ' . $__slAction . ' aborted: game_id is empty or invalid');
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_game_id']);
        exit;
    }
    // Guard: shared_learning table must exist
    $__slMissing = SKAI_checkRequiredTables();
    if (in_array((\Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo()->getPrefix()) . 'skai_shared_learning', $__slMissing, true)) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skai_shared_learning table missing -- run admin migration.');
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'tables_missing']);
        exit;
    }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Auto-correct game_id column to VARCHAR(50) if the table was created
    // under an older INT schema. Idempotent -- no-op once column is already VARCHAR(50).
    if (function_exists('SKAI_runSharedLearningLotteryIdMigration')) {
        SKAI_runSharedLearningLotteryIdMigration();
    }
    try {
        $__slDb  = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $__slNow = (new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date())->toSql();

        if ($__slAction === 'load_shared_learning') {
            // Return all learning rows for this canonical game_id
            if (ob_get_level()) { @ob_clean(); }
            $__slQ = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slGameId))
                ->order($__slDb->quoteName('updated_at') . ' DESC');
            $__slDb->setQuery($__slQ);
            $__slRows = $__slDb->loadAssocList() ?: [];
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'rows' => $__slRows], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);

        } elseif ($__slAction === 'save_shared_learning') {
            // Upsert aggregated learning key/value for this canonical game_id
            $__slPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__slPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            $__slKey     = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($__slPayload['learning_key']   ?? 'default'));
            $__slScope   = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($__slPayload['learning_scope'] ?? 'global'));
            $__slMetric  = json_encode($__slPayload['metric_json']  ?? [], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            $__slCount   = (int)($__slPayload['sample_count']       ?? 0);
            $__slResDate = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)($__slPayload['last_result_date'] ?? date('Y-m-d')));
            // Check for existing row
            $__slChkQ = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('id, sample_count')
                ->from($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('game_id')        . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slGameId))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('learning_key')   . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slKey))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('learning_scope') . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slScope))
                ->setLimit(1);
            $__slDb->setQuery($__slChkQ);
            $__slExist = $__slDb->loadAssoc();
            if ($__slExist) {
                $__slNewCount = (int)$__slExist['sample_count'] + $__slCount;
                $__slUpQ = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                    ->set([
                        $__slDb->quoteName('metric_json')      . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slMetric),
                        $__slDb->quoteName('sample_count')     . ' = ' . $__slNewCount,
                        $__slDb->quoteName('last_result_date') . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slResDate),
                        $__slDb->quoteName('last_run_uuid')    . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slRunUuid),
                        $__slDb->quoteName('updated_at')       . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slNow),
                    ])
                    ->where($__slDb->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__slExist['id']);
                $__slDb->setQuery($__slUpQ);
                try {
                    $__slDb->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning updated game_id=' . $__slGameId . ' key=' . $__slKey);
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'action' => 'updated', 'sample_count' => $__slNewCount]);
                } catch (\Throwable $__slUpEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning update error: ' . $__slUpEx->getMessage());
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                }
            } else {
                $__slInQ = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                    ->columns($__slDb->quoteName([
                        'game_id','learning_key','learning_scope','metric_json',
                        'sample_count','last_result_date','last_run_uuid',
                        'created_at','updated_at',
                    ]))
                    ->values(implode(',', [
                        $__slDb->quote($__slGameId),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slKey),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slScope),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slMetric),
                        $__slCount,
                        $__slDb->quote($__slResDate),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slRunUuid),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slNow),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slNow),
                    ]));
                $__slDb->setQuery($__slInQ);
                try {
                    $__slDb->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning inserted game_id=' . $__slGameId . ' key=' . $__slKey);
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'action' => 'inserted']);
                } catch (\Throwable $__slInEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning insert error: ' . $__slInEx->getMessage());
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                }
            }

        } elseif ($__slAction === 'merge_shared_learning_after_result') {
            // Called after draw result reconciliation to update shared learning with actual outcome
            $__slPayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
            if (!is_array($__slPayload)) { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_payload']); exit; }
            $__slKey     = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($__slPayload['learning_key']   ?? 'outcome'));
            $__slScope   = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($__slPayload['learning_scope'] ?? 'global'));
            $__slMetric  = json_encode($__slPayload['metric_json'] ?? [], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            $__slCount   = (int)($__slPayload['sample_count']      ?? 1);
            $__slResDate = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)($__slPayload['last_result_date'] ?? date('Y-m-d')));
            // Upsert -- accumulate sample_count
            $__slChkQ2 = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                ->select('id, sample_count')
                ->from($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('game_id')        . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slGameId))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('learning_key')   . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slKey))
                ->where($__slDb->quoteName('learning_scope') . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slScope))
                ->setLimit(1);
            $__slDb->setQuery($__slChkQ2);
            $__slExist2 = $__slDb->loadAssoc();
            if ($__slExist2) {
                $__slNewCount2 = (int)$__slExist2['sample_count'] + $__slCount;
                $__slUpQ2 = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                    ->set([
                        $__slDb->quoteName('metric_json')      . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slMetric),
                        $__slDb->quoteName('sample_count')     . ' = ' . $__slNewCount2,
                        $__slDb->quoteName('last_result_date') . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slResDate),
                        $__slDb->quoteName('last_run_uuid')    . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slRunUuid),
                        $__slDb->quoteName('updated_at')       . ' = ' . $__slDb->quote($__slNow),
                    ])
                    ->where($__slDb->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__slExist2['id']);
                $__slDb->setQuery($__slUpQ2);
                try {
                    $__slDb->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result updated game_id=' . $__slGameId . ' key=' . $__slKey);
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'action' => 'merged', 'sample_count' => $__slNewCount2]);
                } catch (\Throwable $__slMergeUpEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result update error: ' . $__slMergeUpEx->getMessage());
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                }
            } else {
                $__slInQ2 = $__slDb->getQuery(true)
                    ->insert($__slDb->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                    ->columns($__slDb->quoteName([
                        'game_id','learning_key','learning_scope','metric_json',
                        'sample_count','last_result_date','last_run_uuid',
                        'created_at','updated_at',
                    ]))
                    ->values(implode(',', [
                        $__slDb->quote($__slGameId),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slKey),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slScope),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slMetric),
                        $__slCount,
                        $__slDb->quote($__slResDate),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slRunUuid),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slNow),
                        $__slDb->quote($__slNow),
                    ]));
                $__slDb->setQuery($__slInQ2);
                try {
                    $__slDb->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result inserted game_id=' . $__slGameId . ' key=' . $__slKey);
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'action' => 'inserted']);
