                } catch (\Throwable $__slMergeInEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result insert error: ' . $__slMergeInEx->getMessage());
                    echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error']);
                }
            }
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $__slEx) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] shared_learning AJAX exception: ' . $__slEx->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'server_exception']);
    }
    exit;
}

function SKAI_extractOfficialResultParts($officialResult): array
{
    $data = is_array($officialResult) ? $officialResult : [];
    $main = $data['main'] ?? $data['numbers'] ?? $data['winning_numbers'] ?? $data['main_numbers'] ?? [];
    $extra = $data['extra'] ?? $data['extra_numbers'] ?? $data['bonus_numbers'] ?? [];
    $main = array_values(array_unique(array_filter(array_map('intval', (array)$main), static function($v){ return $v > 0; })));
    $extra = array_values(array_unique(array_filter(array_map('intval', (array)$extra), static function($v){ return $v > 0; })));
    return ['main' => $main, 'extra' => $extra];
}

function SKAI_loadEliteMetricsSummaryRows($gameId, $limit = 100): array
{
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId))
            ->order($db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(max(1, (int)$limit));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        return $db->loadAssocList() ?: [];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_ELITE] SKAI_loadEliteMetricsSummaryRows error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [];
    }
}


// [[SKAI2_STRICT_JSON_RESPONSE_V3]]
// Server-score AJAX must return clean JSON only. This helper clears any buffered
// HTML, warnings, Joomla messages, or accidental whitespace before the JSON body.
// Without this, the browser can receive a valid JSON object preceded by markup,
// which causes JSON.parse to fail and forces SKAI2 into legacy fallback mode.
if (!function_exists('SKAI2_sendStrictJson')) {
    function SKAI2_sendStrictJson(array $payload) {
        try {
            while (ob_get_level() > 0) {
                @ob_clean();
                @ob_end_clean();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            // Best effort only. The JSON response below is still attempted.
        }
        try {
            $app = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
            $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
            $app->setHeader('Cache-Control', 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0', true);
            $app->sendHeaders();
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
            @header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
        }
        $json = json_encode($payload, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        if ($json === false || $json === '') {
            $json = '{"ok":false,"error":"json_encode_failed"}';
        }
        echo $json;
        exit;
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI2_ENGINE]] AJAX handler -- get_skai2_server_scores
// Canonical server-side statistical prediction via SKAI2_runPredictionEngine().
// Called by the JS prediction flow to integrate PHP scores into the live run.
// Requires POST + CSRF + authenticated user.
// ========================================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '') === 'get_skai2_server_scores'
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    try {
        $__s2User = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
        if ($__s2User->guest) {
            SKAI2_sendStrictJson(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
        }
        $__s2GameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('game_id', ''));
        if ($__s2GameId === '') {
            SKAI2_sendStrictJson(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_game_id']);
        }
        // Accept draw history from JS (window.draws format: [{numbers:[...], date:'Y-m-d'}, ...])
        // Limit to last 500 draws to keep payload reasonable.
        $__s2RawHistory = (string)$in->get('draw_history_json', '', 'RAW');
        $__s2History = [];
        if ($__s2RawHistory !== '') {
            $__s2Parsed = json_decode($__s2RawHistory, true);
            if (is_array($__s2Parsed)) {
                foreach (array_slice($__s2Parsed, -500) as $__s2Row) {
                    if (!is_array($__s2Row)) { continue; }
                    // Support {numbers:[...]} and {main:[...]} from JS draw format
                    $__s2Nums = isset($__s2Row['main']) && is_array($__s2Row['main'])
                        ? $__s2Row['main']
                        : (isset($__s2Row['numbers']) && is_array($__s2Row['numbers']) ? $__s2Row['numbers'] : []);
                    $__s2Nums = array_values(array_map('intval', array_filter($__s2Nums, 'is_numeric')));
                    if (empty($__s2Nums)) { continue; }
                    $__s2Date = isset($__s2Row['date']) ? preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)$__s2Row['date']) : '';
                    $__s2Entry = ['main' => $__s2Nums, 'date' => $__s2Date];
                    // Include extra/bonus ball if present
                    if (isset($__s2Row['extra']) && is_numeric($__s2Row['extra'])) {
                        $__s2Entry['extra'] = [(int)$__s2Row['extra']];
                    }
                    $__s2History[] = $__s2Entry;
                }
            }
        }
        if (empty($__s2History)) {
            SKAI2_sendStrictJson(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'empty_draw_history']);
        }
        // Optional params (e.g., caps, risk_profile)
        $__s2Params = [];
        $__s2ParamsRaw = (string)$in->get('params_json', '', 'RAW');
        if ($__s2ParamsRaw !== '') {
            $__s2ParamsParsed = json_decode($__s2ParamsRaw, true);
            if (is_array($__s2ParamsParsed)) {
                $__s2Params = $__s2ParamsParsed;
            }
        }
        // SKAI2_runPredictionEngine is the canonical entry point (defined globally in engine section).
        $__s2Result = SKAI2_runPredictionEngine($__s2GameId, $__s2History, $__s2Params);
        if (!isset($__s2Result['ok']) || !$__s2Result['ok']) {
            SKAI2_sendStrictJson([
                'ok'       => false,
                'error'    => $__s2Result['error'] ?? 'engine_error',
                'warnings' => $__s2Result['warnings'] ?? [],
            ]);
        }
        // Return only the fields JS needs; keep payload compact.
        SKAI2_sendStrictJson([
            'ok'                      => true,
            'game_id'                 => $__s2GameId,
            'game_type'               => $__s2Result['game_type'] ?? '',
            'ranked_numbers'          => $__s2Result['ranked_numbers'] ?? [],
            'bonus_numbers'           => $__s2Result['bonus_numbers'] ?? [],
            'combinations'            => $__s2Result['combinations'] ?? [],
            'daily_digit_predictions' => $__s2Result['daily_digit_predictions'] ?? null,
            'random_baseline'         => $__s2Result['random_baseline'] ?? [],
            'warnings'                => $__s2Result['warnings'] ?? [],
        ]);
    } catch (\Throwable $__s2Ex) {
        error_log('[SKAI2] get_skai2_server_scores exception: ' . $__s2Ex->getMessage());
        SKAI2_sendStrictJson(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'internal_error']);
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_ELITE]] AJAX handlers -- authoritative learning events + reconciliation
// Actions: save_learning_event, load_learning_event, reconcile_learning_event, load_elite_metrics_summary
// ========================================================================
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && in_array((string)$in->getString('skai_action', ''), [
        'save_learning_event', 'load_learning_event', 'reconcile_learning_event', 'load_elite_metrics_summary',
    ], true)
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    $__eliteUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if ($__eliteUser->guest) {
        try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'not_logged_in']);
        exit;
    }
    try { $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true); $app->sendHeaders(); } catch (\Throwable $__h) { @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); }
    $__eliteAction = (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '');
    $__eliteGameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('game_id', ''));
    $__eliteRunUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('run_uuid', ''));
    $__eliteTargetDate = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)$in->getString('target_draw_date', ''));
    $__elitePayload = json_decode((string)$in->getString('payload', '{}'), true);
    if (!is_array($__elitePayload)) { $__elitePayload = []; }

    if ($__eliteAction !== 'load_elite_metrics_summary' && ($__eliteGameId === '' || $__eliteRunUuid === '' || $__eliteTargetDate === '')) {
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'missing_identity']);
        exit;
    }
    if ($__eliteAction !== 'load_elite_metrics_summary' && !preg_match('/^\d{4}\-\d{2}\-\d{2}$/', $__eliteTargetDate)) {
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_target_draw_date']);
        exit;
    }

    try {
        if ($__eliteAction === 'load_learning_event') {
            $officialHash = (string)($__elitePayload['official_result_hash'] ?? '');
            if ($officialHash === '') { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'missing_official_result_hash']); exit; }
            $db = Factory::getDbo();
            $q = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->select('*')
                ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events'))
                ->where($db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__eliteRunUuid))
                ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__eliteGameId))
                ->where($db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__eliteTargetDate))
                ->where($db->quoteName('official_result_hash') . ' = ' . $db->quote($officialHash))
                ->setLimit(1);
            $db->setQuery($q);
            $row = $db->loadAssoc();
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'row' => $row ?: null], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            exit;
        }

        if ($__eliteAction === 'load_elite_metrics_summary') {
            $gid = $__eliteGameId;
            if ($gid === '') { $gid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('gid', '')); }
            if ($gid === '') { echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_game_id']); exit; }
            $rows = SKAI_loadEliteMetricsSummaryRows($gid, (int)($in->getInt('limit', 100)));
            $count = count($rows);
            $acc = [
                'top5_containment' => 0.0,
                'top10_containment' => 0.0,
                'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => 0.0,
                'winner_rank_lift_random' => 0.0,
                'winner_rank_lift_frequency' => 0.0,
                'winner_rank_lift_recency' => 0.0,
                'winner_rank_lift_skip' => 0.0,
                'promotion_help_rate' => 0.0,
                'promotion_harm_rate' => 0.0,
                'protected_core_regression_rate' => 0.0,
            ];
            foreach ($rows as $__r) {
                foreach ($acc as $__k => $__v) { $acc[$__k] += (float)($__r[$__k] ?? 0.0); }
            }
            if ($count > 0) {
                foreach ($acc as $__k => $__v) { $acc[$__k] = (float)($__v / $count); }
            }
            $acc['rolling_stability_score'] = max(0.0, 1.0 - (float)$acc['protected_core_regression_rate']);
            $acc['elite_objective_j'] = SKAI_computeEliteCompositeObjective([
                'top5_containment_rate' => (float)$acc['top5_containment'],
                'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => (float)$acc['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'],
                'top10_containment_rate' => (float)$acc['top10_containment'],
                'avg_lift' => (
                    (float)$acc['winner_rank_lift_random'] +
                    (float)$acc['winner_rank_lift_frequency'] +
                    (float)$acc['winner_rank_lift_recency'] +
                    (float)$acc['winner_rank_lift_skip']
                ) / 4.0,
                'rolling_stability_score' => (float)$acc['rolling_stability_score'],
            ]);
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'game_id' => $gid, 'sample_count' => $count, 'summary' => $acc], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            exit;
        }

        if ($__eliteAction === 'save_learning_event' || $__eliteAction === 'reconcile_learning_event') {
            $officialResult = $__elitePayload['official_result'] ?? [];
            $rankedMainTop20 = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)($__elitePayload['ranked_main_top20'] ?? [])));
            $rankedMainTop20 = array_values(array_filter(array_slice($rankedMainTop20, 0, 20), static function($v){ return $v > 0; }));
            $rankedExtra = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', (array)($__elitePayload['ranked_extra'] ?? [])), static function($v){ return $v > 0; }));
            if ($__eliteAction === 'reconcile_learning_event' && count($rankedMainTop20) === 0) {
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'missing_ranked_main_top20']);
                exit;
            }

            $parts = SKAI_extractOfficialResultParts($officialResult);
            $actualMain = $parts['main'];
            $actualExtra = $parts['extra'];
            if ($__eliteAction === 'reconcile_learning_event' && empty($actualMain)) {
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'missing_official_main_result']);
                exit;
            }

            $officialGame = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)($__elitePayload['official_game_id'] ?? ($officialResult['game_id'] ?? $__eliteGameId)));
            $officialDate = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)($__elitePayload['official_draw_date'] ?? ($officialResult['draw_date'] ?? $__eliteTargetDate)));
            if ($officialGame !== $__eliteGameId || $officialDate !== $__eliteTargetDate) {
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'official_result_mismatch']);
                exit;
            }

            $officialHash = hash('sha256', json_encode([
                'game_id' => $__eliteGameId,
                'draw_date' => $__eliteTargetDate,
                'main' => $actualMain,
                'extra' => $actualExtra,
            ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE));

            $baselines = [
                'random' => (array)($__elitePayload['baseline_random'] ?? []),
                'frequency' => (array)($__elitePayload['baseline_frequency'] ?? []),
                'recency' => (array)($__elitePayload['baseline_recency'] ?? []),
                'skip' => (array)($__elitePayload['baseline_skip'] ?? []),
            ];
            $promotionContext = [
                'promotion_help_rate' => (float)($__elitePayload['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'promotion_harm_rate' => (float)($__elitePayload['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'protected_core_regression_rate' => (float)($__elitePayload['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'rolling_stability_score' => (float)($__elitePayload['rolling_stability_score'] ?? 0.0),
            ];
            $eliteMetrics = SKAI_calculateEliteRankMetrics($rankedMainTop20, $actualMain, $baselines, $promotionContext);

            $storeRes = SKAI_storeLearningEvent([
                'run_uuid' => $__eliteRunUuid,
                'game_id' => $__eliteGameId,
                'target_draw_date' => $__eliteTargetDate,
                'official_result_hash' => $officialHash,
                'main_actual_json' => json_encode($actualMain, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
                'extra_actual_json' => json_encode($actualExtra, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
                'ranked_main_top20_json' => json_encode($rankedMainTop20, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
                'ranked_extra_json' => json_encode($rankedExtra, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
                'top5_containment' => (float)($eliteMetrics['top5_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'top10_containment' => (float)($eliteMetrics['top10_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => (float)($eliteMetrics['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'] ?? 0.0),
                'winner_rank_lift_random' => (float)($eliteMetrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_random'] ?? 0.0),
                'winner_rank_lift_frequency' => (float)($eliteMetrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency'] ?? 0.0),
                'winner_rank_lift_recency' => (float)($eliteMetrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_recency'] ?? 0.0),
                'winner_rank_lift_skip' => (float)($eliteMetrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_skip'] ?? 0.0),
                'promotion_help_rate' => (float)($eliteMetrics['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'promotion_harm_rate' => (float)($eliteMetrics['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'protected_core_regression_rate' => (float)($eliteMetrics['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0.0),
                'is_learned' => 1,
            ]);
            if (empty($storeRes['ok'])) {
                echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => (string)($storeRes['error'] ?? 'store_failed')]);
                exit;
            }
            echo json_encode([
                'ok' => true,
                'deduplicated' => !empty($storeRes['deduplicated']),
                'official_result_hash' => $officialHash,
                'elite_metrics' => $eliteMetrics,
            ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
            exit;
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $__eliteEx) {
        error_log('[SKAI_ELITE] AJAX handler exception: ' . $__eliteEx->getMessage());
        echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'error' => 'server_exception']);
        exit;
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// Migration is now triggered only via the secure POST admin endpoint:
//   skai_action=skai_admin_migrate (core.admin + CSRF required).
// The SKAI_Phase1_Install() / SKAI_Evaluation_Install() functions below
// are called internally by that handler and are not directly callable
// from a public request.
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_PHASE1]] SKAI Phase 1 -- Install / migrate dedicated SKAI tables.
 *
 * Creates all production tables if they do not already exist.
 * Safe to call multiple times (CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS).
 * Preserves all existing data.
 *
 * @return array{success:bool,message:string,tables_created:int,errors:array<string>}
 */
function SKAI_Phase1_Install(): array
{
    try {
        $db      = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
        $created = 0;
        $errors  = [];

        $tables = [
            // 1. Per-lottery authoritative settings
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_lottery_settings` (
                `id`                         INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`                    VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `lottery_slug`               VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
                `main_pool_size`             INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `bonus_pool_size`            INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `draw_count_main`            INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `draw_count_bonus`           INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `is_multistate`              TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `is_multicountry`            TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `supports_bonus`             TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `supports_pairs`             TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                `supports_tail_recovery`     TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                `supports_calibration`       TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                `supports_gibbs`             TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
                `active_parameter_set_id`    INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `active_calibration_version` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `active_tail_version`        VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `status`                     VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
                `created_at`                 DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `updated_at`                 DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_sls_game_id`      (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_sls_lottery_slug` (`lottery_slug`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 2. Per-user preferences (separate from shared predictive core)
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_user_preferences` (
                `id`                      INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `user_id`                 INT NOT NULL,
                `game_id`                 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `risk_profile`            VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'balanced',
                `coverage_style`          VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'balanced',
                `combo_count_preference`  INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 5,
                `overlap_tolerance`       VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium',
                `ui_density_preference`   VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'comfortable',
                `show_advanced_panels`    TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `created_at`              DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `updated_at`              DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_sup_user_id`   (`user_id`),
                KEY `idx_sup_game_id`   (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_sup_user_game` (`user_id`, `game_id`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 3. Run log -- one record per analysis run
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_run_log` (
                `id`                    INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `run_uuid`              VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
                `user_id`               INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `game_id`               VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `lottery_slug`          VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `engine_version`        VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `config_version`        VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `tuning_mode`           VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `calibration_enabled`   TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `tail_recovery_enabled` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `pairwise_enabled`      TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `gibbs_enabled`         TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `runtime_status`        VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `final_rank_source`     VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `score_path_hash`       VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `created_at`            DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uq_srl_run_uuid` (`run_uuid`),
                KEY `idx_srl_game_id`    (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_srl_user_id`    (`user_id`),
                KEY `idx_srl_created_at` (`created_at`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 4. Backtest summary -- per-window aggregated backtest results
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_backtest_summary` (
                `id`                       INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`                  VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `window_start`             DATE NOT NULL,
                `window_end`               DATE NOT NULL,
                `sample_size`              INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `recall_at_20`             DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `ndcg_at_20`               DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `mean_winner_rank`         DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `top_10_stability`         DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `benchmark_random_lift`    DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `benchmark_frequency_lift` DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `benchmark_recency_lift`   DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `created_at`               DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_sbs_game_id`      (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_sbs_window_start` (`window_start`),
                KEY `idx_sbs_window_end`   (`window_end`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 5. Calibration bins -- monotonic calibration mapping per lottery
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_calibration_bins` (
                `id`                   INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`              VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `calibration_version`  VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `bin_index`            INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `score_min`            DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `score_max`            DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `sample_count`         INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `observed_hit_rate`    DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `smoothed_hit_rate`    DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `created_at`           DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_scb_game_id`             (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_scb_calibration_version` (`calibration_version`),
                KEY `idx_scb_bin_index`           (`bin_index`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 6. Tail recovery summary -- per-version boundary optimization results
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_tail_recovery_summary` (
                `id`                             INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`                        VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `tail_version`                   VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `window_start`                   DATE NOT NULL,
                `window_end`                     DATE NOT NULL,
                `tail_miss_reduction_rate`       DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `near_miss_promotion_rate`       DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `tail_gain_score`                DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `protected_core_regression_rate` DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `sample_count`                   INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `created_at`                     DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_strs_game_id`      (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_strs_tail_version` (`tail_version`),
                KEY `idx_strs_window_start` (`window_start`),
                KEY `idx_strs_window_end`   (`window_end`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 7. Parameter sets -- versioned scoring configurations
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_parameter_sets` (
                `id`                INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `parameter_version` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `parameter_json`    LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `source_mode`       VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `is_live_path`      TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `is_active`         TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `score_path_hash`   VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `created_at`        DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `updated_at`        DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_sps_game_id`           (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_sps_parameter_version` (`parameter_version`),
                KEY `idx_sps_is_active`         (`is_active`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 8. Runtime audit -- per-run verification record
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_runtime_audit` (
                `id`                      INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `run_uuid`                VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
                `game_id`                 VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `domain_verified`         TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `mode_verified`           TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `metrics_complete`        TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `display_matches_engine`  TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `snapshot_matches_engine` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `fallback_triggered`      TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `fallback_reason`         VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `audit_status`            VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `created_at`              DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_sra_run_uuid`   (`run_uuid`),
                KEY `idx_sra_game_id`    (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_sra_created_at` (`created_at`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 9. [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Shared learning -- persistent platform-level aggregate learning
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_shared_learning` (
                `id`               INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`          VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `learning_key`     VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
                `learning_scope`   VARCHAR(64)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'global',
                `metric_json`      LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `sample_count`     INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `last_result_date` DATE NOT NULL,
                `last_run_uuid`    VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `created_at`       DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `updated_at`       DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uq_ssl_game_key_scope` (`game_id`, `learning_key`, `learning_scope`),
                KEY `idx_ssl_game_id`      (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_ssl_updated_at`   (`updated_at`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 10. Elite learning events -- authoritative post-draw deduplicated reconciliation ledger
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_learning_events` (
                `id`                                INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `run_uuid`                          VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
                `game_id`                           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `target_draw_date`                  DATE NOT NULL,
                `official_result_hash`              VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
                `main_actual_json`                  LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `extra_actual_json`                 LONGTEXT NULL,
                `ranked_main_top20_json`            LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `ranked_extra_json`                 LONGTEXT NULL,
                `top5_containment`                  DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `top10_containment`                 DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `mean_reciprocal_winner_rank`       DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `winner_rank_lift_random`           DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `winner_rank_lift_frequency`        DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `winner_rank_lift_recency`          DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `winner_rank_lift_skip`             DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `promotion_help_rate`               DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `promotion_harm_rate`               DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `protected_core_regression_rate`    DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `is_learned`                        TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `created_at`                        DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `learned_at`                        DATETIME NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uq_sle_run_game_draw_hash` (`run_uuid`, `game_id`, `target_draw_date`, `official_result_hash`),
                KEY `idx_sle_game_date` (`game_id`, `target_draw_date`),
                KEY `idx_sle_learned`   (`is_learned`, `learned_at`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            // 11. Best settings -- one row per game; stores the highest-scoring tuned parameter set
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_best_settings` (
                `id`                INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`           VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `parameter_version` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `settings_json`     LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `parameter_json`    LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `best_params_json`  LONGTEXT NOT NULL,
                `score`             DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `best_score`        DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `avg_recall_at_20`  DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `source_mode`       VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
                `is_active`         TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `status`            VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
                `created_at`        DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `updated_at`        DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                KEY `idx_sbs_game_id`   (`game_id`),
                KEY `idx_sbs_is_active` (`is_active`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
        ];

        foreach ($tables as $sql) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                $db->execute();
                $created++;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $errors[] = $e->getMessage();
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Table creation error: ' . $e->getMessage());
            }
        }

        return [
            'success'        => count($errors) === 0,
            'message'        => count($errors) === 0
                ? 'SKAI Phase 1: ' . $created . ' tables created successfully.'
                : 'SKAI Phase 1: ' . $created . ' tables created with ' . count($errors) . ' error(s).',
            'tables_created' => $created,
            'errors'         => $errors,
        ];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Install failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [
            'success'        => false,
            'message'        => 'SKAI Phase 1 install failed: ' . $e->getMessage(),
            'tables_created' => 0,
            'errors'         => [$e->getMessage()],
        ];
    }
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_PHASE1]] Joomla-safe admin migration trigger.
 *
 * Runs SKAI_Evaluation_Install(), SKAI_TailMissRecovery_Install(), and
 * SKAI_Phase1_Install() in sequence.  Only callable by authenticated Joomla
 * superusers via a POST request carrying a valid CSRF token.
 * Any public GET-based install trigger has been removed.
 *
 * @return array{success:bool,message:string,details:array<string,mixed>}
 */
function SKAI_runAdminMigration(): array
{
    $app      = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getApplication();
    $user     = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    $in       = $app->getInput();

    // Must be a POST with a valid CSRF token.
    if ($in->getMethod() !== 'POST' || !\Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Migration blocked: invalid token or not POST.');
        return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Forbidden: CSRF check failed.', 'details' => []];
    }

    // Must be a logged-in superuser.
    if ($user->guest || !$user->authorise('core.admin')) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Migration blocked: insufficient privileges (uid=' . (int)$user->id . ').');
        return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Forbidden: superuser required.', 'details' => []];
    }

    $details = [];

    // Existing evaluation tables.
    if (function_exists('SKAI_Evaluation_Install')) {
        $r = SKAI_Evaluation_Install();
        $details['eval'] = $r;
        if (!$r['success']) {
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] SKAI_Evaluation_Install errors: ' . implode('; ', $r['errors']));
        }
    }

    // Existing tail-miss tables.
    if (function_exists('SKAI_TailMissRecovery_Install')) {
        $r = SKAI_TailMissRecovery_Install();
        $details['tail'] = $r;
        if (!$r['success']) {
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] SKAI_TailMissRecovery_Install errors: ' . implode('; ', $r['errors']));
        }
    }

    // New Phase 1 tables.
    $r = SKAI_Phase1_Install();
    $details['phase1'] = $r;
    if (!$r['success']) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] SKAI_Phase1_Install errors: ' . implode('; ', $r['errors']));
    }

    // Schema upgrade for additive columns.
    if (function_exists('SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade')) {
        $r = SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade();
        $details['schema_upgrade'] = $r;
    }

    // [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] Schema upgrade for display/save/render structured fields.
    if (function_exists('skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols')) {
        $r = skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols();
        $details['user_saved_numbers_display_sync'] = $r;
    }

    // Idempotent migration: ensure game_id VARCHAR(50) in #__skai_shared_learning.
    if (function_exists('SKAI_runSharedLearningLotteryIdMigration')) {
        $r = SKAI_runSharedLearningLotteryIdMigration();
        $details['shared_learning_game_id_migration'] = $r;
    }

    // Idempotent migration: ensure game_id VARCHAR(50) (not INT) in all 8 engine-learning tables.
    if (function_exists('SKAI_runEngineTablesGameIdMigration')) {
        $r = SKAI_runEngineTablesGameIdMigration();
        $details['engine_tables_game_id_migration'] = $r;
    }

    $allOk = array_reduce($details, static function (bool $carry, array $item): bool {
        return $carry && ($item['success'] ?? false);
    }, true);

    return [
        'success' => $allOk,
        'message' => $allOk ? 'All SKAI migrations completed successfully.' : 'Some migrations had errors -- see details.',
        'details' => $details,
    ];
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_PHASE1]] Joomla admin migration endpoint.
// Triggered only via POST with action=skai_admin_migrate and valid CSRF token.
// Superuser access required. Public GET-based triggers are NOT supported.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
if ($in->getMethod() === 'POST'
    && (string)$in->getString('skai_action', '') === 'skai_admin_migrate'
    && \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::checkToken('post')
) {
    $migrateUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
    if (!$migrateUser->guest && $migrateUser->authorise('core.admin')) {
        try {
            $app->setHeader('Content-Type', 'application/json; charset=utf-8', true);
            $app->sendHeaders();
        } catch (\Throwable $_mh) {
            @header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
        }
        echo json_encode(SKAI_runAdminMigration(), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        exit;
    } else {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Unauthorized migration attempt by uid=' . (int)(\Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser()->id));
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_PHASE1+B]] Auto-migration guard: call SKAI_Phase1_Install() once
// per admin session; for non-admin users log a warning if tables are missing.
// Schema creation is admin-only; non-admins get a logged warning, not a crash.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
$__autoMigrUser = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getUser();
if (!$__autoMigrUser->guest && $__autoMigrUser->authorise('core.admin')) {
    $__autoMigrKey  = 'skai.phase1.migrated.v4';
    $__autoMigrDone = $app->getUserState($__autoMigrKey, 0);
    if (!$__autoMigrDone) {
        // CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS is safe to re-call; only runs once per admin session.
        try {
            $__migrResult = SKAI_Phase1_Install();
            if (!$__migrResult['success']) {
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Auto-migration partial: ' . implode('; ', $__migrResult['errors']));
            }
            // Also apply additive #__user_saved_numbers schema columns during admin page-load.
            // This ensures target-binding/display-sync fields are created without requiring
            // a separate admin-only POST migration call.
            if (function_exists('skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols')) {
                $__saveColsResult = skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols();
                if (empty($__saveColsResult['success'])) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] user_saved_numbers additive migration partial: ' . (string)($__saveColsResult['message'] ?? 'unknown error'));
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $__autoMigrEx) {
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE1] Auto-migration exception: ' . $__autoMigrEx->getMessage());
        }
        $app->setUserState($__autoMigrKey, 1);
    }
} elseif (!$__autoMigrUser->guest) {
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_B]] Non-admin authenticated user: warn if required tables are missing
    // This is non-fatal and does not block the page; learning writes will fail gracefully.
    try {
        $__missingTables = SKAI_checkRequiredTables();
        if (!empty($__missingTables)) {
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_B] SKAI learning tables missing for user id=' . (int)$__autoMigrUser->id
                . ': ' . implode(', ', $__missingTables) . ' -- admin must run migration.');
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $__autoMigrNonAdmEx) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_B] Table-check exception: ' . $__autoMigrNonAdmEx->getMessage());
    }
}
unset($__autoMigrUser, $__autoMigrKey, $__autoMigrDone);


// === EVALUATION SYSTEM FUNCTIONS (ALL 8 MODULES) ===
// Includes: Instrumentation, Backtest, Attribution, Calibration,
//           Pairwise, Gibbs, Tuning, Reports

/**
 * =====================================================================
 * SKAI EVALUATION ENGINE - INSTRUMENTATION MODULE
 * =====================================================================
 * Purpose: Log per-number score breakdowns for each prediction run
 * Dependencies: Joomla 5.1.2, skai_evaluation_schema.sql
 * Usage: Call SKAI_logPredictionRun() after computing top 20
 * =====================================================================
 */



/**
 * Log a complete prediction run with score breakdowns
 * 
 * @param string $gameId         Lottery game identifier
 * @param array  $rankedList     Array of candidate objects: [{num, score_total, score_parts, rank}]
 * @param array  $top20Nums      Top 20 numbers (for quick evaluation)
 * @param array  $params         Parameters used: weights, window, etc.
 * @param string $drawDate       Target draw date (YYYY-MM-DD) or null
 * @param array  $extrasRanked   Extra ball predictions (optional)
 * @param bool   $deterministic  Whether consistent results mode was used
 * @param int    $reproKey       Reproducibility key (backward compatible with seed)
 * @return int|false             Inserted log ID or false on failure
 */
function SKAI_logPredictionRun($gameId, $rankedList, $top20Nums, $params, $drawDate = null, $extrasRanked = [], $deterministic = false, $reproKey = null) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $query = $db->getQuery(true);
        
        // Ensure ranked list has at least top 50 candidates
        $fullRankedList = array_slice($rankedList, 0, 50);
        
        // Validate and enrich score_parts for each candidate
        foreach ($fullRankedList as &$candidate) {
            if (!isset($candidate['score_parts'])) {
                $candidate['score_parts'] = [
                    'freq' => 0.0,
                    'recency' => 0.0,
                    'window' => 0.0,
                    'ml' => 0.0,
                    'penalties' => 0.0,
                    'pairwise' => 0.0
                ];
            } else {
                // Ensure all parts exist (set to 0 if missing)
                $parts = &$candidate['score_parts'];
                $parts['freq'] = $parts['freq'] ?? 0.0;
                $parts['recency'] = $parts['recency'] ?? 0.0;
                $parts['window'] = $parts['window'] ?? 0.0;
                $parts['ml'] = $parts['ml'] ?? 0.0;
                $parts['penalties'] = $parts['penalties'] ?? 0.0;
                $parts['pairwise'] = $parts['pairwise'] ?? 0.0;
            }
            
            // Add metadata
            if (!isset($candidate['meta'])) {
                $candidate['meta'] = [
                    'gameId' => $gameId,
                    'drawDate' => $drawDate,
                    'modelVersion' => 'v1.0',
                    'params' => $params
                ];
            }
        }
        unset($candidate);
        
        // Prepare insert
        $now = new Date('now');
        $columns = [
            'game_id',
            'run_date',
            'draw_date',
            'model_version',
            'params_json',
            'ranked_list',
            'top20_nums',
            'extras_json',
            'deterministic',
            'seed',
            'created_at'
        ];
        
        $values = [
            $db->quote($gameId),
            $db->quote($now->toSql()),
            $drawDate ? $db->quote($drawDate) : 'NULL',
            $db->quote('v1.0'),
            $db->quote(json_encode($params, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
            $db->quote(json_encode($fullRankedList, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
            $db->quote(implode(',', $top20Nums)),
            !empty($extrasRanked) ? $db->quote(json_encode($extrasRanked, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)) : 'NULL',
            $deterministic ? '1' : '0',
            $reproKey !== null ? (int)$reproKey : 'NULL',  // Store as seed column for DB compatibility
            $db->quote($now->toSql())
        ];
        
        $query->insert($db->quoteName('#__skai_run_logs'))
            ->columns($db->quoteName($columns))
            ->values(implode(',', $values));
        
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $db->execute();
        
        return $db->insertid();
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] logPredictionRun error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return false;
    }
}

/**
 * Build score_parts breakdown from existing SKAI scoring components
 * 
 * @param int   $num            Number being scored
 * @param float $freqScore      Frequency component
 * @param float $recencyScore   Recency/skip component
 * @param float $windowScore    Window-based component
 * @param float $mlScore        Machine learning component
 * @param float $penalty        Penalty adjustments
 * @param float $pairwiseBonus  Pairwise lift bonus (from set-aware inference)
 * @return array                Score parts structure
 */
function SKAI_buildScoreParts($num, $freqScore, $recencyScore, $windowScore, $mlScore, $penalty, $pairwiseBonus = 0.0) {
    return [
        'freq' => (float)$freqScore,
        'recency' => (float)$recencyScore,
        'window' => (float)$windowScore,
        'ml' => (float)$mlScore,
        'penalties' => (float)$penalty,
        'pairwise' => (float)$pairwiseBonus
    ];
}

/**
 * Create score breakdown metadata
 * 
 * @param string $gameId       Game identifier
 * @param string $drawDate     Target draw date
 * @param array  $params       Parameters used
 * @return array               Metadata structure
 */
function SKAI_buildScoreMeta($gameId, $drawDate, $params) {
    return [
        'gameId' => $gameId,
        'drawDate' => $drawDate,
        'modelVersion' => 'v1.0',
        'params' => $params
    ];
}

/**
 * Get recent prediction runs for a game
 * 
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier
 * @param int    $limit   Number of recent runs to retrieve
 * @return array          Array of run log records
 */
function SKAI_getRecentRuns($gameId, $limit = 10) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $query = $db->getQuery(true);
        
        $query->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_run_logs'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
            ->order($db->quoteName('run_date') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit($limit);
        
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $results = $db->loadAssocList();
        
        // Decode JSON fields
        foreach ($results as &$row) {
            $row['params_json'] = json_decode($row['params_json'], true);
            $row['ranked_list'] = json_decode($row['ranked_list'], true);
            $row['top20_nums'] = explode(',', $row['top20_nums']);
            if ($row['extras_json']) {
                $row['extras_json'] = json_decode($row['extras_json'], true);
            }
        }
        
        return $results;
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] getRecentRuns error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [];
    }
}

/**
 * Get a specific run by ID
 * 
 * @param int $runId  Run log ID
 * @return array|null Run record or null if not found
 */
function SKAI_getRunById($runId) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $query = $db->getQuery(true);
        
        $query->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_run_logs'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$runId);
        
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $row = $db->loadAssoc();
        
        if ($row) {
            // Decode JSON fields
            $row['params_json'] = json_decode($row['params_json'], true);
            $row['ranked_list'] = json_decode($row['ranked_list'], true);
            $row['top20_nums'] = explode(',', $row['top20_nums']);
            if ($row['extras_json']) {
                $row['extras_json'] = json_decode($row['extras_json'], true);
            }
        }
        
        return $row;
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] getRunById error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return null;
    }
}

/**
 * Clean up old run logs (maintenance)
 * 
 * @param int $daysToKeep  Keep logs from last N days
 * @return int             Number of rows deleted
 */
function SKAI_cleanupOldLogs($daysToKeep = 180) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $query = $db->getQuery(true);
        
        $cutoffDate = new Date('-' . $daysToKeep . ' days');
        
        $query->delete($db->quoteName('#__skai_run_logs'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('created_at') . ' < ' . $db->quote($cutoffDate->toSql()));
        
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $db->execute();
        
        return $db->getAffectedRows();
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] cleanupOldLogs error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return 0;
    }
}

/**
 * =====================================================================
 * SKAI EVALUATION ENGINE - BACKTEST MODULE
 * =====================================================================
 * Purpose: Walk-forward time-split backtest with evaluation metrics
 * Metrics: Recall@20, MeanWinnerRank, NDCG@20
 * Dependencies: Joomla 5.1.2, skai_evaluation_schema.sql
 * =====================================================================
 */



/**
 * Run walk-forward backtest on historical draws
 * 
 * @param string $gameId         Lottery game identifier  
 * @param array  $drawHistory    Historical draws (chronological): [{date, numbers, extras}]
 * @param int    $windowSize     Training window size (number of draws)
 * @param int    $startIndex     Start index for backtesting
 * @param int    $endIndex       End index for backtesting (null = all)
 * @param array  $params         Prediction parameters
 * @param callable $predictFn    Prediction function($trainWindow, $params) => $rankedList
 * @return array                 Backtest results summary
 */
function SKAI_runWalkForwardBacktest($gameId, $drawHistory, $windowSize, $startIndex, $endIndex, $params, $predictFn) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $results = [];
        
        if ($endIndex === null || $endIndex > count($drawHistory)) {
            $endIndex = count($drawHistory);
        }
        
        // Walk forward through historical draws
        for ($t = $startIndex; $t < $endIndex; $t++) {
            // Training window: draws before t
            $trainStart = max(0, $t - $windowSize);
            $trainWindow = array_slice($drawHistory, $trainStart, $t - $trainStart);
            
            if (empty($trainWindow)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            // Generate prediction using training window
            $rankedList = $predictFn($trainWindow, $params);
            
            if (empty($rankedList)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            // Actual winners for this draw
            $actualDraw = $drawHistory[$t];
            $winners = $actualDraw['numbers'] ?? [];
            
            if (empty($winners)) {
                continue;
            }
            
            // Top 20 prediction
            $top20 = array_slice(array_column($rankedList, 'num'), 0, 20);
            
            // Calculate metrics
            $metrics = SKAI_calculateBacktestMetrics($rankedList, $winners, $top20);
            
            // Store metrics in database
            $metricsId = SKAI_storeBacktestMetrics(
                $gameId,
                $actualDraw['date'],
                $trainWindow[0]['date'] ?? null,
                $trainWindow[count($trainWindow) - 1]['date'] ?? null,
                $windowSize,
                $metrics,
                $winners,
                $params
            );
            
            // Store miss attribution for winners not in top 20
            if ($metricsId && !empty($metrics['missing_winners'])) {
                SKAI_storeMissAttribution(
                    $metricsId,
                    $gameId,
                    $actualDraw['date'],
                    $metrics['missing_winners'],
                    $rankedList,
                    $top20
                );
            }
            
            $results[] = array_merge($metrics, [
                'test_date' => $actualDraw['date'],
                'metrics_id' => $metricsId
            ]);
        }
        
        // Calculate aggregate statistics
        $aggregate = SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults($results);
        
        return [
            'per_draw' => $results,
            'aggregate' => $aggregate,
            'game_id' => $gameId,
            'window_size' => $windowSize,
            'num_tests' => count($results)
        ];
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] runWalkForwardBacktest error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return ['error' => $e->getMessage()];
    }
}

/**
 * Calculate backtest metrics for a single draw
 * 
 * @param array $rankedList  Full ranked candidate list
 * @param array $winners     Actual winning numbers
 * @param array $top20       Top 20 predictions
 * @return array             Metrics: {recall_at_20, mean_winner_rank, ndcg_at_20, missing_winners}
 */
function SKAI_calculateBacktestMetrics($rankedList, $winners, $top20) {
    // Recall@20: fraction of winners in top 20
    $winnersInTop20 = array_intersect($winners, $top20);
    $recallAt20 = count($winners) > 0 ? count($winnersInTop20) / count($winners) : 0.0;
    
    // Build rank lookup map
    $rankMap = [];
    foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $item) {
        $rankMap[$item['num']] = $idx + 1; // 1-based rank
    }
    
    // Mean Winner Rank: average rank of winners (use 999 if not found)
    $winnerRanks = [];
    $missingWinners = [];
    foreach ($winners as $w) {
        if (isset($rankMap[$w])) {
            $winnerRanks[] = $rankMap[$w];
        } else {
            $winnerRanks[] = 999;
            $missingWinners[] = $w;
        }
    }
    $meanWinnerRank = count($winnerRanks) > 0 ? array_sum($winnerRanks) / count($winnerRanks) : 999.0;
    
    // NDCG@20: relevance=1 for winners, 0 for non-winners
    $ndcgAt20 = SKAI_calculateNDCG($rankedList, $winners, 20);
    
    $elite = SKAI_calculateEliteRankMetrics($rankedList, $winners, [
        'random' => [],
        'frequency' => [],
        'recency' => [],
        'skip' => [],
    ], []);

    return [
        'recall_at_20' => $recallAt20,
        'mean_winner_rank' => $meanWinnerRank,
        'ndcg_at_20' => $ndcgAt20,
        'winners_in_top20' => $winnersInTop20,
        'missing_winners' => $missingWinners,
        'total_winners' => count($winners),
        'top5_containment_rate' => (float)($elite['top5_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'top10_containment_rate' => (float)($elite['top10_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => (float)($elite['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_random' => (float)($elite['winner_rank_lift_vs_random'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency' => (float)($elite['winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_recency' => (float)($elite['winner_rank_lift_vs_recency'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_skip' => (float)($elite['winner_rank_lift_vs_skip'] ?? 0.0),
        'promotion_help_rate' => (float)($elite['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'promotion_harm_rate' => (float)($elite['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'protected_core_regression_rate' => (float)($elite['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'rolling_stability_score' => (float)($elite['rolling_stability_score'] ?? 0.0),
        'elite_objective_j' => (float)($elite['elite_objective_j'] ?? 0.0),
    ];
}

function SKAI_buildRankMapFromOrderedNumbers(array $orderedNums): array
{
    $rankMap = [];
    foreach (array_values($orderedNums) as $idx => $n) {
        $nn = (int)$n;
        if ($nn > 0 && !isset($rankMap[$nn])) {
            $rankMap[$nn] = $idx + 1;
        }
    }
    return $rankMap;
}

function SKAI_computeRankLiftVsBaselines(array $winnerNums, array $liveRankMap, array $baselineRankMaps): array
{
    $winnerNums = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', $winnerNums)));
    if (empty($winnerNums)) {
        return ['random' => 0.0, 'frequency' => 0.0, 'recency' => 0.0, 'skip' => 0.0, 'avg' => 0.0];
    }

    $liveMrr = 0.0;
    foreach ($winnerNums as $w) {
        $r = (int)($liveRankMap[$w] ?? 0);
        $liveMrr += $r > 0 ? (1.0 / $r) : 0.0;
    }
    $liveMrr /= count($winnerNums);

    $out = ['random' => 0.0, 'frequency' => 0.0, 'recency' => 0.0, 'skip' => 0.0, 'avg' => 0.0];
    $keys = ['random', 'frequency', 'recency', 'skip'];
    $sum = 0.0; $n = 0;
    foreach ($keys as $k) {
        $baseMap = is_array($baselineRankMaps[$k] ?? null) ? $baselineRankMaps[$k] : [];
        if ($k === 'random' && empty($baseMap)) {
            $baseMrr = 0.025;
        } else {
            $baseMrr = 0.0;
            foreach ($winnerNums as $w) {
                $br = (int)($baseMap[$w] ?? 0);
                $baseMrr += $br > 0 ? (1.0 / $br) : 0.0;
            }
            $baseMrr /= count($winnerNums);
        }
        $lift = $liveMrr - $baseMrr;
        $out[$k] = (float)$lift;
        $sum += $lift; $n++;
    }
    $out['avg'] = $n > 0 ? (float)($sum / $n) : 0.0;
    return $out;
}

function SKAI_computeEliteCompositeObjective(array $eliteMetrics): float
{
    $t5 = (float)($eliteMetrics['top5_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0);
    $mrrw = (float)($eliteMetrics['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'] ?? 0.0);
    $t10 = (float)($eliteMetrics['top10_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0);
    $lift = (float)($eliteMetrics['avg_lift'] ?? 0.0);
    $stable = (float)($eliteMetrics['rolling_stability_score'] ?? 0.0);
    return (float)((0.40 * $t5) + (0.25 * $mrrw) + (0.15 * $t10) + (0.10 * $lift) + (0.10 * $stable));
}

function SKAI_calculateEliteRankMetrics($rankedList, $winners, $baselines = [], $promotionContext = []): array
{
    $winnerNums = array_values(array_unique(array_map('intval', (array)$winners)));
    $ordered = [];
    if (is_array($rankedList) && !empty($rankedList) && is_array($rankedList[0] ?? null)) {
        foreach ($rankedList as $r) { $ordered[] = (int)($r['num'] ?? 0); }
    } else {
        $ordered = array_values(array_map('intval', (array)$rankedList));
    }
    $ordered = array_values(array_filter($ordered, static function($v){ return (int)$v > 0; }));
    $rankMap = SKAI_buildRankMapFromOrderedNumbers($ordered);

    $top5 = array_slice($ordered, 0, 5);
    $top10 = array_slice($ordered, 0, 10);
    $inTop5 = array_intersect($winnerNums, $top5);
    $inTop10 = array_intersect($winnerNums, $top10);
    $den = max(1, count($winnerNums));
    $mrrw = 0.0;
    foreach ($winnerNums as $w) {
        $rk = (int)($rankMap[$w] ?? 0);
        $mrrw += $rk > 0 ? (1.0 / $rk) : 0.0;
    }
    $mrrw = $mrrw / $den;

    $baselineRankMaps = [
        'random' => SKAI_buildRankMapFromOrderedNumbers((array)($baselines['random'] ?? [])),
        'frequency' => SKAI_buildRankMapFromOrderedNumbers((array)($baselines['frequency'] ?? [])),
        'recency' => SKAI_buildRankMapFromOrderedNumbers((array)($baselines['recency'] ?? [])),
        'skip' => SKAI_buildRankMapFromOrderedNumbers((array)($baselines['skip'] ?? [])),
    ];
    $lifts = SKAI_computeRankLiftVsBaselines($winnerNums, $rankMap, $baselineRankMaps);

    $promotionHelp = (float)($promotionContext['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0.0);
    $promotionHarm = (float)($promotionContext['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0.0);
    $coreReg = (float)($promotionContext['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0.0);
    $stable = (float)($promotionContext['rolling_stability_score'] ?? max(0.0, 1.0 - $coreReg));

    $metrics = [
        'top5_containment_rate' => (float)(count($inTop5) / $den),
        'top10_containment_rate' => (float)(count($inTop10) / $den),
        'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => (float)$mrrw,
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_random' => (float)$lifts['random'],
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency' => (float)$lifts['frequency'],
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_recency' => (float)$lifts['recency'],
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_skip' => (float)$lifts['skip'],
        'avg_lift' => (float)$lifts['avg'],
        'promotion_help_rate' => $promotionHelp,
        'promotion_harm_rate' => $promotionHarm,
        'protected_core_regression_rate' => $coreReg,
        'rolling_stability_score' => $stable,
    ];
    $metrics['elite_objective_j'] = SKAI_computeEliteCompositeObjective($metrics);
    return $metrics;
}

/**
 * Calculate NDCG@k (Normalized Discounted Cumulative Gain)
 * 
 * @param array $rankedList  Ranked predictions
 * @param array $winners     Actual winners (relevance = 1)
 * @param int   $k           Cutoff (e.g., 20)
 * @return float             NDCG score [0, 1]
 */
function SKAI_calculateNDCG($rankedList, $winners, $k) {
    $topK = array_slice($rankedList, 0, $k);
    $winnerSet = array_flip($winners);
    
    // DCG: sum of rel_i / log2(i+1)
    $dcg = 0.0;
    foreach ($topK as $i => $item) {
        $rel = isset($winnerSet[$item['num']]) ? 1.0 : 0.0;
        $dcg += $rel / log($i + 2, 2); // i is 0-based, so position is i+1, log2(i+1+1)
    }
    
    // IDCG: ideal DCG (all winners at top)
    $numWinners = count($winners);
    $idcg = 0.0;
    for ($i = 0; $i < min($k, $numWinners); $i++) {
        $idcg += 1.0 / log($i + 2, 2);
    }
    
    return $idcg > 0 ? $dcg / $idcg : 0.0;
}

/**
 * Store backtest metrics in database
 */
function SKAI_storeBacktestMetrics($gameId, $testDrawDate, $trainStart, $trainEnd, $windowSize, $metrics, $winners, $params) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $query = $db->getQuery(true);
        
        $paramsHash = md5(json_encode($params));
        
        $columns = [
            'game_id',
            'test_draw_date',
            'train_window_start',
            'train_window_end',
            'window_size',
            'recall_at_20',
            'mean_winner_rank',
            'ndcg_at_20',
            'winners_json',
            'missing_winners_json',
            'params_hash',
            'created_at'
        ];
        
        $now = new Date('now');
        $values = [
            $db->quote($gameId),
            $db->quote($testDrawDate),
            $trainStart ? $db->quote($trainStart) : 'NULL',
            $trainEnd ? $db->quote($trainEnd) : 'NULL',
            (int)$windowSize,
            (float)$metrics['recall_at_20'],
            (float)$metrics['mean_winner_rank'],
            (float)$metrics['ndcg_at_20'],
            $db->quote(json_encode($winners)),
            $db->quote(json_encode($metrics['missing_winners'] ?? [])),
            $db->quote($paramsHash),
            $db->quote($now->toSql())
        ];
        
        $query->insert($db->quoteName('#__skai_backtest_metrics'))
            ->columns($db->quoteName($columns))
            ->values(implode(',', $values));
        
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $db->execute();
        
        return $db->insertid();
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] storeBacktestMetrics error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return false;
    }
}

/**
 * Aggregate backtest results across multiple draws
 */
function SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults($results) {
    if (empty($results)) {
        return [
            'avg_recall_at_20' => 0.0,
            'avg_ndcg_at_20' => 0.0,
            'avg_mean_winner_rank' => 0.0,
            'top5_containment_rate' => 0.0,
            'top10_containment_rate' => 0.0,
            'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => 0.0,
            'winner_rank_lift_vs_random' => 0.0,
            'winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency' => 0.0,
            'winner_rank_lift_vs_recency' => 0.0,
            'winner_rank_lift_vs_skip' => 0.0,
            'promotion_help_rate' => 0.0,
            'promotion_harm_rate' => 0.0,
            'protected_core_regression_rate' => 0.0,
            'rolling_stability_score' => 0.0,
            'elite_objective_j' => 0.0,
            'num_draws' => 0
        ];
    }
    
    $totalRecall = 0.0;
    $totalNDCG = 0.0;
    $totalMWR = 0.0;
    $totalT5 = 0.0;
    $totalT10 = 0.0;
    $totalMRRW = 0.0;
    $totalLiftR = 0.0;
    $totalLiftF = 0.0;
    $totalLiftRec = 0.0;
    $totalLiftS = 0.0;
    $totalHelp = 0.0;
    $totalHarm = 0.0;
    $totalCoreReg = 0.0;
    $totalStable = 0.0;
    $totalEliteJ = 0.0;
    $count = count($results);
    
    foreach ($results as $r) {
        $totalRecall += $r['recall_at_20'];
        $totalNDCG += $r['ndcg_at_20'];
        $totalMWR += $r['mean_winner_rank'];
        $totalT5 += (float)($r['top5_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalT10 += (float)($r['top10_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalMRRW += (float)($r['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalLiftR += (float)($r['winner_rank_lift_vs_random'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalLiftF += (float)($r['winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalLiftRec += (float)($r['winner_rank_lift_vs_recency'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalLiftS += (float)($r['winner_rank_lift_vs_skip'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalHelp += (float)($r['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalHarm += (float)($r['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalCoreReg += (float)($r['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalStable += (float)($r['rolling_stability_score'] ?? 0.0);
        $totalEliteJ += (float)($r['elite_objective_j'] ?? 0.0);
    }
    
    return [
        'avg_recall_at_20' => $totalRecall / $count,
        'avg_ndcg_at_20' => $totalNDCG / $count,
        'avg_mean_winner_rank' => $totalMWR / $count,
        'top5_containment_rate' => $totalT5 / $count,
        'top10_containment_rate' => $totalT10 / $count,
        'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => $totalMRRW / $count,
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_random' => $totalLiftR / $count,
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency' => $totalLiftF / $count,
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_recency' => $totalLiftRec / $count,
        'winner_rank_lift_vs_skip' => $totalLiftS / $count,
        'promotion_help_rate' => $totalHelp / $count,
        'promotion_harm_rate' => $totalHarm / $count,
        'protected_core_regression_rate' => $totalCoreReg / $count,
        'rolling_stability_score' => $totalStable / $count,
        'elite_objective_j' => $totalEliteJ / $count,
        'num_draws' => $count
    ];
}

function SKAI_hasLearningEvent($runUuid, $gameId, $targetDrawDate, $officialResultHash): bool
{
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('id')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$runUuid))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId))
            ->where($db->quoteName('target_draw_date') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$targetDrawDate))
            ->where($db->quoteName('official_result_hash') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$officialResultHash))
            ->setLimit(1);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        return (bool)$db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_ELITE] SKAI_hasLearningEvent error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return false;
    }
}

function SKAI_storeLearningEvent(array $eventData)
{
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $now = (new Date('now'))->toSql();
        $runUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($eventData['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
        $gameId = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/', '', (string)($eventData['game_id'] ?? ''));
        $targetDrawDate = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', (string)($eventData['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
        $officialHash = (string)($eventData['official_result_hash'] ?? '');
        if ($runUuid === '' || $gameId === '' || $targetDrawDate === '' || $officialHash === '') {
            return ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'invalid_event_identity'];
        }
        if (SKAI_hasLearningEvent($runUuid, $gameId, $targetDrawDate, $officialHash)) {
            return ['ok' => true, 'deduplicated' => true];
        }
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->insert($db->quoteName('#__skai_learning_events'))
            ->columns($db->quoteName([
                'run_uuid','game_id','target_draw_date','official_result_hash',
                'main_actual_json','extra_actual_json','ranked_main_top20_json','ranked_extra_json',
                'top5_containment','top10_containment','mean_reciprocal_winner_rank',
                'winner_rank_lift_random','winner_rank_lift_frequency','winner_rank_lift_recency','winner_rank_lift_skip',
                'promotion_help_rate','promotion_harm_rate','protected_core_regression_rate',
                'is_learned','created_at','learned_at',
            ]))
            ->values(implode(',', [
                $db->quote($runUuid),
                $db->quote($gameId),
                $db->quote($targetDrawDate),
                $db->quote($officialHash),
                $db->quote((string)($eventData['main_actual_json'] ?? '[]')),
                (isset($eventData['extra_actual_json']) && $eventData['extra_actual_json'] !== null) ? $db->quote((string)$eventData['extra_actual_json']) : 'NULL',
                $db->quote((string)($eventData['ranked_main_top20_json'] ?? '[]')),
                (isset($eventData['ranked_extra_json']) && $eventData['ranked_extra_json'] !== null) ? $db->quote((string)$eventData['ranked_extra_json']) : 'NULL',
                (float)($eventData['top5_containment'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['top10_containment'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['winner_rank_lift_random'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['winner_rank_lift_frequency'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['winner_rank_lift_recency'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['winner_rank_lift_skip'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0),
                (float)($eventData['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0),
                (int)($eventData['is_learned'] ?? 0),
                $db->quote($now),
                !empty($eventData['is_learned']) ? $db->quote($now) : 'NULL',
            ]));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
        return ['ok' => true, 'id' => (int)$db->insertid(), 'deduplicated' => false];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $msg = $e->getMessage();
        if (strpos($msg, '1062') !== false || strpos($msg, 'Duplicate') !== false) {
            return ['ok' => true, 'deduplicated' => true];
        }
        error_log('[SKAI_ELITE] SKAI_storeLearningEvent error: ' . $msg);
        return ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'db_error'];
    }
}

function SKAI_storeEliteBacktestMetrics($gameId, $runUuid, $targetDrawDate, array $metrics, array $actualMain = [], array $actualExtra = [], array $rankedMainTop20 = [], array $rankedExtra = [])
{
    $officialHash = hash('sha256', json_encode([
        'game_id' => (string)$gameId,
        'target_draw_date' => (string)$targetDrawDate,
        'main' => array_values(array_map('intval', $actualMain)),
        'extra' => array_values(array_map('intval', $actualExtra)),
    ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE));
    return SKAI_storeLearningEvent([
        'run_uuid' => (string)$runUuid,
        'game_id' => (string)$gameId,
        'target_draw_date' => (string)$targetDrawDate,
        'official_result_hash' => $officialHash,
        'main_actual_json' => json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $actualMain)), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
        'extra_actual_json' => json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $actualExtra)), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
        'ranked_main_top20_json' => json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', array_slice($rankedMainTop20, 0, 20))), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
        'ranked_extra_json' => json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $rankedExtra)), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE),
        'top5_containment' => (float)($metrics['top5_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'top10_containment' => (float)($metrics['top10_containment_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'mean_reciprocal_winner_rank' => (float)($metrics['mean_reciprocal_winner_rank'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_random' => (float)($metrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_random'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_frequency' => (float)($metrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_recency' => (float)($metrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_recency'] ?? 0.0),
        'winner_rank_lift_skip' => (float)($metrics['winner_rank_lift_vs_skip'] ?? 0.0),
        'promotion_help_rate' => (float)($metrics['promotion_help_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'promotion_harm_rate' => (float)($metrics['promotion_harm_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'protected_core_regression_rate' => (float)($metrics['protected_core_regression_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'is_learned' => 0,
    ]);
}

/**
 * Get backtest metrics for a game
 * 
 * @param string $gameId      Game identifier
 * @param string $paramsHash  Optional: filter by params hash
 * @param int    $limit       Number of results to return
 * @return array              Backtest metrics
 */
function SKAI_getBacktestMetrics($gameId, $paramsHash = null, $limit = 100) {
    try {
        $db = Factory::getDbo();
        $query = $db->getQuery(true);
        
        $query->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_backtest_metrics'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
            ->order($db->quoteName('test_draw_date') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit($limit);
        
        if ($paramsHash) {
            $query->where($db->quoteName('params_hash') . ' = ' . $db->quote($paramsHash));
        }
        
        $db->setQuery($query);
        $results = $db->loadAssocList();
        
        // Decode JSON fields
        foreach ($results as &$row) {
            $row['winners_json'] = json_decode($row['winners_json'], true);
            $row['missing_winners_json'] = json_decode($row['missing_winners_json'], true);
        }
        
        return $results;
        
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI] getBacktestMetrics error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [];
    }
}

/**
 * =====================================================================
 * SKAI EVALUATION ENGINE - MISS ATTRIBUTION MODULE
