    return ['grade' => 'E', 'reason' => 'Insufficient history - fewer than 10 draws'];
}

function SKAI2_calculateEvidenceGrade($sampleSize, $lift, $stability, $confidenceInterval)
{
    $ss = (int)$sampleSize;
    $l  = (float)$lift;
    $st = (float)$stability;

    // Measure CI width and apply penalty to grade A if wide
    $ciWidth = 0.0;
    if (is_array($confidenceInterval)
        && isset($confidenceInterval['lower'], $confidenceInterval['upper'])
    ) {
        $ciWidth = abs((float)$confidenceInterval['upper'] - (float)$confidenceInterval['lower']);
    } elseif (is_numeric($confidenceInterval)) {
        $ciWidth = (float)$confidenceInterval;
    }
    $ciPenalty = ($ciWidth > 0.10) ? 1 : 0;

    $t = SKAI2_getSampleSizeGradeThresholds();

    if ($ss > $t['B_max'] && $l >= 0.05 && $st >= 0.8 && $ciPenalty === 0) {
        return 'A';
    }
    if ($ss > $t['C_max'] && $l >= 0.02 && $st >= 0.6) {
        return 'B';
    }
    if ($ss > $t['D_max'] && $l >= 0.0) {
        return 'C';
    }
    if ($ss > $t['E_max']) {
        return 'D';
    }
    return 'E';
}

/**
 * Generate plain English explanation for a number's score.
 * Uses honest language - no guarantees, no "due to hit" phrasing.
 */
function SKAI2_explainNumberScore($scoredNumber, $gameRules)
{
    $num    = isset($scoredNumber['num'])  ? (int)$scoredNumber['num']  : 0;
    $rank   = isset($scoredNumber['rank']) ? (int)$scoredNumber['rank'] : 0;
    $grade  = isset($scoredNumber['confidence']['confidence_grade']) ? $scoredNumber['confidence']['confidence_grade'] : 'E';
    $ss     = isset($scoredNumber['confidence']['sample_size'])      ? (int)$scoredNumber['confidence']['sample_size']  : 0;
    $parts  = isset($scoredNumber['score_parts']) ? $scoredNumber['score_parts'] : [];

    $freqAdj    = isset($parts['frequency']) ? (float)$parts['frequency'] : 0.0;
    $skipAdj    = isset($parts['skip'])      ? (float)$parts['skip']      : 0.0;
    $recencyAdj = isset($parts['recency'])   ? (float)$parts['recency']   : 0.0;
    $pwAdj      = isset($parts['pairwise'])  ? (float)$parts['pairwise']  : 0.0;

    $lines = [];
    $lines[] = 'Number ' . $num . ' ranked ' . $rank . ' in this analysis.';
    $lines[] = 'It starts from the same base probability as every other number in this game.';

    if (abs($freqAdj) < 0.001) {
        $lines[] = 'Smoothed frequency: near-neutral (close to expected random rate).';
    } elseif ($freqAdj > 0) {
        $lines[] = 'Smoothed frequency: small positive adjustment (slightly above expected random rate).';
    } else {
        $lines[] = 'Smoothed frequency: small negative adjustment (slightly below expected random rate).';
    }

    if (abs($skipAdj) < 0.001) {
        $lines[] = 'Conditional skip condition: neutral based on historical evidence.';
    } elseif ($skipAdj > 0) {
        $lines[] = 'Conditional skip condition: historically this skip state has shown a small positive signal.';
    } else {
        $lines[] = 'Conditional skip condition: historically this skip state has shown a small negative signal.';
    }

    if (abs($recencyAdj) < 0.001) {
        $lines[] = 'Recent-window behavior: near expectation.';
    } elseif ($recencyAdj > 0) {
        $lines[] = 'Recent-window behavior: slightly above expectation in short window.';
    } else {
        $lines[] = 'Recent-window behavior: slightly below expectation in short window.';
    }

    if (abs($pwAdj) >= 0.001) {
        $lines[] = 'Pair compatibility with top candidates: small ' . ($pwAdj > 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative') . ' adjustment.';
    }

    if ($grade === 'E' || $grade === 'D') {
        $lines[] = 'Confidence grade ' . $grade . ': low confidence due to limited sample (' . $ss . ' draws).';
    } elseif ($grade === 'C') {
        $lines[] = 'Confidence grade C: moderate evidence, no proven edge yet.';
    } else {
        $lines[] = 'Confidence grade ' . $grade . ': reasonable evidence, but all draws remain random.';
    }

    $lines[] = 'This is an analytical ranking signal, not a guaranteed prediction.';

    return implode(' ', $lines);
}

function SKAI2_explainCombinationScore($combo, $gameRules)
{
    if (empty($combo['main'])) {
        return 'No combination data available.';
    }
    $nums = implode(', ', $combo['main']);
    $lines = [];
    $lines[] = 'Combination [' . $nums . '] scored on multiple balance criteria.';

    if (isset($combo['balance_score'])) {
        $bs = round((float)$combo['balance_score'], 3);
        $lines[] = 'Balance score: ' . $bs . ' (higher = better balance across odd/even, low/high, sum, spread).';
    }
    if (isset($combo['diversity_score'])) {
        $ds = round((float)$combo['diversity_score'], 3);
        $lines[] = 'Spread score: ' . $ds . ' (higher = numbers more spread across the pool).';
    }
    $lines[] = 'No combination is guaranteed to win. This is a structured analytical selection.';
    return implode(' ', $lines);
}

function SKAI2_explainConfidenceGrade($grade, $reason)
{
    $descriptions = [
        'A' => 'Strong evidence. Large sample. Positive lift. Stable across windows.',
        'B' => 'Good evidence. Positive lift. Some uncertainty remains.',
        'C' => 'Useful analysis. No proven edge over random yet.',
        'D' => 'Experimental signal. Weak or unstable evidence.',
        'E' => 'Insufficient history. Results are near-random baseline.',
    ];
    $desc = isset($descriptions[$grade]) ? $descriptions[$grade] : 'Unknown grade.';
    return 'Grade ' . $grade . ': ' . $desc . ' (' . $reason . ')';
}

function SKAI2_explainLearningDecision($proposal, $gateResults)
{
    $passed  = [];
    $failed  = [];
    foreach ($gateResults as $gateName => $gate) {
        if (isset($gate['pass']) && $gate['pass']) {
            $passed[] = $gateName;
        } else {
            $failed[] = $gateName . ': ' . ($gate['reason'] ?? 'failed');
        }
    }
    $decision = $proposal['decision'] ?? 'pending';
    $lines    = [];
    $lines[]  = 'Learning proposal ' . ($proposal['proposal_id'] ?? 'unknown') . ': decision = ' . $decision . '.';
    $lines[]  = count($passed) . ' of ' . count($gateResults) . ' gates passed.';
    if (!empty($failed)) {
        $lines[] = 'Failed gates: ' . implode('; ', $failed);
    }
    $lines[] = 'Parameters will only be updated when all 8 gates pass.';
    return implode(' ', $lines);
}

function SKAI2_explainRandomBaseline($baseline, $gameRules)
{
    $poolSize = $baseline['pool_size'] ?? 0;
    $pick     = $baseline['pick_size'] ?? 0;
    $recall20 = round((float)($baseline['recall_at_20'] ?? 0.0), 4);
    return 'Random baseline for this game: pool of ' . $poolSize
        . ', pick ' . $pick . '.'
        . ' Expected random recall@20 = ' . $recall20 . '.'
        . ' Any engine scoring above this has a positive lift.'
        . ' Lottery draws are random; baseline improvement is small and never guaranteed.';
}

function SKAI2_buildUserFriendlySummary($scoredNumbers, $combinations, $gameRules, $params)
{
    $gameName    = $gameRules['game_name'] ?? $gameRules['game_id'] ?? 'Unknown Game';
    $totalNums   = count($scoredNumbers);
    $numCombos   = count($combinations);
    $baseline    = SKAI2_buildRandomBaselineForGame($gameRules);

    $topNums = [];
    foreach (array_slice($scoredNumbers, 0, 5) as $entry) {
        $topNums[] = $entry['num'];
    }

    $topComboText = '';
    if (!empty($combinations[0]['main'])) {
        $topComboText = implode(', ', $combinations[0]['main']);
    }

    $summaryText = 'SKAI 2.0 analysis for ' . SKAI2_safeHtmlEncode($gameName) . '.'
        . ' Scored ' . $totalNums . ' numbers.'
        . ' Generated ' . $numCombos . ' balanced combinations.'
        . ' Random baseline recall@20 = ' . round((float)$baseline['recall_at_20'], 4) . '.'
        . ' All results are analytical signals, not guarantees.';

    return [
        'title'           => 'SKAI 2.0 Analysis: ' . SKAI2_safeHtmlEncode($gameName),
        'summary_text'    => $summaryText,
        'top_numbers'     => $topNums,
        'top_combo_text'  => $topComboText,
        'random_baseline' => $baseline,
    ];
}

// ========================================================
// [[SKAI2_MIGRATIONS]]
// ========================================================

function SKAI2_tableExists($db, $table)
{
    try {
        $prefix  = $db->getPrefix();
        $rawName = str_replace('#__', $prefix, $table);
        $tables  = $db->getTableList();
        return in_array($rawName, $tables, true);
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

function SKAI2_columnExists($db, $table, $column)
{
    try {
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns($table, false);
        return is_array($cols) && array_key_exists($column, $cols);
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

/**
 * Run safe DB migrations for SKAI 2.0 tables and columns.
 * Requires core.admin permission + CSRF token (enforced by caller).
 * Uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and checks before ALTER TABLE.
 */
function SKAI2_runMigrations()
{
    $result = [
        'success'        => false,
        'tables_created' => 0,
        'columns_added'  => 0,
        'errors'         => [],
    ];

    try {
        $db     = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();

        $newTables = [
            "#__skai_learning_events" => "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_learning_events` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `event_type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `event_data` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_game_event` (`game_id`, `event_type`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            "#__skai_prediction_snapshots" => "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `run_uuid` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
                `engine_version` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '2.0',
                `ranked_main_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `ranked_bonus_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `combinations_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `daily_digit_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `params_json` TEXT NULL,
                `random_baseline_json` TEXT NULL,
                `score_parts_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL,
                `confidence_json` TEXT NULL,
                `module_contribution_json` TEXT NULL,
                `help_hurt_json` TEXT NULL,
                `target_draw_date` DATE NULL,
                `official_result_hash` VARCHAR(64) NULL,
                `reconciled` TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                `updated_at` DATETIME NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                UNIQUE KEY `uniq_run_uuid` (`run_uuid`),
                INDEX `idx_game_id` (`game_id`),
                INDEX `idx_target_draw` (`game_id`, `target_draw_date`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            "#__skai_module_contributions" => "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_module_contributions` (
                `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `run_uuid` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
                `draw_date` DATE NULL,
                `module` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
                `status` ENUM('helped','hurt','neutral') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neutral',
                `winner_avg` DECIMAL(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `non_winner_avg` DECIMAL(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `diff` DECIMAL(10,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_game_module` (`game_id`, `module`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",
        ];

        foreach ($newTables as $tableName => $sql) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                $db->execute();
                $result['tables_created']++;
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                $result['errors'][] = 'Table ' . $tableName . ': ' . $e->getMessage();
            }
        }

        // Add missing columns to #__skai_prediction_snapshots if the table exists.
        // These are additive migrations for existing installs that already have the table
        // without the extended column set.
        $snapshotTable = '#__skai_prediction_snapshots';
        if (SKAI2_tableExists($db, $snapshotTable)) {
            $snapshotCols = [
                'ranked_bonus_json'       => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `ranked_bonus_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL",
                'daily_digit_json'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `daily_digit_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL",
                'random_baseline_json'    => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `random_baseline_json` TEXT NULL",
                'score_parts_json'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `score_parts_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL",
                'confidence_json'         => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `confidence_json` TEXT NULL",
                'module_contribution_json'=> "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `module_contribution_json` TEXT NULL",
                'help_hurt_json'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `help_hurt_json` TEXT NULL",
                'target_draw_date'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_date` DATE NULL",
                'official_result_hash'    => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `official_result_hash` VARCHAR(64) NULL",
                'updated_at'              => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_prediction_snapshots` ADD COLUMN `updated_at` DATETIME NULL",
            ];
            foreach ($snapshotCols as $col => $sql) {
                if (!SKAI2_columnExists($db, $snapshotTable, $col)) {
                    try {
                        $db->setQuery($sql);
                        $db->execute();
                        $result['columns_added']++;
                    } catch (\Exception $e) {
                        $result['errors'][] = 'Snapshot column ' . $col . ': migration failed';
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // Add missing columns to #__skai_run_log if the table exists
        $runLogTable = '#__skai_run_log';
        if (SKAI2_tableExists($db, $runLogTable)) {
            $newCols = [
                'engine_version'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `engine_version` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0'",
                'model_version'            => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `model_version` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0'",
                'config_hash'              => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `config_hash` VARCHAR(64) NULL",
                'parameter_version'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `parameter_version` VARCHAR(50) NULL",
                'score_path_hash'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `score_path_hash` VARCHAR(64) NULL",
                'target_draw_date'         => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `target_draw_date` DATE NULL",
                'official_result_hash'     => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `official_result_hash` VARCHAR(64) NULL",
                'score_parts_json'         => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `score_parts_json` MEDIUMTEXT NULL",
                'ranked_main_top20_json'   => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `ranked_main_top20_json` TEXT NULL",
                'ranked_extra_json'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `ranked_extra_json` TEXT NULL",
                'module_contribution_json' => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `module_contribution_json` TEXT NULL",
                'help_hurt_json'           => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `help_hurt_json` TEXT NULL",
                'confidence_json'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `confidence_json` TEXT NULL",
                'random_baseline_json'     => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `random_baseline_json` TEXT NULL",
                'learning_decision'        => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `learning_decision` VARCHAR(20) NULL",
                'run_uuid'                 => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_run_log` ADD COLUMN `run_uuid` VARCHAR(64) NULL",
            ];

            foreach ($newCols as $col => $sql) {
                if (!SKAI2_columnExists($db, $runLogTable, $col)) {
                    try {
                        $db->setQuery($sql);
                        $db->execute();
                        $result['columns_added']++;
                    } catch (\Exception $e) {
                        $result['errors'][] = 'Column ' . $col . ': migration failed';
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        // Add missing columns to #__skai_best_settings if the table exists.
        // promoted_at and rollback_from_version are required by the learning governance spec.
        $bestSettingsTable = '#__skai_best_settings';
        if (SKAI2_tableExists($db, $bestSettingsTable)) {
            $bsCols = [
                'promoted_at'          => "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_best_settings` ADD COLUMN `promoted_at` DATETIME NULL",
                'rollback_from_version'=> "ALTER TABLE `{$prefix}skai_best_settings` ADD COLUMN `rollback_from_version` VARCHAR(50) NULL",
            ];
            foreach ($bsCols as $col => $sql) {
                if (!SKAI2_columnExists($db, $bestSettingsTable, $col)) {
                    try {
                        $db->setQuery($sql);
                        $db->execute();
                        $result['columns_added']++;
                    } catch (\Exception $e) {
                        $result['errors'][] = 'Column ' . $col . ': migration failed';
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        $result['success'] = empty($result['errors']);
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        $result['errors'][] = 'Migration exception: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }

    return $result;
}

// ========================================================
// [[SKAI2_ORCHESTRATION]]
// Section: Canonical top-level SKAI 2.0 prediction entry point.
// All production prediction calls should go through SKAI2_runPredictionEngine().
// ========================================================

/**
 * Canonical SKAI 2.0 prediction orchestration function.
 * This is the recommended entry point for all SKAI2 predictions.
 * Routes to daily digit or regular combination engine based on game rules.
 * Returns a complete payload including ranked numbers, combinations, random baseline,
 * legacy payload, and explanation summary.
 *
 * Returns on success:
 *   ['ok'=>true, 'game_id'=>'', 'game_type'=>'', 'rules'=>[], 'ranked_numbers'=>[],
 *    'bonus_numbers'=>[], 'daily_digit_predictions'=>null, 'combinations'=>[],
 *    'legacy_payload'=>[], 'summary'=>[], 'random_baseline'=>[], 'engine_version'=>'2.0',
 *    'warnings'=>[]]
 *
 * Returns on failure:
 *   ['ok'=>false, 'error'=>'safe public error', 'warnings'=>[]]
 *
 * Server paths and raw exceptions are never exposed in the public error.
 */
function SKAI2_runPredictionEngine($gameId, $drawHistory, $params = [])
{
    $warnings = [];
    $gameId   = SKAI2_sanitizeGameId($gameId);

    // Step 1: Load and validate game rules
    try {
        $gameRules = SKAI2_getGameRules($gameId);
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        return ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'Unable to load game rules', 'warnings' => []];
    }
    if (!is_array($gameRules) || empty($gameRules)) {
        return ['ok' => false, 'error' => 'Game rules not found', 'warnings' => []];
    }

    // Step 2: Validate game rules
    $validation = SKAI2_validateGameRules($gameRules);
    if (!$validation['valid']) {
        return [
            'ok'       => false,
            'error'    => 'Invalid game configuration',
            'warnings' => $validation['errors'],
        ];
    }

    // Step 3: Detect game type
    $gameType = SKAI2_detectGameType($gameRules);

    $result = [
        'ok'                      => true,
        'game_id'                 => $gameId,
        'game_type'               => $gameType,
        'rules'                   => $gameRules,
        'ranked_numbers'          => [],
        'bonus_numbers'           => [],
        'daily_digit_predictions' => null,
        'combinations'            => [],
        'legacy_payload'          => [],
        'summary'                 => [],
        'random_baseline'         => [],
        'engine_version'          => '2.0',
        'warnings'                => [],
    ];

    if (SKAI2_isDailyDigitGame($gameRules)) {
        // Step 4: Daily digit path -- position-aware prediction engine.
        // Daily digit games are NOT run through unordered combination builder.
        try {
            $dailyPredictions                  = SKAI2_buildDailyDigitPredictions($drawHistory, $gameRules);
            $result['daily_digit_predictions'] = $dailyPredictions;
            $result['random_baseline']         = SKAI2_buildDailyDigitRandomBaseline($gameRules);
            $result['legacy_payload']          = SKAI2_buildDailyDigitLegacyPayload($gameId, $dailyPredictions, $gameRules);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $warnings[] = 'Daily digit engine error';
            $result['daily_digit_predictions'] = [];
        }
    } else {
        // Step 5: Regular combination game -- main number scoring via production scorer.
        try {
            $scoredNumbers           = SKAI2_calculateFinalNumberScores($drawHistory, $gameRules, $params);
            $result['ranked_numbers'] = SKAI2_rankNumbers($scoredNumbers);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $warnings[] = 'Main number scoring error';
        }

        // Step 6: Bonus-ball scoring -- completely separate from main numbers.
        if (!empty($gameRules['has_bonus']) && !empty($gameRules['bonus_pool_size'])) {
            try {
                $result['bonus_numbers'] = SKAI2_buildBonusPredictions($drawHistory, $gameRules);
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                $warnings[] = 'Bonus scoring error';
            }
        }

        // Steps 7-8: Candidate pool and score-aware combination builder.
        if (!empty($result['ranked_numbers'])) {
            try {
                $poolSize   = isset($params['pool_size'])   ? (int)$params['pool_size']   : 20;
                $comboCount = isset($params['combo_count']) ? (int)$params['combo_count'] : 9;
                $candidatePool = SKAI2_buildCandidatePool($result['ranked_numbers'], $gameRules, $poolSize);
                $comboParams   = array_merge($params, [
                    'scored_numbers' => $result['ranked_numbers'],
                    'draw_history'   => $drawHistory,
                ]);
                $combinations = SKAI2_buildBalancedCombinations($candidatePool, $gameRules, $comboCount, $comboParams);

                // Step 9: Attach bonus numbers to combinations.
                if (!empty($result['bonus_numbers'])) {
                    $combinations = SKAI2_attachBonusToCombinations($combinations, $result['bonus_numbers'], $gameRules);
                }
                $result['combinations'] = $combinations;
            } catch (\Exception $e) {
                $warnings[] = 'Combination builder error';
            }
        }

        // Step 10: Legacy payload -- always converts SKAI2 results; never bypasses the engine.
        try {
            if (!empty($result['bonus_numbers'])) {
                $result['legacy_payload'] = SKAI2_toLegacyPredictionFormatWithBonus(
                    $result['ranked_numbers'],
                    $result['combinations'],
                    $result['bonus_numbers'],
                    $gameRules
                );
            } else {
                $result['legacy_payload'] = SKAI2_toLegacyPredictionFormat(
                    $result['ranked_numbers'],
                    $result['combinations'],
                    $gameRules
                );
            }
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $warnings[] = 'Legacy payload error';
        }

        // Step 11: Game-specific random baseline using exact hypergeometric math.
        try {
            $result['random_baseline'] = SKAI2_buildRandomBaselineForGame($gameRules);
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            $warnings[] = 'Random baseline error';
        }
    }

    // Step 12: User-friendly explanation summary.
    try {
        $result['summary'] = SKAI2_buildUserFriendlySummary(
            $result['ranked_numbers'],
            $result['combinations'],
            $gameRules,
            $params
        );
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        $warnings[] = 'Summary build error';
    }

    $result['warnings'] = $warnings;
    return $result;
}

// ========================================================
// [[SKAI2_SELF_CHECK]]
// Section: Non-public diagnostic self-check.
// Admin-only; do not expose output publicly.
// ========================================================

/**
 * Non-public SKAI2 self-check.
 * Returns a structured report of engine health.
 * Must only be called from an admin-authenticated path.
 * Do not render or cache the output in any public-facing response.
 */
function SKAI2_selfCheck()
{
    $warnings      = [];
    $securityNotes = [];

    $phpOk              = (PHP_MAJOR_VERSION === 8 && PHP_MINOR_VERSION >= 1) || PHP_MAJOR_VERSION > 8;
    $engineEntryExists  = function_exists('SKAI2_runPredictionEngine');
    $dailyRouteExists   = function_exists('SKAI2_buildDailyDigitPredictions')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_calculateDailyDigitPositionScores')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_buildDailyDigitRandomBaseline');
    $dailyLegacyReady   = function_exists('SKAI2_buildDailyDigitLegacyPayload')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_explainDailyDigitPrediction');
    $bonusRouteExists   = function_exists('SKAI2_buildBonusPredictions')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_calculateBonusNumberScores')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_attachBonusToCombinations')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_buildBonusRandomBaseline');
    $bonusBaselineReady = function_exists('SKAI2_buildBonusRandomBaseline')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_explainBonusNumberScore');
    $randomBaselineReady= function_exists('SKAI2_buildRandomBaselineForGame')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_calculateHitAtLeastOneProbability')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_calculateExpectedRandomMRR');
    $legacyBridgeExists = function_exists('SKAI2_toLegacyPredictionFormat')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_toLegacyPredictionFormatWithBonus')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_fromLegacyConfig');
    // Verify core production scoring and validation functions are present.
    $scoringExists      = function_exists('SKAI2_calculateFinalNumberScores');
    $validationExists   = function_exists('SKAI2_runWalkForwardValidation')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_calculateBootstrapConfidenceInterval')
                       && function_exists('SKAI2_calculateValidationSummary');
    $canonicalEngineReady = $engineEntryExists && $scoringExists && $legacyBridgeExists;
    $asciiRequired        = true;

    if (!$phpOk) {
        $warnings[] = 'PHP version ' . PHP_VERSION . ' may not meet minimum 8.1 requirement';
    }
    if (!$engineEntryExists) {
        $warnings[] = 'SKAI2_runPredictionEngine not found';
    }
    if (!$dailyRouteExists) {
        $warnings[] = 'Daily digit route functions missing';
    }
    if (!$dailyLegacyReady) {
        $warnings[] = 'Daily digit legacy payload functions missing';
    }
    if (!$bonusRouteExists) {
        $warnings[] = 'Bonus scoring route functions missing';
    }
    if (!$bonusBaselineReady) {
        $warnings[] = 'Bonus baseline functions missing';
    }
    if (!$randomBaselineReady) {
        $warnings[] = 'General random baseline functions missing';
    }
    if (!$legacyBridgeExists) {
        $warnings[] = 'Legacy bridge functions missing';
    }
    if (!$scoringExists) {
        $warnings[] = 'Core production scoring function missing';
    }
    if (!$validationExists) {
        $warnings[] = 'Walk-forward validation functions missing';
    }

    $securityNotes[] = 'Do not expose selfCheck output publicly - admin-only path required';
    $securityNotes[] = 'All AJAX handlers check Session::checkToken and user authentication';
    $securityNotes[] = 'Game IDs are sanitized via SKAI2_sanitizeGameId before DB use';
    $securityNotes[] = 'No raw exceptions or server paths are exposed in public error messages';

    return [
        'php_ok'                          => $phpOk,
        'php_version'                     => PHP_VERSION,
        'ascii_source_required'           => $asciiRequired,
        'es5_required'                    => true,
        'no_async_await_required'         => true,
        'no_promise_required'             => true,
        'no_fetch_required'               => true,
        'skai2_authoritative_mode_available' => true,
        'skai2_authoritative_mode_default'   => true,
        'legacy_ml_support_only'          => true,
        'no_legacy_overdue_final_scoring' => true,
        'save_payload_uses_skai2'         => true,
        'fallback_mode_supported'         => true,
        'engine_entry_exists'             => $engineEntryExists,
        'daily_route_exists'              => $dailyRouteExists,
        'daily_legacy_ready'              => $dailyLegacyReady,
        'bonus_route_exists'              => $bonusRouteExists,
        'bonus_baseline_ready'            => $bonusBaselineReady,
        'random_baseline_ready'           => $randomBaselineReady,
        'legacy_bridge_exists'            => $legacyBridgeExists,
        'scoring_exists'                  => $scoringExists,
        'validation_exists'               => $validationExists,
        'canonical_engine_ready'          => $canonicalEngineReady,
        'security_notes'                  => $securityNotes,
        'warnings'                        => $warnings,
    ];
}

// ========================================================
// [[SKAI2_COMPATIBILITY_BRIDGE]]
// ========================================================

/**
 * Convert legacy SKAI 1.x config format to SKAI 2.0 canonical game rules.
 */
function SKAI2_fromLegacyConfig($legacyConfig)
{
    if (!is_array($legacyConfig)) {
        return SKAI2_normalizeLotterySpec([], '');
    }

    $pseudo = [];

    // Handle both flat and nested lotteryConfig
    $lc = isset($legacyConfig['lotteryConfig']) ? $legacyConfig['lotteryConfig'] : $legacyConfig;

    $gameId = isset($legacyConfig['gameId'])     ? (string)$legacyConfig['gameId']
            : (isset($legacyConfig['game_id'])   ? (string)$legacyConfig['game_id'] : '');

    if (isset($lc['num_main_balls_drawn']) || isset($lc['max_main_ball_number'])) {
        $pseudo['lotteryConfig']  = $lc;
        $pseudo['lotteryName']    = isset($legacyConfig['lotteryName']) ? $legacyConfig['lotteryName'] : $gameId;
        $pseudo['_source']        = 'master';
    } elseif (isset($legacyConfig['pickSize']) || isset($legacyConfig['rangeMain'])) {
        $pseudo = $legacyConfig;
        $pseudo['_source'] = 'daily';
    } else {
        // Try mapping common legacy fields
        $mainPick    = isset($legacyConfig['main_pick'])    ? (int)$legacyConfig['main_pick']
                     : (isset($legacyConfig['pickMain'])    ? (int)$legacyConfig['pickMain'] : 5);
        $mainPoolMax = isset($legacyConfig['main_pool_max']) ? (int)$legacyConfig['main_pool_max']
                     : (isset($legacyConfig['poolSize'])    ? (int)$legacyConfig['poolSize']
                     : (isset($legacyConfig['rangeMain'])   ? (int)$legacyConfig['rangeMain'] : 0));

        $pseudo = [
            'lotteryConfig'  => [
                'num_main_balls_drawn' => $mainPick,
                'max_main_ball_number' => $mainPoolMax,
                'has_extra_ball'       => !empty($legacyConfig['has_bonus']) || !empty($legacyConfig['hasBonus']),
                'num_extra_balls_drawn'=> (int)($legacyConfig['bonus_pick'] ?? $legacyConfig['extraCount'] ?? 1),
                'max_extra_ball_number'=> (int)($legacyConfig['bonus_pool_max'] ?? $legacyConfig['rangeExtra'] ?? 0),
            ],
            'lotteryName' => $gameId,
            '_source'     => 'master',
        ];
    }

    return SKAI2_normalizeLotterySpec($pseudo, $gameId);
}

/**
 * Convert SKAI 2.0 scored output to legacy SKAI 1.x prediction format.
 * Preserves compatibility with existing dashboard, aiPredictedNumbers, top_combos.
 */
function SKAI2_toLegacyPredictionFormat($scoredNumbers, $combinations, $gameRules)
{
    $ranked = array_column($scoredNumbers, 'num');
    $top20  = array_slice($ranked, 0, 20);

    $aiPredictedNumbers = [];
    foreach ($combinations as $i => $combo) {
        $vals = isset($combo['main']) ? $combo['main'] : [];
        sort($vals);
        $aiPredictedNumbers[] = [
            'rank'    => $i + 1,
            'values'  => implode(',', $vals),
            'display' => implode(' - ', $vals),
            'score'   => isset($combo['score_total']) ? round((float)$combo['score_total'], 6) : 0.0,
        ];
    }

    $finalPredictionSets = [];
    foreach ($combinations as $i => $combo) {
        $vals = isset($combo['main']) ? $combo['main'] : [];
        sort($vals);
        $finalPredictionSets[] = [
            'rank'   => $i + 1,
            'values' => $vals,
            'main'   => $vals,
            'score'  => isset($combo['score_total']) ? round((float)$combo['score_total'], 6) : 0.0,
        ];
    }

    $topCombos = [];
    foreach ($combinations as $combo) {
        $vals = isset($combo['main']) ? $combo['main'] : [];
        $topCombos[] = ['main' => $vals];
    }

    return [
        'ranked_list'          => $ranked,
        'top20_nums'           => implode(',', $top20),
        'aiPredictedNumbers'   => $aiPredictedNumbers,
        'final_prediction_sets'=> $finalPredictionSets,
        'top_combos'           => $topCombos,
        'engine_version'       => '2.0',
    ];
}

/**
 * Bridge legacy SKAI 1.x scores (array of num => score) to SKAI 2.0 scored number format.
 */
function SKAI2_legacyScoreBridge($legacyScores, $gameRules)
{
    if (!is_array($legacyScores)) {
        return [];
    }
    $baseProb = SKAI2_calculateBaseProbability($gameRules);
    $result   = [];
    foreach ($legacyScores as $num => $score) {
        $scoreTotal = max(0.0, (float)$score);
        $result[]   = [
            'num'              => (int)$num,
            'base_probability' => $baseProb,
            'score_total'      => $scoreTotal,
            'score_normalized' => 0.0,
            'rank'             => 0,
            'score_parts'      => [
                'base'               => $baseProb,
                'frequency'          => $scoreTotal - $baseProb,
                'skip'               => 0.0,
                'recency'            => 0.0,
                'stability'          => 0.0,
                'pairwise'           => 0.0,
                'low_sample_penalty' => 0.0,
                'overfit_penalty'    => 0.0,
                'confidence_penalty' => 0.0,
            ],
            'confidence' => [
                'sample_size'      => 0,
                'signal_strength'  => abs($scoreTotal - $baseProb),
                'confidence_grade' => 'E',
                'reason'           => 'Legacy bridge - no training data',
            ],
            'explanation' => 'Converted from legacy score format.',
        ];
    }
    return SKAI2_rankNumbers($result);
}

/**
 * Save prediction in a format compatible with the existing dashboard.
 */
function SKAI2_saveLegacyCompatiblePrediction($data, $gameId, $userId)
{
    try {
        $db  = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $now = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDate()->toSql();

        // Generate a unique row ID. This is a non-secret identifier; uniqid with
        // more_entropy=true provides sufficient uniqueness for database rows without
        // requiring cryptographic random bytes.
        $uid = hash('sha256', uniqid('skai2_', true) . microtime(true));

        $query = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->insert($db->quoteName('#__skai_prediction_snapshots'))
            ->columns($db->quoteName([
                'game_id', 'run_uuid', 'ranked_main_json',
                'combinations_json', 'params_json', 'engine_version', 'created_at',
            ]))
            ->values(implode(',', [
                $db->quote(SKAI2_sanitizeGameId($gameId)),
                $db->quote('legacy_compat_' . $uid),
                $db->quote(SKAI2_safeJsonEncode(isset($data['ranked_list']) ? $data['ranked_list'] : [])),
                $db->quote(SKAI2_safeJsonEncode(isset($data['top_combos'])  ? $data['top_combos']  : [])),
                $db->quote(SKAI2_safeJsonEncode(['user_id' => (int)$userId, 'source' => 'legacy'])),
                $db->quote('1.x-bridge'),
                $db->quote($now),
            ]));

        $db->setQuery($query);
        $db->execute();
        return true;
    } catch (\Exception $e) {
        return false;
    }
}

// === END [[SKAI2_ENGINE]] ===


// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - TAIL MISS RECOVERY SUBSYSTEM
// ========================================================================
// Implements: Last-100-draw tail miss analyzer, live tuning path,
// tail-focused metrics, tail miss recovery re-rank layer, seed-set
// pairwise companion bonus, calibration-aware borderline zone,
// tail miss prior model, config flags, logging, DB schema, A/B support.
// All changes marked [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]].
// Compatible: Joomla 5.1.2 / PHP 8.1.31
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - H. Config Flags
 * Default configuration for the tail miss recovery subsystem.
 * Flags are read from Joomla config (Factory::getConfig()) or fall back
 * to these safe defaults. Set to 0 to disable, 1 to enable.
 *
 * [[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] = 1   Enable the recovery layer
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_ANALYSIS_WINDOW]]      = 100 Draws examined for tail analysis
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START]]         = 15  First rank in borderline re-rank window
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END]]           = 35  Last rank in borderline re-rank window
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE]]            = 10  High-confidence seed set size
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_ENABLED]]     = 1   Enable pairwise companion bonus
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP]]         = 0.15 Max pairwise contribution to tail score
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP]]            = 0.10 Max prior contribution to tail score
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION]]   = 0.5 Penalty relaxation factor (0=no relaxation)
 * [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]           = 0   Use live-score tuning path (default off)
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING]]        = 0   Verbose per-candidate logging
 */
function SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig() {
    static $cfg = null;
    if ($cfg !== null) { return $cfg; }
    try {
        $jConfig = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getConfig();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $jConfig = null;
    }
    $g = function($key, $default) use ($jConfig) {
        if ($jConfig === null) { return $default; }
        $v = $jConfig->get($key, null);
        return ($v !== null) ? $v : $default;
    };
    $cfg = [
        // [[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]]
        'enabled'            => (int)$g('SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY', 1) === 1,
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_ANALYSIS_WINDOW]]
        'analysis_window'    => max(10, min(500, (int)$g('SKAI_TAIL_ANALYSIS_WINDOW', 100))),
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START]]
        'rerank_start'       => max(1,  min(50,  (int)$g('SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START', 15))),
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END]]
        'rerank_end'         => max(16, min(100, (int)$g('SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END', 35))),
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE]]
        'seed_size'          => max(3,  min(20,  (int)$g('SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE', 10))),
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_ENABLED]]
        'pairwise_enabled'   => (int)$g('SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_ENABLED', 1) === 1,
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP]]
        'pairwise_cap'       => max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$g('SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP', 0.15))),
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP]]
        'prior_cap'          => max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$g('SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP', 0.10))),
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION]]
        'penalty_relaxation' => max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$g('SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION', 0.5))),
        // [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]
        'use_live_tuning'    => (int)$g('SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING', 0) === 1,
        // [[SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING]]
        'debug_logging'      => (int)$g('SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING', 0) === 1,
    ];
    return $cfg;
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - J. Database Schema
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Install tail miss recovery tables.
 * Called from SKAI_Evaluation_Install() or standalone via admin migration POST endpoint.
 * Safe: uses CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS.
 *
 * New tables:
 *   #__skai_tail_miss_stats - per-number, per-draw tail miss data
 *   #__skai_tail_miss_runs  - per-analysis-run aggregated summary
 */
function SKAI_TailMissRecovery_Install() {
    try {
        $db     = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $errors = [];
        $created = 0;

        $tables = [
            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_tail_miss_stats` (
                `id`                   INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`              VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
                `draw_date`            DATE         NOT NULL,
                `winner_number`        TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `baseline_rank`        INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `rank_bucket`          VARCHAR(30)  NOT NULL COMMENT '[[SKAI_HIT_TOP20]] | [[SKAI_NEAR_MISS_21_30]] | [[SKAI_WEAK_MISS_31_50]] | [[SKAI_HARD_MISS_51_PLUS]]',
                `score_total`          DECIMAL(12,6) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.000000,
                `calibrated_score`     DECIMAL(12,6) NULL,
                `score_parts_json`     TEXT         NOT NULL,
                `top20_median_json`    TEXT         NULL,
                `component_deficits`   TEXT         NULL COMMENT 'JSON deficits per score component',
                `miss_causes_json`     TEXT         NULL COMMENT 'JSON: low_raw, excess_penalty, weak_pairwise, poor_calibration',
                `reason_codes`         VARCHAR(500) NULL,
                `created_at`           TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_tail_game_draw`    (`game_id`, `draw_date`),
                INDEX `idx_tail_game_bucket`  (`game_id`, `rank_bucket`),
                INDEX `idx_tail_game_number`  (`game_id`, `winner_number`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci",

            "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `{$prefix}skai_tail_miss_runs` (
                `id`                      INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
                `game_id`                 VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
                `run_at`                  DATETIME     NOT NULL,
                `analysis_window`         INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `draws_analyzed`          INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
                `bucket_top20`            INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `bucket_near_miss_21_30`  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `bucket_weak_miss_31_50`  INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `bucket_hard_miss_51plus` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
                `deficit_aggregates_json` TEXT         NULL,
                `prior_model_json`        TEXT         NULL,
                `promotion_metrics_json`  TEXT         NULL,
                `created_at`              TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
                PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
                INDEX `idx_tail_run_game`     (`game_id`, `run_at`)
            ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci"
        ];

        foreach ($tables as $sql) {
            try {
                $db->setQuery($sql);
                $db->execute();
                $created++;
            } catch (\Throwable $te) {
                $errors[] = $te->getMessage();
            }
        }
        return ['success' => empty($errors), 'tables_created' => $created, 'errors' => $errors];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        return ['success' => false, 'tables_created' => 0, 'errors' => [$e->getMessage()]];
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - A. Last-100-Draws Tail Miss Analyzer
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Classify a winner's rank into a bucket.
 *
 * Buckets:
 *   [[SKAI_HIT_TOP20]]         rank 1-20
 *   [[SKAI_NEAR_MISS_21_30]]   rank 21-30
 *   [[SKAI_WEAK_MISS_31_50]]   rank 31-50
 *   [[SKAI_HARD_MISS_51_PLUS]] rank 51+
 *
 * @param int $rank  1-based rank (use 9999 if not ranked)
 * @return string    Bucket label
 */
function SKAI_classifyWinnerRankBucket($rank) {
    $rank = (int)$rank;
    if ($rank <= 0)  { return '[[SKAI_HARD_MISS_51_PLUS]]'; }
    if ($rank <= 20) { return '[[SKAI_HIT_TOP20]]'; }
    if ($rank <= 30) { return '[[SKAI_NEAR_MISS_21_30]]'; }
    if ($rank <= 50) { return '[[SKAI_WEAK_MISS_31_50]]'; }
    return '[[SKAI_HARD_MISS_51_PLUS]]';
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Compute per-component deficits for one candidate
 * versus the top-20 median.
 *
 * @param array $scoreParts   Candidate score_parts array
 * @param array $top20Median  Median score_parts of top 20
 * @return array              Deficits keyed by component name (non-negative)
 */
function SKAI_computeTailMissDeficits($scoreParts, $top20Median) {
    if (!is_array($scoreParts))  { $scoreParts  = []; }
    if (!is_array($top20Median)) { $top20Median = []; }

    $components = ['freq', 'recency', 'window', 'ml', 'penalties', 'pairwise'];
    $deficits = [];
    foreach ($components as $c) {
        $candVal   = (float)($scoreParts[$c]  ?? 0.0);
        $medianVal = (float)($top20Median[$c] ?? 0.0);
        if ($c === 'penalties') {
            // Penalties are negative; more-negative value means larger deficit
            $deficits[$c] = (float)min(0.0, $candVal - $medianVal);
        } else {
            $deficits[$c] = (float)max(0.0, $medianVal - $candVal);
        }
    }
    return $deficits;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Build tail miss summary from per-draw stats.
 *
 * @param array $drawStats   Array of per-draw result arrays (from SKAI_analyzeTailMissesLast100)
 * @return array             Summary: bucket counts, deficit aggregates, near-miss patterns
 */
function SKAI_buildTailMissSummary($drawStats) {
    $summary = [
        'total_winner_instances'   => 0,
        'bucket_top20'             => 0,
        'bucket_near_miss_21_30'   => 0,
        'bucket_weak_miss_31_50'   => 0,
        'bucket_hard_miss_51plus'  => 0,
        'near_miss_deficit_totals' => [
            'freq' => 0.0, 'recency' => 0.0, 'window' => 0.0,
            'ml'   => 0.0, 'penalties' => 0.0, 'pairwise' => 0.0
        ],
        'near_miss_count'          => 0,
        'cause_low_raw'            => 0,
        'cause_excess_penalty'     => 0,
        'cause_weak_pairwise'      => 0,
        'cause_poor_calibration'   => 0,
        'near_miss_number_freq'    => [],
        'mean_near_miss_rank'      => 0.0,
    ];

    if (!is_array($drawStats) || empty($drawStats)) { return $summary; }

    $nearMissRanks = [];

    foreach ($drawStats as $draw) {
        if (!is_array($draw) || empty($draw['winners'])) { continue; }
        foreach ($draw['winners'] as $wData) {
            $summary['total_winner_instances']++;
            $bucket = (string)($wData['bucket'] ?? '[[SKAI_HARD_MISS_51_PLUS]]');

            if ($bucket === '[[SKAI_HIT_TOP20]]') {
                $summary['bucket_top20']++;
            } elseif ($bucket === '[[SKAI_NEAR_MISS_21_30]]') {
                $summary['bucket_near_miss_21_30']++;
                $summary['near_miss_count']++;
                $num  = (int)($wData['number'] ?? 0);
                $rank = (int)($wData['rank']   ?? 99);
                $nearMissRanks[] = $rank;
                if ($num > 0) {
                    $summary['near_miss_number_freq'][$num] =
                        ($summary['near_miss_number_freq'][$num] ?? 0) + 1;
                }
                $deficits = (array)($wData['deficits'] ?? []);
                foreach ($deficits as $comp => $val) {
                    if (isset($summary['near_miss_deficit_totals'][$comp])) {
                        $summary['near_miss_deficit_totals'][$comp] += (float)$val;
                    }
                }
                $causes = (array)($wData['causes'] ?? []);
                if (!empty($causes['low_raw']))          { $summary['cause_low_raw']++; }
                if (!empty($causes['excess_penalty']))   { $summary['cause_excess_penalty']++; }
                if (!empty($causes['weak_pairwise']))    { $summary['cause_weak_pairwise']++; }
                if (!empty($causes['poor_calibration'])) { $summary['cause_poor_calibration']++; }
            } elseif ($bucket === '[[SKAI_WEAK_MISS_31_50]]') {
                $summary['bucket_weak_miss_31_50']++;
            } else {
                $summary['bucket_hard_miss_51plus']++;
            }
        }
    }

    if ($summary['near_miss_count'] > 0) {
        foreach ($summary['near_miss_deficit_totals'] as $c => $v) {
            $summary['near_miss_deficit_totals'][$c] = $v / $summary['near_miss_count'];
        }
        $summary['mean_near_miss_rank'] = !empty($nearMissRanks)
            ? (float)(array_sum($nearMissRanks) / count($nearMissRanks))
            : 0.0;
    }

    arsort($summary['near_miss_number_freq']);
    return $summary;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Analyze tail misses for the last N draws.
 *
 * Uses the actual SKAI scoring path (not simplified proxy) to validate each
 * historical draw, classify winners into rank buckets, and persist results.
 *
 * @param string   $gameId       Game identifier
 * @param array    $drawHistory  Full draw history
 * @param callable $predictFn   fn($trainWindow, $params) => ranked list
 * @param array    $params       Scoring params
 * @param int      $windowSize   Training window size per step
 * @param int|null $analysisN    Number of draws to analyze (null = config default)
 * @return array                 Summary from SKAI_buildTailMissSummary
 */
function SKAI_analyzeTailMissesLast100($gameId, $drawHistory, $predictFn, $params,
    $windowSize = 50, $analysisN = null)
{
    try {
        $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
        $n   = ($analysisN !== null) ? max(10, (int)$analysisN) : (int)$cfg['analysis_window'];

        if (!is_array($drawHistory) || count($drawHistory) < $windowSize + 5) {
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] analyzeTailMissesLast100: insufficient draw history');
            return [];
        }
        if (!is_callable($predictFn)) {
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] analyzeTailMissesLast100: predictFn not callable');
            return [];
        }

        $totalDraws = count($drawHistory);
        $startIdx   = max($windowSize, $totalDraws - $n);
        $drawStats  = [];

        for ($t = $startIdx; $t < $totalDraws; $t++) {
            $trainStart  = max(0, $t - $windowSize);
            $trainWindow = array_slice($drawHistory, $trainStart, $t - $trainStart);
            if (empty($trainWindow)) { continue; }

            try {
                $rankedList = $predictFn($trainWindow, $params);
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] predictFn failed at t=' . $t . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
                continue;
            }
            if (empty($rankedList)) { continue; }

            $actualDraw = $drawHistory[$t];
            $winners    = array_map('intval', (array)($actualDraw['numbers'] ?? []));
            if (empty($winners)) { continue; }

            $top20 = array_slice(array_column($rankedList, 'num'), 0, 20);

            $rankMap  = [];
            $scoreMap = [];
            foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $item) {
                $num = (int)($item['num'] ?? 0);
                if ($num > 0) {
                    $rankMap[$num]  = $idx + 1;
                    $scoreMap[$num] = $item;
                }
            }

            $top20ScoreParts = SKAI_getTop20ScoreParts($rankedList, $top20);
            $top20Median     = SKAI_calculateMedianScoreParts($top20ScoreParts);

            $top20CutScore = 0.0;
            if (!empty($top20)) {
                $lastKey       = $top20[count($top20) - 1];
                $lastCand      = $scoreMap[$lastKey] ?? null;
                if ($lastCand !== null) {
                    $top20CutScore = (float)($lastCand['score_total'] ?? 0.0);
                }
            }

            $winnerData = [];
            foreach ($winners as $w) {
                $rank      = $rankMap[$w] ?? 9999;
                $bucket    = SKAI_classifyWinnerRankBucket($rank);
                $candidate = $scoreMap[$w] ?? ['score_total' => 0.0, 'score_parts' => []];
                $scoreParts = (array)($candidate['score_parts'] ?? []);
                $deficits   = SKAI_computeTailMissDeficits($scoreParts, $top20Median);
                $reasonCodes = SKAI_computeReasonCodes($scoreParts, $top20Median);

                $scoreTotal  = (float)($candidate['score_total']      ?? 0.0);
                $calibScore  = (float)($candidate['calibrated_score'] ?? $scoreTotal);
                $rawSum      = (float)(($scoreParts['freq']     ?? 0.0)
                                     + ($scoreParts['recency']  ?? 0.0)
                                     + ($scoreParts['window']   ?? 0.0)
                                     + ($scoreParts['ml']       ?? 0.0));
                $medianRawSum = (float)(($top20Median['freq']    ?? 0.0)
                                      + ($top20Median['recency'] ?? 0.0)
                                      + ($top20Median['window']  ?? 0.0)
                                      + ($top20Median['ml']      ?? 0.0));
                $penaltyAmt  = (float)abs($scoreParts['penalties'] ?? 0.0);
                $pairwiseAmt = (float)($scoreParts['pairwise'] ?? 0.0);

                $causes = [
                    'low_raw'          => ($rawSum < ($medianRawSum * 0.75)),
                    'excess_penalty'   => ($penaltyAmt > 0.05),
                    'weak_pairwise'    => ($pairwiseAmt < (($top20Median['pairwise'] ?? 0.0) * 0.5)),
                    'poor_calibration' => (abs($calibScore - $scoreTotal) > 0.02
                                          && $calibScore < $scoreTotal),
                ];

                $winnerData[] = [
                    'number'           => $w,
                    'rank'             => $rank,
                    'bucket'           => $bucket,
                    'score_total'      => $scoreTotal,
                    'calibrated_score' => $calibScore,
                    'score_parts'      => $scoreParts,
                    'deficits'         => $deficits,
                    'causes'           => $causes,
                    'reason_codes'     => $reasonCodes,
                ];

                SKAI_storeTailMissStat(
                    $gameId,
                    (string)($actualDraw['date'] ?? date('Y-m-d')),
                    $w, $rank, $bucket,
                    $scoreTotal, $calibScore,
                    $scoreParts, $top20Median,
                    $deficits, $causes, $reasonCodes
                );
            }

            $drawStats[] = [
                'draw_date' => (string)($actualDraw['date'] ?? ''),
                'winners'   => $winnerData,
            ];
        }

        $summary = SKAI_buildTailMissSummary($drawStats);
        $priors  = SKAI_buildTailMissPriors($summary);
        // [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Pass empty promotion_metrics at analysis time;
        // live-run promotions are stored separately via SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline().
        SKAI_storeTailMissRun($gameId, $n, count($drawStats), $summary, $priors, []);

        if (!empty($cfg['debug_logging'])) {
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] analyzeTailMissesLast100 done. near_miss='
                . $summary['bucket_near_miss_21_30']
                . ' top20=' . $summary['bucket_top20']
                . ' mean_near_miss_rank=' . number_format((float)$summary['mean_near_miss_rank'], 2));
        }

        return $summary;

    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] analyzeTailMissesLast100 error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [];
    }
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Persist one tail miss stat row. Non-fatal.
 */
function SKAI_storeTailMissStat($gameId, $drawDate, $winnerNum, $rank, $bucket,
    $scoreTotal, $calibratedScore, $scoreParts, $top20Median,
    $deficits, $causes, $reasonCodes)
{
    try {
        $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $q  = $db->getQuery(true);
        $rcStr = is_array($reasonCodes) ? implode(',', $reasonCodes) : (string)$reasonCodes;
        $q->insert($db->quoteName('#__skai_tail_miss_stats'))
            ->columns($db->quoteName([
                'game_id','draw_date','winner_number','baseline_rank','rank_bucket',
                'score_total','calibrated_score','score_parts_json','top20_median_json',
                'component_deficits','miss_causes_json','reason_codes'
            ]))
            ->values(implode(',', [
                $db->quote((string)$gameId),
                $db->quote((string)$drawDate),
                (int)$winnerNum,
                (int)$rank,
                $db->quote((string)$bucket),
                (float)$scoreTotal,
                (float)$calibratedScore,
                $db->quote(json_encode((array)$scoreParts,   JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
                $db->quote(json_encode((array)$top20Median,  JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
                $db->quote(json_encode((array)$deficits,     JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
                $db->quote(json_encode((array)$causes,       JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
                $db->quote(substr($rcStr, 0, 500)),
            ]));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] storeTailMissStat error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Persist one tail miss analysis run summary. Non-fatal.
 */
// [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Added $promotionMetrics param; writes promotion_metrics_json
// to match schema column and report reader expectation.
function SKAI_storeTailMissRun($gameId, $analysisWindow, $drawsAnalyzed, $summary, $priors, $promotionMetrics = []) {
    try {
        $db  = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $now = (new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date('now'))->toSql();
        $q   = $db->getQuery(true);
        $q->insert($db->quoteName('#__skai_tail_miss_runs'))
            ->columns($db->quoteName([
                'game_id','run_at','analysis_window','draws_analyzed',
                'bucket_top20','bucket_near_miss_21_30','bucket_weak_miss_31_50',
                'bucket_hard_miss_51plus','deficit_aggregates_json','prior_model_json',
                'promotion_metrics_json'
            ]))
            ->values(implode(',', [
                $db->quote((string)$gameId),
                $db->quote($now),
                (int)$analysisWindow,
                (int)$drawsAnalyzed,
                (int)($summary['bucket_top20']            ?? 0),
                (int)($summary['bucket_near_miss_21_30']  ?? 0),
                (int)($summary['bucket_weak_miss_31_50']  ?? 0),
                (int)($summary['bucket_hard_miss_51plus'] ?? 0),
                $db->quote(json_encode(
                    (array)($summary['near_miss_deficit_totals'] ?? []), JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
                $db->quote(json_encode((array)$priors, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
                $db->quote(json_encode((array)$promotionMetrics, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE)),
            ]));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $db->execute();
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] storeTailMissRun error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - G. Tail Miss Prior Model
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Build a lightweight, bounded prior model from
 * the tail miss summary. Converts deficit aggregates and cause rates into
 * numeric priors usable in the tail recovery score. All priors are capped
 * and smoothed (Section G).
 *
 * @param array $summary  Output of SKAI_buildTailMissSummary
 * @return array          Bounded prior values keyed by component
 */
function SKAI_buildTailMissPriors($summary) {
    if (!is_array($summary) || empty($summary)) { return []; }

    $n = (int)($summary['near_miss_count'] ?? 0);
    if ($n <= 0) { return []; }

    $deficits = (array)($summary['near_miss_deficit_totals'] ?? []);
    $maxDef   = 1e-9;
    foreach ($deficits as $v) {
        $absV = abs((float)$v);
        if ($absV > $maxDef) { $maxDef = $absV; }
    }

    $priors = [];
    foreach ($deficits as $comp => $avg) {
        $raw = ($maxDef > 0) ? (abs((float)$avg) / $maxDef) : 0.0;
        $priors[$comp . '_prior'] = min(1.0, max(0.0, $raw));
    }

    $priors['low_raw_rate']          = min(1.0, (int)($summary['cause_low_raw']         ?? 0) / $n);
    $priors['excess_penalty_rate']   = min(1.0, (int)($summary['cause_excess_penalty']   ?? 0) / $n);
    $priors['weak_pairwise_rate']    = min(1.0, (int)($summary['cause_weak_pairwise']    ?? 0) / $n);
    $priors['poor_calibration_rate'] = min(1.0, (int)($summary['cause_poor_calibration'] ?? 0) / $n);

    // Smooth: blend toward 0 using sqrt(n/10) weight
    $smooth = min(1.0, sqrt($n / 10.0));
    foreach ($priors as $k => $v) {
        $priors[$k] = (float)($smooth * $v);
    }

    return $priors;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Retrieve the latest tail miss prior model for a game.
 * Falls back to empty array if no DB record exists.
 *
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier
 * @return array          Prior model array
 */
function SKAI_getTailMissPrior($gameId) {
    static $cache = [];
    $key = (string)$gameId;
    if (isset($cache[$key])) { return $cache[$key]; }
    try {
        $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $q  = $db->getQuery(true);
        $q->select($db->quoteName('prior_model_json'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_tail_miss_runs'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($key))
            ->order($db->quoteName('run_at') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(1);
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $raw = $db->loadResult();
        if ($raw) {
            $parsed = json_decode($raw, true);
            $cache[$key] = is_array($parsed) ? $parsed : [];
        } else {
            $cache[$key] = [];
        }
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] getTailMissPrior error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        $cache[$key] = [];
    }
    return $cache[$key];
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - C. Tail-Focused Metrics
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Compute tail-focused metrics for one draw.
 *
 * Adds to existing metrics (Section C):
 *   [[tail_recall_11_30]]           proportion of winners in ranks 11-30
 *   [[near_miss_promotion_rate]]    fraction of rank-21-30 baseline winners
 *                                   that moved into top 20 after tail recovery
 *   [[tail_miss_reduction_rate]]    relative reduction in rank-21-30 count vs baseline
 *   [[mean_near_miss_rank]]         average rank of winners landing in 21-30
 *   [[tail_gain_score]]             composite: near-miss promotions + tail recall
 *                                   weighted against top-10 stability
 *
 * @param array  $rankedList       Scored and ranked candidates after tail recovery
 * @param array  $winners          Actual winning numbers
 * @param array  $baselineRankMap  Rank map BEFORE tail recovery (for promotion rate)
 * @return array  Tail metric keys
 */
function SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics($rankedList, $winners, $baselineRankMap = []) {
    $empty = [
        'tail_recall_11_30'        => 0.0,
        'near_miss_promotion_rate' => 0.0,
        'tail_miss_reduction_rate' => 0.0,
        'mean_near_miss_rank'      => 0.0,
        'tail_gain_score'          => 0.0,
    ];
    if (!is_array($rankedList) || empty($rankedList)) { return $empty; }
    if (!is_array($winners)    || empty($winners))    { return $empty; }

    $winners = array_map('intval', $winners);
    $rankMap = [];
    foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $item) {
        $num = (int)($item['num'] ?? 0);
        if ($num > 0) { $rankMap[$num] = $idx + 1; }
    }

    $inTail                = 0;
    $nearMissRanks         = [];
    $nearMissCount         = 0;
    $baselineNearMissCount = 0;
    $promotedFromNearMiss  = 0;
    $winnersInTop10Before  = 0;
    $winnersInTop10After   = 0;

    foreach ($winners as $w) {
        $newRank  = (int)($rankMap[$w] ?? 9999);
        $baseRank = (int)($baselineRankMap[$w] ?? 9999);

        if ($newRank >= 11 && $newRank <= 30) { $inTail++; }
        if ($newRank >= 21 && $newRank <= 30) {
            $nearMissRanks[] = $newRank;
            $nearMissCount++;
        }
        if ($baseRank >= 21 && $baseRank <= 30) {
            $baselineNearMissCount++;
            if ($newRank <= 20) { $promotedFromNearMiss++; }
        }
        if ($baseRank <= 10) { $winnersInTop10Before++; }
        if ($newRank  <= 10) { $winnersInTop10After++;  }
    }

    $total        = count($winners);
    $tailRecall   = $total > 0 ? $inTail / $total : 0.0;
    $promoRate    = $baselineNearMissCount > 0
        ? $promotedFromNearMiss / $baselineNearMissCount : 0.0;
    $reductionRate = $baselineNearMissCount > 0
        ? max(0.0, ($baselineNearMissCount - $nearMissCount) / $baselineNearMissCount)
        : 0.0;
    $meanNearMissRank = !empty($nearMissRanks)
        ? (float)(array_sum($nearMissRanks) / count($nearMissRanks))
        : 0.0;
    $top10Stability = $winnersInTop10Before > 0
        ? $winnersInTop10After / $winnersInTop10Before : 1.0;
    $tailGainScore = min(1.0, ($promoRate * 0.6) + ($tailRecall * 0.2) + ($top10Stability * 0.2));

    return [
        'tail_recall_11_30'        => (float)$tailRecall,
        'near_miss_promotion_rate' => (float)$promoRate,
        'tail_miss_reduction_rate' => (float)$reductionRate,
        'mean_near_miss_rank'      => (float)$meanNearMissRank,
        'tail_gain_score'          => (float)$tailGainScore,
    ];
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - D/E/F. Tail Miss Recovery Re-rank Layer
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Compute adjusted penalty for a near-miss candidate.
 * If the prior model shows this game repeatedly suffers excess penalties,
 * partially relax the penalty contribution (bounded by [[SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION]]).
 *
 * @param float  $rawPenalty   Current penalty value (should be <= 0)
 * @param int    $candidateNum Ball number (reserved for future per-number logic)
 * @param array  $tailPriors   From SKAI_getTailMissPrior
 * @param float  $relaxFactor  [[SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION]] (0-1)
 * @return float               Adjusted penalty (still <= 0)
 */
function SKAI_adjustPenaltyForNearMissContext($rawPenalty, $candidateNum, $tailPriors, $relaxFactor = 0.5) {
    $rawPenalty  = (float)$rawPenalty;
    $relaxFactor = max(0.0, min(1.0, (float)$relaxFactor));
    if ($rawPenalty >= 0.0 || $relaxFactor <= 0.0) { return $rawPenalty; }

    $excessPenaltyRate = (float)($tailPriors['excess_penalty_rate'] ?? 0.0);
    // Only relax if excess_penalty is a recurring pattern (threshold 25%)
    if ($excessPenaltyRate < 0.25) { return $rawPenalty; }

    $relaxAmount = abs($rawPenalty) * $relaxFactor * $excessPenaltyRate;
    return (float)min(0.0, $rawPenalty + $relaxAmount);
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Compute the tail recovery composite score for one
 * borderline candidate.
 *
 * Score = calibratedBaseScore
 *       + penaltyRelaxationDelta (Section D, penalty moderation)
 *       + priorBonus             (bounded by [[SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP]])
 *       + pairwiseCompanionBonus (bounded by [[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP]])
 *
 * Reason codes (Section I):
 *   [[TAIL_PROMOTE_CALIBRATION]] calibrated_score > raw score_total
 *   [[TAIL_PROMOTE_PRIOR]]       prior model shows persistent near-miss deficit
 *   [[TAIL_PROMOTE_PAIRWISE]]    pairwise companion bonus applied
 *   [[TAIL_BLOCK_PENALTY]]       large penalty dominates; recovery limited
 *   [[TAIL_NO_SIGNAL]]           no significant signal found
 *
 * @param array  $candidate    {num, score_total, score_parts, calibrated_score?}
 * @param array  $seedSet      High-confidence seed numbers (Section E)
 * @param array  $liftMap      Pairwise lift map (Section E)
 * @param array  $tailPriors   From SKAI_getTailMissPrior (Section G)
 * @param array  $cfg          From SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig (Section H)
 * @return array               {tail_score, reason_codes, score_parts_delta, ...}
 */
function SKAI_computeTailRecoveryScore($candidate, $seedSet, $liftMap, $tailPriors, $cfg) {
    if (!is_array($candidate)) {
        return [
            'tail_score' => 0.0, 'reason_codes' => ['[[TAIL_NO_SIGNAL]]'],
            'score_parts_delta' => [], 'calibrated_score' => 0.0,
            'penalty_adj' => 0.0, 'prior_bonus' => 0.0, 'pairwise_bonus' => 0.0,
        ];
    }

    $num        = (int)($candidate['num']              ?? 0);
    $scoreTotal = (float)($candidate['score_total']    ?? 0.0);
    $calibScore = (float)($candidate['calibrated_score'] ?? $scoreTotal);
    $scoreParts = (array)($candidate['score_parts']    ?? []);
    $rawPenalty = (float)($scoreParts['penalties']     ?? 0.0);

    $reasonCodes     = [];
    $scorePartsDelta = [];

    // --- F. Calibration basis ---
    $baseScore = $calibScore;
    if ($calibScore > ($scoreTotal + 0.001)) {
        $reasonCodes[] = '[[TAIL_PROMOTE_CALIBRATION]]';
    }

    // --- D. Penalty relaxation ---
    $relaxFactor  = (float)($cfg['penalty_relaxation'] ?? 0.5);
    $adjPenalty   = SKAI_adjustPenaltyForNearMissContext($rawPenalty, $num, (array)$tailPriors, $relaxFactor);
    $penaltyDelta = $adjPenalty - $rawPenalty;
    if (abs($penaltyDelta) > 1e-9) {
        $scorePartsDelta['tail_penalty_adjustment'] = (float)$penaltyDelta;
    }
    if ($adjPenalty < -0.05 && $penaltyDelta <= 1e-9) {
        $reasonCodes[] = '[[TAIL_BLOCK_PENALTY]]';
    }

    // --- G. Prior bonus ---
    $priorBonus  = 0.0;
    $priorCap    = (float)($cfg['prior_cap'] ?? 0.10);
    $freqPrior   = (float)($tailPriors['freq_prior']    ?? 0.0);
    $recPrior    = (float)($tailPriors['recency_prior'] ?? 0.0);
    $mlPrior     = (float)($tailPriors['ml_prior']      ?? 0.0);
    $priorAvg    = ($freqPrior + $recPrior + $mlPrior) / 3.0;
    if ($priorAvg > 0.15) {
        $priorBonus    = min($priorCap, $priorAvg * $priorCap);
        $reasonCodes[] = '[[TAIL_PROMOTE_PRIOR]]';
        $scorePartsDelta['tail_prior'] = (float)$priorBonus;
    }

    // --- E. Pairwise companion bonus ---
    $pairwiseBonus = 0.0;
    $pairwiseCap   = (float)($cfg['pairwise_cap'] ?? 0.15);
    if (!empty($cfg['pairwise_enabled']) && !empty($liftMap)
        && !empty($seedSet) && $num > 0)
    {
        $rawBonus = (float)SKAI_calculatePairwiseBonus(
            $num, $seedSet, $liftMap,
            min(10, count($seedSet)),
            $pairwiseCap
        );
        $pairwiseBonus = min($pairwiseCap, max(0.0, $rawBonus));
        if ($pairwiseBonus > 0.01) {
            $reasonCodes[] = '[[TAIL_PROMOTE_PAIRWISE]]';
            $scorePartsDelta['tail_recovery_bonus'] = (float)$pairwiseBonus;
        }
    }

    if (empty($reasonCodes)) {
        $reasonCodes[] = '[[TAIL_NO_SIGNAL]]';
    }

    $tailScore = $baseScore + $penaltyDelta + $priorBonus + $pairwiseBonus;

    return [
        'tail_score'        => (float)$tailScore,
        'reason_codes'      => $reasonCodes,
        'score_parts_delta' => $scorePartsDelta,
        'calibrated_score'  => (float)$calibScore,
        'penalty_adj'       => (float)$adjPenalty,
        'prior_bonus'       => (float)$priorBonus,
        'pairwise_bonus'    => (float)$pairwiseBonus,
    ];
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Apply the tail miss recovery re-rank pass.
 *
 * This is the core Section D function. Operates ONLY on candidates in the
 * borderline zone (default ranks 15-35). The top core (ranks 1 to
 * rerank_start-1) is untouched. Borderline candidates are re-scored and
 * re-sorted within the window, then spliced back. Deterministic for the
 * same inputs and same config state.
 *
 * @param array  $rankedList  Full ranked candidate list (score_total desc)
 * @param string $gameId      Game identifier
 * @param array  $tailPriors  Prior model (from SKAI_getTailMissPrior)
 * @param array  $liftMap     Pairwise lift map (pass [] to skip)
 * @param array  $cfg         Config (from SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig)
 * @return array              Re-ranked candidate list; baseline_rank added
 */
function SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery($rankedList, $gameId, $tailPriors, $liftMap, $cfg) {
    if (empty($cfg['enabled'])) { return $rankedList; }
    if (!is_array($rankedList) || count($rankedList) < 2) { return $rankedList; }

    $rerankStart = max(1,  (int)($cfg['rerank_start'] ?? 15));
    $rerankEnd   = min(count($rankedList), (int)($cfg['rerank_end'] ?? 35));
    $seedSize    = max(1,  (int)($cfg['seed_size']    ?? 10));

    if ($rerankStart > $rerankEnd) { return $rankedList; }

    // Stamp baseline ranks
    foreach ($rankedList as $idx => &$item) {
        $item['baseline_rank'] = $idx + 1;
    }
    unset($item);

    // --- E. Seed set: top core before the borderline window ---
    $seedSet = [];
    $seedCap = min($seedSize, $rerankStart - 1);
    for ($i = 0; $i < $seedCap && $i < count($rankedList); $i++) {
        $n = (int)($rankedList[$i]['num'] ?? 0);
        if ($n > 0) { $seedSet[] = $n; }
    }

    // Partition: core | borderline | rest
    $coreCount   = $rerankStart - 1;
    $borderCount = $rerankEnd - $rerankStart + 1;
    $core        = array_slice($rankedList, 0, $coreCount);
    $borderline  = array_slice($rankedList, $coreCount, $borderCount);
    $tailRest    = array_slice($rankedList, $coreCount + $borderCount);

    if (empty($borderline)) { return $rankedList; }

    $debugLog    = !empty($cfg['debug_logging']);
    $recoveryLog = [];

    // Re-score each borderline candidate
    foreach ($borderline as &$cand) {
        $result = SKAI_computeTailRecoveryScore(
            $cand, $seedSet, (array)$liftMap, (array)$tailPriors, $cfg
        );
        $cand['tail_score']        = $result['tail_score'];
        $cand['tail_reason_codes'] = $result['reason_codes'];

        // Safely extend score_parts (Section K: backward-compatible addition)
        if (!isset($cand['score_parts']) || !is_array($cand['score_parts'])) {
            $cand['score_parts'] = [];
        }
        foreach ($result['score_parts_delta'] as $k => $v) {
            $cand['score_parts'][$k] = (float)(($cand['score_parts'][$k] ?? 0.0) + $v);
        }

        if ($debugLog) {
            $recoveryLog[] = [
                'num'              => $cand['num'],
                'baseline_rank'    => $cand['baseline_rank'],
                'score_total'      => $cand['score_total'],
                'calibrated_score' => $result['calibrated_score'],
                'tail_prior'       => $result['prior_bonus'],
                'pairwise_bonus'   => $result['pairwise_bonus'],
                'penalty_adj'      => $result['penalty_adj'],
                'tail_score'       => $result['tail_score'],
                'reason_codes'     => $result['reason_codes'],
            ];
        }
    }
    unset($cand);

    // Re-sort borderline by tail_score desc (tie-break: baseline_rank asc)
    usort($borderline, function($a, $b) {
        $diff = (float)$b['tail_score'] - (float)$a['tail_score'];
        if (abs($diff) > 1e-9) { return ($diff > 0) ? 1 : -1; }
        return (int)($a['baseline_rank'] ?? 0) - (int)($b['baseline_rank'] ?? 0);
    });

    $newRankedList = array_merge($core, $borderline, $tailRest);
