    // Re-stamp new ranks
    foreach ($newRankedList as $idx => &$item) {
        $item['rank'] = $idx + 1;
    }
    unset($item);

    if ($debugLog && !empty($recoveryLog)) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] applyTailMissRecovery log (gameId=' . $gameId . '): '
            . json_encode($recoveryLog, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE));
    }

    return $newRankedList;
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - B. Live Tuning Path
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Live-score-based tuning using the actual ranking
 * pipeline. Controlled by [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]].
 *
 * If [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]] is 0 (default) or on any failure, falls back
 * to existing SKAI_computeTunedWeights (simplified tuner).
 *
 * Focus: winners falling in ranks 21-30 are tracked separately so that the
 * weight delta emphasises recovery of near-miss candidates.
 *
 * @param string   $gameId       Game identifier
 * @param array    $baseWeights  Starting weights
 * @param array    $drawHistory  Full draw history
 * @param callable $predictFn   fn($trainWindow, $params) => ranked list
 * @param array    $params       Scoring params
 * @param int      $windowSize   Validation window size
 * @param float    $lr           Learning rate
 * @param float    $smooth       Smoothing factor
 * @return array                 Tuned weights or $baseWeights on failure/disabled
 */
function SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive($gameId, $baseWeights, $drawHistory, $predictFn, $params,
    $windowSize = 60, $lr = 0.05, $smooth = 0.2)
{
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
    if (empty($cfg['use_live_tuning'])) {
        return SKAI_computeTunedWeights($gameId, $baseWeights, $drawHistory, $windowSize, $lr, $smooth);
    }

    try {
        if (!is_callable($predictFn)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('predictFn must be callable');
        }
        if (!is_array($drawHistory) || count($drawHistory) < $windowSize + 10) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('Insufficient draw history for live tuning');
        }

        $totalDraws      = count($drawHistory);
        $validationStart = max(0, $totalDraws - $windowSize);
        $validationDraws = array_slice($drawHistory, $validationStart);
        if (empty($validationDraws)) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('Empty validation draws set');
        }

        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive: game=' . $gameId
            . ' window=' . $windowSize . ' draws=' . count($validationDraws));

        $components    = ['freq', 'recency', 'window', 'ml', 'penalties', 'pairwise'];
        $totalDeficits = array_fill_keys($components, 0.0);
        $numMisses     = 0;
        $nearMisses    = 0;

        foreach ($validationDraws as $valIdx => $valDraw) {
            $trainEndIdx = $validationStart + $valIdx;
            if ($trainEndIdx < 10) { continue; }
            $trainWindow = array_slice($drawHistory, 0, $trainEndIdx);
            $winners     = array_map('intval', (array)($valDraw['numbers'] ?? []));
            if (empty($winners)) { continue; }

            try {
                $rankedList = $predictFn($trainWindow, $params);
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] computeTunedWeightsLive predictFn error: ' . $e->getMessage());
                continue;
            }
            if (empty($rankedList)) { continue; }

            $rankMap  = [];
            $scoreMap = [];
            foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $item) {
                $n = (int)($item['num'] ?? 0);
                if ($n > 0) { $rankMap[$n] = $idx + 1; $scoreMap[$n] = $item; }
            }
            $top20   = array_slice(array_column($rankedList, 'num'), 0, 20);
            $top20SP = SKAI_getTop20ScoreParts($rankedList, $top20);
            $medSP   = SKAI_calculateMedianScoreParts($top20SP);

            foreach ($winners as $w) {
                $rank = $rankMap[$w] ?? 9999;
                if ($rank <= 20) { continue; }
                $candidate  = $scoreMap[$w] ?? [];
                $scoreParts = (array)($candidate['score_parts'] ?? []);
                $deficits   = SKAI_computeTailMissDeficits($scoreParts, $medSP);
                foreach ($components as $c) {
                    $totalDeficits[$c] += (float)($deficits[$c] ?? 0.0);
                }
                $numMisses++;
                if ($rank >= 21 && $rank <= 30) { $nearMisses++; }
            }
        }

        if ($numMisses === 0) {
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] computeTunedWeightsLive: no misses - keeping base weights');
            return $baseWeights;
        }

        foreach ($totalDeficits as $c => $v) { $totalDeficits[$c] = $v / $numMisses; }

        $mappedDeficits = [
            'frequency' => (float)($totalDeficits['freq']     ?? 0.0),
            'skip'      => (float)($totalDeficits['window']   ?? 0.0),
            'recency'   => (float)($totalDeficits['recency']  ?? 0.0),
            'cooccur'   => (float)($totalDeficits['pairwise'] ?? 0.0),
        ];

        $deltas     = SKAI_computeWeightDeltas(['component_deficits' => $mappedDeficits], $lr);
        $newWeights = SKAI_applyWeightUpdate($baseWeights, $deltas, $smooth);

        $metricBefore = SKAI_evaluateWeightsSimplified($baseWeights, $mappedDeficits);
        $metricAfter  = SKAI_evaluateWeightsSimplified($newWeights,  $mappedDeficits);
        $improvement  = $metricAfter - $metricBefore;

        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] computeTunedWeightsLive: misses=' . $numMisses
            . ' nearMiss21_30=' . $nearMisses
            . ' improvement=' . number_format($improvement, 4));

        return ($improvement >= 0.001) ? $newWeights : $baseWeights;

    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] computeTunedWeightsLive error: ' . $e->getMessage()
            . ' - falling back to simplified tuner');
        return SKAI_computeTunedWeights($gameId, $baseWeights, $drawHistory, $windowSize, $lr, $smooth);
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - I. Logging and Report
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Generate a tail miss recovery report for a game.
 *
 * Returns structured data covering the most recent analysis run plus
 * promotion metrics. Safe to call at any time; returns graceful empty on
 * missing data.
 *
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier
 * @param int    $limit   Number of recent run records to summarise
 * @return array          Report data
 */
function SKAI_getTailMissRecoveryReport($gameId, $limit = 5) {
    try {
        $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $q  = $db->getQuery(true);
        $q->select('*')
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_tail_miss_runs'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$gameId))
            ->order($db->quoteName('run_at') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(max(1, (int)$limit));
        $db->setQuery($q);
        $runs = $db->loadAssocList();

        if (empty($runs)) {
            return ['game_id' => $gameId, 'runs' => [], 'message' => 'No tail miss runs found'];
        }

        foreach ($runs as &$run) {
            $run['deficit_aggregates_json'] = json_decode($run['deficit_aggregates_json'] ?? '', true) ?: [];
            $run['prior_model_json']        = json_decode($run['prior_model_json']        ?? '', true) ?: [];
            $run['promotion_metrics_json']  = json_decode($run['promotion_metrics_json']  ?? '', true) ?: [];
        }
        unset($run);

        $latest       = $runs[0];
        $totalWinners = (int)($latest['bucket_top20']            ?? 0)
                      + (int)($latest['bucket_near_miss_21_30']  ?? 0)
                      + (int)($latest['bucket_weak_miss_31_50']  ?? 0)
                      + (int)($latest['bucket_hard_miss_51plus'] ?? 0);

        return [
            'game_id'                 => $gameId,
            'runs'                    => $runs,
            'latest_run'              => $latest,
            'total_winners_analyzed'  => $totalWinners,
            'near_miss_rate'          => $totalWinners > 0
                ? round((int)($latest['bucket_near_miss_21_30'] ?? 0) / $totalWinners, 4)
                : 0.0,
            'top20_rate'              => $totalWinners > 0
                ? round((int)($latest['bucket_top20'] ?? 0) / $totalWinners, 4)
                : 0.0,
            'prior_model'             => $latest['prior_model_json'],
        ];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] getTailMissRecoveryReport error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return ['game_id' => $gameId, 'error' => $e->getMessage()];
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - K. Pipeline Integration Helper
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Full tail-recovery-aware pipeline step.
 *
 * Wraps an existing ranked list (already produced by base pipeline) and
 * applies the tail miss recovery re-rank pass as step 5 of the pipeline:
 *
 *   1. base candidate scoring            (caller)
 *   2. score_parts assembly              (caller)
 *   3. pairwise bonuses if enabled       (caller)
 *   4. calibration if available          (caller)
 *   5. [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] pass  (this function)
 *   6. Gibbs / set-aware stage           (caller, after this)
 *   7. final ranked output               (caller)
 *
 * @param array  $rankedList      Already-ranked candidates
 * @param string $gameId          Game identifier
 * @param array  $calibrationMap  Calibration map (may be empty)
 * @param array  $liftMap         Pairwise lift map (may be empty)
 * @return array                  Re-ranked list (tail recovery applied)
 */
function SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep($rankedList, $gameId, $calibrationMap = [], $liftMap = []) {
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
    if (empty($cfg['enabled'])) { return $rankedList; }

    try {
        // --- F. Apply calibration to any un-calibrated candidate in the borderline zone ---
        if (!empty($calibrationMap) && is_array($calibrationMap)) {
            foreach ($rankedList as &$cand) {
                if (!isset($cand['calibrated_score'])) {
                    $raw  = (float)($cand['score_total'] ?? 0.0);
                    $cal  = SKAI_applyCalibration($raw, $calibrationMap);
                    $cand['calibrated_score'] = $cal;
                    if (!empty($cfg['debug_logging']) && abs($cal - $raw) > 1e-6) {
                        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] Calibration applied num=' . ($cand['num'] ?? '?')
                            . ' raw=' . number_format($raw, 6)
                            . ' cal=' . number_format($cal, 6)
                            . ' [[TAIL_PROMOTE_CALIBRATION]]');
                    }
                }
            }
            unset($cand);
        }

        $tailPriors = SKAI_getTailMissPrior($gameId);
        return SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery($rankedList, $gameId, $tailPriors, (array)$liftMap, $cfg);

    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runTailRecoveryPipelineStep error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return $rankedList;
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - L. A/B Comparison Support
// ========================================================================

/**
 * [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] Run baseline vs tail-recovery A/B backtest.
 *
 * Runs the same walk-forward validation twice:
 *   - Baseline:  predictFn as-is
 *   - Upgraded:  same predictFn + SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery
 *
 * Reports standard metrics plus the new tail-focused ones.
 *
 * @param string   $gameId       Game identifier
 * @param array    $drawHistory  Full draw history
 * @param int      $startIndex   Backtest start index
 * @param int|null $endIndex     Backtest end index (null = end of history)
 * @param int      $windowSize   Training window per step
 * @param array    $params       Scoring params
 * @param callable $predictFn   Baseline prediction function
 * @param array    $liftMap      Pairwise lift map (may be empty)
 * @param array    $calibMap     Calibration map (may be empty)
 * @return array                 A/B comparison report
 */
function SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest($gameId, $drawHistory, $startIndex, $endIndex,
    $windowSize, $params, $predictFn, $liftMap = [], $calibMap = [])
{
    try {
        $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
        if (!is_array($drawHistory)) { return ['error' => 'Invalid drawHistory']; }
        if (!is_callable($predictFn)) { return ['error' => 'predictFn not callable']; }
        if ($endIndex === null || $endIndex > count($drawHistory)) {
            $endIndex = count($drawHistory);
        }

        $baselineResults = [];
        $upgradedResults = [];

        for ($t = (int)$startIndex; $t < (int)$endIndex; $t++) {
            $trainStart  = max(0, $t - $windowSize);
            $trainWindow = array_slice($drawHistory, $trainStart, $t - $trainStart);
            if (empty($trainWindow)) { continue; }

            $actualDraw = $drawHistory[$t];
            $winners    = array_map('intval', (array)($actualDraw['numbers'] ?? []));
            if (empty($winners)) { continue; }

            try {
                $baselineRanked = $predictFn($trainWindow, $params);
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { continue; }
            if (empty($baselineRanked)) { continue; }

            $top20Baseline   = array_slice(array_column($baselineRanked, 'num'), 0, 20);
            $baselineMetrics = SKAI_calculateBacktestMetrics($baselineRanked, $winners, $top20Baseline);

            $baselineRankMap = [];
            foreach ($baselineRanked as $idx => $item) {
                $baselineRankMap[(int)($item['num'] ?? 0)] = $idx + 1;
            }

            $tailPriors     = SKAI_getTailMissPrior($gameId);
            $upgradedRanked = SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery(
                $baselineRanked, $gameId, $tailPriors, (array)$liftMap, $cfg
            );
            if (!empty($calibMap)) {
                $upgradedRanked = SKAI_calibrateList($upgradedRanked, $calibMap);
            }

            $top20Upgraded   = array_slice(array_column($upgradedRanked, 'num'), 0, 20);
            $upgradedMetrics = SKAI_calculateBacktestMetrics($upgradedRanked, $winners, $top20Upgraded);
            $tailMetrics     = SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics($upgradedRanked, $winners, $baselineRankMap);

            $baselineResults[] = $baselineMetrics;
            $upgradedResults[] = array_merge($upgradedMetrics, $tailMetrics);
        }

        if (empty($baselineResults)) {
            return ['error' => 'No valid draws in A/B test range'];
        }

        $aggBaseline = SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults($baselineResults);
        $aggUpgraded = SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults($upgradedResults);

        $tailKeys = ['tail_recall_11_30', 'near_miss_promotion_rate',
                     'tail_miss_reduction_rate', 'mean_near_miss_rank', 'tail_gain_score'];
        $aggTail = array_fill_keys($tailKeys, 0.0);
        $cnt     = count($upgradedResults);
        foreach ($upgradedResults as $r) {
            foreach ($tailKeys as $k) { $aggTail[$k] += (float)($r[$k] ?? 0.0); }
        }
        if ($cnt > 0) {
            foreach ($aggTail as $k => $v) { $aggTail[$k] = $v / $cnt; }
        }

        $recallDelta = $aggUpgraded['avg_recall_at_20'] - $aggBaseline['avg_recall_at_20'];

        return [
            'game_id'      => $gameId,
            'draws_tested' => count($baselineResults),
            'baseline'     => $aggBaseline,
            'upgraded'     => array_merge($aggUpgraded, $aggTail),
            'deltas'       => [
                'recall_at_20_delta'       => (float)$recallDelta,
                'ndcg_at_20_delta'         => (float)($aggUpgraded['avg_ndcg_at_20'] - $aggBaseline['avg_ndcg_at_20']),
                'mean_winner_rank_delta'   => (float)($aggBaseline['avg_mean_winner_rank'] - $aggUpgraded['avg_mean_winner_rank']),
                'tail_recall_11_30'        => (float)$aggTail['tail_recall_11_30'],
                'near_miss_promotion_rate' => (float)$aggTail['near_miss_promotion_rate'],
                'tail_miss_reduction_rate' => (float)$aggTail['tail_miss_reduction_rate'],
                'mean_near_miss_rank'      => (float)$aggTail['mean_near_miss_rank'],
                'tail_gain_score'          => (float)$aggTail['tail_gain_score'],
            ],
            'recommendation' => ($recallDelta >= 0 && $aggTail['near_miss_promotion_rate'] > 0.05)
                ? 'tail_recovery_beneficial'
                : 'tail_recovery_neutral_or_negative',
        ];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runTailRecoveryABTest error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return ['error' => $e->getMessage()];
    }
}

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] - AUTO-INSTALL
// ========================================================================
// Public ?install_tail=1 trigger has been removed for security.
// Use SKAI_runAdminMigration() via the Joomla admin endpoint instead.

// === END TAIL MISS RECOVERY SUBSYSTEM ===

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] - FULL CORRECTIVE INTEGRATION PASS
// ========================================================================
// Sections added:
//   C. SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher  - live/simplified tuner dispatcher
//   A. SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline      - wired live pipeline entry point
//   D. SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade           - additive promotion_metrics_json migration
//   F. SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel    - runtime status report (array)
//   F. SKAI_renderRuntimeVerificationPanel - rendered text/HTML panel
//   G. SKAI_runRuntimeIntegrityChecks      - full integrity check suite
//   G. SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryWiring       - wiring check
//   G. SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness       - metric check
//   G. SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness - storage/schema check
// ========================================================================

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Runtime state tracker (per-request).
// Populated by live pipeline and tuner dispatcher; read by panel.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
if (!isset($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'])) {
    $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] = [
        // tail recovery
        'tail_recovery_enabled'       => false,
        'tail_recovery_invoked'       => false,
        'tail_recovery_error'         => null,
        'candidates_reranked'         => 0,
        'promotions_into_top20'       => 0,
        'rerank_window'               => [15, 35],
        'seed_size'                   => 10,
        // tuning
        'live_tuning_enabled'         => false,
        'live_tuning_used'            => false,
        'live_tuning_error'           => null,
        // calibration
        'calibration_loaded'          => false,
        'calibration_applied'         => false,
        // pairwise
        'pairwise_loaded'             => false,
        'pairwise_applied'            => false,
        // gibbs
        'gibbs_active'                => false,
        // priors
        'priors_loaded'               => false,
        // storage
        'promotion_metrics_stored'    => false,
        'summary_row_stored'          => false,
        // general
        'run_mode'                    => '[[TAIL_RUNTIME_BASELINE_ONLY]]',
        'final_ranked_count'          => 0,
        'unique_candidate_count'      => 0,
        'duplicate_detected'          => false,
        'score_rank_consistent'       => true,
        'metric_compute_status'       => 'not_run',
        'db_persistence_status'       => 'not_run',
        'config_flags'                => [],
        'recent_ab_summary'           => null,
        'top_promoted_candidates'     => [],
        'last_run_game_id'            => '',
        // [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] post-fix fields (consolidated here)
        'final_order_source'          => '[[SKAI_BASE_SCORE]]',
        'promoted_candidates_audit'   => [],
        'ab_summary_stored'           => false,
        'live_pipeline_invoked'       => false,
        'dispatcher_used'             => false,
        'post_fix_verification'       => null,
    ];
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// C. [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Tuning Dispatcher
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Central dispatcher for weight tuning.
 *
 * Routes to SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive if [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]] is
 * enabled; otherwise falls through to the simplified tuner.
 * Any failure falls back cleanly to the simplified tuner.
 *
 * This is the single function the main pipeline should call for tuning.
 *
 * @param string   $gameId       Game identifier
 * @param array    $baseWeights  Starting component weights
 * @param array    $drawHistory  Full draw history
 * @param callable|null $predictFn Prediction fn (required for live tuning)
 * @param array    $params       Scoring params (required for live tuning)
 * @param int      $windowSize   Tuning window size
 * @param float    $lr           Learning rate
 * @param float    $smooth       Smoothing factor
 * @return array                 Tuned weights
 */
function SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher(
    $gameId, $baseWeights, $drawHistory,
    $predictFn = null, $params = [],
    $windowSize = 60, $lr = 0.05, $smooth = 0.2
) {
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
    $useLive = !empty($cfg['use_live_tuning']);

    // Update runtime state
    $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['live_tuning_enabled'] = $useLive;
    $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['config_flags']['SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING'] = $useLive ? 1 : 0;

    if ($useLive && is_callable($predictFn)) {
        try {
            $result = SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive(
                $gameId, $baseWeights, $drawHistory,
                $predictFn, $params, $windowSize, $lr, $smooth
            );
            $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['live_tuning_used'] = true;
            $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['live_tuning_error'] = null;
            // [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Mark dispatcher was used
            if (function_exists('SKAI_markDispatcherUsed')) { SKAI_markDispatcherUsed(); }
            return $result;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['live_tuning_used']  = false;
            $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['live_tuning_error'] = $e->getMessage();
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher live error: '
                . $e->getMessage() . ' - falling back to simplified tuner');
        }
    }

    // Simplified tuner fallback
    $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['live_tuning_used'] = false;
    // [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Mark dispatcher was used
    if (function_exists('SKAI_markDispatcherUsed')) { SKAI_markDispatcherUsed(); }
    try {
        return SKAI_computeTunedWeights($gameId, $baseWeights, $drawHistory, $windowSize, $lr, $smooth);
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher simplified error: '
            . $e->getMessage());
        return (array)$baseWeights;
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// A. [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Live Prediction Pipeline Entry Point
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Fully-wired live prediction pipeline.
 *
 * Pipeline order:
 *   1. base candidate scoring        (caller provides $rankedList)
 *   2. score_parts assembly          (caller)
 *   3. pairwise bonuses              (if $liftMap provided and config enabled)
 *   4. calibration                   (if $calibrationMap provided)
 *   5. tail miss recovery            (gated by [[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]])
 *   6. Gibbs / set-aware             (if SKAI_isGibbsEnabled())
 *   7. final ranked output           (returned)
 *   8. persistence / logging         (via SKAI_logPredictionRun if $params provided)
 *
 * Recovery errors fall back to baseline ranking cleanly.
 * Applied once and only once per call.
 *
 * @param array  $rankedList      Already-scored, sorted candidates from base pipeline
 * @param string $gameId          Game identifier
 * @param array  $calibrationMap  Calibration map (may be empty)
 * @param array  $liftMap         Pairwise lift map (may be empty)
 * @param array  $params          Scoring params (for persistence)
 * @param array  $gibbsConstraints Optional Gibbs constraints
 * @return array                  Final ranked list
 */
function SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline(
    $rankedList, $gameId,
    $calibrationMap = [], $liftMap = [],
    $params = [], $gibbsConstraints = []
) {
    $cfg  = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
    $rt   = &$GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'];

    // Snapshot config flags
    $rt['config_flags']['SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY'] = empty($cfg['enabled'])         ? 0 : 1;
    $rt['config_flags']['SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START']         = (int)($cfg['rerank_start']  ?? 15);
    $rt['config_flags']['SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END']           = (int)($cfg['rerank_end']    ?? 35);
    $rt['config_flags']['SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE']            = (int)($cfg['seed_size']     ?? 10);
    $rt['config_flags']['SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_ENABLED']     = empty($cfg['pairwise_enabled']) ? 0 : 1;
    $rt['config_flags']['SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING']        = empty($cfg['debug_logging'])    ? 0 : 1;
    $rt['rerank_window']  = [(int)($cfg['rerank_start'] ?? 15), (int)($cfg['rerank_end'] ?? 35)];
    $rt['seed_size']      = (int)($cfg['seed_size'] ?? 10);
    $rt['last_run_game_id'] = (string)$gameId;

    if (!is_array($rankedList) || empty($rankedList)) {
        return $rankedList;
    }

    // --- Step 3: Pairwise bonuses (if liftMap provided and enabled in cfg) ---
    if (!empty($liftMap) && !empty($cfg['pairwise_enabled'])) {
        $rt['pairwise_loaded']  = true;
        try {
            $seedSize  = max(1, (int)($cfg['seed_size'] ?? 10));
            $pairCap   = (float)($cfg['pairwise_cap'] ?? 1.0);
            $rankedList = SKAI_addPairwiseBonuses($rankedList, $liftMap, $seedSize, 10, $pairCap);
            $rt['pairwise_applied'] = true;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $rt['pairwise_applied'] = false;
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runLivePredictionPipeline pairwise error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    // --- Step 4: Calibration ---
    if (!empty($calibrationMap)) {
        $rt['calibration_loaded'] = true;
        try {
            $rankedList = SKAI_calibrateList($rankedList, $calibrationMap);
            $rankedList = SKAI_sortByCalibrated($rankedList);
            $rt['calibration_applied'] = true;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $rt['calibration_applied'] = false;
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runLivePredictionPipeline calibration error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    // Baseline snapshot before tail recovery
    $baselineRanked = $rankedList;

    // --- Step 5: Tail miss recovery (gated by [[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]]) ---
    $rt['tail_recovery_enabled'] = !empty($cfg['enabled']);
    if ($rt['tail_recovery_enabled']) {
        $promotionMetrics = [];
        try {
            $top20Before  = array_slice(array_column($rankedList, 'num'), 0, 20);
            $rankedList   = SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep($rankedList, $gameId, $calibrationMap, $liftMap);
            $top20After   = array_slice(array_column($rankedList, 'num'), 0, 20);

            $rt['tail_recovery_invoked'] = true;
            $rt['run_mode']              = '[[TAIL_RUNTIME_UPGRADED]]';

            // Count promotions into top 20
            $newInTop20 = count(array_diff($top20After, $top20Before));
            $rt['promotions_into_top20'] = $newInTop20;

            // Count candidates in rerank window
            $rerankStart = (int)($cfg['rerank_start'] ?? 15);
            $rerankEnd   = min(count($rankedList), (int)($cfg['rerank_end'] ?? 35));
            $rt['candidates_reranked'] = max(0, $rerankEnd - $rerankStart + 1);

            // Collect top promoted candidates for panel
            $promoted = [];
            foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $cand) {
                $baseRank = (int)($cand['baseline_rank'] ?? ($idx + 1));
                $finalRank = $idx + 1;
                if ($baseRank !== $finalRank && $finalRank <= 20) {
                    $promoted[] = [
                        'num'              => (int)($cand['num'] ?? 0),
                        'baseline_rank'    => $baseRank,
                        'final_rank'       => $finalRank,
                        'score_total'      => (float)($cand['score_total']      ?? 0.0),
                        'calibrated_score' => (float)($cand['calibrated_score'] ?? $cand['score_total'] ?? 0.0),
                        'tail_prior'       => (float)($cand['score_parts']['tail_prior']            ?? 0.0),
                        'pairwise_bonus'   => (float)($cand['score_parts']['pairwise_bonus']        ?? 0.0),
                        'penalty_adj'      => (float)($cand['score_parts']['tail_penalty_adjustment'] ?? 0.0),
                        'tail_score'       => (float)($cand['tail_score']       ?? 0.0),
                        'reason_codes'     => (string)($cand['tail_reason_codes'] ?? ''),
                    ];
                }
            }
            $rt['top_promoted_candidates'] = $promoted;

            // Build promotion metrics for persistence
            $promotionMetrics = [
                'promotions_into_top20'  => $newInTop20,
                'candidates_reranked'    => $rt['candidates_reranked'],
                'top20_before'           => $top20Before,
                'top20_after'            => $top20After,
                'promoted_candidates'    => $promoted,
                'run_mode'               => '[[TAIL_RUNTIME_UPGRADED]]',
            ];

            // Ensure score_total consistency: update score_total to reflect final tail_score
            // where tail_score was computed (Section B requirement).
            foreach ($rankedList as &$item) {
                if (isset($item['tail_score']) && (float)$item['tail_score'] > 0.0) {
                    // tail_score is additive on top of base; make score_total canonical final score
                    $item['score_total'] = (float)$item['tail_score'];
                    if (!isset($item['score_parts']) || !is_array($item['score_parts'])) {
                        $item['score_parts'] = [];
                    }
                    // tag that score_total now reflects post-recovery effective score
                    $item['score_parts']['tail_score'] = (float)$item['tail_score'];
                }
            }
            unset($item);

        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            $rt['tail_recovery_invoked'] = false;
            $rt['tail_recovery_error']   = $e->getMessage();
            $rt['run_mode']              = '[[TAIL_RUNTIME_BASELINE_ONLY]]';
            $rankedList                  = $baselineRanked; // safe fallback
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runLivePredictionPipeline tail recovery error: '
                . $e->getMessage() . ' [[TAIL_RUNTIME_BASELINE_ONLY]]');
        }

        // Persist promotion metrics if storage is possible
        if (!empty($promotionMetrics)) {
            try {
                $tailPriors = SKAI_getTailMissPrior($gameId);
                $summary    = SKAI_buildTailMissSummary([]);
                SKAI_storeTailMissRun(
                    $gameId, (int)($cfg['analysis_window'] ?? 100),
                    0, $summary, $tailPriors, $promotionMetrics
                );
                $rt['promotion_metrics_stored'] = true;
                $rt['summary_row_stored']        = true;
                $rt['db_persistence_status']     = 'ok';
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $rt['promotion_metrics_stored'] = false;
                $rt['db_persistence_status']    = 'error: ' . $e->getMessage();
                error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runLivePredictionPipeline promotion persist error: '
                    . $e->getMessage());
            }
        }
    } else {
        $rt['tail_recovery_invoked'] = false;
        $rt['run_mode']              = '[[TAIL_RUNTIME_BASELINE_ONLY]]';
    }

    // --- Step 6: Gibbs / set-aware stage ---
    $rt['gibbs_active'] = false;
    $__gibbsConfigOn = (function_exists('SKAI_isGibbsEnabled') && SKAI_isGibbsEnabled());
    if ($__gibbsConfigOn && function_exists('SKAI_shouldEnableGibbs')) {
        list($__gibbsReady, $__gibbsReason) = SKAI_shouldEnableGibbs($rt, $liftMap, $calibrationMap, $gameId);
        if (!$__gibbsReady) {
            error_log('[SKAI_GIBBS] disabled reason=' . $__gibbsReason);
        }
    } else {
        $__gibbsReady  = false;
        $__gibbsReason = 'config_disabled';
    }
    if ($__gibbsReady) {
        error_log('[SKAI_GIBBS] enabled game_id=' . (string)$gameId);
        $rt['gibbs_active'] = true;
        try {
            $gibbsParams = function_exists('SKAI_getGibbsParams') ? SKAI_getGibbsParams() : [];
            $domain      = (int)($gibbsParams['domain']        ?? 70);
            $setSize     = (int)($gibbsParams['set_size']       ?? 6);
            $numIter     = (int)($gibbsParams['num_iterations'] ?? 1000);
            $beta        = (float)($gibbsParams['beta']          ?? 1.0);
            $marginals   = SKAI_gibbsSampling(
                $rankedList, $liftMap, $setSize, $numIter, $beta,
                $gibbsConstraints, $domain
            );
            $rankedList  = SKAI_rerankByMarginals($rankedList, $marginals);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] runLivePredictionPipeline Gibbs error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
    }

    // --- Step 7: Re-stamp final ranks and sanity check ---
    $seen = [];
    $dup  = false;
    foreach ($rankedList as $idx => &$item) {
        $item['rank'] = $idx + 1;
        $n = (int)($item['num'] ?? 0);
        if (isset($seen[$n])) { $dup = true; }
        $seen[$n] = true;
    }
    unset($item);
    $rt['final_ranked_count']    = count($rankedList);
    $rt['unique_candidate_count'] = count($seen);
    $rt['duplicate_detected']    = $dup;

    // Score/rank consistency check: ensure descending score order (using score_total)
    $prevScore = PHP_FLOAT_MAX;
    $scoreRankOk = true;
    foreach ($rankedList as $item) {
        $s = (float)($item['score_total'] ?? 0.0);
        if ($s > $prevScore + 1e-9) { $scoreRankOk = false; break; }
        $prevScore = $s;
    }
    $rt['score_rank_consistent'] = $scoreRankOk;
    $rt['metric_compute_status'] = 'ready';

    // Priors status
    $rt['priors_loaded'] = !empty(SKAI_getTailMissPrior($gameId));

    // [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Update post-fix runtime state fields
    if (function_exists('SKAI_postPipelineStateUpdate')) {
        SKAI_postPipelineStateUpdate($rankedList, $gameId);
    }

    return $rankedList;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// D. [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Safe Schema Upgrade
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Additive schema migration.
 *
 * Adds promotion_metrics_json column to #__skai_tail_miss_runs if absent.
 * Safe to call multiple times; uses ALTER TABLE only when needed.
 * Never destroys existing data.
 *
 * @return array  ['success' => bool, 'message' => string]
 */
function SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade() {
    try {
        $db     = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $table  = $prefix . 'skai_tail_miss_runs';

        // Check if column already exists
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__skai_tail_miss_runs', false);
        if (!is_array($cols)) {
            return ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Could not read table columns'];
        }

        if (isset($cols['promotion_metrics_json'])) {
            return ['success' => true, 'message' => 'promotion_metrics_json already present'];
        }

        $sql = "ALTER TABLE `{$table}` ADD COLUMN "
             . "`promotion_metrics_json` TEXT NULL "
             . "COMMENT 'JSON: promotions into top20, promoted candidates, run mode' "
             . "AFTER `prior_model_json`";
        $db->setQuery($sql);
        $db->execute();

        return ['success' => true, 'message' => 'promotion_metrics_json column added'];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_TAIL] SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];
    }
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] Idempotent schema upgrade for #__user_saved_numbers.
 * Adds structured display/save fields required for display-save-render parity.
 * Safe to call multiple times. Never destroys existing data. PHP 8.1 / Joomla 5.1.2 compatible.
 *
 * @return array{success:bool,message:string,added:array,skipped:array}
 */
function skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols()
{
    static $__sdsDone = null;
    if ($__sdsDone !== null) { return $__sdsDone; }
    try {
        $db   = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
        if (!is_array($cols)) {
            return $__sdsDone = ['success' => false, 'message' => 'Could not read #__user_saved_numbers columns', 'added' => [], 'skipped' => []];
        }
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $table  = $prefix . 'user_saved_numbers';
        $added   = [];
        $skipped = [];

        // Column definitions: name => SQL definition (no AFTER clause for portability)
        $newCols = [
            'save_schema_version'           => "INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2 COMMENT 'Schema version marker for structured display fields'",
            'prediction_family'             => "VARCHAR(30) NULL COMMENT 'regular or daily'",
            'prediction_type'               => "VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT 'powerball euromillions pick3 pick4 pick5 etc'",
            'render_mode'                   => "VARCHAR(40) NULL COMMENT 'regular_main_extra or daily_combos'",
            'main_display_json'             => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON array of main display numbers in probability order'",
            'extra_display_json'            => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON array of extra/bonus display numbers in probability order'",
            'canonical_main_display'        => "VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT 'CSV of main display numbers canonical probability order'",
            'canonical_extra_display'       => "VARCHAR(200) NULL COMMENT 'CSV of extra display numbers canonical'",
            'prediction_extra_display_count' => "INT NULL COMMENT 'Count of extra/bonus numbers in display set'",
            'regular_main_numbers_json'     => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Regular lottery: JSON array of main numbers for display'",
            'regular_extra_numbers_json'    => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Regular lottery: JSON array of extra/bonus numbers for display'",
            'daily_pick_size'               => "TINYINT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: pick size 3 4 or 5'",
            'daily_primary_prediction'      => "VARCHAR(30) NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: primary combo display string e.g. 123'",
            'daily_primary_prediction_json' => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: JSON array of primary combo digits'",
            'daily_top_picks_json'          => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: JSON array of top-5 combo display strings'",
            'daily_top_pick_strings_json'   => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: JSON array of top-5 combo strings with bonus display'",
            'daily_bonus_digits_json'       => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: JSON array of bonus digit integers'",
            'daily_influential_digits_json' => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: JSON array of ranked/influential digit integers'",
            'daily_display_payload_json'    => "MEDIUMTEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: full canonical display payload for rendering'",
            'daily_learning_payload_json'   => "MEDIUMTEXT NULL COMMENT 'Daily lottery: structured payload for learning/tracking'",
            'display_variant'               => "VARCHAR(40) NULL COMMENT 'Renderer display variant hint'",
            'renderer_hint'                 => "VARCHAR(40) NULL COMMENT 'Renderer hint for MyLottoExpert display logic'",
            'canonical_display_string'      => "VARCHAR(500) NULL COMMENT 'Human-readable canonical display summary string'",
            'prediction_target_id'          => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Immutable canonical draw target identifier'",
            'prediction_target_key'         => "VARCHAR(255) NULL COMMENT 'Canonical draw target identity key before hashing'",
            'prediction_target_json'        => "MEDIUMTEXT NULL COMMENT 'Structured canonical draw target payload'",
            'target_game_id'                => "VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT 'Canonical game identifier bound at save time'",
            'target_lottery_id'             => "INT NULL COMMENT 'Canonical lottery row identifier bound at save time'",
            'target_draw_date'              => "DATE NULL COMMENT 'Canonical draw date bound at save time'",
            'target_draw_at'                => "DATETIME NULL COMMENT 'Canonical draw timestamp bound at save time'",
            'target_draw_session'           => "VARCHAR(40) NULL COMMENT 'Canonical draw session bound at save time'",
            'target_timezone_id'            => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Timezone used to resolve the canonical target'",
            // [[MLE_DRAW_TZ_FIX_2026]] Draw timezone traceability fields
            'target_draw_timezone'          => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Official lottery draw timezone e.g. America/New_York'",
            'target_draw_label'             => "VARCHAR(191) NULL COMMENT 'Human-readable draw label with timezone e.g. Draw: Jun 3 2026 ET'",
            'target_draw_source'            => "VARCHAR(80) NULL COMMENT 'Source path used to resolve the draw timezone'",
            'target_draw_resolution_note'   => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'Resolution trace note for official draw timezone'",
            'target_prediction_family'      => "VARCHAR(30) NULL COMMENT 'regular or daily for canonical target'",
            'target_prediction_type'        => "VARCHAR(50) NULL COMMENT 'prediction type bound into canonical target'",
            'target_pick_size'              => "TINYINT NULL COMMENT 'Pick size bound into canonical target'",
            'target_extra_count'            => "TINYINT NULL COMMENT 'Extra count bound into canonical target'",
            'run_uuid'                      => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Execution identity from SKAI snapshot/save envelope'",
            'snapshot_run_uuid'             => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Posted snapshot execution identity used during save'",
            'origin_source'                 => "VARCHAR(80) NULL COMMENT 'Source system that originated the prediction'",
            // [[CANONICAL_METHOD_IDENTITY]] Fail-safe method identity for MyLottoExpert.
            // MyLottoExpert should classify by analysis_method_key first, then legacy fields only as fallback.
            'analysis_method_key'           => "VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Canonical analysis method key: skai core_ai mcmc skip_hit frequency heatmap manual'",
            'analysis_engine_label'         => "VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Human-readable engine label, e.g. SKAI'",
            'analysis_track_label'          => "VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Human-readable MyLottoExpert learning track label'",
            'analysis_source_page'          => "VARCHAR(120) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Source page/component that created this prediction'",
            'analysis_schema_version'       => "VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1' COMMENT 'Canonical method identity schema version'",
            'source_batch_id'               => "INT NULL COMMENT 'MyLottoExpert Precision Lock batch header id'",
            'source_batch_run_id'           => "INT NULL COMMENT 'MyLottoExpert Precision Lock batch run id'",
            'source_batch_type'             => "VARCHAR(80) NULL COMMENT 'Originating batch type'",
            'source_batch_run_order'        => "TINYINT NULL COMMENT 'Run order inside the originating batch'",
            'source_batch_origin'           => "VARCHAR(80) NULL COMMENT 'Originating batch bridge identifier'",
            'batch_control_flag'            => "TINYINT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '1 when this saved prediction is the Precision Lock control run'",
            'source_batch_test_variable'    => "VARCHAR(128) NULL COMMENT 'Precision Lock setting being tested'",
            'source_batch_test_value'       => "VARCHAR(128) NULL COMMENT 'Precision Lock tested value'",
            // [[SKAI_V122_HIVE_LEARNING_CONTRACT]] Additive contract columns for every future SKAI save.
            // These are optional for old rows and never rewrite existing records.
            'hive_learning_contract_version' => "VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'Hive learning contract schema version saved by SKAI'",
            'hive_intake_mode'               => "VARCHAR(80) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'planned_hive_guided, observed_manual_skai, or observed_skai_batch'",
            'hive_queue_id'                  => "INT NULL COMMENT 'Hive research queue id when assigned before run'",
            'hive_assignment_id'             => "INT NULL COMMENT 'Hive assignment id when assigned before run'",
            'hive_research_type'             => "VARCHAR(80) NULL COMMENT 'Hive research type or observed intake type'",
            'hive_setting_key'               => "VARCHAR(128) NULL COMMENT 'Hive setting key being tested when known'",
            'hive_settings_fingerprint'      => "VARCHAR(64) NULL COMMENT 'Normalized settings fingerprint used by hive duplicate guard'",
            'hive_contract_status'           => "VARCHAR(40) NOT NULL DEFAULT '' COMMENT 'hive_ready, tracking_ready, or missing_required_fields'",
            'hive_contract_json'             => "MEDIUMTEXT NULL COMMENT 'Canonical SKAI hive learning contract payload'",
            'hive_contract_missing_json'     => "TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON array of missing contract fields at save time'",
        ];

        foreach ($newCols as $colName => $colDef) {
            if (isset($cols[$colName])) {
                $skipped[] = $colName;
                continue;
            }
            try {
                $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$table}` ADD COLUMN `{$colName}` {$colDef}");
                $db->execute();
                $added[] = $colName;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                error_log('[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC] skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols: failed to add ' . $colName . ': ' . $e->getMessage());
            }
        }
        $msg = 'skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols complete: added=[' . implode(',', $added) . '] skipped=' . count($skipped);
        error_log('[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC] ' . $msg);
        return $__sdsDone = ['success' => true, 'message' => $msg, 'added' => $added, 'skipped' => $skipped];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC] skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return $__sdsDone = ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage(), 'added' => [], 'skipped' => []];
    }
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Idempotent migration: ensure game_id VARCHAR(50) in #__skai_shared_learning.
 *
 * Canonical shared-learning identity is the string game_id (e.g. "101", "AZ2"), not the
 * integer lottery_id row-PK.  This migration handles three possible prior states:
 *   1. Column is already `game_id VARCHAR(50)` -- no-op.
 *   2. Column is `game_id INT` (original state before any migration) -- change type to VARCHAR(50).
 *   3. Column was renamed to `lottery_id INT` by a previous migration -- rename + retype to game_id VARCHAR(50).
 *   4. Table does not yet exist -- no-op (CREATE TABLE handles it).
 *
 * Safe to call multiple times.  Uses CHANGE COLUMN (MySQL 5.5+ / MariaDB 5.1+).
 *
 * @return array{success:bool,message:string}
 */
function SKAI_runSharedLearningLotteryIdMigration(): array
{
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Static cache so repeated calls within one request are free.
    static $__migDone = null;
    if ($__migDone !== null) { return $__migDone; }
    try {
        $db    = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $cols  = $db->getTableColumns('#__skai_shared_learning', false);
        if (!is_array($cols)) {
            // Table does not yet exist -- CREATE TABLE will handle it.
            return $__migDone = ['success' => true, 'message' => 'skai_shared_learning table not yet present; skipping'];
        }
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $table  = $prefix . 'skai_shared_learning';
        $colMsg = '';

        if (isset($cols['game_id'])) {
            $colType = strtolower((string)($cols['game_id']->Type ?? $cols['game_id'] ?? ''));
            if (strpos($colType, 'varchar') !== false) {
                $colMsg = 'game_id VARCHAR column already present';
            } else {
                // game_id exists but is INT -- change type to VARCHAR(50).
                $db->setQuery(
                    "ALTER TABLE `{$table}` CHANGE COLUMN `game_id` `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''"
                );
                $db->execute();
                error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skai_shared_learning: game_id INT changed to VARCHAR(50)');
                $colMsg = 'game_id INT changed to VARCHAR(50)';
            }
        } elseif (isset($cols['lottery_id'])) {
            // Column was renamed to lottery_id INT by a previous migration -- restore + retype.
            $db->setQuery(
                "ALTER TABLE `{$table}` CHANGE COLUMN `lottery_id` `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''"
            );
            $db->execute();
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skai_shared_learning: lottery_id renamed back to game_id VARCHAR(50)');
            $colMsg = 'lottery_id renamed to game_id VARCHAR(50)';
        } else {
            return $__migDone = ['success' => true, 'message' => 'game_id column not found; table may still be empty'];
        }

        // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Repair rows where INT coercion stored game_id='0':
        // recover the real canonical string game_id from metric_json.
        // Idempotent -- no-op when no game_id='0' rows exist.
        $__repQ = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select([$db->quoteName('id'), $db->quoteName('metric_json')])
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . " = '0'");
        $db->setQuery($__repQ);
        $__corruptRows = $db->loadAssocList() ?: [];
        $__repaired = 0;
        foreach ($__corruptRows as $__crow) {
            $__mj = @json_decode((string)$__crow['metric_json'], true);
            if (!is_array($__mj)) { continue; }
            $__realGid = trim((string)($__mj['game_id'] ?? ''));
            if ($__realGid === '' || $__realGid === '0') { continue; }
            try {
                $__fixQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->update($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                    ->set($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__realGid))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__crow['id']);
                $db->setQuery($__fixQ);
                $db->execute();
                $__repaired++;
            } catch (\Throwable $__fixEx) {
                // Duplicate key: a row with the correct game_id already exists -- remove the stale '0' row.
                try {
                    $__delQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->delete($db->quoteName('#__skai_shared_learning'))
                        ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$__crow['id']);
                    $db->setQuery($__delQ);
                    $db->execute();
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skai_shared_learning: removed stale game_id=0 row id=' . (int)$__crow['id'] . ' (real game_id=' . $__realGid . ' already present)');
                } catch (\Throwable $__delEx) {
                    error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skai_shared_learning: could not repair game_id=0 row id=' . (int)$__crow['id'] . ': ' . $__delEx->getMessage());
                }
            }
        }
        if ($__repaired > 0) {
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skai_shared_learning: repaired ' . $__repaired . ' corrupt game_id=0 rows from metric_json');
        }

        return $__migDone = ['success' => true, 'message' => $colMsg . ($__repaired > 0 ? '; repaired ' . $__repaired . ' corrupt rows' : '')];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] SKAI_runSharedLearningLotteryIdMigration error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return $__migDone = ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];
    }
}

/**
 * Idempotent migration: ensure game_id is VARCHAR(50) (not INT) in the eight
 * engine-learning tables that were originally created with INT game_id.
 *
 * Affected tables:
 *   skai_lottery_settings, skai_user_preferences, skai_run_log,
 *   skai_backtest_summary, skai_calibration_bins, skai_tail_recovery_summary,
 *   skai_parameter_sets, skai_runtime_audit
 *
 * Safe to call multiple times (static cache prevents double-execution).
 *
 * @return array{success:bool,message:string}
 */
function SKAI_runEngineTablesGameIdMigration(): array
{
    static $__migDone = null;
    if ($__migDone !== null) { return $__migDone; }
    try {
        $db     = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $prefix = $db->getPrefix();
        $tables = [
            'skai_lottery_settings',
            'skai_user_preferences',
            'skai_run_log',
            'skai_backtest_summary',
            'skai_calibration_bins',
            'skai_tail_recovery_summary',
            'skai_parameter_sets',
            'skai_runtime_audit',
        ];
        $altered = [];
        foreach ($tables as $tbl) {
            $fullTable = $prefix . $tbl;
            try {
                $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__' . $tbl, false);
            } catch (\Throwable $__) {
                $cols = null; // table does not exist yet -- CREATE TABLE will handle it
            }
            if (!is_array($cols) || !isset($cols['game_id'])) {
                continue; // table absent or column missing; skip
            }
            $colType = strtolower((string)($cols['game_id']->Type ?? $cols['game_id'] ?? ''));
            if (strpos($colType, 'varchar') !== false) {
                continue; // already VARCHAR -- nothing to do
            }
            // Column exists but is INT -- change to VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''.
            $db->setQuery("ALTER TABLE `{$fullTable}` MODIFY COLUMN `game_id` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''");
            $db->execute();
            error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] ' . $tbl . ': game_id INT changed to VARCHAR(50)');
            $altered[] = $tbl;
        }
        $msg = empty($altered)
            ? 'engine tables game_id already VARCHAR or tables absent'
            : 'altered: ' . implode(', ', $altered);
        return $__migDone = ['success' => true, 'message' => $msg];
    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        error_log('[SKAI_PHASE_C] SKAI_runEngineTablesGameIdMigration error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return $__migDone = ['success' => false, 'message' => $e->getMessage()];
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// F. [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Runtime Verification Panel
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Return structured runtime verification data.
 *
 * Reports subsystem status, key metrics, recent promotion decisions,
 * and config flags in effect. Safe to call at any time after pipeline runs.
 *
 * Gated by [[SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING]] for verbose sections but always
 * returns basic verification data.
 *
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier (used for A/B summary lookup)
 * @return array          Verification panel data
 */
function SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel($gameId = '') {
    $rt  = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();

    // --- Integrity checks ---
    $integrityResults = SKAI_runRuntimeIntegrityChecks($gameId);

    // --- Recent A/B summary ---
    $abSummary = null;
    if (!empty($gameId)) {
        try {
            $abSummary = $rt['recent_ab_summary'] ?? null;
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { $abSummary = null; }
    }

    // --- Score/rank consistency ---
    $scoreRankStatus = ($rt['score_rank_consistent'] ?? true) ? 'ok' : 'mismatch_detected';

    $panel = [
        // --- Subsystem status ---
        'subsystems' => [
            'tail_miss_recovery_enabled'   => (bool)($rt['tail_recovery_enabled']  ?? false),
            'tail_miss_recovery_invoked'   => (bool)($rt['tail_recovery_invoked']   ?? false),
            'tail_miss_recovery_error'     => $rt['tail_recovery_error'] ?? null,
            'live_tuning_enabled'          => (bool)($rt['live_tuning_enabled']     ?? false),
            'live_tuning_used'             => (bool)($rt['live_tuning_used']         ?? false),
            'live_tuning_error'            => $rt['live_tuning_error'] ?? null,
            'calibration_loaded'           => (bool)($rt['calibration_loaded']      ?? false),
            'calibration_applied'          => (bool)($rt['calibration_applied']     ?? false),
            'pairwise_loaded'              => (bool)($rt['pairwise_loaded']          ?? false),
            'pairwise_applied'             => (bool)($rt['pairwise_applied']         ?? false),
            'gibbs_active'                 => (bool)($rt['gibbs_active']             ?? false),
            'priors_loaded'                => (bool)($rt['priors_loaded']            ?? false),
            'promotion_metrics_stored'     => (bool)($rt['promotion_metrics_stored'] ?? false),
            'summary_row_stored'           => (bool)($rt['summary_row_stored']       ?? false),
        ],
        // --- Rerank params ---
        'rerank_window'                    => $rt['rerank_window']            ?? [15, 35],
        'seed_size'                        => (int)($rt['seed_size']          ?? 10),
        'candidates_reranked'              => (int)($rt['candidates_reranked'] ?? 0),
        'promotions_into_top20'            => (int)($rt['promotions_into_top20'] ?? 0),
        // --- Run mode ---
        'run_mode'                         => $rt['run_mode'] ?? '[[TAIL_RUNTIME_BASELINE_ONLY]]',
        // --- Sanity checks ---
        'sanity' => [
            'final_ranking_count'          => (int)($rt['final_ranked_count']    ?? 0),
            'unique_candidate_count'       => (int)($rt['unique_candidate_count'] ?? 0),
            'duplicate_detection_status'   => ($rt['duplicate_detected'] ?? false) ? 'duplicates_found' : 'ok',
            'score_rank_consistency'       => $scoreRankStatus,
            'metric_compute_status'        => $rt['metric_compute_status']  ?? 'not_run',
            'db_persistence_status'        => $rt['db_persistence_status']  ?? 'not_run',
        ],
        // --- Config flags ---
        'config_flags'                     => array_merge(
            (array)($rt['config_flags'] ?? []),
            [
                'SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY' => empty($cfg['enabled'])          ? 0 : 1,
                'SKAI_TAIL_ANALYSIS_WINDOW'      => (int)($cfg['analysis_window']   ?? 100),
                'SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START'         => (int)($cfg['rerank_start']      ?? 15),
                'SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END'           => (int)($cfg['rerank_end']        ?? 35),
                'SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE'            => (int)($cfg['seed_size']         ?? 10),
                'SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_ENABLED'     => empty($cfg['pairwise_enabled']) ? 0 : 1,
                'SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP'         => (float)($cfg['pairwise_cap']    ?? 1.0),
                'SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP'            => (float)($cfg['prior_cap']       ?? 0.5),
                'SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION'   => (float)($cfg['penalty_relaxation'] ?? 0.5),
                'SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING'           => empty($cfg['use_live_tuning'])  ? 0 : 1,
                'SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING'        => empty($cfg['debug_logging'])    ? 0 : 1,
            ]
        ),
        // --- Integrity ---
        'integrity'                        => $integrityResults,
        // --- A/B summary ---
        'recent_ab_summary'                => $abSummary,
        // --- Top promoted candidates (verbose; gated by debug_logging) ---
        'top_promoted_candidates'          => !empty($cfg['debug_logging'])
            ? ($rt['top_promoted_candidates'] ?? [])
            : [],
        'game_id'                          => (string)($rt['last_run_game_id'] ?? $gameId),
    ];

    return $panel;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Render the verification panel as operator-friendly text.
 *
 * Suitable for Joomla admin view, debug output, or existing report section.
 * Returns a plain-text/HTML-safe string.
 *
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier
 * @return string         Rendered panel
 */
function SKAI_renderRuntimeVerificationPanel($gameId = '') {
    $panel = SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel($gameId);
    $lines = [];
    $lines[] = '=== [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Panel ===';
    $lines[] = 'Game: ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($panel['game_id'] ?? $gameId), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $lines[] = 'Run mode: ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($panel['run_mode'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $lines[] = '';
    $lines[] = '--- Subsystems ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['subsystems'] ?? []) as $k => $v) {
        $val = is_bool($v) ? ($v ? 'YES' : 'NO') : (is_null($v) ? 'n/a' : (string)$v);
        $lines[] = '  ' . str_pad($k, 36) . ': ' . $val;
    }
    $lines[] = '';
    $lines[] = '--- Rerank / Seed ---';
    $rw = $panel['rerank_window'] ?? [15, 35];
    $lines[] = '  rerank_window           : ' . $rw[0] . '-' . $rw[1];
    $lines[] = '  seed_size               : ' . (int)($panel['seed_size'] ?? 10);
    $lines[] = '  candidates_reranked     : ' . (int)($panel['candidates_reranked'] ?? 0);
    $lines[] = '  promotions_into_top20   : ' . (int)($panel['promotions_into_top20'] ?? 0);
    $lines[] = '';
    $lines[] = '--- Sanity Checks ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['sanity'] ?? []) as $k => $v) {
        $lines[] = '  ' . str_pad($k, 36) . ': ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$v, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    }
    $lines[] = '';
    $lines[] = '--- Config Flags ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['config_flags'] ?? []) as $k => $v) {
        $lines[] = '  ' . str_pad($k, 36) . ': ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$v, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    }
    $lines[] = '';
    $lines[] = '--- Integrity Checks ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['integrity'] ?? []) as $check) {
        $status = $check['pass'] ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';
        $lines[] = '  [' . $status . '] ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($check['name'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')
            . ': ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($check['detail'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    }

    $promoted = $panel['top_promoted_candidates'] ?? [];
    if (!empty($promoted)) {
        $lines[] = '';
        $lines[] = '--- Top Promoted Candidates ---';
        foreach ($promoted as $p) {
            $lines[] = '  num=' . (int)($p['num'] ?? 0)
                . ' base_rank=' . (int)($p['baseline_rank'] ?? 0)
                . ' final_rank=' . (int)($p['final_rank'] ?? 0)
                . ' score=' . number_format((float)($p['score_total'] ?? 0.0), 6)
                . ' cal=' . number_format((float)($p['calibrated_score'] ?? 0.0), 6)
                . ' prior=' . number_format((float)($p['tail_prior'] ?? 0.0), 4)
                . ' pairwise=' . number_format((float)($p['pairwise_bonus'] ?? 0.0), 4)
                . ' pen_adj=' . number_format((float)($p['penalty_adj'] ?? 0.0), 4)
                . ' tail=' . number_format((float)($p['tail_score'] ?? 0.0), 6)
                . ' reasons=' . htmlspecialchars((string)($p['reason_codes'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }
    }

    $lines[] = '=== END [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] ===';
    return implode("\n", $lines);
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// G. [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Integrity Checks
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Run all integrity checks and return results.
 *
 * Each result: ['name' => string, 'pass' => bool, 'detail' => string]
 *
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier (for DB checks)
 * @return array          Array of check results
 */
function SKAI_runRuntimeIntegrityChecks($gameId = '') {
    $checks = [];

    $checks = array_merge($checks, SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryWiring());
    $checks = array_merge($checks, SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness());
    $checks = array_merge($checks, SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness($gameId));

    // Config bounds
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
    $rerankStart = (int)($cfg['rerank_start'] ?? 15);
    $rerankEnd   = (int)($cfg['rerank_end']   ?? 35);
    $seedSize    = (int)($cfg['seed_size']    ?? 10);
    $analysisWin = (int)($cfg['analysis_window'] ?? 100);

    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'rerank_window_sane',
        'pass'   => ($rerankStart >= 1 && $rerankEnd >= $rerankStart && $rerankEnd <= 100),
        'detail' => "start=$rerankStart end=$rerankEnd",
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'seed_size_bounded',
        'pass'   => ($seedSize >= 1 && $seedSize < $rerankStart),
        'detail' => "seed_size=$seedSize rerank_start=$rerankStart",
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'analysis_window_sane',
        'pass'   => ($analysisWin >= 10 && $analysisWin <= 1000),
        'detail' => "analysis_window=$analysisWin",
    ];

    // Runtime state checks
    $rt = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'no_duplicate_candidates',
        'pass'   => !($rt['duplicate_detected'] ?? false),
        'detail' => ($rt['duplicate_detected'] ?? false) ? 'duplicates found' : 'ok',
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'score_rank_consistent',
        'pass'   => (bool)($rt['score_rank_consistent'] ?? true),
        'detail' => ($rt['score_rank_consistent'] ?? true) ? 'ok' : 'score/rank order mismatch',
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'run_mode_set',
        'pass'   => !empty($rt['run_mode']),
        'detail' => (string)($rt['run_mode'] ?? 'not_set'),
    ];

    return $checks;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Verify tail recovery wiring.
 *
 * @return array  Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryWiring() {
    $checks = [];

    // SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep callable
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'tail_pipeline_step_callable',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep')
            ? 'SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep not found',
    ];

    // Live pipeline entry point callable
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'live_pipeline_callable',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline')
            ? 'SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline not found',
    ];

    // Tuning dispatcher callable
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'tuning_dispatcher_callable',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher')
            ? 'SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher not found',
    ];

    // applyTailMissRecovery callable
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'apply_tail_recovery_callable',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery')
            ? 'SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery not found',
    ];

    // Config enabled check
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'tail_recovery_config_loaded',
        'pass'   => is_array($cfg) && isset($cfg['enabled']),
        'detail' => is_array($cfg) ? 'config loaded; enabled=' . ($cfg['enabled'] ? '1' : '0') : 'config load failed',
    ];

    // Runtime invocation check
    $rt = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => 'tail_recovery_invocation_tracked',
        'pass'   => isset($rt['tail_recovery_invoked']),
        'detail' => isset($rt['tail_recovery_invoked'])
            ? ('invoked=' . ($rt['tail_recovery_invoked'] ? 'yes' : 'no'))
            : 'runtime state not initialized',
    ];

    return $checks;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Verify all required metrics can be computed.
 *
 * @return array  Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness() {
    $checks  = [];
    $required = [
        'SKAI_calculateBacktestMetrics'  => 'recall_at_20 + mean_winner_rank + ndcg_at_20',
        'SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics' => 'tail_recall_11_30 + near_miss_promotion_rate + tail_miss_reduction_rate + mean_near_miss_rank + tail_gain_score',
        'SKAI_calculateNDCG'             => 'ndcg_at_20',
        'SKAI_getTop20ScoreParts'        => 'score_parts for top 20',
        'SKAI_calculateMedianScoreParts' => 'top20 median for deficit baseline',
        'SKAI_computeTailMissDeficits'   => 'per-component deficits',
        'SKAI_buildTailMissPriors'       => 'prior model',
        'SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults'  => 'aggregate metrics for A/B',
    ];

    foreach ($required as $fn => $desc) {
        $checks[] = [
            'name'   => 'metric_fn_' . strtolower(str_replace('SKAI_', '', $fn)),
            'pass'   => function_exists($fn),
            'detail' => function_exists($fn) ? $desc : "MISSING: $fn - $desc",
        ];
    }

    // Check SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics returns expected keys
    $tailFn = 'SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics';
    if (function_exists($tailFn)) {
        $testResult = $tailFn([], [], []);
        $requiredKeys = [
            'tail_recall_11_30', 'near_miss_promotion_rate',
            'tail_miss_reduction_rate', 'mean_near_miss_rank', 'tail_gain_score',
        ];
        $missing = array_diff($requiredKeys, array_keys((array)$testResult));
        $checks[] = [
            'name'   => 'tail_focused_metrics_keys',
            'pass'   => empty($missing),
            'detail' => empty($missing) ? 'all keys present' : 'missing: ' . implode(', ', $missing),
        ];
    }

    return $checks;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] Verify summary storage completeness.
 *
 * Checks schema has all columns expected by the report reader.
 *
 * @param string $gameId  Game identifier (unused; for future per-game checks)
 * @return array          Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness($gameId = '') {
    $checks = [];

    // Required columns in #__skai_tail_miss_runs (as read by SKAI_getTailMissRecoveryReport)
    $requiredCols = [
        'id', 'game_id', 'run_at', 'analysis_window', 'draws_analyzed',
        'bucket_top20', 'bucket_near_miss_21_30', 'bucket_weak_miss_31_50',
        'bucket_hard_miss_51plus', 'deficit_aggregates_json', 'prior_model_json',
        'promotion_metrics_json', 'created_at',
    ];

    try {
        $db   = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDbo();
        $cols = $db->getTableColumns('#__skai_tail_miss_runs', false);
        if (!is_array($cols)) {
            $checks[] = [
                'name'   => 'tail_runs_table_exists',
                'pass'   => false,
                'detail' => 'Could not read table columns (table may not exist)',
            ];
            return $checks;
        }

        $checks[] = [
            'name'   => 'tail_runs_table_exists',
            'pass'   => true,
            'detail' => 'Table #__skai_tail_miss_runs accessible',
        ];

        $missingCols = [];
        foreach ($requiredCols as $col) {
            if (!isset($cols[$col])) { $missingCols[] = $col; }
        }
        $checks[] = [
            'name'   => 'tail_runs_schema_complete',
            'pass'   => empty($missingCols),
            'detail' => empty($missingCols)
                ? 'all required columns present'
                : 'missing columns: ' . implode(', ', $missingCols),
        ];

        // Verify SKAI_storeTailMissRun writes promotion_metrics_json
        // (check by reflection on function signature - can't call live; use static analysis)
        $fnExists = function_exists('SKAI_storeTailMissRun');
        $checks[] = [
            'name'   => 'store_fn_exists',
            'pass'   => $fnExists,
            'detail' => $fnExists ? 'SKAI_storeTailMissRun defined' : 'MISSING: SKAI_storeTailMissRun',
        ];

    } catch (\Throwable $e) {
        $checks[] = [
            'name'   => 'tail_runs_schema_check',
            'pass'   => false,
            'detail' => 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage(),
        ];
    }

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] - AUTO-UPGRADE TRIGGER
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public ?upgrade_skai_schema=1 trigger has been removed for security.
// Use SKAI_runAdminMigration() via the Joomla admin endpoint instead.

// === END [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] ADDITIONS ===

// ========================================================================
// [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] - POST-IMPLEMENTATION VERIFICATION PASS
// ========================================================================
// Added per strict post-fix requirements. All checks are runtime-verifiable,
// structured, non-fatal, and included in the verification panel.
// ========================================================================

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Master post-fix check entry point
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Master post-fix verification entry point.
 *
 * Runs all sub-checks and returns a unified structured result.
 * Safe to call at any time; no fatal errors; no side effects.
 *
 * @param string $gameId       Game identifier
 * @param array  $rankedList   Final ranked list from current run (may be empty)
 * @return array               Unified check report
 */
function SKAI_runPostFixVerificationChecks($gameId = '', $rankedList = []) {
    $report = [
        'label'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]]',
        'game_id' => (string)$gameId,
        'checks'  => [],
        'summary' => ['total' => 0, 'passed' => 0, 'failed' => 0],
    ];

    $allChecks = [];
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyLivePipelineWiring());
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyLiveTuningDispatcherUsage());
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyScoreRankConsistency($rankedList));
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryUsage());
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyABComparisonIntegrity());
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness());
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness($gameId));
    $allChecks = array_merge($allChecks, SKAI_verifyPopCashPopHandling());

    $report['checks'] = $allChecks;
    $report['summary']['total']  = count($allChecks);
    $report['summary']['passed'] = count(array_filter($allChecks, function($c) { return !empty($c['pass']); }));
    $report['summary']['failed'] = $report['summary']['total'] - $report['summary']['passed'];

    // Log compact summary
    error_log('[SKAI_POST_FIX] Verification: total='  . $report['summary']['total']
        . ' passed=' . $report['summary']['passed']
        . ' failed=' . $report['summary']['failed']
        . ' game='   . $gameId);

    // Persist into runtime state for panel
    if (isset($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'])) {
        $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['post_fix_verification'] = $report;
    }

    return $report;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Live pipeline wiring verification
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Verify the live prediction pipeline is
 * correctly wired, not just that helper functions exist.
 *
 * Checks:
 *  - SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline is defined
 *  - SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep is called from it (runtime proof via invoked flag)
 *  - The pipeline consumed the ranked list (not returned it unchanged naively)
 *  - SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery is reachable
 *  - Final output path (rank re-stamp) is applied
 *
 * @return array  Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyLivePipelineWiring() {
    $checks = [];
    $rt     = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];

    // Static: functions defined
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] live_pipeline_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline'),
