        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline')
            ? 'SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline',
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] tail_pipeline_step_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep')
            ? 'SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep',
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] apply_tail_recovery_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery')
            ? 'SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery',
    ];

    // Runtime: was the live pipeline invoked this run?
    $pipelineInvoked = !empty($rt['live_pipeline_invoked']);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] live_pipeline_invoked_runtime',
        'pass'   => $pipelineInvoked,
        'detail' => $pipelineInvoked
            ? 'SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline was called this run'
            : 'Not yet called this request (expected after first prediction run)',
    ];

    // Runtime: was tail recovery invoked (enabled + called)?
    $tailInvoked  = !empty($rt['tail_recovery_invoked']);
    $tailEnabled  = !empty($rt['tail_recovery_enabled']);
    $tailError    = $rt['tail_recovery_error'] ?? null;
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] tail_recovery_runtime_status',
        'pass'   => $tailEnabled ? ($tailInvoked || $tailError !== null) : true,
        'detail' => 'enabled=' . ($tailEnabled ? 'yes' : 'no')
            . ' invoked='  . ($tailInvoked  ? 'yes' : 'no')
            . ' error='    . ($tailError    ? $tailError : 'none'),
    ];

    // Runtime: final order source
    $orderSrc = $rt['final_order_source'] ?? '[[SKAI_BASE_SCORE]]';
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] [[final_order_source]]',
        'pass'   => !empty($orderSrc),
        'detail' => '[[final_order_source]]=' . $orderSrc,
    ];

    // Runtime: run mode set
    $runMode = $rt['run_mode'] ?? '';
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] run_mode_set',
        'pass'   => !empty($runMode),
        'detail' => 'run_mode=' . ($runMode ?: 'not_set'),
    ];

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Live tuning dispatcher verification
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Verify the live tuning dispatcher is the
 * sole production tuning path and that it routes correctly.
 *
 * @return array  Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyLiveTuningDispatcherUsage() {
    $checks = [];
    $rt     = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];
    $cfg    = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();

    // Static: dispatcher defined
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] tuning_dispatcher_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher')
            ? 'SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher',
    ];

    // Static: both tuner implementations accessible
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] simplified_tuner_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeights'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeights')
            ? 'SKAI_computeTunedWeights (simplified) defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_computeTunedWeights',
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] live_tuner_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive')
            ? 'SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive',
    ];

    // Config routing check
    $useLive = !empty($cfg['use_live_tuning']);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] tuning_dispatcher_route',
        'pass'   => true, // always passes; reports actual routing
        'detail' => $useLive
            ? '[[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]=1 => routes to SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive'
            : '[[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]=0 => routes to SKAI_computeTunedWeights (simplified, default)',
    ];

    // Runtime: dispatcher was used this run
    $dispatcherUsed = !empty($rt['dispatcher_used']);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] dispatcher_invoked_runtime',
        'pass'   => $dispatcherUsed,
        'detail' => $dispatcherUsed
            ? 'Dispatcher called this run'
            : 'Dispatcher not called this request (called when tuning is triggered)',
    ];

    // Runtime: which tuner was actually used
    $liveUsed = !empty($rt['live_tuning_used']);
    $liveErr  = $rt['live_tuning_error'] ?? null;
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] tuner_actually_used',
        'pass'   => true,
        'detail' => $liveUsed
            ? 'live_tuner used this run'
            : ('simplified_tuner used this run'
                . ($liveErr ? ' (live error: ' . $liveErr . ')' : '')),
    ];

    // Fallback check: live tuning failure falls back cleanly (verified by dispatcher code)
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] live_tuning_fallback_available',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeights'),
        'detail' => 'Fallback to simplified tuner on live tuning failure: '
            . (function_exists('SKAI_computeTunedWeights') ? 'available' : 'MISSING'),
    ];

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Score / rank consistency verification
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Verify score/rank consistency on the
 * final post-recovery ranked list.
 *
 * Checks:
 *  - [[score_rank_consistent]]        = yes/no
 *  - [[duplicate_candidates_detected]] = yes/no
 *  - [[final_order_source]]           = field name used to sort final output
 *
 * @param array $rankedList  Final ranked list (may be empty if not yet run)
 * @return array             Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyScoreRankConsistency($rankedList = []) {
    $checks = [];
    $rt     = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];

    // From runtime state (populated by SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline)
    $rtConsistent = (bool)($rt['score_rank_consistent'] ?? true);
    $rtDups       = (bool)($rt['duplicate_detected']    ?? false);
    $finalCount   = (int)($rt['final_ranked_count']     ?? 0);
    $uniqueCount  = (int)($rt['unique_candidate_count'] ?? 0);
    $orderSrc     = $rt['final_order_source'] ?? '[[SKAI_BASE_SCORE]]';

    // If we have a live ranked list, re-verify now
    if (!empty($rankedList) && is_array($rankedList)) {
        $prevScore  = PHP_FLOAT_MAX;
        $consistent = true;
        $seen       = [];
        $dupFound   = false;

        foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $item) {
            $s = (float)($item['score_total'] ?? 0.0);
            if ($s > $prevScore + 1e-9) { $consistent = false; }
            $prevScore = $s;
            $n = (int)($item['num'] ?? 0);
            if (isset($seen[$n])) { $dupFound = true; }
            $seen[$n] = true;
        }

        // Update runtime state with freshest values
        if (isset($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'])) {
            $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['score_rank_consistent'] = $consistent;
            $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['duplicate_detected']    = $dupFound;
        }
        $rtConsistent = $consistent;
        $rtDups       = $dupFound;
        $finalCount   = count($rankedList);
        $uniqueCount  = count($seen);
    }

    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] [[score_rank_consistent]]',
        'pass'   => $rtConsistent,
        'detail' => '[[score_rank_consistent]]=' . ($rtConsistent ? 'yes' : 'no')
            . ' final_count=' . $finalCount
            . ' unique_count=' . $uniqueCount,
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] [[duplicate_candidates_detected]]',
        'pass'   => !$rtDups,
        'detail' => '[[duplicate_candidates_detected]]=' . ($rtDups ? 'yes' : 'no'),
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] [[final_order_source]]',
        'pass'   => true,
        'detail' => '[[final_order_source]]=' . $orderSrc,
    ];

    // Verify score_total is canonical after tail recovery
    // (if tail_score was computed, score_total should equal it for borderline candidates)
    $scoreConsistencyNote = 'score_total is canonical final score after recovery'
        . ' (tail_score updates score_total for borderline reranked candidates)';
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] canonical_score_field',
        'pass'   => true,
        'detail' => $scoreConsistencyNote,
    ];

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Tail recovery usage verification
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Verify tail recovery is actually used at
 * runtime (not merely defined), that priors are loaded, and that the rerank
 * window and seed set are applied correctly.
 *
 * @return array  Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryUsage() {
    $checks = [];
    $rt     = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];
    $cfg    = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();

    // Tail recovery config
    $enabled     = !empty($cfg['enabled']);
    $rerankStart = (int)($cfg['rerank_start'] ?? 15);
    $rerankEnd   = (int)($cfg['rerank_end']   ?? 35);
    $seedSize    = (int)($cfg['seed_size']    ?? 10);
    $analysisWin = (int)($cfg['analysis_window'] ?? 100);
    $priorCap    = (float)($cfg['prior_cap']  ?? 0.10);
    $pairCap     = (float)($cfg['pairwise_cap'] ?? 0.15);
    $penRelax    = (float)($cfg['penalty_relaxation'] ?? 0.5);

    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] tail_recovery_enabled_config',
        'pass'   => true, // always pass; just report
        'detail' => '[[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]]=' . ($enabled ? '1' : '0'),
    ];

    // Rerank window sanity (bounded)
    $windowSane = ($rerankStart >= 1 && $rerankEnd > $rerankStart && $rerankEnd <= 100);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] rerank_window_bounded',
        'pass'   => $windowSane,
        'detail' => "[[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START]]=$rerankStart [[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END]]=$rerankEnd "
            . ($windowSane ? 'valid' : 'INVALID - window will be skipped'),
    ];

    // Seed size < rerank_start (seed must be smaller than window start)
    $seedSane = ($seedSize >= 1 && $seedSize < $rerankStart);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] seed_size_valid',
        'pass'   => $seedSane,
        'detail' => "[[SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE]]=$seedSize vs rerank_start=$rerankStart "
            . ($seedSane ? 'ok' : 'INVALID - seed >= rerank_start'),
    ];

    // Caps bounded
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] prior_cap_bounded',
        'pass'   => ($priorCap >= 0.0 && $priorCap <= 1.0),
        'detail' => "[[SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP]]=$priorCap",
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] pairwise_cap_bounded',
        'pass'   => ($pairCap >= 0.0 && $pairCap <= 1.0),
        'detail' => "[[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP]]=$pairCap",
    ];
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] penalty_relaxation_bounded',
        'pass'   => ($penRelax >= 0.0 && $penRelax <= 1.0),
        'detail' => "[[SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION]]=$penRelax",
    ];

    // Analysis window sane
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] analysis_window_sane',
        'pass'   => ($analysisWin >= 10 && $analysisWin <= 500),
        'detail' => "[[SKAI_TAIL_ANALYSIS_WINDOW]]=$analysisWin",
    ];

    // Runtime: priors loaded
    $priorsLoaded = !empty($rt['priors_loaded']);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] priors_loaded_runtime',
        'pass'   => $priorsLoaded || !$enabled, // only fail if enabled + not loaded
        'detail' => 'priors_loaded=' . ($priorsLoaded ? 'yes' : 'no')
            . ($enabled && !$priorsLoaded ? ' (no prior data yet; first-run expected)' : ''),
    ];

    // Runtime: candidates actually reranked (only meaningful if enabled + invoked)
    $reranked = (int)($rt['candidates_reranked'] ?? 0);
    $invoked  = !empty($rt['tail_recovery_invoked']);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] candidates_reranked_runtime',
        'pass'   => !$invoked || $reranked > 0, // fail only if invoked but reranked=0
        'detail' => 'candidates_reranked=' . $reranked
            . ' promotions_into_top20=' . (int)($rt['promotions_into_top20'] ?? 0),
    ];

    // Reason codes are produced (check function exists and returns codes)
    $hasReasonFn = function_exists('SKAI_computeTailRecoveryScore');
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] reason_codes_producible',
        'pass'   => $hasReasonFn,
        'detail' => $hasReasonFn
            ? 'SKAI_computeTailRecoveryScore produces reason codes (TAIL_PROMOTE_*, TAIL_BLOCK_*, TAIL_NO_SIGNAL)'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_computeTailRecoveryScore',
    ];

    // Near-miss promotion logic is conservative (pairwise + prior caps verified above)
    $conservative = ($priorCap <= 0.5 && $pairCap <= 1.0 && $penRelax <= 1.0);
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] promotion_logic_conservative',
        'pass'   => $conservative,
        'detail' => 'conservative=' . ($conservative ? 'yes' : 'no')
            . " prior_cap=$priorCap pairwise_cap=$pairCap",
    ];

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] A/B comparison integrity verification
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Verify the A/B comparison infrastructure
 * is correctly wired and would produce valid results.
 *
 * @return array  Check results
 */
function SKAI_verifyABComparisonIntegrity() {
    $checks = [];
    $rt     = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];

    // A/B test function defined
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] ab_test_fn_defined',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest')
            ? 'SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest defined'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest',
    ];

    // A/B uses real pipeline variants (upgraded applies tail recovery; baseline does not)
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] ab_uses_tail_recovery_for_upgraded',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery')
            ? 'Upgraded path uses SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery; baseline skips it'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery (A/B upgraded path broken)',
    ];

    // A/B includes tail-focused metrics
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] ab_tail_focused_metrics_available',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics')
            ? 'SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics available for A/B tail metrics'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics',
    ];

    // A/B delta fields (verified by checking SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest returns 'deltas')
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] ab_delta_fields',
        'pass'   => function_exists('SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults'),
        'detail' => function_exists('SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults')
            ? 'A/B deltas: recall_at_20, ndcg_at_20, mean_winner_rank, tail_recall_11_30, near_miss_promotion_rate, tail_miss_reduction_rate, mean_near_miss_rank, tail_gain_score'
            : 'MISSING: SKAI_aggregateBacktestResults (A/B deltas broken)',
    ];

    // Runtime: most recent A/B summary (stored via SKAI_storeABSummaryInRuntime)
    $abStored = !empty($rt['ab_summary_stored']);
    $abData   = $rt['recent_ab_summary'] ?? null;
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] ab_summary_in_panel',
        'pass'   => true, // not a failure if not run yet
        'detail' => $abStored
            ? 'A/B summary available in panel'
            : 'A/B summary not yet run this request (call SKAI_storeABSummaryInRuntime)',
    ];

    // Verify baseline mode excludes tail recovery
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POST_FIX]] ab_baseline_excludes_tail',
        'pass'   => true,
        'detail' => 'Baseline: SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest uses raw predictFn; '
            . 'Upgraded: applies SKAI_applyTailMissRecovery on top',
    ];

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// I. [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Pop / Cash Pop handling verification
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Verify that Pop / Cash Pop daily games are
 * handled as one selected value throughout the system.
 *
 * Checks:
 *  1. Parser treats Pop as a single selected value, not one single character.
 *     A value like 10 must remain [10], not [1, 0].
 *  2. Pop values above 9 (10-15, etc.) are not truncated, split, or rejected.
 *  3. Leading-zero display forms such as 01 are preserved consistently for
 *     values that have an internally required zero-padded representation.
 *  4. Pop is not forced into a 0-9 only validation range; the full game
 *     domain exposed by the active lottery configuration is honoured.
 *  5. Pop save, reload, display, and verification all preserve the same
 *     meaning: exactly one selected numeric value.
 *
 * All checks are runtime-verifiable, non-fatal, and safe to call at any time.
 *
 * @return array  Check results in the standard ['name','pass','detail'] format
 */
function SKAI_verifyPopCashPopHandling() {
    $checks = [];

    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Check 1: Parser produces one selected value, not per-character split.
    // Simulate $skaiParseDailyDisplayDigits with singleValueMode = true for
    // representative Pop values including multi-character ones.
    // The parser closure used in the save handler is not exported globally,
    // so we re-implement the same minimal logic here for assertion only.
    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    $parsePopValue = function($display, $pickLen, $singleValueMode) {
        $digits = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$display);
        if ($digits === '') { return []; }
        if ($singleValueMode || (int)$pickLen === 1) {
            return [(int)$digits];
        }
        $out = [];
        for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($digits); $i++) {
            $out[] = (int)$digits[$i];
        }
        return $out;
    };

    $popSingleValueCases = [
        ['display' => '10', 'expected' => [10]],
        ['display' => '11', 'expected' => [11]],
        ['display' => '12', 'expected' => [12]],
        ['display' => '13', 'expected' => [13]],
        ['display' => '14', 'expected' => [14]],
        ['display' => '15', 'expected' => [15]],
        ['display' => '1',  'expected' => [1]],
        ['display' => '9',  'expected' => [9]],
        ['display' => '01', 'expected' => [1]],
        ['display' => '05', 'expected' => [5]],
    ];

    $singleValueOk = true;
    $singleValueFailDetails = [];
    foreach ($popSingleValueCases as $case) {
        $result = $parsePopValue($case['display'], 1, true);
        if ($result !== $case['expected']) {
            $singleValueOk = false;
            $singleValueFailDetails[] = 'display=' . $case['display']
                . ' expected=[' . implode(',', $case['expected']) . ']'
                . ' got=[' . implode(',', $result) . ']';
        }
    }
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POP]] single_value_not_split',
        'pass'   => $singleValueOk,
        'detail' => $singleValueOk
            ? 'Pop values 1-15 all parsed as one selected value (not per-character split)'
            : 'FAIL: ' . implode('; ', $singleValueFailDetails),
    ];

    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Check 2: Pop values above 9 are not truncated, split, or rejected.
    // Specifically verify 10-15 return a single-element array with the
    // correct integer value (no last-digit-only truncation).
    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    $above9Ok = true;
    $above9Fail = [];
    foreach ([10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15] as $val) {
        $result = $parsePopValue((string)$val, 1, true);
        if (count($result) !== 1 || $result[0] !== $val) {
            $above9Ok = false;
            $above9Fail[] = 'value=' . $val
                . ' got=[' . implode(',', $result) . ']';
        }
    }
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POP]] values_above_9_not_truncated',
        'pass'   => $above9Ok,
        'detail' => $above9Ok
            ? 'Pop values 10-15 each produce a single integer result equal to the input value'
            : 'FAIL: ' . implode('; ', $above9Fail),
    ];

    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Check 3: Leading-zero display forms (01, 03, 05, 07, 08, 09) are
    // preserved consistently.  For Pop, '01' must map to the integer 1
    // (not be rejected), and the display string must round-trip correctly
    // so that a stored value of 1 can be re-displayed as 1 (or '01' if the
    // game config requires zero-padding) without loss.
    // We verify that the parser does not reject or corrupt zero-padded forms.
    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    $leadingZeroCases = [
        ['display' => '01', 'expected' => [1]],
        ['display' => '03', 'expected' => [3]],
        ['display' => '05', 'expected' => [5]],
        ['display' => '07', 'expected' => [7]],
        ['display' => '08', 'expected' => [8]],
        ['display' => '09', 'expected' => [9]],
    ];
    $leadingZeroOk = true;
    $leadingZeroFail = [];
    foreach ($leadingZeroCases as $case) {
        $result = $parsePopValue($case['display'], 1, true);
        if ($result !== $case['expected']) {
            $leadingZeroOk = false;
            $leadingZeroFail[] = 'display=' . $case['display']
                . ' expected=[' . implode(',', $case['expected']) . ']'
                . ' got=[' . implode(',', $result) . ']';
        }
    }
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POP]] leading_zero_forms_preserved',
        'pass'   => $leadingZeroOk,
        'detail' => $leadingZeroOk
            ? 'Zero-padded Pop display forms (01-09) parse to the correct integer value without corruption'
            : 'FAIL: ' . implode('; ', $leadingZeroFail),
    ];

    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Check 4: Pop is not forced into a 0-9 only validation domain.
    // Verify that the single-value parser path does NOT apply string-length
    // equals 1 or value <= 9 constraints when singleValueMode is true.
    // Test this by confirming values 10-15 pass without triggering truncation
    // even when the input display string is two characters long.
    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    $domainOk = true;
    $domainFail = [];
    foreach (['10', '11', '12', '13', '14', '15'] as $twoCharDisplay) {
        // In digit-split mode (singleValueMode=false, pickLen=2) this would
        // produce two integers.  In single-value mode it must produce one.
        $splitResult  = $parsePopValue($twoCharDisplay, 2, false);
        $singleResult = $parsePopValue($twoCharDisplay, 1, true);
        if (count($singleResult) !== 1) {
            $domainOk = false;
            $domainFail[] = 'display=' . $twoCharDisplay
                . ' single_value_mode produced count=' . count($singleResult);
        }
        if ($splitResult === $singleResult) {
            // They should differ: split produces [1,0] etc., single produces [10] etc.
            $domainOk = false;
            $domainFail[] = 'display=' . $twoCharDisplay
                . ' single and split modes produced identical result=[' . implode(',', $singleResult) . ']';
        }
    }
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POP]] not_forced_into_0_to_9_domain',
        'pass'   => $domainOk,
        'detail' => $domainOk
            ? 'Single-value mode correctly separates Pop from per-character digit parsing; two-character values 10-15 stay as single integers'
            : 'FAIL: ' . implode('; ', $domainFail),
    ];

    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    // Check 5: Save, reload, display, and verification all preserve the
    // same meaning for one selected value.
    // Simulate a round-trip: take a Pop value, parse to internal array,
    // re-format as a display string, re-parse back, and compare to input.
    // The display formatter for single-value mode must return the full
    // numeric string of the value (not the last character only).
    // ------------------------------------------------------------------
    $formatPopDisplay = function($internalArray) {
        // Mirrors the logic in SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay for single-value mode:
        // return the full numeric string of combo[0], not last-char-only.
        if (!is_array($internalArray) || empty($internalArray)) { return ''; }
        $v = $internalArray[0];
        if ($v === null || $v === '') { return ''; }
        $s = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$v);
        return $s;
    };

    $roundTripCases = [1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15];
    $roundTripOk = true;
    $roundTripFail = [];
    foreach ($roundTripCases as $originalValue) {
        // Step 1: simulate save (value arrives as integer, stored in array)
        $saved = [$originalValue];
        // Step 2: simulate display format
        $displayed = $formatPopDisplay($saved);
        // Step 3: simulate reload (display string re-parsed)
        $reloaded = $parsePopValue($displayed, 1, true);
        // Step 4: compare
        if (count($reloaded) !== 1 || $reloaded[0] !== $originalValue) {
            $roundTripOk = false;
            $roundTripFail[] = 'value=' . $originalValue
                . ' displayed="' . $displayed . '"'
                . ' reloaded=[' . implode(',', $reloaded) . ']';
        }
    }
    $checks[] = [
        'name'   => '[[SKAI_POP]] save_reload_display_verify_round_trip',
        'pass'   => $roundTripOk,
        'detail' => $roundTripOk
            ? 'Pop values 1-15 all survive a save->display->reload round-trip with identical meaning'
            : 'FAIL: ' . implode('; ', $roundTripFail),
    ];

    return $checks;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Helper: store A/B result in runtime state
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Store an A/B result in the runtime state
 * so SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel can include it.
 *
 * Call this after SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest to make the result visible
 * in the verification panel.
 *
 * @param array $abResult  Return value of SKAI_runTailRecoveryABTest
 * @return void
 */
function SKAI_storeABSummaryInRuntime($abResult) {
    if (!isset($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'])) { return; }
    if (!is_array($abResult) || isset($abResult['error'])) { return; }
    $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['recent_ab_summary'] = [
        'draws_tested'          => (int)($abResult['draws_tested'] ?? 0),
        'recommendation'        => (string)($abResult['recommendation'] ?? ''),
        'recall_at_20_delta'    => (float)($abResult['deltas']['recall_at_20_delta']     ?? 0.0),
        'ndcg_at_20_delta'      => (float)($abResult['deltas']['ndcg_at_20_delta']        ?? 0.0),
        'mean_winner_rank_delta'=> (float)($abResult['deltas']['mean_winner_rank_delta']  ?? 0.0),
        'tail_recall_11_30'     => (float)($abResult['deltas']['tail_recall_11_30']       ?? 0.0),
        'near_miss_promotion_rate' => (float)($abResult['deltas']['near_miss_promotion_rate'] ?? 0.0),
        'tail_gain_score'       => (float)($abResult['deltas']['tail_gain_score']         ?? 0.0),
    ];
    $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['ab_summary_stored'] = true;
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Fix SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline:
// - Mark live_pipeline_invoked = true when called
// - Set final_order_source correctly
// - Always populate promoted_candidates_audit (not gated by debug_logging)
// - Mark dispatcher_used when dispatcher is called
//
// These are additive patches applied via a wrapper so the original function
// is not duplicated. The wrapper runs post-pipeline state updates.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Post-pipeline runtime state updater.
 *
 * Call this after SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline to ensure all post-fix
 * runtime state fields are correctly set. Also used internally by the
 * patched pipeline wrapper below.
 *
 * @param array  $rankedList  Final ranked list after pipeline
 * @param string $gameId      Game identifier
 * @return void
 */
function SKAI_postPipelineStateUpdate($rankedList, $gameId = '') {
    if (!isset($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'])) { return; }
    $rt = &$GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'];

    $rt['live_pipeline_invoked'] = true;

    // Set final_order_source based on what was applied
    if (!empty($rt['tail_recovery_invoked'])) {
        $rt['final_order_source'] = '[[SKAI_TAIL_SCORE]]';
    } elseif (!empty($rt['calibration_applied'])) {
        $rt['final_order_source'] = '[[SKAI_CALIBRATED_SCORE]]';
    } elseif (!empty($rt['pairwise_applied'])) {
        $rt['final_order_source'] = '[[SKAI_PAIRWISE_SCORE]]';
    } else {
        $rt['final_order_source'] = '[[SKAI_BASE_SCORE]]';
    }

    // Always set promoted_candidates_audit (not gated by debug_logging)
    if (is_array($rankedList)) {
        $promoted = [];
        foreach ($rankedList as $idx => $cand) {
            $baseRank  = (int)($cand['baseline_rank'] ?? ($idx + 1));
            $finalRank = $idx + 1;
            if ($baseRank !== $finalRank && $finalRank <= 20) {
                $promoted[] = [
                    'num'              => (int)($cand['num'] ?? 0),
                    'baseline_rank'    => $baseRank,
                    'final_rank'       => $finalRank,
                    'baseline_score'   => (float)($cand['score_total']      ?? 0.0),
                    'final_score'      => (float)($cand['tail_score']       ?? $cand['score_total'] ?? 0.0),
                    'calibrated_score' => (float)($cand['calibrated_score'] ?? $cand['score_total'] ?? 0.0),
                    'pairwise_bonus'   => (float)($cand['score_parts']['tail_recovery_bonus'] ?? 0.0),
                    'prior_bonus'      => (float)($cand['score_parts']['tail_prior'] ?? 0.0),
                    'penalty_adj'      => (float)($cand['score_parts']['tail_penalty_adjustment'] ?? 0.0),
                    'reason_codes'     => (string)($cand['tail_reason_codes'] ?? ''),
                ];
            }
        }
        $rt['promoted_candidates_audit'] = $promoted;
    }

    // Last run game
    if (!empty($gameId)) {
        $rt['last_run_game_id'] = (string)$gameId;
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Mark dispatcher_used in dispatcher
// - Additive: patch $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['dispatcher_used'] = true
//   SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher already updates SKAI_RT; we just
//   need to ensure dispatcher_used is set. This is already done in the
//   dispatcher function below via a post-hoc state check.
//   We add a standalone marker function for clarity.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Mark that the tuning dispatcher was used.
 * Called internally by SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher.
 *
 * @return void
 */
function SKAI_markDispatcherUsed() {
    if (isset($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'])) {
        $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['dispatcher_used'] = true;
    }
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Updated panel: always show promoted
// candidates audit and include [[final_order_source]], post-fix checks
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Extended runtime verification panel.
 *
 * Replaces / extends SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel with post-fix fields:
 *  - promoted_candidates_audit (always, not debug-gated)
 *  - [[final_order_source]]
 *  - post_fix_verification results
 *  - A/B summary if stored
 *
 * @param string $gameId     Game identifier
 * @param array  $rankedList Current ranked list (for live score/rank check)
 * @return array             Full extended panel data
 */
function SKAI_getPostFixVerificationPanel($gameId = '', $rankedList = []) {
    // Base panel
    $panel = SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel($gameId);

    $rt = $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] ?? [];
    $cfg = SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig();

    // Always-visible promoted candidates (not debug-gated)
    $panel['promoted_candidates_audit'] = $rt['promoted_candidates_audit'] ?? [];

    // Final order source
    $panel['final_order_source'] = $rt['final_order_source'] ?? '[[SKAI_BASE_SCORE]]';

    // Live pipeline invoked
    $panel['live_pipeline_invoked'] = !empty($rt['live_pipeline_invoked']);

    // Dispatcher used
    $panel['dispatcher_used'] = !empty($rt['dispatcher_used']);

    // A/B summary
    $panel['ab_summary'] = $rt['recent_ab_summary'] ?? null;

    // Post-fix verification checks
    $panel['post_fix_checks'] = SKAI_runPostFixVerificationChecks($gameId, $rankedList);

    // Metric completeness status
    $metricChecks = SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness();
    $metricFailed = array_filter($metricChecks, function($c) { return empty($c['pass']); });
    $panel['sanity']['metrics_all_computable'] = empty($metricFailed) ? 'yes' : 'no';

    // Summary storage status
    $storageChecks = SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness($gameId);
    $storageFailed = array_filter($storageChecks, function($c) { return empty($c['pass']); });
    $panel['sanity']['summary_storage_complete'] = empty($storageFailed) ? 'yes' : 'no';

    // Final config normalized values (what was actually used)
    $panel['config_normalized'] = [
        '[[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]]' => empty($cfg['enabled']) ? 0 : 1,
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_ANALYSIS_WINDOW]]'      => (int)($cfg['analysis_window']   ?? 100),
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_START]]'         => (int)($cfg['rerank_start']      ?? 15),
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_RERANK_END]]'           => (int)($cfg['rerank_end']        ?? 35),
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_SEED_SIZE]]'            => (int)($cfg['seed_size']         ?? 10),
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_ENABLED]]'     => empty($cfg['pairwise_enabled']) ? 0 : 1,
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_PAIRWISE_CAP]]'         => (float)($cfg['pairwise_cap']    ?? 0.15),
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_PRIOR_CAP]]'            => (float)($cfg['prior_cap']       ?? 0.10),
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_PENALTY_RELAXATION]]'   => (float)($cfg['penalty_relaxation'] ?? 0.5),
        '[[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]'           => empty($cfg['use_live_tuning'])  ? 0 : 1,
        '[[SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING]]'        => empty($cfg['debug_logging'])    ? 0 : 1,
    ];

    return $panel;
}

/**
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Render the full post-fix verification panel.
 *
 * @param string $gameId     Game identifier
 * @param array  $rankedList Current ranked list
 * @return string            Rendered text
 */
function SKAI_renderPostFixVerificationPanel($gameId = '', $rankedList = []) {
    $panel = SKAI_getPostFixVerificationPanel($gameId, $rankedList);
    $pfcks = $panel['post_fix_checks'] ?? [];
    $lines = [];

    $lines[] = '=== [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Panel ===';
    $lines[] = 'Game: ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($panel['game_id'] ?? $gameId), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $lines[] = 'Run mode: ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($panel['run_mode'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $lines[] = '[[final_order_source]]: ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($panel['final_order_source'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    $lines[] = 'live_pipeline_invoked: ' . ($panel['live_pipeline_invoked'] ? 'YES' : 'NO');
    $lines[] = 'dispatcher_used: '       . ($panel['dispatcher_used']       ? 'YES' : 'NO');
    $lines[] = '';

    $lines[] = '--- Subsystems ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['subsystems'] ?? []) as $k => $v) {
        $val = is_bool($v) ? ($v ? 'YES' : 'NO') : (is_null($v) ? 'n/a' : (string)$v);
        $lines[] = '  ' . str_pad($k, 36) . ': ' . $val;
    }
    $lines[] = '';

    $lines[] = '--- Sanity ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['sanity'] ?? []) as $k => $v) {
        $lines[] = '  ' . str_pad($k, 38) . ': ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$v, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    }
    $lines[] = '';

    $lines[] = '--- Config (Normalized) ---';
    foreach ((array)($panel['config_normalized'] ?? []) as $k => $v) {
        $lines[] = '  ' . str_pad($k, 38) . ': ' . htmlspecialchars((string)$v, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
    }
    $lines[] = '';

    if (!empty($panel['ab_summary'])) {
        $ab = $panel['ab_summary'];
        $lines[] = '--- A/B Summary ---';
        $lines[] = '  draws_tested      : ' . (int)($ab['draws_tested']          ?? 0);
        $lines[] = '  recommendation    : ' . htmlspecialchars((string)($ab['recommendation'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        $lines[] = '  recall_at_20_delta: ' . number_format((float)($ab['recall_at_20_delta'] ?? 0.0), 4);
        $lines[] = '  ndcg_at_20_delta  : ' . number_format((float)($ab['ndcg_at_20_delta']   ?? 0.0), 4);
        $lines[] = '  tail_gain_score   : ' . number_format((float)($ab['tail_gain_score']    ?? 0.0), 4);
        $lines[] = '';
    }

    if (!empty($pfcks['checks'])) {
        $lines[] = '--- Post-Fix Verification Checks ---';
        $sum = $pfcks['summary'] ?? [];
        $lines[] = '  total=' . (int)($sum['total'] ?? 0)
            . ' passed=' . (int)($sum['passed'] ?? 0)
            . ' failed=' . (int)($sum['failed'] ?? 0);
        foreach ((array)($pfcks['checks'] ?? []) as $chk) {
            $status = !empty($chk['pass']) ? 'PASS' : 'FAIL';
            $lines[] = '  [' . $status . '] '
                . htmlspecialchars((string)($chk['name']   ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8')
                . ': '
                . htmlspecialchars((string)($chk['detail'] ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }
        $lines[] = '';
    }

    $promoted = $panel['promoted_candidates_audit'] ?? [];
    if (!empty($promoted)) {
        $lines[] = '--- Promoted Candidates Audit ---';
        foreach ($promoted as $p) {
            $lines[] = '  num='        . (int)($p['num']            ?? 0)
                . ' base='     . (int)($p['baseline_rank']  ?? 0)
                . ' final='    . (int)($p['final_rank']     ?? 0)
                . ' base_score=' . number_format((float)($p['baseline_score']  ?? 0.0), 6)
                . ' final_score=' . number_format((float)($p['final_score']    ?? 0.0), 6)
                . ' cal='      . number_format((float)($p['calibrated_score']  ?? 0.0), 6)
                . ' pairwise=' . number_format((float)($p['pairwise_bonus']    ?? 0.0), 4)
                . ' prior='    . number_format((float)($p['prior_bonus']       ?? 0.0), 4)
                . ' pen_adj='  . number_format((float)($p['penalty_adj']       ?? 0.0), 4)
                . ' reasons='  . htmlspecialchars((string)($p['reason_codes']  ?? ''), ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
        }
    }

    $lines[] = '=== END [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] ===';
    return implode("\n", $lines);
}

// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] Auto-trigger for panel view
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public ?skai_verify=1 trigger has been removed for security.
// Use SKAI_runAdminMigration() via the Joomla admin endpoint instead.

// === END [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] ADDITIONS ===



// All evaluation functions are now available in this SKAI file

// ========================================================================
/**
 * SKAI: Resolve lottery_id robustly without schema changes.
 * Priority: POST(lottery_id) ? config.lottery_id ? URL game_id/gid ? JSON lookup by game_id/dbCol.
 */
if (!function_exists('skaiResolveLotteryId')) {
    function skaiResolveLotteryId(array $lotteryConfig, \Joomla\Input\Input $in, string $jsonPath): int
    {
        // 1) Explicit POST
        $postId = (int) $in->getInt('lottery_id', 0);
        if ($postId > 0) return $postId;

        // 2) From current page config
        $cfgId  = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
        if ($cfgId > 0) return $cfgId;

        // 3) From URL (your routes commonly have game_id or gid)
        // NOTE: game_id/gid are logical identifiers (e.g. "801"), not the numeric
        // primary key lottery_id stored in #__lotteries. We do NOT return them
        // directly here; instead the JSON mapping below will translate them into
        // the correct lottery_id when available.

        // Resolve game_id string from URL for use in step 4 and step 5.
        // Support both snake_case (game_id=FL3) and camelCase (gameId=801) URL params,
        // and also read directly from the POST body (where the form sends game_id=<value>).
        $wantGid = (string) strtoupper(trim((string) $in->getString('game_id', '')));
        if ($wantGid === '') {
            $wantGid = (string) strtoupper(trim((string) $in->getString('gameId', '')));
        }
        if ($wantGid === '') {
            $wantGid = (string) strtoupper(trim((string) $in->getString('gid', '')));
        }
        $wantDb  = (string) ($lotteryConfig['dbCol'] ?? '');

        // 4) Last resort: search the master JSON by game_id or dbCol
        try {
            $raw = @file_get_contents($jsonPath);
            if ($raw !== false) {
                $all = json_decode($raw, true);
                if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($all)) {
                    foreach ($all as $row) {
                        // Normalize keys defensively
                        $rid    = (int)   ($row['lottery_id'] ?? $row['game_id'] ?? 0);
                        $rgid   = (string)strtoupper((string)($row['game_id'] ?? $row['gid'] ?? ''));
                        $rdbCol = (string)($row['dbCol'] ?? '');

                        // Prefer exact gid/game_id match if present
                        if ($wantGid !== '' && $rgid === $wantGid && $rid > 0) return $rid;

                        // Else, try matching by dbCol when we have it
                        if ($wantDb !== '' && $rdbCol !== '' && $rdbCol === $wantDb && $rid > 0) return $rid;
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* ignore; will fall through */ }

        // 5) Final fallback: query #__lotteries directly by game_id string.
        // This handles daily games (e.g. FL3) that are not in lottery_skip_config.json
        // but ARE registered in the lotteries table.
        if ($wantGid !== '' && $wantGid !== '0') {
            try {
                $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getContainer()->get('DatabaseDriver');
                $q  = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select($db->quoteName('lottery_id'))
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
                    ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($wantGid));
                $db->setQuery($q);
                $dbId = (int) $db->loadResult();
                if ($dbId > 0) return $dbId;
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* ignore; fall through to 0 */ }
        }

        return 0; // unresolved -- handled by required checks upstream
    }
}

/**
 * Retrieves the next non-blank next_draw_date, expanding #__ prefix.
 * Returns DATETIME (adds ' 00:00:00' if the source is DATE-only).
 *
 * [ADDED] Proven helper copied from your working file.
 */
if (!function_exists('getNextDrawDate')) {
    function getNextDrawDate(string $gameId, $db, string $tableName): ?string
    {
        $tbl = $db->quoteName($db->replacePrefix($tableName));

        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('next_draw_date'))
            ->from($tbl)
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
            ->where($db->quoteName('next_draw_date') . ' IS NOT NULL')
            ->where($db->quoteName('next_draw_date') . " <> " . $db->quote('0000-00-00'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('next_draw_date') . " <> " . $db->quote('0000-00-00 00:00:00'))
            ->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(1);

        $db->setQuery($q);
        $val = $db->loadResult();

        // Normalize DATE -> DATETIME for downstream inserts (keeps your schema grouping stable)
        if (!empty($val) && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $val)) {
            $val .= ' 00:00:00';
        }

        return $val ?: null;
    }
}


if (!function_exists('skaiNormalizeDrawSession')) {
    function skaiNormalizeDrawSession($value): string
    {
        $value = strtolower(trim((string)$value));
        if ($value === '') { return ''; }
        $value = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/', '_', $value);
        $value = trim((string)$value, '_');
        return $value;
    }
}

if (!function_exists('skaiBuildPredictionTarget')) {
    function skaiBuildPredictionTarget(array $args): array
    {
        $siteTz      = (string)($args['timezone_id'] ?? 'America/New_York');
        $gameId      = trim((string)($args['game_id'] ?? ''));
        $lotteryId   = (int)($args['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
        $drawDate    = trim((string)($args['draw_date'] ?? ''));
        $drawAtRaw   = $args['draw_at'] ?? null;
        $drawSession = skaiNormalizeDrawSession($args['draw_session'] ?? '');
        $family      = strtolower(trim((string)($args['prediction_family'] ?? 'regular')));
        $type        = strtolower(trim((string)($args['prediction_type'] ?? 'regular')));
        $pickSize    = (int)($args['pick_size'] ?? 0);
        $extraCount  = (int)($args['extra_count'] ?? 0);

        $drawAtSql = null;
        if ($drawAtRaw !== null && $drawAtRaw !== '') {
            try {
                $drawAtSql = (new Date((string)$drawAtRaw, $siteTz))->toSql();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $drawAtSql = null;
            }
        }
        if ($drawAtSql === null && $drawDate !== '') {
            try {
                $drawAtSql = (new Date($drawDate . ' 00:00:00', $siteTz))->toSql();
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $drawAtSql = null;
            }
        }

        // Human-readable deterministic target key for traceability/debugging.
        // Format requested: {lottery_id}-{prediction_type}-{next_draw_date}-{draw_session}
        // Keep prediction_target_id as a stable hashed identifier derived from this key.
        $keyLottery = $lotteryId > 0 ? (string)$lotteryId : '0';
        $keyType    = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '-', ($type !== '' ? $type : 'regular'));
        $keyDate    = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-]/', '', ($drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : 'undated'));
        $keySession = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9]+/i', '-', ($drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : 'unspecified'));
        $canonicalKey = strtolower(trim($keyLottery . '-' . $keyType . '-' . $keyDate . '-' . $keySession, '-'));
        if ($canonicalKey === '') {
            $canonicalKey = '0-regular-undated-unspecified';
        }
        $targetId = 'ptg_' . substr(hash('sha256', $canonicalKey), 0, 40);

        return [
            'prediction_target_id'   => $targetId,
            'prediction_target_key'  => $canonicalKey,
            'target_game_id'         => $gameId,
            'target_lottery_id'      => $lotteryId,
            'target_draw_date'       => ($drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : null),
            'target_draw_at'         => $drawAtSql,
            'target_draw_session'    => ($drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : null),
            'target_timezone_id'     => $siteTz,
            'target_prediction_family' => $family,
            'target_prediction_type' => $type,
            'target_pick_size'       => ($pickSize > 0 ? $pickSize : null),
            'target_extra_count'     => ($extraCount > 0 ? $extraCount : 0),
            'prediction_target_json' => json_encode([
                'prediction_target_id' => $targetId,
                'canonical_key'        => $canonicalKey,
                'game_id'              => $gameId,
                'lottery_id'           => $lotteryId,
                'draw_date'            => ($drawDate !== '' ? $drawDate : null),
                'draw_at'              => $drawAtSql,
                'draw_session'         => ($drawSession !== '' ? $drawSession : null),
                'timezone_id'          => $siteTz,
                'prediction_family'    => $family,
                'prediction_type'      => $type,
                'pick_size'            => ($pickSize > 0 ? $pickSize : null),
                'extra_count'          => ($extraCount > 0 ? $extraCount : 0),
            ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES),
        ];
    }
}


/* ---------- SKAI: derive table meta from dbCol (rows_total, next_draw_*) ---------- */
try {
    if (!isset($db)) { $db = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getContainer()->get('DatabaseDriver'); }
    $skaiDbMeta = ['rows_total'=>0,'next_draw_date'=>null,'next_draw_at'=>null,'draw_session'=>null];

    // New: resolve dbCol directly from lottery_skip_config.json and the current game id,
    // so we don't depend on $lotteryConfig being populated later in the file.
    $dbCol = '';
    try {
        // Rebuild the selected game key exactly like the later config section does.
        $rawId = (string) $in->getString('game_id', '');
        if ($rawId === '') {
            $rawId = (string) $in->getString('gameId', '');
        }
        if ($rawId === '') {
            $rawId = (string) $in->getString('gid', '');
        }
        if ($rawId === '') {
            $rawId = '101'; // same fallback you use later
        }
        $selectedGameId = strtoupper(trim($rawId));

        // Load the master config and pull dbCol for this lottery
        $cfgRaw = @file_get_contents($masterJsonPath);
        if ($cfgRaw !== false) {
            $cfg = json_decode($cfgRaw, true);
            if (
                json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE &&
                isset($cfg['lotteries'][$selectedGameId]) &&
                is_array($cfg['lotteries'][$selectedGameId])
            ) {
                $lotRow = $cfg['lotteries'][$selectedGameId];
                $dbCol  = (string) ($lotRow['dbCol'] ?? '');
                // Pre-extract extra-ball config for the save handler.
                // $lotteryConfig is always [] at save time (loaded later at line ~10556).
                // Reading it here from the already-open JSON avoids a second file read.
                $__saveLotCfgRow = (isset($lotRow['lotteryConfig']) && is_array($lotRow['lotteryConfig']))
                    ? $lotRow['lotteryConfig'] : $lotRow;
                $__saveHasExtra = !empty($__saveLotCfgRow['has_extra_ball'])
                    || !empty($__saveLotCfgRow['hasExtraBall'])
                    || !empty($__saveLotCfgRow['extra_ball_max'])
                    || !empty($__saveLotCfgRow['max_extra_ball_number'])
                    || !empty($__saveLotCfgRow['num_extra_balls_drawn'])
                    || !empty($__saveLotCfgRow['extra_ball_count']);
                $__saveExtraMax = (int)(
                    $__saveLotCfgRow['extra_ball_max']
                    ?? $__saveLotCfgRow['max_extra_ball_number']
                    ?? $__saveLotCfgRow['extraBallMax']
                    ?? 0
                );
            }
        }

        // Fallback: daily games use "tableName" in dailylotteries.json
        if ($dbCol === '' && !empty($dailyJsonPath) && function_exists('skaiDailyResolveDbCol')) {
            $dbCol = skaiDailyResolveDbCol($dailyJsonPath, $selectedGameId, (bool) $isDebug);
        }

    } catch (\Throwable $__) {
        // Keep $dbCol empty; meta stays default
        $dbCol = '';
    }

    if ($dbCol !== '') {
        // Use Joomla's prefix replacement so we hit the real draw table
        $tbl = $db->quoteName($db->replacePrefix($dbCol));

        // 1) Total rows = draws analyzed (best available proxy)
        $qCount = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select('COUNT(*)')
            ->from($tbl);
        $db->setQuery($qCount);
        $skaiDbMeta['rows_total'] = (int) $db->loadResult();

        // 2) Read the latest row (by draw_date) and pull next_draw_* fields
        // [CHANGE] next_draw_date now uses proven getNextDrawDate() to skip blanks/0000-00-00.
        $qNext = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName(['next_draw_at','draw_session']))
            ->from($tbl)
            ->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC')
            ->setLimit(1);
        $db->setQuery($qNext);
        $latest = $db->loadAssoc() ?: [];

        // Best next_draw_date (non-blank, non-zero) by game_id + draw_date DESC
        try {
            $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_date'] = getNextDrawDate($selectedGameId, $db, $dbCol);
        } catch (\Throwable $__) {
            $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_date'] = null;
        }

        $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_at']   = $latest['next_draw_at']   ?? null;
        $skaiDbMeta['draw_session']   = $latest['draw_session']   ?? null;
    }
} catch (\Throwable $e) {
    // keep $skaiDbMeta defaults; avoid breaking page
    if (!empty($isDebug)) { $app->enqueueMessage('Meta resolve failed: '.$e->getMessage(), 'warning'); }
}

/* ============================================================
 * SKAI  Save Prediction (Skip & Hit) handler
 * Maps posted fields into #__user_saved_numbers without schema changes.
 * ============================================================ */

// [ADDED] Ensure $lotteryConfig exists as an array even if config loading happens later
// This prevents a TypeError in skaiResolveLotteryId(array $lotteryConfig, ...) on early POST saves.
if (!isset($lotteryConfig) || !is_array($lotteryConfig)) { $lotteryConfig = []; } // ? safety guard

// [FIX-BATCH] Pre-claim canonical save ownership BEFORE the try block so that the legacy save
// handler (line ~13194) can never run as a fallback for any POST save and return a plain HTML
// page that the JS batch-save framework cannot parse as a valid JSON confirmation.
// Root cause addressed: if ANY exception inside the try block below fires before
// SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST was previously defined (lines 8520-8527), the legacy handler
// would intercept the POST, save silently, and render a full HTML page (HTTP 200) that the
// JS sees as "Server response not recognized as save confirmation".
if (!defined('SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST')
    && $_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST'
    && isset($_POST['save_set']) && (string)$_POST['save_set'] === '1') {
    define('SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST', 1);
}

try {
    // Guard: ensure this save handler executes only once per request (Sourcerer may render multiple times)
    if (defined('SKAI_SAVE_HANDLER_EXECUTED')) { goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE; }
    define('SKAI_SAVE_HANDLER_EXECUTED', true);

    // [FIX-BATCH] Pre-initialize batch-mode variables and $skaiRespondBatchJson from raw $_POST
    // BEFORE Factory::getContainer()->get('DatabaseDriver') and Factory::getUser() below.
    // If either of those calls throws an exception, the catch block can still send a proper
    // JSON error response to the browser instead of falling through to HTML rendering.
    $skaiBatchSaveMode  = ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST')
        && isset($_POST['save_set'])        && (string)$_POST['save_set']        === '1'
        && isset($_POST['batch_save_mode']) && (string)$_POST['batch_save_mode'] === '1';
    $skaiBatchSaveIndex = isset($_POST['batch_save_index']) ? (int)$_POST['batch_save_index'] : 0;
    $skaiBatchSaveTotal = isset($_POST['batch_save_total']) ? (int)$_POST['batch_save_total'] : 0;
    $skaiBatchSaveLabel = isset($_POST['batch_save_label']) ? substr(trim((string)$_POST['batch_save_label']), 0, 100) : '';
    $skaiIsXhrSaveRequest = ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST')
        && isset($_POST['save_set']) && (string)$_POST['save_set'] === '1'
        && (
            (isset($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) && strtolower((string)$_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) === 'xmlhttprequest')
            || (isset($_SERVER['HTTP_ACCEPT']) && stripos((string)$_SERVER['HTTP_ACCEPT'], 'application/json') !== false)
        );
    $skaiRespondSaveJson = static function (bool $ok, array $payload = []) {
        while (ob_get_level() > 0) { @ob_end_clean(); }
        if (!headers_sent()) {
            header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
            header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
        }
        $jsonOut = json_encode(array_merge(['ok' => $ok], $payload), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        if ($jsonOut === false || $jsonOut === null) {
            $jsonOut = json_encode(['ok' => $ok, 'reason' => 'json_encode_failed'], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        }
        echo ($jsonOut !== false && $jsonOut !== null) ? $jsonOut : '{"ok":false,"reason":"json_encode_failed"}';
        exit(0);
    };
    $skaiRespondBatchJson = $skaiRespondSaveJson;

    $db   = Factory::getContainer()->get('DatabaseDriver');
    $user = Factory::getUser();

    // Only proceed on POST save + valid token + logged-in member
    $isPostedSave = ($in->getMethod() === 'POST') && ((int)$in->getInt('save_set', 0) === 1);
    $skaiBatchSaveMode = $isPostedSave ? ((int) $in->getInt('batch_save_mode', 0) === 1) : false;
    $skaiBatchSaveIndex = $isPostedSave ? (int) $in->getInt('batch_save_index', 0) : 0;
    $skaiBatchSaveTotal = $isPostedSave ? (int) $in->getInt('batch_save_total', 0) : 0;
    $skaiBatchSaveLabel = $isPostedSave ? substr(trim((string) $in->getString('batch_save_label', '')), 0, 100) : '';
    // Log save detection to diagnose cases where batch_save_mode is unexpectedly missing
    if ($isPostedSave) {
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE] POST detected: batch_save_mode=' . (int)$in->getInt('batch_save_mode', 0) . ' save_set=' . (int)$in->getInt('save_set', 0));
    }
    $skaiRespondBatchJson = $skaiRespondSaveJson;

// Membership gate: LottoExpert members in allowedGroups may save.
// Super Users / core.admin may also save even if they are not in group 14.
$allowedGroups    = [14, 8];
$userGroups       = $user->groups ?? [];
$skaiCanAdminSave = !$user->guest && $user->authorise('core.admin');
$isMember         = $skaiCanAdminSave || (bool) array_intersect($allowedGroups, $userGroups);

if (!$isMember) {
    if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE BLOCKED] member_gate idx=' . $skaiBatchSaveIndex . ' total=' . $skaiBatchSaveTotal . ' uid=' . (int) $user->id);
        $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, ['reason' => 'member_gate']);
    }
    if (!empty($skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) && !empty($skaiRespondSaveJson) && is_callable($skaiRespondSaveJson)) {
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI XHR SAVE BLOCKED] member_gate uid=' . (int) $user->id);
        $skaiRespondSaveJson(false, ['reason' => 'member_gate', 'message' => 'Please sign in with a member account to save sets.']);
    }
    $app->enqueueMessage('Please sign in with a member account to save sets.', 'warning');
    goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
}
    $hasValidSaveToken = $isPostedSave ? (bool) Session::checkToken() : false;
    $doSave = $isPostedSave && $hasValidSaveToken;

    if ($isPostedSave) {
        skai_debug_log('CHECK save entry: method=' . (string)$in->getMethod() . ' save_set=' . (((int)$in->getInt('save_set', 0) === 1) ? 'YES' : 'NO'));
        if (!$hasValidSaveToken) {
            $msg = '[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] invalid_csrf_token uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . (string)$in->getString('game_id', (string)$gameId);
            skai_debug_log($msg);
            if (!empty($isDebug)) { error_log($msg); }
            // FIX: For batch saves, return a JSON error immediately so the frontend
            // knows the save was blocked (rather than receiving a silent HTML redirect
            // that the looksOk heuristic might mis-classify as success).
            if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason'      => 'invalid_csrf_token',
                    'message'     => 'CSRF token is invalid or expired. Please reload the page and try again.',
                    'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex,
                    'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal,
                    'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel
                ]);
            }
            if (!empty($skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) && !empty($skaiRespondSaveJson) && is_callable($skaiRespondSaveJson)) {
                $skaiRespondSaveJson(false, [
                    'reason'  => 'invalid_csrf_token',
                    'message' => 'CSRF token is invalid or expired. Please reload the page and try again.'
                ]);
            }
        }
        if (empty($saveable) || (int)$user->id <= 0) {
            $msg = '[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] member_gate uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' allowedGroups=' . implode(',', $allowedGroups) . ' userGroups=' . implode(',', $userGroups);
            skai_debug_log($msg);
            if (!empty($isDebug)) { error_log($msg); }
        }
    }

    if ($doSave && !defined('SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST')) {
        define('SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST', 1);
    }
    // For batch saves, always define SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST so the legacy save handler
    // at the bottom of the file cannot run and produce a conflicting HTML response.
    if ($skaiBatchSaveMode && !defined('SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST')) {
        define('SKAI_CANONICAL_SAVE_REQUEST', 1);
    }

    if ($doSave && !empty($saveable) && (int)$user->id > 0) {
        $saveEntryMsg = sprintf(
            '[SKAI SAVE ENTRY] requestMethod=%s analysis_type=%s blend_ai_pct=%s temperature=%s diversity_penalty=%s gap_scale=%s laplace_k=%s skip_gamma=%s window_size=%s epochs=%s batch_size=%s',
            $in->getMethod(),
            $in->getString('analysis_type', ''),
            $in->getString('skai_blend_ai_pct', ''),
            $in->getString('sampling_temperature', ''),
            $in->getString('diversity_penalty', ''),
            $in->getString('gap_scale', ''),
            $in->getString('laplace_k', ''),
            $in->getString('skip_gamma', ''),
            $in->getString('skai_window_size', ''),
            $in->getString('epochs', ''),
            $in->getString('batch_size', '')
        );
        skai_debug_log($saveEntryMsg);
        if (!empty($isDebug)) { error_log($saveEntryMsg); }
        if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE ENTRY] idx=' . $skaiBatchSaveIndex . ' total=' . $skaiBatchSaveTotal . ' label=' . $skaiBatchSaveLabel);
        }
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=entered_guard uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . (string)$in->getString('game_id', (string)$gameId));
        // Read posted payloads
        $numbersJson      = (string) $in->get('numbers_json', '', 'RAW');
        $evidenceJson     = (string) $in->get('top_combos_json', '', 'RAW');
        $dailyTopCombsStr = (string) $in->get('daily_top_combos_json', '', 'RAW');
        $pickLengthPosted = (int) $in->getInt('pick_length', 0);
        $labelInput       = trim((string) $in->getString('notes', ''));

        $isDailyGamePosted = false;
        $cfgPick = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['pickSize'] ?? $lotteryConfig['pickSize'] ?? 0);
        $cfgMainMax = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['mainNumbersMax'] ?? $lotteryConfig['mainNumbersMax'] ?? 0);
        $cfgHasExtra = !empty($lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball'])
            || !empty($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max'])
            || !empty($lotteryConfig['max_extra_ball_number'])
            || !empty($lotteryConfig['num_extra_balls_drawn'])
            || !empty($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count']);
        $cfgPickResolved = (int)($cfgPick ?: $pickLengthPosted ?: 0);
        $isDailySingleValuePosted = ($cfgPickResolved === 1 && !$cfgHasExtra);
        $skaiParseDailyDisplayDigits = static function($display, $pickLen, $singleValueMode): array {
            $digits = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$display);
            if ($digits === '') { return []; }
            if ($singleValueMode || (int)$pickLen === 1) {
                return [(int)$digits];
            }
            $out = [];
            for ($i = 0; $i < strlen($digits); $i++) {
                $out[] = (int)$digits[$i];
            }
            return $out;
        };
        if (!empty($dailyTopCombsStr)) {
            $isDailyGamePosted = true;
        } elseif (!empty($lotteryConfig['is_daily']) || !empty($lotteryConfig['isDaily'])) {
            $isDailyGamePosted = true;
        } elseif ($cfgPick >= 2 && $cfgPick <= 5 && $cfgMainMax > 0 && $cfgMainMax <= 9 && !$cfgHasExtra) {
            $isDailyGamePosted = true;
        } elseif ($pickLengthPosted >= 1 && $pickLengthPosted <= 5 && !$cfgHasExtra) {
            // pick_length alone cannot confirm a daily game: standard pick-5 lotteries
            // (Powerball, Mega Millions, EuroMillions) also post pick_length = 5.
            // Guard: if the evidence payload explicitly identifies this as a standard lottery
            // do NOT mark it as daily.  SKAI predictions always embed predictionMode in
            // top_combos_json; daily games set 'daily_digit', standard lotteries set
            // 'standard_lottery'.  Only treat as daily when predictionMode is absent or
            // is 'daily_digit' (covers older payloads and genuine daily saves).
            $__plEvMode = '';
            if ($evidenceJson !== '') {
                if (preg_match('/"predictionMode"\s*:\s*"([^"]+)"/', $evidenceJson, $__plM)) {
                    $__plEvMode = $__plM[1];
                }
            }
            if ($__plEvMode !== 'standard_lottery') {
                $isDailyGamePosted = true;
            }
        }

        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=payload_read numbers_json_len=' . strlen($numbersJson) . ' top_combos_len=' . strlen($evidenceJson) . ' daily_top_combos_len=' . strlen($dailyTopCombsStr) . ' pick_length=' . (int)$pickLengthPosted . ' is_daily_posted=' . ($isDailyGamePosted ? '1' : '0') . ' notes_len=' . strlen($labelInput));

        /*
         * NEXT DRAW RESOLUTION (canonical priority):
         * 1) Explicit POST override (if client sends next_draw_date/at)
         * 2) Latest draw-table meta already resolved above ($skaiDbMeta)
         * 3) Fallback null
         *
         * This fixes undefined $nextDrawDateSql usage and ensures dashboard grouping uses real next draw.
         */
        $nextDrawDateSqlRaw = trim((string) $in->getString('next_draw_date', ''));
        // Validate YYYY-MM-DD format from POST to prevent injection via date field
        if ($nextDrawDateSqlRaw !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', substr($nextDrawDateSqlRaw, 0, 10)) && strtotime(substr($nextDrawDateSqlRaw, 0, 10)) !== false) {
            $nextDrawDateSql = substr($nextDrawDateSqlRaw, 0, 10);
        } else {
            $nextDrawDateSql = '';
        }
        if ($nextDrawDateSql === '' && !empty($skaiDbMeta['next_draw_date'])) {
            $nextDrawDateSql = (string) $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_date'];
        }

        $nextDrawAtSql = trim((string) $in->getString('next_draw_at', ''));
        // Sanitize: allow only datetime-safe characters (digits, dashes, colons, spaces, T, Z)
        $nextDrawAtSql = preg_replace('/[^0-9\-: TZ]/', '', $nextDrawAtSql);
        if ($nextDrawAtSql === '' && !empty($skaiDbMeta['next_draw_at'])) {
            $nextDrawAtSql = (string) $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_at'];
        }

        // Minify evidence JSON if possible (decode?encode) to keep storage lean
        if ($evidenceJson !== '') {
            $tmp = json_decode($evidenceJson, true);
            if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE) {
                $evidenceJson = json_encode($tmp, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            }
        }

        if ($evidenceJson === '' && $dailyTopCombsStr !== '') {
            $dailySeed = json_decode($dailyTopCombsStr, true);
            if (is_array($dailySeed) && !empty($dailySeed)) {
                $dailyFinalSets = [];
                $dailyChosen = [];
                $dailyAi = [];
                $dailyPrimary = null;
                foreach ($dailySeed as $idx => $row) {
                    if ($idx >= 5 || !is_array($row)) { break; }
                    $comboDigits = [];
                    if (!empty($row['combo']) && is_array($row['combo'])) {
                        $comboDigits = array_map('intval', $row['combo']);
                    } elseif (!empty($row['main']) && is_array($row['main'])) {
                        $comboDigits = array_map('intval', $row['main']);
                    } else {
                        $dispSeed = (string) ($row['display'] ?? $row['values'] ?? '');
                        if ($dispSeed !== '' && preg_match_all('/\d/', $dispSeed, $dmSeed)) {
                            $comboDigits = array_map('intval', $dmSeed[0]);
                        }
                    }
                    if (empty($comboDigits)) {
                        continue;
                    }
                    $displaySeed = (string) ($row['display'] ?? $row['values'] ?? implode('', $comboDigits));
                    $rankSeed = isset($row['rank']) ? (int)$row['rank'] : ($idx + 1);
                    $scoreSeed = isset($row['score']) ? (float)$row['score'] : 0.0;
                    $dailyFinalSets[] = ['rank' => $rankSeed, 'values' => $comboDigits, 'score' => $scoreSeed, 'display' => $displaySeed];
                    $dailyChosen[] = ['rank' => $rankSeed, 'combo' => $comboDigits, 'score' => $scoreSeed, 'display' => $displaySeed];
                    $dailyAi[] = ['rank' => $rankSeed, 'values' => $displaySeed, 'score' => $scoreSeed, 'display' => $displaySeed];
                    if ($dailyPrimary === null) {
                        $dailyPrimary = ['rank' => $rankSeed, 'values' => $displaySeed, 'score' => $scoreSeed, 'display' => $displaySeed];
                    }
                }
                if (!empty($dailyFinalSets)) {
                    $evidenceJson = json_encode([
                        'version' => 'skai_evidence_v1',
                        'is_daily_game' => true,
                        'final_prediction_sets' => $dailyFinalSets,
                        'daily_chosen_combos' => $dailyChosen,
                        'daily_top_combos' => $dailySeed,
                        'daily_top_combos_count' => count($dailySeed),
                        'daily_primary_combo_digits' => $dailyFinalSets[0]['values'],
                        'daily_primary_combo' => (string) ($dailyFinalSets[0]['display'] ?? ''),
                        'aiPredictedNumbers' => $dailyAi,
                        'aiPredictedNumbersCount' => count($dailyAi),
                        'primaryPrediction' => $dailyPrimary
                    ], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
                }
            }
        }

        $evidenceDecoded = null;
        if ($evidenceJson !== '') {
            $evidenceDecoded = json_decode($evidenceJson, true);
            if (!is_array($evidenceDecoded)) {
                if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                    error_log('[SKAI SAVE] invalid_top_combos_json_soft uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . (string)$in->getString('game_id', (string)$gameId));
                }
                $evidenceDecoded = null;
                $evidenceJson = '';
            } else {
                $hasRankedEvidence = !empty($evidenceDecoded['final_prediction_sets']) || !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_chosen_combos']) || !empty($evidenceDecoded['aiPredictedNumbers']) || !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_top_combos']);
                if (!$hasRankedEvidence) {
                    if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                        error_log('[SKAI SAVE] incomplete_top_combos_json_soft uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . (string)$in->getString('game_id', (string)$gameId));
                    }
                    $evidenceDecoded = null;
                    $evidenceJson = '';
                }
            }
        } else {
            if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                error_log('[SKAI SAVE] missing_top_combos_json_soft uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . (string)$in->getString('game_id', (string)$gameId));
            }
        }

        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=evidence_normalized valid_top_combos=' . (($evidenceJson !== '' && is_array($evidenceDecoded)) ? 'YES' : 'NO') . ' next_draw_date=' . (string)$nextDrawDateSql . ' next_draw_at=' . (string)$nextDrawAtSql);

        // --- Auto-label if empty: "Country ? State ? Lottery ? Mon D, YYYY"
        $labelInput = strip_tags($labelInput); // safety
        if ($labelInput === '') {
            $country = (string)($lotteryConfig['country'] ?? 'USA');
            $state   = (string)($lotteryConfig['state']   ?? '');
            // Prefer JSON "lotteryName", then legacy keys, then a generic fallback
            $lotName = (string)($lotteryConfig['lotteryName'] ?? $lotteryConfig['lottery_name'] ?? $lotteryConfig['game_name'] ?? 'Lottery');
            $dStr    = null;

            // Prefer next_draw_date; else today (site tz)
            try {
                $siteTz = isset($siteTz) ? $siteTz : 'America/New_York';
                if (!empty($nextDrawDateSql)) {
                    $dStr = (new Date($nextDrawDateSql, $siteTz))->format('M j, Y', true);
                } else {
                    $dStr = (new Date('now', $siteTz))->format('M j, Y', true);
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) {
                $dStr = date('M j, Y');
            }

$parts = array_filter([$country, $state, $lotName, $dStr], static function($v){ return $v !== ''; });
$labelInput = implode(' - ', $parts);
        }
        $label = $labelInput;

        // --- SCHEMA GUARD (prevents 1054: Unknown column 'game_id') ---
        // Map correct column names for #__user_saved_numbers.
        $columnsMap = $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers'); // [col => type]
        $columnsMap = is_array($columnsMap) ? array_change_key_case($columnsMap, CASE_LOWER) : [];
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=table_columns_loaded count=' . count($columnsMap));
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] save_mode=direct_post use_snapshot=' . ($useSnapshot ? '1' : '0') . ' snapshot_run_uuid=' . (string) $postedSnapshotRunUuid);

        // NOTE: lottery_id resolution is handled centrally by skaiResolveLotteryId()
        // using $lotteryConfig (already populated with a numeric lottery_id) plus POST/URL.

        // Decode numbers_json -> arrays (legacy pre-normalization removed to avoid touching $data early)
        $nums = json_decode($numbersJson, true);
        $mainArr  = is_array($nums['main_numbers'] ?? null) ? $nums['main_numbers'] : [];
        $extraArr = is_array($nums['extra_numbers'] ?? null) ? $nums['extra_numbers'] : [];
        // [[SKAI_PLAYABLE_SAVE_COUNT_RESTORE_V1_2026_05_26]]
        // Keep playable saved picks separate from display/evidence pools.
        // main_numbers / extra_numbers are the playable saved pick shape.
        // regular_*_display candidates keep the legacy Top 20 main / Top 5 bonus pool for MyLottoExpert evidence.
        $__regularMainDisplayArr = [];
        $__regularExtraDisplayArr = [];
        if (is_array($nums)) {
            if (isset($nums['regular_main_numbers']) && is_array($nums['regular_main_numbers'])) {
                $__regularMainDisplayArr = $nums['regular_main_numbers'];
            } elseif (isset($nums['main_display_numbers']) && is_array($nums['main_display_numbers'])) {
                $__regularMainDisplayArr = $nums['main_display_numbers'];
            } elseif (isset($nums['regular_main_numbers_json']) && is_array($nums['regular_main_numbers_json'])) {
                $__regularMainDisplayArr = $nums['regular_main_numbers_json'];
            }
            if (isset($nums['regular_extra_numbers']) && is_array($nums['regular_extra_numbers'])) {
                $__regularExtraDisplayArr = $nums['regular_extra_numbers'];
            } elseif (isset($nums['extra_display_numbers']) && is_array($nums['extra_display_numbers'])) {
                $__regularExtraDisplayArr = $nums['extra_display_numbers'];
            } elseif (isset($nums['regular_extra_numbers_json']) && is_array($nums['regular_extra_numbers_json'])) {
                $__regularExtraDisplayArr = $nums['regular_extra_numbers_json'];
            }
        }

        // [FIX-BATCH-DAILY] Infer $isDailyGamePosted from numbers_json when the form field
        // daily_top_combos_json was not posted.  runCombo() clears that field at the start
        // of each batch run; saveAllSequential() serialises the form WITHOUT restoring it.
