        // Without this guard, $isDailyGamePosted stays false for daily batch saves, causing
        // $norm() to strip digit 0 from $mainArr (zero is excluded for non-daily lotteries).
        // If the primary combo is all zeros (e.g. "000"), $mainArr becomes empty and PHP
        // returns {"ok":false,"reason":"empty_main_numbers"}, stopping the whole batch.
        if (!$isDailyGamePosted && is_array($nums)) {
            if (!empty($nums['daily_top_combo_strings'])
                || array_key_exists('daily_primary_combo_digits', $nums)
                || !empty($nums['daily_bonus_digits'])) {
                $isDailyGamePosted = true;
                skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] daily_inferred_from_numbers_json=1 keys=' . implode(',', array_filter(['daily_top_combo_strings', 'daily_primary_combo_digits', 'daily_bonus_digits'], function($k) use ($nums){ return isset($nums[$k]) && $nums[$k] !== [] && $nums[$k] !== null; })));
            }
        }

        // Forensic fallback: some branches post main_numbers / extra_ball_numbers directly
        // as JSON strings or CSV-like strings before numbers_json is refreshed.
        if (empty($mainArr)) {
            $mainRaw = (string) $in->get('main_numbers', '', 'RAW');
            if ($mainRaw !== '') {
                $mainDecoded = json_decode($mainRaw, true);
                if (is_array($mainDecoded)) {
                    $mainArr = $mainDecoded;
                } else {
                    $mainArr = preg_split('/\s*,\s*/', trim($mainRaw), -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
                }
            }
        }
        if ($isDailyGamePosted && empty($mainArr) && $dailyTopCombsStr !== '') {
            $dailySeed = json_decode($dailyTopCombsStr, true);
            if (is_array($dailySeed) && !empty($dailySeed)) {
                $dailyStrings = [];
                foreach ($dailySeed as $dailyRow) {
                    if (!is_array($dailyRow)) { continue; }
                    $dispRow = (string) ($dailyRow['display'] ?? $dailyRow['values'] ?? '');
                    $dispRow = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $dispRow);
                    if ($dispRow !== '') { $dailyStrings[] = $dispRow; }
                    if (count($dailyStrings) >= 5) { break; }
                }
                if (!empty($dailyStrings)) {
                    $firstDailyDisplay = (string)$dailyStrings[0];
                    $mainArr = $skaiParseDailyDisplayDigits($firstDailyDisplay, $cfgPickResolved, $isDailySingleValuePosted);
                } else {
                    $firstDaily = $dailySeed[0];
                    if (!empty($firstDaily['combo']) && is_array($firstDaily['combo'])) {
                        $mainArr = array_map('intval', $firstDaily['combo']);
                    } elseif (!empty($firstDaily['main']) && is_array($firstDaily['main'])) {
                        $mainArr = array_map('intval', $firstDaily['main']);
                    } else {
                        $dispFirst = (string) ($firstDaily['display'] ?? $firstDaily['values'] ?? '');
                        $mainArr = $skaiParseDailyDisplayDigits($dispFirst, $cfgPickResolved, $isDailySingleValuePosted);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        if (empty($extraArr)) {
            $extraRaw = (string) $in->get('extra_ball_numbers', '', 'RAW');
            if ($extraRaw !== '') {
                $extraDecoded = json_decode($extraRaw, true);
                if (is_array($extraDecoded)) {
                    $extraArr = $extraDecoded;
                } else {
                    $extraArr = preg_split('/\s*,\s*/', trim($extraRaw), -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
                }
            }
        }

        // [FIX-EVIDENCE-RECOVERY] Last-resort recovery from top_combos_json evidence.
        // wireEvidence (document capture phase) always populates top_combos_json before
        // interceptSaveForm serialises the form; so $evidenceDecoded is the most reliable
        // source when numbers_json / main_numbers fields are empty (which happens because
        // interceptSaveForm's stopPropagation() prevents skaiPrepareAiSave from running).
        if (empty($mainArr) && is_array($evidenceDecoded)) {
            // Step 1: detect daily game from evidence payload
            if (!$isDailyGamePosted) {
                if (!empty($evidenceDecoded['is_daily_game'])
                    || !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_chosen_combos'])) {
                    $isDailyGamePosted = true;
                    skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] isDailyGamePosted_recovered_from_evidence=1');
                }
            }
            // Step 2: extract main numbers and pre-populate $nums['daily_top_combo_strings']
            // so the $dailyDisplaySet builder below can use the existing code path.
            if ($isDailyGamePosted && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_chosen_combos']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_chosen_combos'])) {
                $__recoveredDisplays = [];
                foreach ($evidenceDecoded['daily_chosen_combos'] as $__dccRow) {
                    if (!is_array($__dccRow)) { continue; }
                    $__dccDisp = '';
                    if (!empty($__dccRow['display'])) {
                        $__dccDisp = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$__dccRow['display']);
                    } elseif (!empty($__dccRow['combo']) && is_array($__dccRow['combo'])) {
                        $__dccDisp = implode('', array_map('intval', $__dccRow['combo']));
                    } elseif (!empty($__dccRow['values'])) {
                        $__dccDisp = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$__dccRow['values']);
                    }
                    if ($__dccDisp !== '') { $__recoveredDisplays[] = $__dccDisp; }
                    if (count($__recoveredDisplays) >= 5) { break; }
                }
                if (!empty($__recoveredDisplays)) {
                    // Inject into $nums so the standard $dailyDisplaySet builder uses it
                    if (!is_array($nums)) { $nums = []; }
                    $nums['daily_top_combo_strings'] = $__recoveredDisplays;
                    // Set $mainArr from first combo digits for downstream range checks
                    $mainArr = $skaiParseDailyDisplayDigits((string)$__recoveredDisplays[0], $cfgPickResolved, $isDailySingleValuePosted);
                    skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] main_numbers_recovered_from_evidence=1 display=' . (string)$__recoveredDisplays[0]);
                }
            } elseif (!$isDailyGamePosted && !empty($evidenceDecoded['final_prediction_sets']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['final_prediction_sets'])) {
                $__fps0 = $evidenceDecoded['final_prediction_sets'][0] ?? [];
                if (!empty($__fps0['values']) && is_array($__fps0['values'])) {
                    $mainArr = array_map('intval', $__fps0['values']);
                    skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] main_numbers_recovered_from_fps_evidence=1');
                }
            }
        }


        $dailyDisplaySet = [];
        if ($isDailyGamePosted) {
            if (!empty($nums['daily_top_combo_strings']) && is_array($nums['daily_top_combo_strings'])) {
                foreach ($nums['daily_top_combo_strings'] as $dts) {
                    $dts = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$dts);
                    if ($dts !== '') { $dailyDisplaySet[] = $dts; }
                    if (count($dailyDisplaySet) >= 5) { break; }
                }
            }
            if (empty($dailyDisplaySet) && $dailyTopCombsStr !== '') {
                $dailySeed = json_decode($dailyTopCombsStr, true);
                if (is_array($dailySeed)) {
                    foreach ($dailySeed as $dailyRow) {
                        if (!is_array($dailyRow)) { continue; }
                        $dispRow = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)($dailyRow['display'] ?? $dailyRow['values'] ?? ''));
                        if ($dispRow !== '') { $dailyDisplaySet[] = $dispRow; }
                        if (count($dailyDisplaySet) >= 5) { break; }
                    }
                }
            }
            $tmpDailyCsv = trim((string)$in->getString('main_numbers_csv', ''));
            if ($tmpDailyCsv !== '') {
                $tmpDailyCsv = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', $tmpDailyCsv);
                if ($tmpDailyCsv !== '') {
                    $dailyDisplayMain = $tmpDailyCsv;
                }
            }
            if (empty($dailyDisplaySet) && !empty($mainArr) && is_array($mainArr)) {
                // [FIX-SKAI-COMBO-JOIN] Detect whether mainArr contains individual digit values
                // (e.g. [5, 0, 2] from an AI output that returned per-digit arrays) rather than
                // full combo strings (e.g. ['502', '183']). When all elements are single digits
                // (0-9), join them into one combo string so daily_top_picks_json is stored as
                // ['502'] not ['5','0','2']. The latter causes MyLottoExpert to compare single-digit
                // combos against multi-digit draw strings and report 0 hits for a correct prediction.
                $__skaiAllSingleDigits = true;
                foreach ($mainArr as $__smItem) {
                    if (is_array($__smItem) || is_object($__smItem)) { $__skaiAllSingleDigits = false; break; }
                    $__smStr = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$__smItem);
                    if (strlen($__smStr) !== 1) { $__skaiAllSingleDigits = false; break; }
                }
                if ($__skaiAllSingleDigits && count($mainArr) >= 2) {
                    // Individual digit values: join as one combo string
                    $__skaiJoined = implode('', array_map(function($d) { return (string)(int)$d; }, $mainArr));
                    if ($__skaiJoined !== '') { $dailyDisplaySet[] = $__skaiJoined; }
                } else {
                    foreach ($mainArr as $__dailyMainRow) {
                        if (is_array($__dailyMainRow) || is_object($__dailyMainRow)) { continue; }
                        $__dailyMainDisp = preg_replace('/[^0-9]/', '', (string)$__dailyMainRow);
                        if ($__dailyMainDisp !== '') { $dailyDisplaySet[] = $__dailyMainDisp; }
                        if (count($dailyDisplaySet) >= 5) { break; }
                    }
                }
            }
            if ($dailyDisplayMain === '' && !empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
                $dailyDisplayMain = (string)$dailyDisplaySet[0];
            }
            if (!empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
                $mainArr = array_values($dailyDisplaySet);
            }
        }

        // Helper: detect daily (0?9) games so 0 is allowed there only
        $isDaily = (function(array $cfg): bool {
            // Try common keys in your JSON config (tolerant)
            $maxMain = null;
            if (isset($cfg['rangeMainMax']))        $maxMain = (int)$cfg['rangeMainMax'];
            elseif (isset($cfg['mainNumbersMax']))  $maxMain = (int)$cfg['mainNumbersMax'];
            elseif (isset($cfg['lotteryConfig']['mainNumbersMax'])) $maxMain = (int)$cfg['lotteryConfig']['mainNumbersMax'];
            // Heuristic: daily games typically have max = 9
            return ($maxMain !== null && $maxMain <= 9);
        })($lotteryConfig ?? []);

        // Normalize with project rule: exclude 0 unless it's a daily game
        // CHG: Preserve input order (probability order) while de-duping.
        // Sorting (numeric) will be applied later only for non-SKAI saves.
        $norm = static function(array $a, bool $allowZero, bool $preserveDuplicates): array {
            $out  = [];
            $seen = [];

            foreach ($a as $v) {
                $n = (int) $v;

                if ($n === 0 && !$allowZero) {
                    continue; // exclude 0 for non-daily
                }
                if ($n < 0) {
                    continue;
                }

                if ($preserveDuplicates) {
                    $out[] = $n;
                } elseif (!isset($seen[$n])) {
                    $seen[$n] = true;
                    $out[]    = $n; // preserve original ordering
                }
            }

            return $out;
        };

        if ($isDailyGamePosted && !empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
            $mainArr = array_values($dailyDisplaySet);
        } else {
            // FIX: use $isDailyGamePosted as a second gate for allowZero so that daily
            // games whose config uses non-standard key names (and therefore $isDaily=false)
            // still preserve digit 0 in main and extra arrays.
            $mainArr  = $norm($mainArr,  $isDaily || $isDailyGamePosted, $isDailyGamePosted);
        }
        $extraArr = $norm($extraArr, $isDaily || $isDailyGamePosted, $isDailyGamePosted);

        // --- Strict validation against config (size, range, uniqueness) ---
        $pickSize = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['pickSize'] ?? $lotteryConfig['pickSize'] ?? 0);
        $mainMax  = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['mainNumbersMax'] ?? $lotteryConfig['mainNumbersMax'] ?? 0);
        $mainMin  = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['mainNumbersMin'] ?? $lotteryConfig['mainNumbersMin'] ?? 1);
        // $lotteryConfig is always [] at save time (loaded after the save handler).
        // Use $__saveHasExtra / $__saveExtraMax extracted from the master JSON in the
        // pre-save meta block above when available; fall back to $lotteryConfig otherwise.
        $__extraCfgKnown = isset($__saveHasExtra);
        $extraMax = $__extraCfgKnown
            ? (int)($__saveExtraMax ?? 0)
            : (int)($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['extraNumbersMax'] ?? $lotteryConfig['extraNumbersMax'] ?? 0);
        $extraMin = (int) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['extraNumbersMin'] ?? $lotteryConfig['extraNumbersMin'] ?? 1);
        $hasExtraCfg = $__extraCfgKnown
            ? (bool)$__saveHasExtra
            : (!empty($lotteryConfig['hasExtraBall']) || !empty($lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['hasExtraBall']));

        // Determine if this save is a SKAI pool-style prediction (top 20/5),
        // which should not be forced to match pickSize or the 2-extra limit.
        $sourceRaw  = (string) $in->getString('analysis_type', 'skip_hit');
        $sourceNorm = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', $sourceRaw) ?: 'skip_hit';
        $isSkaiPool = in_array($sourceNorm, ['skai_prediction', 'skai_ai'], true);

        // Clamp mins: daily games (by config OR by posted flag) allow digit 0.
        if ($mainMin <= 0) $mainMin = ($isDaily || $isDailyGamePosted) ? 0 : 1;
        if ($extraMin <= 0) $extraMin = ($isDaily || $isDailyGamePosted) ? 0 : 1;

        // Range filter (drop anything out of range)
        if ($isDailyGamePosted && !empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
            $mainArr = array_values($dailyDisplaySet);
        } else {
            $mainArr = array_values(array_filter($mainArr, function($n) use ($mainMin, $mainMax){
                if ($mainMax > 0) return ($n >= $mainMin && $n <= $mainMax);
                return ($n >= $mainMin);
            }));
        }
        $extraArr = array_values(array_filter($extraArr, function($n) use ($extraMin, $extraMax){
            if ($extraMax > 0) return ($n >= $extraMin && $n <= $extraMax);
            return ($n >= $extraMin);
        }));

        // Size checks (best-effort: allow save when not provided in config)
        // For SKAI pool saves (skai_prediction), we allow > pickSize (e.g. top 20 mains).
        if (!$isDailyGamePosted && !$isSkaiPool && $pickSize > 0 && count($mainArr) !== $pickSize) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] reason=pick_size_mismatch expected=' . (int)$pickSize . ' got=' . count($mainArr));
            if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason'      => 'pick_size_mismatch',
                    'message'     => 'We couldn\'t save: expected ' . $pickSize . ' main numbers, got ' . count($mainArr) . '.',
                    'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex, 'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal, 'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
                ]);
            }
            $app->enqueueMessage(
                'We couldn\'t save: expected ' . $pickSize . ' main numbers, got ' . count($mainArr) . '.',
                'error'
            );
            goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
        }
        if (!$isSkaiPool && !$isDailyGamePosted && $hasExtraCfg && $extraMax > 0) {
            // For standard non-SKAI saves with extras: use configured extra count, safe fallback if missing.
            $allowedExtraCount = 0;
            if (!empty($__extraCfgKnown) && isset($__saveLotCfgRow) && is_array($__saveLotCfgRow)) {
                $allowedExtraCount = (int) (
                    $__saveLotCfgRow['num_extra_balls_drawn']
                    ?? $__saveLotCfgRow['extra_ball_count']
                    ?? $__saveLotCfgRow['extraCount']
                    ?? $__saveLotCfgRow['numExtraBallsDrawn']
                    ?? 0
                );
            }
            if ($allowedExtraCount <= 0) {
                $allowedExtraCount = (int) (
                    $lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['num_extra_balls_drawn']
                    ?? $lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['extra_ball_count']
                    ?? $lotteryConfig['lotteryConfig']['extraCount']
                    ?? $lotteryConfig['num_extra_balls_drawn']
                    ?? $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count']
                    ?? $lotteryConfig['extraCount']
                    ?? 0
                );
            }
            if ($allowedExtraCount <= 0) {
                $allowedExtraCount = 2;
            }
            // Standard SKAI saves must persist the full trained extra payload.
            // For regular lotteries with extras in this SKAI pipeline, enforce 5.
            if ($isSkaiPool && $allowedExtraCount < 5) {
                $allowedExtraCount = 5;
            }
            if ($isSkaiPool && count($extraArr) < $allowedExtraCount) {
                skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] reason=too_few_extra_balls count=' . count($extraArr) . ' required=' . (int)$allowedExtraCount);
                if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                    $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                        'reason'      => 'too_few_extra_balls',
                        'message'     => 'We couldn\'t save: extra balls are incomplete (need ' . (int)$allowedExtraCount . ').',
                        'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex, 'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal, 'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
                    ]);
                }
                if (!$skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) { $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t save: extra balls are incomplete (need ' . (int)$allowedExtraCount . ').', 'error'); }
                goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
            }
            if (count($extraArr) > $allowedExtraCount) {
                skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] reason=too_many_extra_balls count=' . count($extraArr) . ' allowed=' . (int)$allowedExtraCount);
                if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                    $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                        'reason'      => 'too_many_extra_balls',
                        'message'     => 'We couldn\'t save: too many extra balls (max ' . (int)$allowedExtraCount . ').',
                        'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex, 'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal, 'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
                    ]);
                }
                if (!$skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) { $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t save: too many extra balls (max ' . (int)$allowedExtraCount . ').', 'error'); }
                goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
            }
        } else {
            // Drop extras for any save on games confirmed to have no extra ball.
            // When game config is known ($__extraCfgKnown=true, loaded from master JSON above),
            // apply the drop to ALL save types including SKAI pool saves, because we have a
            // reliable source of truth.  When config is unknown (file read failed), keep the
            // original SKAI pool save guard: posted extras may still be valid even though
            // $lotteryConfig is empty at save time.
            if (!$isDailyGamePosted && !$hasExtraCfg) {
                if (!empty($__extraCfgKnown) || !$isSkaiPool) {
                    $extraArr = [];
                }
            }
        }

        // --- Required checks (strict) ---
        if ((int)$user->id <= 0) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] reason=user_not_logged_in_post_guard');
            if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason'      => 'user_not_logged_in',
                    'message'     => 'You need to be signed in to save picks.',
                    'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex, 'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal, 'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
                ]);
            }
            if (!$skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) { $app->enqueueMessage('You need to be signed in to save picks.', 'error'); }
            goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
        }

        // --- Canonicalize number arrays ---
        // CHG: For SKAI pool saves, preserve probability order.
        // For all other saves, keep numeric canonical order to avoid '01' vs '1' mismatches.
        $canon = static function(array $arr, bool $preserveOrder, bool $preserveDuplicates): array {
            $arr = array_map('intval', $arr); // force integers

            if ($preserveDuplicates) {
                return array_values($arr);
            }

            if ($preserveOrder) {
                // De-dupe while preserving original order (most probable -> least probable)
                $out  = [];
                $seen = [];
                foreach ($arr as $n) {
                    if (!isset($seen[$n])) {
                        $seen[$n] = true;
                        $out[]    = $n;
                    }
                }
                return $out;
            }

            // Legacy behavior: de-dupe + numeric sort
            $arr = array_values(array_unique($arr));
            sort($arr, SORT_NUMERIC);
            return $arr;
        };

        $preserveProbabilityOrder = !empty($isSkaiPool); // already derived from analysis_type earlier
        if ($isDailyGamePosted && !empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
            $mainArr = array_values($dailyDisplaySet);
        } else {
            $mainArr  = $canon($mainArr,  $preserveProbabilityOrder, $isDailyGamePosted);
        }
        $extraArr = $canon($extraArr, $preserveProbabilityOrder, $isDailyGamePosted);

        // Rebuild CSVs from canonical arrays
        // Daily games use the top combo string set as the saved main_numbers mirror so
        // dashboard display and hit-check workflows can read the same canonical combo list.
        $mainCsv  = $isDailyGamePosted && !empty($dailyDisplaySet) ? implode(',', $dailyDisplaySet) : implode(',', $mainArr);
        $extraCsv = implode(',', $extraArr);

        // Resolve lottery_id robustly (POST ? config ? URL ? JSON by game_id/dbCol) BEFORE validating
        $lotteryId = skaiResolveLotteryId($lotteryConfig, $in, $masterJsonPath);

        if ((int)$lotteryId <= 0) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] reason=lottery_id_unresolved');
            if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason'      => 'lottery_id_unresolved',
                    'message'     => 'We couldn\'t resolve the lottery id for this page. Save aborted.',
                    'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex, 'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal, 'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
                ]);
            }
            if (!$skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) { $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t resolve the lottery id for this page. Save aborted.', 'error'); }
            goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
        }
        // [FIX] Try main_numbers_csv fallbackbefore blocking so saves using CSV-only
        // payloads (e.g. when numbers_json has empty arrays) are not rejected prematurely.
        if (empty($mainArr)) {
            $tmpMainCsv = preg_replace('/[^0-9,]/', '', trim((string)$in->getString('main_numbers_csv', '')));
            if ($tmpMainCsv !== '') {
                $mainArr = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $tmpMainCsv)), 'strlen'));
                // Re-apply normalization so zero-stripping rules are honoured
                $mainArr = $norm($mainArr, $isDaily || $isDailyGamePosted, $isDailyGamePosted);
                if (!empty($mainArr) && $mainMin >= 0 && $mainMax > 0) {
                    $mainArr = array_values(array_filter($mainArr, function($n) use ($mainMin, $mainMax) {
                        return $n >= $mainMin && $n <= $mainMax;
                    }));
                }
                if (!empty($mainArr)) {
                    $mainCsv = implode(',', $mainArr);
                    skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=csv_fallback_applied main_count=' . count($mainArr));
                }
            }
        }
        if (empty($mainArr)) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE BLOCKED] reason=empty_main_numbers_after_normalization');
            if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason'      => 'empty_main_numbers',
                    'message'     => 'No main numbers to save. Please build your set first.',
                    'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex, 'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal, 'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
                ]);
            }
            if (!$skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) { $app->enqueueMessage('No main numbers to save. Please build your set first.', 'error'); }
            goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
        }
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=normalized_payload lottery_id=' . (int)$lotteryId . ' main_count=' . count($mainArr) . ' extra_count=' . count($extraArr) . ' main_csv_len=' . strlen($mainCsv) . ' extra_csv_len=' . strlen($extraCsv));

        // Back-compat: if JSON failed/empty, allow explicit CSVs from POST
        if ($mainCsv === '' && ($tmp = trim((string)$in->getString('main_numbers_csv',''))) !== '') {
            $mainCsv = preg_replace('/[^0-9,]/', '', $tmp);
        }
        if ($extraCsv === '' && ($tmp = trim((string)$in->getString('extra_ball_numbers_csv',''))) !== '') {
            $extraCsv = preg_replace('/[^0-9,]/', '', $tmp);
        }
        // Rehydrate arrays from CSV (so downstream star_ball1/2 mapping still works)
        if ($mainCsv !== '' && empty($mainArr))  { $mainArr  = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $mainCsv)), 'strlen')); }
        if ($extraCsv !== '' && empty($extraArr)) { $extraArr = array_values(array_filter(array_map('intval', explode(',', $extraCsv)), 'strlen')); }


        // Draws analyzed priority: 1) count($mainHistory) if available; 2) DB meta rows_total; 3) request fallback
        if (isset($mainHistory) && is_array($mainHistory) && count($mainHistory) > 0) {
            $drawsAnalyzed = (int) count($mainHistory);
        } elseif (isset($skaiDbMeta['rows_total']) && (int)$skaiDbMeta['rows_total'] > 0) {
            $drawsAnalyzed = (int) $skaiDbMeta['rows_total'];
        } else {
            // Accept client hint if provided
            $drawsAnalyzed = (int) $in->getInt('draws_analyzed', 0);
        }

        // Knobs: best-effort from POST/DOM; align with your defaults
        $laplaceK   = (int) $in->getInt('laplace_k', (int)($lotteryConfig['laplace_k'] ?? 1));
        $skipWindow = (int) $in->getInt('bt_windows', 0);
        $autoTune   = (int) $in->getInt('bt_autotune', 0);
        $bestWindow = (int) $in->getInt('best_window', 0);
        $tunedWin   = (int) $in->getInt('tuned_window', 0);

        // Source passthrough (analysis type) with sanitization; default skip_hit
        $source = (string) $in->getString('analysis_type', 'skip_hit');
        $source = preg_replace('/[^a-z0-9_\-]/i', '', $source) ?: 'skip_hit';

        // --- Optional weights (0?100), clamp safely; ignore if missing ---
        $clamp01   = static function($v){ $v=(int)$v; return max(0, min(100, $v)); };
        $freqW     = $in->getString('freq_weight', null);      $freqW     = ($freqW!==null)     ? $clamp01($freqW) : null;
        $skipW     = $in->getString('skip_weight', null);      $skipW     = ($skipW!==null)     ? $clamp01($skipW) : null;
        $histW     = $in->getString('hist_weight', null);      $histW     = ($histW!==null)     ? $clamp01($histW) : null;
        $pbFreqW   = $in->getString('pb_freq_weight', null);   $pbFreqW   = ($pbFreqW!==null)   ? $clamp01($pbFreqW) : null;
        $pbSkipW   = $in->getString('pb_skip_weight', null);   $pbSkipW   = ($pbSkipW!==null)   ? $clamp01($pbSkipW) : null;
        $pbHistW   = $in->getString('pb_hist_weight', null);   $pbHistW   = ($pbHistW!==null)   ? $clamp01($pbHistW) : null;

        // --- Optional NN / analysis params (pass-through if provided) ---
        $epochs    = $in->getInt('epochs', null);
        $batchSize = $in->getInt('batch_size', null);
        $dropout   = $in->getString('dropout_rate', null);
        $learnRate = $in->getString('learning_rate', null);
        $actFn     = $in->getString('activation_function', null);
        $hidden    = $in->getInt('hidden_layers', null);
        $recDecay  = $in->getString('recency_decay', null);

        // MCMC-ish knobs (present on other modules; harmless here if absent)
        $walks     = $in->getInt('walks', null);
        $burnIn    = $in->getInt('burn_in', null);
        $decay     = $in->getString('decay', null);
        $chainLen  = $in->getInt('chain_len', null);

        // Misc flags
        $pureMode  = $in->getInt('pure_mode', null);
        $tuneUsed  = $in->getInt('tune_used', null);

        // SKAI-specific parameters (blend, temperature, diversity, etc.)
        // Canonical: ai_pct is the single source of truth; skip_pct is derived at runtime.
        $skaiBlendSkipPct   = null;
        $skaiBlendAiPct     = $in->getString('skai_blend_ai_pct', null);
        if ($skaiBlendAiPct !== null && $skaiBlendAiPct !== '') {
            $skaiBlendAiPct = (string) max(0, min(100, (int) $skaiBlendAiPct));
        }
        // Locked/Optimized Blend fields
        $skaiSelectedBlendAiPct  = $in->getString('skai_selected_blend_ai_pct', null);
        if ($skaiSelectedBlendAiPct !== null && $skaiSelectedBlendAiPct !== '') {
            $skaiSelectedBlendAiPct = (string) max(0, min(100, (int) $skaiSelectedBlendAiPct));
        }
        $skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct = $in->getString('skai_effective_blend_ai_pct', null);
        if ($skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct !== null && $skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct !== '') {
            $skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct = (string) max(0, min(100, (int) $skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct));
        }
        $skaiBlendOptimized  = (int) $in->getString('skai_blend_optimized', '0');
        $skaiAllowBlendOpt   = (int) $in->getString('skai_allow_blend_opt', '0');
        $samplingTemp       = $in->getString('sampling_temperature', null);
        $diversityPenalty   = $in->getString('diversity_penalty', null);
        $gapScale           = $in->getString('gap_scale', null);
        $skaiWindowSize     = $in->getInt('skai_window_size', null);
        $skaiRunMode        = $in->getString('skai_run_mode', null);
        $skaiTopNNumbers    = $in->getInt('skai_top_n_numbers', null);
        $skaiTopNCombos     = $in->getInt('skai_top_n_combos', null);

        // User selection: risk profile + strategy (sanitize input)
        $riskProfile = $in->getString('risk_profile', null);
        if ($riskProfile !== null) {
            $riskProfile = trim(strtolower((string)$riskProfile));
            if (!in_array($riskProfile, ['balanced', 'explorative', 'conservative'], true)) {
                $riskProfile = 'balanced';
            }
        }
        $strategy = $in->getString('strategy', null);
        if ($strategy !== null) {
            $strategy = trim(strtolower((string)$strategy));
            if (!in_array($strategy, ['ai', 'hybrid', 'skip'], true)) {
                $strategy = 'hybrid';
            }
        }

        // ============================================================
        // DIRECT-POST SAVE PATH (request-local, synchronous)
        // ------------------------------------------------------------
        // Saving must succeed from the submitted POST payload alone.
        // The session snapshot is now OPTIONAL enrichment only and must
        // never override a coherent form submission or block the insert.
        // ============================================================
        $saveGameId = (string) $in->getString('game_id', '');
        if ($saveGameId === '') { $saveGameId = (string) $in->getString('gameId', ''); }
        if ($saveGameId === '') { $saveGameId = (string) $in->getString('gid', ''); }
        if ($saveGameId === '') { $saveGameId = (string) $gameId; } // last resort: page-level $gameId
        $postedSnapshotRunUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('snapshot_run_uuid', ''));
        $snapshotKey           = 'skai.lastRunSnapshot.' . $saveGameId . '.' . (int)$user->id;
        $lastRunSnapshot       = $app->getUserState($snapshotKey, null);
        $useSnapshot           = false;

        if (is_array($lastRunSnapshot) && !empty($lastRunSnapshot)) {
            $snapshotRunUuid = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($lastRunSnapshot['run_uuid'] ?? ''));
            if ($postedSnapshotRunUuid !== '' && $snapshotRunUuid !== '' && hash_equals($snapshotRunUuid, $postedSnapshotRunUuid)) {
                $useSnapshot = true;
            } elseif ($postedSnapshotRunUuid === '' && $snapshotRunUuid === '') {
                $useSnapshot = true;
            } else {
                skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE] snapshot_ignored uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . $saveGameId . ' posted_run_uuid=' . $postedSnapshotRunUuid . ' snapshot_run_uuid=' . $snapshotRunUuid);
                if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                    error_log('[SKAI SAVE] snapshot_ignored uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . $saveGameId . ' posted_run_uuid=' . $postedSnapshotRunUuid . ' snapshot_run_uuid=' . $snapshotRunUuid);
                }
                $lastRunSnapshot = [];
            }
        }

        if (!is_array($lastRunSnapshot) || empty($lastRunSnapshot)) {
            $lastRunSnapshot = [];
        }

        if (!empty($isDebug)) {
            error_log('[SKAI SNAPSHOT LOAD] uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' gameId=' . $saveGameId . ' use_snapshot=' . ($useSnapshot ? '1' : '0') . ' snapshot_keys=' . implode(',', array_keys((array) $lastRunSnapshot)));
        }

        // Snapshot is enrichment only. Prefer the direct POST/request-local values.
        if ($useSnapshot) {
            if ((int) $skipWindow <= 0 && isset($lastRunSnapshot['skip_window'])) {
                $skipWindow = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['skip_window'];
            }
            if (!isset($autoTune) && isset($lastRunSnapshot['auto_tune'])) {
                $autoTune = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['auto_tune'];
            }
            if (!isset($tuneUsed) && isset($lastRunSnapshot['tune_used'])) {
                $tuneUsed = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['tune_used'];
            }
            if ((int) $skaiTopNCombos <= 0 && isset($lastRunSnapshot['top_n_combos'])) {
                $skaiTopNCombos = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['top_n_combos'];
            }
            if ((int) $skaiWindowSize <= 0 && (isset($lastRunSnapshot['skai_window']) || isset($lastRunSnapshot['window_size']))) {
                $skaiWindowSize = (int) ($lastRunSnapshot['skai_window'] ?? $lastRunSnapshot['window_size']);
            }
            if ((int) $drawsAnalyzed <= 0 && (($lastRunSnapshot['draws_used'] ?? 0) > 0)) {
                $drawsAnalyzed = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['draws_used'];
            }
            if ((string) $samplingTemp === '' && isset($lastRunSnapshot['sampling_temperature'])) {
                $samplingTemp = (string) (float) $lastRunSnapshot['sampling_temperature'];
            }
            if ((string) $diversityPenalty === '' && isset($lastRunSnapshot['diversity_penalty'])) {
                $diversityPenalty = (string) (float) $lastRunSnapshot['diversity_penalty'];
            }
            if ((string) $gapScale === '' && isset($lastRunSnapshot['gap_scale'])) {
                $gapScale = (string) (float) $lastRunSnapshot['gap_scale'];
            }
            if ((int) $laplaceK <= 0 && isset($lastRunSnapshot['laplace_k'])) {
                $laplaceK = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['laplace_k'];
            }
            if ((string) $skaiBlendAiPct === '' && (isset($lastRunSnapshot['blend_ai_pct']) || isset($lastRunSnapshot['blend_pct']) || isset($lastRunSnapshot['blend_skip_pct']))) {
                $snapBlendAiPct = null;
                if (isset($lastRunSnapshot['blend_ai_pct'])) {
                    $snapBlendAiPct = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['blend_ai_pct'];
                } elseif (isset($lastRunSnapshot['blend_pct'])) {
                    $snapBlendAiPct = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['blend_pct'];
                } elseif (isset($lastRunSnapshot['blend_skip_pct'])) {
                    $snapBlendAiPct = 100 - (int) $lastRunSnapshot['blend_skip_pct'];
                }
                $snapBlendAiPct   = max(0, min(100, (int) $snapBlendAiPct));
                $skaiBlendAiPct   = (string) $snapBlendAiPct;
                $skaiBlendSkipPct = null;
            }
            if ((int) $epochs <= 0 && isset($lastRunSnapshot['epochs'])) {
                $epochs = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['epochs'];
            }
            if ((int) $batchSize <= 0 && isset($lastRunSnapshot['batch_size'])) {
                $batchSize = (int) $lastRunSnapshot['batch_size'];
            }
        }
        // ============================================================
        // END DIRECT-POST SAVE PATH
        // ============================================================

        // [[SKAI_V64_REGEX_SAFE_CLOSED_LOOP_SETTINGS_SNAPSHOT_BRIDGE]]
        // Optional full runtime settings snapshot from the matching run snapshot.
        // This supplements settings_json so MyLottoExpert can learn from every
        // saved/scored setting, including future settings that do not yet have
        // individual DB columns. It is evidence metadata only.
        $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsSnapshot = [];
        $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsKeys = [];
        if ($useSnapshot && is_array($lastRunSnapshot)) {
            if (isset($lastRunSnapshot['settings_full']) && is_array($lastRunSnapshot['settings_full'])) {
                $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsSnapshot = $lastRunSnapshot['settings_full'];
            } elseif (isset($lastRunSnapshot['settings_snapshot']) && is_array($lastRunSnapshot['settings_snapshot'])) {
                $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsSnapshot = $lastRunSnapshot['settings_snapshot'];
            }
            if (isset($lastRunSnapshot['settings_snapshot_keys']) && is_array($lastRunSnapshot['settings_snapshot_keys'])) {
                $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsKeys = array_values(array_map('strval', $lastRunSnapshot['settings_snapshot_keys']));
            } elseif (!empty($skaiV60RuntimeSettingsSnapshot)) {
                $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsKeys = array_slice(array_keys($skaiV60RuntimeSettingsSnapshot), 0, 80);
            }
        }

        // NEW: Read explicit mode component keys
        $skaiModePrimary = $in->getString('skai_mode_primary', null);
        if ($skaiModePrimary !== null) {
            $skaiModePrimary = trim(strtolower((string)$skaiModePrimary));
            if (!in_array($skaiModePrimary, ['balanced', 'explorative', 'conservative'], true)) {
                $skaiModePrimary = null;
            }
        }
        $skaiModeMethod = $in->getString('skai_mode_method', null);
        if ($skaiModeMethod !== null) {
            $skaiModeMethod = trim(strtolower((string)$skaiModeMethod));
            if (!in_array($skaiModeMethod, ['ai', 'hybrid', 'skip'], true)) {
                $skaiModeMethod = null;
            }
        }
        $skaiModeRisk = $in->getString('skai_mode_risk', null);
        if ($skaiModeRisk !== null) {
            $skaiModeRisk = trim(strtolower((string)$skaiModeRisk));
            if (!in_array($skaiModeRisk, ['balanced', 'explorative', 'conservative'], true)) {
                $skaiModeRisk = null;
            }
        }

        // Build server-side combined display string (overrides client-sent value to prevent spoofing)
        $finalRunModeDisplay = 'hybrid'; // fallback
        if ($skaiModePrimary && $skaiModeMethod) {
            // Map enums to Title Case labels
            $primaryLabels = [
                'balanced' => 'Balanced',
                'explorative' => 'Wider Search',
                'conservative' => 'Safer Range',
            ];
            $methodLabels = [
                'ai' => 'AI-focused',
                'hybrid' => 'Balanced',
                'skip' => 'Skip Pattern',
            ];
            $primaryLabel = $primaryLabels[$skaiModePrimary] ?? 'Balanced';
            $methodLabel = $methodLabels[$skaiModeMethod] ?? 'Balanced';
            
            // Format: "<Primary> - <Method>"
            $finalRunModeDisplay = $primaryLabel . ' - ' . $methodLabel;
        }
        // Override the skai_run_mode with server-built value
        $skaiRunMode = $finalRunModeDisplay;

        // CHG: Read Pick3/Pick4/Daily game specific parameters
        $pickLength = $in->getInt('pick_length', null);
        $allowZero = $in->getInt('allow_zero', 0);
        $digitProbsJson = $in->getString('digit_probs_json', null);
        $settingsSummary = $in->getString('settings_summary', null);
        $comprehensiveSettingsJson = $in->getString('comprehensive_settings', null);

        // Compose a user-friendly label ONLY if one hasn't already been built upstream.
        // Prefer JSON "lotteryName", then legacy keys.
        // CHG: Use settings summary for label if available
        if (!empty($settingsSummary)) {
            $label = mb_substr($settingsSummary, 0, 190, 'UTF-8');
        } elseif (empty($label)) {
            $lotName = (string) ($lotteryConfig['lotteryName'] ?? $lotteryConfig['lottery_name'] ?? $lotteryConfig['game_name'] ?? 'Lottery');
            $dateNow = (new Date())->format('M j, Y');
            $label   = $labelInput !== '' ? $labelInput : ('SKAI - ' . $lotName . ' - ' . $dateNow);
        }

        // [[MLE_DRAW_TZ_FIX_2026]] Compute timestamps with lottery-timezone-aware priority.
        // Priority for DRAW TIMEZONE (target_draw_date / target_draw_at / target_timezone_id):
        //   1. Lottery-specific timezone from lotteryConfig or known draw-family defaults
        //   2. Site-configured timezone
        //   (User profile timezone is intentionally NOT used for draw-date authority)
        // $siteTz is still used for "now" timestamps (utc_epoch, user_local_datetime) and
        // for the cosmetic label only.

        // --- Resolve lottery draw timezone ---
        $lotteryTz = '';
        // 1a. From loaded lotteryConfig
        if (empty($lotteryTz)) {
            $lotteryTz = trim((string)($lotteryConfig['timezone_id'] ?? $lotteryConfig['draw_timezone'] ?? ''));
        }
        // 1b. Known draw-family defaults (game_id prefix match)
        if (empty($lotteryTz) && isset($selectedGameId)) {
            $__gidU = strtoupper((string)$selectedGameId);
            if (strncmp($__gidU, 'PB', 2) === 0 || strncmp($__gidU, 'POWERBALL', 9) === 0 ||
                strncmp($__gidU, 'MEGAMILLIONS', 12) === 0 || strncmp($__gidU, 'MEGA_MILLIONS', 13) === 0 ||
                strncmp($__gidU, 'MM', 2) === 0) {
                $lotteryTz = 'America/New_York';
            }
            unset($__gidU);
        }
        // 1c. Safe state/game fallback mapping when timezone metadata is missing.
        if (empty($lotteryTz)) {
            $__gidState = strtoupper((string)($selectedGameId ?? ''));
            $__lotNameState = strtoupper(trim((string)($lotteryConfig['lottery_name'] ?? $lotteryConfig['game_name'] ?? $lotteryConfig['name'] ?? '')));
            $__stateCode = '';
            if (preg_match('/^(CA|TX|FL|WA)[A-Z0-9_\-]*/', $__gidState, $__stateMatch)) {
                $__stateCode = (string)$__stateMatch[1];
            } elseif (strpos($__lotNameState, 'CALIFORNIA') !== false) {
                $__stateCode = 'CA';
            } elseif (strpos($__lotNameState, 'TEXAS') !== false) {
                $__stateCode = 'TX';
            } elseif (strpos($__lotNameState, 'FLORIDA') !== false) {
                $__stateCode = 'FL';
            } elseif (strpos($__lotNameState, 'WASHINGTON') !== false) {
                $__stateCode = 'WA';
            }
            $__stateTzMap = array(
                'CA' => 'America/Los_Angeles',
                'TX' => 'America/Chicago',
                'FL' => 'America/New_York',
                'WA' => 'America/Los_Angeles',
            );
            if ($__stateCode !== '' && isset($__stateTzMap[$__stateCode])) {
                $lotteryTz = (string)$__stateTzMap[$__stateCode];
            }
            unset($__stateTzMap, $__stateCode, $__gidState, $__lotNameState, $__stateMatch);
        }
        // Validate lottery timezone
        if ($lotteryTz !== '') {
            try { new \DateTimeZone($lotteryTz); } catch (\Throwable $__) { $lotteryTz = ''; }
        }

        // --- Resolve site timezone (for "now" display timestamps only) ---
        $userTz = null;
        try {
            $siteConfig = Factory::getConfig();
            $userTz = $siteConfig->get('offset', 'America/New_York');
        } catch (\Throwable $__) {
            $userTz = 'America/New_York';
        }
        // Validate site timezone
        try {
            $testTz = new \DateTimeZone($userTz);
        } catch (\Throwable $__) {
            $userTz = 'America/New_York';
        }

        // Use lottery timezone for draw-date calculations; site timezone for display timestamps
        $drawTz = ($lotteryTz !== '') ? $lotteryTz : $userTz;
        $siteTz = $userTz;
        $nowDate = new Date('now', $siteTz);
        $nowSql = $nowDate->toSql();
        
        // Store canonical UTC epoch (integer seconds)
        $utcEpoch = (int)$nowDate->toUnix();
        
        // Store user local datetime string (for dashboard display)
        $userLocalDatetime = $nowDate->format('Y-m-d H:i:s', true);
        
        // Store timezone identifier (IANA format) - records site TZ for dashboard
        $timezoneId = $siteTz;

        // --- Sanitize lengths (defensive; no schema changes) ---
        // label VARCHAR-ish: keep to ~190 chars to be index-safe
        if ($label !== '') { $label = mb_substr($label, 0, 190, 'UTF-8'); }
        // top_combos_json TEXT-ish: if the encoded blob exceeds 64 kB, null it out rather
        // than byte-truncating.  mb_substr at a byte boundary splits valid UTF-8 sequences
        // and always produces syntactically invalid JSON; every downstream json_decode call
        // on such a row returns null, permanently losing all evidence/combo display data.
        // Null is a safe value: callers already guard with !empty() or is_array() checks.
        if (!empty($evidenceJson) && mb_strlen($evidenceJson, '8bit') > 64000) {
            $evidenceJson = null;
        }

        // Optional next_draw_date/next_draw_at - prefer POST, then DB meta, then config; else NULL.
        // [[MLE_DRAW_TZ_FIX_2026]] Batch run full_settings_json target draw fields are authoritative.
        $nextDrawDateSql = (isset($nextDrawDateSql) && trim((string)$nextDrawDateSql) !== '')
            ? substr(trim((string)$nextDrawDateSql), 0, 10)
            : null;
        $nextDrawAtSql = (isset($nextDrawAtSql) && trim((string)$nextDrawAtSql) !== '')
            ? (string)$nextDrawAtSql
            : null;
        $skaiBatchTargetDraw = array(
            'has_valid_target_draw_date' => false,
            'target_draw_date' => null,
            'target_draw_at' => null,
            'target_draw_timezone' => null,
            'target_draw_label' => null,
            'target_draw_source' => null,
            'target_draw_resolution_note' => null,
            'target_draw_at_tz' => null,
        );
        $skaiSourceBatchRunId = (int)$in->getInt('source_batch_run_id', 0);
        $skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget = (int)$in->getInt('source_batch_id', 0);
        $skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget = (int)$in->getInt('source_batch_run_order', 0);
        $skaiPostedBatchIdForTarget = (int)$in->getInt('batch_id', 0);
        $skaiPostedBatchIndexForTarget = (int)$in->getInt('batch_save_index', 0);
        if ($skaiPostedBatchIndexForTarget <= 0) { $skaiPostedBatchIndexForTarget = (int)$in->getInt('batch_index', 0); }
        $skaiPostedBatchContextForTarget = ((int)$in->getInt('mle_skai_batch', 0) === 1);
        if ($skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget <= 0 && $skaiPostedBatchContextForTarget && $skaiPostedBatchIdForTarget > 0) {
            $skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget = (int)$skaiPostedBatchIdForTarget;
        }
        if ($skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget <= 0 && $skaiPostedBatchIndexForTarget > 0) {
            $skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget = (int)$skaiPostedBatchIndexForTarget;
        }
        // [[SKAI_BATCH_TARGET_FIX_2026_06_02]] Canonical lookup is batch_id + run_order only.
        // source_batch_run_id is NOT used as the primary path because in admin/hive/research
        // contexts it may contain a hive assignment id, not the mle_skai_batch_run primary key.
        // Using it as a primary path caused the wrong full_settings_json to be loaded, leaving
        // has_valid_target_draw_date false and the save falling back to the live resolver date.
        $skaiCanLookupByBatchRun = ($skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget > 0 && $skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget > 0);
        $skaiCanFallbackByRunId  = (!$skaiCanLookupByBatchRun && $skaiSourceBatchRunId > 0);
        if ($skaiCanLookupByBatchRun || $skaiCanFallbackByRunId) {
            try {
                $skaiRunTables = array_map('strtolower', array_keys((array)$db->getTableList()));
                $skaiRunTable  = strtolower(str_replace('#__', $db->getPrefix(), '#__mle_skai_batch_run'));
                if (in_array($skaiRunTable, $skaiRunTables, true)) {
                    $skaiRunQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->select(array($db->quoteName('full_settings_json'), $db->quoteName('batch_id')))
                        ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'));
                    if ($skaiCanLookupByBatchRun) {
                        $skaiRunQ
                            ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('run_order') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget)
                            ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC');
                    } else {
                        $skaiRunQ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchRunId);
                    }
                    $db->setQuery($skaiRunQ, 0, 1);
                    $skaiRunRow = $db->loadAssoc();
                    $skaiRunJson = ($skaiRunRow !== null) ? (string)($skaiRunRow['full_settings_json'] ?? '') : '';
                    // Secondary fallback: verify the loaded row belongs to the declared source batch
                    // when source_batch_id is known. Discard if batch_id does not match.
                    if ($skaiCanFallbackByRunId && $skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget > 0 && $skaiRunRow !== null) {
                        if ((int)($skaiRunRow['batch_id'] ?? 0) !== $skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget) {
                            $skaiRunJson = '';
                        }
                    }
                    if ($skaiRunJson !== '') {
                        $skaiRunSettings = json_decode($skaiRunJson, true);
                        if (json_last_error() === JSON_ERROR_NONE && is_array($skaiRunSettings)) {
                            $runTdd = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
                            if ($runTdd !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $runTdd) && strtotime($runTdd) !== false) {
                                $skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date'] = true;
                                $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_date'] = $runTdd;
                            }
                            $runTdtz = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_timezone'] ?? ''));
                            if ($runTdtz !== '') {
                                try {
                                    new \DateTimeZone($runTdtz);
                                    $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'] = $runTdtz;
                                } catch (\Throwable $__) {}
                            }
                            $runTdatTz = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_at_tz'] ?? ''));
                            if ($runTdatTz !== '') {
                                try {
                                    new \DateTimeZone($runTdatTz);
                                    $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at_tz'] = $runTdatTz;
                                } catch (\Throwable $__) {}
                            }
                            $runTda = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_at'] ?? ''));
                            if ($runTda !== '') {
                                try {
                                    $runAtTz = (string)($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at_tz'] ?? $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'] ?? $drawTz);
                                    $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at'] = (new Date($runTda, $runAtTz))->toSql();
                                } catch (\Throwable $__) {}
                            }
                            $runTdl = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_label'] ?? ''));
                            if ($runTdl !== '') {
                                $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_label'] = mb_substr($runTdl, 0, 191, 'UTF-8');
                            }
                            $runTds = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_source'] ?? ''));
                            if ($runTds !== '') {
                                $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_source'] = mb_substr($runTds, 0, 80, 'UTF-8');
                            }
                            $runTdrn = trim((string)($skaiRunSettings['target_draw_resolution_note'] ?? ''));
                            $__skaiTraceBatchDateSeen = ($runTdd !== '' ? str_replace('-', '_', substr($runTdd, 0, 10)) : 'missing');
                            $__skaiTraceLoadMode = $skaiCanLookupByBatchRun ? 'loaded_by_batch_id_run_order' : 'loaded_by_source_batch_run_id_fallback';
                            $__skaiTraceMarker = 'actual_live_file_marker_2026_06_02|' . $__skaiTraceLoadMode . '|batch_json_date_seen_' . $__skaiTraceBatchDateSeen;
                            $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_resolution_note'] = ($runTdrn !== '' ? ($runTdrn . ' | ') : '') . $__skaiTraceMarker;
                        }
                    } else {
                        $skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_resolution_note'] = 'actual_live_file_marker_2026_06_02|loaded_by_batch_id_run_order|batch_json_date_seen_missing|batch_json_missing_for_run_order';
                    }
                }
                unset($skaiCanLookupByBatchRun, $skaiCanFallbackByRunId, $skaiRunQ, $skaiRunRow, $skaiRunJson, $skaiRunSettings, $runTdd, $runTda, $runTdtz, $runTdl, $runTds, $runTdrn, $runTdatTz, $runAtTz, $skaiRunTable, $skaiRunTables);
            } catch (\Throwable $__) { /* ignore and use resolver fallback */ }
        }
        if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date'])) {
            $nextDrawDateSql = (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_date'];
            if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at'])) {
                $nextDrawAtSql = (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at'];
            } else {
                $nextDrawAtSql = null;
            }
            if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'])) {
                $drawTz = (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'];
            }
        } else {
            // 1) Prefer an explicit posted next_draw_date if present (for parity with other modules)
            $postedNext = trim((string) $in->getString('next_draw_date', ''));
            if ($postedNext !== '') {
                $postedNextDate = substr($postedNext, 0, 10);
                if (preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $postedNextDate) && strtotime($postedNextDate) !== false) {
                    $nextDrawDateSql = $postedNextDate;
                }
            }
        }

        // 2) Fallbacks from DB meta and config (only if authoritative batch date is missing/invalid)
        $ndd = $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_date'] ?? null;
        $nda = $skaiDbMeta['next_draw_at']   ?? null;
        if (empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date'])) {
            // [[MLE_DRAW_TZ_FIX_2026]] Parse next-draw timestamps using LOTTERY timezone ($drawTz),
            // not site/user timezone ($siteTz).  This prevents midnight-UTC rollover from shifting
            // the draw date forward when the server is UTC but the draw occurs in Eastern time.
            try {
                if ($nextDrawDateSql === null && !empty($ndd)) {
                    if (preg_match('/^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/', (string)$ndd, $__nm)) {
                        $nextDrawDateSql = $__nm[1];
                    } else {
                        $nextDrawDateSql = (new Date($ndd, $drawTz))->format('Y-m-d', true);
                    }
                    unset($__nm);
                } elseif ($nextDrawDateSql === null && !empty($lotteryConfig['next_draw_date'])) {
                    $__cfgNdd = (string)$lotteryConfig['next_draw_date'];
                    if (preg_match('/^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/', $__cfgNdd, $__nm)) {
                        $nextDrawDateSql = $__nm[1];
                    } else {
                        $nextDrawDateSql = (new Date($__cfgNdd, $drawTz))->format('Y-m-d', true);
                    }
                    unset($__cfgNdd, $__nm);
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* ignore; leave as NULL */ }

            // 3) Final fallback: proven backward scan in draw table
            if ($nextDrawDateSql === null && !empty($dbCol)) {
                try {
                    $fallbackNdd = getNextDrawDate($selectedGameId, $db, $dbCol);
                    if (!empty($fallbackNdd)) {
                        if (preg_match('/^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/', (string)$fallbackNdd, $__nm)) {
                            $nextDrawDateSql = $__nm[1];
                        } else {
                            $nextDrawDateSql = (new Date($fallbackNdd, $drawTz))->format('Y-m-d', true);
                        }
                        unset($__nm);
                    }
                } catch (\Throwable $__) { /* ignore */ }
            }
        }

        if ($nextDrawDateSql !== null) {
            $nextDrawDateSql = substr(trim((string)$nextDrawDateSql), 0, 10);
        }

        try {
            if (empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date']) && $nextDrawAtSql === null && !empty($nda)) {
                // Full timestamp for next_draw_at (DATETIME column) - use lottery TZ
                $nextDrawAtSql = (new Date($nda, $drawTz))->toSql();
            } elseif (empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date']) && $nextDrawAtSql === null && !empty($lotteryConfig['next_draw_at'])) {
                $nextDrawAtSql = (new Date($lotteryConfig['next_draw_at'], $drawTz))->toSql();
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $e) { /* ignore; leave as NULL */ }

                // Resolve draw_session with the same priority style as next_draw_*:
        // 1) POST draw_session (if client sends)
        // 2) DB meta draw_session
        // 3) NULL
        $drawSessionSql = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', substr(trim((string) $in->getString('draw_session', '')), 0, 40));
        if ($drawSessionSql === '' && !empty($skaiDbMeta['draw_session'])) {
            $drawSessionSql = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', substr((string) $skaiDbMeta['draw_session'], 0, 40));
        }
        if ($drawSessionSql === '') { $drawSessionSql = null; }

        // Canonical immutable draw target binding for this saved prediction.
        $predictionTarget = skaiBuildPredictionTarget([
            'game_id'            => $saveGameId !== '' ? $saveGameId : (string)$selectedGameId,
            'lottery_id'         => (int)$lotteryId,
            'draw_date'          => (string)($nextDrawDateSql ?? ''),
            'draw_at'            => $nextDrawAtSql,
            'draw_session'       => $drawSessionSql,
            'timezone_id'        => $drawTz,
            'prediction_family'  => $isDailyGamePosted ? 'daily' : 'regular',
            'prediction_type'    => $__predType ?? ($isDailyGamePosted ? 'daily' : 'regular'),
            'pick_size'          => $isDailyGamePosted ? (int)((isset($__dailyPickSizeRow) && $__dailyPickSizeRow !== null) ? $__dailyPickSizeRow : 0) : (int)count($mainArr),
            'extra_count'        => (int)count($extraArr),
        ]);
        $predictionTargetId   = (string)($predictionTarget['prediction_target_id'] ?? '');
        $predictionTargetKey  = (string)($predictionTarget['prediction_target_key'] ?? '');
        $predictionTargetJson = (string)($predictionTarget['prediction_target_json'] ?? '');
        $resolvedRunUuid      = $postedSnapshotRunUuid !== ''
            ? $postedSnapshotRunUuid
            : preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/', '', (string)($lastRunSnapshot['run_uuid'] ?? ''));

        // [[SKAI_V122_HIVE_LEARNING_CONTRACT]] Every saved SKAI prediction must have
        // a durable run identity so MyLottoExpert can ingest, score, and learn from it.
        // This is additive and does not change prediction math.
        if ($resolvedRunUuid === '') {
            try {
                if (function_exists('random_bytes')) {
                    $bytes = random_bytes(16);
                    $hex = bin2hex($bytes);
                    $resolvedRunUuid = substr($hex, 0, 8) . '-' . substr($hex, 8, 4) . '-' . substr($hex, 12, 4) . '-' . substr($hex, 16, 4) . '-' . substr($hex, 20, 12);
                } else {
                    $resolvedRunUuid = sprintf('%04x%04x-%04x-%04x-%04x-%04x%04x%04x', mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0x0fff)|0x4000, mt_rand(0,0x3fff)|0x8000, mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff), mt_rand(0,0xffff));
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $__v122UuidEx) {
                $resolvedRunUuid = 'skai-' . date('YmdHis') . '-' . substr(hash('sha256', (string)$user->id . '|' . (string)$saveGameId . '|' . microtime(true)), 0, 24);
            }
        }
        if ($postedSnapshotRunUuid === '') { $postedSnapshotRunUuid = $resolvedRunUuid; }

        // Build insert object (ONLY known columns) - deduped keys, sanitized values
 // CHG: Force canonical source for SKAI saves (prevents Heatmap branch on dashboard)
$source = 'skai_prediction';

// CHG: Build a comprehensive SKAI settings blob so dashboard can render -Run parameters-
// [[MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BRIDGE]] Optional MyLottoExpert Precision Lock batch tracking.
$skaiSourceBatchId       = (int) $in->getInt('source_batch_id', 0);
$skaiSourceBatchRunId    = (int) $in->getInt('source_batch_run_id', 0);
$skaiSourceBatchRunOrder = (int) $in->getInt('source_batch_run_order', 0);
if ($skaiSourceBatchId <= 0 && !empty($skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget)) { $skaiSourceBatchId = (int)$skaiSourceBatchIdForTarget; }
if ($skaiSourceBatchRunOrder <= 0 && !empty($skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget)) { $skaiSourceBatchRunOrder = (int)$skaiSourceBatchRunOrderForTarget; }
$skaiBatchControlFlag    = (int) $in->getInt('batch_control_flag', 0);
$skaiSourceBatchType     = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _\-]/', '', (string) $in->getString('source_batch_type', ''));
$skaiSourceBatchOrigin   = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string) $in->getString('source_batch_origin', ''));
$skaiBatchTestVariable   = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _\-\.]/', '', (string) $in->getString('source_batch_test_variable', ''));
$skaiBatchTestValue      = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9 _\-\.%]/', '', (string) $in->getString('source_batch_test_value', ''));
$skaiBatchTracking = [];
if ($skaiSourceBatchId > 0 || $skaiSourceBatchRunId > 0 || $skaiSourceBatchOrigin !== '') {
    $skaiBatchTracking = [
        'origin_source' => 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
        'source_batch_id' => $skaiSourceBatchId,
        'source_batch_run_id' => $skaiSourceBatchRunId,
        'source_batch_type' => $skaiSourceBatchType !== '' ? $skaiSourceBatchType : 'SKAI Precision Lock Batch',
        'source_batch_run_order' => $skaiSourceBatchRunOrder,
        'source_batch_origin' => $skaiSourceBatchOrigin !== '' ? $skaiSourceBatchOrigin : 'mle_precision_lock_batch',
        'batch_control_flag' => $skaiBatchControlFlag ? 1 : 0,
        'test_variable' => $skaiBatchTestVariable,
        'test_value' => $skaiBatchTestValue,
    ];
}

// [[SKAI_V122_HIVE_LEARNING_CONTRACT]] Canonical learning envelope for every SKAI save.
// This captures enough identity/settings/target metadata for the hive to track all future
// SKAI runs, whether they were launched by MyLottoExpert or manually from SKAI.
$skaiHiveQueueId = (int)$in->getInt('mle_research_queue_id', 0);
if ($skaiHiveQueueId <= 0) { $skaiHiveQueueId = (int)$in->getInt('hive_queue_id', 0); }
$skaiHiveAssignmentId = (int)$in->getInt('mle_research_assignment_id', 0);
if ($skaiHiveAssignmentId <= 0) { $skaiHiveAssignmentId = (int)$in->getInt('hive_assignment_id', 0); }
$skaiHiveResearchType = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$in->getString('mle_research_type', ''));
if ($skaiHiveResearchType === '') { $skaiHiveResearchType = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$in->getString('hive_research_type', '')); }
$skaiHiveSettingKey = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)$in->getString('mle_research_setting_key', ''));
if ($skaiHiveSettingKey === '') { $skaiHiveSettingKey = $skaiBatchTestVariable; }
$skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint = preg_replace('/[^a-fA-F0-9]/', '', (string)$in->getString('mle_settings_fingerprint', ''));
if ($skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint === '') { $skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint = preg_replace('/[^a-fA-F0-9]/', '', (string)$in->getString('hive_settings_fingerprint', '')); }
$skaiHiveGuidedMode = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$in->getString('mle_guided_mode', ''));
$skaiHiveCommandSource = preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-]/', '', (string)$in->getString('mle_command_source', ''));
$skaiHiveIntakeMode = 'observed_manual_skai';
if ($skaiHiveQueueId > 0 || $skaiHiveAssignmentId > 0 || $skaiHiveGuidedMode === 'required' || $skaiHiveCommandSource === 'mylottoexpert') {
    $skaiHiveIntakeMode = 'planned_hive_guided';
} elseif ($skaiBatchSaveMode || $skaiBatchSaveTotal > 0 || !empty($skaiBatchTracking)) {
    $skaiHiveIntakeMode = 'observed_skai_batch';
}
if ($skaiHiveResearchType === '') { $skaiHiveResearchType = ($skaiHiveIntakeMode === 'planned_hive_guided') ? 'guided_hive_research' : 'observed_skai_intake'; }
if ($skaiHiveSettingKey === '') { $skaiHiveSettingKey = 'complete_settings_snapshot'; }
$skaiHiveContractMissing = [];
$skaiHiveRequired = [
    'user_id' => (int)$user->id,
    'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
    'game_id' => (string)$saveGameId,
    'target_lottery_id' => (int)($predictionTarget['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0),
    'target_game_id' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
    'target_draw_date' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
    'prediction_target_id' => (string)$predictionTargetId,
    'prediction_target_key' => (string)$predictionTargetKey,
    'run_uuid' => (string)$resolvedRunUuid,
    'main_numbers' => (string)$mainCsv,
    'settings_available' => 1,
];
foreach ($skaiHiveRequired as $__hk => $__hv) {
    if ($__hv === null || $__hv === '' || $__hv === 0 || $__hv === '0') { $skaiHiveContractMissing[] = $__hk; }
}
$skaiHiveContractStatus = empty($skaiHiveContractMissing) ? 'hive_ready' : ((string)$mainCsv !== '' && (string)$resolvedRunUuid !== '' ? 'tracking_ready' : 'missing_required_fields');
$skaiHiveContract = [
    'version' => 'skai_hive_learning_contract_v122',
    'contract_status' => $skaiHiveContractStatus,
    'missing_fields' => $skaiHiveContractMissing,
    'hive_intake_mode' => $skaiHiveIntakeMode,
    'source' => 'skai_prediction',
    'origin_source' => !empty($skaiBatchTracking) ? 'mle_precision_lock_batch' : 'skai',
    'identity' => [
        'user_id' => (int)$user->id,
        'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
        'game_id' => (string)$saveGameId,
        'target_lottery_id' => (int)($predictionTarget['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0),
        'target_game_id' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_game_id'] ?? ''),
        'target_draw_date' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
        'target_draw_at' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_draw_at'] ?? ''),
        'target_draw_session' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_draw_session'] ?? ''),
        'target_timezone_id' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_timezone_id'] ?? ''),
        'prediction_target_id' => (string)$predictionTargetId,
        'prediction_target_key' => (string)$predictionTargetKey,
        'run_uuid' => (string)$resolvedRunUuid,
        'snapshot_run_uuid' => (string)$postedSnapshotRunUuid,
    ],
    'hive' => [
        'queue_id' => (int)$skaiHiveQueueId,
        'assignment_id' => (int)$skaiHiveAssignmentId,
        'research_type' => (string)$skaiHiveResearchType,
        'setting_key' => (string)$skaiHiveSettingKey,
        'settings_fingerprint' => (string)$skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint,
        'guided_mode' => (string)$skaiHiveGuidedMode,
        'command_source' => (string)$skaiHiveCommandSource,
    ],
    'batch_tracking' => $skaiBatchTracking,
    'save_state' => [
        'evaluation_status' => 'pending',
        'eligible_for_learning_after_scored_draw' => 1,
        'date_saved' => (string)$nowSql,
        'generated_at' => (string)$nowSql,
    ],
    'settings_summary' => [
        'profile' => $riskProfile ?? 'balanced',
        'strategy' => $strategy ?? 'hybrid',
        'skai_run_mode' => $skaiRunMode ?? null,
        'sampling_temperature' => $samplingTemp ?? null,
        'diversity_penalty' => $diversityPenalty ?? null,
        'gap_scale' => $gapScale ?? null,
        'skai_window_size' => $skaiWindowSize ?? null,
        'blend_ai_pct' => $skaiBlendAiPct ?? null,
    ],
];
$skaiHiveContractJson = json_encode($skaiHiveContract, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
$skaiHiveContractMissingJson = json_encode($skaiHiveContractMissing, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);

$skaiSettings = [
    'version' => 1,
    'analysis'     => 'SKAI',
    'profile'      => $riskProfile ?? 'balanced',
    'strategy'     => $strategy ?? 'hybrid',
    'summary'      => $settingsSummary ?? null,
    'prediction_target' => [
        'prediction_target_id'  => $predictionTargetId ?: null,
        'prediction_target_key' => $predictionTargetKey ?: null,
        'target_json'           => ($predictionTargetJson !== '' ? json_decode($predictionTargetJson, true) : null),
        'run_uuid'              => $resolvedRunUuid ?: null,
    ],
    
    // NEW: Explicit mode components for better tracking
    'skai_mode_primary' => $skaiModePrimary ?? ($riskProfile ?? 'balanced'),
    'skai_mode_method'  => $skaiModeMethod ?? ($strategy ?? 'hybrid'),
    'skai_mode_risk'    => $skaiModeRisk ?? ($riskProfile ?? 'balanced'),
    'skai_run_mode'     => $finalRunModeDisplay,
    
    'auto_tune'    => isset($autoTune) ? (int)$autoTune : null,
    'skip_window'  => ($skipWindow > 0) ? (int)$skipWindow : null,
    'best_window'  => !empty($bestWindow) ? (int)$bestWindow : null,
    'tuned_window' => !empty($tunedWin) ? (int)$tunedWin : null,
    'laplace_k'    => isset($laplaceK) ? (int)$laplaceK : null,
    
    'blend' => [
        'ai_pct'   => $skaiBlendAiPct ?? null,
    ],

    // weights
    'weights' => [
        'freq'    => $freqW   ?? null,
        'skip'    => $skipW   ?? null,
        'hist'    => $histW   ?? null,
        'pb_freq' => $pbFreqW ?? null,
        'pb_skip' => $pbSkipW ?? null,
        'pb_hist' => $pbHistW ?? null,
    ],

    // NN params
    'nn' => [
        'epochs'       => $epochs    ?? null,
        'batch_size'   => $batchSize ?? null,
        'dropout_rate' => $dropout   ?? null,
        'learning_rate'=> $learnRate ?? null,
        'activation_function' => $actFn ?? null,
        'hidden_layers'=> $hidden    ?? null,
        'recency_decay'=> $recDecay  ?? null,
    ],

    // Inference params (CHG: added so settings_json is a complete record matching individual columns)
    'sampling_temperature' => $samplingTemp    ?? null,
    'diversity_penalty'    => $diversityPenalty ?? null,
    'gap_scale'            => $gapScale         ?? null,
    'skip_gamma'           => null, // no dedicated DB col; tracked via blend

    // Digit game specifics
    'digit_game' => [
        'pick_length' => $pickLength ?? null,
        'allow_zero'  => $allowZero ? true : false,
    ],
    // [[SKAI_V64_REGEX_SAFE_CLOSED_LOOP_SETTINGS_SNAPSHOT_BRIDGE]] Complete runtime evidence snapshot.
    // MyLottoExpert v61 reads this nested section to map every setting area per lottery.
    'elite_settings_evidence' => [
        'schema' => 'skai_v61_closed_loop_settings_snapshot_v1',
        'source' => 'skai_run_snapshot_bridge',
        'run_uuid' => $resolvedRunUuid ?: null,
        'snapshot_run_uuid' => $postedSnapshotRunUuid ?: null,
        'snapshot_used' => !empty($useSnapshot) ? 1 : 0,
        'snapshot_keys' => $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsKeys,
        'runtime_settings' => $skaiV60RuntimeSettingsSnapshot,
    ],
    'batch_tracking' => $skaiBatchTracking,
    // [[SKAI_V122_HIVE_LEARNING_CONTRACT]] Embedded copy so MyLottoExpert can learn even if optional hive_* columns are absent.
    'hive_learning_contract' => $skaiHiveContract,
];

// Encode once here; DB insert step will keep it as string
$skaiSettingsJson = json_encode($skaiSettings, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);

// [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] Compute structured display fields for save/render parity
$__lNameForType = strtolower((string)($lotteryConfig['lotteryName'] ?? $lotteryConfig['lottery_name'] ?? $lotteryConfig['game_name'] ?? ''));
if (strpos($__lNameForType, 'powerball') !== false) {
    $__predType = 'powerball';
} elseif (strpos($__lNameForType, 'euro') !== false && strpos($__lNameForType, 'million') !== false) {
    $__predType = 'euromillions';
} elseif ($isDailyGamePosted) {
    $__ps = (int)($cfgPick ?: ($pickLength ?? 0) ?: count($mainArr));
    if ($__ps === 1) { $__predType = 'cash_pop'; }
    elseif ($__ps === 2) { $__predType = 'pick2'; }
    elseif ($__ps === 3) { $__predType = 'pick3'; }
    elseif ($__ps === 4) { $__predType = 'pick4'; }
    elseif ($__ps === 5) { $__predType = 'pick5'; }
    else { $__predType = 'daily'; }
} else {
    $__predType = 'regular';
}

$__dailyPickSizeRow    = $isDailyGamePosted ? (int)($cfgPick ?: ($pickLength ?? 0) ?: count($mainArr)) : null;
$__dailyPrimPredRow    = null;
$__dailyPrimPredDigits = null;
$__dailyTopPicksRow    = null;
$__dailyTopPickStrRow  = null;
$__dailyBonusDigRow    = null;
$__dailyInflDigRow     = null;
$__dailyDispPayload    = null;
$__dailyLearnPayload   = null;

if ($isDailyGamePosted) {
    // Primary prediction display string
    if (!empty($dailyDisplayMain)) {
        $__dailyPrimPredRow = (string)$dailyDisplayMain;
    } elseif (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_display'])) {
        $__dailyPrimPredRow = (string)$evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_display'];
    } elseif (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo'])) {
        $__dailyPrimPredRow = (string)$evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo'];
    } elseif (!empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
        $__dailyPrimPredRow = (string)$dailyDisplaySet[0];
    }

    // Primary prediction digits (JSON array)
    if (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_digits']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_digits'])) {
        $__dailyPrimPredDigits = json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_digits'])), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    } elseif (!empty($__dailyPrimPredRow)) {
        $__dailyPrimDigits = $skaiParseDailyDisplayDigits((string)$__dailyPrimPredRow, (int)$__dailyPickSizeRow, ((int)$__dailyPickSizeRow === 1));
        $__dailyPrimPredDigits = !empty($__dailyPrimDigits) ? json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $__dailyPrimDigits)), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null;
    }

    // Top picks (combo display strings, JSON array)
    if (!empty($dailyDisplaySet)) {
        $__dailyTopPicksRow = json_encode(array_values($dailyDisplaySet), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    } elseif (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_combo_strings']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_combo_strings'])) {
        $__dailyTopPicksRow = json_encode(array_values($evidenceDecoded['daily_combo_strings']), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    } elseif (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_top_combo_strings']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_top_combo_strings'])) {
        $__dailyTopPicksRow = json_encode(array_values($evidenceDecoded['daily_top_combo_strings']), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    }

    // Bonus digits (JSON array of ints)
    // [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] Read daily_bonus_digits first; fall back to daily_extra_digits
    // (the key written by skaiPrepareAiSave and the batch-save injection) before $extraArr.
