    if (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_bonus_digits']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_bonus_digits'])) {
        $__dailyBonusDigRow = json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_bonus_digits'])), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    } elseif (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_extra_digits']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_extra_digits'])) {
        $__dailyBonusDigRow = json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_extra_digits'])), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    } elseif (!empty($extraArr)) {
        $__dailyBonusDigRow = json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $extraArr)), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    }

    // Influential/ranked digits (JSON array of ints)
    if (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits']) && is_array($evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits'])) {
        $__dailyInflDigRow = json_encode(array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits'])), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
    }

    // Top pick strings with bonus (JSON array of strings like "123 + Bonus 03 07")
    $__topPicksForStr = !empty($dailyDisplaySet) ? array_values($dailyDisplaySet) : [];
    if (!empty($__topPicksForStr)) {
        $__bonusForStr = !empty($extraArr) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $extraArr)) : [];
        if (!empty($__bonusForStr)) {
            $__bonusDispForStr = array_map(static function($n) { $n=(int)$n; return ($n>=0&&$n<10)?('0'.$n):(string)$n; }, $__bonusForStr);
            $__bonusSuffixStr  = ' + Bonus ' . implode(' ', $__bonusDispForStr);
            $__dailyTopPickStrRow = json_encode(array_map(static function($s) use ($__bonusSuffixStr){ return $s . $__bonusSuffixStr; }, $__topPicksForStr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
        } else {
            $__dailyTopPickStrRow = json_encode($__topPicksForStr, JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
        }
    }

    // Daily display payload (canonical structured payload for rendering)
    $__dailyDispPayload = json_encode([
        'pick_size'          => $__dailyPickSizeRow,
        'primary_prediction' => $__dailyPrimPredRow,
        'top_picks'          => !empty($dailyDisplaySet) ? array_values($dailyDisplaySet) : [],
        'bonus_digits'       => !empty($extraArr) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $extraArr)) : [],
        'influential_digits' => (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits'])) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits'])) : [],
        'schema_version'     => 2,
    ], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);

    // Daily learning payload (preserve for calibration/learning/tracking - DO NOT REMOVE)
    $__dailyLearnPayload = json_encode([
        'pick_size'            => $__dailyPickSizeRow,
        'primary_prediction'   => $__dailyPrimPredRow,
        'top_picks'            => !empty($dailyDisplaySet) ? array_values($dailyDisplaySet) : [],
        'ranked_digits'        => (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits'])) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_ranked_digits'])) : [],
        'bonus_digits'         => !empty($extraArr) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $extraArr)) : [],
        'primary_combo_digits' => (is_array($evidenceDecoded) && !empty($evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_digits'])) ? array_values(array_map('intval', $evidenceDecoded['daily_primary_combo_digits'])) : [],
        'schema_version'       => 2,
    ], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE);
}

// [[SKAI_PLAYABLE_SAVE_COUNT_RESTORE_V1_2026_05_26]]
// Final display pool fallback: if JS did not send separate display pools, use playable arrays.
if (empty($__regularMainDisplayArr) && !empty($mainArr)) { $__regularMainDisplayArr = $mainArr; }
if (empty($__regularExtraDisplayArr) && !empty($extraArr)) { $__regularExtraDisplayArr = $extraArr; }
$__regularMainDisplayArr = array_values(array_slice(array_map('intval', is_array($__regularMainDisplayArr) ? $__regularMainDisplayArr : []), 0, 20));
$__regularExtraDisplayArr = array_values(array_slice(array_map('intval', is_array($__regularExtraDisplayArr) ? $__regularExtraDisplayArr : []), 0, 5));

// [[MLE_DRAW_TZ_FIX_2026]] Compute human-readable draw label with official lottery timezone abbreviation.
// Mirrors mylottoexpertResolveOfficialDrawTarget() label logic so direct SKAI saves display the same format.
$__skaiDrawLabel = '';
$__skaiDrawLabelDate = (string)($predictionTarget['target_draw_date'] ?? $nextDrawDateSql ?? '');
if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_label'])) {
    $__skaiDrawLabel = (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_label'];
} elseif ($__skaiDrawLabelDate !== '') {
    try {
        $__dtLabel = new \Joomla\CMS\Date\Date($__skaiDrawLabelDate . ' 00:00:00', $drawTz);
        $__tzAbbrMap = array(
            'America/New_York'    => 'ET',
            'America/Chicago'     => 'CT',
            'America/Denver'      => 'MT',
            'America/Phoenix'     => 'MT',
            'America/Los_Angeles' => 'PT',
            'America/Anchorage'   => 'AKT',
            'Pacific/Honolulu'    => 'HT',
        );
        $__tzDisplay = isset($__tzAbbrMap[$drawTz]) ? $__tzAbbrMap[$drawTz] : $drawTz;
        $__skaiDrawLabel = 'Draw: ' . $__dtLabel->format('M j, Y', true) . ' ' . $__tzDisplay;
    } catch (\Throwable $__) {
        $__skaiDrawLabel = 'Draw: ' . $__skaiDrawLabelDate;
    }
}
$__skaiDrawSource = !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_source'])
    ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_source']
    : 'lottery_timezone_resolver';
$__skaiDrawResolutionNote = !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_resolution_note'])
    ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_resolution_note']
    : (isset($lotteryTz) && $lotteryTz !== '' ? 'resolved_from_lottery_config' : (isset($drawTz) ? 'resolved_from_draw_family_or_site_fallback' : 'unknown'));
if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date'])) {
    $__skaiDrawSource = 'batch_json_preserved';
    if (strpos($__skaiDrawResolutionNote, 'preserved_from_batch_full_settings_json') === false) {
        $__skaiDrawResolutionNote = trim($__skaiDrawResolutionNote) !== ''
            ? ($__skaiDrawResolutionNote . ' | preserved_from_batch_full_settings_json')
            : 'preserved_from_batch_full_settings_json';
    }
}
$__skaiTargetDrawDateRow = !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date'])
    ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_date']
    : ($predictionTarget['target_draw_date'] ?? null);
$__skaiTargetDrawAtRow = !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['has_valid_target_draw_date'])
    ? (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at']) ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at'] : null)
    : ($predictionTarget['target_draw_at'] ?? null);
$__skaiTargetDrawTimezoneRow = !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'])
    ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone']
    : (isset($drawTz) ? $drawTz : ($predictionTarget['target_timezone_id'] ?? null));

// [[SKAI_BATCH_TARGET_FINAL_OVERRIDE_2026_06_02]]
// Final guard immediately before row mapping: if batch full_settings_json carries a valid
// target_draw_date, force canonical persisted target_draw_* fields from that batch payload.
$__skaiFinalTargetDrawDateRow = $__skaiTargetDrawDateRow;
$__skaiFinalTargetDrawAtRow = $__skaiTargetDrawAtRow;
$__skaiFinalTargetDrawTimezoneRow = $__skaiTargetDrawTimezoneRow;
$__skaiFinalDrawLabel = $__skaiDrawLabel;
$__skaiFinalDrawSource = $__skaiDrawSource;
$__skaiFinalDrawResolutionNote = $__skaiDrawResolutionNote;
$__skaiBatchFinalDate = trim((string)($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_date'] ?? ''));
if ($__skaiBatchFinalDate !== '' && preg_match('/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/', $__skaiBatchFinalDate) && strtotime($__skaiBatchFinalDate) !== false) {
    $__skaiFinalTargetDrawDateRow = $__skaiBatchFinalDate;
    $__skaiFinalTargetDrawAtRow = !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at']) ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at'] : null;
    if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'])) {
        $__skaiFinalTargetDrawTimezoneRow = (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_timezone'];
    }
    if (!empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_label'])) {
        $__skaiFinalDrawLabel = (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_label'];
    }
    $__skaiFinalDrawSource = 'batch_json_preserved';
    $__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote = trim((string)($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_resolution_note'] ?? $__skaiFinalDrawResolutionNote));
    if (strpos($__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote, 'preserved_from_batch_full_settings_json') === false) {
        $__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote = $__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote !== ''
            ? ($__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote . ' | preserved_from_batch_full_settings_json')
            : 'preserved_from_batch_full_settings_json';
    }
    $__skaiFinalDrawResolutionNote = $__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote;
}
unset($__skaiBatchFinalDate, $__skaiBatchBaseResolutionNote);

$row = (object) [
    'user_id'             => (int) $user->id,
    'lottery_id'          => (int) $lotteryId,
    'main_numbers'        => (string) $mainCsv,
    'extra_ball_numbers'  => (string) $extraCsv,

    // If present, also map first two extras to star_ball1/2 (EuroMillions-style)
    'star_ball1'          => isset($extraArr[0]) ? (string)$extraArr[0] : null,
    'star_ball2'          => isset($extraArr[1]) ? (string)$extraArr[1] : null,

    'source'              => (string) $source,
    // Make direct SKAI saves visible to MyLottoExpert pending/active evidence queries
    // on sites where save_intent exists and is used to separate prediction archives
    // from manual play sets.
    'save_intent'         => 'prediction_archive',
    'play_status'         => 'draft',
    'evaluation_status'   => 'pending',
    'label'               => (string) $label,
    'prediction_target_id' => ($predictionTargetId !== '' ? $predictionTargetId : null),
    'prediction_target_key' => ($predictionTargetKey !== '' ? $predictionTargetKey : null),
    'prediction_target_json' => ($predictionTargetJson !== '' ? $predictionTargetJson : null),
    'target_game_id'      => ($predictionTarget['target_game_id'] ?? null),
    'target_lottery_id'   => ($predictionTarget['target_lottery_id'] ?? null),
    'target_draw_date'    => $__skaiFinalTargetDrawDateRow,
    'target_draw_at'      => $__skaiFinalTargetDrawAtRow,
    'target_draw_session' => ($predictionTarget['target_draw_session'] ?? null),
    'target_timezone_id'  => ($predictionTarget['target_timezone_id'] ?? null),
    // [[MLE_DRAW_TZ_FIX_2026]] Traceability fields - written to row when columns exist
    'target_draw_timezone'        => $__skaiFinalTargetDrawTimezoneRow,
    'target_draw_at_tz'           => !empty($skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at_tz']) ? (string)$skaiBatchTargetDraw['target_draw_at_tz'] : null,
    'target_draw_label'           => ($__skaiFinalDrawLabel !== '' ? $__skaiFinalDrawLabel : null),
    'target_draw_source'          => ($__skaiFinalDrawSource !== '' ? $__skaiFinalDrawSource : null),
    'target_draw_resolution_note' => ($__skaiFinalDrawResolutionNote !== '' ? $__skaiFinalDrawResolutionNote : null),
    'target_prediction_family' => ($predictionTarget['target_prediction_family'] ?? null),
    'target_prediction_type' => ($predictionTarget['target_prediction_type'] ?? null),
    'target_pick_size'    => ($predictionTarget['target_pick_size'] ?? null),
    'target_extra_count'  => ($predictionTarget['target_extra_count'] ?? null),
    'run_uuid'            => ($resolvedRunUuid !== '' ? $resolvedRunUuid : null),
    'snapshot_run_uuid'   => ($postedSnapshotRunUuid !== '' ? $postedSnapshotRunUuid : null),

    // CHG: Persist SKAI settings for dashboard display
    'settings_json'       => $skaiSettingsJson,

    // [[MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BRIDGE]] Persist batch identity when SKAI is launched from MyLottoExpert.
    // [[CANONICAL_METHOD_IDENTITY]] Direct SKAI saves must be classified as SKAI, not Core AI/legacy Neural AI.
    'analysis_method_key'     => 'skai',
    'analysis_engine_label'   => 'SKAI',
    'analysis_track_label'    => 'SKAI Precision Track',
    'analysis_source_page'    => 'skai',
    'analysis_schema_version' => '1',

    'origin_source'          => !empty($skaiBatchTracking) ? 'mle_precision_lock_batch' : 'skai',
    // [[SKAI_V122_HIVE_LEARNING_CONTRACT]] Persist contract fields when additive columns exist.
    'hive_learning_contract_version' => 'v122',
    'hive_intake_mode'               => $skaiHiveIntakeMode,
    'hive_queue_id'                  => ($skaiHiveQueueId > 0 ? $skaiHiveQueueId : null),
    'hive_assignment_id'             => ($skaiHiveAssignmentId > 0 ? $skaiHiveAssignmentId : null),
    'hive_research_type'             => ($skaiHiveResearchType !== '' ? $skaiHiveResearchType : null),
    'hive_setting_key'               => ($skaiHiveSettingKey !== '' ? $skaiHiveSettingKey : null),
    'hive_settings_fingerprint'      => ($skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint !== '' ? strtolower($skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint) : null),
    'hive_contract_status'           => $skaiHiveContractStatus,
    'hive_contract_json'             => $skaiHiveContractJson,
    'hive_contract_missing_json'     => $skaiHiveContractMissingJson,
    'source_batch_id'        => ($skaiSourceBatchId > 0 ? $skaiSourceBatchId : null),
    'source_batch_run_id'    => ($skaiSourceBatchRunId > 0 ? $skaiSourceBatchRunId : null),
    'source_batch_type'      => ($skaiSourceBatchType !== '' ? $skaiSourceBatchType : (!empty($skaiBatchTracking) ? 'SKAI Precision Lock Batch' : null)),
    'source_batch_run_order' => ($skaiSourceBatchRunOrder > 0 ? $skaiSourceBatchRunOrder : null),
    'source_batch_origin'    => ($skaiSourceBatchOrigin !== '' ? $skaiSourceBatchOrigin : (!empty($skaiBatchTracking) ? 'mle_precision_lock_batch' : null)),
    'batch_control_flag'     => ($skaiBatchControlFlag ? 1 : 0),
    'source_batch_test_variable' => ($skaiBatchTestVariable !== '' ? $skaiBatchTestVariable : null),
    'source_batch_test_value'    => ($skaiBatchTestValue !== '' ? $skaiBatchTestValue : null),

    'top_combos_json'     => $evidenceJson, // may be NULL if malformed earlier
    'date_saved'          => $nowSql,
    'generated_at'        => $nowSql,
    'draws_analyzed'      => ($drawsAnalyzed > 0) ? (int)$drawsAnalyzed : null,
    // For compatibility with dashboard filters that expect both fields
    'draws_used'          => ($drawsAnalyzed > 0) ? (int)$drawsAnalyzed : null,
    'next_draw_date'      => $nextDrawDateSql,
    'next_draw_at'        => $nextDrawAtSql,

    // Session label if available
    'draw_session'        => $drawSessionSql,

    // Skip/Auto-Tune knobs (persist only when provided)
    // (kept ONCE here - duplicates removed)
    'laplace_k'           => isset($laplaceK)   ? (int)$laplaceK   : null,
    'skip_window'         => ($skipWindow > 0)  ? (int)$skipWindow : null,
    'auto_tune'           => isset($autoTune)   ? (int)$autoTune   : null,
    'best_window'         => !empty($bestWindow) ? (int)$bestWindow : null,
    'tuned_window'        => !empty($tunedWin)   ? (int)$tunedWin   : null,

    // MCMC / analysis knobs
    'walks'               => $walks     ?? null,
    'burn_in'             => $burnIn    ?? null,
    'decay'               => $decay     ?? null,
    'chain_len'           => $chainLen  ?? null,

    // Weights (0-100)
    'freq_weight'         => $freqW   ?? null,
    'skip_weight'         => $skipW   ?? null,
    'hist_weight'         => $histW   ?? null,
    'pb_freq_weight'      => $pbFreqW ?? null,
    'pb_skip_weight'      => $pbSkipW ?? null,
    'pb_hist_weight'      => $pbHistW ?? null,

    // NN params (if the page posts them; harmless for Skip/Hit)
    'epochs'              => $epochs    ?? null,
    'batch_size'          => $batchSize ?? null,
    'dropout_rate'        => $dropout   ?? null,
    'learning_rate'       => $learnRate ?? null,
    'activation_function' => $actFn     ?? null,
    'hidden_layers'       => $hidden    ?? null,
    'recency_decay'       => $recDecay  ?? null,

    // Flags
    'pure_mode'           => $pureMode ?? null,
    'tune_used'           => $tuneUsed ?? null,

    // SKAI-specific parameters (blend, temperature, diversity, etc.)
    'skai_blend_skip_pct'     => null,
    'skai_blend_ai_pct'       => $skaiBlendAiPct     ?? null,
    // Locked/Optimized Blend data model
    'skai_selected_blend_ai_pct'  => $skaiSelectedBlendAiPct  ?? $skaiBlendAiPct ?? null,
    'skai_effective_blend_ai_pct' => $skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct ?? $skaiBlendAiPct ?? null,
    'skai_blend_optimized'        => $skaiBlendOptimized      ?? 0,
    'skai_allow_blend_opt'        => $skaiAllowBlendOpt       ?? 0,
    'sampling_temperature'    => $samplingTemp       ?? null,
    'diversity_penalty'       => $diversityPenalty   ?? null,
    'gap_scale'               => $gapScale           ?? null,
    'skai_window_size'        => $skaiWindowSize     ?? null,
    'skai_run_mode'           => $skaiRunMode        ?? null,
    'skai_top_n_numbers'      => $skaiTopNNumbers    ?? null,
    'skai_top_n_combos'       => $skaiTopNCombos     ?? null,

    // User selection: risk profile + strategy
    'risk_profile'            => $riskProfile        ?? null,
    'strategy'                => $strategy           ?? null,

    // Timezone-aware timestamps
    'utc_epoch'               => $utcEpoch           ?? null,
    'user_local_datetime'     => $userLocalDatetime  ?? null,
    'timezone_id'             => $timezoneId         ?? null,

    // Progress tracking (initialized to null, will be updated during computation)
    'progress_stage'          => 0,
    'progress_label'          => 'Saved',

    // CHG: Persist digit probabilities for Pick3/Pick4/Daily games
    'digit_probabilities' => !empty($digitProbsJson) ? $digitProbsJson : null,

    // [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] Structured display/save fields for render parity
    'save_schema_version'            => 2,
    'prediction_family'              => $isDailyGamePosted ? 'daily' : 'regular',
    'prediction_type'                => $__predType,
    'render_mode'                    => $isDailyGamePosted ? 'daily_combos' : 'regular_main_extra',
    'main_display_json'              => (!$isDailyGamePosted && !empty($__regularMainDisplayArr)) ? json_encode(array_values($__regularMainDisplayArr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : (!empty($mainArr) ? json_encode(array_values($mainArr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null),
    'extra_display_json'             => (!$isDailyGamePosted && !empty($__regularExtraDisplayArr)) ? json_encode(array_values($__regularExtraDisplayArr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : (!empty($extraArr) ? json_encode(array_values($extraArr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null),
    'canonical_main_display'         => ($mainCsv !== '') ? (string)$mainCsv : null,
    'canonical_extra_display'        => !empty($extraCsv) ? (string)$extraCsv : null,
    'prediction_extra_display_count' => !empty($extraArr) ? count($extraArr) : 0,
    'regular_main_numbers_json'      => (!$isDailyGamePosted && !empty($__regularMainDisplayArr)) ? json_encode(array_values($__regularMainDisplayArr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
    'regular_extra_numbers_json'     => (!$isDailyGamePosted && !empty($__regularExtraDisplayArr)) ? json_encode(array_values($__regularExtraDisplayArr), JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) : null,
    'daily_pick_size'                => $__dailyPickSizeRow,
    'daily_primary_prediction'       => $__dailyPrimPredRow,
    'daily_primary_prediction_json'  => $__dailyPrimPredDigits,
    'daily_top_picks_json'           => $__dailyTopPicksRow,
    'daily_top_pick_strings_json'    => $__dailyTopPickStrRow,
    'daily_bonus_digits_json'        => $__dailyBonusDigRow,
    'daily_influential_digits_json'  => $__dailyInflDigRow,
    'daily_display_payload_json'     => $__dailyDispPayload,
    'daily_learning_payload_json'    => $__dailyLearnPayload,
    'renderer_hint'                  => $isDailyGamePosted ? 'daily_combos' : 'regular_balls',
    'display_variant'                => $isDailyGamePosted
        ? ('daily_' . ($__predType !== 'daily' ? $__predType : 'pick'))
        : ($__predType !== 'regular' ? $__predType : 'regular_lottery'),
    'canonical_display_string'       => $isDailyGamePosted
        ? ('Pick ' . (string)($__dailyPickSizeRow ?: '?') . ' - Top 5 Combos' . (!empty($extraArr) ? ' + Bonus' : ''))
        : (count($mainArr) . ' main' . (!empty($extraArr) ? ' + ' . count($extraArr) . ' bonus' : '')),
];

        // [[SKAI_MLE_BATCH_SAVE_STRICT_VALIDATION]]
        // In MyLottoExpert batch mode, block loose rows unless the posted batch context
        // resolves to a real batch header + run row with matching lottery context.
        if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
            $skaiBatchValidationFail = '';
            $skaiHeaderLotteryId = 0;
            $skaiSavedLotteryId = (int)($row->lottery_id ?? 0);
            $skaiTargetLotteryId = (int)($predictionTarget['target_lottery_id'] ?? 0);
            if ($skaiSourceBatchId <= 0 || $skaiSourceBatchRunOrder < 1 || $skaiSourceBatchRunOrder > 9) {
                $skaiBatchValidationFail = 'batch_context_missing';
            } else {
                try {
                    $skaiMleHeaderQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->select(array($db->quoteName('id'), $db->quoteName('lottery_id')))
                        ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
                        ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId)
                        ->setLimit(1);
                    $db->setQuery($skaiMleHeaderQ);
                    $skaiMleHeaderRow = $db->loadAssoc();
                    if (!is_array($skaiMleHeaderRow) || empty($skaiMleHeaderRow)) {
                        $skaiBatchValidationFail = 'batch_context_missing';
                    } else {
                        $skaiHeaderLotteryId = (int)($skaiMleHeaderRow['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                        if (
                            $skaiHeaderLotteryId <= 0
                            || ($skaiSavedLotteryId > 0 && $skaiSavedLotteryId !== $skaiHeaderLotteryId)
                            || ($skaiTargetLotteryId > 0 && $skaiTargetLotteryId !== $skaiHeaderLotteryId)
                        ) {
                            $skaiBatchValidationFail = 'batch_lottery_mismatch';
                        } else {
                            $skaiMleRunQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                                ->select($db->quoteName('id'))
                                ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                                ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId)
                                ->where($db->quoteName('run_order') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchRunOrder)
                                ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                                ->setLimit(1);
                            $db->setQuery($skaiMleRunQ);
                            $skaiMleRunId = (int)$db->loadResult();
                            if ($skaiMleRunId <= 0) {
                                $skaiBatchValidationFail = 'batch_run_missing';
                            }
                        }
                    }
                } catch (\Throwable $__skaiMleBatchValidationEx) {
                    $skaiBatchValidationFail = 'batch_context_missing';
                }
            }
            if ($skaiBatchValidationFail !== '') {
                skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE BLOCKED] reason=' . $skaiBatchValidationFail . ' uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' batch_id=' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId . ' run_order=' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchRunOrder . ' saved_lottery_id=' . (int)$skaiSavedLotteryId . ' target_lottery_id=' . (int)$skaiTargetLotteryId . ' header_lottery_id=' . (int)$skaiHeaderLotteryId);
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason' => (string)$skaiBatchValidationFail,
                    'batch_index' => (int)$skaiBatchSaveIndex,
                    'batch_total' => (int)$skaiBatchSaveTotal,
                    'batch_label' => (string)$skaiBatchSaveLabel
                ]);
            }
        }

        // Normalize: convert empty strings to NULL to avoid '' in nullable columns
        foreach ($row as $k => $v) {
            if ($v === '') { $row->$k = null; }
        }


        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=pre_transaction source=' . (string)$source . ' drawsAnalyzed=' . (int)$drawsAnalyzed);
        // --- Atomic insert (transaction) ---
        try {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=transaction_start');
            $db->transactionStart();
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=transaction_started');

            // 1) Hard-map IDs: ensure lottery_id is set (schema uses lottery_id)
            if (!isset($row->lottery_id) || (int)$row->lottery_id === 0) {
                $lotteryIdFromCfg = (int)($lotteryConfig['lottery_id'] ?? 0);
                $row->lottery_id  = (int)($row->lottery_id ?? 0);
                if ($row->lottery_id === 0 && $lotteryIdFromCfg > 0) {
                    $row->lottery_id = $lotteryIdFromCfg;
                }
            }
            if (isset($row->game_id)) {
                unset($row->game_id); // prevent 1054 from unknown column in this table
            }

            // [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] Ensure new structured columns exist before whitelist filter
            if (function_exists('skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols')) {
                skaiEnsureUserSavedNumbersCols();
            }

            // 2) Whitelist from live DB schema to avoid unknown columns (e.g., game_id)
            $schemaCols = (array) $db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false); // col => type
            $allowed    = array_keys($schemaCols);
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=schema_loaded allowed_count=' . count($allowed));

            // 3) Build a clean data map from $row restricted to whitelist (drop anything else)
            $data = [];
            foreach ($allowed as $col) {
                if (isset($row->$col)) {
                    $data[$col] = $row->$col;
                }
            }
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=data_filtered data_count=' . count($data));
            // (Optional) Debug: show stripped keys if running in debug mode
            if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                $rowKeys  = array_keys(get_object_vars($row));
                $stripped = array_values(array_diff($rowKeys, $allowed));
                if (!empty($stripped)) {
                    error_log('[SKAI SAVE] stripped unknown cols: '.implode(',', $stripped));
                }
            }

            // 4) Defaults & final normalization
            // Ensure required basics exist
            if (!isset($data['user_id'])) {
                $data['user_id'] = (int)$user->id;
            }
            if (!isset($data['lottery_id'])) {
                $data['lottery_id'] = (int)($row->lottery_id ?? 0);
            }

            // Normalize JSON-capable fields (encode arrays/objects)
            // [CHANGE] JSON-encode complex fields; keeps strings as-is if already encoded.
            $jsonFields = [
                'main_numbers',
                'extra_ball_numbers',
                'top_combos_json',
                'matched_numbers',
                'digit_probabilities',
                'hidden_layers'
            ];
            foreach ($jsonFields as $jf) {
                if (array_key_exists($jf, $data)) {
                    $v = $data[$jf];
                    if (is_array($v) || is_object($v)) {
                        $data[$jf] = json_encode($v, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
                    }
                }
            }

            // Fill date defaults via Joomla time (portable/timezone-aware)
            $nowSql = \Joomla\CMS\Factory::getDate()->toSql();
            $useNowForDateSaved = false;
            if (!isset($data['date_saved']) || $data['date_saved'] === null || $data['date_saved'] === '') {
                $useNowForDateSaved = true;
            }
            $useNowForGenerated = false;
            if (!isset($data['generated_at']) || $data['generated_at'] === null || $data['generated_at'] === '') {
                $useNowForGenerated = true;
            }

            // 5) Type-aware rendering (numbers unquoted, strings quoted, NULL literal)
            // [CHANGE] Remove hidden_layers from intFields (it's JSON above).
            $intFields = [
                'id','user_id','lottery_id','draws_analyzed','main_matches','bonus_matches',
                'star_ball1','star_ball2','epochs','batch_size','walks','burn_in',
                'laplace_k','chain_len','skip_window','draws_used','best_window','tuned_window',
                'auto_tune','pure_mode','tune_used','target_lottery_id','target_pick_size','target_extra_count',
                'save_schema_version','prediction_extra_display_count','daily_pick_size','skai_blend_optimized','skai_allow_blend_opt',
                'progress_stage','source_batch_id','source_batch_run_id','source_batch_run_order','batch_control_flag',
                'hive_queue_id','hive_assignment_id'
            ];
            $floatFields = [
                'dropout_rate','learning_rate','recency_decay','decay',
                'freq_weight','skip_weight','hist_weight','pb_freq_weight','pb_skip_weight','pb_hist_weight'
            ];

            $columns = [];
            $values  = [];

            foreach ($data as $k => $v) {
                // Only persist whitelisted cols
                if (!in_array($k, $allowed, true)) {
                    continue;
                }
                $columns[] = $db->quoteName($k);

                // Date defaults (Joomla date) ? use per-column flags
                if ($k === 'date_saved' && $useNowForDateSaved) {
                    $values[] = $db->quote($nowSql);
                    continue;
                }
                if ($k === 'generated_at' && $useNowForGenerated) {
                    $values[] = $db->quote($nowSql);
                    continue;
                }

                if ($v === null) {
                    $values[] = 'NULL';
                    continue;
                }

                if (in_array($k, $intFields, true)) {
                    $values[] = (string)((int)$v);
                    continue;
                }

                if (in_array($k, $floatFields, true)) {
                    $values[] = (string)((float)$v);
                    continue;
                }

                // strings/datetimes/json
                $values[] = $db->quote((string)$v);
            }

            // If date_saved was missing entirely and not present in $data, inject Joomla NOW
            if ($useNowForDateSaved && !in_array($db->quoteName('date_saved'), $columns, true)) {
                $columns[] = $db->quoteName('date_saved');
                $values[]  = $db->quote($nowSql);
            }
            // If generated_at was missing entirely, inject too
            if ($useNowForGenerated && !in_array($db->quoteName('generated_at'), $columns, true)) {
                $columns[] = $db->quoteName('generated_at');
                $values[]  = $db->quote($nowSql);
            }

            // Safety: ensure we have at least user_id, lottery_id
            if (!in_array($db->quoteName('user_id'), $columns, true)) {
                $columns[] = $db->quoteName('user_id');
                $values[]  = (string)((int)$user->id);
            }
            if (!in_array($db->quoteName('lottery_id'), $columns, true)) {
                $columns[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id');
                $values[]  = (string)((int)($row->lottery_id ?? 0));
            }

            // 6) Build and execute INSERT
            $query = $db->getQuery(true)
                ->insert($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                ->columns($columns)
                ->values(implode(',', $values));

            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=pre_execute column_count=' . count($columns) . ' value_count=' . count($values) . ' source=' . (string)($data['source'] ?? '') . ' prediction_target_id=' . (string)($data['prediction_target_id'] ?? ''));
            $db->setQuery($query)->execute();
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=execute_ok');

            // [[SKAI_V5_CAPTURE_INSERT_ID_BEFORE_COMMIT]]
            // Some database drivers can return 0 when insertid() is read only after
            // transactionCommit(). Capture it immediately after the INSERT so the
            // automatic Hive intake receives the real #__user_saved_numbers.id.
            $skaiLastSavedRowId = 0;
            try { $skaiLastSavedRowId = (int)$db->insertid(); } catch (\Throwable $__skaiInsertIdEx) { $skaiLastSavedRowId = 0; }

            $db->transactionCommit();
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=commit_ok row_id=' . (int)$skaiLastSavedRowId);
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            // Rollback and notify
            try { $db->transactionRollback(); } catch (\Throwable $__) {}
            if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                // (intentionally blank)
            }

            // Enriched, privacy-safe context for logs (helps diagnose)
            $ctxUser   = isset($row->user_id) ? (int)$row->user_id : (int)$user->id;
            $ctxLotId  = isset($row->lottery_id) ? (int)$row->lottery_id : 0;
            $ctxSource = isset($row->source) ? (string)$row->source : 'skip_hit';
            error_log('[SKAI SAVE ROLLBACK] uid='.$ctxUser.' lotId='.$ctxLotId.' src='.$ctxSource.' err='.$e->getMessage());
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE ERROR] phase=transaction_catch uid=' . $ctxUser . ' lotId=' . $ctxLotId . ' src=' . $ctxSource . ' err=' . $e->getMessage());

            if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
                $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                    'reason' => 'transaction_catch',
                    'message' => 'Save failed. Please try again.',
                    'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex,
                    'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal,
                    'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel
                ]);
            }
            if (!$skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) {
                if (!empty($isDebug)) {
                    $app->enqueueMessage('Save failed (rolled back). Please try again.', 'error');
                } else {
                    $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t save your set right now. Please try again.', 'error');
                }
            }
            goto SKAI_SAVE_DONE;
        }

        // Success message and redirect to dashboard
        $newId = isset($skaiLastSavedRowId) ? (int)$skaiLastSavedRowId : 0;
        if ($newId <= 0) { try { $newId = (int)$db->insertid(); } catch (\Throwable $__) { $newId = 0; } }
        // [[SKAI_V5_SAVED_ROW_ID_FALLBACK_LOOKUP]]
        // If the driver still reports 0, recover the saved row id from the row identity
        // that was just inserted. This is read-only and scoped to the current user and run.
        if ($newId <= 0) {
            try {
                $__skaiLookupCols = (array)$db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
                $__skaiWhere = array($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$user->id);
                if (array_key_exists('run_uuid', $__skaiLookupCols) && trim((string)$resolvedRunUuid) !== '') {
                    $__skaiWhere[] = $db->quoteName('run_uuid') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$resolvedRunUuid);
                }
                if (array_key_exists('lottery_id', $__skaiLookupCols) && (int)$lotteryId > 0) {
                    $__skaiWhere[] = $db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId;
                }
                if (array_key_exists('game_id', $__skaiLookupCols) && trim((string)$saveGameId) !== '') {
                    $__skaiWhere[] = $db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$saveGameId);
                }
                if (array_key_exists('prediction_target_id', $__skaiLookupCols) && !empty($data['prediction_target_id'])) {
                    $__skaiWhere[] = $db->quoteName('prediction_target_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)$data['prediction_target_id']);
                }
                $__skaiIdQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                    ->select($db->quoteName('id'))
                    ->from($db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers'))
                    ->where($__skaiWhere)
                    ->order($db->quoteName('id') . ' DESC')
                    ->setLimit(1);
                $db->setQuery($__skaiIdQ);
                $newId = (int)$db->loadResult();
                if ($newId > 0) { error_log('[SKAI V5] recovered saved_row_id=' . (int)$newId . ' for run_uuid=' . (string)$resolvedRunUuid); }
            } catch (\Throwable $__skaiSavedIdLookupEx) {
                error_log('[SKAI V5] saved row id fallback lookup failed: ' . $__skaiSavedIdLookupEx->getMessage());
            }
        }
        try {
            $skaiUnhideLotteryId = (int)$lotteryId;
            if ($skaiUnhideLotteryId <= 0) { $skaiUnhideLotteryId = (int)($row->lottery_id ?? 0); }
            if ($skaiUnhideLotteryId > 0) {
                mylottoexpertUnhideLotteryForUser($db, (int)$user->id, $skaiUnhideLotteryId);
            }
        } catch (\Throwable $__skaiUnhideEx) { }
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE SUCCESS] row_id=' . (int)$newId . ' uid=' . (int)$user->id . ' lotId=' . (int)$lotteryId . ' source=' . (string)$source . ' main_count=' . count($mainArr) . ' extra_count=' . count($extraArr));
        $__skaiAutoHiveResult = array('ok'=>false,'reason'=>'not_run');
        if (function_exists('SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_afterSave')) {
            try {
                $__skaiAutoHiveResult = SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_afterSave($db, array(
                    'saved_row_id' => (int)$newId,
                    'user_id' => (int)$user->id,
                    'lottery_id' => (int)$lotteryId,
                    'game_id' => (string)$saveGameId,
                    'target_draw_date' => (string)($predictionTarget['target_draw_date'] ?? ''),
                    'run_uuid' => (string)$resolvedRunUuid,
                    'batch_uuid' => (string)($data['batch_uuid'] ?? ''),
                    'setting_key' => (string)($skaiHiveSettingKey ?? 'complete_settings_snapshot'),
                    'settings_json' => (string)($skaiSettingsJson ?? ''),
                    'hive_contract_status' => (string)($skaiHiveContractStatus ?? ''),
                    'hive_intake_mode' => (string)($skaiHiveIntakeMode ?? '')
                ));
                if (!empty($__skaiAutoHiveResult['ok']) && (int)$newId > 0) {
                    try {
                        $__skaiSavedCols = (array)$db->getTableColumns('#__user_saved_numbers', false);
                        $__skaiHiveSets = array();
                        // [[SKAI_V4_PRESERVE_PLANNED_HIVE_LINKS_FOR_DELETE_QUEUE]]
                        // If this save came from a planned Hive research assignment, keep the
                        // original campaign queue/assignment ids on user_saved_numbers. The
                        // automatic observed intake row still exists, but it must not replace the
                        // campaign linkage or the admin Delete Queue and Saved Runs action cannot
                        // find the saved run later.
                        $__skaiLinkQueueId = (int)($skaiHiveQueueId ?? 0);
                        $__skaiLinkAssignmentId = (int)($skaiHiveAssignmentId ?? 0);
                        $__skaiLinkMode = 'automatic_skai_save';
                        if ($__skaiLinkQueueId <= 0) { $__skaiLinkQueueId = (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['queue_id'] ?? 0); }
                        if ($__skaiLinkAssignmentId <= 0) { $__skaiLinkAssignmentId = (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['assignment_id'] ?? 0); }
                        if ((int)($skaiHiveQueueId ?? 0) > 0 || (int)($skaiHiveAssignmentId ?? 0) > 0) { $__skaiLinkMode = 'planned_hive_guided'; }
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_queue_id', $__skaiSavedCols)) { $__skaiHiveSets[] = $db->quoteName('hive_queue_id') . ' = ' . (int)$__skaiLinkQueueId; }
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_assignment_id', $__skaiSavedCols)) { $__skaiHiveSets[] = $db->quoteName('hive_assignment_id') . ' = ' . (int)$__skaiLinkAssignmentId; }
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_settings_fingerprint', $__skaiSavedCols)) { $__skaiHiveSets[] = $db->quoteName('hive_settings_fingerprint') . ' = ' . $db->quote((string)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['settings_fingerprint'] ?? ($skaiHiveSettingsFingerprint ?? ''))); }
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_contract_status', $__skaiSavedCols)) { $__skaiHiveSets[] = $db->quoteName('hive_contract_status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('hive_ready'); }
                        if (array_key_exists('hive_intake_mode', $__skaiSavedCols)) { $__skaiHiveSets[] = $db->quoteName('hive_intake_mode') . ' = ' . $db->quote($__skaiLinkMode); }
                        if (!empty($__skaiHiveSets)) {
                            $db->setQuery('UPDATE ' . $db->quoteName('#__user_saved_numbers') . ' SET ' . implode(',', $__skaiHiveSets) . ' WHERE ' . $db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$newId . ' AND ' . $db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$user->id);
                            $db->execute();
                        }
                    } catch (\Throwable $__skaiAutoHiveUpdateEx) { error_log('[SKAI AUTO HIVE] saved row link update failed for saved_row_id=' . (int)$newId . ': ' . $__skaiAutoHiveUpdateEx->getMessage()); }
                }
                if (empty($__skaiAutoHiveResult['ok'])) {
                    error_log('[SKAI AUTO HIVE] intake not recorded for saved_row_id=' . (int)$newId . ' reason=' . (string)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['reason'] ?? 'unknown'));
                } else {
                    // [[SKAI_MLE_AUTO_HIVE_SUCCESS_LOG_V6]]
                    // Positive production evidence that automatic Hive intake attached the saved SKAI row.
                    // This does not change prediction math, scoring, saving, or database behavior.
                    error_log(
                        '[SKAI AUTO HIVE] intake recorded saved_row_id=' . (int)$newId
                        . ' queue_id=' . (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['queue_id'] ?? 0)
                        . ' assignment_id=' . (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['assignment_id'] ?? 0)
                        . ' fingerprint=' . preg_replace('/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-.]/', '', (string)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''))
                    );
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $__skaiAutoHiveEx) { error_log('[SKAI AUTO HIVE] intake exception for saved_row_id=' . (int)$newId . ': ' . $__skaiAutoHiveEx->getMessage()); }
        }
        
        // CHG: Instrumentation log - persisted config (guarded by $isDebug)
        if (!empty($isDebug)) {
            error_log(sprintf(
                '[SKAI SAVE SUCCESS] id=%d uid=%d lotId=%d src=%s profile=%s strategy=%s gameType=%s pickLen=%s',
                $newId,
                $user->id,
                $lotteryId,
                $source,
                $riskProfile ?? 'none',
                $strategy ?? 'none',
                ($pickLength && $pickLength <= 9) ? 'digit' : 'standard',
                $pickLength ?? 'none'
            ));
            // CHG: Log the full persisted config for mismatch audit
            error_log('[SKAI persistedConfig] ' . json_encode([
                'id'                   => $newId,
                'sampling_temperature' => $samplingTemp       ?? null,
                'diversity_penalty'    => $diversityPenalty   ?? null,
                'gap_scale'            => $gapScale           ?? null,
                'laplace_k'            => $laplaceK           ?? null,
                'skip_gamma'           => ($skaiBlendSkipPct  ?? null), // skip_gamma not a separate col; log blend
                'skai_blend_ai_pct'    => $skaiBlendAiPct     ?? null,
                'skai_blend_skip_pct'  => null,
                'skai_selected_blend_ai_pct'  => $skaiSelectedBlendAiPct  ?? $skaiBlendAiPct ?? null,
                'skai_effective_blend_ai_pct' => $skaiEffectiveBlendAiPct ?? $skaiBlendAiPct ?? null,
                'skai_blend_optimized'        => $skaiBlendOptimized      ?? 0,
                'skai_allow_blend_opt'        => $skaiAllowBlendOpt       ?? 0,
                'skai_window_size'     => $skaiWindowSize     ?? null,
                'epochs'               => $epochs             ?? null,
                'batch_size'           => $batchSize          ?? null,
                'risk_profile'         => $riskProfile        ?? null,
                'strategy'             => $strategy           ?? null,
                'skai_run_mode'        => $skaiRunMode        ?? null,
                'settings_json_sample' => substr($skaiSettingsJson ?? '', 0, 300),
            ]));
        }
        
        // [[MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_STATUS_SYNC]] When a MyLottoExpert Precision Focus batch run saves
        // successfully inside SKAI, mark the matching MyLottoExpert batch run as generated and update
        // the batch header. This prevents MyLottoExpert from continuing to say "Ready to run" after
        // the user has already executed the Precision Focus batch in SKAI.
        if (!empty($skaiSourceBatchId) && !empty($skaiSourceBatchRunId)) {
            try {
                $skaiMlePrefix = $db->getPrefix();
                $skaiMleTables = $db->getTableList();
                $skaiMleRunRaw = $skaiMlePrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_run';
                $skaiMleHeaderRaw = $skaiMlePrefix . 'mle_skai_batch_header';
                if (is_array($skaiMleTables)
                    && in_array($skaiMleRunRaw, $skaiMleTables, true)
                    && in_array($skaiMleHeaderRaw, $skaiMleTables, true)
                ) {
                    $skaiMleRunCols = array_keys((array)$db->getTableColumns('#__mle_skai_batch_run', false));
                    $skaiMleHeaderCols = array_keys((array)$db->getTableColumns('#__mle_skai_batch_header', false));
                    if (in_array('status', $skaiMleRunCols, true)) {
                        $skaiMleRunQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . ' = ' . $db->quote('generated'))
                            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchRunId)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$user->id)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
                        $db->setQuery($skaiMleRunQ);
                        $db->execute();
                    }
                    $skaiMleDoneQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->select('COUNT(*)')
                        ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                        ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$user->id)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('status') . ' IN (' . $db->quote('generated') . ',' . $db->quote('completed') . ',' . $db->quote('saved') . ',' . $db->quote('scored') . ')');
                    $db->setQuery($skaiMleDoneQ);
                    $skaiMleDoneCount = (int)$db->loadResult();
                    $skaiMleTotalQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                        ->select('COUNT(*)')
                        ->from($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_run'))
                        ->where($db->quoteName('batch_id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$user->id)
                        ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
                    $db->setQuery($skaiMleTotalQ);
                    $skaiMleTotalCount = (int)$db->loadResult();
                    $skaiMleHeaderStatus = ($skaiMleTotalCount > 0 && $skaiMleDoneCount >= $skaiMleTotalCount) ? 'generated' : 'partially_generated';
                    if (in_array('status', $skaiMleHeaderCols, true)) {
                        $skaiMleHeaderQ = $db->getQuery(true)
                            ->update($db->quoteName('#__mle_skai_batch_header'))
                            ->set($db->quoteName('status') . ' = ' . $db->quote($skaiMleHeaderStatus))
                            ->where($db->quoteName('id') . ' = ' . (int)$skaiSourceBatchId)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('user_id') . ' = ' . (int)$user->id)
                            ->where($db->quoteName('lottery_id') . ' = ' . (int)$lotteryId);
                        $db->setQuery($skaiMleHeaderQ);
                        $db->execute();
                    }
                }
            } catch (\Throwable $skaiMleSyncEx) {
                skai_debug_log('[SKAI MLE BATCH STATUS SYNC] non-fatal error: ' . $skaiMleSyncEx->getMessage());
            }
        }

        if ($skaiBatchSaveMode) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE SUCCESS] idx=' . $skaiBatchSaveIndex . ' total=' . $skaiBatchSaveTotal . ' label=' . $skaiBatchSaveLabel . ' row_id=' . (int) $newId);
            $skaiRespondBatchJson(true, [
                'row_id' => (int) $newId,
                'hive_contract_status' => (string)($skaiHiveContractStatus ?? ''),
                'hive_intake_mode' => (string)($skaiHiveIntakeMode ?? ''),
                'auto_hive_intake' => !empty($__skaiAutoHiveResult['ok']) ? 1 : 0,
                'auto_hive_queue_id' => (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['queue_id'] ?? 0),
                'auto_hive_assignment_id' => (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['assignment_id'] ?? 0),
                'auto_hive_settings_fingerprint' => (string)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['settings_fingerprint'] ?? ''),
                'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex,
                'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal,
                'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel
            ]);
        }

        $app->enqueueMessage('Saved to your dashboard.', 'message');

        // For XHR saves (the JS interceptSaveForm sends X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest),
        // return a clean JSON response so the frontend can parse it directly.
        // Without this, $app->redirect() sends the full dashboard HTML which the JS
        // heuristic misclassifies as an error (e.g. "couldn" appearing anywhere on the page).
        $isXhrSave = (isset($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH'])
            && strtolower($_SERVER['HTTP_X_REQUESTED_WITH']) === 'xmlhttprequest');
        if ($isXhrSave) {
            while (ob_get_level() > 0) { @ob_end_clean(); }
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
                header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
            }
            echo json_encode(['ok' => true, 'row_id' => (int)$newId, 'hive_contract_status' => (string)($skaiHiveContractStatus ?? ''), 'hive_intake_mode' => (string)($skaiHiveIntakeMode ?? ''), 'auto_hive_intake' => !empty($__skaiAutoHiveResult['ok']) ? 1 : 0, 'auto_hive_queue_id' => (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['queue_id'] ?? 0), 'auto_hive_assignment_id' => (int)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['assignment_id'] ?? 0), 'auto_hive_settings_fingerprint' => (string)($__skaiAutoHiveResult['settings_fingerprint'] ?? '')], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            exit(0);
        }

        // Redirect to My LottoExpert dashboard
        try {
            $dashboardUrl = \Joomla\CMS\Uri\Uri::root() . 'membership/my-dashboard';
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI SAVE TRACE] phase=pre_redirect url=' . $dashboardUrl);
            $app->redirect($dashboardUrl);
            return; // stop further rendering in this execution path
        } catch (\Throwable $e) {
            // If redirect fails (rare), just continue; message is already queued
        }

        SKAI_SAVE_DONE:
        // Batch-save catch-all: if execution reaches here with $skaiBatchSaveMode set, it means a
        // validation check (pick-size, empty numbers, lottery-id, etc.) exited via goto without first
        // sending a JSON response. Since every $skaiRespondBatchJson() call above ends with exit(0),
        // we only reach this label when NO JSON was sent. Send a generic failure now so the browser
        // receives a proper response instead of a 200 HTML page.
        if (!empty($skaiBatchSaveMode) && !empty($skaiRespondBatchJson) && is_callable($skaiRespondBatchJson)) {
            $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
                'reason'      => 'validation_failed',
                'message'     => 'Save was blocked by a server-side validation check.',
                'batch_index' => $skaiBatchSaveIndex,
                'batch_total' => $skaiBatchSaveTotal,
                'batch_label' => $skaiBatchSaveLabel,
            ]);
        }
        if (!empty($skaiIsXhrSaveRequest) && !empty($skaiRespondSaveJson) && is_callable($skaiRespondSaveJson)) {
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI XHR SAVE DONE FALLBACK] reason=validation_failed');
            $skaiRespondSaveJson(false, [
                'reason'  => 'validation_failed',
                'message' => 'Save was blocked by a server-side validation check.'
            ]);
        }
        // [FIX] Raw-$_POST safety net: handles the case where $skaiBatchSaveMode was
        // not initialized (e.g. because the guard at line ~8455 jumped here before the
        // pre-init block ran, or Sourcerer rendered the block twice).  Without this,
        // PHP falls through to Joomla page rendering and the browser receives an HTTP
        // 200 HTML page that the JS batch-save framework cannot parse as a JSON
        // confirmation, triggering "Server response not recognized as save confirmation".
        if (empty($skaiBatchSaveMode)
            && isset($_POST['batch_save_mode']) && (string)$_POST['batch_save_mode'] === '1'
            && isset($_POST['save_set'])        && (string)$_POST['save_set']        === '1') {
            $bIdx = isset($_POST['batch_save_index']) ? (int)$_POST['batch_save_index'] : 0;
            $bTot = isset($_POST['batch_save_total']) ? (int)$_POST['batch_save_total'] : 0;
            $bLbl = isset($_POST['batch_save_label']) ? substr(trim((string)$_POST['batch_save_label']), 0, 100) : '';
            skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE DONE FALLBACK] idx=' . $bIdx . ' total=' . $bTot);
            while (ob_get_level() > 0) { @ob_end_clean(); }
            if (!headers_sent()) {
                header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
                header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
            }
            echo json_encode(['ok' => false, 'reason' => 'validation_failed',
                'message' => 'Save was blocked by a server-side validation check.',
                'batch_index' => $bIdx, 'batch_total' => $bTot, 'batch_label' => $bLbl],
                JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES);
            exit(0);
        }
    }
} catch (\Throwable $e) {
    if (!empty($skaiBatchSaveMode) && !empty($skaiRespondBatchJson) && is_callable($skaiRespondBatchJson)) {
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE FATAL] idx=' . (int) $skaiBatchSaveIndex . ' total=' . (int) $skaiBatchSaveTotal);
        $skaiRespondBatchJson(false, [
            'reason' => 'save_fatal',
            'message' => 'An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.',
            'batch_index' => (int) $skaiBatchSaveIndex,
            'batch_total' => (int) $skaiBatchSaveTotal,
            'batch_label' => (string) $skaiBatchSaveLabel
        ]);
    }
    // [FIX-BATCH] Raw-$_POST fallback: if $skaiBatchSaveMode / $skaiRespondBatchJson were not
    // yet defined when the exception fired (e.g. $db init threw before line 8487), send JSON now.
    if (empty($skaiBatchSaveMode)
        && isset($_POST['batch_save_mode']) && (string)$_POST['batch_save_mode'] === '1'
        && isset($_POST['save_set'])        && (string)$_POST['save_set']        === '1') {
        skai_debug_log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE FATAL EARLY]');
        while (ob_get_level() > 0) { @ob_end_clean(); }
        if (!headers_sent()) {
            header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8');
            header('Cache-Control: no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, max-age=0');
        }
        echo json_encode([
            'ok'          => false,
            'reason'      => 'save_fatal_early',
            'message'     => 'An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.',
            'batch_index' => isset($_POST['batch_save_index']) ? (int)$_POST['batch_save_index'] : 0,
            'batch_total' => isset($_POST['batch_save_total']) ? (int)$_POST['batch_save_total'] : 0,
            'batch_label' => isset($_POST['batch_save_label']) ? substr(trim((string)$_POST['batch_save_label']), 0, 100) : '',
        ], JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES) ?: '{"ok":false,"reason":"save_fatal_early"}';
        exit(0);
    }
    if (!empty($skaiIsXhrSaveRequest)) {
        // XHR saves: client already received a JSON error response; don't pollute the PHP session.
    } elseif (!empty($isDebug)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('Save failed. Please try again.', 'error');
    } else {
        $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t save your set right now. Please try again.', 'error');
    }
}

$masterConfig = null;
try {
    $cfgMtime   = @filemtime($masterJsonPath) ?: 0;
    $apcuReady  = (\function_exists('apcu_enabled') ? \apcu_enabled() : (\function_exists('apcu_fetch') && (bool)\ini_get('apc.enabled')));
    $apcuKey    = 'skai.lottery_cfg.' . \md5($masterJsonPath . '|' . $cfgMtime);

    if ($apcuReady) {
        $cached = \apcu_fetch($apcuKey, $apcuHit);
        if ($apcuHit && \is_array($cached)) {
            $masterConfig = $cached; // cache hit
        }
    }

    if ($masterConfig === null) {
        // cache miss or APCu not available
        $masterRaw = \file_get_contents($masterJsonPath);
        if ($masterRaw === false) {
            throw new \RuntimeException('Unable to read configuration file.');
        }

        $decoded = \json_decode($masterRaw, true);
        if (!\is_array($decoded)) {
            // Provide informative JSON error message to logs; generic to users
            $jsonErr = \function_exists('json_last_error_msg') ? \json_last_error_msg() : 'unknown JSON error';
            if ($isDebug) {
                error_log('[SKAI] JSON decode error for lottery_skip_config.json: ' . $jsonErr);
            }
            throw new \RuntimeException('Invalid configuration JSON.');
        }

        $masterConfig = $decoded; 

        if ($apcuReady) {
            // Store to APCu (no TTL; invalidated by mtime change)
            \apcu_store($apcuKey, $masterConfig);
        }
    }
} catch (\Throwable $e) {
    // Keep user-facing message generic; log details if debug
    if ($isDebug) {
        error_log('[SKAI] Config load failure: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
    $app->enqueueMessage('We\'re setting things up. Please refresh in a moment or try again shortly.', 'error');
    // Output content for Sourcerer before exiting
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
}

// Read lottery ID from URL (fallback to 101 if missing) ? Joomla 4/5: use getInput()
$requestedId = (string) $in->getString('game_id', '');

// Some routes/tools use "gameId" (camelCase) just like the standalone AI page.
// Support that first before falling back to "gid".
if ($requestedId === '') {
    $requestedId = (string) $in->getString('gameId', '');
}

// Some of your legacy / alternate routes use "gid" instead of "game_id"
// (e.g., /euromillions-skai?gid=801). Support that here before falling back.
if ($requestedId === '') {
    $requestedId = (string) $in->getString('gid', '');
}

if ($requestedId === '') {
    $requestedId = '101'; // fallback (FL3)
}

$selectedGameId = strtoupper(trim($requestedId));

// Validate selected game (master spec first; fallback to daily catalog)
$dailyRow = null;

if (
    $selectedGameId === '' ||
    !isset($masterConfig['lotteries']) ||
    !is_array($masterConfig['lotteries'])
) {
    $app->enqueueMessage('This lottery link looks incomplete. Please choose a game from the menu and try again.', 'error');
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
}

$hasMaster = (isset($masterConfig['lotteries'][$selectedGameId]) && is_array($masterConfig['lotteries'][$selectedGameId]));

if (!$hasMaster) {
    // Fallback: daily digit lotteries (Pick 2-Pick 5, Fireball/Wild, Midday/Evening variants)
    if (function_exists('skaiDailyLoadByGameId')) {
        $dailyRow = skaiDailyLoadByGameId($dailyJsonPath, $selectedGameId, (bool)$isDebug);
    }

    if (!is_array($dailyRow)) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('This lottery link looks incomplete. Please choose a game from the menu and try again.', 'error');
        echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
        return;
    }
}

// Extract config for selected lottery:
// - master lottery_skip_config.json shape OR
// - normalized daily shape via skai_daily_bridge.php
$config = $hasMaster
    ? $masterConfig['lotteries'][$selectedGameId]
    : (function_exists('skaiNormalizeDailyToMasterLotteryShape') ? skaiNormalizeDailyToMasterLotteryShape($dailyRow) : []);

// Guard: config must be a usable array before we continue
if (!is_array($config) || empty($config)) {
    $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t load this game configuration. Please try again.', 'error');
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
}

// dbCol/table name (required downstream)
$dbCol = (string)($config['dbCol'] ?? '');

// Resolve canonical game_id from config (prefer snake_case), fallback to selected key
$gameId = (string)($config['game_id'] ?? $config['gameId'] ?? $selectedGameId);
if ($gameId === '') {
    $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t identify this lottery. Please pick your game and try again.', 'error');
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
}

// Resolve the real lottery_id (primary key) from #__lotteries using the game_id
if (!isset($db)) {
    $db = Factory::getContainer()->get('DatabaseDriver');
}
$queryLottery = $db->getQuery(true)
    ->select($db->quoteName('lottery_id'))
    ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
    ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId));
$db->setQuery($queryLottery);
$lotteryId = (int) $db->loadResult();

if ($lotteryId <= 0) {
    // If we can-t resolve a valid lottery_id, abort to avoid saving bad references
    $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t resolve the lottery id for this game.', 'error');
    echo "<!-- SKAI error: lottery_id lookup failed -->";
    return;
}

$lotteryName   = (string)($config['lotteryName'] ?? '');
$lotteryConfig = (array)($config['lotteryConfig'] ?? []);
$lotteryConfig['lottery_id'] = $lotteryId; // make sure config exposes the real lottery_id

// Auto-detect daily games: if loaded from dailylotteries.json (no master), mark as daily
// This avoids needing to modify the JSON files themselves
if (!$hasMaster && isset($dailyRow) && is_array($dailyRow)) {
    $lotteryConfig['is_daily'] = true;  // Loaded from dailylotteries.json
} elseif (!isset($lotteryConfig['is_daily'])) {
    $lotteryConfig['is_daily'] = false; // Loaded from lottery_skip_config.json or default
}

// Guard: require a valid data

// Guard: require a valid data table for this lottery
if ($dbCol === '') {
    $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t find the data table for this lottery (missing dbCol in config). Please try again later.', 'error');
    if (!empty($isDebug)) {
        error_log('[SKAI] Missing dbCol for game_id=' . $gameId . ' in lottery_skip_config.json');
    }
    // Output content for Sourcerer before exiting
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
}

    // Normalize key names so downstream code can rely on one shape
    // Snake_case ? canonical
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['main_ball_max']) && isset($lotteryConfig['max_main_ball_number'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['main_ball_max'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['max_main_ball_number'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max']) && isset($lotteryConfig['max_extra_ball_number'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['max_extra_ball_number'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['pick_size']) && isset($lotteryConfig['num_main_balls_drawn'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['pick_size'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['num_main_balls_drawn'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count']) && isset($lotteryConfig['num_extra_balls_drawn'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['num_extra_balls_drawn'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns']) && !empty($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_column'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns'] = [ (string) $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_column'] ];
    }

    // CamelCase ? canonical
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['main_ball_max']) && isset($lotteryConfig['mainNumbersMax'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['main_ball_max'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['mainNumbersMax'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max']) && isset($lotteryConfig['extraBallMax'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['extraBallMax'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['pick_size']) && isset($lotteryConfig['pickSize'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['pick_size'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['pickSize'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count']) && isset($lotteryConfig['numExtraBallsDrawn'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count'] = (int) $lotteryConfig['numExtraBallsDrawn'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball']) && array_key_exists('hasExtraBall', $lotteryConfig)) {
        $lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball'] = (bool) $lotteryConfig['hasExtraBall'];
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns']) && !empty($lotteryConfig['extraBallColumns']) && is_array($lotteryConfig['extraBallColumns'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns'] = array_map('strval', $lotteryConfig['extraBallColumns']);
    }
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns']) && !empty($lotteryConfig['extraBallColumn'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns'] = [ (string) $lotteryConfig['extraBallColumn'] ];
    }

    // If still unset, infer has_extra_ball from extra_ball_max
    if (!isset($lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball']) && isset($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max'])) {
        $lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball'] = ((int) $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max']) > 0;
    }

    $config['lotteryConfig'] = $lotteryConfig;

    $defaultFreqWeight = (float)($config['defaultWeights']['frequency']  ?? 100.0);

$defaultSkipWeight = (float)($config['defaultWeights']['skip']       ?? 0.0);
$defaultHistWeight = (float)($config['defaultWeights']['historical'] ?? 0.0);

// Determine columns (robust, deduped, strings)
$mainBallCols = array_values(array_map('strval', (array)($lotteryConfig['main_ball_columns'] ?? [])));
$extraBallCols = [];
if (!empty($lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball'])) {
    if (!empty($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns']) && is_array($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns'])) {
        $extraBallCols = array_map('strval', $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns']);
    }
}
$extraBallCols = array_values(array_filter(array_unique($extraBallCols)));
$selectCols    = array_values(array_unique(array_merge($mainBallCols, $extraBallCols, ['draw_date'])));

// Guard: no main-ball columns ? nothing to analyze; tell the user clearly.
if (empty($mainBallCols)) {
    $app->enqueueMessage('We\'re missing the main-ball data fields for this lottery (game_id: ' . htmlspecialchars($gameId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . '), so analysis can\'t run yet.', 'error');
    if (!empty($isDebug)) {
        error_log('[SKAI] No main_ball_columns for game_id=' . $gameId . ' (dbCol=' . $dbCol . ')');
    }
    // Output content for Sourcerer before exiting
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
}

// Fetch true lottery_id from DB (authoritative ID) with defensive try/catch ?
// but only if we do not already have a resolved numeric $lotteryId.
if (!isset($db)) {
    $db = Factory::getDbo();
}

/** Helper: quote table with Joomla prefix even if JSON gives plain name */
if (!function_exists('skai_quote_table')) {
    function skai_quote_table($db, string $name): string {
        $n = trim($name);
        if ($n === '') { return ''; }
        // If caller didn-t include "#__", add it so replacePrefix can work
        if (strpos($n, '#__') !== 0) { $n = '#__' . $n; }
        return $db->quoteName($db->replacePrefix($n));
    }
}


if ((int)($lotteryId ?? 0) === 0) {
    try {
        $q = $db->getQuery(true)
            ->select($db->quoteName('lottery_id'))
            ->from($db->quoteName('#__lotteries'))
            ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
            ->setLimit(1);

        $db->setQuery($q);
        $lotteryId = (int) $db->loadResult();
    } catch (\Throwable $dbEx) {
        if ($isDebug) {
            error_log('[SKAI] DB lookup error for game_id ' . $gameId . ': ' . $dbEx->getMessage());
        }
        $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t reach our database to look up this lottery. Please refresh and try again.', 'error');
        // Output content for Sourcerer before exiting
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
    }
}

// (unchanged) keep the guard and its closing braces
    if ($lotteryId === 0) {
        $app->enqueueMessage('We couldn\'t match this lottery in our records (game_id: ' . htmlspecialchars($gameId, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8') . ').', 'error');
        // Output content for Sourcerer before exiting
    echo "<!-- SKAI error -->";
    return;
    }

/* ==========================================================================
   SKAI - Section 2: Data Fetching, Skip & Hit, Feature Extraction (PHP)
   ========================================================================== */
// [Unified] Legacy per-post save path fully retired. All saving is handled by the
// SKAI comprehensive handler above (CSRF, membership, canonicalization, evidence, PRG).
// Nothing to do here before analytics; proceed directly to data fetching.

if (!isset($config) || !is_array($config)) {
    throw new RuntimeException('SKAI: Missing $config from Section 1.');
}
if (!isset($lotteryConfig) || !is_array($lotteryConfig)) {
    $lotteryConfig = $config['lotteryConfig'];
}
// [CHANGED] Robust extra-ball detection: explicit has_extra_ball flag wins.
// If has_extra_ball is present (true/false), honor it. Only fall back to extra_ball_max
// when the flag is entirely absent to support older configs.
$__extraMaxCandidate = (int)($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max'] ?? $lotteryConfig['max_extra_ball_number'] ?? 0);
$__extraCols         = (array)($lotteryConfig['extra_ball_columns'] ?? []);
$__hasExtraCols      = is_array($__extraCols) && count($__extraCols) > 0;

if (array_key_exists('has_extra_ball', $lotteryConfig)) {
    $__flagWantsExtra = !empty($lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball']);  // true only if flag is truthy
} else {
    $__flagWantsExtra = ($__extraMaxCandidate > 0);                // legacy heuristic
}

if ($__flagWantsExtra && !$__hasExtraCols) {
    // Fail-safe: configuration claims extra ball, but no columns configured.
    // Log to error_log in all environments (not just debug) so the admin is aware.
    error_log('[SKAI] Extra-ball requested but no columns configured for game_id=' . $gameId);
}

$hasExtra = ($__flagWantsExtra && $__hasExtraCols);

/* ---------- Fetch draws (ROW-LIMITED window; newest first, then reversed to ASC) ---------- */
// Pull up to the most recent rows to protect memory; then reverse to ASC for analytics.
$rowLimit = (int)($config['limits']['max_rows'] ?? 1500);

$query = $db->getQuery(true)
    ->select(array_map([$db, 'quoteName'], $selectCols))
    ->from(skai_quote_table($db, $dbCol)) // robust table prefixing
    ->where($db->quoteName('game_id') . ' = ' . $db->quote($gameId))
    ->order($db->quoteName('draw_date') . ' DESC');            // newest first

// Use Joomla DB pagination args for LIMIT/OFFSET: start=0, limit=$rowLimit
$db->setQuery($query, 0, $rowLimit);
$rowsDesc = (array) $db->loadObjectList();

// Reverse to ASC for temporal processing
$rowsAsc = $rowsDesc ? array_reverse($rowsDesc, false) : [];

// Derive a stable cutoff date (latest draw date) for downstream metadata
$cutoffDate = '';
if (!empty($rowsAsc)) {
    $lastIdx = count($rowsAsc) - 1;
    $lastRow = $rowsAsc[$lastIdx] ?? null;
    $rawCd   = ($lastRow && isset($lastRow->draw_date)) ? (string) $lastRow->draw_date : '';
    $cutoffDate = $rawCd !== '' ? substr($rawCd, 0, 10) : '';
}

/* ------------------------------------------------------------------------
 * Add: expose DB row count to JS and clamp the Window slider to DB length
 * Sorcerer rule: pure JS must use a normal
 * ------------------------------------------------------------------------ */
$rowsCount = (int) count($rowsAsc);

?>

<?php
/* ---------- Transform DB rows ? structured histories (ASC) ---------- */
$mainHistory  = [];   // [ {numbers:[...], date:'Y-m-d'} ... ]  (ASC)
$extraHistory = [];   // [ {number:int|null, date:'Y-m-d'} ... ] (ASC) // FIX: initialize to avoid undefined variable notices

// Early guard: nothing to transform
if (!$rowsAsc) {
    $fullMainHistory  = $mainHistory;
    $fullExtraHistory = $extraHistory; // now safely an empty array when there are no rows
} else {
    // Precompute first extra column if applicable
// Process rows: main numbers plus all configured extra balls (supports games with multiple extras)
foreach ($rowsAsc as $r) {
    // Fast date normalize: supports 'YYYY-mm-dd' and 'YYYY-mm-dd HH:MM:SS'
    $rawDate = isset($r->draw_date) ? (string) $r->draw_date : '';
    $date    = $rawDate !== '' ? substr($rawDate, 0, 10) : '';

    // MAIN numbers
    $nums = [];
    foreach ($mainBallCols as $col) {
        if (!isset($r->$col)) { continue; }
        $raw = trim((string) $r->$col);
        if ($raw === '') { continue; }

        // Fast integer extraction: prefer ctype_digit; fallback to regex if mixed text
        if (ctype_digit($raw)) {
            $nums[] = (int) $raw; // leading zeros collapse to int by design
        } elseif (preg_match('/\d+/', $raw, $m)) {
            $nums[] = (int) $m[0];
        }
    }
        $mainHistory[] = ['numbers' => $nums, 'date' => $date];

        // EXTRA numbers: support multiple extra_ball_columns (e.g., EuroMillions Lucky Stars)
        $extras = [];
        if (!empty($extraBallCols)) {
            foreach ($extraBallCols as $xCol) {
                if (!isset($r->$xCol)) {
                    continue;
                }
                $rawX = trim((string) $r->$xCol);
                if ($rawX === '') {
                    continue;
                }

                if (ctype_digit($rawX)) {
                    $extras[] = (int) $rawX;
                } elseif (preg_match('/\d+/', $rawX, $mx)) {
                    $extras[] = (int) $mx[0];
                }
            }
        }

        // Always append a row so histories stay aligned by date.
        $extraHistory[] = [
            // Backwards-compatible single extra: first Lucky Star (if present)
            'number'  => isset($extras[0]) ? $extras[0] : null,
            // NEW: all extras for this draw (0, 1 or 2 for EuroMillions)
            'numbers' => $extras,
            'date'    => $date,
        ];
    }

    // Expose full his
$fullMainHistory  = $mainHistory;
$fullExtraHistory = $extraHistory;

}

// ---------- Core analytics helpers (skip/hit histograms) ----------
// (Note) Using the newer implementation that appears below in this file.
// The earlier helper block has been removed to avoid duplicate definitions.

// Optional: alias for older call sites so the rest of the code keeps working unchanged.
if (!function_exists('calculateSkipsAndProbabilities')) {
  function calculateSkipsAndProbabilities(array $data, bool $single = false, int $laplaceK = 1): array {
    // Forward to the SKAI implementation with Laplace K (clamped in caller as needed)
    return skai_calculateSkipsAndProbabilities($data, $single, $laplaceK);
  }
}

/**
 * SKAI: Skip/Hit core math with canonicalization and Laplace smoothing.
 *
 * @param array $history   Array of draws (each draw is array of ints OR a string like "01, 12, 34")
 * @param bool  $single    True for extra-ball lanes (semantics don't change here; retained for compatibility)
 * @param int   $laplaceK  Laplace smoothing K in {0,1,2}, default 1
 *
 * @return array [$skips, $drawCounts, $lastDate, $prevIdx, $histProbs]
 *         - $skips:      [num => currentSkip]
 *         - $drawCounts: [num => total hit count]
 *         - $lastDate:   null (placeholder; retained for signature compatibility)
 *         - $prevIdx:    [num => lastHitIndexOrMinusOne]
 *         - $histProbs:  [num => ['p_hit_given_k', 'support_trials', 'support_hits']]
 */
if (!function_exists('skai_calculateSkipsAndProbabilities')) {
    function skai_calculateSkipsAndProbabilities(array $history, bool $single = false, int $laplaceK = 1): array
    {
        // --- Normalize draws to sets of integers, strip leading zeros -------------
        $draws = [];
        $maxBallObserved = 0;
        foreach ($history as $row) {
            if (is_array($row)) {
                $parts = $row;
            } else {
                $parts = preg_split('/[^\d]+/', (string) $row, -1, PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY);
            }
            $set = [];
            foreach ($parts as $p) {
                $v = (int) $p;            // '01' -> 1
                if (!in_array($v, $set, true)) {
                    $set[] = $v;
                    if ($v > $maxBallObserved) {
                        $maxBallObserved = $v;
                    }
                }
            }
            $draws[] = $set;
        }
        $N = count($draws);
        if ($N === 0) {
            return [[], [], null, [], []];
        }
