  <!-- Profile (training recipe) -->
<div class="opt-card" role="group" aria-labelledby="skai-profile-title" style="margin-bottom:8px">
<div id="skai-profile-title" class="opt-title">
      Training style
      <span class="opt-hint">How bold SKAI should behave</span>
  </div>
  <p class="opt-help-line">
    Choose how SKAI trains for this run: <strong>Balanced</strong> for everyday play, <strong>Wider Search</strong> to chase patterns more aggressively, or <strong>Safer Range</strong> to stay closer to long-term behavior.
  </p>
<div id="skai-profile-buttons" class="btn-row" data-role="profile">
  <button type="button" class="btn-chip is-active" data-profile="balanced" aria-pressed="true">
    Balanced
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="btn-chip" data-profile="explorative" aria-pressed="false">
    Wider Search
      </button>
<button type="button" class="btn-chip" data-profile="conservative" aria-pressed="false">
  Safer Range
</button>
</div>
</div>

  <!-- Strategy (how to combine ML with skip-prior) -->
<div class="opt-card" role="group" aria-labelledby="skai-strategy-title" style="margin-bottom:8px">
<div id="skai-strategy-title" class="opt-title">
      Blend strategy
      <span class="opt-hint">How SKAI mixes patterns with AI</span>
  </div>
  <p class="opt-help-line">
    Pick how SKAI combines <strong>Skip &amp; Hit patterns</strong> with <strong>AI predictions</strong>. Balanced keeps the run centered, AI-focused leans into the model, and Pattern-focused leans into long-gap pattern behavior.
  </p>
  <div id="skai-strategy-buttons" class="btn-row" data-role="strategy">
      <button type="button" class="btn-chip" data-strategy="ai" aria-pressed="false">AI-focused</button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-chip is-active" data-strategy="hybrid" aria-pressed="true">
        Balanced (recommended)
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="btn-chip" data-strategy="skip" aria-pressed="false">Pattern-focused</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Blend (single slider controlling AI %, with Skip as the remainder) -->
  <div class="opt-card skai-blend-card" role="group" aria-labelledby="skai-blend-title">
  <div class="skai-blend-head">
    <div>
      <div class="skai-blend-kicker">Smart blend control</div>
      <div id="skai-blend-title" class="opt-title" style="margin-bottom:2px">AI share for this run</div>
      <div class="opt-help-line" style="margin:0">One number controls the mix: <strong>AI %</strong>. SKAI automatically uses the remaining percentage for <strong>Skip patterns</strong>.</div>
    </div>
    <div class="skai-blend-meta" aria-hidden="true">
      <span class="skai-blend-chip" id="skai-blend-ai-chip">AI 55%</span>
      <span class="skai-blend-chip" id="skai-blend-skip-chip">Skip 45%</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skai-blend-readout" aria-live="polite">
    <div id="skai-blend-readout" class="skai-blend-percent">55%</div>
    <div id="skai-blend-readout-label" class="skai-blend-mode">Balanced</div>
  </div>
  <div class="slider-row skai-blend-range-wrap">
    <div id="skai-blend-center" class="skai-blend-float" aria-hidden="true">
      <span id="skai-blend-center-pct" class="skai-blend-float-pct">55%</span>
      <span id="skai-blend-center-label" class="skai-blend-float-label">Balanced</span>
    </div>
    <input type="range" id="skai-blend-range" min="0" max="100" value="55" step="1" aria-describedby="skai-blend-help">
    <output id="skai-blend-range-out" for="skai-blend-range" class="skai-range-out" style="display:none">55</output>
    <div class="skai-blend-scale" aria-hidden="true">
      <span>Pattern-focused</span>
      <span>Balanced</span>
      <span>AI-focused</span>
    </div>
  </div>
<div id="skai-blend-help" class="opt-help">
  <p class="opt-help-line">
    Move the slider to choose how much <strong>AI influence</strong> SKAI uses. The rest is automatically assigned to <strong>Skip &amp; Hit pattern influence</strong>.
  </p>

  <ul class="opt-help-list">
    <li><strong>0-30% AI</strong> &mdash; <strong>Pattern-focused:</strong> heavier weight on long-gap and extended skip-pattern behavior.</li>
    <li><strong>40-60% AI</strong> &mdash; <strong>Balanced:</strong> the premium everyday setting for a steady AI / pattern blend.</li>
    <li><strong>70-100% AI</strong> &mdash; <strong>AI-focused:</strong> stronger model influence with lighter skip weighting.</li>
  </ul>

  <p class="opt-help-note">
    What you see here is exactly what SKAI saves for the run: <strong>AI % = slider value</strong>. Skip share is derived at runtime and is not stored as a second saved percentage.
  </p>

<!-- Engine-Optimized Blend toggle -->
<div id="skai-blend-opt-wrap" style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:8px;margin-top:6px;padding:6px 8px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px">
  <input type="checkbox" id="skai-allow-blend-opt" name="skai_allow_blend_opt_ui" value="1" checked style="width:auto;margin:3px 0 0;flex-shrink:0" aria-describedby="skai-blend-opt-help skai-opt-interaction-note">
  <div>
    <label for="skai-allow-blend-opt" style="margin:0;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.875rem">Allow Engine-Optimized Blend</label>
    <p id="skai-blend-opt-help" style="margin:2px 0 0;font-size:0.78rem;color:#475569;line-height:1.4">When enabled, SKAI may adjust the AI&#37; automatically for this run using recent validation patterns. When disabled, the selected blend stays locked exactly as shown for full repeatability.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="skai-mode-explainer" class="opt-card skai-mode-smart-up" role="region" aria-labelledby="skai-mode-explainer-title" style="margin-top:10px;border:1px solid #dbe4f0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f8fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(15,23,42,.05)">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap">
    <div>
      <div id="skai-mode-explainer-title" class="opt-title" style="margin-bottom:4px">How SKAI will run this prediction</div>
      <p class="opt-help-line" style="margin:0;color:#334155">
        These controls choose between <strong>adaptive performance</strong> and <strong>exact repeatability</strong>. SKAI does not use random picks here. It changes how the engine is allowed to behave during this run.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div id="skai-run-mode-badge" aria-live="polite" style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:#e0f2fe;border:1px solid #bae6fd;color:#0c4a6e;font-weight:800;font-size:.84rem;white-space:nowrap">
      Mode: Adaptive (Recommended)
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-top:12px">
    <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #dbeafe;background:#eff6ff">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#1d4ed8;margin-bottom:4px">Adaptive Mode</div>
      <div style="font-size:.84rem;color:#475569;margin-bottom:8px">Engine-Optimized Blend ON * Reproducible Predictions OFF</div>
      <p class="opt-help-line" style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#334155">
        SKAI may adjust the AI share automatically using recent validation behavior. This gives the engine more freedom to pursue the strongest current run.
      </p>
      <ul class="opt-help-list" style="margin:0;padding-left:18px">
        <li>Best for live prediction performance</li>
        <li>Results can change when current evidence changes</li>
        <li>Most aligned with SKAI learning and optimization</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
    <div style="padding:12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;background:#f8fafc">
      <div style="font-weight:800;color:#0f172a;margin-bottom:4px">Consistent Mode</div>
      <div style="font-size:.84rem;color:#475569;margin-bottom:8px">Reproducible Predictions ON</div>
      <p class="opt-help-line" style="margin:0 0 8px 0;color:#334155">
        SKAI locks the run so the same settings and same key produce the same output. This is ideal for testing, auditing, and exact comparison.
      </p>
      <ul class="opt-help-list" style="margin:0;padding-left:18px">
        <li>Best for repeatable validation</li>
        <li>Engine optimization is restricted for truthfully consistent output</li>
        <li>Same settings + same key = same picks</li>
      </ul>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="skai-mode-what-to-expect" style="margin-top:12px;padding:12px;border-radius:10px;background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0">
    <div style="font-weight:800;margin-bottom:4px">What to expect from your current mode</div>
    <div id="skai-mode-expectation-text" style="font-size:.92rem;line-height:1.55">
      Adaptive mode is active. SKAI can fine-tune the blend for this run, so results may change as the current evidence changes. This is the recommended setting when your goal is the strongest live prediction rather than exact replay.
    </div>
  </div>

  <div style="margin-top:10px;font-size:.84rem;color:#64748b;line-height:1.5">
    <strong>Expert note:</strong> If your goal is the strongest live prediction, leave <strong>Engine-Optimized Blend on</strong> and keep <strong>Reproducible Predictions off</strong>. Turn reproducibility on only when you want SKAI to repeat the same result on purpose.
  </div>
</div>


  <!-- Reproducible Predictions (Score-Driven, Not Random) -->
  <div id="skai-deterministic-card" class="opt-card skai-mode-smart-up" role="group" aria-labelledby="skai-deterministic-title" aria-describedby="skai-repro-explain" style="margin-top:8px">
    <div id="skai-deterministic-title" class="opt-title">
      Reproducible Predictions
      <span class="opt-hint">Get the same results every time</span>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px">
      <input type="checkbox" id="deterministic" name="deterministic" value="1" style="width:auto;margin:0" aria-describedby="skai-repro-explain skai-opt-interaction-note">
      <label for="deterministic" style="margin:0;font-weight:normal;cursor:pointer">Enable consistent results</label>
    </div>
    <p class="opt-help-line" id="skai-repro-explain">
      <strong>SKAI is score-driven:</strong> it ranks numbers using AI + historical analysis.
      The Reproducibility Key does <strong>NOT generate random numbers</strong>.
      It only makes results repeatable and selects a consistent variant when candidates score similarly.
      Same settings + same key = same picks. Different key = different variant, still score-driven.
    </p>
    <p class="opt-help-line" id="skai-opt-interaction-note" style="margin-top:6px;font-size:0.9em;color:#475569">
      <strong>Interaction rule:</strong> Engine-Optimized Blend is the recommended default for strongest adaptive runs.
      If you turn on Consistent Results, SKAI automatically locks blend optimization for that run so repeatability stays truthful.
    </p>

    <!-- Reproducibility Key (conditional, shown when deterministic is enabled) -->
    <div id="reprokey_container" style="display:block;margin-top:10px">
      <label for="reproKey" style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:4px;display:block">
        Reproducibility Key <span style="font-size:0.85em;color:#6b7280;font-weight:normal">(Advanced - controls repeatability &amp; variants)</span>
      </label>
      <input type="number" id="reproKey" name="reproKey" min="1" max="2147483647" placeholder="Auto-generated from settings" 
             style="width:100%;padding:8px;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:4px;font-size:14px"
             aria-describedby="reprokey-help">
      <p class="opt-help-line" id="reprokey-help" style="margin-top:4px;font-size:0.9em">
        Optional: specify a custom key value. If left blank, SKAI will generate a stable key from your settings.
        Use the same key to reproduce exact predictions. Changing the key produces a different variant (still score-driven).
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

<div id="skai-advanced" class="tile skai-collapsible skai-collapsed" data-skai-collapsible style="margin:10px 0 16px 0">
<div class="skai-collapsible-head" data-skai-head data-text-show="Advanced Settings" data-text-hide="Hide Advanced Settings">
  <button id="skai-adv-toggle" class="btn-outline" type="button" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px" aria-expanded="false">
    <span class="carat" style="display:inline-block;transform:rotate(-90deg);transition:transform .18s ease;"></span>

<div id="skai-adv-body" class="skai-collapsible-body" data-skai-body style="margin-top:10px;display:none">

  <!-- Epochs -->
  <label for="skaiadv_epochs">Epochs</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_epochs" min="1" max="500" value="120" step="1">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_epochs_num" min="1" max="500" value="120">
  </div>
  <div class="help">How many full training passes SKAI makes over your draw history. Higher values can capture more patterns but take longer and may overfit (too focused on past noise).</div>

  <!-- Batch Size -->
  <label for="skaiadv_batch">Batch Size</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_batch" min="1" max="512" value="32" step="1">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_batch_num" min="1" max="512" value="32">
  </div>
  <div class="help">How many examples SKAI learns from at once. Larger batches can run faster but may smooth away very fine details; smaller batches react more to each draw.</div>

  <!-- Dropout -->
  <label for="skaiadv_dropout">Dropout Rate</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_dropout" min="0" max="0.6" value="0.2" step="0.01">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_dropout_num" min="0" max="0.6" value="0.2" step="0.01">
  </div>
  <div class="help">Protection against overfitting. Higher dropout makes SKAI more cautious and robust, but if set too high it can weaken the learning signal.</div>

  <!-- Learning Rate -->
  <label for="skaiadv_lr">Learning Rate</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_lr" min="0.000001" max="0.1" value="0.001" step="0.000001">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_lr_num" min="0.000001" max="0.1" value="0.001" step="0.000001">
  </div>
  <div class="help">How boldly SKAI updates its understanding each step. Very high values can bounce around and miss patterns; very low values can feel slow or stuck.</div>

  <!-- Recency Decay -->
  <label for="skaiadv_decay">Recency Decay</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_decay" min="0" max="0.999" value="0.9" step="0.001">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_decay_num" min="0" max="0.999" value="0.9" step="0.001">
  </div>
  <div class="help">How much extra weight SKAI gives to recent draws compared to older ones. Values closer to 1.0 lean strongly on recent history; lower values treat all draws more evenly.</div>

  <!-- Window Size (Auto-Tune still enforces final W at run-time) -->
  <label for="skaiadv_window">Window Size</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_window" min="5" max="500" value="50" step="1">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_window_num" min="5" max="500" value="50">
  </div>
  <div class="help">
    How many past draws SKAI studies together when it looks for patterns. Larger windows capture long term behavior; smaller windows react faster to recent changes. Auto-Tune still chooses the final window automatically at run time.
  </div>


  <!-- Hidden Layers -->
  <label for="skaiadv_layers">Hidden Layers</label>
  <div class="range-row">
    <input type="range" id="skaiadv_layers" min="1" max="12" value="6" step="1">
    <input type="number" id="skaiadv_layers_num" min="1" max="12" value="6">
  </div>
  <div class="help">How deep SKAI&rsquo;s neural network is. More layers allow SKAI to capture more complex relationships between numbers, but too many can latch onto noise.</div>


  <!-- Activation -->
  <label for="skaiadv_activation">Activation</label>
  <select id="skaiadv_activation" aria-describedby="skaiadv_activation_help">
    <option value="tanh" selected>tanh</option>
    <option value="relu">relu</option>
    <option value="elu">elu</option>
    <option value="sigmoid">sigmoid</option>
  </select>
  <div class="help" id="skaiadv_activation_help">
    relu = fast & stable; tanh = subtle; elu = robust on noise; sigmoid = compact but limited.
  </div>

<!-- Sampling Temperature -->
<label for="skaiadv_temp">Sampling Temperature</label>
<div class="range-row">
  <input type="range" id="skaiadv_temp" min="0.5" max="1.5" value="0.85" step="0.01">
  <input type="number" id="skaiadv_temp_num" min="0.5" max="1.5" value="0.85" step="0.01">
</div>

<!-- Diversity Penalty -->
<div class="help">
  Controls randomness. Lower (0.6-0.9) = safer; higher (1.0-1.3) = more diverse and riskier.
</div>

<!-- Diversity Penalty -->
<label for="skaiadv_diversity">Diversity Penalty</label>
<div class="range-row">
  <input type="range" id="skaiadv_diversity" min="0" max="0.1" value="0.02" step="0.001">
  <input type="number" id="skaiadv_diversity_num" min="0" max="0.1" value="0.02" step="0.001">
</div>
<div class="help">
  Reduces repeat numbers. 0.01-0.03 = subtle; higher spreads picks wider but may skip strong ones.
</div>

<!-- Gap Scale -->
<label for="skaiadv_gap">Gap Scale</label>
<div class="range-row">
  <input type="range" id="skaiadv_gap" min="0" max="1" value="0.20" step="0.01">
  <input type="number" id="skaiadv_gap_num" min="0" max="1" value="0.20" step="0.01">
</div>
<div class="help">
  Weight of "gap" (skip distance) in scoring. 0.1-0.3 is typical; higher = stronger skip consideration.
</div>

<!-- Skip Gamma -->
<label for="skaiadv_skipgamma">Skip Gamma</label>
<div class="range-row">
  <input type="range" id="skaiadv_skipgamma" min="0" max="1" value="0.20" step="0.01">
  <input type="number" id="skaiadv_skipgamma_num" min="0" max="1" value="0.20" step="0.01">
</div>
<div class="help">
  Controls how strongly extended skip-gap behavior becomes a prior signal. 0.0 = no skip-gap signal; 0.15-0.30 typical; higher can overfit to long-skips.
</div>

  <!-- Reset to defaults -->
  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
    <button type="button" id="skai-adv-reset" class="btn-outline" title="Reset Advanced settings to defaults">
      Reset to defaults
    </button>
  </div>

<script>
/* SKAI: Show recommended action block after analysis completes */
;(function(){
  "use strict";
  function showActionBlock(){
    var el = document.getElementById('skai-action-block');
    if (el) { el.classList.add('is-visible'); }
    /* Also show the save button if a save target exists */
    var savBtn = document.getElementById('skai-action-save');
    var mainSave = document.getElementById('skai-save-btn') || document.getElementById('saveBtn') || document.getElementById('skai-save');
    if (savBtn && mainSave) { savBtn.style.display = ''; }
  }
  function hideActionBlock(){
    var el = document.getElementById('skai-action-block');
    if (el) { el.classList.remove('is-visible'); }
  }
  if (window.addEventListener) {
    window.addEventListener('skai:done', showActionBlock, false);
    window.addEventListener('skai:reset', hideActionBlock, false);
    window.addEventListener('skai:analysis-stop', hideActionBlock, false);
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function() {
    'use strict';
    var btn = document.getElementById('skaiEngStatusToggleBtn');
    var content = document.getElementById('skaiEngStatusContent');
    if (!btn || !content) { return; }
    btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        var expanded = btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
        expanded = !expanded;
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(expanded));
        btn.textContent = expanded ? 'Hide Details' : 'View Details';
        content.style.display = expanded ? 'block' : 'none';
    });
}());
</script>

<script>
// Conversion UI: let non-members explore the full page while gating premium actions.
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  try {
    if (!window.SKAI_PREVIEW_MODE) { return; }

    function openGate() {
      var modal = document.getElementById('signupModal');
      if (modal) {
        modal.style.display = 'flex';
        document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      }
    }

    function showPreviewPanels() {
      var ids = ['skai-run-options','skai-ai-central','skai-confidence-explainer','skai-summary-card'];
      for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
        var el = document.getElementById(ids[i]);
        if (el) { el.style.display = 'block'; }
      }
    }

    function disablePreviewInputs() {
      var root = document.getElementById('skai-run-options');
      if (!root) { return; }
      var fields = root.querySelectorAll('input, select, textarea, button');
      for (var i = 0; i < fields.length; i++) {
        var f = fields[i];
        if (!f || f.id === 'startPrediction') { continue; }
        var tag = (f.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
        var type = (f.getAttribute('type') || '').toLowerCase();
        if (tag === 'button' || type === 'submit' || type === 'button' || tag === 'select' || tag === 'textarea' || type === 'range' || type === 'number' || type === 'radio' || type === 'checkbox') {
          f.disabled = true;
          f.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
        }
      }
    }

    var runBtn = document.getElementById('startPrediction');
    if (runBtn) {
      runBtn.removeAttribute('disabled');
      runBtn.removeAttribute('aria-disabled');
      runBtn.addEventListener('click', function (ev) {
        ev.preventDefault();
        ev.stopPropagation();
        openGate();
      }, true);
    }

    var saveBtn = document.getElementById('skai-action-save');
    if (saveBtn) {
      saveBtn.style.display = '';
      saveBtn.addEventListener('click', function (ev) {
        if (window.SKAI_CAN_SAVE) { return; }
        ev.preventDefault();
        ev.stopPropagation();
        openGate();
      }, true);
    }

    var lockTargets = document.querySelectorAll('#skai-ai-submit-save, #skai-submit-save, #skai-batch-launch, [data-skai-run], #openSignup');
    for (var i = 0; i < lockTargets.length; i++) {
      (function (node) {
        if (!node) { return; }
        node.addEventListener('click', function (ev) {
          if (window.SKAI_CAN_RUN && window.SKAI_CAN_SAVE && node.id !== 'openSignup') { return; }
          ev.preventDefault();
          ev.stopPropagation();
          openGate();
        }, true);
      })(lockTargets[i]);
    }

    showPreviewPanels();
    disablePreviewInputs();

    var teaser = document.getElementById('skai-action-block');
    if (teaser) { teaser.classList.add('is-visible'); }
  } catch (e) {}
});
</script>

<script>
// Hard-kill SKAI global status bar ("Idle  Ready") without affecting the rest of the page.
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  try {
    function removeGlobalBar(node) {
      if (node && node.id === 'skai-global-status' && node.parentNode) {
        node.parentNode.removeChild(node);
      }
    }

    // Remove if it already exists on load
    removeGlobalBar(document.getElementById('skai-global-status'));

    // Watch for any future creations and remove them
    if (window.MutationObserver) {
      var obs = new MutationObserver(function (mutations) {
        for (var i = 0; i < mutations.length; i++) {
          var added = mutations[i].addedNodes || [];
          for (var j = 0; j < added.length; j++) {
            removeGlobalBar(added[j]);
          }
        }
      });
      obs.observe(document.body, { childList: true });
    }
  } catch (e) {
    // Fail silently; page still loads normally
  }
});
</script>



<?php
// ========================================================================
// [JS INDEX] RUNTIME BLOCKS (Ctrl+F by -SKAI Runner/Optimizer Block #-)

//  G) Apply Server Caps to UI Inputs
//  H) Save-to-Dashboard Form Wiring
//  I) Performance Index (PI) Badge Wiring
//  J) Save Submit Interceptor / Payload Normalizer
//  K) Config Accessors (getSpec / getRules)
//  L) Smoothed Histogram Event Cache
//  1) Optimizer Selection + Input Sync
//  2) Start Button Lifecycle / aria-busy
//  3) Auto-Tune Gatekeeper

<?php echo '<script>'; ?>

// (removed duplicate SKAI_SERVER export; earlier Sec-4 export remains canonical)
// Export raw draws (ASC) from server (Section 4/5 build) for client ML
// Shape: [ { numbers:[...], date:'YYYY-MM-DD' }, ... ]
window.draws = <?php echo json_encode(
  $fullMainHistory ?? [],
  JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_QUOT
); ?>;

// Export extra-draws stream for client ML (ASC)
// Shape: [ { number:int, date:'YYYY-MM-DD' }, ... ]
window.extraDraws = <?php echo json_encode(
  $fullExtraHistory ?? [],
  JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_QUOT
); ?>;

// Normalize extraDraws in case numbers are stringy like "07"
;(function(){
  var arr = Array.isArray(window.extraDraws) ? window.extraDraws : [];
window.extraDraws = arr.map(function(r){
    var n = Number(r && r.number);

    // CHG: ES5-safe finite check.
    return { number: (isFinite(n) ? n : null), date: (r && r.date) || '' };
  });
})();

// Robust meta export ? do not rely on $SKAI_FEATURES
<?php
$__domain      = (int)($lotteryConfig['max_main_ball_number']  ?? $lotteryConfig['main_ball_max']  ?? 0);
$__pick        = (int)($lotteryConfig['pick_size']             ?? count($lotteryConfig['main_ball_columns'] ?? []));
$__extraDomain = (int)($lotteryConfig['max_extra_ball_number'] ?? $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_max'] ?? 0);
// FIX: Use the already-computed $hasExtra (set at line 1290: $__flagWantsExtra && $__hasExtraCols)
// which checks both has_extra_ball flag AND that columns exist. Fall back to config check if not yet set.
$__hasExtra    = isset($hasExtra) ? (bool)$hasExtra : !empty($lotteryConfig['has_extra_ball']);
$__allowZero   = ($__domain > 0 && $__domain <= 9) && !$__hasExtra;
$__gameFamilyRaw = strtolower(trim((string)($lotteryConfig['game_family'] ?? $lotteryConfig['gameFamily'] ?? '')));
$__isCashPopFamily = (strpos($__gameFamilyRaw, 'cash pop') !== false) || (strpos($__gameFamilyRaw, 'cash_pop') !== false) || (strpos($__gameFamilyRaw, 'cashpop') !== false);
$__mainCountRaw = (int)($lotteryConfig['main_count'] ?? $lotteryConfig['mainCount'] ?? $__pick);

/**
 * Whether the extra ball should be treated as strictly 1-based on the client.
 * Priority: explicit config override -> default heuristic (domain > 9 => 1-based).
 */
$__forceOneBasedExtra = array_key_exists('extra_one_based', $lotteryConfig)
  ? (bool)$lotteryConfig['extra_one_based']
  : ($__extraDomain > 9);
?>
window.SKAI_META = <?php
$__isDailyDigit      = ($__domain > 0 && $__domain <= 9 && !$__hasExtra) || !empty($lotteryConfig['is_daily']) || !empty($lotteryConfig['isDaily']);
$__isStandardLottery = ($__domain > 9);
$__isDailySingleValue = ($__pick === 1 && !$__hasExtra && ($__isCashPopFamily || $__mainCountRaw === 1 || $__isDailyDigit));
$__predictionMode    = ($__isDailySingleValue || $__isDailyDigit) ? 'daily_digit' : 'standard_lottery';
$__extraCount        = $__hasExtra ? (int)($lotteryConfig['num_extra_balls_drawn'] ?? $lotteryConfig['extra_ball_count'] ?? 1) : 0;
echo json_encode([
  'domain'                => $__domain,
  'pick'                  => $__pick,
  'pickSize'              => $__pick,
  'pickMain'              => $__pick,
  'mainMax'               => $__domain,
  'extraDomain'           => $__extraDomain,
  'extraCount'            => $__extraCount,
  'hasExtraBall'          => (bool)$__hasExtra,
  'allowZero'             => (bool)$__allowZero,
  'forceOneBasedExtra'    => (bool)$__forceOneBasedExtra,
  'isDaily'               => !empty($lotteryConfig['is_daily']) || !empty($lotteryConfig['isDaily']),
  'isDailyDigitGame'      => (bool)$__isDailyDigit,
  'isDailySingleValueGame'=> (bool)$__isDailySingleValue,
  'isStandardLotteryGame' => (bool)$__isStandardLottery,
  'gameFamily'            => (string)$__gameFamilyRaw,
  'predictionMode'        => $__predictionMode
], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES | JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_QUOT);
?>;
<?php echo '</script>'; ?>



 <script>
/* ==========================================================
   SKAI Runner/Optimizer Block R2: Evidence ? Save Form Bridge
   Purpose:
     - Copies evidence JSON (#skai_evidence_v1) into hidden
       input[name="top_combos_json"] for saving
   Depends on:
     - <script type="application/json" id="skai_evidence_v1">
     - Save form hidden input present
   Exposes (globals):
     - None
   Notes:
     - Safe, runs once per load; doesn-t alter prediction logic.
   ========================================================== */
  ;(function(){
    'use strict';
    // Progressive enhancement: if a save form has top_combos_json, populate it.
    var el = document.getElementById('skai_evidence_v1');

    if (!el) return;
    var json = el.textContent || '';
    if (!json) return;
    var input = document.querySelector('input[name="top_combos_json"]');
    if (input && !input.value) {
      try { input.value = json; } catch(e){}
    }
  })();
</script>

<?php
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
// [[SKAI_PHASE5]] PHP -> JS bridge: emit SKAI_FLAGS, skaiRunLogEndpoint,
// and skaiCsrfToken.  Must be emitted BEFORE the Phase 2 canonical runtime
// scripts so Phase 2 reads actual values instead of defaulting to 0.
// -----------------------------------------------------------------------
$__skaiFlags = [
    'SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION'     => 1,
    'SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY'   => 1,
    'SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE'        => isset($enablePairwise) && !empty($enablePairwise) ? 1 : 0,
    'SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS'           => 0,
    'SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING'     => 1,
    'SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING' => 1,
    'SKAI_ENABLE_RUNTIME_AUDIT'   => 1,
    'SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE'        => 0,
    'SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS'          => 1,
];
// [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Emit canonical string game_id for shared-learning identity.
// $gameId is the string identifier (e.g. "101", "AZ2") from config -- the canonical key
// that unifies all states of the same lottery. Never use $lotteryId here.
$__skaiGameId    = (string)$gameId;
$__skaiUserId    = (int)(Factory::getUser()->id ?? 0);
$__skaiCsrfToken = Session::getFormToken();
$__skaiEndpoint  = (string)Uri::current();
echo '<script>';
echo '(function(){"use strict";';
echo 'if(typeof window.SKAI_FLAGS==="undefined"){window.SKAI_FLAGS={};}';
foreach ($__skaiFlags as $__k => $__v) {
    echo 'window.SKAI_FLAGS[' . json_encode($__k, JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_QUOT) . ']=' . (int)$__v . ';';
}
unset($__k, $__v);
echo 'window.SKAI_FLAGS.game_id=' . json_encode($__skaiGameId, JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_QUOT) . ';';
echo 'window.SKAI_FLAGS.user_id=' . $__skaiUserId . ';';
echo 'window.skaiRunLogEndpoint=' . json_encode($__skaiEndpoint, JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_QUOT) . ';';
echo 'window.skaiCsrfToken=' . json_encode($__skaiCsrfToken, JSON_HEX_TAG | JSON_HEX_APOS | JSON_HEX_AMP | JSON_HEX_QUOT) . ';';
echo '}());';
echo '</script>';
unset($__skaiFlags, $__skaiGameId, $__skaiUserId, $__skaiCsrfToken, $__skaiEndpoint);
?>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE2]] SKAI Canonical Runtime Object + Helpers
   Phase 2 -- ONE CANONICAL RUNTIME SOURCE OF TRUTH
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  var SKAI_FLAGS = window.SKAI_FLAGS || {};
  var SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION    = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION    || 0;
  var SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY  = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY  || 0;
  var SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE       = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE       || 0;
  var SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS          = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS          || 0;
  var SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING    = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING    || 0;
  var SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING= SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING|| 0;
  var SKAI_ENABLE_RUNTIME_AUDIT  = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_RUNTIME_AUDIT  || 0;
  var SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE       = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE       || 0;
  var SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS         = SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS         || 1;
  window.SKAI_FLAGS = {
    SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION:     SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION,
    SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY:   SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY,
    SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE:        SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE,
    SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS:           SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS,
    SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING:     SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING,
    SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING: SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING,
    SKAI_ENABLE_RUNTIME_AUDIT:   SKAI_ENABLE_RUNTIME_AUDIT,
    SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE:        SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE,
    SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS:          SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS,
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Preserve PHP-rendered canonical game_id string for Phase C AJAX.
    // game_id is the string identifier (e.g. "101", "AZ2") that unifies multi-state games.
    game_id:                     String(SKAI_FLAGS.game_id || ''),
    user_id:                     parseInt(String(SKAI_FLAGS.user_id  || 0), 10) || 0
  };
  var SKAI_RUNTIME = {
    meta: {}, config: {}, history: [], descriptive: {}, scoring: {},
    calibration: {}, tail: {}, validation: {}, decision: {}, final: {}, ui: {}, audit: {}
  };
  function skaiGenerateRunUuid() {
    return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, function (c) {
      var r = (Math.random() * 16) | 0;
      return ((c === 'x') ? r : ((r & 0x3) | 0x8)).toString(16);
    });
  }
  function skaiResetRuntime() {
    SKAI_RUNTIME.meta = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.config = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.history = [];
    SKAI_RUNTIME.descriptive = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration = {};
    SKAI_RUNTIME.tail = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.validation = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.decision = {};
    SKAI_RUNTIME.final = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.ui = {}; SKAI_RUNTIME.audit = {};
  }
  function skaiInitRuntime(gameId, lotterySlug, engineVersion) {
    skaiResetRuntime();
    var uuid = skaiGenerateRunUuid();
    SKAI_RUNTIME.meta = {
      run_uuid: uuid, game_id: gameId || '', lottery_slug: lotterySlug || '',
      engine_version: engineVersion || '2.0', started_at: (new Date()).toISOString(), finished_at: null
    };
    if (SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
      try { console.info('[SKAI] Runtime initialized. uuid=' + uuid + ' game=' + gameId); } catch (_) {}
    }
    return SKAI_RUNTIME;
  }
  function skaiSetRuntimeMeta(fields) {
    if (!fields || typeof fields !== 'object') {
      if (SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] skaiSetRuntimeMeta: invalid fields.'); } catch (_) {} }
      return;
    }
    var keys = Object.keys(fields);
    for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) { SKAI_RUNTIME.meta[keys[i]] = fields[keys[i]]; }
  }
  function skaiGetFinalPredictionSets() { return SKAI_RUNTIME.final.prediction_sets || []; }
  function skaiSetFinalPredictionSets(sets) {
    if (!Array.isArray(sets)) {
      if (SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] skaiSetFinalPredictionSets: non-array fallback.'); } catch (_) {} }
      SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered = 1;
      SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason = 'skaiSetFinalPredictionSets received non-array';
      sets = [];
    }
    SKAI_RUNTIME.final.prediction_sets = sets;
    SKAI_RUNTIME.final.prediction_set_count = sets.length;
    SKAI_RUNTIME.final.primary_prediction = sets.length > 0 ? sets[0] : null;
    SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.display_matches_engine =
      (sets.length > 0 && SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output_count === sets.length) ? 1 : 0;
  }
  function skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot() {
    var snap = {
      run_uuid: SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.run_uuid || '', game_id: SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.game_id || '',
      lottery_slug: SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.lottery_slug || '', engine_version: SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.engine_version || '',
      started_at: SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.started_at || '', finished_at: SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.finished_at || '',
      domain_verified: SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.domain_verified || 0,
      mode_verified: SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.mode_verified || 0,
      metrics_complete: SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.metrics_complete || 0,
      display_matches_engine: SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.display_matches_engine || 0,
      snapshot_matches_engine: SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.snapshot_matches_engine || 0,
      fallback_triggered: SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered || 0,
      fallback_reason: SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason || '',
      calibration_enabled: window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION || 0,
      tail_recovery_enabled: window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY || 0,
      pairwise_enabled: window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE || 0,
      gibbs_enabled: window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS || 0,
      tuning_mode: SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.tuning_mode || '',
      final_rank_source: SKAI_RUNTIME.final.rank_source || '',
      score_path_hash: SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.score_path_hash || '',
      final_prediction_sets: skaiGetFinalPredictionSets()
    };
    var engineSets = SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output || [];
    snap.snapshot_matches_engine =
      (JSON.stringify(snap.final_prediction_sets) === JSON.stringify(engineSets)) ? 1 : 0;
    SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.snapshot_matches_engine = snap.snapshot_matches_engine;
    return snap;
  }
  function skaiBridgeLegacyGlobals() {
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME_STATS && typeof window.SKAI_RUNTIME_STATS === 'object') {
      SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring._legacy_runtime_stats = window.SKAI_RUNTIME_STATS;
    }
    var legacyConfig = window.lottoConfig || window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.windowConfig || {};
    if (legacyConfig && typeof legacyConfig === 'object') {
      SKAI_RUNTIME.config._legacy_lotto_config = legacyConfig;
    }
  }
  skaiBridgeLegacyGlobals();
  window.SKAI_RUNTIME                  = SKAI_RUNTIME;
  window.skaiInitRuntime               = skaiInitRuntime;
  window.skaiResetRuntime              = skaiResetRuntime;
  window.skaiSetRuntimeMeta            = skaiSetRuntimeMeta;
  window.skaiGetFinalPredictionSets    = skaiGetFinalPredictionSets;
  window.skaiSetFinalPredictionSets    = skaiSetFinalPredictionSets;
  window.skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot = skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot;
  window.skaiGenerateRunUuid           = skaiGenerateRunUuid;
  // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Canonical active game_id helper.
  // Returns the string game_id (e.g. "101", "AZ2") that is the shared-learning identity.
  // Reads SKAI_FLAGS.game_id set by PHP bridge. Falls back to SKAI_CONFIG.gameId.
  // Returns empty string if unavailable -- callers must guard against empty string.
  window.skaiGetActiveGameId = function skaiGetActiveGameId() {
    var gid = String(window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.game_id ? window.SKAI_FLAGS.game_id : '');
    if (!gid) {
      var cfg = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
      gid = String(cfg.gameId || cfg.game_id || '');
    }
    return gid.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
  };
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE3]] SKAI Score Path Unification
   Phase 3 -- ONE UNIFIED SCORE PATH
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  /**
   * Validate all upstream readiness conditions before activating Gibbs in the
   * client-side score pipeline.  Returns true only when ALL five conditions pass.
   * Logs a [SKAI_GIBBS] console message in every case.
   *
   * Conditions:
   *   1) SKAI_FLAGS.game_id is a non-empty string
   *   2) SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE is truthy (pairwise active)
   *   3) SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.active_bins is non-empty and built this run
   *   4) SKAI_RUNTIME.tail.live is set (tail recovery was invoked)
   *   5) Shared learning has >= 50 draws_used for this game_id
   *
   * @param {Object} runtime  window.SKAI_RUNTIME (or equivalent)
   * @return {boolean}
   */
  function skaiShouldEnableGibbs(runtime) {
    runtime = runtime || {};
    var flags = window.SKAI_FLAGS || {};
    // Condition 1: valid game_id
    var gameId = String(flags.game_id || '');
    if (!gameId) {
      try { console.info('[SKAI_GIBBS] disabled reason=missing_game_id'); } catch (_) {}
      return false;
    }
    // Condition 2: pairwise enabled
    if (!flags.SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE) {
      try { console.info('[SKAI_GIBBS] disabled reason=missing_pairwise'); } catch (_) {}
      return false;
    }
    // Condition 3: calibration active and built this run
    var cal = runtime.calibration || {};
    if (!cal.active_bins || !cal.active_bins.length || !cal.built_this_run) {
      try { console.info('[SKAI_GIBBS] disabled reason=missing_calibration'); } catch (_) {}
      return false;
    }
    // Condition 4: tail recovery invoked this run
    var tail = runtime.tail || {};
    if (!tail.live) {
      try { console.info('[SKAI_GIBBS] disabled reason=tail_recovery_inactive'); } catch (_) {}
      return false;
    }
    // Condition 5: shared learning has sufficient data
    var sl = (runtime.scoring && runtime.scoring.shared_learning && runtime.scoring.shared_learning[gameId]) || {};
    var drawsUsed = (sl.draws_used) ? parseInt(String(sl.draws_used), 10) || 0 : 0;
    if (drawsUsed < 50) {
      try { console.info('[SKAI_GIBBS] disabled reason=insufficient_shared_learning'); } catch (_) {}
      return false;
    }
    try { console.info('[SKAI_GIBBS] enabled game_id=' + gameId); } catch (_) {}
    return true;
  }
  window.SKAI_shouldEnableGibbs = skaiShouldEnableGibbs;

  function skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline(config, flags) {
    config = config || {}; flags = flags || window.SKAI_FLAGS || {};
    var pipeline = { stages: [], score_path_hash: '', config_snapshot: {} };
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'frequency',   active: 1, weight: config.frequencyWeight || 1.0 });
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'recency',     active: 1, weight: config.recencyWeight   || 1.0 });
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'skip',        active: 1, weight: config.skipWeight      || 1.0 });
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'pairwise',    active: flags.SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE    ? 1 : 0, weight: config.pairwiseWeight || 0.0 });
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'gibbs',       active: (flags.SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS && skaiShouldEnableGibbs(window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {})) ? 1 : 0, weight: 1.0 });
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'calibration', active: flags.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION ? 1 : 0, weight: 1.0 });
    pipeline.stages.push({ id: 'tail',        active: flags.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY ? 1 : 0, weight: 1.0 });
    pipeline.config_snapshot = {
      mainPoolSize: config.mainPoolSize || 0, drawCountMain: config.drawCountMain || 0, supportsBonus: config.supportsBonus || 0
    };
    pipeline.score_path_hash = skaiGetScorePathHash(pipeline.stages);
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.pipeline = pipeline;
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.score_path_hash = pipeline.score_path_hash;
    }
    return pipeline;
  }
  function skaiGetScorePathHash(stages) {
    var parts = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < stages.length; i++) {
      if (stages[i].active) { parts.push(stages[i].id + ':' + stages[i].weight); }
    }
    var str = parts.join('|'); var h = 0x811c9dc5;
    for (var j = 0; j < str.length; j++) { h ^= str.charCodeAt(j); h = (h * 0x01000193) >>> 0; }
    return h.toString(16);
  }
  function skaiApplyCanonicalRanking(candidates, pipeline) {
    if (!Array.isArray(candidates) || candidates.length === 0) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
        try { console.warn('[SKAI] skaiApplyCanonicalRanking: empty candidate list.'); } catch (_) {}
      }
      return [];
    }
    pipeline = pipeline || (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.pipeline) || {};
    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Build stage-active map so inactive stages are enforced before ranking
    var stageMap = {}; var stages = pipeline.stages || [];
    for (var _s = 0; _s < stages.length; _s++) { stageMap[stages[_s].id] = stages[_s]; }
    var ranked = candidates.slice();
    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Enforce SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE: strip pairwise score contribution when stage inactive
    if (stageMap.pairwise && !stageMap.pairwise.active) {
      for (var _pi = 0; _pi < ranked.length; _pi++) {
        var _pp = ranked[_pi].score_parts;
        if (_pp && _pp.pairwise) {
          ranked[_pi].score = (ranked[_pi].score || 0) - (_pp.pairwise || 0);
          _pp.pairwise = 0;
        }
      }
    }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Enforce SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS: zero Gibbs marginal when stage inactive
    if (stageMap.gibbs && !stageMap.gibbs.active) {
      for (var _gi = 0; _gi < ranked.length; _gi++) {
        if (ranked[_gi].gibbs_marginal) { ranked[_gi].gibbs_marginal = 0; }
      }
    }
    ranked.sort(function (a, b) { return (b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0); });
    for (var i = 0; i < ranked.length; i++) { ranked[i].rank = i + 1; ranked[i].rank_source = 'canonical'; }
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output = ranked;
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output_count = ranked.length;
    }
    return ranked;
  }
  function skaiRunCanonicalBacktest(history, windowSize, scoreFn) {
    var results = [];
    if (!Array.isArray(history) || history.length < windowSize + 1) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
        try { console.warn('[SKAI] skaiRunCanonicalBacktest: insufficient history.'); } catch (_) {}
      }
      return results;
    }
    var pipeline = (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.pipeline)
      || skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline({}, window.SKAI_FLAGS || {});
    for (var i = windowSize; i < history.length; i++) {
      var trainWindow = history.slice(i - windowSize, i); var testDraw = history[i];
      var candidates = scoreFn(trainWindow); var ranked = skaiApplyCanonicalRanking(candidates, pipeline);
      var top20 = ranked.slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
      var top5 = ranked.slice(0, 5).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
      var top10 = ranked.slice(0, 10).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
      var rankMap = {};
      for (var rm = 0; rm < ranked.length; rm++) { rankMap[ranked[rm].num] = rm + 1; }
      var hits = 0;
      var hitsTop5 = 0;
      var hitsTop10 = 0;
      var mrrw = 0;
      if (Array.isArray(testDraw)) {
        for (var j = 0; j < testDraw.length; j++) {
          if (top20.indexOf(testDraw[j]) !== -1) { hits++; }
          if (top5.indexOf(testDraw[j]) !== -1) { hitsTop5++; }
          if (top10.indexOf(testDraw[j]) !== -1) { hitsTop10++; }
          var rr = rankMap[testDraw[j]] || 0;
          mrrw += rr > 0 ? (1 / rr) : 0;
        }
      }
      var den = (testDraw && testDraw.length) ? testDraw.length : 1;
      var top5Rate = hitsTop5 / den;
      var top10Rate = hitsTop10 / den;
      var mrrwRate = mrrw / den;
      var lift = mrrwRate - 0.025;
      var stable = 1;
      var objectiveJ = (0.40 * top5Rate) + (0.25 * mrrwRate) + (0.15 * top10Rate) + (0.10 * lift) + (0.10 * stable);
      results.push({
        window_index: i,
        recall_at_20: testDraw.length > 0 ? hits / testDraw.length : 0,
        top5_containment_rate: top5Rate,
        top10_containment_rate: top10Rate,
        mean_reciprocal_winner_rank: mrrwRate,
        winner_rank_lift_vs_random: lift,
        winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency: 0,
        winner_rank_lift_vs_recency: 0,
        winner_rank_lift_vs_skip: 0,
        rolling_stability_score: stable,
        elite_objective_j: objectiveJ,
        top20: top20,
        test_draw: testDraw,
        score_path_hash: pipeline.score_path_hash || ''
      });
    }
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.backtest_results = results; }
    return results;
  }
  function skaiRunCanonicalTuning(paramGrid, scoreFn, history, windowSize) {
    var best = null; var bestVal = -1;
    for (var p = 0; p < paramGrid.length; p++) {
      var params = paramGrid[p];
      var backtestFn = (function (lp) { return function (tw) { return scoreFn(tw, lp); }; }(params));
      var results = skaiRunCanonicalBacktest(history, windowSize, backtestFn);
      var totalObj = 0;
      var totalRecall = 0;
      var totalT5 = 0;
      var totalMRRW = 0;
      for (var r = 0; r < results.length; r++) {
        totalObj += results[r].elite_objective_j || 0;
        totalRecall += results[r].recall_at_20 || 0;
        totalT5 += results[r].top5_containment_rate || 0;
        totalMRRW += results[r].mean_reciprocal_winner_rank || 0;
      }
      var avgObj = results.length > 0 ? totalObj / results.length : 0;
      var avgRecall = results.length > 0 ? totalRecall / results.length : 0;
      var avgT5 = results.length > 0 ? totalT5 / results.length : 0;
      var avgMRRW = results.length > 0 ? totalMRRW / results.length : 0;
      if (avgObj > bestVal) { bestVal = avgObj; best = { params: params, recall_at_20: avgRecall, top5_containment_rate: avgT5, mean_reciprocal_winner_rank: avgMRRW, elite_objective_j: avgObj }; }
    }
    if (best && window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.tuned_params = best.params;
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.tuning_mode = 'canonical_grid';
    } else if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
      try { console.warn('[SKAI] skaiRunCanonicalTuning: no best params. Fallback to defaults.'); } catch (_) {}
      if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered = 1;
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason = 'skaiRunCanonicalTuning found no best params';
      }
    }
    return best;
  }
  window.skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline = skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline;
  window.skaiGetScorePathHash            = skaiGetScorePathHash;
  window.skaiApplyCanonicalRanking       = skaiApplyCanonicalRanking;
  window.skaiRunCanonicalBacktest        = skaiRunCanonicalBacktest;
  window.skaiRunCanonicalTuning          = skaiRunCanonicalTuning;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE4]] SKAI Lottery Domain and Mode Correctness
   Phase 4 -- AUTHORITATIVE PER-LOTTERY CONFIG
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  function skaiLoadLotterySettings(gameId, settingsOverride) {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME; var src = settingsOverride || (rt && rt.config && rt.config[gameId]) || (rt && rt.config._legacy_lotto_config) || {};
    var settings = {
      game_id: gameId || src.game_id || '', lottery_slug: src.lottery_slug || src.slug || '',
      main_pool_size: src.main_pool_size || src.domain || src.maxMain || 0,
      bonus_pool_size: src.bonus_pool_size || src.bonusDomain || 0,
      draw_count_main: src.draw_count_main || src.pickMain || 0,
      draw_count_bonus: src.draw_count_bonus || src.pickBonus || 0,
      is_multistate: src.is_multistate || 0, is_multicountry: src.is_multicountry || 0,
      supports_bonus: src.supports_bonus || (src.pickBonus > 0 ? 1 : 0),
      supports_pairs: (typeof src.supports_pairs !== 'undefined') ? src.supports_pairs : 1,
      supports_tail_recovery: (typeof src.supports_tail_recovery !== 'undefined') ? src.supports_tail_recovery : 1,
      supports_calibration: (typeof src.supports_calibration !== 'undefined') ? src.supports_calibration : 1,
      supports_gibbs: (typeof src.supports_gibbs !== 'undefined') ? src.supports_gibbs : 1
    };
    if (rt) { rt.config.active_settings = settings; }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE4]] Also fetch authoritative settings from #__skai_lottery_settings via PHP endpoint (async, updates cache)
    if (gameId && window.skaiRunLogEndpoint && window.skaiCsrfToken) {
      try {
        var xhrLs = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhrLs.open('POST', window.skaiRunLogEndpoint, true);
        xhrLs.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
        xhrLs.onreadystatechange = function () {
          if (xhrLs.readyState !== 4) { return; }
          try {
            var resp = JSON.parse(xhrLs.responseText);
            if (resp && resp.ok && resp.settings) {
              var dbRow = resp.settings;
              // Merge authoritative DB values over the JS runtime cache
              var merged = {
                game_id:             dbRow.game_id               || settings.game_id,
                lottery_slug:        dbRow.lottery_slug          || settings.lottery_slug,
                main_pool_size:      (dbRow.main_pool_size  > 0) ? skaiSanitizeInt(dbRow.main_pool_size,  1, 99)  : settings.main_pool_size,
                bonus_pool_size:     (dbRow.bonus_pool_size > 0) ? skaiSanitizeInt(dbRow.bonus_pool_size, 1, 99)  : settings.bonus_pool_size,
                draw_count_main:     (dbRow.draw_count_main > 0) ? skaiSanitizeInt(dbRow.draw_count_main, 1, 20)  : settings.draw_count_main,
                draw_count_bonus:    (dbRow.draw_count_bonus > 0)? +dbRow.draw_count_bonus: settings.draw_count_bonus,
                is_multistate:       +dbRow.is_multistate        || settings.is_multistate,
                is_multicountry:     +dbRow.is_multicountry      || settings.is_multicountry,
                supports_bonus:      +dbRow.supports_bonus       || settings.supports_bonus,
                supports_pairs:      (typeof dbRow.supports_pairs !== 'undefined') ? +dbRow.supports_pairs : settings.supports_pairs,
                supports_tail_recovery: (typeof dbRow.supports_tail_recovery !== 'undefined') ? +dbRow.supports_tail_recovery : settings.supports_tail_recovery,
                supports_calibration:   (typeof dbRow.supports_calibration !== 'undefined') ? +dbRow.supports_calibration : settings.supports_calibration,
                supports_gibbs:         (typeof dbRow.supports_gibbs !== 'undefined') ? +dbRow.supports_gibbs : settings.supports_gibbs
              };
              var rtNow = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
              if (rtNow) {
                rtNow.config.active_settings = merged;
                if (!rtNow.config[gameId]) { rtNow.config[gameId] = {}; }
                rtNow.config[gameId] = merged;
                try {
                  if (!rtNow.calibration) { rtNow.calibration = {}; }
                  var _activeBins = (dbRow.active_calibration_bins && dbRow.active_calibration_bins.length) ? dbRow.active_calibration_bins : [];
                  if (_activeBins.length) {
                    rtNow.calibration.active_bins = _activeBins;
                    rtNow.calibration.loaded_from_db = 1;
                    rtNow.calibration.built_this_run = 0;
                    rtNow.calibration.version = String(dbRow.active_calibration_version || '');
                    rtNow.calibration.sample_count = 0;
                    for (var _abi = 0; _abi < _activeBins.length; _abi++) {
                      rtNow.calibration.sample_count += parseInt(_activeBins[_abi].sample_count || 0, 10) || 0;
                    }
                  }
                  if (dbRow.active_parameter_set && rtNow.scoring) {
                    rtNow.scoring.loaded_parameter_set = dbRow.active_parameter_set;
                  }
                  if (dbRow.active_tail_summary && rtNow.tail) {
                    rtNow.tail.loaded_summary = dbRow.active_tail_summary;
                  }
                } catch (_) {}
              }
            }
          } catch (_) {}
        };
        xhrLs.send('skai_action=load_lottery_settings&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
          '&' + encodeURIComponent(window.skaiCsrfToken) + '=1');
      } catch (_) {}
    }
    return settings;
  }
  function skaiResolveLotteryDomain(gameId) {
    var s = skaiLoadLotterySettings(gameId);
    return { mainPool: s.main_pool_size, bonusPool: s.bonus_pool_size, drawMain: s.draw_count_main, drawBonus: s.draw_count_bonus };
  }
  function skaiVerifyLotteryDomain(gameId, runtimeConfig) {
    var settings = skaiLoadLotterySettings(gameId);
    var ok = settings.main_pool_size > 0 && settings.draw_count_main > 0;
    if (runtimeConfig) {
      var cfgPool = runtimeConfig.main_pool_size || runtimeConfig.domain || runtimeConfig.maxMain || 0;
      if (cfgPool > 0 && cfgPool !== settings.main_pool_size) {
        ok = false;
        if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
          try { console.warn('[SKAI] Domain mismatch for game=' + gameId); } catch (_) {}
        }
      }
    }
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.domain_verified = ok ? 1 : 0;
      if (!ok) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered = 1; window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason = 'domain_verification_failed game=' + gameId; }
    }
    return ok;
  }
  function skaiVerifyLotteryMode(gameId, runtimeConfig) {
    var settings = skaiLoadLotterySettings(gameId);
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
    var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
    var cfg = runtimeConfig || window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
    var fallbackPool = settings.main_pool_size || meta.domain || meta.mainMax || rt.main_pool_size || cfg.main_pool_size || cfg.domain || cfg.maxMain || 0;
    var fallbackPick = settings.draw_count_main || meta.pick || meta.pickMain || rt.draw_count_main || cfg.draw_count_main || cfg.pickMain || 0;
    if ((!settings.main_pool_size || settings.main_pool_size < 1) && fallbackPool > 0) { settings.main_pool_size = parseInt(fallbackPool, 10) || 0; }
    if ((!settings.draw_count_main || settings.draw_count_main < 1) && fallbackPick > 0) { settings.draw_count_main = parseInt(fallbackPick, 10) || 0; }
    var ok = true; var reason = '';
    if (settings.draw_count_main < 1 || settings.main_pool_size < 1 || settings.draw_count_main > settings.main_pool_size) {
      ok = false; reason = 'implausible_draw_count game=' + gameId;
    }
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.mode_verified = ok ? 1 : 0;
      if (!ok) {
        window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION = 0; window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY = 0; window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS = 0;
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered = 1; window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason = reason;
        if (window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] Mode verification failed (' + reason + '). Advanced features disabled.'); } catch (_) {} }
      } else {
        if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config = {}; }
        if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config[gameId]) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config[gameId] = {}; }
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config[gameId].main_pool_size = settings.main_pool_size;
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config[gameId].draw_count_main = settings.draw_count_main;
      }
    }
    return ok;
  }
  window.skaiLoadLotterySettings  = skaiLoadLotterySettings;
  window.skaiResolveLotteryDomain = skaiResolveLotteryDomain;
  window.skaiVerifyLotteryDomain  = skaiVerifyLotteryDomain;
  window.skaiVerifyLotteryMode    = skaiVerifyLotteryMode;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE5]] SKAI Run Logging and Audit
   Phase 5 -- EVERY RUN GETS A UUID AND AUDIT RECORD
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  if (!window.skaiRunLogEndpoint) { window.skaiRunLogEndpoint = ''; }
  if (!window.skaiCsrfToken)      { window.skaiCsrfToken = ''; }
  function skaiLogFallbackEvent(reason, context) {
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered = 1;
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason = String(reason || '');
      if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_log) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_log = []; }
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_log.push({ reason: String(reason || ''), context: context || {}, timestamp: (new Date()).toISOString() });
    }
    if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI FALLBACK] ' + reason, context || ''); } catch (_) {} }
  }
  function skaiPostJson(action, payload, callback) {
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token    = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
    if (!endpoint) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] ' + action + ': no endpoint configured; skipped.'); } catch (_) {} }
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(false); }
      return;
    }
    var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
    xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
    xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
    xhr.onload = function () {
      var ok = (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 300);
      if (!ok && window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] ' + action + ': HTTP ' + xhr.status); } catch (_) {} }
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(ok); }
    };
    xhr.onerror = function () {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] ' + action + ': network error.'); } catch (_) {} }
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(false); }
    };
    xhr.send('skai_action=' + encodeURIComponent(action) + '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(payload || {})));
  }
  function skaiInsertRunLog(data, cb) { skaiPostJson('insert_run_log', data, cb); }
  function skaiInsertRuntimeAudit(data, cb) { skaiPostJson('insert_runtime_audit', data, cb); }
  function skaiNormalizePredictionSets(input) {
    var out = [];
    if (!Array.isArray(input)) { return out; }
    for (var i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
      var item = input[i];
      var arr = null;
      if (Array.isArray(item)) {
        arr = item;
      } else if (item && typeof item === 'object') {
        arr = item.main_numbers || item.numbers || item.combo || item.values || item.set || null;
      }
      if (!Array.isArray(arr)) { continue; }
      var norm = [];
      for (var j = 0; j < arr.length; j++) {
        var n = parseInt(arr[j], 10);
        if (!isNaN(n)) { norm.push(n); }
      }
      if (norm.length) { out.push(norm.join(',')); }
    }
    return out;
  }
  function skaiVerifyDisplayMatchesEngine(displayedSets) {
    var engineOutput = (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output) || [];
    var dispNorm = skaiNormalizePredictionSets(displayedSets);
    var engNorm = skaiNormalizePredictionSets(engineOutput);
    var match = (JSON.stringify(dispNorm) === JSON.stringify(engNorm));
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.display_matches_engine = match ? 1 : 0; }
    if (!match && window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] Display/engine mismatch detected.', { displayed: dispNorm, engine: engNorm }); } catch (_) {} }
    return match;
  }
  function skaiVerifySnapshotMatchesEngine(snapshot) {
    var snap = window.skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot ? window.skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot() : null;
    if (!snap) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] skaiVerifySnapshotMatchesEngine: unavailable.'); } catch (_) {} }
      return false;
    }
    var match = (JSON.stringify(snapshot) === JSON.stringify(snap.final_prediction_sets));
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.snapshot_matches_engine = match ? 1 : 0; }
    return match;
  }
  window.skaiLogFallbackEvent            = skaiLogFallbackEvent;
  window.skaiInsertRunLog                = skaiInsertRunLog;
  window.skaiInsertRuntimeAudit          = skaiInsertRuntimeAudit;
  window.skaiVerifyDisplayMatchesEngine  = skaiVerifyDisplayMatchesEngine;
  window.skaiVerifySnapshotMatchesEngine = skaiVerifySnapshotMatchesEngine;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE6]] SKAI Shadow Learning Hooks
   Phase 6 -- SHADOW-MODE ADVANCED LOGIC (feature-gated)
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  function _logFallback(reason, ctx) {
    if (window.skaiLogFallbackEvent) { window.skaiLogFallbackEvent(reason, ctx); }
    else { try { console.warn('[SKAI FALLBACK] ' + reason, ctx); } catch (_) {} }
  }
  function skaiRunShadowCalibration(candidates, calibrationBins) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION) { return null; }
    if (!Array.isArray(candidates) || !Array.isArray(calibrationBins)) { _logFallback('skaiRunShadowCalibration: invalid inputs', {}); return null; }
    var calibrated = candidates.slice().map(function (c) {
      var score = c.score || 0; var calScore = score;
      for (var i = 0; i < calibrationBins.length; i++) {
        var bin = calibrationBins[i];
        if (score >= bin.score_min && score < bin.score_max) { calScore = bin.smoothed_hit_rate; break; }
      }
      return { num: c.num, score: c.score, calibrated_score: calScore };
    });
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.shadow = calibrated; }
    return calibrated;
  }
  function skaiRunShadowTailRecovery(candidates) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY) { return null; }
    if (!Array.isArray(candidates)) { _logFallback('skaiRunShadowTailRecovery: invalid inputs', {}); return null; }
    var regimes = window.skaiDefineRankRegimes ? window.skaiDefineRankRegimes() : [];
    var shadow = candidates.slice().map(function (c) {
      var rank = c.rank || 0; var zone = 'unknown';
      for (var i = 0; i < regimes.length; i++) {
        if (rank >= regimes[i].start && rank <= regimes[i].end) { zone = regimes[i].label; break; }
      }
      return { num: c.num, score: c.score, rank: rank, shadow_zone: zone };
    });
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.tail.shadow = shadow; }
    return shadow;
  }
  function skaiRunShadowBenchmarks(history, candidates) {
    if (!Array.isArray(history) || !Array.isArray(candidates)) { _logFallback('skaiRunShadowBenchmarks: invalid inputs', {}); return null; }
    var n = candidates.length; if (n === 0) { return null; }
    var randomRecall = Math.min(20, n) / n;
    var freqMap = {};
    for (var i = 0; i < history.length; i++) { var draw = history[i]; if (!Array.isArray(draw)) { continue; } for (var j = 0; j < draw.length; j++) { freqMap[draw[j]] = (freqMap[draw[j]] || 0) + 1; } }
    var freqRanked = candidates.slice().sort(function (a, b) { return (freqMap[b.num] || 0) - (freqMap[a.num] || 0); });
    var freqTop20 = freqRanked.slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var recencyMap = {};
    for (var d = 0; d < history.length; d++) { var recDraw = history[d]; if (!Array.isArray(recDraw)) { continue; } for (var k = 0; k < recDraw.length; k++) { if (!(recDraw[k] in recencyMap)) { recencyMap[recDraw[k]] = d; } } }
    var recencyRanked = candidates.slice().sort(function (a, b) { return (recencyMap[b.num] || 0) - (recencyMap[a.num] || 0); });
    var recencyTop20 = recencyRanked.slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var benchmarks = { random: { expected_recall_at_20: randomRecall }, frequency: { top20: freqTop20 }, recency: { top20: recencyTop20 } };
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.shadow_benchmarks = benchmarks; }
    return benchmarks;
  }
  function skaiCompareShadowVsLive() {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME; if (!rt) { return null; }
    var liveTop20  = (rt.scoring.engine_output || []).slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var shadowCal  = (rt.calibration.shadow || []).slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var shadowTail = (rt.tail.shadow || []).slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var overlap = function (a, b) { var count = 0; for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) { if (b.indexOf(a[i]) !== -1) { count++; } } return count; };
    var comparison = { live_vs_shadow_cal: { overlap20: overlap(liveTop20, shadowCal) }, live_vs_shadow_tail: { overlap20: overlap(liveTop20, shadowTail) } };
    rt.scoring.shadow_comparison = comparison;
    return comparison;
  }
  window.skaiRunShadowCalibration  = skaiRunShadowCalibration;
  window.skaiRunShadowTailRecovery = skaiRunShadowTailRecovery;
  window.skaiRunShadowBenchmarks   = skaiRunShadowBenchmarks;
  window.skaiCompareShadowVsLive   = skaiCompareShadowVsLive;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE7]] SKAI Calibration (feature-gated)
   Phase 7 -- SELECTIVE PER-LOTTERY CALIBRATION
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  var MIN_SAMPLE_COUNT = 30;
  function skaiBuildCalibrationBins(candidates, history, numBins) {
    numBins = numBins || 10; if (!Array.isArray(candidates) || candidates.length === 0) { return []; }
    var scores = candidates.map(function (c) { return c.score || 0; });
    var minScore = scores.reduce(function (m, v) { return v < m ? v : m; }, scores[0]);
    var maxScore = scores.reduce(function (m, v) { return v > m ? v : m; }, scores[0]);
    var range = maxScore - minScore || 1; var binSize = range / numBins; var bins = [];
    for (var b = 0; b < numBins; b++) { bins.push({ bin_index: b, score_min: minScore + b * binSize, score_max: minScore + (b + 1) * binSize, sample_count: 0, observed_hit_rate: 0, smoothed_hit_rate: 0 }); }
    for (var i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) { var s = candidates[i].score || 0; var idx = Math.min(Math.floor((s - minScore) / binSize), numBins - 1); if (idx >= 0) { bins[idx].sample_count++; } }
    var hasTruth = false;
    for (var bi = 0; bi < bins.length; bi++) {
      if ((bins[bi].sample_count || 0) > 0 && ((bins[bi].observed_hit_rate || 0) > 0 || (bins[bi].smoothed_hit_rate || 0) > 0)) { hasTruth = true; break; }
    }
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.bins = bins;
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.sample_count = candidates.length;
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.version = 'v_' + (candidates.length) + '_' + (bins.length);
      if (hasTruth) {
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.active_bins = bins;
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.built_this_run = 1;
      } else {
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.pending_bins = bins;
        if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.loaded_from_db) {
          window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.active_bins = [];
        }
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.built_this_run = 0;
        if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
          try { console.info('[SKAI] Calibration bins built without observed outcomes; persistence deferred.'); } catch (_) {}
        }
      }
    }
    return bins;
  }
  function skaiLoadActiveCalibration() { return (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.active_bins) || []; }
  function skaiCanActivateCalibration() {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION) { return false; }
    // Domain must be verified before calibration is allowed
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && !window.SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.domain_verified) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] Calibration disabled: domain not verified.'); } catch (_) {} }
      return false;
    }
    var bins = skaiLoadActiveCalibration(); if (!bins.length) { return false; }
    for (var i = 0; i < bins.length; i++) { if ((bins[i].sample_count || 0) < MIN_SAMPLE_COUNT) { return false; } }
    return true;
  }
  function skaiApplyCalibratedRanking(candidates) {
    if (!skaiCanActivateCalibration()) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.info('[SKAI] Calibration not activated; using raw scores.'); } catch (_) {} }
      return candidates;
    }
    var bins = skaiLoadActiveCalibration();
    var calibrated = candidates.slice().map(function (c) {
      var s = c.score || 0; var cal = s;
      for (var i = 0; i < bins.length; i++) { if (s >= bins[i].score_min && s < bins[i].score_max) { cal = bins[i].smoothed_hit_rate; break; } }
      return { num: c.num, score: c.score, calibrated_score: cal };
    });
    calibrated.sort(function (a, b) { return b.calibrated_score - a.calibrated_score; });
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.live = calibrated; }
    return calibrated;
  }
  window.skaiBuildCalibrationBins   = skaiBuildCalibrationBins;
  window.skaiLoadActiveCalibration  = skaiLoadActiveCalibration;
  window.skaiCanActivateCalibration = skaiCanActivateCalibration;
  window.skaiApplyCalibratedRanking = skaiApplyCalibratedRanking;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE8]] SKAI Tail Recovery (feature-gated)
   Phase 8 -- CONTROLLED BOUNDARY OPTIMIZATION
   Regimes: 1-5 protected | 6-25 promotion band | 26-35 recovery | 36-50 weak | 51+ suppression
   Auto-disables if protected core is harmed.
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  function skaiDefineRankRegimes() {
    return [
      { start:  1, end: 5,    label: 'protected_core',   allow_adjust: false },
      { start:  6, end: 25,   label: 'promotion_band',   allow_adjust: true  },
      { start: 26, end: 35,   label: 'recovery_zone',    allow_adjust: true  },
      { start: 36, end: 50,   label: 'weak_tail_zone',   allow_adjust: true  },
      { start: 51, end: 9999, label: 'suppression_zone', allow_adjust: false }
    ];
  }
  function skaiApplyEliteTopRankPromotion(candidates, gameId, runtimeMeta) {
    if (!Array.isArray(candidates) || candidates.length === 0) { return candidates || []; }
    var out = candidates.slice();
    var i;
    var protectedCoreSize = 5;
    var bandStart = 6;
    var bandEnd = Math.min(25, out.length);
    var maxJump = 4;
    var promoStrength = 0.03;
    var promotedCount = 0;
    var harmedCount = 0;
    var baselineTop10 = out.slice(0, 10).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    for (i = 0; i < out.length; i++) { out[i].baseline_rank = out[i].rank || (i + 1); }
    if (bandEnd < bandStart) { return out; }
    var core = out.slice(0, protectedCoreSize);
    var band = out.slice(bandStart - 1, bandEnd);
    var rest = out.slice(bandEnd);
    var freqMap = (((window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {}).scoring || {}).shared_learning_summary || {}).frequency || {};
    for (i = 0; i < band.length; i++) {
      var cand = band[i];
      var num = cand.num;
      var base = cand.score || 0;
      var freqBoost = (freqMap && typeof freqMap[num] !== 'undefined') ? Math.min(1, (parseInt(freqMap[num], 10) || 0) / 10) : 0;
      var tailBoost = cand.tail_adjusted ? 1 : 0;
      var priorBoost = (cand.score_parts && cand.score_parts.tail_prior) ? Math.min(1, Math.max(0, cand.score_parts.tail_prior)) : 0;
      var signal = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (0.45 * tailBoost) + (0.35 * priorBoost) + (0.20 * freqBoost)));
      cand.promotion_signal = signal;
      cand.score = base * (1 + (promoStrength * signal));
    }
    band.sort(function (a, b) {
      var d = (b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0);
      if (Math.abs(d) > 1e-9) { return d; }
      return (a.baseline_rank || 999) - (b.baseline_rank || 999);
    });
    for (i = 0; i < band.length; i++) {
      var minRank = Math.max(bandStart, (band[i].baseline_rank || (bandStart + i)) - maxJump);
      var target = bandStart + i;
      if (target < minRank) { target = minRank; }
      band[i].bounded_target_rank = target;
    }
    band.sort(function (a, b) {
      var d = (a.bounded_target_rank || 999) - (b.bounded_target_rank || 999);
      if (d !== 0) { return d; }
      return ((b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0));
    });
    out = core.concat(band).concat(rest);
    for (i = 0; i < out.length; i++) { out[i].rank = i + 1; }
    var top10Now = out.slice(0, 10).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    for (i = 0; i < out.length; i++) {
      if ((out[i].baseline_rank || 999) > out[i].rank) { promotedCount++; }
    }
    for (i = 0; i < baselineTop10.length; i++) {
      if (top10Now.indexOf(baselineTop10[i]) === -1) { harmedCount++; }
    }
    if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { return out; }
    if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.tail) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.tail = {}; }
    window.SKAI_RUNTIME.tail.promotion_metrics = {
      game_id: String(gameId || ''),
      promotion_help_rate: band.length > 0 ? (promotedCount / band.length) : 0,
      promotion_harm_rate: baselineTop10.length > 0 ? (harmedCount / baselineTop10.length) : 0,
      protected_core_regression_rate: 0,
      max_upward_jump: maxJump,
      promotion_strength: promoStrength
    };
    return out;
  }
  function skaiCanActivateTailRecovery() {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY) { return false; }
    // Domain must be verified before tail recovery is allowed
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && !window.SKAI_RUNTIME.validation.domain_verified) {
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] Tail recovery disabled: domain not verified.'); } catch (_) {} }
      return false;
    }
    var settings = window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config.active_settings;
    return settings ? (settings.supports_tail_recovery || false) : false;
  }
  function skaiApplyBoundaryTailRecovery(candidates) {
    if (!skaiCanActivateTailRecovery()) { return candidates; }
    var regimes = skaiDefineRankRegimes(); var adjusted = candidates.slice();
    for (var i = 0; i < adjusted.length; i++) {
      var rank = adjusted[i].rank || (i + 1); var zone = 'suppression_zone'; var allow = false;
      for (var r = 0; r < regimes.length; r++) { if (rank >= regimes[r].start && rank <= regimes[r].end) { zone = regimes[r].label; allow = regimes[r].allow_adjust; break; } }
      adjusted[i].rank_zone = zone; adjusted[i].tail_adjusted = 0;
      if (allow && zone === 'recovery_zone') { adjusted[i].score = (adjusted[i].score || 0) * 1.01; adjusted[i].tail_adjusted = 1; }
    }
    var core = adjusted.filter(function (c) { return c.rank_zone === 'protected_core'; });
