    var nonCore = adjusted.filter(function (c) { return c.rank_zone !== 'protected_core'; });
    nonCore.sort(function (a, b) { return (b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0); });
    var result = core.concat(nonCore);
    for (var j = 0; j < result.length; j++) { result[j].rank = j + 1; }
    result = skaiApplyEliteTopRankPromotion(result, (window.skaiGetActiveGameId ? window.skaiGetActiveGameId() : ''), window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {});
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.tail.live = result; }
    return result;
  }
  function skaiMeasureTailRecoveryImpact(before, after) {
    if (!Array.isArray(before) || !Array.isArray(after)) { return null; }
    var coreBefore = before.filter(function (c) { return (c.rank || 0) <= 10; }).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var coreAfter  = after.filter(function (c)  { return (c.rank || 0) <= 10; }).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var coreChanged = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < coreBefore.length; i++) { if (coreAfter.indexOf(coreBefore[i]) === -1) { coreChanged++; } }
    var protectedCoreRegressionRate = coreBefore.length > 0 ? coreChanged / coreBefore.length : 0;
    if (protectedCoreRegressionRate > 0.1) {
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY = 0;
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) { try { console.warn('[SKAI] Tail recovery auto-disabled: core regression = ' + protectedCoreRegressionRate); } catch (_) {} }
      if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_triggered = 1; window.SKAI_RUNTIME.audit.fallback_reason = 'tail_recovery_auto_disabled_core_regression'; }
    }
    var nearMissPromoted = after.filter(function (c) { return c.tail_adjusted && (c.rank || 0) <= 20; }).length;
    // tail_miss_reduction_rate: fraction of candidates that were in the tail zone (rank > 50 before) and moved out after recovery
    var tailBefore = before.filter(function (c) { return (c.rank || 0) > 50; }).map(function (c) { return c.num; });
    var movedOutOfTail = 0;
    for (var k = 0; k < tailBefore.length; k++) {
      var rankAfter = null;
      for (var m = 0; m < after.length; m++) { if (after[m].num === tailBefore[k]) { rankAfter = after[m].rank || 0; break; } }
      if (rankAfter !== null && rankAfter <= 50) { movedOutOfTail++; }
    }
    var tailMissReductionRate = tailBefore.length > 0 ? movedOutOfTail / tailBefore.length : 0;
    // tail_gain_score: average score uplift for tail-adjusted candidates
    var tailAdjusted = after.filter(function (c) { return c.tail_adjusted; });
    var totalGain = 0;
    for (var n = 0; n < tailAdjusted.length; n++) {
      var numAdj = tailAdjusted[n].num;
      var scoreBefore = 0;
      for (var q = 0; q < before.length; q++) { if (before[q].num === numAdj) { scoreBefore = before[q].score || 0; break; } }
      totalGain += (tailAdjusted[n].score || 0) - scoreBefore;
    }
    var tailGainScore = tailAdjusted.length > 0 ? totalGain / tailAdjusted.length : 0;
    var impact = { near_miss_promotion_rate: after.length > 0 ? nearMissPromoted / after.length : 0, tail_miss_reduction_rate: tailMissReductionRate, tail_gain_score: tailGainScore, protected_core_regression_rate: protectedCoreRegressionRate };
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.tail.impact_metrics = impact; }
    return impact;
  }
  window.skaiDefineRankRegimes         = skaiDefineRankRegimes;
  window.skaiCanActivateTailRecovery   = skaiCanActivateTailRecovery;
  window.skaiApplyEliteTopRankPromotion = skaiApplyEliteTopRankPromotion;
  window.skaiApplyBoundaryTailRecovery = skaiApplyBoundaryTailRecovery;
  window.skaiMeasureTailRecoveryImpact = skaiMeasureTailRecoveryImpact;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE9+C]] SKAI Shared Per-Lottery Learning
   Phase 9/C -- AGGREGATE BY LOTTERY ONLY; NEVER USER FAVORITES
   Persistent DB-backed shared learning for all authenticated users.
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';

  // Load shared learning from DB into runtime memory for this game
  function skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb(gameId, callback) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING) {
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); }
      return;
    }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] game_id must be a non-empty canonical string identifier (e.g. "101", "AZ2").
    var gidStr = String(gameId || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    if (!gidStr) {
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); }
      return;
    }
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token    = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
    if (!endpoint || !token) {
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); }
      return;
    }
    try {
      var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
      xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
      xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
      xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
        if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
        var raw = String(xhr.responseText || '');
        var cleaned = raw.replace(/^\s+|\s+$/g, '');
        var start = cleaned.indexOf('{');
        var end = cleaned.lastIndexOf('}');
        if (start > 0 || end >= 0) {
          cleaned = (start >= 0 && end > start) ? cleaned.substring(start, end + 1) : cleaned;
        }
        try {
          var resp = JSON.parse(cleaned);
          if (resp && resp.ok && Array.isArray(resp.rows)) {
            // Merge DB rows into runtime memory
            var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
            if (rt) {
              if (!rt.scoring) { rt.scoring = {}; }
              if (!rt.scoring.shared_learning) { rt.scoring.shared_learning = {}; }
              if (!rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId]) { rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId] = {}; }
              for (var i = 0; i < resp.rows.length; i++) {
                var row = resp.rows[i];
                if (!row || !row.learning_key) { continue; }
                try {
                  rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId][row.learning_key] = JSON.parse(row.metric_json || '{}');
                } catch (_) { rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId][row.learning_key] = {}; }
              }
            }
            if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(resp.rows); }
          } else {
            if (resp && !resp.ok) {
              if (window.console && console.warn) {
                console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] load_shared_learning failed:', (resp.error || 'unknown'));
              }
            }
            if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); }
          }
        } catch (_) {
          if (window.console && console.warn) {
            console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] load_shared_learning parse error', { status: xhr.status, preview: cleaned.substring(0, 200) });
          }
          if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); }
        }
      };
      if (window.console && console.info) {
        console.info('[SKAI_PHASE_C] load_shared_learning using game_id=' + gidStr);
      }
      xhr.send('skai_action=load_shared_learning&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gidStr) +
        '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
    } catch (_) {
      if (window.console && console.warn) {
        console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] load_shared_learning XHR error');
      }
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); }
    }
  }

  // Save aggregated learning summary to DB
  function skaiSaveSharedLearningToDb(gameId, learningKey, scope, metricJson, sampleCount, runUuid) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING) { return; }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] game_id must be a non-empty canonical string (e.g. "101", "AZ2").
    var gidStr = String(gameId || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    if (!gidStr) {
      if (window.console && console.error) {
        console.error('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning aborted: missing canonical game_id');
      }
      return;
    }
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token    = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
    if (!endpoint || !token) { return; }
    try {
      var payload = JSON.stringify({
        learning_key:   learningKey  || 'default',
        learning_scope: scope        || 'global',
        metric_json:    metricJson   || {},
        sample_count:   sampleCount  || 0,
        last_result_date: (new Date()).toISOString().substring(0, 10)
      });
      var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
      xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
      xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
      xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
        if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
        try {
          var resp = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);
          if (!resp || !resp.ok) {
            if (window.console && console.warn) {
              console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning failed:', (resp && resp.error) || 'unknown');
            }
          }
        } catch (_) {}
      };
      if (window.console && console.info) {
        console.info('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning using game_id=' + gidStr);
      }
      xhr.send('skai_action=save_shared_learning&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gidStr) +
        '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(runUuid || '') +
        '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(payload) +
        '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
    } catch (_) {
      if (window.console && console.warn) {
        console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] save_shared_learning XHR error');
      }
    }
  }

  // Merge shared learning after draw result is known
  function skaiMergeSharedLearningAfterResult(gameId, learningKey, scope, metricJson, runUuid) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING) { return; }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] game_id must be a non-empty canonical string (e.g. "101", "AZ2").
    var gidStr = String(gameId || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    if (!gidStr) {
      if (window.console && console.error) {
        console.error('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result aborted: missing canonical game_id');
      }
      return;
    }
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token    = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
    if (!endpoint || !token) { return; }
    try {
      var payload = JSON.stringify({
        learning_key:    learningKey || 'outcome',
        learning_scope:  scope       || 'global',
        metric_json:     metricJson  || {},
        sample_count:    1,
        last_result_date: (new Date()).toISOString().substring(0, 10)
      });
      var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
      xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
      xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
      xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
        if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
        try {
          var resp = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText);
          if (!resp || !resp.ok) {
            if (window.console && console.warn) {
              console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result failed:', (resp && resp.error) || 'unknown');
            }
          }
        } catch (_) {}
      };
      if (window.console && console.info) {
        console.info('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result using game_id=' + gidStr);
      }
      xhr.send('skai_action=merge_shared_learning_after_result&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gidStr) +
        '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(runUuid || '') +
        '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(payload) +
        '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
    } catch (_) {
      if (window.console && console.warn) {
        console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] merge_shared_learning_after_result XHR error');
      }
    }
  }

  function skaiPostLearningEventAction(action, gameId, runUuid, targetDrawDate, payload, callback) {
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
    var gidStr = String(gameId || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    var uidStr = String(runUuid || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/g, '');
    var drawStr = String(targetDrawDate || '').replace(/[^0-9\-]/g, '');
    if (!endpoint || !token || !gidStr || !uidStr || !drawStr) {
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback({ ok: false, error: 'invalid_identity' }); }
      return;
    }
    try {
      var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
      xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
      xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
      xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
        if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
        var parsed = null;
        try { parsed = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); } catch (_) { parsed = { ok: false, error: 'parse_error' }; }
        if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(parsed); }
      };
      xhr.send('skai_action=' + encodeURIComponent(action) +
        '&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gidStr) +
        '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(uidStr) +
        '&target_draw_date=' + encodeURIComponent(drawStr) +
        '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(payload || {})) +
        '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
    } catch (_) {
      if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback({ ok: false, error: 'xhr_error' }); }
    }
  }

  function skaiBuildRankMap(arr) {
    var m = {}; var i;
    arr = Array.isArray(arr) ? arr : [];
    for (i = 0; i < arr.length; i++) {
      var n = parseInt(arr[i], 10);
      if (isFinite(n) && n > 0 && typeof m[n] === 'undefined') { m[n] = i + 1; }
    }
    return m;
  }

  function skaiCalcMrrw(winners, rankMap) {
    winners = Array.isArray(winners) ? winners : [];
    var den = winners.length > 0 ? winners.length : 1;
    var sum = 0; var i;
    for (i = 0; i < winners.length; i++) {
      var rk = rankMap[parseInt(winners[i], 10)] || 0;
      sum += rk > 0 ? (1 / rk) : 0;
    }
    return sum / den;
  }

  function skaiCalculateEliteRankMetrics(rankedMainTop20, mainActual, baselineLists, promotionMetrics) {
    var ranked = (Array.isArray(rankedMainTop20) ? rankedMainTop20 : []).map(function (v) { return parseInt(v, 10); }).filter(function (v) { return isFinite(v) && v > 0; }).slice(0, 20);
    var winners = (Array.isArray(mainActual) ? mainActual : []).map(function (v) { return parseInt(v, 10); }).filter(function (v) { return isFinite(v) && v > 0; });
    var rankMap = skaiBuildRankMap(ranked);
    var top5 = ranked.slice(0, 5);
    var top10 = ranked.slice(0, 10);
    var i; var inTop5 = 0; var inTop10 = 0;
    for (i = 0; i < winners.length; i++) {
      if (top5.indexOf(winners[i]) !== -1) { inTop5++; }
      if (top10.indexOf(winners[i]) !== -1) { inTop10++; }
    }
    var den = winners.length > 0 ? winners.length : 1;
    var mrrw = skaiCalcMrrw(winners, rankMap);
    baselineLists = baselineLists || {};
    var liftRandom = mrrw - 0.025;
    var liftFrequency = mrrw - skaiCalcMrrw(winners, skaiBuildRankMap(baselineLists.frequency || []));
    var liftRecency = mrrw - skaiCalcMrrw(winners, skaiBuildRankMap(baselineLists.recency || []));
    var liftSkip = mrrw - skaiCalcMrrw(winners, skaiBuildRankMap(baselineLists.skip || []));
    promotionMetrics = promotionMetrics || {};
    var stable = (typeof promotionMetrics.rolling_stability_score !== 'undefined')
      ? (+promotionMetrics.rolling_stability_score || 0)
      : Math.max(0, 1 - (+promotionMetrics.protected_core_regression_rate || 0));
    var avgLift = (liftRandom + liftFrequency + liftRecency + liftSkip) / 4;
    var objectiveJ = (0.40 * (inTop5 / den)) + (0.25 * mrrw) + (0.15 * (inTop10 / den)) + (0.10 * avgLift) + (0.10 * stable);
    return {
      top5_containment: inTop5 / den,
      top10_containment: inTop10 / den,
      mean_reciprocal_winner_rank: mrrw,
      winner_rank_lift_random: liftRandom,
      winner_rank_lift_frequency: liftFrequency,
      winner_rank_lift_recency: liftRecency,
      winner_rank_lift_skip: liftSkip,
      promotion_help_rate: +promotionMetrics.promotion_help_rate || 0,
      promotion_harm_rate: +promotionMetrics.promotion_harm_rate || 0,
      protected_core_regression_rate: +promotionMetrics.protected_core_regression_rate || 0,
      rolling_stability_score: stable,
      elite_objective_j: objectiveJ
    };
  }

  function skaiReconcileRunAgainstOfficialResult(gameId, runUuid, targetDrawDate, officialResult) {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
    var gidStr = String(gameId || (rt.meta && rt.meta.game_id) || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    var uidStr = String(runUuid || (rt.meta && rt.meta.run_uuid) || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9\-_.]/g, '');
    var drawStr = String(targetDrawDate || '').replace(/[^0-9\-]/g, '');
    if (!gidStr || !uidStr || !/^\d{4}\-\d{2}\-\d{2}$/.test(drawStr)) { return; }
    officialResult = officialResult || {};
    var officialGame = String(officialResult.game_id || gidStr).replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    var officialDate = String(officialResult.draw_date || drawStr).replace(/[^0-9\-]/g, '');
    if (officialGame !== gidStr || officialDate !== drawStr) { return; }
    var mainActual = (officialResult.main || officialResult.main_numbers || officialResult.winning_numbers || officialResult.numbers || []).map(function (v) { return parseInt(v, 10); }).filter(function (v) { return isFinite(v) && v > 0; });
    var extraActual = (officialResult.extra || officialResult.extra_numbers || officialResult.bonus_numbers || []).map(function (v) { return parseInt(v, 10); }).filter(function (v) { return isFinite(v) && v > 0; });
    if (!mainActual.length) { return; }
    var ranked = ((rt.scoring && rt.scoring.engine_output) || []).slice(0, 20).map(function (c) { return parseInt(c.num, 10); }).filter(function (v) { return isFinite(v) && v > 0; });
    if (!ranked.length) { return; }
    var rankedExtra = (window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA || []).slice(0).map(function (v) { return parseInt(v, 10); }).filter(function (v) { return isFinite(v) && v > 0; });
    var shadow = (rt.scoring && rt.scoring.shadow_benchmarks) || {};
    var baselines = {
      frequency: (shadow.frequency && shadow.frequency.top20) || [],
      recency: (shadow.recency && shadow.recency.top20) || [],
      skip: (shadow.skip && shadow.skip.top20) || []
    };
    var promo = (rt.tail && rt.tail.promotion_metrics) || (rt.tail && rt.tail.impact_metrics) || {};
    var elite = skaiCalculateEliteRankMetrics(ranked, mainActual, baselines, promo);
    var payload = {
      official_result: {
        game_id: gidStr,
        draw_date: drawStr,
        main: mainActual,
        extra: extraActual
      },
      ranked_main_top20: ranked,
      ranked_extra: rankedExtra,
      baseline_frequency: baselines.frequency,
      baseline_recency: baselines.recency,
      baseline_skip: baselines.skip,
      promotion_help_rate: elite.promotion_help_rate,
      promotion_harm_rate: elite.promotion_harm_rate,
      protected_core_regression_rate: elite.protected_core_regression_rate,
      rolling_stability_score: elite.rolling_stability_score
    };
    skaiPostLearningEventAction('reconcile_learning_event', gidStr, uidStr, drawStr, payload, function (resp) {
      if (!resp || !resp.ok) { return; }
      skaiMergeSharedLearningAfterResult(gidStr, 'elite_reconciled', 'global', {
        top5_containment: elite.top5_containment,
        top10_containment: elite.top10_containment,
        mean_reciprocal_winner_rank: elite.mean_reciprocal_winner_rank,
        winner_rank_lift_random: elite.winner_rank_lift_random,
        winner_rank_lift_frequency: elite.winner_rank_lift_frequency,
        winner_rank_lift_recency: elite.winner_rank_lift_recency,
        winner_rank_lift_skip: elite.winner_rank_lift_skip,
        rolling_stability_score: elite.rolling_stability_score,
        elite_objective_j: elite.elite_objective_j
      }, uidStr);
    });
  }

  function skaiLoadEliteMetricsSummary(gameId, callback) {
    var gidStr = String(gameId || '').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_\-\.]/g, '');
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
    if (!gidStr || !endpoint || !token) { if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); } return; }
    try {
      var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
      xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
      xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
      xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
        if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
        var resp = null;
        try { resp = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); } catch (_) { resp = null; }
        if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(resp && resp.ok ? resp.summary : null); }
      };
      xhr.send('skai_action=load_elite_metrics_summary&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gidStr) +
        '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
    } catch (_) { if (typeof callback === 'function') { callback(null); } }
  }

  function skaiAggregateLotteryLearning(gameId, history) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING) { return null; }
    if (!Array.isArray(history) || history.length === 0) { return null; }
    var freq = {}; var lastSeen = {};
    for (var i = 0; i < history.length; i++) {
      var draw = history[i];
      if (!Array.isArray(draw)) { continue; }
      for (var j = 0; j < draw.length; j++) {
        freq[draw[j]] = (freq[draw[j]] || 0) + 1;
        lastSeen[draw[j]] = i;
      }
    }
    var summary = {
      game_id: gameId || '', draws_used: history.length,
      frequency: freq, last_seen: lastSeen,
      updated_at: (new Date()).toISOString()
    };
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) {
      if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.shared_learning) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.shared_learning = {}; }
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.shared_learning[gameId] = summary;
    }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Persist aggregate to DB for cross-user sharing
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
    var runUuid = (rt && rt.meta && rt.meta.run_uuid) || '';
    skaiSaveSharedLearningToDb(gameId, 'frequency_aggregate', 'global', summary, history.length, runUuid);
    return summary;
  }

  function skaiUpdateLotteryLearningAfterOutcome(gameId, newDraw) {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING) { return; }
    if (!Array.isArray(newDraw) || newDraw.length === 0) { return; }
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME; if (!rt) { return; }
    var sl = (rt.scoring.shared_learning && rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId]) || {};
    var freq = sl.frequency || {};
    for (var i = 0; i < newDraw.length; i++) { freq[newDraw[i]] = (freq[newDraw[i]] || 0) + 1; }
    sl.frequency = freq;
    sl.draws_used = (sl.draws_used || 0) + 1;
    sl.updated_at = (new Date()).toISOString();
    if (!rt.scoring.shared_learning) { rt.scoring.shared_learning = {}; }
    rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId] = sl;
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C/E]] Persist outcome-based learning update to DB
    var runUuid = (rt.meta && rt.meta.run_uuid) || '';
    skaiMergeSharedLearningAfterResult(gameId, 'outcome_frequency', 'global', sl, runUuid);
  }

  function skaiLoadLotteryLearningSummary(gameId) {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
    return (rt && rt.scoring.shared_learning && rt.scoring.shared_learning[gameId]) || null;
  }

  window.skaiAggregateLotteryLearning          = skaiAggregateLotteryLearning;
  window.skaiUpdateLotteryLearningAfterOutcome = skaiUpdateLotteryLearningAfterOutcome;
  window.skaiLoadLotteryLearningSummary        = skaiLoadLotteryLearningSummary;
  window.skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb          = skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb;
  window.skaiSaveSharedLearningToDb            = skaiSaveSharedLearningToDb;
  window.skaiMergeSharedLearningAfterResult    = skaiMergeSharedLearningAfterResult;
  window.skaiPostLearningEventAction           = skaiPostLearningEventAction;
  window.skaiCalculateEliteRankMetrics         = skaiCalculateEliteRankMetrics;
  window.skaiReconcileRunAgainstOfficialResult = skaiReconcileRunAgainstOfficialResult;
  window.skaiLoadEliteMetricsSummary           = skaiLoadEliteMetricsSummary;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE_C_INIT]] Pre-run shared learning page initializer.
   Loads DB-persisted shared learning into SKAI_RUNTIME at page load
   so that the FIRST run on a fresh page load benefits from prior
   learning accumulated by other authenticated users.
   ES5 only. Runs once after page is interactive.
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  function skaiPageInitSharedLearning() {
    if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING) { return; }
    if (typeof window.skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb !== 'function') { return; }
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Use canonical string game_id -- never allow empty game_id to reach the server.
    var gameIdStr = (typeof window.skaiGetActiveGameId === 'function') ? window.skaiGetActiveGameId() : '';
    if (!gameIdStr) {
      if (window.console && console.warn) {
        console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_C] skaiPageInitSharedLearning: no valid game_id available, skipping load.');
      }
      return;
    }
    if (window.console && console.info) {
      console.info('[SKAI_PHASE_C] resolved active game_id=' + gameIdStr);
    }
    // Load into SKAI_RUNTIME so scoring can reference it before skai:done fires
    window.skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb(gameIdStr, function (rows) {
      if (rows && rows.length > 0) {
        if (window.console && console.log) {
          console.log('[SKAI_PHASE_C_INIT] Pre-loaded ' + rows.length + ' shared learning row(s) for game_id=' + gameIdStr);
        }
      }
    });
  }
  // Run immediately if DOM is ready, else defer to DOMContentLoaded
  if (document.readyState === 'complete' || document.readyState === 'interactive') {
    skaiPageInitSharedLearning();
  } else {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', skaiPageInitSharedLearning);
  }
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE10]] SKAI User Preferences and Set Construction
   Phase 10 -- USER PORTFOLIO SEPARATE FROM PREDICTIVE CORE
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  function skaiLoadUserPreferences(userId, gameId) {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME; var key = String(userId || '') + '_' + String(gameId || '');
    // Return cached runtime value immediately (populated by PHP bridge on load)
    var cached = (rt && rt.decision.user_preferences && rt.decision.user_preferences[key]);
    if (cached) { return cached; }
    var defaults = { user_id: userId || 0, game_id: gameId || '', risk_profile: 'balanced', coverage_style: 'balanced', combo_count_preference: 5, overlap_tolerance: 'medium', ui_density_preference: 'comfortable', show_advanced_panels: 0 };
    // Async refresh from PHP endpoint (non-blocking; updates runtime cache for next call)
    if (window.skaiRunLogEndpoint && userId && gameId) {
      var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
      var token    = window.skaiCsrfToken      || '';
      if (endpoint && token) {
        try {
          var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
          xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
          xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
          xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
            if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
            try {
              var res = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}');
              if (res.ok && res.preferences && rt) {
                if (!rt.decision.user_preferences) { rt.decision.user_preferences = {}; }
                rt.decision.user_preferences[key] = res.preferences;
              }
            } catch (_) {}
          };
          xhr.send('skai_action=load_user_preferences' +
            '&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
            '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
        } catch (_) {}
      }
    }
    return defaults;
  }
  function skaiSaveUserPreferences(userId, gameId, prefs) {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME; if (!rt) { return; }
    if (!rt.decision.user_preferences) { rt.decision.user_preferences = {}; }
    var key = String(userId || '') + '_' + String(gameId || '');
    rt.decision.user_preferences[key] = prefs || {};
    // Persist to PHP endpoint asynchronously
    var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
    var token    = window.skaiCsrfToken      || '';
    if (endpoint && token && userId && gameId) {
      try {
        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.open('POST', endpoint, true);
        xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
        xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
          if (xhr.readyState !== 4 || xhr.status === 200) { return; }
          if (typeof window.skaiLogFallbackEvent === 'function') {
            window.skaiLogFallbackEvent('save_user_preferences HTTP ' + xhr.status, {});
          }
        };
        xhr.send('skai_action=save_user_preferences' +
          '&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
          '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(prefs || {})) +
          '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
      } catch (e) {
        if (typeof window.skaiLogFallbackEvent === 'function') {
          window.skaiLogFallbackEvent('save_user_preferences network error: ' + String(e && e.message || e), {});
        }
      }
    }
  }
  function skaiApplyCoverageProfile(candidates, style) {
    if (!Array.isArray(candidates)) { return []; }
    if (style === 'aggressive') { return candidates.slice(); }
    if (style === 'conservative') { return candidates.slice(0, 40); }
    return candidates.slice(0, 20);
  }
  function skaiApplyOverlapControl(candidates) { return candidates; }
  function skaiBuildDecisionSets(rankedCandidates, userId, gameId) {
    var prefs = skaiLoadUserPreferences(userId, gameId); var comboCount = prefs.combo_count_preference || 5;
    var sets = skaiApplyCoverageProfile(rankedCandidates, prefs.coverage_style);
    sets = skaiApplyOverlapControl(sets); sets = sets.slice(0, comboCount);
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.decision.active_sets = sets; window.SKAI_RUNTIME.final.rank_source = 'canonical+user_prefs'; }
    return sets;
  }
  window.skaiLoadUserPreferences  = skaiLoadUserPreferences;
  window.skaiSaveUserPreferences  = skaiSaveUserPreferences;
  window.skaiBuildDecisionSets    = skaiBuildDecisionSets;
  window.skaiApplyCoverageProfile = skaiApplyCoverageProfile;
  window.skaiApplyOverlapControl  = skaiApplyOverlapControl;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE11]] SKAI Security Hardening
   Phase 11 -- OUTPUT SANITIZATION HELPERS
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  var ESC_MAP = { '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#x27;', '/': '&#x2F;' };
  function skaiEscapeHtml(str) { return String(str == null ? '' : str).replace(/[&<>"'/]/g, function (c) { return ESC_MAP[c] || c; }); }
  function skaiEscapeAttr(str) { return skaiEscapeHtml(str); }
  function skaiSanitizeText(str) { return String(str == null ? '' : str).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); }
  function skaiSanitizeInt(val, min, max) { var n = parseInt(String(val), 10); if (isNaN(n)) { n = 0; } if (typeof min === 'number' && n < min) { n = min; } if (typeof max === 'number' && n > max) { n = max; } return n; }
  function skaiSanitizeFloat(val, min, max) { var f = parseFloat(String(val)); if (isNaN(f)) { f = 0.0; } if (typeof min === 'number' && f < min) { f = min; } if (typeof max === 'number' && f > max) { f = max; } return f; }
  window.skaiEscapeHtml   = skaiEscapeHtml;
  window.skaiEscapeAttr   = skaiEscapeAttr;
  window.skaiSanitizeText = skaiSanitizeText;
  window.skaiSanitizeInt  = skaiSanitizeInt;
  window.skaiSanitizeFloat= skaiSanitizeFloat;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_PHASE12]] SKAI UI Evidence State Hooks
   Phase 12 -- DESCRIPTIVE / EXPERIMENTAL / VALIDATED PANELS
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';
  var EVIDENCE_STATES = ['descriptive', 'experimental', 'validated'];
  function skaiGetEvidenceState(context) {
    context = context || {};
    if (context.calibrated && context.recall_threshold_met && context.has_backtest) { return 'validated'; }
    if (context.has_backtest || context.calibrated) { return 'experimental'; }
    return 'descriptive';
  }
  function skaiRenderEvidenceBadge(state) {
    var safeState = (EVIDENCE_STATES.indexOf(state) !== -1) ? state : 'descriptive';
    var label = { descriptive: 'Descriptive', experimental: 'Experimental', validated: 'Validated' }[safeState];
    var esc  = window.skaiEscapeHtml || function (s) { return String(s); };
    var attr = window.skaiEscapeAttr  || esc;
    return '<span class="skai-evidence-badge skai-evidence-' + attr(safeState) + '">' + esc(label) + '</span>';
  }
  function skaiBuildEvidencePanelMeta(panelId, label, context) {
    var state = skaiGetEvidenceState(context || {});
    var meta = { panel_id: panelId || '', label: label || '', evidence_state: state, badge_html: skaiRenderEvidenceBadge(state), show_advanced: (state === 'validated') || (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.ui.show_advanced_panels) || false };
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME) { if (!window.SKAI_RUNTIME.ui.panels) { window.SKAI_RUNTIME.ui.panels = {}; } window.SKAI_RUNTIME.ui.panels[panelId || ''] = meta; }
    return meta;
  }
  window.skaiGetEvidenceState       = skaiGetEvidenceState;
  window.skaiRenderEvidenceBadge    = skaiRenderEvidenceBadge;
  window.skaiBuildEvidencePanelMeta = skaiBuildEvidencePanelMeta;
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_TRUST_LAYER]] Educational + Trust Layer JS
   ES5 strict compatible. No const/let/arrow functions.
   Depends on: skai:done event, existing profile/strategy
   buttons, existing summary card fields.
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';

  /* ---- Helpers ---- */
  function skaiGetReadableProfileLabel() {
    var btn = document.querySelector('#skai-profile-buttons .btn-chip.is-active');
    if (!btn) { return 'Balanced'; }
    var dp = btn.getAttribute('data-profile') || '';
    if (dp === 'explorative') { return 'Wider Search'; }
    if (dp === 'conservative') { return 'Safer Range'; }
    return 'Balanced';
  }

  function skaiGetReadableStrategyLabel() {
    var btn = document.querySelector('#skai-strategy-buttons .btn-chip.is-active');
    if (!btn) { return 'Balanced'; }
    var ds = btn.getAttribute('data-strategy') || '';
    if (ds === 'ai')     { return 'AI-focused'; }
    if (ds === 'skip')   { return 'Pattern-focused'; }
    if (ds === 'hybrid') { return 'Balanced'; }
    return 'Balanced';
  }

  function skaiGetReadableBlendLabel() {
    var el = document.getElementById('skai-summary-blend');
    if (el && el.textContent && el.textContent !== '' && el.textContent !== '--') {
      return el.textContent;
    }
    // Fall back to slider value if available
    var slider = document.querySelector('[data-skai-blend]') || document.querySelector('#skai-blend-slider') || document.querySelector('.skai-blend-slider');
    if (slider) {
      var v = parseInt(slider.value || slider.getAttribute('data-skai-blend') || '60', 10);
      return v + '% AI';
    }
    return '--';
  }

  function skaiGetDrawCountLabel() {
    // Try runtime object first
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
    if (rt && rt.history && typeof rt.history.draw_count === 'number') {
      return rt.history.draw_count + ' draws';
    }
    // Try visible total-draws field
    var el = document.getElementById('skai-total-draws') || document.querySelector('[data-skai-total-draws]');
    if (el) { return (el.textContent || el.value || '--').trim() + ' draws'; }
    // Try canonical raw-draws array (same source used by the run snapshot)
    var rd = Array.isArray(window.__SKAI_RAW_DRAWS__) ? window.__SKAI_RAW_DRAWS__ : null;
    if (rd && rd.length > 0) { return rd.length + ' draws'; }
    // Try window.draws fallback
    var wd = Array.isArray(window.draws) ? window.draws : null;
    if (wd && wd.length > 0) { return wd.length + ' draws'; }
    return '--';
  }

  function skaiGetEngineStateLabels() {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
    var labels = {
      learning:    'Building',
      calibration: 'Not active',
      tail:        'Not active'
    };
    if (!rt) { return labels; }
    // Shared learning
    if (rt.scoring && rt.scoring.shared_learning_summary) {
      labels.learning = 'Active';
    } else if (rt.scoring && rt.scoring.shared_learning) {
      labels.learning = 'Active';
    }
    // Calibration
    if (rt.calibration && rt.calibration.active_bins && rt.calibration.active_bins.length > 0) {
      labels.calibration = 'Active';
    } else if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION) {
      labels.calibration = 'Building';
    }
    // Tail recovery
    if (rt.tail && rt.tail.impact_metrics) {
      var autoOff = rt.tail.auto_disabled;
      labels.tail = autoOff ? 'Not active (auto-disabled)' : 'Active';
    } else if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY) {
      labels.tail = 'Building';
    }
    return labels;
  }

  /* ---- Chip helpers ---- */
  function skaiSetChip(id, text, state) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) { return; }
    el.textContent = text;
    el.className = 'skai-chip skai-chip--dot';
    if (state === 'active')   { el.className += ' skai-chip--active'; }
    else if (state === 'caution') { el.className += ' skai-chip--caution'; }
    else                      { el.className += ' skai-chip--building'; }
  }

  function setText(id, val) {
    var el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) { el.textContent = val || '--'; }
  }

  /* ---- skaiSyncLearningPanels: update all live status fields ---- */
  function skaiSyncLearningPanels() {
    var profile  = skaiGetReadableProfileLabel();
    var strategy = skaiGetReadableStrategyLabel();
    var blend    = skaiGetReadableBlendLabel();
    var draws    = skaiGetDrawCountLabel();
    var engine   = skaiGetEngineStateLabels();

    // --- Panel A: status chips ---
    skaiSetChip('skai-run-engine-learning-state',    'Shared learning: ' + engine.learning,
      engine.learning === 'Active' ? 'active' : (engine.learning === 'Not active' ? 'caution' : 'building'));
    skaiSetChip('skai-run-engine-calibration-state', 'Calibration: ' + engine.calibration,
      engine.calibration === 'Active' ? 'active' : (engine.calibration.indexOf('Not') === 0 ? 'caution' : 'building'));
    skaiSetChip('skai-run-engine-tail-state',        'Tail recovery: ' + engine.tail,
      engine.tail === 'Active' ? 'active' : (engine.tail.indexOf('Not') === 0 ? 'caution' : 'building'));
    skaiSetChip('skai-run-engine-profile-state',  'Profile: ' + profile,  'active');
    skaiSetChip('skai-run-engine-strategy-state', 'Strategy: ' + strategy, 'active');

    // --- Panel B: run-powered fields ---
    setText('skai-rpp-profile',     profile);
    setText('skai-rpp-strategy',    strategy);
    setText('skai-rpp-blend',       blend);
    setText('skai-rpp-draws',       draws);
    setText('skai-rpp-learning',    engine.learning);
    setText('skai-rpp-calibration', engine.calibration);
    setText('skai-rpp-tail',        engine.tail);

    // Show panel B after run
    var rpp = document.getElementById('skai-run-powered-panel');
    if (rpp) { rpp.className = rpp.className + ' is-visible'; }
  }

  /* ---- skaiFaqInit: accordion keyboard + click ---- */
  function skaiFaqInit() {
    var faq = document.getElementById('skai-learning-faq');
    if (!faq) { return; }
    var btns = faq.querySelectorAll('.skai-faq__btn');
    for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) {
      (function (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
          var expanded = btn.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true';
          var panelId  = btn.getAttribute('aria-controls');
          var panel    = document.getElementById(panelId);
          if (!panel) { return; }
          if (expanded) {
            btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
            panel.className = panel.className.replace(' is-open', '');
          } else {
            btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
            if (panel.className.indexOf('is-open') === -1) {
              panel.className += ' is-open';
            }
          }
        });
        btn.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
          if (e.keyCode === 13 || e.keyCode === 32) {
            e.preventDefault();
            btn.click();
          }
        });
      }(btns[i]));
    }
  }

  /* ---- Listen for skai:done to trigger sync ---- */
  window.addEventListener('skai:done', function () {
    try { skaiSyncLearningPanels(); } catch (_) {}
  }, false);

  /* ---- Also sync on profile/strategy button clicks (pre-run) ---- */
  function skaiBindProfileStrategySync() {
    var rows = document.querySelectorAll('#skai-profile-buttons .btn-chip, #skai-strategy-buttons .btn-chip');
    for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
      rows[i].addEventListener('click', function () {
        // defer so is-active class is applied first
        setTimeout(function () {
          try { skaiSyncLearningPanels(); } catch (_) {}
        }, 50);
      }, false);
    }
  }

  /* ---- Init on DOM ready ---- */
  function skaiTrustLayerInit() {
    skaiFaqInit();
    skaiBindProfileStrategySync();
    try { skaiSyncLearningPanels(); } catch (_) {}
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', skaiTrustLayerInit, false);
  } else {
    skaiTrustLayerInit();
  }

}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================
   [[SKAI_WIRING]] SKAI Live Analysis Event Wiring
   Phase 2-12 integration into the existing event-driven flow.

   Purpose:
     - Wire skaiInitRuntime() into skai:ml:start so every run
       gets a fresh canonical runtime object.
     - Wire Phase 3 score pipeline, Phase 4 domain/mode checks,
       Phase 5 run logging/audit, Phase 6 shadow benchmarks,
       Phase 9 shared learning into skai:done.
     - Wire skaiVerifyDisplayMatchesEngine() post-render.

   This block is the ONLY place Phase 2-12 helpers are called
   from the live analysis path.  All wiring is additive and
   non-breaking; failures fall back with skaiLogFallbackEvent().

   Depends on:
     - window.SKAI_FLAGS   (set by PHP bridge before Phase 2)
     - window.SKAI_RUNTIME (set by Phase 2)
     - All Phase 2-12 window.skai* helpers
     - window.draws        (draw history from PHP)
     - window.SKAI_META    (lottery meta from PHP)
   ========================================================== */
(function () {
  'use strict';

  function _getGameId() {
    // [[SKAI_PHASE_C]] Use canonical string game_id helper as primary source.
    // game_id is the string identifier (e.g. "101", "AZ2") that is the Phase C shared-learning key.
    if (typeof window.skaiGetActiveGameId === 'function') {
      var gid = window.skaiGetActiveGameId();
      if (gid) { return gid; }
    }
    var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
    var cfg  = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
    var fid  = window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.game_id ? window.SKAI_FLAGS.game_id : '';
    var raw = String(fid || cfg.gameId || cfg.game_id || meta.gameId || '');
    return (typeof window.skaiSanitizeText === 'function') ? window.skaiSanitizeText(raw) : raw;
  }

  function _getLotterySlug() {
    var cfg = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
    return String(cfg.slug || cfg.lottery_slug || '');
  }

  function _getDrawHistory() {
    var arr = Array.isArray(window.draws) ? window.draws : [];
    return arr.map(function (d) {
      return Array.isArray(d.numbers) ? d.numbers.map(Number) : [];
    }).filter(function (row) { return row.length > 0; });
  }

  function _safeFn(name, fn) {
    try { return fn(); }
    catch (e) {
      if (typeof window.skaiLogFallbackEvent === 'function') {
        window.skaiLogFallbackEvent('[[SKAI_WIRING]] ' + name + ' threw: ' + String(e && e.message || e), {});
      }
      return null;
    }
  }

  // -------------------------------------------------------
  // skai:ml:start -- called once per analysis run
  // -------------------------------------------------------
  window.addEventListener('skai:ml:start', function () {

    // [[SKAI_PHASE11]] SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE: disable all advanced features when set
    if (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE) {
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION  = 0;
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY = 0;
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_PAIRWISE      = 0;
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS         = 0;
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING   = 0;
      window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_SHARED_LEARNING = 0;
      if (window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_LOG_FALLBACKS) {
        try { console.warn('[SKAI] SKAI_FORCE_SAFE_MODE active: all advanced features disabled.'); } catch (_) {}
      }
    }

    _safeFn('skaiInitRuntime', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiInitRuntime !== 'function') { return; }
      window.skaiInitRuntime(_getGameId(), _getLotterySlug(), '2.0');
    });

    _safeFn('skaiSetRuntimeMeta.game_config', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiSetRuntimeMeta !== 'function') { return; }
      var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
      var cfg  = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
      window.skaiSetRuntimeMeta({
        main_pool_size:   meta.domain      || meta.mainMax       || cfg.main_pool_size  || 0,
        draw_count_main:  meta.pick        || meta.pickMain      || cfg.draw_count_main || 0,
        is_daily:         meta.isDaily     || meta.isDailyDigitGame || 0,
        prediction_mode:  meta.predictionMode || ''
      });
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE4]] Load authoritative lottery settings from #__skai_lottery_settings (async DB fetch + runtime cache update)
    _safeFn('skaiLoadLotterySettings', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiLoadLotterySettings !== 'function') { return; }
      window.skaiLoadLotterySettings(_getGameId());
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE4]] Domain + mode verification
    _safeFn('skaiVerifyLotteryDomain', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiVerifyLotteryDomain !== 'function') { return; }
      var cfg = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
      window.skaiVerifyLotteryDomain(_getGameId(), cfg);
    });

    _safeFn('skaiVerifyLotteryMode', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiVerifyLotteryMode !== 'function') { return; }
      var cfg = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
      window.skaiVerifyLotteryMode(_getGameId(), cfg);
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE4]] Resolve authoritative lottery domain (main pool, bonus, draw counts) from cached settings
    _safeFn('skaiResolveLotteryDomain', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiResolveLotteryDomain !== 'function') { return; }
      var resolved = window.skaiResolveLotteryDomain(_getGameId());
      if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && resolved) {
        window.SKAI_RUNTIME.config.resolved_domain = resolved;
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Build canonical score pipeline
    _safeFn('skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline !== 'function') { return; }
      var cfg   = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.lottoConfig || {};
      var flags = window.SKAI_FLAGS || {};
      var meta  = window.SKAI_META  || {};
      var _sf = window.skaiSanitizeFloat;
      window.skaiBuildCanonicalScorePipeline({
        mainPoolSize:   meta.domain   || meta.mainMax  || cfg.main_pool_size   || 0,
        drawCountMain:  meta.pick     || meta.pickMain || cfg.draw_count_main  || 0,
        supportsBonus:  meta.hasExtraBall ? 1 : 0,
        frequencyWeight: _sf ? _sf(cfg.frequencyWeight || 1.0, 0.0, 5.0) : 1.0,
        recencyWeight:   _sf ? _sf(cfg.recencyWeight   || 1.0, 0.0, 5.0) : 1.0,
        skipWeight:      _sf ? _sf(cfg.skipWeight      || 1.0, 0.0, 5.0) : 1.0
      }, flags);
    });

  }, false);

  // -------------------------------------------------------
  // skai:done -- called after the full analysis run completes
  // -------------------------------------------------------
  window.addEventListener('skai:done', function () {
    var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME;
    if (!rt) { return; }

    // Mark finish time
    _safeFn('skaiSetRuntimeMeta.finished', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiSetRuntimeMeta === 'function') {
        window.skaiSetRuntimeMeta({ finished_at: (new Date()).toISOString() });
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Apply canonical ranking to whatever engine_output exists
    _safeFn('skaiApplyCanonicalRanking', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiApplyCanonicalRanking !== 'function') { return; }
      var candidates = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output : [];
      if (candidates.length > 0) {
        var pipeline = (rt.scoring && rt.scoring.pipeline) || {};
        window.skaiApplyCanonicalRanking(candidates, pipeline);
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Live backtest and tuning (gated by SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING)
    // [[FIX]] Async-deferred: captures all needed values synchronously then runs the heavy
    // backtest+tuning loop in setTimeout(fn,0). This yields the main thread so every other
    // skai:done handler (including the form-field writer) completes before the loop starts.
    // History is capped at 60 draws (50 windows x 5 param sets = 250 iterations, < 10 ms)
    // to keep the deferred work bounded. Persist AJAX calls are bundled inside the same
    // callback so save_backtest_summary and save_parameter_set always fire after results exist.
    _safeFn('skaiRunCanonicalBacktest+Tuning', function () {
      if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING) { return; }
      var history = _getDrawHistory();
      if (history.length < 11) { return; }
      if (typeof window.skaiRunCanonicalBacktest !== 'function') { return; }
      // Cap history to bound computation; 60 draws -> 50 windows x 5 params = 250 iters
      var _btHistory = history.length > 60 ? history.slice(-60) : history;
      // Capture all closure values before yielding the thread
      var _btPipeline = (rt.scoring && rt.scoring.pipeline) || {};
      var _btPoolSize = (_btPipeline.config_snapshot && _btPipeline.config_snapshot.mainPoolSize) || 49;
      var _btEndpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || '';
      var _btToken    = window.skaiCsrfToken      || '';
      var _btGameId   = _getGameId();
      var _btRunUuid  = (rt.meta && rt.meta.run_uuid) || '';
      setTimeout(function () {
        try {
          var _btFreqFn = function (trainWindow) {
            var freq = {};
            for (var i = 0; i < trainWindow.length; i++) {
              var draw = trainWindow[i];
              for (var j = 0; j < draw.length; j++) { freq[draw[j]] = (freq[draw[j]] || 0) + 1; }
            }
            var candidates = [];
            for (var n = 1; n <= _btPoolSize; n++) { candidates.push({ num: n, score: freq[n] || 0 }); }
            return candidates;
          };
          window.skaiRunCanonicalBacktest(_btHistory, 10, _btFreqFn);
          if (typeof window.skaiRunCanonicalTuning === 'function') {
            var _btParamGrid = [
              { frequencyWeight: 1.0, recencyWeight: 1.0 },
              { frequencyWeight: 1.5, recencyWeight: 0.5 },
              { frequencyWeight: 0.5, recencyWeight: 1.5 },
              { frequencyWeight: 2.0, recencyWeight: 1.0 },
              { frequencyWeight: 1.0, recencyWeight: 2.0 }
            ];
            var _btTuneFn = function (trainWindow, params) {
              var freq = {}; var recency = {};
              for (var i = 0; i < trainWindow.length; i++) {
                var draw = trainWindow[i]; var weight = i + 1;
                for (var j = 0; j < draw.length; j++) {
                  freq[draw[j]]    = (freq[draw[j]] || 0) + 1;
                  recency[draw[j]] = (recency[draw[j]] || 0) + weight;
                }
              }
              var candidates = [];
              var fw = (params && params.frequencyWeight) || 1.0;
              var rw = (params && params.recencyWeight)   || 1.0;
              for (var n = 1; n <= _btPoolSize; n++) {
                candidates.push({ num: n, score: (freq[n] || 0) * fw + (recency[n] || 0) * rw });
              }
              return candidates;
            };
            window.skaiRunCanonicalTuning(_btParamGrid, _btTuneFn, _btHistory, 10);
          }
          // Persist results immediately after backtest+tuning complete (results now populated)
          if (_btEndpoint && _btToken) {
            var _btRt       = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
            var _btRunUuid2 = (_btRt.meta && _btRt.meta.run_uuid) || _btRunUuid;
            var _btResults  = (_btRt.scoring && _btRt.scoring.backtest_results) || [];
            if (_btResults.length > 0) {
              var _btTotalRecall = 0;
              var _btTotalT5 = 0; var _btTotalT10 = 0; var _btTotalMRRW = 0; var _btTotalLift = 0; var _btTotalStable = 0; var _btTotalObj = 0;
              for (var _bti = 0; _bti < _btResults.length; _bti++) {
                _btTotalRecall += _btResults[_bti].recall_at_20 || 0;
                _btTotalT5 += _btResults[_bti].top5_containment_rate || 0;
                _btTotalT10 += _btResults[_bti].top10_containment_rate || 0;
                _btTotalMRRW += _btResults[_bti].mean_reciprocal_winner_rank || 0;
                _btTotalLift += ((_btResults[_bti].winner_rank_lift_vs_random || 0) + (_btResults[_bti].winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency || 0) + (_btResults[_bti].winner_rank_lift_vs_recency || 0) + (_btResults[_bti].winner_rank_lift_vs_skip || 0)) / 4;
                _btTotalStable += _btResults[_bti].rolling_stability_score || 0;
                _btTotalObj += _btResults[_bti].elite_objective_j || 0;
              }
              var _btPayload = JSON.stringify({
                window_size:      10,
                total_windows:    _btResults.length,
                avg_recall_at_20: _btTotalRecall / _btResults.length,
                top5_containment_rate: _btTotalT5 / _btResults.length,
                top10_containment_rate: _btTotalT10 / _btResults.length,
                mean_reciprocal_winner_rank: _btTotalMRRW / _btResults.length,
                benchmark_random_lift: _btTotalLift / _btResults.length,
                rolling_stability_score: _btTotalStable / _btResults.length,
                elite_objective_j: _btTotalObj / _btResults.length,
                score_path_hash:  (_btRt.scoring && _btRt.scoring.score_path_hash) || ''
              });
              try {
                var _xhrBt = new XMLHttpRequest();
                _xhrBt.open('POST', _btEndpoint, true);
                _xhrBt.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
                _xhrBt.onreadystatechange = function () {
                  if (_xhrBt.readyState !== 4) { return; }
                  try {
                    var _rBt = JSON.parse(_xhrBt.responseText);
                    if (!_rBt || !_rBt.ok) {
                      if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_F] save_backtest_summary failed:', (_rBt && _rBt.error) || 'unknown'); }
                    }
                  } catch (_) {}
                };
                _xhrBt.send('skai_action=save_backtest_summary&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(_btGameId) +
                  '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(_btRunUuid2) +
                  '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(_btPayload) +
                  '&' + encodeURIComponent(_btToken) + '=1');
              } catch (_) {}
            }
            var _btTunedParams = (_btRt.scoring && _btRt.scoring.tuned_params);
            if (_btTunedParams) {
              var _btPsAvg = (_btResults.length > 0)
                ? (function () { var s = 0; for (var i = 0; i < _btResults.length; i++) { s += _btResults[i].recall_at_20 || 0; } return s / _btResults.length; }()) : 0;
              var _btPsEliteJ = (_btResults.length > 0)
                ? (function () { var s = 0; for (var i = 0; i < _btResults.length; i++) { s += _btResults[i].elite_objective_j || 0; } return s / _btResults.length; }()) : 0;
              var _btPsPayload = JSON.stringify({
                params:               _btTunedParams,
                avg_recall_at_20:     _btPsAvg,
                avg_elite_objective_j: _btPsEliteJ,
                tuning_mode:          (_btRt.scoring && _btRt.scoring.tuning_mode) || 'canonical_grid'
              });
              try {
                var _xhrPs = new XMLHttpRequest();
                _xhrPs.open('POST', _btEndpoint, true);
                _xhrPs.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
                _xhrPs.onreadystatechange = function () {
                  if (_xhrPs.readyState !== 4) { return; }
                  try {
                    var _rPs = JSON.parse(_xhrPs.responseText);
                    if (!_rPs || !_rPs.ok) {
                      if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_F] save_parameter_set failed:', (_rPs && _rPs.error) || 'unknown'); }
                    }
                  } catch (_) {}
                };
                _xhrPs.send('skai_action=save_parameter_set&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(_btGameId) +
                  '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(_btRunUuid2) +
                  '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(_btPsPayload) +
                  '&' + encodeURIComponent(_btToken) + '=1');
              } catch (_) {}
            }
          }
        } catch (_) {}
      }, 0);
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE3]] Persist backtest summary and best parameter set to PHP
    // NOTE: When SKAI_ENABLE_LIVE_TUNING is active this block is a no-op because
    // backtest_results are populated asynchronously (see async setTimeout above).
    // Kept as a safety fallback for any future synchronous backtest path.
    _safeFn('persist_backtest+params', function () {
      var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || ''; var token = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
      if (!endpoint || !token) { return; }
      var gameId  = _getGameId();
      var rt2     = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
      var runUuid = (rt2.meta && rt2.meta.run_uuid) || '';
      var btResults = (rt2.scoring && rt2.scoring.backtest_results) || [];
      if (btResults.length > 0) {
        var totalRecall = 0;
        var totalT5 = 0; var totalT10 = 0; var totalMRRW = 0; var totalLift = 0; var totalStable = 0; var totalObj = 0;
        for (var bi = 0; bi < btResults.length; bi++) {
          totalRecall += btResults[bi].recall_at_20 || 0;
          totalT5 += btResults[bi].top5_containment_rate || 0;
          totalT10 += btResults[bi].top10_containment_rate || 0;
          totalMRRW += btResults[bi].mean_reciprocal_winner_rank || 0;
          totalLift += ((btResults[bi].winner_rank_lift_vs_random || 0) + (btResults[bi].winner_rank_lift_vs_frequency || 0) + (btResults[bi].winner_rank_lift_vs_recency || 0) + (btResults[bi].winner_rank_lift_vs_skip || 0)) / 4;
          totalStable += btResults[bi].rolling_stability_score || 0;
          totalObj += btResults[bi].elite_objective_j || 0;
        }
        var btPayload = JSON.stringify({
          window_size:      10,
          total_windows:    btResults.length,
          avg_recall_at_20: btResults.length > 0 ? totalRecall / btResults.length : 0,
          top5_containment_rate: btResults.length > 0 ? totalT5 / btResults.length : 0,
          top10_containment_rate: btResults.length > 0 ? totalT10 / btResults.length : 0,
          mean_reciprocal_winner_rank: btResults.length > 0 ? totalMRRW / btResults.length : 0,
          benchmark_random_lift: btResults.length > 0 ? totalLift / btResults.length : 0,
          rolling_stability_score: btResults.length > 0 ? totalStable / btResults.length : 0,
          elite_objective_j: btResults.length > 0 ? totalObj / btResults.length : 0,
          score_path_hash:  (rt2.scoring && rt2.scoring.score_path_hash) || ''
        });
        try {
          var xhr1 = new XMLHttpRequest();
          xhr1.open('POST', endpoint, true);
          xhr1.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
          xhr1.onreadystatechange = function () {
            if (xhr1.readyState !== 4) { return; }
            try {
              var r1 = JSON.parse(xhr1.responseText);
              if (!r1 || !r1.ok) {
                if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_F] save_backtest_summary failed:', (r1 && r1.error) || 'unknown'); }
              }
            } catch (_) {}
          };
          xhr1.send('skai_action=save_backtest_summary&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
            '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(runUuid) +
            '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(btPayload) +
            '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
        } catch (_) {}
      }
      var tunedParams = (rt2.scoring && rt2.scoring.tuned_params);
      if (tunedParams) {
        var _ps2BtR = (rt2.scoring && rt2.scoring.backtest_results) || [];
        var psPayload = JSON.stringify({
          params:               tunedParams,
          avg_recall_at_20: (_ps2BtR.length > 0)
            ? (function () { var s = 0; for (var i = 0; i < _ps2BtR.length; i++) { s += _ps2BtR[i].recall_at_20 || 0; } return s / _ps2BtR.length; }()) : 0,
          avg_elite_objective_j: (_ps2BtR.length > 0)
            ? (function () { var s = 0; for (var i = 0; i < _ps2BtR.length; i++) { s += _ps2BtR[i].elite_objective_j || 0; } return s / _ps2BtR.length; }()) : 0,
          tuning_mode:          (rt2.scoring && rt2.scoring.tuning_mode) || 'canonical_grid'
        });
        try {
          var xhr2 = new XMLHttpRequest();
          xhr2.open('POST', endpoint, true);
          xhr2.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
          xhr2.onreadystatechange = function () {
            if (xhr2.readyState !== 4) { return; }
            try {
              var r2 = JSON.parse(xhr2.responseText);
              if (!r2 || !r2.ok) {
                if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_F] save_parameter_set failed:', (r2 && r2.error) || 'unknown'); }
              }
            } catch (_) {}
          };
          xhr2.send('skai_action=save_parameter_set&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
            '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(runUuid) +
            '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(psPayload) +
            '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
        } catch (_) {}
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE2]] Persist authoritative lottery settings + best settings wiring
    _safeFn('persist_lottery_settings+best_settings', function () {
      var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || ''; var token = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
      if (!endpoint || !token) { return; }
      var gameId = _getGameId();
      var rtls = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
      var meta = rtls.meta || {};
      var cfg = rtls.config || {};
      var scoring = rtls.scoring || {};
      var hist = _getDrawHistory();
      var lotteryPayload = JSON.stringify({
        lottery_slug: (meta.lottery_slug || meta.slug || meta.game_slug || ('game_' + gameId)),
        main_pool_size: meta.main_pool_size || meta.number_pool || cfg.main_pool_size || cfg.number_pool || 0,
        bonus_pool_size: meta.bonus_pool_size || cfg.bonus_pool_size || 0,
        draw_count_main: hist.length || meta.draw_count_main || meta.draw_count || 0,
        draw_count_bonus: meta.draw_count_bonus || 0,
        is_multistate: meta.is_multistate ? 1 : 0,
        is_multicountry: meta.is_multicountry ? 1 : 0,
        supports_bonus: (meta.supports_bonus || cfg.supports_bonus) ? 1 : 0,
        supports_pairs: (typeof cfg.supports_pairs !== 'undefined') ? (cfg.supports_pairs ? 1 : 0) : 1,
        supports_tail_recovery: (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY) ? 1 : 0,
        supports_calibration: (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION) ? 1 : 0,
        supports_gibbs: (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_GIBBS) ? 1 : 0,
        active_parameter_set_id: scoring.active_parameter_set_id || 0,
        active_calibration_version: (rtls.calibration && rtls.calibration.version) || '',
        active_tail_version: (rtls.tail && rtls.tail.version) || '',
        status: 'active'
      });
      try {
        var xhrLs2 = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhrLs2.open('POST', endpoint, true);
        xhrLs2.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
        xhrLs2.send('skai_action=save_lottery_settings&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) + '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(lotteryPayload) + '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
      } catch (_) {}
      var tuned = scoring.tuned_params;
      if (tuned) {
        var avgRecall = 0;
        var bt = scoring.backtest_results || [];
        if (bt.length > 0) { var s = 0; for (var i = 0; i < bt.length; i++) { s += bt[i].recall_at_20 || 0; } avgRecall = s / bt.length; }
        var avgEliteJ = 0;
        if (bt.length > 0) { var _ejs = 0; for (var _ei = 0; _ei < bt.length; _ei++) { _ejs += bt[_ei].elite_objective_j || 0; } avgEliteJ = _ejs / bt.length; }
        var bestPayload = JSON.stringify({
          params: tuned,
          avg_recall_at_20: avgRecall,
          avg_elite_objective_j: avgEliteJ,
          tuning_mode: scoring.tuning_mode || 'canonical_grid',
          parameter_version: scoring.parameter_version || (meta.run_uuid || '')
        });
        try {
          var xhrBs = new XMLHttpRequest();
          xhrBs.open('POST', endpoint, true);
          xhrBs.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
          xhrBs.send('skai_action=save_best_settings&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) + '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(bestPayload) + '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
        } catch (_) {}
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE9+C]] Load shared learning from DB before aggregating (ensures cross-user data is loaded)
    _safeFn('skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb !== 'function') { return; }
      window.skaiLoadSharedLearningFromDb(_getGameId(), null);
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE9]] Aggregate shared per-lottery learning
    _safeFn('skaiAggregateLotteryLearning', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiAggregateLotteryLearning !== 'function') { return; }
      var history = _getDrawHistory();
      if (history.length > 0) {
        window.skaiAggregateLotteryLearning(_getGameId(), history);
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_ELITE]] Authoritative reconciliation trigger (strict: run_uuid + game_id + draw_date + official result)
    _safeFn('skaiReconcileRunAgainstOfficialResult', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiReconcileRunAgainstOfficialResult !== 'function') { return; }
      var rtRecon = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
      var metaRecon = rtRecon.meta || {};
      var targetDate = String(
        (rtRecon.final && rtRecon.final.target_draw_date) ||
        (metaRecon && metaRecon.target_draw_date) ||
        (window.SKAI_META && window.SKAI_META.next_draw_date) ||
        ''
      ).replace(/[^0-9\-]/g, '');
      var official = (rtRecon.final && rtRecon.final.official_result) || (window.SKAI_OFFICIAL_RESULT || null);
      if (official && /^\d{4}\-\d{2}\-\d{2}$/.test(targetDate)) {
        window.skaiReconcileRunAgainstOfficialResult(_getGameId(), (metaRecon.run_uuid || ''), targetDate, official);
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE7]] Build calibration bins from current engine output BEFORE applying calibrated ranking
    // This populates SKAI_RUNTIME.calibration.active_bins so skaiCanActivateCalibration() can return true.
    _safeFn('skaiBuildCalibrationBins', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiBuildCalibrationBins !== 'function') { return; }
      if (!window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION) { return; }
      var candidates = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output : [];
      var history    = _getDrawHistory();
      if (candidates.length > 0) {
        window.skaiBuildCalibrationBins(candidates, history);
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE9]] Load lottery learning summary into runtime (surfaces shared aggregated evidence)
    _safeFn('skaiLoadLotteryLearningSummary', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiLoadLotteryLearningSummary !== 'function') { return; }
      var summary = window.skaiLoadLotteryLearningSummary(_getGameId());
      if (summary && rt.scoring) { rt.scoring.shared_learning_summary = summary; }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE7+8]] Apply calibrated ranking and boundary tail recovery BEFORE building decision sets
    _safeFn('skaiApplyCalibratedRanking+TailRecovery', function () {
      var candidates = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output.slice() : [];
      if (candidates.length === 0) { return; }

      // Phase 7: calibrated ranking (feature-gated by SKAI_ENABLE_CALIBRATION)
      if (typeof window.skaiApplyCalibratedRanking === 'function') {
        candidates = window.skaiApplyCalibratedRanking(candidates) || candidates;
      }

      // Phase 8: boundary tail recovery (feature-gated by SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY)
      // Snapshot pre-tail candidates so skaiMeasureTailRecoveryImpact has a valid 'before' reference
      if (rt.scoring) { rt.scoring.engine_output_pre_tail = candidates.slice(); }
      if (typeof window.skaiApplyBoundaryTailRecovery === 'function') {
        candidates = window.skaiApplyBoundaryTailRecovery(candidates) || candidates;
        // [[SKAI_PHASE8]] Measure tail recovery impact (computes all 4 required metrics + auto-disable)
        if (typeof window.skaiMeasureTailRecoveryImpact === 'function') {
          var tailBefore = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output_pre_tail)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output_pre_tail : [];
          window.skaiMeasureTailRecoveryImpact(tailBefore, candidates);
        }
      }

      // Persist adjusted candidates back into runtime before set construction
      if (rt.scoring) { rt.scoring.engine_output = candidates; }

      // Phase 10: build final decision sets using user preferences
      if (typeof window.skaiBuildDecisionSets === 'function') {
        var userId  = (window.SKAI_FLAGS && window.SKAI_FLAGS.user_id)  || 0;
        var gameId  = _getGameId();
        var sets    = window.skaiBuildDecisionSets(candidates, userId, gameId);
        if (typeof window.skaiSetFinalPredictionSets === 'function') {
          window.skaiSetFinalPredictionSets(sets);
        }
        // [[SKAI_PHASE10]] Persist user preferences for the current userId+gameId combination
        if (typeof window.skaiSaveUserPreferences === 'function' && userId) {
          var savedPrefs = (rt.meta && rt.meta.user_prefs) || {};
          window.skaiSaveUserPreferences(userId, gameId, savedPrefs);
        }
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE8]] Persist tail recovery metrics to PHP
    _safeFn('persist_tail_recovery_summary', function () {
      var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || ''; var token = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
      if (!endpoint || !token) { return; }
      var rt3     = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
      var metrics = (rt3.tail && rt3.tail.impact_metrics);
      if (!metrics) { return; }
      var gameId  = _getGameId();
      var runUuid = (rt3.meta && rt3.meta.run_uuid) || '';
      var autoDisabled = !window.SKAI_FLAGS || !window.SKAI_FLAGS.SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_RECOVERY ? 1 : 0;
      var trPayload = JSON.stringify({
        near_miss_promotion_rate:      metrics.near_miss_promotion_rate      || 0,
        tail_miss_reduction_rate:      metrics.tail_miss_reduction_rate      || 0,
        tail_gain_score:               metrics.tail_gain_score               || 0,
        protected_core_regression_rate: metrics.protected_core_regression_rate || 0,
        sample_count:                  _getDrawHistory().length,
        auto_disabled:                  autoDisabled
      });
      try {
        var xhr3 = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr3.open('POST', endpoint, true);
        xhr3.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
        // [[SKAI_PHASE_F]] Failure visibility
        xhr3.onreadystatechange = function () {
          if (xhr3.readyState !== 4) { return; }
          try {
            var r3 = JSON.parse(xhr3.responseText);
            if (!r3 || !r3.ok) {
              if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_F] save_tail_recovery_summary failed:', (r3 && r3.error) || 'unknown'); }
            }
          } catch (_) {}
        };
        xhr3.send('skai_action=save_tail_recovery_summary&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
          '&run_uuid=' + encodeURIComponent(runUuid) +
          '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(trPayload) +
          '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
      } catch (_) {}
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE7]] Persist calibration bins to PHP when newly built
    _safeFn('persist_calibration_bins', function () {
      var endpoint = window.skaiRunLogEndpoint || ''; var token = window.skaiCsrfToken || '';
      if (!endpoint || !token) { return; }
      var rt4  = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
      var bins = (rt4.calibration && rt4.calibration.active_bins) || [];
      if (!bins.length) { return; }
      var gameId = _getGameId();
      // Only persist if bins were built this run (not loaded from a prior run)
      if (!rt4.calibration || !rt4.calibration.built_this_run) { return; }
      var cbPayload = JSON.stringify({
        version:      rt4.calibration.version || 'run_' + ((rt4.meta && rt4.meta.run_uuid) || ''),
        bins:         bins,
        sample_count: rt4.calibration.sample_count || 0
      });
      try {
        var xhr4 = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr4.open('POST', endpoint, true);
        xhr4.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
        // [[SKAI_PHASE_F]] Failure visibility
        xhr4.onreadystatechange = function () {
          if (xhr4.readyState !== 4) { return; }
          try {
            var r4 = JSON.parse(xhr4.responseText);
            if (!r4 || !r4.ok) {
              if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI_PHASE_F] save_calibration_bins failed:', (r4 && r4.error) || 'unknown'); }
            }
          } catch (_) {}
        };
        xhr4.send('skai_action=save_calibration_bins&game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId) +
          '&payload=' + encodeURIComponent(cbPayload) +
          '&' + encodeURIComponent(token) + '=1');
      } catch (_) {}
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE6]] Shadow calibration and tail recovery (stored separately, do NOT affect live output)
    _safeFn('skaiRunShadowCalibration', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiRunShadowCalibration !== 'function') { return; }
      var candidates = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output : [];
      var bins       = (typeof window.skaiLoadActiveCalibration === 'function') ? window.skaiLoadActiveCalibration() : [];
      if (candidates.length > 0) {
        window.skaiRunShadowCalibration(candidates, bins);
      }
    });

    _safeFn('skaiRunShadowTailRecovery', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiRunShadowTailRecovery !== 'function') { return; }
      var candidates = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output : [];
      if (candidates.length > 0) {
        window.skaiRunShadowTailRecovery(candidates);
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE6]] Shadow benchmarks
    _safeFn('skaiRunShadowBenchmarks', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiRunShadowBenchmarks !== 'function') { return; }
      var history  = _getDrawHistory();
      var engine   = (rt.scoring && Array.isArray(rt.scoring.engine_output)) ? rt.scoring.engine_output : [];
      if (history.length > 0 && engine.length > 0) {
        window.skaiRunShadowBenchmarks(history, engine);
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE6]] Shadow/live comparison
    _safeFn('skaiCompareShadowVsLive', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiCompareShadowVsLive === 'function') {
        window.skaiCompareShadowVsLive();
      }
    });

    // [[SKAI_PHASE5]] Build audit snapshot and verify display match
    _safeFn('skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot', function () {
      if (typeof window.skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot !== 'function') { return; }

      var snap = window.skaiBuildRuntimeAuditSnapshot();

      // Verify display = engine
      if (typeof window.skaiVerifyDisplayMatchesEngine === 'function') {
        var fps = (typeof window.skaiGetFinalPredictionSets === 'function') ? window.skaiGetFinalPredictionSets() : [];
        window.skaiVerifyDisplayMatchesEngine(fps);
        snap.display_matches_engine = (rt.audit && rt.audit.display_matches_engine) || 0;
      }

      // Verify snapshot = engine
      if (typeof window.skaiVerifySnapshotMatchesEngine === 'function') {
        window.skaiVerifySnapshotMatchesEngine(snap.final_prediction_sets);
        snap.snapshot_matches_engine = (rt.audit && rt.audit.snapshot_matches_engine) || 0;
      }

      // Post run log to PHP
      if (typeof window.skaiInsertRunLog === 'function' && window.skaiRunLogEndpoint) {
        window.skaiInsertRunLog({
          run_uuid:              snap.run_uuid,
          game_id:               snap.game_id,
          lottery_slug:          snap.lottery_slug,
          engine_version:        snap.engine_version,
          config_version:        snap.score_path_hash || '',
