    // -------------------------------
    settings = window.SKAI_SETTINGS || {};
    ds       = window.SKAI_DS || null;
    probs    = (window.SKAI_lastProbs && window.SKAI_lastProbs.slice) ? window.SKAI_lastProbs.slice() : [];
    rawDraws = Array.isArray(window.SKAI_RAW_DRAWS) ? window.SKAI_RAW_DRAWS
                  : (Array.isArray(window.draws) ? window.draws : []);
    meta     = window.SKAI_META || {};

    // Guards
    var dsOK = !!(ds && Array.isArray(ds.xs) && Array.isArray(ds.ys) && ds.xs.length >= 5 && ds.ys.length === ds.xs.length);
    var pOK  = Array.isArray(probs) && probs.length > 0;
    if (!(dsOK && pOK)) {
      try { (window.SKAI_warn || console.warn)('[SKAI] Scoring skipped: training not ready or dataset missing.'); } catch(_){}
      return;
    }

    // Progress signal
    emitEvt('skai:score:begin');

    // Basics
    var n      = (typeof window.SKAI_DS_N === 'number') ? window.SKAI_DS_N : (ds.xs.length | 0);
    var outDim = (typeof window.SKAI_OUT_DIM === 'number' && window.SKAI_OUT_DIM > 0) ? window.SKAI_OUT_DIM : (probs.length | 0);
    var W      = (settings && settings.windowSize) ? (settings.windowSize | 0) : 50;

// Prior
var nowVec  = window.buildSkaiCurrentVector(rawDraws, settings) || { skipPrior: [] };
priorMain   = Array.isArray(nowVec.skipPrior) ? nowVec.skipPrior : [];

/* ============================================================
   POSITION-SPECIFIC DIGIT PRIORS + BLEND (Pick 3 / Pick 4)
   - Activates only for digit games (domain<=9 and allowZero)
   - Produces:
       window.SKAI_POS_BLEND  : [pos][digit] probability
       window.SKAI_POS_TOPS   : [pos] -> [{num, p}, ...]
       window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS : [{main:[...], score, approxPct}, ...]
   ============================================================ */
try {
  // Detect digit game
  var domainMain = (meta && isFinite(+meta.domain) && +meta.domain > 0) ? (+meta.domain|0) : 0;
  var pickMain   = (meta && isFinite(+meta.pick)   && +meta.pick   > 0) ? (+meta.pick|0)   : 0;

  // allowZero already exists in this function later; we can infer digit game defensively:
  var isDigitGame = (domainMain > 0 && domainMain <= 9);
  
  // Debug logging for position combo generation
  if (window.console && window.console.log) {
    if (window.SKAI_DEBUG && window.console && console.log) { console.log('[SKAI Position Combos Generation Debug]', {
      domainMain: domainMain,
      pickMain: pickMain,
      isDigitGame: isDigitGame,
      hasRawDraws: Array.isArray(rawDraws),
      rawDrawsLength: rawDraws ? rawDraws.length : 0,
      condition: isDigitGame && pickMain >= 2 && pickMain <= 6 && Array.isArray(rawDraws) && rawDraws.length >= 10
    }); }
  }

  if (isDigitGame && pickMain >= 2 && pickMain <= 6 && Array.isArray(rawDraws) && rawDraws.length >= 10) {

    // Config: use the same window + decay approach SKAI uses elsewhere
    var hist = rawDraws.length | 0;

    var Wpos = +settings.windowSize;
    if (!isFinite(Wpos) || Wpos <= 0) Wpos = Math.max(10, hist - 1);
    Wpos = Math.max(10, Math.min((Wpos|0), Math.max(10, hist)));

    var decayPos = +settings.recencyDecay;
    if (!isFinite(decayPos)) decayPos = 0.90;
    if (decayPos < 0) decayPos = 0;
    if (decayPos > 1) decayPos = 1;

    // Blend weight between ML and position prior
    // 0 = pure ML (no position effect), 1 = pure position prior.
    // If positionBlend is not explicitly provided, derive it from the actual
    // run blend so daily digit games truly change across AI / Balanced / Skip runs.
    var posBlendLambda = Number(settings.positionBlend);
    if (!isFinite(posBlendLambda)) {
      var _dailyAiShare = null;
      if (settings && typeof settings.blend !== 'undefined') {
        _dailyAiShare = Number(settings.blend);
      } else if (settings && typeof settings.blendRatio !== 'undefined') {
        _dailyAiShare = Number(settings.blendRatio);
      }
      if (isFinite(_dailyAiShare)) {
        if (_dailyAiShare > 1) { _dailyAiShare = _dailyAiShare / 100; }
        if (_dailyAiShare < 0) { _dailyAiShare = 0; }
        if (_dailyAiShare > 1) { _dailyAiShare = 1; }
        posBlendLambda = 1 - _dailyAiShare; // position prior = skip share
      } else {
        posBlendLambda = 0.45; // Balanced default => AI 55 / Skip 45
      }
    }
    if (posBlendLambda < 0) posBlendLambda = 0;
    if (posBlendLambda > 1) posBlendLambda = 1;

    // Domain digits: 0..9
    var domDigits = 10;

    // Helpers (ES5-safe)
    function numsOf(d){
      if (Array.isArray(d)) return d;
      if (d && Array.isArray(d.numbers)) return d.numbers;
      if (d && Array.isArray(d.nums)) return d.nums;
      return [];
    }
    function clamp01(x){
      x = +x;
      if (!isFinite(x)) return 0;
      if (x < 0) return 0;
      if (x > 1) return 1;
      return x;
    }

    // Build weighted counts per position with Laplace smoothing
    var posCounts = [];
    for (var p = 0; p < pickMain; p++){
      var row = new Array(domDigits);
      for (var d0 = 0; d0 < domDigits; d0++) row[d0] = 1; // Laplace(1)
      posCounts.push(row);
    }

    var startPos = Math.max(0, hist - Wpos);
    var endPos   = hist;

    for (var iPos = startPos; iPos < endPos; iPos++){
      var draw = rawDraws[iPos];
      var arr  = numsOf(draw);
      if (!arr || !arr.length) continue;

      // Newest draw gets weight 1, older decays
      var age = (endPos - 1 - iPos) | 0;
      if (age < 0) age = 0;
      var wgt = (decayPos === 1) ? 1 : Math.pow(decayPos, age);

      for (var pp = 0; pp < pickMain; pp++){
        var v = arr[pp];
        if (!isFinite(v)) continue;
        v = (v|0);
        if (v < 0 || v > 9) continue;
        posCounts[pp][v] += wgt;
      }
    }

    // Normalize to priors
    var posPrior = [];
    for (var p2 = 0; p2 < pickMain; p2++){
      var sum = 0;
      for (var d1 = 0; d1 < domDigits; d1++) sum += posCounts[p2][d1];
      var pr = new Array(domDigits);
      if (sum > 0) {
        for (var d2 = 0; d2 < domDigits; d2++) pr[d2] = posCounts[p2][d2] / sum;
      } else {
        for (var d3 = 0; d3 < domDigits; d3++) pr[d3] = 1 / domDigits;
      }
      posPrior.push(pr);
    }

    // ------------------------------------------------------------
    // CHG: Support true per-position ML output (Pickx10)
    // If probs.length === pickMain*10, interpret it as concatenated heads:
    //   [pos0(10), pos1(10), ...]
    // Otherwise fall back to legacy single 10-way ML vector.
    // Blend becomes: pos-ML + pos-prior (multiplicative fusion) then renorm.
    // ------------------------------------------------------------

    var havePosML = (Array.isArray(probs) && probs.length === (pickMain * domDigits));
    var posML = null;

    if (havePosML) {
      posML = new Array(pickMain);
      for (var pML = 0; pML < pickMain; pML++){
        var row = new Array(domDigits);
        var sRow = 0;
        for (var dML = 0; dML < domDigits; dML++){
          var pv2 = +probs[(pML * domDigits) + dML];
          if (!isFinite(pv2) || pv2 < 0) pv2 = 0;
          row[dML] = pv2;
          sRow += pv2;
        }
        // normalize head defensively
        if (sRow > 0) {
          for (var dML2 = 0; dML2 < domDigits; dML2++) row[dML2] /= sRow;
        } else {
          for (var dML3 = 0; dML3 < domDigits; dML3++) row[dML3] = 1 / domDigits;
        }
        posML[pML] = row;
      }
    }

    // Legacy ML vector (single 10-way), used only if no posML
    var ml = null;
    if (!havePosML) {
      ml = new Array(domDigits);
      for (var d4 = 0; d4 < domDigits; d4++){
        var pv = (Array.isArray(probs) && isFinite(probs[d4])) ? +probs[d4] : (1 / domDigits);
        if (pv < 1e-9) pv = 1e-9;
        ml[d4] = pv;
      }
      var mlSum = 0;
      for (var d5 = 0; d5 < domDigits; d5++) mlSum += ml[d5];
      if (mlSum > 0) { for (var d6 = 0; d6 < domDigits; d6++) ml[d6] /= mlSum; }
    }

    // pos-ML + pos-prior (multiplicative fusion); use posBlendLambda as prior weight
    // posBlendLambda=0 => pure ML, posBlendLambda=1 => pure position prior
    var wPrior = posBlendLambda;
    var wML    = 1 - wPrior;

    var posBlend = [];
    for (var p3 = 0; p3 < pickMain; p3++){
      var vec = new Array(domDigits);
      var s2 = 0;

      for (var d7 = 0; d7 < domDigits; d7++){
        var pml = havePosML ? (posML[p3][d7]) : (ml[d7]);
        var ppr = posPrior[p3][d7];

        // clamp away from 0 (prevents collapse)
        if (!(pml > 0)) pml = 1e-12;
        if (!(ppr > 0)) ppr = 1e-12;

        // + implemented as product of powered terms, then renormalize
        var b = Math.pow(pml, wML) * Math.pow(ppr, wPrior);

        // DAILY V3: apply a daily-only per-position diversification transform so
        // different modes do not keep collapsing to the same digit ladder.
        // This only affects Pick 2-5 digit games and does not touch standard lotteries.
        try {
          var _pTemp = Number(settings.temperature || settings.temp || 0.85);
          if (!isFinite(_pTemp) || _pTemp <= 0) _pTemp = 0.85;
          if (_pTemp < 0.25) _pTemp = 0.25;
          if (_pTemp > 4.0) _pTemp = 4.0;

          var _pProfile = String(settings.profile || settings.riskProfile || 'balanced').toLowerCase();
          var _pStrategy = String(settings.strategy || settings.mode || 'hybrid').toLowerCase();
          var _blendAiPct = null;
          if (typeof settings.blendAiPct === 'number') {
            _blendAiPct = settings.blendAiPct;
          } else if (typeof settings.blend === 'number') {
            _blendAiPct = (settings.blend <= 1 ? (settings.blend * 100) : settings.blend);
          }
          if (!isFinite(_blendAiPct)) _blendAiPct = 55;

          var _posBias = 1;
          var _digitNorm = (domDigits > 1) ? (d7 / (domDigits - 1)) : 0;
          var _centered = (_digitNorm - 0.5);
          var _posCenter = ((pickMain > 1 ? (p3 / (pickMain - 1)) : 0.5) - 0.5);
          var _swing = (_centered * _posCenter);

          if (_pProfile === 'explorative') {
            _posBias += (_centered * 0.22) + (_swing * 0.18) + ((_pTemp - 0.85) * 0.16);
          } else if (_pProfile === 'conservative') {
            _posBias += ((-_centered) * 0.14) + ((_pTemp < 0.85 ? (0.85 - _pTemp) : 0) * 0.12);
          } else {
            _posBias += (_swing * 0.08) + ((_pTemp - 0.85) * 0.05);
          }

          if (_pStrategy === 'ai') {
            _posBias += (_digitNorm * ((_blendAiPct - 50) / 100) * 0.20);
          } else if (_pStrategy === 'skip') {
            _posBias += ((1 - _digitNorm) * ((50 - _blendAiPct) / 100) * 0.18);
          } else {
            _posBias += ((_digitNorm - 0.5) * ((_blendAiPct - 50) / 100) * 0.06);
          }

          if (_posBias < 0.72) _posBias = 0.72;
          if (_posBias > 1.35) _posBias = 1.35;
          b = b * _posBias;
        } catch(_dailyPosBiasErr) {}

        if (b < 1e-12) b = 1e-12;

        vec[d7] = b;
        s2 += b;
      }

      if (s2 > 0) { for (var d8 = 0; d8 < domDigits; d8++) vec[d8] /= s2; }
      posBlend.push(vec);
    }

    // Build tops per position (top 5)
    function topN(vec, N){
      var tmp = [];
      for (var dd = 0; dd < vec.length; dd++){
        tmp.push({ num: dd, p: +vec[dd] });
      }
      tmp.sort(function(a,b){ return (b.p - a.p); });
      return tmp.slice(0, N);
    }

    var tops = [];
    for (var p4 = 0; p4 < pickMain; p4++){
      tops.push(topN(posBlend[p4], 5));
    }

    // ------------------------------------------------------------
    // CHG: Dynamic per-position pool size for combo generation
    // - Legacy (global ML): 4 per position (unchanged)
    // - True pos-ML (Pickx10): 6 per position by default
    // - Safety cap: keep total expansions under a hard limit
    // ------------------------------------------------------------
    var _havePosML = (typeof havePosML !== 'undefined') ? !!havePosML : false;

    var poolK = _havePosML ? 6 : 4;       // default behavior
    var MAX_ENUM = 5000;                  // hard safety cap

    // FIX (daily-batch BUG 6): Pool size was fixed regardless of temperature/profile,
    // meaning every batch run generated combos from the SAME top-K digits per position.
    // Since posBlend ordering is a monotone function of the blend inputs, different blend
    // settings never change WHICH digits enter the pool -- only their relative weights.
    // This caused identical top-5 combos across all 9 runs even when profile/strategy differ.
    //
    // Fix: make poolK respond to the run's temperature so that:
    //   Safer Range (temp < 0.75): poolK reduced toward 3 (trust top digits tightly)
    //   Balanced    (temp 0.75-1.0): poolK unchanged (current baseline)
    //   Wider Search (temp > 1.0):   poolK expanded toward 7 (explore lower-rank digits)
    //
    // This is analytically correct: conservative profiles should use fewer candidates
    // (higher confidence in top picks), while explorative profiles should consider
    // a broader set of lower-probability digit candidates.
    // Guard: daily digit games only; non-daily games are unaffected.
    try {
      var _poolTemp = Number(settings.temperature || 0.85);
      if (!isFinite(_poolTemp) || _poolTemp <= 0) _poolTemp = 0.85;
      // Map temperature to a pool-size adjustment delta (daily digit game only):
      //   temp <= 0.70  -> delta = -1 (conservative: tighter pool)
      //   temp 0.71-0.90 -> delta = 0  (balanced: unchanged)
      //   temp 0.91-1.05 -> delta = +1 (slightly explorative)
      //   temp >  1.05  -> delta = +2  (fully explorative: wider pool)
      var _poolDelta = 0;
      if (_poolTemp <= 0.70) {
        _poolDelta = -1;
      } else if (_poolTemp > 1.05) {
        _poolDelta = 2;
      } else if (_poolTemp > 0.90) {
        _poolDelta = 1;
      }
      poolK = Math.max(2, Math.min(8, poolK + _poolDelta));
    } catch(_poolDeltaErr) {}



    // shrink poolK if K^pickMain would exceed MAX_ENUM
    function powInt(a, b){
      var r = 1;
      for (var i0 = 0; i0 < b; i0++) r *= a;
      return r;
    }
    while (pickMain >= 2 && powInt(poolK, pickMain) > MAX_ENUM && poolK > 2) poolK--;

    // Generate top combos using dynamic poolK
    var perPosPool = [];
    for (var p5 = 0; p5 < pickMain; p5++){
      perPosPool.push(topN(posBlend[p5], poolK));
    }

    var combos = [];
    function pushCombo(mainArr, score){
      var adjusted = +score;

      // DAILY FIX:
      // Apply a light repeat penalty so all-same or heavily repeated combos
      // do not dominate purely because one digit is globally strongest.
      // This is a soft adjustment, not a ban.
      try {
        var counts = {};
        var maxRepeat = 0;
        var uniqueCount = 0;
        var i, key, dupPenalty = 1;

        for (i = 0; i < mainArr.length; i++) {
          key = String(mainArr[i]);
          if (!counts[key]) {
            counts[key] = 1;
            uniqueCount++;
          } else {
            counts[key]++;
          }
          if (counts[key] > maxRepeat) {
            maxRepeat = counts[key];
          }
        }

        if (maxRepeat >= mainArr.length) {
          dupPenalty = 0.02; // e.g. 999 / 3333 / 9999 - strongly suppress all-same domination
        } else if (mainArr.length >= 4 && maxRepeat >= mainArr.length - 1) {
          dupPenalty = 0.10; // e.g. 9998 / 3334 - heavy penalty for near-all-same Pick 4/5 patterns
        } else if (mainArr.length === 3 && maxRepeat >= 2) {
          dupPenalty = 0.28; // e.g. 993 - penalize duplicated Pick 3 patterns more aggressively
        } else if (mainArr.length >= 4 && maxRepeat === 3) {
          dupPenalty = 0.18; // e.g. 9938 in Pick 4 - triple-repeat suppression
        } else if (maxRepeat === 2) {
          dupPenalty = 0.78; // one repeated pair still allowed, but not dominant
        }

        adjusted = adjusted * dupPenalty * (0.88 + (0.12 * (uniqueCount / mainArr.length)));

        // Strategy-aware daily adjustment:
        // use the actual run temperature/diversity to make combo ordering respond
        // to AI-focused / Balanced / Pattern-focused instead of collapsing
        // to the same ranking across all nine batch runs.
        var _tempDaily = Number(settings.temperature || settings.temp || 0.85);
        if (!isFinite(_tempDaily) || _tempDaily <= 0) _tempDaily = 0.85;
        if (_tempDaily < 0.25) _tempDaily = 0.25;
        if (_tempDaily > 4.0)  _tempDaily = 4.0;

        var _divDaily = Number(settings.diversityPenalty || settings.diversity || 0.02);
        if (!isFinite(_divDaily) || _divDaily < 0) _divDaily = 0.02;
        if (_divDaily > 0.50) _divDaily = 0.50;

        adjusted = Math.pow(Math.max(adjusted, 1e-12), 1 / _tempDaily);
        adjusted = adjusted * (1 + (_divDaily * ((uniqueCount - 1) / Math.max(1, mainArr.length - 1)) * 0.25));

        // Profile-aware daily refinement:
        // FIX (daily-batch BUG 6 continued): the original multipliers (0.03-0.08)
        // were too small to change combo ordering when all combos have similar spread
        // (e.g., all contain digits 5-9 -> similar _spreadNorm ~0.4-0.7).
        // Strengthened to ACTUALLY reorder combos differently per profile:
        //   Wider Search: strongly prefers diverse digits (high spread + high uniqueness)
        //   Safer Range: strongly prefers concentrated top-digit combos (low spread)
        //   Balanced:     modest preference for mid-spread combos
        var _profileDaily = String(settings.profile || settings.riskProfile || 'balanced').toLowerCase();
        var _minDigit = 99, _maxDigit = -1;
        for (i = 0; i < mainArr.length; i++) {
          if (mainArr[i] < _minDigit) _minDigit = mainArr[i];
          if (mainArr[i] > _maxDigit) _maxDigit = mainArr[i];
        }
        var _spreadNorm = (_maxDigit >= _minDigit) ? ((_maxDigit - _minDigit) / 9) : 0;
        var _uniqueRatio = uniqueCount / Math.max(1, mainArr.length);
        if (_profileDaily === 'explorative') {
          // Strongly promote spread and uniqueness -- allows lower-base-score combos to surface
          adjusted = adjusted * (1 + (0.30 * _spreadNorm) + (0.15 * _uniqueRatio));        } else if (_profileDaily === 'conservative') {
          // Strongly promote concentrated combos -- prefer top digits together
          adjusted = adjusted * (1 + (0.25 * (1 - _spreadNorm)) + (0.10 * (1 - Math.abs(0.60 - _uniqueRatio))));        } else {
          // Balanced: mild preference for medium-spread combos
          adjusted = adjusted * (1 + (0.12 * (1 - Math.abs(0.50 - _spreadNorm))));
        }
      } catch(_dupErr) {}

      combos.push({ main: mainArr.slice(), score: adjusted });
    }
    if (pickMain === 2){
      for (var a2 = 0; a2 < perPosPool[0].length; a2++){
        for (var b2 = 0; b2 < perPosPool[1].length; b2++){
          var A2 = perPosPool[0][a2], B2 = perPosPool[1][b2];
          pushCombo([A2.num, B2.num], A2.p * B2.p);
        }
      }
    } else if (pickMain === 3){
      for (var a3 = 0; a3 < perPosPool[0].length; a3++){
        for (var b3 = 0; b3 < perPosPool[1].length; b3++){
          for (var c3 = 0; c3 < perPosPool[2].length; c3++){
            var A3 = perPosPool[0][a3], B3 = perPosPool[1][b3], C3 = perPosPool[2][c3];
            pushCombo([A3.num, B3.num, C3.num], A3.p * B3.p * C3.p);
          }
        }
      }
    } else if (pickMain === 4){
      for (var a4 = 0; a4 < perPosPool[0].length; a4++){
        for (var b4 = 0; b4 < perPosPool[1].length; b4++){
          for (var c4 = 0; c4 < perPosPool[2].length; c4++){
            for (var d4b = 0; d4b < perPosPool[3].length; d4b++){
              var A4 = perPosPool[0][a4], B4 = perPosPool[1][b4], C4 = perPosPool[2][c4], D4 = perPosPool[3][d4b];
              pushCombo([A4.num, B4.num, C4.num, D4.num], A4.p * B4.p * C4.p * D4.p);
            }
          }
        }
      }
    } else if (pickMain === 5){
      for (var a5 = 0; a5 < perPosPool[0].length; a5++){
        for (var b5 = 0; b5 < perPosPool[1].length; b5++){
          for (var c5 = 0; c5 < perPosPool[2].length; c5++){
            for (var d5b = 0; d5b < perPosPool[3].length; d5b++){
              for (var e5 = 0; e5 < perPosPool[4].length; e5++){
                var A5 = perPosPool[0][a5], B5 = perPosPool[1][b5], C5 = perPosPool[2][c5], D5 = perPosPool[3][d5b], E5 = perPosPool[4][e5];
                pushCombo([A5.num, B5.num, C5.num, D5.num, E5.num], A5.p * B5.p * C5.p * D5.p * E5.p);
                if (combos.length >= MAX_ENUM) { break; }
              }
              if (combos.length >= MAX_ENUM) { break; }
            }
            if (combos.length >= MAX_ENUM) { break; }
          }
          if (combos.length >= MAX_ENUM) { break; }
        }
        if (combos.length >= MAX_ENUM) { break; }
      }
    } else {
      // For pick sizes >5, compute only per-position tops (no combos)
    }


    combos.sort(function(a,b){ return (b.score - a.score); });

    (function(){
      var filtered = [];
      var seen = {};
      var ci, cj, c, disp, valid;
      for (ci = 0; ci < combos.length; ci++) {
        c = combos[ci];
        if (!c || !Array.isArray(c.main) || c.main.length !== pickMain) continue;
        valid = true;
        for (cj = 0; cj < c.main.length; cj++) {
          if (!isFinite(c.main[cj]) || c.main[cj] < 0 || c.main[cj] > 9) { valid = false; break; }
        }
        if (!valid) continue;
        disp = window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(c.main, pickMain);
        if (!disp || disp.length !== pickMain || seen[disp]) continue;
        seen[disp] = 1;
        filtered.push(c);
      }
      combos = filtered;
    })();

    if (combos.length > 12) combos = combos.slice(0, 12);

    // Calculate approxPct BEFORE diversity reordering so each combo's percentage
    // reflects its honest score relative to the global maximum.
    // This keeps the values truthful even after diversity reordering.
    (function(){
      var mx = 0;
      for (var ci = 0; ci < combos.length; ci++){
        if (combos[ci].score > mx) mx = combos[ci].score;
      }
      for (var ci2 = 0; ci2 < combos.length; ci2++){
        var pct = (mx > 0) ? (100 * combos[ci2].score / mx) : 0;
        combos[ci2].approxPct = Math.round(pct);
      }
    })();

    // DAILY ENGINE V2:
    // Re-rank the candidate combos with an explicit cross-set diversity pass
    // so the displayed/saved Top 5 is a true ranked set, not five near-clones.
    // This is daily-only and leaves standard lottery logic untouched.
    (function(){
      if (!combos || combos.length < 2) return;

      function comboSimilarity(a, b) {
        var len = Math.max(a.length, b.length) || 1;
        var posMatch = 0;
        var countA = {}, countB = {}, k;
        for (var i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
          if (a[i] === b[i]) { posMatch++; }
          k = String(a[i]);
          countA[k] = (countA[k] || 0) + 1;
        }
        for (var j = 0; j < b.length; j++) {
          k = String(b[j]);
          countB[k] = (countB[k] || 0) + 1;
        }
        var shared = 0;
        for (k in countA) {
          if (countA.hasOwnProperty(k) && countB[k]) {
            shared += Math.min(countA[k], countB[k]);
          }
        }
        var posRatio = posMatch / len;
        var sharedRatio = shared / len;
        return (0.68 * posRatio) + (0.32 * sharedRatio);
      }

      function comboSpread(mainArr) {
        var minD = 99, maxD = -1;
        for (var i = 0; i < mainArr.length; i++) {
          if (mainArr[i] < minD) minD = mainArr[i];
          if (mainArr[i] > maxD) maxD = mainArr[i];
        }
        return (maxD >= minD) ? ((maxD - minD) / 9) : 0;
      }

      var maxScore = 0;
      for (var i0 = 0; i0 < combos.length; i0++) {
        if (combos[i0].score > maxScore) maxScore = combos[i0].score;
      }
      if (!(maxScore > 0)) maxScore = 1;

      var tempDaily2 = Number(settings.temperature || settings.temp || 0.85);
      if (!isFinite(tempDaily2) || tempDaily2 <= 0) tempDaily2 = 0.85;
      if (tempDaily2 < 0.25) tempDaily2 = 0.25;
      if (tempDaily2 > 4.0) tempDaily2 = 4.0;

      var divDaily2 = Number(settings.diversityPenalty || settings.diversity || 0.02);
      if (!isFinite(divDaily2) || divDaily2 < 0) divDaily2 = 0.02;
      if (divDaily2 > 0.50) divDaily2 = 0.50;

      var profileDaily2 = String(settings.profile || settings.riskProfile || 'balanced').toLowerCase();
      var lambda = 0.16 + (divDaily2 * 2.35) + ((tempDaily2 - 0.85) * 0.10);
      if (profileDaily2 === 'explorative') {
        lambda += 0.10;
      } else if (profileDaily2 === 'conservative') {
        lambda -= 0.05;
      }
      if (lambda < 0.08) lambda = 0.08;
      if (lambda > 0.55) lambda = 0.55;

      var selected = [];
      var pool = combos.slice(0);
      selected.push(pool.shift());

      var _dailyJitterSeed = 0;
      try {
        var _jProf = String(settings.profile || settings.riskProfile || 'balanced').toLowerCase();
        var _jStr  = String(settings.strategy || settings.mode || 'hybrid').toLowerCase();
        var _jTemp = Number(settings.temperature || settings.temp || 0.85);
        var _jDiv  = Number(settings.diversityPenalty || settings.diversity || 0.02);
        var _jBlend = (typeof settings.blendAiPct === 'number') ? settings.blendAiPct : ((typeof settings.blend === 'number') ? (settings.blend <= 1 ? settings.blend * 100 : settings.blend) : 55);
        var _jKey = [_jProf, _jStr, _jTemp, _jDiv, _jBlend].join('|');
        for (var _jk = 0; _jk < _jKey.length; _jk++) {
          _dailyJitterSeed = ((_dailyJitterSeed * 31) + _jKey.charCodeAt(_jk)) % 1000003;
        }
      } catch(_) {}

      while (pool.length && selected.length < 5) {
        var bestIdx = 0;
        var bestMMR = -1e9;
        for (var pi = 0; pi < pool.length; pi++) {
          var cand = pool[pi];
          var baseNorm = cand.score / maxScore;
          var worstSim = 0;
          for (var si = 0; si < selected.length; si++) {
            var sim = comboSimilarity(cand.main, selected[si].main);
            if (sim > worstSim) worstSim = sim;
          }
          var spread = comboSpread(cand.main);
          var novelty = 1 - worstSim;
          var _jitter = (((_dailyJitterSeed + ((pi + 1) * 97) + (selected.length * 193)) % 1000) / 1000) * 0.018;
          var mmrScore = (baseNorm * (1 - (lambda * worstSim))) + (novelty * lambda * 0.22) + (spread * lambda * 0.08) + _jitter;
          if (mmrScore > bestMMR) {
            bestMMR = mmrScore;
            bestIdx = pi;
          }
        }
        selected.push(pool.splice(bestIdx, 1)[0]);
      }

      combos = selected.concat(pool);

      // Build daily supplemental digits (Top 3) from residual position support.
      // These are saved separately from the primary combo and never overwrite it.
      var digitAgg = new Array(domDigits);
      var digitUse = new Array(domDigits);
      for (var da = 0; da < domDigits; da++) { digitAgg[da] = 0; digitUse[da] = 0; }
      for (var pp2 = 0; pp2 < posBlend.length; pp2++) {
        for (var dd2 = 0; dd2 < domDigits; dd2++) {
          digitAgg[dd2] += Number(posBlend[pp2][dd2] || 0);
        }
      }
      for (var sc = 0; sc < selected.length && sc < 5; sc++) {
        var weight = (5 - sc) / 5;
        for (var md = 0; md < selected[sc].main.length; md++) {
          var dig = parseInt(selected[sc].main[md], 10);
          if (isFinite(dig) && dig >= 0 && dig < domDigits) {
            digitUse[dig] += weight;
          }
        }
      }
      function skaiBuildDailyComboExtras(comboDigits) {
        var comboRef = Array.isArray(comboDigits) ? comboDigits.slice(0) : [];
        var comboPool = [];
        for (var ed = 0; ed < domDigits; ed++) {
          var scoreEd = digitAgg[ed];
          if (comboRef && comboRef.length) {
            for (var pdx = 0; pdx < comboRef.length; pdx++) {
              if (parseInt(comboRef[pdx], 10) === ed) {
                scoreEd *= 0.58;
                break;
              }
            }
          }
          scoreEd *= (1 - Math.min(0.72, digitUse[ed] * 0.11));
          comboPool.push({ num: ed, p: scoreEd });
        }
        comboPool.sort(function(a, b){ return b.p - a.p; });
        var comboDigitsOut = [];
        var comboRowsOut = [];
        for (var ei = 0; ei < comboPool.length && comboDigitsOut.length < 3; ei++) {
          if (!isFinite(comboPool[ei].num)) continue;
          comboDigitsOut.push(comboPool[ei].num);
          comboRowsOut.push({ num: comboPool[ei].num, p: comboPool[ei].p, approxPct: 0, source: 'daily_residual' });
        }
        if (comboRowsOut.length) {
          var extraMax = comboRowsOut[0].p > 0 ? comboRowsOut[0].p : 1;
          for (var exi = 0; exi < comboRowsOut.length; exi++) {
            comboRowsOut[exi].approxPct = Math.round((comboRowsOut[exi].p / extraMax) * 100);
            comboRowsOut[exi].rank = exi + 1;
            comboRowsOut[exi].display = (comboRowsOut[exi].num >= 0 && comboRowsOut[exi].num < 10) ? ('0' + String(comboRowsOut[exi].num)) : String(comboRowsOut[exi].num);
          }
        }
        return { digits: comboDigitsOut.slice(0), rows: comboRowsOut.slice(0) };
      }
      var primaryExtraBundle = skaiBuildDailyComboExtras(selected.length ? selected[0].main : []);
      var extraDigits = primaryExtraBundle.digits.slice(0);
      var extraRows = primaryExtraBundle.rows.slice(0);
      window.SKAI_DAILY_BUILD_COMBO_EXTRAS = skaiBuildDailyComboExtras;
      window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS = extraRows.slice(0, 3);
      window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS = extraDigits.slice(0);
      window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered = extraDigits.slice(0);
      window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA = [];
    })();

    // Publish
    window.SKAI_POS_BLEND  = posBlend;
    window.SKAI_POS_TOPS   = tops;
    window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS = combos;
    
    // Debug: Confirm data was published
    if (window.console && window.console.log) {
      if (window.SKAI_DEBUG && window.console && console.log) { console.log('[SKAI Position Combos] Published to window', {
        topsLength: tops.length,
        combosLength: combos.length
      }); }
    }
  } else {
    // Clear if not a digit game
    window.SKAI_POS_BLEND  = null;
    window.SKAI_POS_TOPS   = null;
    window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS = null;
    
    // Debug: Data cleared (not a digit game or conditions not met)
    if (window.console && window.console.log) {
      if (window.SKAI_DEBUG && window.console && console.log) { console.log('[SKAI Position Combos] Cleared (not a digit game or conditions not met)'); }
    }
  }
} catch(_posErr) {
  // Log errors instead of silently swallowing
  if (window.console && window.console.error) {
    console.error('[SKAI Position Combos Generation Error]', _posErr);
  }
}

    // CHG: Thompson Sampling posterior arrays (optional)
    var postA = (nowVec && Array.isArray(nowVec.postA)) ? nowVec.postA : null;
    var postB = (nowVec && Array.isArray(nowVec.postB)) ? nowVec.postB : null;

    // TS controls (defaults ON)
    var tsOn = (settings && settings.thompsonSampling != null) ? !!settings.thompsonSampling : true;

    // Reproducibility Key -- NOT random prediction
    // SKAI is score-driven (AI + analytics produce scores).
    // The key is used only to make runs repeatable and to resolve near-ties consistently.
    // Same settings + same key => same picks. Different key => different variant (still score-driven).
    (function(){
      var deterministic = settings && settings.deterministic;
      var consistentResults = settings && settings.consistentResults;
      var reproKey = settings && (settings.reproKey || settings.seed); // Accept both
      
      // If consistent results are on but no key provided, generate one from settings hash
      if ((deterministic || consistentResults) && !reproKey) {
        var cfg = window.SKAI_CONFIG || window.__le_gameConfig || window.lottoConfig || {};
        var lottery_id = cfg.lottery_id || cfg.gameId || '';
        var gameId = cfg.gameId || '';
        var pick = (settings && settings.pick) || '';
        var extra = (settings && settings.extra) || '';
        var windowSize = (settings && settings.windowSize) || '';
        var weights = {
          blend: (settings && settings.blend) || 0,
          temperature: (settings && settings.temperature) || 1,
          skipGamma: (settings && settings.skipGamma) || 0
        };
        var mode = (settings && settings.mode) || '';
        
        reproKey = window.skaiGenerateReproKey(lottery_id, gameId, pick, extra, windowSize, weights, mode);
        // FIX (daily-batch BUG 2): Do NOT write the auto-generated reproKey back into
        // the persistent SKAI_SETTINGS object.  Writing it caused runs 2-9 of a daily
        // batch to inherit run 1's reproKey (because the condition `!reproKey` became
        // false after run 1 stored its key).  With this fix, every batch run that has
        // no user-supplied key will auto-generate a fresh key from its own settings.
        // (The key is still passed to SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.init below for this run.)
      }
      
      // Initialize deterministic state
      window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.init((deterministic || consistentResults), reproKey);
      
      // Log for debugging (internal only)
      if ((deterministic || consistentResults) && window.console && window.console.log) {
        console.log('[SKAI] Consistent results enabled with Reproducibility Key:', reproKey);
      }
    })();

    /**
     * Reproducibility test function (callable from console)
     * Usage: window.SKAI_testReproducibility()
     * Returns: true if two runs produce identical results, false otherwise
     */
    window.SKAI_testReproducibility = function() {
      try {
        if (!window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC || !window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.enabled) {
          console.error('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] FAILED: Consistent results mode is not enabled');
          return false;
        }
        
        var reproKey = window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.reproKey;
        if (!reproKey) {
          console.error('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] FAILED: No Reproducibility Key found');
          return false;
        }
        
        console.log('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] Running prediction twice with Reproducibility Key:', reproKey);
        
        // Store current blended results
        var run1 = window.SKAI_lastBlended ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.SKAI_lastBlended)) : null;
        
        if (!run1 || !Array.isArray(run1) || run1.length === 0) {
          console.warn('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] No initial results found. Run a prediction first.');
          return false;
        }
        
        // Re-initialize deterministic state with same key
        window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.init(true, reproKey);
        
        // Trigger a new prediction by simulating the prediction process
        // Note: In real usage, user would click "Predict" button twice
        // For this test, we compare the Thompson sampling outputs
        var testSamples1 = [];
        var testSamples2 = [];
        
        // Sample from Beta distribution 10 times with same parameters
        window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.init(true, reproKey);
        for (var i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
          testSamples1.push(window.skaiSampleBeta(5, 5));
        }
        
        // Re-initialize and sample again
        window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.init(true, reproKey);
        for (var j = 0; j < 10; j++) {
          testSamples2.push(window.skaiSampleBeta(5, 5));
        }
        
        // Compare samples
        var identical = true;
        for (var k = 0; k < 10; k++) {
          if (Math.abs(testSamples1[k] - testSamples2[k]) > 1e-10) {
            identical = false;
            break;
          }
        }
        
        if (identical) {
          console.log('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] PASSED \u2713');
          console.log('Samples from run 1:', testSamples1);
          console.log('Samples from run 2:', testSamples2);
          return true;
        } else {
          console.error('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] FAILED \u2717');
          console.error('Samples differ between runs:');
          console.error('Run 1:', testSamples1);
          console.error('Run 2:', testSamples2);
          return false;
        }
        
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('[SKAI Reproducibility Test] ERROR:', e);
        return false;
      }
    };

    // CHG: Stability (anti-churn) for UX: EMA blend with last scores
    // 0 = no smoothing; 1 = fully locked to previous (not recommended)
    var stability = (settings && settings.stability != null) ? Number(settings.stability) : NaN;
    if (!isFinite(stability)) stability = 0.35;
    if (stability < 0) stability = 0;
    if (stability > 0.95) stability = 0.95;

    // FIX (daily-batch BUG 3): Always start with a fresh score cache for each run.
    // The previous `|| {}` meant the EMA stability smoothing from run N carried into
    // run N+1, pulling run N+1's digit scores toward run N's scores and reducing the
    // variation that different profile/strategy/blend combos are designed to produce.
    // Resetting here is safe for single runs too: the first run simply starts clean.
    window.SKAI_lastScoreByNum = {};
    var tsStrength = (settings && settings.tsStrength != null) ? Number(settings.tsStrength) : NaN;
    if (!isFinite(tsStrength)) tsStrength = 1.0;
    if (tsStrength < 0) tsStrength = 0;
    if (tsStrength > 3) tsStrength = 3;

    // CHG: Mode -> policy mapping (best-in-class UX)
    // If settings.tsStrength is explicitly set, it remains authoritative.
    // Otherwise, we auto-pick tsStrength based on mode.
    var modeKey = (settings && settings.mode != null) ? String(settings.mode) : "";
    // FIX: Also incorporate profile and strategy so per-combo defaults vary.
    // skaiApplyCombo sets settings.profile / settings.strategy but not settings.mode.
    var _mkProfile  = (settings && settings.profile)  ? String(settings.profile)  : '';
    var _mkStrategy = (settings && settings.strategy) ? String(settings.strategy) : '';
    var mk = (modeKey + ' ' + _mkProfile + ' ' + _mkStrategy).toLowerCase();

    if (!(settings && settings.tsStrength != null)) {
      // FIX: derive exploration strength from BOTH profile and strategy so
      // batch variants that only differ by strategy do not collapse into the
      // same policy branch just because the profile token matched first.
      var tsBase = 1.00;
      var tsAdj  = 0.00;

      if (mk.indexOf("conserv") >= 0)      { tsBase = 0.45; }
      else if (mk.indexOf("explor") >= 0)  { tsBase = 1.55; }
      else if (mk.indexOf("balanc") >= 0)  { tsBase = 1.00; }
      else                                  { tsBase = 1.00; }

      if (mk.indexOf("ai-forward") >= 0 || mk.indexOf(" ai ") >= 0 || mk.indexOf("ai") >= 0) {
        tsAdj -= 0.20;
      }
      if (mk.indexOf("skip pattern") >= 0 || mk.indexOf("skip") >= 0) {
        tsAdj += 0.30;
      }
      if (mk.indexOf("balanced mix") >= 0 || mk.indexOf("mix") >= 0 || mk.indexOf("hybrid") >= 0) {
        tsAdj += 0.10;
      }

      tsStrength = tsBase + tsAdj;
      if (tsStrength < 0.20) { tsStrength = 0.20; }
      if (tsStrength > 2.25) { tsStrength = 2.25; }
    }

    // CHG: Temperature policy for AI probabilities (ranking-safe monotone transform)
    // If settings.aiTemp is explicitly set, it remains authoritative.
    // FIX: Also accept settings.temperature (set by skaiApplyCombo) before mode defaults.
    var aiTemp = (settings && settings.aiTemp != null) ? Number(settings.aiTemp) : NaN;
    if (!isFinite(aiTemp) || aiTemp <= 0) {
      aiTemp = (settings && settings.temperature != null) ? Number(settings.temperature) : NaN;
    }
    if (!isFinite(aiTemp) || aiTemp <= 0) {
      // Mode defaults:
      if (mk.indexOf("conserv") >= 0)      { aiTemp = 0.70; }  // sharper
      else if (mk.indexOf("explor") >= 0)  { aiTemp = 1.40; }  // flatter
      else if (mk.indexOf("ai") >= 0)      { aiTemp = 0.85; }  // slightly sharper
      else if (mk.indexOf("skip") >= 0)    { aiTemp = 1.10; }  // slightly flatter
      else if (mk.indexOf("mix") >= 0)     { aiTemp = 1.15; }
      else                                 { aiTemp = 1.00; }  // balanced
    }
    if (aiTemp < 0.25) aiTemp = 0.25;
    if (aiTemp > 3.00) aiTemp = 3.00;

    allowZero   = !!meta.allowZero && !meta.hasExtraBall;
    L           = Math.max(probs.length, priorMain.length || 0);
    
    // CHG: For digit games (Pick 3/Pick 4/Daily), limit L to 10 (digits 0-9 only)
    var domainMain = (meta && isFinite(+meta.domain) && +meta.domain > 0) ? (+meta.domain|0) : 0;
    if (domainMain > 0 && domainMain <= 9) {
      L = Math.min(L, 10);
    }

    // Tail design for gate/ridge
    var V     = Math.max(30, Math.min(200, Math.floor(0.15 * n)));
    var Vsafe = Math.max(0, Math.min(V, n));
    var X = [], Y = [];

    if (Vsafe >= 5) {
      var yVal = ds.ys.slice(n - Vsafe);
      var pVal = new Array(Vsafe);
      for (var r = 0; r < Vsafe; r++) { pVal[r] = probs.slice(); }

      for (var r2 = 0; r2 < Vsafe; r2++) {
        var ai    = pVal[r2];
        var wEdge = Math.max(1, (W | 0) + r2);
        var drawsR = Array.isArray(rawDraws) ? rawDraws.slice(0, Math.min(rawDraws.length, wEdge)) : [];
        var nowR   = window.buildSkaiCurrentVector(drawsR, settings) || {};
        var shR    = Array.isArray(nowR.skipPrior) ? nowR.skipPrior : new Array(ai.length);
        if (!Array.isArray(nowR.skipPrior)) { for (var f0=0; f0<ai.length; f0++){ shR[f0]=0; } }
        var y = yVal[r2] || [];
        for (var j=0; j<ai.length; j++){
          var a  = (+ai[j]) || 0;
          var s  = (+shR[j]) || 0;
          var yj = (+y[j])  || 0;
          X.push([a, s, a*s, 1]);  // intercept
          Y.push(yj);
        }
      }
    }

    // Ridge (ES5)
    function ridgeSolve(Xm, Ym, lambda){
      if (!Xm.length) return [0.7, 0.3, 0.0, 0.0];
      var m = Xm.length, d = Xm[0].length, i, j;
      var XtX = []; for (i=0;i<d;i++){ XtX[i]=[]; for(j=0;j<d;j++){ XtX[i][j]=0; } }
      var XtY = []; for (i=0;i<d;i++){ XtY[i]=0; }
      for (var r3=0; r3<m; r3++){
        var xi = Xm[r3], yi = Ym[r3];
        for (var a=0;a<d;a++){
          XtY[a]+=xi[a]*yi;
          for (var b=0;b<d;b++){ XtX[a][b]+=xi[a]*xi[b]; }
        }
      }
      for (var a2=0;a2<d;a2++){ XtX[a2][a2] += (lambda || 0); }
      var A = [];
      for (i=0;i<d;i++){ A[i]=XtX[i].slice(0); A[i].push(XtY[i]); }
      var dim=d;
      for (var col=0; col<dim; col++){
        var piv=col;
        for (var rr=col+1; rr<dim; rr++){ if (Math.abs(A[rr][col])>Math.abs(A[piv][col])) piv=rr; }
        if (piv!==col){ var tmp=A[col]; A[col]=A[piv]; A[piv]=tmp; }
        var pv=A[col][col] || 1e-9;
        for (var c=col; c<=dim; c++){ A[col][c]/=pv; }
        for (var r4=0; r4<dim; r4++){
          if (r4===col) continue;
          var f=A[r4][col];
          for (var c2=col; c2<=dim; c2++){ A[r4][c2]-=f*A[col][c2]; }
        }
      }
      var w=new Array(dim); for (i=0;i<dim;i++){ w[i]=A[i][dim]; }
      return w;
    }

    // Gate (ES5)
    function gateLearn(Xm, Ym, iters, lr, l2){
      if (!Xm.length) return [0.7, 0.3, 0.0, 0.0];
      var d = Xm[0].length, w=[], t, k;
      for (k=0;k<d;k++){ w[k]=0; }
      function sig(z){ return 1/(1+Math.exp(-z)); }
      iters = iters || 300; lr = lr || 0.05; l2 = l2 || 1e-3;
      for (t=0; t<iters; t++){
        var g=[]; for (k=0;k<d;k++){ g[k]=0; }
        for (var i4=0; i4<Xm.length; i4++){
          var xi = Xm[i4], yi = Ym[i4], z=0;
          for (k=0;k<d;k++) z += w[k]*xi[k];
          var p = sig(z);
          for (k=0;k<d;k++) g[k] += (p-yi)*xi[k];
        }
        for (k=0;k<d;k++){ g[k] = g[k]/Xm.length + l2*w[k]; w[k] -= lr*g[k]; }
      }
      return w;
    }

    // Weights (start from sane defaults)
    var wAI = 0.7, wSH = 0.3, wINT = 0.0, wB = 0.0;
    if (settings.useGateMeta && X.length){
      var wg = gateLearn(X, Y, 300, 0.05, 1e-3);
      wAI = wg[0]; wSH = wg[1]; wINT = wg[2]; wB = wg[3];
    } else if (X.length){
      var wr = ridgeSolve(X, Y, 1e-2);
      wAI = wr[0]; wSH = wr[1]; wINT = wr[2]; wB = wr[3];
    }

    // Harden the weights: if they come out NaN, infinite, or strongly negative,
    // fall back to the safe defaults so the blend behaves sensibly.

    (function(){
      function sane(v, fallback){
        /* CHG: ES5 finite check.
           Reason: Number.isFinite is ES6.
           Benefit: avoids parse/runtime issues, same guard behavior. */
        if (!isFinite(v)) return fallback;
        // If the learner tries to push very negative or huge values, ignore it.
        if (v < -0.1 || v > 5) return fallback;
        return v;
      }
      var defAI  = 0.7, defSH  = 0.3, defINT = 0.0, defB = 0.0;

      wAI  = sane(wAI,  defAI);
      wSH  = sane(wSH,  defSH);
      wINT = sane(wINT, defINT);
      wB   = sane(wB,   defB);

      // Enforce non-negative blend for interpretability; if any are negative,
      // drop back to the defaults.
      if (wAI < 0 || wSH < 0 || wINT < 0 || wB < 0){
        wAI  = defAI;
        wSH  = defSH;
        wINT = defINT;
        wB   = defB;
      }

      // User-controlled AI vs Skip blend override (slider / settings).
      // settings.blend may be 0-1 or 0-100; normalize to 0-1 and
      // interpret it as the AI share for the main head.
      try {
        var alpha = null;

        // Primary source: settings.blend from the SKAI run settings
        if (typeof settings !== 'undefined' && settings && settings.blend !== undefined) {
          var rawBlend = Number(settings.blend);
          /* CHG: ES5 finite check.
             Reason: Number.isFinite is ES6 and may be undefined in module clients.
             Benefit: same -accept only real numbers- logic without runtime crashes. */
          if (isFinite(rawBlend)) {
            alpha = rawBlend;
          } else {
            // DEBUG: Log when blend value is invalid
                        try { console.warn('[SKAI] settings.blend is not finite:', settings.blend, 'rawBlend=' + rawBlend); } catch(_){}
          }
        } else {
          // DEBUG: Log when settings.blend is undefined
                    try { console.warn('[SKAI] settings.blend is undefined or settings object is invalid. settings:', settings); } catch(_){}
        }

        // Fallback source: global SKAI_BLEND_ALPHA (e.g. from blend engine)
        if (alpha === null && typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.SKAI_BLEND_ALPHA === 'number') {
          alpha = window.SKAI_BLEND_ALPHA;
                    try { console.log('[SKAI] Using fallback SKAI_BLEND_ALPHA:', alpha); } catch(_){}
        }

        /* CHG: ES5 finite check for alpha.
           Reason/Benefit: prevents -Number.isFinite is not a function- errors while preserving normalization. */
        if (alpha !== null && isFinite(alpha)) {
          // Allow either 0-1 or 0-100; normalize to 0-1
          if (alpha > 1) { alpha = alpha / 100; }
          if (alpha < 0) { alpha = 0; }
          if (alpha > 1) { alpha = 1; }

          var shShare = 1 - alpha;
          wAI = alpha;
          wSH = shShare;

          // Expose the effective alpha back out for debugging / continuity
          try { window.SKAI_BLEND_ALPHA = alpha; } catch(_){}
        } else {
          // DEBUG: Log when user blend override is not applied
                    try { console.warn('[SKAI] User blend override NOT applied. alpha=' + alpha + ', using learned weights wAI=' + wAI + ', wSH=' + wSH); } catch(_){}
        }
      } catch (e){
        // DEBUG: Log any exceptions in blend override
                try { console.error('[SKAI] Exception in blend override:', e); } catch(_){}
      }

      // Optionally renormalize main vs SH so they sum to 1 (if both > 0)
      var s = wAI + wSH;
      if (s > 0){
        wAI /= s;
        wSH /= s;
      }

      // DEBUG: Log the final blend weights being used for scoring
            try { console.log('[SKAI] Final blend weights - wAI:', wAI.toFixed(3), 'wSH:', wSH.toFixed(3), '(from settings.blend=' + (settings && settings.blend) + ')'); } catch(_){}
     })();

  } catch (_){
    // FIX: close the outer try so we don't throw "missing catch or finally after try"
    try { (window.SKAI_warn || console.warn)('[SKAI] scoreAndRender failed:', _); } catch(__){}
  }

  // Mark learned before blending so downstream listeners can react.
  try { window.__SKAI_LEARNED__ = true; } catch(_){}

  // Blend mains  (FIX: this must be INSIDE SKAI_scoreAndRender so probs/priorMain/etc exist)
  var blended = [];
  var mainSkipMap = {};  // per-number Skip scores (prior)
  var mainMlMap   = {};  // per-number ML scores (probs)

  // FIX: L may be undefined if earlier guards returned before assigning it.
  // Evidence: loop uses `L` directly.
  var Lsafe = (typeof L === 'number' && isFinite(L) && L > 0)
    ? (L | 0)
    : Math.max((probs && probs.length) ? probs.length : 0,
               (priorMain && priorMain.length) ? priorMain.length : 0);
  
  // CHG: For digit games (Pick 3/Pick 4/Daily), limit Lsafe to 10 (digits 0-9 only)
  var domainMainBlend = (meta && isFinite(+meta.domain) && +meta.domain > 0) ? (+meta.domain|0) : 0;
  if (domainMainBlend > 0 && domainMainBlend <= 9) {
    Lsafe = Math.min(Lsafe, 10);
  }

  for (var i0=0; i0<Lsafe; i0++){
    var num   = allowZero ? i0 : (i0 + 1);
    var ai    = isFiniteNum(probs[i0])      ? probs[i0]      : 0;
    var prior = isFiniteNum(priorMain[i0]) ? priorMain[i0]  : 0;

    // CHG: Temperature transform on AI probability for policy-driven modes (monotone; ranking-safe)
    var aiAdj = ai;
    if (isFiniteNum(aiTemp) && aiTemp > 0 && ai > 0) {
      aiAdj = Math.pow(ai, 1 / aiTemp);
    }

    // CHG: Thompson Sampling exploration factor from history posterior
    // We sample Beta(postA, postB) and scale score by sample/mean (tempered by tsStrength).
    var tsFactor = 1;
    if (tsOn && tsStrength > 0 && postA && postB && isFiniteNum(postA[i0]) && isFiniteNum(postB[i0])) {
      var aTS = postA[i0], bTS = postB[i0];
      if (aTS > 0 && bTS > 0) {
        var meanTS = aTS / (aTS + bTS);
        if (meanTS > 0) {
          var sampTS = window.skaiSampleBeta(aTS, bTS);
          if (isFiniteNum(sampTS) && sampTS > 0) {
            tsFactor = Math.pow((sampTS / meanTS), tsStrength);
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // CHG: Coherent blend: treat Skip/Hit prior as a bounded multiplicative bias on the learned AI probability.
    // This prevents scale-mismatch (adding heterogeneous scores) and stabilizes mode changes.
    var bias = Math.exp(wSH * (prior - 0.5));
    var baseScore = Math.max(0, (wAI * aiAdj) * bias + wB);
    var score = baseScore * tsFactor;

    // CHG: Stability smoothing (EMA vs last score)
    var prev = window.SKAI_lastScoreByNum ? window.SKAI_lastScoreByNum[String(num)] : null;
    if (stability > 0 && prev != null && isFinite(prev)) {
      score = (1 - stability) * score + stability * prev;
    }
    if (window.SKAI_lastScoreByNum) window.SKAI_lastScoreByNum[String(num)] = score;

    // DETERMINISTIC: Main-ball scores are kept noise-free so the same model state and
    // settings always produce the same SKAI_TOP_MAIN ranking (reproducible learning).
    // Within-run FPS diversity (5 structurally different combo suggestions per run) is
    // handled deterministically by the FPS selection loop in SKAI_scoreAndRender, which
    // enforces >=2 ball difference between each FPS entry without any Math.random().
    // Cross-run diversity (different batch profile/strategy combos) comes from genuinely
    // different neural-network weights, blend, temperature, and TS factor -- not from noise.

    blended.push({
      num: num,
      score: score,
      explain: {
        ai: ai,
        aiAdj: (typeof aiAdj !== 'undefined') ? aiAdj : ai,
        prior: prior,
        bias: (typeof bias !== 'undefined') ? bias : 1,
        tsFactor: (typeof tsFactor !== 'undefined') ? tsFactor : 1,
        baseScore: (typeof baseScore !== 'undefined') ? baseScore : score,
        stability: (typeof stability !== 'undefined') ? stability : 0
      }
    });

    // FIX: these maps must be written per-iteration while `num/ai/prior` are in scope.
    mainMlMap[num]   = ai;
    mainSkipMap[num] = prior;
  }

   // Sort by score desc, then by number asc (deterministic tie-breaking)
  // FIX: when reproducibility is OFF, avoid falling back to plain number-ascending
  // for score ties because that can make different batch variants collapse to the
  // same final ordering. Use a stable run-specific tie seed derived from the active
  // profile/strategy/blend/temperature instead.
  var skaiRunTieSeed = (function(){
    var seedParts = [
      String((settings && settings.profile) || ''),
      String((settings && settings.strategy) || ''),
      String((settings && settings.mode) || ''),
      String((settings && settings.blend) || ''),
      String((settings && settings.temperature) || aiTemp || ''),
      String((settings && settings.diversityPenalty) || ''),
      String((settings && settings.skai_window_size) || (settings && settings.windowSize) || ''),
      String(tsStrength || '')
    ].join('|').toLowerCase();
    var h = 0;
    for (var hs = 0; hs < seedParts.length; hs++) {
      h = ((h << 5) - h) + seedParts.charCodeAt(hs);
      h |= 0;
    }
    return Math.abs(h) || 1;
  })();
  function skaiRunTieBreak(seed, value) {
    var h = seed | 0;
    h = ((h << 5) - h) + (value | 0);
    h |= 0;
    return Math.abs(h) / 4294967296;
  }

  blended.sort(function(a,b){
    var diff = (b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0);
    if (Math.abs(diff) > 1e-12) { return diff; }
    // CHG: Deterministic tie-breaker when scores are equal and reproducibility is active
    if (window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC && window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.enabled) {
      var tieA = window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.tieBreaker(a.num);
      var tieB = window.SKAI_DETERMINISTIC.tieBreaker(b.num);
      if (tieA !== tieB) return tieA - tieB;
    } else {
      var runTieA = skaiRunTieBreak(skaiRunTieSeed, a.num);
      var runTieB = skaiRunTieBreak(skaiRunTieSeed, b.num);
      if (runTieA !== runTieB) return runTieA - runTieB;
    }
    // Final stable fallback
    return a.num - b.num;
  });

  // CHG: expose latest ranking for explainability/debug
  window.SKAI_lastBlended = blended;

  // [[FIX]] Bridge: populate SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output from blended candidates so
  // the Phase 7/8 learning engine (calibration bins, tail recovery) can use live scoring data.
  // Without this, engine_output stays empty after skai:done fires and all calibration/tail
  // persistence calls return early with candidates.length === 0.
  try {
    if (window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring && blended.length > 0) {
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output = blended.slice();
      window.SKAI_RUNTIME.scoring.engine_output_count = blended.length;
    }
  } catch(_) {}

  var top = blended.slice(0, 20);

  // Keep SKAI_BLEND_RESULTS in sync using the shared blend engine (if present)
  try {
    if (window.SKAI_blendEngine && typeof window.SKAI_blendEngine.run === 'function') {
      var blendInput = {
        mainSkip:  mainSkipMap,
        mainMl:    mainMlMap,
        extraSkip: (window.SKAI_EXTRA_SKIP_MAP || {}),
        extraMl:   (window.SKAI_EXTRA_ML_MAP   || {}),
        options:   {
          alpha:      (typeof settings !== 'undefined' && settings && typeof settings.blend !== 'undefined')
                        ? settings.blend
                        : undefined,
          mainLimit:  20,
          // FIX2: Use isStandardLotteryGame (domain>9) as discriminant, not hasExtraBall.
          // Pick4 with bonus digit: isDailyDigitGame=true, hasExtraBall=true, isStandardLotteryGame=false -> 3
          // EuroMillions/Powerball (even if wrongly tagged is_daily): isStandardLotteryGame=true -> 5
          extraLimit: !!(window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.isDaily || window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)
                          && !window.SKAI_META.isStandardLotteryGame) ? 3 : 5
        }
      };
      window.SKAI_BLEND_RESULTS = window.SKAI_blendEngine.run(blendInput);
    }
  } catch(_){}

  try {
    window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN = top.slice();
    window.SKAI_DEBUG_MAIN = {
      weights: { wAI: wAI, wSH: wSH, wINT: wINT, wB: wB },
      probs:   (probs && probs.slice) ? probs.slice() : [],
      prior:   (priorMain && priorMain.slice) ? priorMain.slice() : [],
      top:     top.slice()
    };

    // SKAI2 authoritative mode: SKAI2_runPredictionEngine is the primary prediction authority.
    // In authoritative mode (default): SKAI2 ranked_numbers replace ML ranking directly.
    // Legacy ML output is stored as supporting evidence only.
    // Set window.SKAI2_AUTHORITATIVE_MODE = false to fall back to 70/30 blend.
    if (typeof window.SKAI2_AUTHORITATIVE_MODE === 'undefined') { window.SKAI2_AUTHORITATIVE_MODE = true; }
    // [[SKAI_BATCH_SNAPSHOT_INTEGRITY_V1]]
    // For 9-run batches, authoritative server-only mode is disabled for this
    // run only. Otherwise profile/strategy/blend variations can all collapse
    // into the same ranked number list. Single-run SKAI behavior is preserved.
    var __skaiBatchVariantActive = false;
    try { __skaiBatchVariantActive = !!(window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_ACTIVE__ || window.__SKAI_MLE_ACTIVE_BATCH_RUN__); } catch (_) {}
    var __skaiS2AuthoritativeForThisRun = !!window.SKAI2_AUTHORITATIVE_MODE;
    if (__skaiBatchVariantActive) { __skaiS2AuthoritativeForThisRun = false; }

    // Signal that ML pipeline has completed. Register the deferred rebuild so the
    // XHR callback can trigger it if SKAI2 arrives after this point.
    window.__SKAI2_ML_DONE__ = true;
    if (__skaiS2AuthoritativeForThisRun && !window.__SKAI2_XHR_DONE__) {
      // XHR not yet returned: register a lightweight deferred build function.
      // When the XHR onreadystatechange fires and both flags are set, it will
      // call this to apply SKAI2 rankings to the already-built globals.
      window.__SKAI2_DEFERRED_BUILD__ = function() {
        try {
          var _dfr = window.SKAI2_SERVER_SCORES;
          if (_dfr && _dfr.ok && Array.isArray(_dfr.ranked_numbers) && _dfr.ranked_numbers.length) {
            window.__SKAI2_FALLBACK_MODE__ = false;
            var _dfrN = _dfr.ranked_numbers.length;
            var _dfrArr = [];
            for (var _dfrI = 0; _dfrI < _dfrN; _dfrI++) {
              var _dfrE = _dfr.ranked_numbers[_dfrI];
              if (_dfrE && _dfrE.num != null) {
                _dfrArr.push({ num: _dfrE.num, score: (_dfrN - _dfrI) / _dfrN });
              }
            }
            if (_dfrArr.length) {
              window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN = _dfrArr;
              // Rebuild last-picks and save-ordered from updated SKAI_TOP_MAIN.
              var _dfrPicks = [];
              for (var _dfrJ = 0; _dfrJ < _dfrArr.length; _dfrJ++) { _dfrPicks.push(_dfrArr[_dfrJ].num); }
              window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__  = _dfrPicks.slice();
              window.skaiSaveMainOrdered  = _dfrPicks.slice();
            }
            if (Array.isArray(_dfr.combinations) && _dfr.combinations.length) {
              var _dfrCombos = [];
              for (var _dfrCI = 0; _dfrCI < _dfr.combinations.length; _dfrCI++) {
                var _dfrCb = _dfr.combinations[_dfrCI];
                if (_dfrCb && Array.isArray(_dfrCb.main) && _dfrCb.main.length) {
                  _dfrCombos.push({ main: _dfrCb.main.slice(), extra: Array.isArray(_dfrCb.extra) ? _dfrCb.extra.slice() : [], score: (typeof _dfrCb.score_total === 'number') ? _dfrCb.score_total : 0 });
                }
              }
              if (_dfrCombos.length) {
                var _dfrExist = Array.isArray(window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS) ? window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS : [];
                window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS = _dfrCombos.concat(_dfrExist);
                if (_dfrCombos[0] && Array.isArray(_dfrCombos[0].main)) {
                  window.skaiSaveMainOrdered = _dfrCombos[0].main.slice();
                  if (Array.isArray(_dfrCombos[0].extra) && _dfrCombos[0].extra.length) {
                    window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered = _dfrCombos[0].extra.slice();
                  }
                }
              }
            }
          } else {
            window.__SKAI2_FALLBACK_MODE__ = true;
          }
        } catch(_dfrErr) {
          if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI2] deferred build error', _dfrErr); }
        }
        window.__SKAI2_DEFERRED_BUILD__ = null;
      };
    }

    try {
      var _s2blend = window.SKAI2_SERVER_SCORES;
      if (_s2blend && _s2blend.ok &&
          Array.isArray(_s2blend.ranked_numbers) && _s2blend.ranked_numbers.length) {
        window.__SKAI2_FALLBACK_MODE__ = false;
        // Store legacy ML output as supporting evidence before overriding.
        window.SKAI_LEGACY_SUPPORTING_OUTPUT = {
          ranked_numbers: (Array.isArray(window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN) ? window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN.slice() : [])
        };
        if (__skaiBatchVariantActive) {
          // [[SKAI_BATCH_SNAPSHOT_INTEGRITY_V1]]
          // Batch variants must preserve per-run ML/settings output. SKAI2 is
          // retained as supporting evidence only until the server endpoint fully
          // scores profile/strategy/blend/temperature parameters.
          window.SKAI2_SUPPORTING_OUTPUT = {
            ranked_numbers: _s2blend.ranked_numbers,
            bonus_numbers: _s2blend.bonus_numbers || [],
            combinations: _s2blend.combinations || []
          };
        } else if (__skaiS2AuthoritativeForThisRun) {
          // Authoritative mode: SKAI2 server ranking IS the primary output.
          // Build normalized score map from SKAI2 ranked_numbers.
          var _s2bMap = {};
          var _s2bN = _s2blend.ranked_numbers.length;
          for (var _s2bi = 0; _s2bi < _s2bN; _s2bi++) {
            var _s2bItem = _s2blend.ranked_numbers[_s2bi];
            if (_s2bItem && _s2bItem.num != null) {
              _s2bMap[_s2bItem.num] = (_s2bN - _s2bi) / _s2bN;
            }
          }
          // Build authoritative ranked list: pure SKAI2 server order.
          // Legacy ML is stored as SKAI_LEGACY_SUPPORTING_OUTPUT above; it is
          // supporting evidence only and must not alter the authoritative ranking.
          var _s2bArr = [];
          var _s2bAll = {};
          for (var _s2bj = 0; _s2bj < _s2bN; _s2bj++) {
            var _s2bEntry = _s2blend.ranked_numbers[_s2bj];
            if (!_s2bEntry || _s2bEntry.num == null) { continue; }
            var _s2bSrv = (_s2bN - _s2bj) / _s2bN;
            // SKAI2 authoritative: 100% server score. Legacy ML is stored as
            // supporting evidence only and must not alter the final ranking order.
            _s2bArr.push({ num: _s2bEntry.num, score: _s2bSrv });
            _s2bAll[_s2bEntry.num] = true;
          }
          // ML-only numbers not ranked by SKAI2 are stored as supporting evidence only.
          // They are NOT added to the authoritative output to preserve SKAI2 order.
          // (legacy_only / display_only - not_for_final_score)
          if (_s2bArr.length) {
            _s2bArr.sort(function(a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
            window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN = _s2bArr;
          }
        } else {
          // Non-authoritative blend: 30% ML + 70% SKAI2 (same result but via re-score path).
          var _s2bMap2 = {};
          var _s2bN2 = _s2blend.ranked_numbers.length;
          for (var _s2bi2 = 0; _s2bi2 < _s2bN2; _s2bi2++) {
            var _s2bItem2 = _s2blend.ranked_numbers[_s2bi2];
            if (_s2bItem2 && _s2bItem2.num != null) {
              _s2bMap2[_s2bItem2.num] = (_s2bN2 - _s2bi2) / _s2bN2;
            }
          }
          var _s2bArr2 = [];
          var _s2bTop2 = Array.isArray(window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN) ? window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN : [];
          for (var _s2bj2 = 0; _s2bj2 < _s2bTop2.length; _s2bj2++) {
            var _s2bEntry2 = _s2bTop2[_s2bj2];
            if (!_s2bEntry2 || _s2bEntry2.num == null) { continue; }
            var _s2bSrv2 = (_s2bMap2[_s2bEntry2.num] != null) ? _s2bMap2[_s2bEntry2.num] : 0;
            _s2bArr2.push({ num: _s2bEntry2.num, score: 0.30 * _s2bEntry2.score + 0.70 * _s2bSrv2 });
          }
          if (_s2bArr2.length) {
            _s2bArr2.sort(function(a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
            window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN = _s2bArr2;
          }
        }
        // If SKAI2 returned scored combinations, use them as primary final combos.
        if (!__skaiBatchVariantActive && Array.isArray(_s2blend.combinations) && _s2blend.combinations.length) {
          var _s2bCombos = [];
          for (var _s2bci = 0; _s2bci < _s2blend.combinations.length; _s2bci++) {
            var _s2bCb = _s2blend.combinations[_s2bci];
            if (_s2bCb && Array.isArray(_s2bCb.main) && _s2bCb.main.length) {
              _s2bCombos.push({
                main:  _s2bCb.main.slice(),
                extra: Array.isArray(_s2bCb.extra) ? _s2bCb.extra.slice() : [],
                score: (typeof _s2bCb.score_total === 'number') ? _s2bCb.score_total : 0
              });
            }
          }
          if (_s2bCombos.length) {
            if (__skaiS2AuthoritativeForThisRun) {
              // Authoritative: SKAI2 combos are the primary list; ML combos follow.
              var _s2bExist = Array.isArray(window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS) ? window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS : [];
              window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS = _s2bCombos.concat(_s2bExist);
            } else {
              var _s2bExist2 = Array.isArray(window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS) ? window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS : [];
              window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS = _s2bCombos.concat(_s2bExist2);
            }
          }
        }
      } else {
        // SKAI2 server response not available: mark fallback mode.
        window.__SKAI2_FALLBACK_MODE__ = true;
        try { if (window.console && console.warn) { console.warn('[SKAI2] authoritative output unavailable; using legacy ML fallback'); } } catch(_){}
      }
    } catch(_s2bErr) {
      if (window.console && console.warn) {
        console.warn('[SKAI2] server score blend error', _s2bErr);
      }
    }

    // keep: expose last picks so other listeners can see them
    try {
      var lastPicks = [];
      for (var t = 0; t < top.length; t++) {
        // each item in `top` is { num: N, score: S }
        lastPicks.push(top[t].num);
      }
      // Rebuild lastPicks from the (possibly blended) SKAI_TOP_MAIN
      if (Array.isArray(window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN) && window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN.length) {
        lastPicks = [];
        for (var _tBlend = 0; _tBlend < window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN.length; _tBlend++) {
          lastPicks.push(window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN[_tBlend].num);
        }
      }
      window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__ = lastPicks.slice(0, 20);
      
      // FIX: Set skaiSaveMainOrdered for database save in probability order
      // This ensures predictions are saved highest-to-lowest confidence, not sorted numerically
      window.skaiSaveMainOrdered = lastPicks.slice(0, 20);
      
      // Build canonical final prediction sets (top 5 complete sets, ranked by probability).
      // For daily digit games: uses SKAI_POS_COMBOS (per-position ranked combos).

      // For standard lottery games: builds via SKAI_buildFinalCombos.
      // SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS is the single source of truth for display, save, and snapshot.
      try {
        var _metaDigit = window.SKAI_META || {};
        var _domainDigit = (_metaDigit && isFinite(+_metaDigit.domain) && +_metaDigit.domain > 0) ? (+_metaDigit.domain|0) : 0;
        var _pickDigit = (_metaDigit && isFinite(+_metaDigit.pick) && +_metaDigit.pick > 0) ? (+_metaDigit.pick|0) : 0;
        var _isDigitGame = (_domainDigit > 0 && _domainDigit <= 9) || !!(_metaDigit.isDailyDigitGame);
        var _fps = []; // final prediction sets array

        if (_isDigitGame && _pickDigit >= 2 && _pickDigit <= 5 && window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS && window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS.length) {
          // Daily digit game: build top 5 sets from SKAI_POS_COMBOS
          var _posCombos = window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS;
          for (var _fi = 0; _fi < _posCombos.length && _fps.length < 5; _fi++) {
            var _pc = _posCombos[_fi];
            if (_pc && Array.isArray(_pc.main) && _pc.main.length === _pickDigit) {
              _fps.push({
                rank:  _fps.length + 1,
                main:  _pc.main.slice(),
                extra: (window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS && window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.length) ? window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.slice(0, 3) : [],
                score: (typeof _pc.score === 'number') ? _pc.score : 0,
                approxPct: (typeof _pc.approxPct === 'number') ? _pc.approxPct : 0,
                source: 'pos_combos'
              });
            }
          }
          // Keep skaiSaveMainOrdered pointing at the top combo's digits (backward compat)
          if (_fps.length > 0) {
            window.skaiSaveMainOrdered = _fps[0].main.slice();
            if (window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS && window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.length) {
              window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered = window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.slice(0, 3);
            }
          }
        } else {
          // Standard lottery game: build ranked final combos
          if (typeof window.SKAI_buildFinalCombos === 'function') {
            var _metaFC = window.SKAI_META || {};
            var _pickFC = parseInt(_metaFC.pick, 10);
            if (!_pickFC || _pickFC < 1) { _pickFC = (lastPicks && lastPicks.length) ? lastPicks.length : 5; }
            // FIX: Always predict at least 5 extra numbers for regular lotteries with an extra
            // ball (e.g. EuroMillions Lucky Stars, Powerball). The official draw count is the
            // minimum required per official rules, but SKAI shows the top-5 most probable picks
            // regardless of how many are officially drawn.
            var _extraCountFC = (_metaFC && _metaFC.hasExtraBall) ? Math.max(5, parseInt(_metaFC.extraCount || _metaFC.extra_ball_count || _metaFC.num_extra_balls_drawn || 1, 10) || 1) : 0;
            // FIX-D: topK 12->20 -- use all 20 balls from SKAI_TOP_MAIN (C(20,5)=15504
            // candidates vs C(12,5)=792).  For large-domain games (Powerball 69, EuroMillions
            // 50) the extra pool breadth is needed so diversity enforcement below can find
            // genuinely different combos; for small-domain games it is harmless.
            // FIX-E: limit 25->100 -- keep top 100 ranked combos available so the
            // diversity-aware FPS selection (Fix F below) has enough candidates to choose
            // 5 entries that each differ by >=2 balls.  With limit=25, the first combo
            // differing by >=2 balls from FPS[0] is often beyond position 37 (because
            // 36 combos share >=4 balls with the top pick) and was never reachable.
            window.SKAI_buildFinalCombos({ pickSize: _pickFC, extraCount: _extraCountFC, topK: 20, limit: 100 });
          }
          if (window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS && window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS.length) {
            window.SKAI_BEST_COMBO = window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS[0] || null;
            // FIX-F: Diversity-aware FPS selection.
            // Problem: With limit=25 and no diversity check, the top 5 combos
            // from C(12,5)=792 all share the same 4 highest-scoring balls and
            // only vary in 1 position.  For large-domain games (Powerball 69,
            // EuroMillions 50) the ML distribution is nearly flat so those 4 balls
            // dominate ALL 25 candidates.  Users see "same numbers" in all 5 slots.
            //
            // Fix: First pass selects combos that differ by >=2 balls from every
            // already-selected FPS entry (max shared = pickSize-2).  Second pass
            // fills any remaining slots without the constraint so we always emit 5.
            var _fpsDivPickSize = _pickFC || 5;
            var _fpsDivMaxShared = Math.max(1, _fpsDivPickSize - 2); // >=2 ball difference
            var _fpsPass2Needed = false;
            for (var _fj = 0; _fj < window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS.length && _fps.length < 5; _fj++) {
              var _fc = window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS[_fj];
              if (!_fc || !Array.isArray(_fc.main) || !_fc.main.length) { continue; }
              var _fcMain = _fc.main;
              var _tooSimilar = false;
              for (var _prevFps = 0; _prevFps < _fps.length; _prevFps++) {
                var _prevMain = _fps[_prevFps].main;
                var _sharedCount = 0;
                for (var _bk = 0; _bk < _fcMain.length; _bk++) {
                  for (var _pk = 0; _pk < _prevMain.length; _pk++) {
                    if (_fcMain[_bk] === _prevMain[_pk]) { _sharedCount++; break; }
                  }
                }
                if (_sharedCount > _fpsDivMaxShared) { _tooSimilar = true; break; }
              }
              if (_tooSimilar) { _fpsPass2Needed = true; continue; }
              _fps.push({
                rank:  _fps.length + 1,
                main:  _fcMain.slice(),
                extra: (_fc.extra && Array.isArray(_fc.extra)) ? _fc.extra.slice() : [],
                score: (typeof _fc.score === 'number') ? _fc.score : 0,
                approxPct: 0,
                source: 'final_combos'
              });
            }
            // Second pass: fill remaining slots without diversity constraint so we
            // always emit exactly 5 FPS entries even if the pool is too concentrated.
            if (_fpsPass2Needed && _fps.length < 5) {
              for (var _fj2 = 0; _fj2 < window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS.length && _fps.length < 5; _fj2++) {
                var _fc2 = window.SKAI_FINAL_COMBOS[_fj2];
                if (!_fc2 || !Array.isArray(_fc2.main) || !_fc2.main.length) { continue; }
                var _alreadyInFps = false;
                for (var _exi = 0; _exi < _fps.length; _exi++) {
                  if (_fps[_exi].main.join(',') === _fc2.main.join(',')) { _alreadyInFps = true; break; }
                }
                if (!_alreadyInFps) {
                  _fps.push({
                    rank:  _fps.length + 1,
                    main:  _fc2.main.slice(),
                    extra: (_fc2.extra && Array.isArray(_fc2.extra)) ? _fc2.extra.slice() : [],
                    score: (typeof _fc2.score === 'number') ? _fc2.score : 0,
                    approxPct: 0,
                    source: 'final_combos'
                  });
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }

        // Publish canonical final prediction sets (source of truth for save/display/snapshot)
        window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS = _fps;

        // CHG: When the new run produced no FPS, clear __SKAI_FPS_JSON__ and all
        // top_combos_json fields so stale data from a prior run is not re-saved.
        if (_fps.length === 0) {
          window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ = null;
          try {
            var _staleFields = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="top_combos_json"]');
            for (var _sfi = 0; _sfi < _staleFields.length; _sfi++) {
              try { _staleFields[_sfi].value = ''; } catch(_){}
            }
          } catch(_staleErr) {}
        }

        // Inject final_prediction_sets into top_combos_json hidden fields right now
        // so that skaiPrepareAiSave / wireEvidence can include all 5 sets on save.
        try {
          if (_fps.length > 0) {
            var _fpsSets = [];
            for (var _fk = 0; _fk < _fps.length; _fk++) {
              // CHG: main||values fallback so batch-restored entries (which use .values) work too
              var _fkMain = Array.isArray(_fps[_fk].main) ? _fps[_fk].main : (Array.isArray(_fps[_fk].values) ? _fps[_fk].values : []);
              // [[SKAI_DISPLAY_SYNC]] For regular lotteries (EuroMillions, Powerball, etc.) the
              // display field must use comma-joined notation ("1,7,14,25,36"), NOT the daily
              // last-digit-concat format ("17456") produced by SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay.
              // Using the wrong format here causes mylottoexpertExtractDailySavedView to
              // misidentify regular-lottery rows as daily and render them incorrectly.
              _fpsSets.push({ rank: _fps[_fk].rank, values: _fkMain.slice(), score: _fps[_fk].score, display: _isDigitGame ? window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(_fkMain, _pickDigit || _fkMain.length) : _fkMain.join(',') });
            }
            // CHG: Build aiPredictedNumbers (canonical display-string form of the ranked sets).
            // This is the primary save key the dashboard and save pipeline read.
            var _aiPN = [];
            for (var _apk = 0; _apk < _fpsSets.length; _apk++) {
              var _apDisp = _fpsSets[_apk].display || (_fpsSets[_apk].values ? (_isDigitGame ? window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(_fpsSets[_apk].values, _pickDigit || 0) : _fpsSets[_apk].values.join(',')) : '');
              _aiPN.push({ rank: _fpsSets[_apk].rank, values: _apDisp, score: _fpsSets[_apk].score, display: _apDisp });
            }
            var _fpsPayload = {
              version: 'skai_fps_v1',
              aiPredictedNumbers: _aiPN,
              aiPredictedNumbersCount: _aiPN.length,
              primaryPrediction: _aiPN[0] || null,
              final_prediction_sets: _fpsSets,
              final_prediction_set_count: _fpsSets.length,
              top_5_prediction_sets: _fpsSets.slice(0, 5),
              primary_prediction_set: _fpsSets[0] || null,
              predictionMode: (_metaDigit.predictionMode || (_isDigitGame ? 'daily_digit' : 'standard_lottery')),
              pickMain: _pickDigit || 5,
              extraCount: ((_metaDigit.hasExtraBall) ? (parseInt(_metaDigit.extraCount || _metaDigit.extra_ball_count || _metaDigit.num_extra_balls_drawn || 1, 10) || 1) : 0)
            };
            if (_isDigitGame && window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS && window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.length) {
              _fpsPayload.daily_extra_digits = window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.slice(0, 3);
            }
            var _fpsStr = JSON.stringify(_fpsPayload);
