    }
    if (W > N) W = N;

    var lapK = isFinite(+options.laplaceK) ? +options.laplaceK : skaiGetLaplaceKFromUIOrServer(1);

    var start = Math.max(0, N - W);
    var end   = N;

    var stats = buildSkipStats(draws, start, end);
    var Pm    = toProbTable(stats.histMain,  lapK);
    var Pb    = toProbTable(stats.histBonus, lapK);

    var mainRows  = [];
    var extraRows = [];
    var key;

    // Main balls
    for (key in stats.curMain) {
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(stats.curMain, key)) continue;
      var b  = parseInt(key, 10);
      var ks = stats.curMain[key] | 0;
      var row = Pm[b] || null;
      var p   = (row && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(row, ks)) ? row[ks] : 0;
      mainRows.push({ num: b, p: +p });
    }

    // Extra balls
    for (key in stats.curBonus) {
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(stats.curBonus, key)) continue;
      var bb  = parseInt(key, 10);
      var ks2 = stats.curBonus[key] | 0;
      var rowB = Pb[bb] || null;
      var p2   = (rowB && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(rowB, ks2)) ? rowB[ks2] : 0;
      extraRows.push({ num: bb, p: +p2 });
    }

    mainRows.sort(function(a,b){ return (b.p - a.p) || (a.num - b.num); });
    extraRows.sort(function(a,b){ return (b.p - a.p) || (a.num - b.num); });

    var topMain  = (isFinite(+options.topMain)  && +options.topMain  > 0) ? (+options.topMain|0)
                   : (spec && spec.pick_size > 0 ? spec.pick_size : 20);
    var topExtra = (isFinite(+options.topExtra) && +options.topExtra > 0) ? (+options.topExtra|0)
                   : (spec && spec.extra_ball_count > 0 ? spec.extra_ball_count : 5);

    if (mainRows.length  > topMain)  mainRows  = mainRows.slice(0, topMain);
    if (extraRows.length > topExtra) extraRows = extraRows.slice(0, topExtra);

    return {
      main:      mainRows,
      extra:     extraRows,
      spec:      spec,
      weights:   wt,
      windowSize:W,
      laplaceK:  lapK
    };
  }

  // Export snapshot helper once
  if (typeof window.SKAI_getSkipHitSnapshot !== 'function') {
    window.SKAI_getSkipHitSnapshot = skaiGetSkipHitSnapshot;
  }

})(); 
</script>

<script>
;(function(){
  'use strict';

  // -----------------------------
  // Probability-based blend core
  // -----------------------------
  function skaiNormalizeSource(list){
    var map = Object.create(null);
    var sum = 0;
    if (!list || !list.length) {
      return { map: map, sum: 0 };
    }

    for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++){
      var item = list[i];
      if (item == null) continue;

      var num = null;
      var w   = 1;

      if (typeof item === 'object') {
        if (item.num != null) {
          num = item.num;
        } else if (item.number != null) {
          num = item.number;
        } else if (item.n != null) {
          num = item.n;
        }
        if (item.p != null) {
          w = item.p;
        } else if (item.prob != null) {
          w = item.prob;
        } else if (item.weight != null) {
          w = item.weight;
        }
      } else {
        num = item;
      }

      var n = isFinite(+num) ? (+num | 0) : NaN;
      var ww = isFinite(+w) ? +w : 0;
      if (!isFinite(n) || ww <= 0) continue;

      var key = String(n);
      if (!map[key]) map[key] = 0;
      map[key] += ww;
      sum += ww;
    }

    return { map: map, sum: sum };
  }

  function skaiExtractTopFromMap(map, sum, outCount){
    var rows = [];
    var key;
    for (key in map){
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(map, key)) continue;
      var prob = (sum > 0) ? (map[key] / sum) : 0;
      rows.push({ num: parseInt(key,10), p: prob });
    }

    rows.sort(function(a,b){
      return (b.p - a.p) || (a.num - b.num);
    });

    var limit = (isFinite(+outCount) && +outCount > 0) ? (+outCount|0) : rows.length;
    var out   = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < rows.length && out.length < limit; i++){
      out.push(rows[i].num);
    }
    return out;
  }

  function skaiBlendOneDimension(mlList, skipList, ratio, outCount){
    var lambda = isFinite(+ratio) ? Math.max(0, Math.min(100, +ratio)) / 100 : 0;

    var srcML   = skaiNormalizeSource(mlList);
    var srcSkip = skaiNormalizeSource(skipList);

    // If we only have one side, ignore lambda: pure source
    if (!srcSkip.sum && srcML.sum) {
      return skaiExtractTopFromMap(srcML.map, srcML.sum, outCount);
    }
    if (!srcML.sum && srcSkip.sum) {
      return skaiExtractTopFromMap(srcSkip.map, srcSkip.sum, outCount);
    }
    if (!srcML.sum && !srcSkip.sum) {
      return [];
    }

    var keys = Object.create(null);
    var k;
    for (k in srcML.map){   if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(srcML.map,   k)) keys[k] = 1; }
    for (k in srcSkip.map){ if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(srcSkip.map, k)) keys[k] = 1; }

    var mlZ   = srcML.sum;
    var skipZ = srcSkip.sum;
    var rows  = [];

    for (k in keys){
      if (!Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(keys, k)) continue;
      var wMl   = srcML.map[k]   || 0;
      var wSkip = srcSkip.map[k] || 0;
      var pMl   = mlZ   > 0 ? (wMl   / mlZ)   : 0;
      var pSkip = skipZ > 0 ? (wSkip / skipZ) : 0;

      var p = (1 - lambda) * pMl + lambda * pSkip;
      rows.push({ num: parseInt(k,10), p: p });
    }

    rows.sort(function(a,b){
      return (b.p - a.p) || (a.num - b.num);
    });

    var limit = (isFinite(+outCount) && +outCount > 0) ? (+outCount|0) : rows.length;
    var out   = [];
    for (var i = 0; i < rows.length && out.length < limit; i++){
      if (rows[i].p <= 0) continue;
      out.push(rows[i].num);
    }

    return out;
  }

  function skaiGetBlendRatio(){
    var r = 0;
    try {
      if (window.SKAI_SERVER && isFinite(+window.SKAI_SERVER.blendRatio)) {
        r = +window.SKAI_SERVER.blendRatio;
      } else {
        var el = document.getElementById('blendRatio_ui') || document.getElementById('blendRatio');
        if (el && isFinite(+el.value)) {
          r = +el.value;
        }
      }
    } catch (_){}
    if (!isFinite(r)) r = 0;
    if (r < 0) r = 0;
    if (r > 100) r = 100;
    return r;
  }

  function SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals(){
    try {
      var ratio = skaiGetBlendRatio();

      // ratio = 0 -> pure ML, do nothing
      if (ratio <= 0) {
        window.__SKAI_BLEND_APPLIED__ = false;
        return;
      }

      // Avoid double-apply on the same run
      if (window.__SKAI_BLEND_APPLIED__) return;

      var mlMain  = window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__ || [];
      var mlExtra = window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ || [];

      // If there is nothing from ML, blending is meaningless
      if ((!mlMain || !mlMain.length) && (!mlExtra || !mlExtra.length)) {
        return;
      }

      var snapshot = (typeof window.SKAI_getSkipHitSnapshot === 'function')
        ? window.SKAI_getSkipHitSnapshot({})
        : null;

      var skipMain  = snapshot && snapshot.main  ? snapshot.main  : [];
      var skipExtra = snapshot && snapshot.extra ? snapshot.extra : [];

      var outMainCount  = mlMain.length ||
        (snapshot && snapshot.spec && snapshot.spec.pick_size) || 0;
      var outExtraCount = mlExtra.length ||
        (snapshot && snapshot.spec && snapshot.spec.extra_ball_count) || 0;

      var blendedMain  = skaiBlendOneDimension(mlMain,  skipMain,  ratio, outMainCount);
      var blendedExtra = skaiBlendOneDimension(mlExtra, skipExtra, ratio, outExtraCount);

      if (blendedMain && blendedMain.length) {
        window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__ = blendedMain.slice();
      }
      if (blendedExtra && blendedExtra.length) {
        window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ = blendedExtra.slice();
      }

      window.__SKAI_BLEND_APPLIED__ = true;

      // Lightweight trace for debugging
      try {
        window.SKAI_BLEND_TRACE = {
          ratio:          ratio,
          outMainCount:   outMainCount,
          outExtraCount:  outExtraCount,
          windowSize:     snapshot && snapshot.windowSize,
          laplaceK:       snapshot && snapshot.laplaceK
        };
      } catch (_){}
    } catch (_){}
  }

  if (typeof window.SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals !== 'function') {
    window.SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals = SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals;
  }

  // Reset flag for each new ML run
  try {
    window.addEventListener('skai:ml:start', function(){
      try { window.__SKAI_BLEND_APPLIED__ = false; } catch(_){}
    }, false);
  } catch (_){}

})();
</script>

<script>
;(function(){
  'use strict';

  // Watchdog-safe wrapper: ensure skai:analysis-stop always has a detail payload
  if (typeof window.SKAI_emit === 'function' && !window.SKAI_emit_wrapped_for_detail) {
    var __origEmit = window.SKAI_emit;

    window.SKAI_emit = function(type, detail){
      // If watchdog or any caller fires a bare analysis-stop, inject a default reason
      if (type === 'skai:analysis-stop' && (detail == null || typeof detail !== 'object')) {
        detail = { reason: 'watchdog' };
      }
      return __origEmit.call(this, type, detail);
    };

    window.SKAI_emit_wrapped_for_detail = true;
  }

  // Floating global SKAI status banner (site-wide, mirrors chip + orb messages)
  (function(){
    var wrapper   = null;
    var pill      = null;
    var textWrap  = null;
    var textMain  = null;
    var textSub   = null;
    var hideTimer = null;

    function ensure(){
      if (wrapper && pill && textWrap && textMain && textSub) {
        return;
      }

      wrapper  = document.getElementById('skai-global-status-wrapper');
      pill     = document.getElementById('skai-global-status');
      textWrap = document.getElementById('skai-global-status-text');

      if (!wrapper || !pill || !textWrap){
        // Create wrapper + pill if they do not yet exist
        wrapper = document.createElement('div');
        wrapper.id = 'skai-global-status-wrapper';

        pill = document.createElement('div');
        pill.id = 'skai-global-status';
        pill.setAttribute('role','status');
        pill.setAttribute('aria-live','polite');

        var dot = document.createElement('span');
        dot.className = 'skai-global-status-dot';
        dot.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');

        textWrap = document.createElement('span');
        textWrap.id = 'skai-global-status-text';

        textMain = document.createElement('span');
        textMain.className = 'skai-global-status-main';

        textSub  = document.createElement('span');
        textSub.className = 'skai-global-status-sub';

        textWrap.appendChild(textMain);
        textWrap.appendChild(textSub);
        pill.appendChild(dot);
        pill.appendChild(textWrap);
        wrapper.appendChild(pill);

        (document.body || document.documentElement).appendChild(wrapper);
      } else {
        // If the wrapper exists, ensure we have references to the inner spans
        if (!textMain || !textSub){
          textMain = textWrap.querySelector('.skai-global-status-main');
          textSub  = textWrap.querySelector('.skai-global-status-sub');
          if (!textMain){
            textMain = document.createElement('span');
            textMain.className = 'skai-global-status-main';
            textWrap.appendChild(textMain);
          }
          if (!textSub){
            textSub = document.createElement('span');
            textSub.className = 'skai-global-status-sub';
            textWrap.appendChild(textSub);
          }
        }
      }
    }

    function update(text, sub){
      ensure();
      if (!wrapper || !pill || !textWrap || !textMain || !textSub) {
        return;
      }

      var main  = (text != null) ? String(text) : '';
      var extra = (sub  != null) ? String(sub)  : '';

      // If no content at all, hide the pill
      if (!main && !extra){
        pill.style.display = 'none';
        wrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
        return;
      }

      // Main line (headline)
      if (main){
        textMain.textContent = main;
        textMain.style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        textMain.textContent = '';
        textMain.style.display = 'none';
      }

      // Sub line (detail)
      if (extra && extra !== main){
        textSub.textContent = extra;
        textSub.style.display = 'block';
      } else {
        textSub.textContent = '';
        textSub.style.display = 'none';
      }

      pill.style.display = 'flex';
      wrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','false');

      // Reset any previous hide timer
      if (hideTimer){
        window.clearTimeout(hideTimer);
        hideTimer = null;
      }

      // Auto-hide for terminal states so UI cleans itself up
      var combined = (main || '') + ' ' + (extra || '');
      var lower = combined.toLowerCase();
      if (lower.indexOf('complete') !== -1 ||
          lower.indexOf('ready')    !== -1 ||
          lower.indexOf('stopped')  !== -1 ||
          lower.indexOf('error')    !== -1) {
        hideTimer = window.setTimeout(function(){
          pill.style.display = 'none';
          wrapper.setAttribute('aria-hidden','true');
        }, 4000);
      }
    }

    if (typeof window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus !== 'function'){
      window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus = function(text, sub){
        update(text, sub);
      };
    }
  })();

  // SKAI orb / bubble (same behaviour as before; now it can talk to SKAI_setGlobalStatus)
  var orb        = document.getElementById('skai-progress-orb');
  var statusNode = document.getElementById('skai-progress-orb-status');
  var hideTimeout = null;

  function setVisible(show){
    if (!orb) return;
    orb.style.display = show ? 'flex' : 'none';
  }

  function setStatusText(msg){
    if (!statusNode) return;
    if (typeof msg === 'string' && msg.trim() !== '') {
      statusNode.textContent = msg;
    }
  }

  window.skaiProgress = {
    show: function(msg){
      if (hideTimeout){
        window.clearTimeout(hideTimeout);
        hideTimeout = null;
      }
      var message = msg || 'SKAI is analyzing your draw history...';
      setStatusText(message);
      setVisible(true);

      // Mirror orb status into the floating banner
      if (typeof window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus === 'function'){
        window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus('SKAI is working on this analysis', message);
      }
    },
    setStatus: function(msg){
      setStatusText(msg);
      // Keep the banner detail line in sync with incremental updates
      if (typeof window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus === 'function'){
        window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus(null, msg);
      }
    },
    done: function(msg){
      var finalMsg = msg || 'Run complete';
      setStatusText(finalMsg);

      // Final message also surfaced in the global banner
      if (typeof window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus === 'function'){
        window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus('Run complete', finalMsg);
      }

      // small delay so user can see the final message
      hideTimeout = window.setTimeout(function(){
        setVisible(false);
      }, 800);
    }
  };

})();
</script>
<script>
;(function(){
  'use strict';

  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){
    try {
      // The SKAI story section with "Todays SKAI analysis for ..."
      var story  = document.querySelector('.skai-story');
      // The main SKAI Prediction Center panel
      var target = document.getElementById('skai-ai-panel');

      if (!story || !target || !target.parentNode) return;

      var parent = target.parentNode;

       // Only move if the story currently sits *after* the panel (or far below)
      // so we don't accidentally reorder if you've already placed it up top.
      var FOLLOWING = (typeof Node !== 'undefined' && Node.DOCUMENT_POSITION_FOLLOWING)
        ? Node.DOCUMENT_POSITION_FOLLOWING
        : 4; // ES5-safe fallback for old browsers
      if ((story.compareDocumentPosition(target) & FOLLOWING) === FOLLOWING) {
        parent.insertBefore(story, target); // move story just above the panel
      }

    } catch (_){}
  });
})();
</script>

<script>
;(function(){
  'use strict';

  // SKAI: Hard-disable the legacy "classic" Auto-Tune function.
  // Any call to window.runAutoTune will now be routed to the Skip & Hit tuner.
  try {
     window.runAutoTune = function () {
      // Prefer canonical Skip & Hit entrypoint if available
      if (typeof window.SKAI_autotuneStart === 'function') {
        return window.SKAI_autotuneStart();
      }
      if (typeof window.SKAI_autotuneBySkipHit === 'function') {
        return window.SKAI_autotuneBySkipHit({});
      }
      // Final fallback: keep contract if Promise exists
      try { return window.Promise ? Promise.resolve(null) : null; } catch(_) { return null; }
    };
  } catch (_){}
})();
</script>
<script>
(function(){
  'use strict';

  function closeAlert(el){
    try{
      el.style.transition = 'opacity .35s ease, transform .35s ease';
      el.style.opacity = '0';
      el.style.transform = 'translateY(6px)';
      setTimeout(function(){
        if (el && el.parentNode) el.parentNode.removeChild(el);
      }, 450);
    }catch(_){}
  }

  function sweep(){
    // Joomla 4/5 typical containers:
    var containers = document.querySelectorAll(
      '.joomla-alert, .alert, .alert-message, .system-message, ' +
      '#system-message-container .alert, #system-message-container .joomla-alert'
    );
    if (!containers || !containers.length) return;

    for (var i=0;i<containers.length;i++){
      (function(el){
        // only auto-hide success/info, leave errors visible longer
        var cls = el.className || '';
        var isError = /alert-danger|danger|error/i.test(cls);
        var delay = isError ? 9000 : 3500;
        setTimeout(function(){ closeAlert(el); }, delay);
      })(containers[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading'){
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', sweep);
  } else {
    sweep();
  }

   // also sweep again shortly after redirects finish rendering
  setTimeout(sweep, 800);
})();
</script>

<script>
/* =====================================================================
   SKAI Production Repairs - Renderer + Progress + Run-Gate Normalizer
   Scope:
     - Fix missing main / extra picks rendering when scoring succeeded
     - Normalize UX state across bar, orb, and global banner
     - Reset run cooldown so Run button doesn't get stuck
     - Add conservative watchdog so progress doesn't freeze at mid %
   NOTE:
     - ES5 only (no arrow functions / Number.isFinite / Object.assign)
     - All calls are guarded with try/catch so nothing can hard-break.
   ===================================================================== */
;(function(){
  'use strict';

  /* ------------------------ 1) Progress API helper ------------------------ */

  function getProgressAPI(){
    var P = null;
    try {
      if (typeof window.SKAI_getProgress === 'function') {
        P = window.SKAI_getProgress();
      } else if (typeof window.ensureProgressAPI === 'function') {
        P = window.ensureProgressAPI();
      } else if (window.SKAI_Progress) {
        P = window.SKAI_Progress;
      }
    } catch (_){}

    if (!P) {
      P = {
        show: function(){},
        set:  function(){},
        done: function(){}
      };
    }
    return P;
  }

  /* ---------------------- 2) Unified UX state helper ---------------------- */

  function SKAI_updateUXState(state){
    try {
      state = state || {};
      var phase  = state.phase  || '';
      var msg    = state.message || '';
      var detail = state.detail || '';
      var P      = getProgressAPI();

      // Normalize bar behavior
      try {
        if (phase === 'idle') {
          P.show('Idle');
          P.set(0, 'Idle');
        } else if (phase === 'autotune') {
          P.show(msg || 'Auto-Tune');
        } else if (phase === 'training') {
          P.show(msg || 'Training model');
        } else if (phase === 'complete') {
          P.set(100, msg || 'Done');
          P.show(detail || 'Your numbers are ready');
          try {
            if (window.skaiProgress && typeof window.skaiProgress.done === 'function') {
              window.skaiProgress.done(detail || msg || 'Run complete');
            }
          } catch (_){}
        } else if (phase === 'error') {
          P.set(100, msg || 'Error');
          if (P.done) P.done(msg || 'Error');
        }
      } catch (_){}

      // Global floating banner
      try {
        if (typeof window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus === 'function') {
          var main = msg || null;
          var sub  = detail || null;
          if (!main && phase === 'idle') main = 'Idle';
          window.SKAI_setGlobalStatus(main, sub);
        }
      } catch (_){}

      // Orb (only mirror key transitions, do not fight existing logic)
      try {
        if (phase === 'training') {
          if (window.skaiProgress && typeof window.skaiProgress.show === 'function') {
            window.skaiProgress.show(detail || msg || 'SKAI is analyzing your draw history...');
          }
        } else if (phase === 'idle') {
          if (window.skaiProgress && typeof window.skaiProgress.done === 'function') {
            window.skaiProgress.done('Idle');
          }
        }
      } catch (_){}
    } catch (_){}
  }

  // Export if not already provided
  if (typeof window.SKAI_updateUXState !== 'function') {
    window.SKAI_updateUXState = SKAI_updateUXState;
  }

  /* ---------------------- 3) Run-gate reset helpers ----------------------- */

  function resetRunCooldown(){
    try { window.__SKAI_RUNNING__ = false; } catch(_){}
    try { window.__SKAI_START_COOLDOWN__ = false; } catch(_){}
    try {
      if (typeof window.SKAI_setBusy === 'function') {
        window.SKAI_setBusy(false);
      }
    } catch(_){}
    try {
      document.documentElement.classList.remove('__skai-running');
      var root = document.getElementById('skai-root') || document.querySelector('[data-skai-root]');
      if (root && root.classList) root.classList.remove('is-busy');
    } catch(_){}
  }

  /* -------------------- 4) Renderer repair (main / extra) ----------------- */

  function dedupeAndSortInts(list){
    var seen = Object.create(null);
    var out  = [];
    if (!list || !list.length) return out;
    for (var i = 0; i < list.length; i++){
      var v = list[i];
      var n = isFinite(+v) ? (+v | 0) : NaN;
      if (!isFinite(n)) continue;
      var key = String(n);
      if (!seen[key]) {
        seen[key] = 1;
        out.push(n);
      }
    }
    out.sort(function(a,b){ return a - b; });
    return out;
  }

  function ensureMainRendered(){
    try {
      // Main container - this already exists in your SKAI layout
      var mainWrap = document.querySelector('.skai-ai-main');
      if (!mainWrap) return;

      var _metaMain = window.SKAI_META || {};
      var _isDailyMain = !!(_metaMain && (_metaMain.isDaily || _metaMain.isDailyDigitGame));

      // DAILY FIX:
      // Daily digit games are rendered by the dedicated SKAI_POS_COMBOS daily block.
      // Do not append any fallback rows here or duplicate output will appear.
      if (_isDailyMain) {
        return;
      }

      // STANDARD LOTTERY FALLBACK:
      // If there are already nball elements, do not touch anything
      var existing = mainWrap.querySelectorAll('.nball');
      if (existing && existing.length) return;

      // Use the captured top picks from scoring
      var picksSrc = [];
      try {
        if (window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__ && window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__.length) {
          for (var i = 0; i < window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__.length; i++){
            picksSrc.push(window.__SKAI_LAST_PICKS__[i]);
          }
        }
      } catch (_){}

      var nums = dedupeAndSortInts(picksSrc);
      if (!nums.length) return;

      var row = document.createElement('div');
      row.className = 'skai-ai-main-picks';

      for (var j = 0; j < nums.length; j++){
        var span = document.createElement('span');
        span.className = 'nball';
        var v = nums[j];
        span.textContent = (v < 10 ? '0' + v : String(v));
        row.appendChild(span);
      }

      mainWrap.appendChild(row);
    } catch (_){}
  }
  function ensureExtraRendered(){
    try {
      var extraWrap = document.getElementById('aiExtraPredictionContainer');
      if (!extraWrap) return;

      var _isDailyExtraGuard = !!(window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.isDaily || window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame));
      if (_isDailyExtraGuard) {
        try { extraWrap.innerHTML = ''; } catch(_){}
        try { extraWrap.style.display = 'none'; } catch(_){}
        try { extraWrap.removeAttribute('data-ai-ready'); } catch(_){}
        return;
      }

      var existing = extraWrap.querySelectorAll('.xball');
      if (existing && existing.length) return;

      // Try a few known globals that might hold extra picks
      var extraSrc = [];
      try {
        if (window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__.length) {
          extraSrc = window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__;
        } else if (window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA.length) {
          extraSrc = window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA;
        }
      } catch (_){}

      var nums = dedupeAndSortInts(extraSrc);
      if (!nums.length) return;

      var row = document.createElement('div');
      row.className = 'skai-ai-extra-picks';

      for (var i = 0; i < nums.length && i < 3; i++){
        var span = document.createElement('span');
        span.className = 'xball';
        var v = nums[i];
        span.textContent = (v < 10 ? '0' + v : String(v));
        row.appendChild(span);
      }
      extraWrap.appendChild(row);
    } catch (_){}
  }

  function repairRenderedPicksOnce(){
    ensureMainRendered();
    ensureExtraRendered();
  }

  // Repair when ML declares completion or legacy "done" fires
  try {
    window.addEventListener('skai:ml:done', function(){
      // Apply blend (ML + Skip & Hit) before rendering pills, if configured
      try {
        if (typeof window.SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals === 'function') {
          window.SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals();
        }
      } catch (_){}

      repairRenderedPicksOnce();
      SKAI_updateUXState({ phase:'complete', message:'Numbers ready', detail:'Your numbers are ready' });
      resetRunCooldown();
    }, false);

    window.addEventListener('skai:done', function(){
      // Legacy completion path - safe to attempt blend here as well (no-op if not applicable)
      try {
        if (typeof window.SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals === 'function') {
          window.SKAI_applyBlendFromGlobals();
        }
      } catch (_){}

      repairRenderedPicksOnce();
      SKAI_updateUXState({ phase:'complete', message:'Run complete', detail:'Your numbers are ready' });
      resetRunCooldown();
    }, false);
  } catch (_){}

  // Fallback: if page loads with results but no events fired
  try {
    var onReadyRepair = function(){
      try {
        setTimeout(repairRenderedPicksOnce, 800);
      } catch (_){}
    };
    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', onReadyRepair, false);
    } else {
      onReadyRepair();
    }
  } catch (_){}

  /* -------------------- 5) Lifecycle / error UX integration ---------------- */

  try {
    window.addEventListener('skai:ml:start', function(){
      try { window.__SKAI_ML_STARTED_AT__ = Date.now(); } catch(_){}
      try { window.__SKAI_LAST_EPOCH__ = -1; } catch(_){}
      SKAI_updateUXState({
        phase:   'training',
        message: 'Training model',
        detail:  'Training in progress'
      });
    }, false);

    window.addEventListener('skai:autotune:start', function(){
      SKAI_updateUXState({
        phase:   'autotune',
        message: 'Auto-Tune running',
        detail:  'Finding a strong Skip & Hit window'
      });
    }, false);

    window.addEventListener('skai:autotune:done', function(){
      SKAI_updateUXState({
        phase:   'training',
        message: 'Preparing training',
        detail:  'Reviewing draw history with the selected window'
      });
    }, false);

    window.addEventListener('skai:analysis-stop', function(e){
      var reason = 'error';
      try {
        if (e && e.detail && e.detail.reason) {
          reason = String(e.detail.reason);
        }
      } catch (_){}
      resetRunCooldown();
      SKAI_updateUXState({
        phase:   'error',
        message: 'Analysis stopped',
        detail:  reason
      });
    }, false);
  } catch (_){}

  // When user returns to the tab, clear any stuck cooldown if not running
  try {
    document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function(){
      try {
        if (document.visibilityState === 'visible' && window.__SKAI_RUNNING__ !== true) {
          window.__SKAI_START_COOLDOWN__ = false;
        }
      } catch (_){}
    }, false);
  } catch (_){}

  /* ---------------------- 6) Safer Range progress watchdog ---------------- */

  (function(){
    var watchdogId = null;

    function clearWatchdog(){
      if (watchdogId) {
        try { clearInterval(watchdogId); } catch(_){}
        watchdogId = null;
      }
    }

    // Start watchdog when ML starts
    try {
      window.addEventListener('skai:ml:start', function(){
        clearWatchdog();

        var lastEpochSeen = (typeof window.__SKAI_LAST_EPOCH__ === 'number')
          ? window.__SKAI_LAST_EPOCH__
          : -1;
        var lastChangeAt = Date.now();

        watchdogId = setInterval(function(){
          try {
            // If run is no longer active, stop watching
            if (window.__SKAI_RUNNING__ !== true) {
              clearWatchdog();
              return;
            }

            var curEpoch = (typeof window.__SKAI_LAST_EPOCH__ === 'number')
              ? window.__SKAI_LAST_EPOCH__
              : lastEpochSeen;

            if (curEpoch !== lastEpochSeen) {
              lastEpochSeen = curEpoch;
              lastChangeAt  = Date.now();
              return;
            }

            var elapsed = Date.now() - lastChangeAt;
            // Only act if we have visible results AND epochs have been stuck
            if (elapsed > 15000) {
              var hasMain  = document.querySelectorAll('.skai-ai-main .nball').length > 0;
              var hasExtra = document.querySelectorAll('#aiExtraPredictionContainer .xball').length > 0;

              if (hasMain || hasExtra) {
                var P = getProgressAPI();
                try {
                  P.set(100, 'Numbers ready');
                  P.show('Your numbers are ready');
                } catch (_){}

                try {
                  if (window.skaiProgress && typeof window.skaiProgress.done === 'function') {
                    window.skaiProgress.done('Run complete');
                  }
                } catch (_){}

                resetRunCooldown();
              }

              clearWatchdog();
            }
          } catch (_){}
        }, 3000);
      }, false);

      window.addEventListener('skai:ml:done', clearWatchdog, false);
      window.addEventListener('skai:analysis-stop', clearWatchdog, false);
    } catch (_){}
  })();

})();
</script>
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  var adv  = document.getElementById('skai-advanced');
  var btn  = document.getElementById('skai-adv-toggle');
  var body = document.getElementById('skai-adv-body');

  if (!adv || !btn || !body) return;

  // CHG: Only force collapsed state if an explicit flag is set.
  // Default behavior is now driven by your HTML/CSS or other SKAI UX rules.
  if (window.SKAI_FORCE_ADV_COLLAPSE === true) {
    adv.classList.add('skai-collapsed');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
    body.style.display = 'none';

    var carat = btn.querySelector('.carat');
    if (carat) {
      carat.style.transform = 'rotate(-90deg)';
    }
  }
});
</script>
<script>
// SKAI: disable Run Analysis for non-authorized users but keep panel visible
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  try {
    if (window.SKAI_CAN_RUN) return; // members: normal behavior

    var btn = document.getElementById('updateButton');
    if (!btn) return;

    // Visually and semantically disable the button
    btn.setAttribute('disabled', 'disabled');
    btn.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
    btn.classList.add('skai-button-disabled');

    // One-line note under the button for guests / non-members
    var noteId = 'skai-locked-note';
    if (!document.getElementById(noteId)) {
      var note = document.createElement('p');
      note.id = noteId;
      note.className = 'skai-locked-note';
      note.textContent = 'Members only: log in to run SKAI and generate AI-ranked number sets for this lottery.';
      note.style.marginTop = '8px';
      note.style.fontSize = '0.85rem';
      note.style.lineHeight = '1.4';
      note.style.color = '#6b7280';

      if (btn.parentNode) {
        // Insert right after the button
        if (btn.nextSibling) {
          btn.parentNode.insertBefore(note, btn.nextSibling);
        } else {
          btn.parentNode.appendChild(note);
        }
      }
    }

    // Capture clicks before any other handler and redirect to signup modal
    btn.addEventListener('click', function (ev) {
      ev.preventDefault();
      ev.stopPropagation();

      var modal = document.getElementById('signupModal');
      if (modal) {
        modal.style.display = 'flex';
      }

      var title = document.getElementById('signupTitle');
      if (title) {
        title.textContent = 'Unlock SKAI Predictions';
      }
    }, true); // capture phase to preempt downstream listeners
  } catch (_){}
}); // END DOMContentLoaded

  // CHG: Rolling-origin backtest runner (ES5-safe)
  // Console usage:
  //   SKAI_runBacktest({ start: 50, end: 500, step: 1, topK: 20, keepSeries: false })
  // Returns summary metrics for tuning: avgTopKHits, avgLogLoss, avgBrier
  // CHG: Helper to return current Top-K ranked numbers + explanation (UX/debug)
  // Console usage: SKAI_getTopExplain(20)
  window.SKAI_getTopExplain = window.SKAI_getTopExplain || function(k){
    k = (k != null) ? (k|0) : 20;
    if (k < 1) k = 1;
    if (!window.SKAI_lastBlended || !window.SKAI_lastBlended.length) return [];
    var out = [];
    for (var i=0; i<k && i<window.SKAI_lastBlended.length; i++){
      out.push(window.SKAI_lastBlended[i]);
    }
    return out;
  };

  // CHG: Pretty explanation lines for UX (console now; UI later)
  // Console usage: SKAI_explainTop(20)
  window.SKAI_explainTop = window.SKAI_explainTop || function(k){
    var rows = window.SKAI_getTopExplain(k);
    var out = [];
    for (var i=0; i<rows.length; i++){
      var r = rows[i] || {};
      var e = r.explain || {};
      var num = r.num;

      // Plain-English interpretation:
      // - aiAdj: AI belief after temperature policy
      // - prior: Skip/Hit learned prior (0..1 normalized)
      // - bias: multiplicative effect from prior
      // - tsFactor: exploration factor from uncertainty
      var line =
        "Num " + num +
        " | AI=" + (isFinite(e.ai) ? e.ai.toFixed(4) : "n/a") +
        " | AI(adj)=" + (isFinite(e.aiAdj) ? e.aiAdj.toFixed(4) : "n/a") +
        " | Prior=" + (isFinite(e.prior) ? e.prior.toFixed(4) : "n/a") +
        " | Bias=" + (isFinite(e.bias) ? e.bias.toFixed(4) : "n/a") +
        " | TS=" + (isFinite(e.tsFactor) ? e.tsFactor.toFixed(4) : "n/a") +
        " | Score=" + (isFinite(r.score) ? r.score.toFixed(6) : "n/a");
      out.push(line);
    }
    return out;
  };

  window.SKAI_runBacktest = window.SKAI_runBacktest || function(opts){
    opts = opts || {};
    var startIdx = (opts.start != null) ? (opts.start|0) : 50;
    var endIdx   = (opts.end   != null) ? (opts.end|0)   : 0;
    var step     = (opts.step  != null) ? (opts.step|0)  : 1;
    var topK     = (opts.topK  != null) ? (opts.topK|0)  : 20;

    var draws = (typeof rawDraws !== 'undefined' && rawDraws) ? rawDraws : (window.SKAIRawDraws || null);
    if (!draws || !draws.length) {
      return { ok:false, error:"No draw history found (rawDraws or window.SKAIRawDraws missing)." };
    }

    if (endIdx <= 0 || endIdx > draws.length - 1) endIdx = draws.length - 1;
    if (startIdx < 5) startIdx = 5;
    if (step < 1) step = 1;
    if (topK < 1) topK = 1;

    var nSteps = 0;
    var sumTopKHits = 0;
    var sumLogLoss = 0;
    var sumBrier = 0;

    var keepSeries = !!opts.keepSeries;
    var series = keepSeries ? [] : null;

    var s = (typeof settings !== 'undefined' && settings) ? settings : (opts.settings || {});
    var numsOf = window.skaiNumsOf || function(d){
      if (Array.isArray(d)) return d;
      if (d && Array.isArray(d.nums)) return d.nums;
      if (d && Array.isArray(d.numbers)) return d.numbers;
      return [];
    };

    for (var t = startIdx; t <= endIdx; t += step){
      var hist = draws.slice(0, t);

      if (window.buildSkaiCurrentVector) {
        window.buildSkaiCurrentVector(hist, s);
      }
      if (window.buildSkaiDataset) {
        window.buildSkaiDataset(hist, s);
      }

      var probs = window.SKAI_lastProbs;
      var priorVec = window.buildSkaiCurrentVector ? window.buildSkaiCurrentVector(hist, s) : null;
      var prior = (priorVec && priorVec.skipPrior) ? priorVec.skipPrior : [];
      var dom = Math.max(prior.length, (probs && probs.length) ? probs.length : 0);
      if (!dom) continue;

      var scored = [];
      for (var i=0;i<dom;i++){
        var num = (s && s.allowZero) ? i : (i + 1);
        var p = (probs && isFinite(probs[i])) ? probs[i] : 0;
        var pr = (prior && isFinite(prior[i])) ? prior[i] : 0;
        var bias = Math.exp(((s && s.wSH != null) ? Number(s.wSH) : 1) * (pr - 0.5));
        var base = (p > 0 ? p : 1e-9) * bias;
        scored.push({num:num, score:base, p:p});
      }
      scored.sort(function(a,b){ return b.score - a.score; });

      var top = [];
      for (var k=0;k<topK && k<scored.length;k++) top.push(scored[k].num);

      var win = numsOf(draws[t]) || [];
      var hk = window.skaiTopKHits(top, win);
      sumTopKHits += hk;

      // Probabilistic proxies: treat each number as Bernoulli hit/no-hit
      if (probs){
        for (var i2=0;i2<dom;i2++){
          var num2 = (s && s.allowZero) ? i2 : (i2 + 1);
          var y = 0;
          for (var j2=0;j2<win.length;j2++){ if (String(win[j2]) === String(num2)) { y=1; break; } }
          var p2 = (probs && isFinite(probs[i2])) ? probs[i2] : 0;
          sumLogLoss += window.skaiLogLoss(p2, y);
          sumBrier   += window.skaiBrier(p2, y);
        }
      }

      nSteps++;
      if (keepSeries) series.push({t:t, topKHits:hk});
    }

    var out = {
      ok:true,
      steps:nSteps,
      avgTopKHits:(nSteps>0 ? (sumTopKHits/nSteps) : 0),
      avgLogLoss:(nSteps>0 ? (sumLogLoss/nSteps) : 0),
      avgBrier:(nSteps>0 ? (sumBrier/nSteps) : 0)
    };

    // CHG: optional calibration stats (if requested)
    if (opts && opts.calibration) {
      var binCount = (opts.binCount != null) ? (opts.binCount|0) : 10;
      var calib = window.skaiCalibBins(binCount);

      // Replay loop quickly using stored series settings (best-effort)
      // Note: This uses the same probs/prior proxy method as the backtest itself.
      for (var t2 = startIdx; t2 <= endIdx; t2 += step){
        var hist2 = draws.slice(0, t2);

        if (window.buildSkaiCurrentVector) window.buildSkaiCurrentVector(hist2, s);
        if (window.buildSkaiDataset) window.buildSkaiDataset(hist2, s);

        var probs2 = window.SKAI_lastProbs;
        if (!probs2) continue;

        var win2 = numsOf(draws[t2]) || [];
        var dom2 = probs2.length;

        for (var i3=0;i3<dom2;i3++){
          var num3 = (s && s.allowZero) ? i3 : (i3 + 1);
          var y3 = 0;
          for (var j3=0;j3<win2.length;j3++){ if (String(win2[j3]) === String(num3)) { y3=1; break; } }
          var p3 = isFinite(probs2[i3]) ? probs2[i3] : 0;
          calib.add(p3, y3);
        }
      }

      out.calibration = calib.summary();
    }

    if (keepSeries) out.series = series;
    return out;
  };


</script>

<script>
/* =====================================================================
   DESIGN B: Run Snapshot sender
   Purpose:
     - After skai:done fires, collect the effectiveRunConfig from
       window.SKAI_SETTINGS (set during the run) and POST it to the
       server as skai_action=store_run_snapshot.
     - The server stores it in the session keyed by userId+gameId.
     - On Save, the server reads from this snapshot instead of form defaults.
   Depends on:
     - window.SKAI_SETTINGS (set in runSkaiML just before model training)
     - window.SKAI_SERVER.csrf (CSRF token for the POST)
     - window.SKAI_SERVER.gameId
     - window.buildEffectiveConfig() (provides derived blend pct etc.)
   Notes:
     - Uses fetch() with a JSON body; gracefully no-ops if fetch is absent.
     - Does NOT block the UI; runs fire-and-forget after skai:done.
   ===================================================================== */
;(function(){
  'use strict';

  if (window.__SKAI_SNAPSHOT_WIRED__) { return; }
  window.__SKAI_SNAPSHOT_WIRED__ = true;

  function sendRunSnapshot() {
    try {
      var S    = window.SKAI_SETTINGS || {};
      var srv  = window.SKAI_SERVER   || {};
      var csrf = srv.csrf             || {};

      // Require CSRF name to proceed
      var csrfName = csrf.name;
      if (!csrfName) { return; }

      // Build the canonical snapshot from window.SKAI_SETTINGS
      var ec = (typeof window.buildEffectiveConfig === 'function') ? window.buildEffectiveConfig() : {};

      // draws_used: total number of draws analyzed (rawDraws.length), up to ~1500.
      // This is the primary "SKAI Window" value - how many draw records were fed into the analysis.
      var drawsUsed = 0;
      try {
        var rd = Array.isArray(window.__SKAI_RAW_DRAWS__) ? window.__SKAI_RAW_DRAWS__ : (Array.isArray(window.draws) ? window.draws : []);
        drawsUsed = rd.length | 0;
      } catch(_) {}

      // skai_window: total number of draws analyzed (up to ~1500), NOT the ML sliding window.
      // settings.windowSize is the ML training window size (a small number like 6-50).
      // The user-facing "SKAI Window" is how many draw records were fed into the analysis.
      var skaiWin = drawsUsed;

      // skip_window: same as skai_window (total draws analyzed)
      var skipWin = skaiWin;

      // auto_tune: whether the auto-tune run completed
      var autoTune = window.__SKAI_AUTOTUNE_DONE__ ? 1 : 0;

      // tune_used: tuned window if auto-tune ran
      var tuneUsed = (window.__SKAI_TUNED_WINDOW__ > 0) ? (window.__SKAI_TUNED_WINDOW__ | 0) : 0;

      // top_n_combos: from settings or default
      var topNCombos = (typeof S.topCombos === 'number') ? (S.topCombos | 0) : 50;

      // game_id from SKAI_SERVER
      var gameId = String(srv.gameId || srv.lotteryId || '');

      var snapshotRunUuid = (function(){
        try { return String((window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.meta && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.run_uuid) || window.__SKAI_LAST_RUN_UUID__ || ''); } catch(_) { return ''; }
      })();
      if (snapshotRunUuid) { window.__SKAI_LAST_RUN_UUID__ = snapshotRunUuid; }

      if (typeof ec.blendAiPct === 'number' && isFinite(ec.blendAiPct)) {
        window.__SKAI_LAST_RUN_BLEND_AI_PCT__ = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, ec.blendAiPct | 0));
        window.__SKAI_LAST_RUN_BLEND_SKIP_PCT__ = null;
        window.__SKAI_LAST_RUN_BLEND_RUN_UUID__ = snapshotRunUuid || '';
      }

      // [[SKAI_V64_REGEX_SAFE_CLOSED_LOOP_SETTINGS_SNAPSHOT_BRIDGE]]
      // Build a broad but safe runtime settings snapshot for MyLottoExpert v61.
      // This records what settings produced the saved prediction; it does not
      // change the model or scoring path.
      function skaiV60CleanScalar(v) {
        if (v === null || typeof v === 'undefined') { return null; }
        if (typeof v === 'boolean') { return v ? 1 : 0; }
        if (typeof v === 'number') { return isFinite(v) ? v : null; }
        if (typeof v === 'string') { return v.replace(/[\x00-\x1F\x7F]/g, '').substr(0, 220); }
        return null;
      }
      function skaiV60Pick(obj, key, fallback) {
        try { return (obj && typeof obj[key] !== 'undefined') ? obj[key] : fallback; } catch(_) { return fallback; }
      }
      function skaiV60FullSettingsSnapshot() {
        var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
        var rt = window.SKAI_RUNTIME || {};
        var rtMeta = rt.meta || {};
        var cfg = {};
        try {
          cfg = {
            topCombos: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.topCombos),
            windowSize: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.windowSize),
            temperature: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.temperature),
            diversityPenalty: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.diversityPenalty),
            gapScale: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.gapScale),
            laplaceK: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.laplaceK),
            epochs: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.epochs),
            batchSize: skaiV60CleanScalar(S.batchSize),
            blendAiPct: (typeof ec.blendAiPct === 'number') ? ec.blendAiPct : null,
            profile: (function(){ var btn = document.querySelector('#skai-profile-buttons .btn-chip[aria-pressed="true"]'); return btn ? (btn.getAttribute('data-profile') || 'balanced') : 'balanced'; })(),
            strategy: (function(){ var btn = document.querySelector('#skai-strategy-buttons .btn-chip[aria-pressed="true"]'); return btn ? (btn.getAttribute('data-strategy') || 'hybrid') : 'hybrid'; })()
          };
        } catch(_) {}
        return {
          schema: 'skai_v61_closed_loop_settings_snapshot_v1',
          source: 'skai_runtime_snapshot',
          game_id: gameId,
          run_uuid: snapshotRunUuid,
          predictionMode: skaiV60CleanScalar(meta.predictionMode || (meta.isDaily ? 'daily_digit' : 'standard_lottery')),
          pickMain: skaiV60CleanScalar(meta.pickMain || meta.pick || meta.pickSize || 0),
          extraCount: skaiV60CleanScalar(meta.extraCount || 0),
          skai_window: skaiWin,
          skip_window: skipWin,
          draws_used: drawsUsed,
          window_size: drawsUsed,
          ml_window_size: cfg.windowSize,
          top_n_combos: topNCombos,
          comboCountSaved: (function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; if (fps && fps.length) { return fps.length | 0; } var c = window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS; return (c && c.length) ? (c.length | 0) : 0; })(),
          auto_tune: autoTune,
          tune_used: tuneUsed,
          blend_ai_pct: cfg.blendAiPct,
          blend_skip_pct: null,
          sampling_temperature: cfg.temperature,
          diversity_penalty: cfg.diversityPenalty,
          gap_scale: cfg.gapScale,
          laplace_k: cfg.laplaceK,
          epochs: cfg.epochs,
          batch_size: cfg.batchSize,
          risk_profile: cfg.profile,
          strategy: cfg.strategy,
          model_family: skaiV60CleanScalar(rtMeta.model_family || rtMeta.engine_version || 'skai'),
          engine_version: skaiV60CleanScalar(rtMeta.engine_version || 'skai'),
          final_rank_source: skaiV60CleanScalar(rtMeta.final_rank_source || ''),
          score_path_hash: skaiV60CleanScalar(rtMeta.score_path_hash || ''),
          calibration_enabled: skaiV60CleanScalar(skaiV60Pick(rtMeta, 'calibration_enabled', skaiV60Pick(S, 'calibration_enabled', null))),
          tail_recovery_enabled: skaiV60CleanScalar(skaiV60Pick(rtMeta, 'tail_recovery_enabled', skaiV60Pick(S, 'tail_recovery_enabled', null))),
          pairwise_enabled: skaiV60CleanScalar(skaiV60Pick(rtMeta, 'pairwise_enabled', skaiV60Pick(S, 'pairwise_enabled', null))),
          gibbs_enabled: skaiV60CleanScalar(skaiV60Pick(rtMeta, 'gibbs_enabled', skaiV60Pick(S, 'gibbs_enabled', null))),
          mcmc_enabled: skaiV60CleanScalar(skaiV60Pick(rtMeta, 'mcmc_enabled', skaiV60Pick(S, 'mcmc_enabled', null))),
          mle_batch_status: (window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS || null),
          mle_batch_payload_summary: (function(){ var p = window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD || null; if (!p) { return null; } return { batch_id: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.batch_id), batch_type: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.batch_type), test_variable: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.test_variable), range_min: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.range_min), range_max: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.range_max), recommended_value: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.recommended_value), precision_lock_stage: skaiV60CleanScalar(p.precision_lock_stage) }; })(),
          closed_loop_context: {
            schema: 'skai_v61_closed_loop_context_v1',
            control_run: 0,
            changed_setting_key: (window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.test_variable) ? skaiV60CleanScalar(window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.test_variable) : '',
            changed_setting_value: (window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.recommended_value) ? skaiV60CleanScalar(window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.recommended_value) : '',
            validation_status: 'pending_official_draw',
            learning_use: 'eligible_after_scored_draw_only'
          },
          raw_settings_summary: cfg
        };
      }

      var snapshot = {
        gameId:               gameId,
        run_uuid:             snapshotRunUuid,
        skai_window:          skaiWin,
        skip_window:          skipWin,
        draws_used:           drawsUsed,
        auto_tune:            autoTune,
        tune_used:            tuneUsed,
        top_n_combos:         topNCombos,
        predictionMode:       (function(){ var m = window.SKAI_META || {}; return m.predictionMode || (m.isDaily ? 'daily_digit' : 'standard_lottery'); })(),
        pickMain:             (function(){ var m = window.SKAI_META || {}; return ((m.pickMain || m.pick || m.pickSize || 0)|0); })(),
        extraCount:           (function(){ var m = window.SKAI_META || {}; return ((m.extraCount || 0)|0); })(),
        comboCountSaved:      (function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; if (fps && fps.length) return fps.length|0; var c = window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS; return (c && c.length) ? (c.length|0) : 0; })(),
        top_combos:           (function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; if (fps && fps.length) { var out=[]; for (var i=0;i<fps.length&&i<5;i++){var m=Array.isArray(fps[i].main)?fps[i].main:(Array.isArray(fps[i].values)?fps[i].values:[]);out.push({rank:fps[i].rank,main:m.slice(),score:fps[i].score});} return out; } var c = window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS; return (c && c.length) ? c.slice(0, 5) : []; })(),
        final_prediction_sets:(function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; if (fps && fps.length) { var out=[]; for (var i=0;i<fps.length;i++){var m=Array.isArray(fps[i].main)?fps[i].main:(Array.isArray(fps[i].values)?fps[i].values:[]);var d=((window.SKAI_META&&window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)&&typeof window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay==='function')?window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(m,((window.SKAI_META&&+window.SKAI_META.pick)||m.length)):m.join(',');out.push({rank:fps[i].rank,values:m.slice(),score:fps[i].score,display:d});} return out; } return []; })(),
        // CHG: aiPredictedNumbers - canonical display-string key matching the save payload format.
        aiPredictedNumbers:   (function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; if (fps && fps.length) { var out=[]; for (var i=0;i<fps.length;i++){var m=Array.isArray(fps[i].main)?fps[i].main:(Array.isArray(fps[i].values)?fps[i].values:[]);var d=((window.SKAI_META&&window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)&&typeof window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay==='function')?window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(m,((window.SKAI_META&&+window.SKAI_META.pick)||m.length)):m.join(',');out.push({rank:fps[i].rank,values:d,score:fps[i].score,display:d});} return out; } return []; })(),
        aiPredictedNumbersCount: (function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; return (fps && fps.length) ? fps.length|0 : 0; })(),
        primaryPrediction:    (function(){ var fps = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS; if (fps && fps.length) { var m=Array.isArray(fps[0].main)?fps[0].main:(Array.isArray(fps[0].values)?fps[0].values:[]); var d=((window.SKAI_META&&window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)&&typeof window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay==='function')?window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(m,((window.SKAI_META&&+window.SKAI_META.pick)||m.length)):m.join(','); return {rank:fps[0].rank,values:d,score:fps[0].score,display:d}; } return null; })(),
        closed_loop_schema:  'skai_v61_closed_loop_context_v1',
        closed_loop_status:  'pending_official_draw',
        changed_setting_key: (window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.test_variable) ? skaiV60CleanScalar(window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.test_variable) : '',
        changed_setting_value: (window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.recommended_value) ? skaiV60CleanScalar(window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.recommended_value) : '',
        learning_use:        'eligible_after_scored_draw_only',
        settings_full:        skaiV60FullSettingsSnapshot(),
        settings_snapshot:    skaiV60FullSettingsSnapshot(),
        settings_snapshot_schema: 'skai_v61_closed_loop_settings_snapshot_v1',
        // Additional inference params from SKAI_SETTINGS (for full parity)
        window_size:          drawsUsed, // total draws analyzed, same as skai_window
        ml_window_size:       (typeof S.windowSize === 'number') ? S.windowSize : null, // ML sliding window (small)
        sampling_temperature: (typeof S.temperature      === 'number') ? S.temperature      : null,
        diversity_penalty:    (typeof S.diversityPenalty === 'number') ? S.diversityPenalty : null,
        gap_scale:            (typeof S.gapScale         === 'number') ? S.gapScale         : null,
        laplace_k:            (typeof S.laplaceK         === 'number') ? S.laplaceK         : null,
        blend_ai_pct:         (typeof ec.blendAiPct      === 'number') ? ec.blendAiPct      : null,
        blend_skip_pct:       null,
        epochs:               (typeof S.epochs           === 'number') ? S.epochs           : null,
        batch_size:           (typeof S.batchSize        === 'number') ? S.batchSize        : null,
        risk_profile:         (function(){
                                 var btn = document.querySelector('#skai-profile-buttons .btn-chip[aria-pressed="true"]');
                                 return btn ? (btn.getAttribute('data-profile') || 'balanced') : 'balanced';
                               })(),
        strategy:             (function(){
                                 var btn = document.querySelector('#skai-strategy-buttons .btn-chip[aria-pressed="true"]');
                                 return btn ? (btn.getAttribute('data-strategy') || 'hybrid') : 'hybrid';
                               })()
      };

      // Build form-encoded body (URLSearchParams is ES6 but widely supported;
      // fall back to manual encoding for legacy browsers)
      var body;
      try {
        var params = new URLSearchParams();
        params.append('skai_action', 'store_run_snapshot');
        params.append(csrfName, '1');
        params.append('snapshot_json', JSON.stringify(snapshot));
        body = params.toString();
      } catch(_) {
        body = 'skai_action=store_run_snapshot&' + encodeURIComponent(csrfName) + '=1&snapshot_json=' + encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(snapshot));
      }

      // Fire-and-forget POST to the same page URL
      var pageUrl = (window.location && window.location.href) ? window.location.href.split('#')[0].split('?')[0] : '';
      if (!pageUrl) { return; }
      // Append game_id so the PHP handler can resolve it from GET
      pageUrl = pageUrl + (pageUrl.indexOf('?') >= 0 ? '&' : '?') + 'game_id=' + encodeURIComponent(gameId);

      // ES5-safe fire-and-forget POST via XMLHttpRequest (no fetch dependency)
      (function(){
        var xhrSnap = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhrSnap.open('POST', pageUrl, true);
        xhrSnap.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
        xhrSnap.onreadystatechange = function() {
          if (xhrSnap.readyState !== 4) { return; }
          try {
            if (xhrSnap.status === 200) {
              var d = JSON.parse(xhrSnap.responseText || '{}');
              window.__SKAI_SNAPSHOT_STORED__ = !!(d && d.ok);
              if (window.SKAI_DEBUG_LOG) {
                try { console.log('[SKAI snapshotStored]', d); } catch(_){}
              }
            } else {
              window.__SKAI_SNAPSHOT_STORED__ = false;
              if (window.SKAI_DEBUG_LOG) {
                try { console.warn('[SKAI snapshotSendFailed] HTTP ' + xhrSnap.status); } catch(_){}
              }
            }
          } catch(_snapE) {
            window.__SKAI_SNAPSHOT_STORED__ = false;
          }
        };
        xhrSnap.onerror = function() { window.__SKAI_SNAPSHOT_STORED__ = false; };
        xhrSnap.send(body);
      }());
    } catch(_) {}
  }

  // Listen for skai:done (fired when both main + extra predictions complete)
  window.addEventListener('skai:done', function() {
    try { sendRunSnapshot(); } catch(_) {}
  }, false);

})();
</script>

<script>
// FIX: Populate canonical save-form fields at skai:done so single-run saves
// always carry the correct risk_profile, strategy, skai_blend_ai_pct,
// skai_run_mode, and snapshot_run_uuid even when skaiPrepareAiSave cannot run
// (interceptSaveForm calls ev.stopPropagation() in its capture-phase handler,
// which prevents the document bubble-phase handler that calls skaiPrepareAiSave
// from ever executing).
//
// For BATCH saves: saveAllSequential already writes all these fields explicitly
// immediately before form.dispatchEvent(ev), so its later writes override these
// skai:done-time values with no conflict.
//
// For SINGLE-RUN saves: these values are written here and remain in the form
// until the user clicks Save, at which point interceptSaveForm serializes them.
;(function(){
  'use strict';
  if (window.__SKAI_SAVE_FORM_WIRE_DONE__) { return; }
  window.__SKAI_SAVE_FORM_WIRE_DONE__ = true;

  // FIX: Local reference to normalizeNumericArray (defined in Block B IIFE and
  // exposed on window). This IIFE is in a separate script block and cannot access
  // the Block B local by name; use window reference with inline fallback.
  var normalizeNumericArray = (typeof window.normalizeNumericArray === 'function')
    ? window.normalizeNumericArray
    : function(arr) {
        if (!arr || !arr.length) { return []; }
        var out = [];
        for (var _ni = 0; _ni < arr.length; _ni++) {
          var _nv = parseInt(arr[_ni], 10);
          if (!isNaN(_nv)) { out.push(_nv); }
        }
        return out;
      };

  var _sdProfLabels  = { balanced: 'Balanced', explorative: 'Wider Search', conservative: 'Safer Range' };
  var _sdStratLabels = { ai: 'AI-focused', hybrid: 'Balanced', skip: 'Pattern-focused' };

  function _sdWrite(id, val) {
    try { var el = document.getElementById(id); if (el) { el.value = val; } } catch(_) {}
  }

  window.addEventListener('skai:done', function() {
    try {
      var _sdS = window.SKAI_SETTINGS || {};

      // Canonical blend: tunedSettings.blend is set to 0..1 by runSkaiML just before skai:done
      var _sdBlend = (typeof _sdS.blend === 'number' && isFinite(_sdS.blend)) ? _sdS.blend : null;
      if (_sdBlend === null) {
        var _sl = document.getElementById('skai-blend-range');
        _sdBlend = _sl ? Number(_sl.value) : 55;
        // Slider is in 0-100; no conversion needed
      } else {
        if (_sdBlend <= 1) { _sdBlend = _sdBlend * 100; }
      }
      _sdBlend = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(_sdBlend)));

      // Canonical profile and strategy from active chip buttons
      var _sdProfBtn  = document.querySelector('#skai-profile-buttons .btn-chip[aria-pressed="true"]');
      var _sdStratBtn = document.querySelector('#skai-strategy-buttons .btn-chip[aria-pressed="true"]');
      var _sdProfileVal = _sdProfBtn  ? (String(_sdProfBtn.getAttribute('data-profile')  || 'balanced')) : 'balanced';
      var _sdStratVal   = _sdStratBtn ? (String(_sdStratBtn.getAttribute('data-strategy') || 'hybrid'))  : 'hybrid';
      var _sdProfLabel  = _sdProfLabels[_sdProfileVal]  || 'Balanced';
      var _sdStratLabel = _sdStratLabels[_sdStratVal]   || 'Balanced';
      var _sdBlendMode  = (_sdBlend >= 70) ? 'AI-focused' : (_sdBlend <= 30 ? 'Pattern-focused' : 'Balanced');

      // Run UUID for snapshot matching
      var _sdUuid = '';
      try { _sdUuid = String((window.SKAI_RUNTIME && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.meta && window.SKAI_RUNTIME.meta.run_uuid) || window.__SKAI_LAST_RUN_UUID__ || ''); } catch(_) {}

      // Selected vs effective blend (Locked / Optimized Blend data model)
      var _sdSelectedPct  = (typeof window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__  === 'number' && isFinite(window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__))
                            ? window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__ : _sdBlend;
      var _sdEffectivePct = (typeof window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__ === 'number' && isFinite(window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__))
                            ? window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__ : _sdBlend;
      var _sdBlendOpt     = window.__SKAI_BLEND_OPTIMIZED__ ? '1' : '0';
      var _sdAllowOpt     = window.__SKAI_ALLOW_BLEND_OPT__ ? '1' : '0';

      // In Locked mode, skai_blend_ai_pct must always equal the selected (slider) value.
      // In Optimized mode, skai_blend_ai_pct holds the effective (tuned) value so DB is truthful.
      var _sdCanonicalBlend = _sdAllowOpt === '1' ? _sdEffectivePct : _sdSelectedPct;

      // Write canonical fields into the AI save form
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-risk-profile',    _sdProfileVal);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-strategy',        _sdStratVal);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-blend-ai-pct',    String(_sdCanonicalBlend));
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-blend-skip-pct',  '');
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-selected-blend-ai-pct',  String(_sdSelectedPct));
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-effective-blend-ai-pct', String(_sdEffectivePct));
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-blend-optimized', _sdBlendOpt);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-allow-blend-opt', _sdAllowOpt);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-mode-primary',    _sdProfileVal);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-mode-method',     _sdStratVal);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-mode-risk',       _sdProfileVal);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-run-mode',        _sdProfLabel + ' - ' + _sdStratLabel);
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-snapshot-run-uuid', _sdUuid);

      // Build settings_summary -- annotate if blend was engine-optimized
      var _sdParts = [
        'Mode: '     + _sdProfLabel,
        'Strategy: ' + _sdStratLabel
      ];
      if (_sdBlendOpt === '1' && _sdEffectivePct !== _sdSelectedPct) {
        _sdParts.push('Blend: ' + _sdSelectedPct + '% \u2192 Optimized ' + _sdEffectivePct + '%* (' + _sdBlendMode + ')');
      } else {
        _sdParts.push('Blend: ' + _sdSelectedPct + '% AI (' + _sdBlendMode + ')');
      }
      if (typeof _sdS.temperature === 'number' && isFinite(_sdS.temperature)) {
        _sdParts.push('Temp: ' + _sdS.temperature.toFixed(2));
      }
      _sdWrite('skai-ai-settings-summary', _sdParts.join(' \u2022 '));

      // FIX: Populate core prediction payload fields immediately at skai:done.
      // This ensures numbers_json / main_numbers / top_combos_json have valid data
      // before the user clicks Save, so interceptSaveForm can serialize them correctly
      // even if skaiPrepareAiSave is blocked by an early guard during submit.
      try {
        var _sdIsDaily = !!(window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.isDaily || window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)
          && !window.SKAI_META.isStandardLotteryGame);
        var _sdExtraLimit = _sdIsDaily ? 3 : ((window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length > 0) ? Math.min(5, window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length) : 5);
        var _sdMainArr = [];
        if (_sdIsDaily && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length) {
          for (var _sdci = 0; _sdci < window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length && _sdMainArr.length < 5; _sdci++) {
            var _sdRow = window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS[_sdci] || {};
            var _sdDisp = String(_sdRow.display || '');
            if (!_sdDisp && Array.isArray(_sdRow.combo) && typeof window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay === 'function') {
              _sdDisp = window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(_sdRow.combo, ((window.SKAI_META && +window.SKAI_META.pick) || _sdRow.combo.length));
            }
            if (_sdDisp) { _sdMainArr.push(_sdDisp); }
          }
        }
        if (!_sdMainArr.length && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length) {
          _sdMainArr = window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.slice();
        }
        var _sdExtraArr = [];
        if (!_sdIsDaily && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__.length) {
          _sdExtraArr = normalizeNumericArray(window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__).slice(0, _sdExtraLimit);
        } else if (!_sdIsDaily && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA.length) {
          _sdExtraArr = normalizeNumericArray(window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA).slice(0, _sdExtraLimit);
        } else if (window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length) {
          _sdExtraArr = normalizeNumericArray(window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered).slice(0, _sdExtraLimit);
        }
        var _sdFpsJson = window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ || '';
        if (_sdMainArr.length) {
          try { _sdWrite('skai-ai-numbers-json', JSON.stringify({main_numbers: _sdMainArr, extra_numbers: _sdExtraArr})); } catch(_) {}
          try { _sdWrite('skai-ai-main-json',    JSON.stringify(_sdMainArr)); } catch(_) {}
          try { _sdWrite('skai-ai-extra-json',   JSON.stringify(_sdExtraArr)); } catch(_) {}
        }
        if (_sdFpsJson) {
          try { _sdWrite('skai-ai-top-combos-json', _sdFpsJson); } catch(_) {}
        }
      } catch(_sdPredErr) {}
    } catch (_sdErr) {}
  }, false);
})();
</script>

<!-- SKAI Feature B: Save interception - prevents redirect, shows toast + inline status -->
<script>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function showSaveToast(msg) {
    try {
      var old = document.getElementById("skai-save-toast");
      if (old && old.parentNode) { old.parentNode.removeChild(old); }
      var t = document.createElement("div");
      t.id = "skai-save-toast";
      t.setAttribute("role", "status");
      t.setAttribute("aria-live", "polite");
      t.style.cssText = "position:fixed;bottom:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#065f46;color:#fff;padding:10px 22px;border-radius:999px;font-size:0.92rem;font-weight:600;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);z-index:99999;pointer-events:none;opacity:1;transition:opacity 0.4s;";
      t.textContent = msg;
      document.body.appendChild(t);
      setTimeout(function () {
        try { t.style.opacity = "0"; } catch (_) {}
        setTimeout(function () { try { if (t.parentNode) { t.parentNode.removeChild(t); } } catch (_) {} }, 450);
      }, 3200);
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function showInlineSaveStatus(form) {
    try {
      var existing = form.querySelector("[data-skai-inline-saved]");
      if (existing && existing.parentNode) { existing.parentNode.removeChild(existing); }
      var now = new Date();
      var hh = ("0" + now.getHours()).slice(-2);
      var mm = ("0" + now.getMinutes()).slice(-2);
      var ss = ("0" + now.getSeconds()).slice(-2);
      var span = document.createElement("span");
      span.setAttribute("data-skai-inline-saved", "1");
      span.style.cssText = "display:inline-block;margin-left:10px;color:#065f46;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;vertical-align:middle;";
      span.textContent = "Saved at " + hh + ":" + mm + ":" + ss;
      var actions = form.querySelector(".skai-save-actions");
      if (actions) {
        actions.appendChild(span);
      } else {
        form.appendChild(span);
      }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function emitSkaiSaveStatus(detail) {
    try {
      if (!detail || typeof detail !== "object") { detail = {}; }
      if (typeof detail.ok === "undefined") { detail.ok = false; }
      detail.ts = Date.now();
      try {
        if (detail.ok) {
          console.log("[SKAI SAVE STATUS]", detail);
        } else {
          console.error("[SKAI SAVE STATUS]", detail);
        }
      } catch (_) {}
      if (typeof window.CustomEvent === "function") {
        window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent("skai:save:complete", { detail: detail }));
      }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  // [FIX-INTERCEPT-POPULATE] Helper called by interceptSaveForm BEFORE form serialization.
  // Populates numbers_json, main_numbers, main_numbers_csv, daily_top_combos_json, pick_length,
  // and allow_zero from the live SKAI globals that are guaranteed to exist after a run.
  // This is necessary because the document-level bubble-phase submit handler (Block B /
  // skaiPrepareAiSave) never fires when interceptSaveForm calls stopPropagation() during
  // the form's capture/target phase.
  window._skaiPopulateFormFields = function(form) {
    if (!form) { return; }
    var _meta    = window.SKAI_META || {};
    var _isDaily = !!(_meta.isDailyDigitGame || _meta.isDaily || _meta.isDailySingleValueGame) && !(_meta.isStandardLotteryGame && !_meta.isDailySingleValueGame);
    var _pick    = parseInt(_meta.pick || _meta.pickSize || _meta.pickMain || 0, 10) || 0;

    // Only write to a field when it is currently empty / unpopulated to avoid stomping over
    // values that a prior code path already set correctly.
    var _set = function(name, val) {
      if (val === null || val === undefined || val === '') { return; }
      var fld = form.querySelector('input[name="' + name + '"]');
      if (fld && (fld.value === '' || fld.value === '[]' || fld.value === 'null')) {
        try { fld.value = String(val); } catch(_) {}
      }
    };

    if (_isDaily && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length) {
      var _combos   = window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS;
      var _first    = _combos[0] || {};
      var _firstArr = Array.isArray(_first.combo) ? _first.combo
                    : (Array.isArray(_first.main) ? _first.main : []);
      var _displays = [];
      var _dtcArr   = [];
      var _extraArr = (window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS || []).slice(0, 3);
      for (var _ci = 0; _ci < _combos.length && _ci < 5; _ci++) {
        var _cc = Array.isArray(_combos[_ci].combo) ? _combos[_ci].combo
                : (Array.isArray(_combos[_ci].main) ? _combos[_ci].main : []);
        var _cd = (typeof window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay === 'function')
          ? window.SKAI_formatDailyComboDisplay(_cc, _pick || _cc.length)
          : _cc.join('');
        if (_cd) {
          _displays.push(_cd);
          _dtcArr.push({ rank: _ci + 1, combo: _cc.slice(), display: _cd, score: (_combos[_ci].score || 0), approxPct: (_combos[_ci].approxPct || 0) });
        }
      }
      if (_displays.length) {
        var _numJson = {
          main_numbers:               _displays.slice(),
          extra_numbers:              _extraArr.slice(),
          daily_top_combo_strings:    _displays.slice(),
          daily_primary_combo_digits: _firstArr.slice(),
          daily_primary_combo_display: _displays[0]
        };
        _set('numbers_json',          JSON.stringify(_numJson));
        _set('main_numbers',          JSON.stringify(_displays));
        _set('main_numbers_csv',      _displays.join(','));
        try { _set('daily_top_combos_json', JSON.stringify(_dtcArr)); } catch(_) {}
        if (_pick > 0) { _set('pick_length', String(_pick)); }
        _set('allow_zero', '1');
      }
    } else if (!_isDaily) {
      // [[SKAI_PLAYABLE_SAVE_COUNT_RESTORE_V1_2026_05_26]]
      // Standard lottery: save playable pick count, while preserving the Top 20/5 display pool.
      var _stdMainPool  = (window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length)
                    ? window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.slice(0, 20)
                    : [];
      var _stdExtraPool = (window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length)
                    ? window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.slice(0, 5)
                    : [];
      if (!_stdMainPool.length && window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS && window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.length) {
        var _fps0 = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS[0] || {};
        _stdMainPool = Array.isArray(_fps0.main) ? _fps0.main.slice()
                 : (Array.isArray(_fps0.values) ? _fps0.values.slice() : []);
      }
      var _mainPickCount = _pick > 0 ? Math.min(_pick, 20) : 5;
      var _extraPickCount = (_meta && _meta.hasExtraBall) ? (parseInt(_meta.extraCount || _meta.extra_ball_count || _meta.num_extra_balls_drawn || 1, 10) || 1) : 0;
      if (_extraPickCount > 5) { _extraPickCount = 5; }
      var _stdMain = _stdMainPool.slice(0, _mainPickCount);
      var _stdExtra = _extraPickCount > 0 ? _stdExtraPool.slice(0, _extraPickCount) : [];
      if (_stdMain.length) {
        var _stdJson = {
          main_numbers: _stdMain,
          extra_numbers: _stdExtra,
          regular_main_numbers: _stdMainPool.slice(0, 20),
          regular_extra_numbers: _stdExtraPool.slice(0, 5),
          main_display_numbers: _stdMainPool.slice(0, 20),
          extra_display_numbers: _stdExtraPool.slice(0, 5),
          playable_main_count: _stdMain.length,
          playable_extra_count: _stdExtra.length,
          display_main_count: _stdMainPool.slice(0, 20).length,
          display_extra_count: _stdExtraPool.slice(0, 5).length
        };
        _set('numbers_json',     JSON.stringify(_stdJson));
        _set('main_numbers',     JSON.stringify(_stdMain));
        _set('main_numbers_csv', _stdMain.join(','));
        if (_stdExtra.length) {
          _set('extra_ball_numbers',     JSON.stringify(_stdExtra));
          _set('extra_ball_numbers_csv', _stdExtra.join(','));
        }
      }
    }
  };

  function _skaiNormalizeInts(arr) {
    var out = [];
    var i;
    for (i = 0; i < (arr || []).length; i++) {
      var n = parseInt(arr[i], 10);
      if (isFinite(n)) { out.push(n); }
    }
    return out;
  }

  function _skaiIsStandardExtraLottery() {
    var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
    return !!(meta && meta.isStandardLotteryGame && meta.hasExtraBall && !meta.isDaily && !meta.isDailyDigitGame);
  }

  function _skaiCollectLiveExtraNumbers(limit) {
    var i;
    var candidates = [];
    var addCandidate = function (arrLike) {
      var norm = _skaiNormalizeInts(arrLike || []);
      var uniq = [];
      var j;
      for (j = 0; j < norm.length; j++) {
        if (uniq.indexOf(norm[j]) === -1) { uniq.push(norm[j]); }
      }
      if (uniq.length) { candidates.push(uniq.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit))); }
    };

    addCandidate(window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__);
    addCandidate(window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA);
    addCandidate(window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered);

    if (Array.isArray(window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA) && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length) {
      var topExtras = [];
      for (i = 0; i < window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length && topExtras.length < limit; i++) {
        var row = window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[i] || {};
        var rn = parseInt(row.num, 10);
        if (isFinite(rn) && topExtras.indexOf(rn) === -1) { topExtras.push(rn); }
      }
      addCandidate(topExtras);
    }

    var host = document.getElementById('aiExtraPredictionContainer');
    var balls = host ? host.querySelectorAll('.xball') : [];
    if (balls && balls.length) {
      var domExtras = [];
      for (i = 0; i < balls.length && domExtras.length < limit; i++) {
        var bn = parseInt(String(balls[i].textContent || '').replace(/[^0-9\-]/g, ''), 10);
        if (isFinite(bn) && domExtras.indexOf(bn) === -1) { domExtras.push(bn); }
      }
      addCandidate(domExtras);
    }

    for (i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
      if (candidates[i].length >= limit) {
        return candidates[i].slice(0, limit);
      }
    }

    var longest = [];
    for (i = 0; i < candidates.length; i++) {
      if (candidates[i].length > longest.length) {
        longest = candidates[i];
      }
    }
    return longest.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit));
  }

  function _skaiPayloadHasExtras(jsonStr, minCount) {
    var need = parseInt(minCount, 10) || 1;
    if (!jsonStr) { return false; }
    try {
      var obj = JSON.parse(jsonStr);
      if (!obj || typeof obj !== 'object') { return false; }
      if (Array.isArray(obj.extra_numbers) && obj.extra_numbers.length >= need) { return true; }
      var i;
      var fps = Array.isArray(obj.final_prediction_sets) ? obj.final_prediction_sets : [];
      for (i = 0; i < fps.length; i++) {
        if (fps[i] && Array.isArray(fps[i].extra) && fps[i].extra.length >= need) { return true; }
      }
      var top5 = Array.isArray(obj.top_5_prediction_sets) ? obj.top_5_prediction_sets : [];
      for (i = 0; i < top5.length; i++) {
        if (top5[i] && Array.isArray(top5[i].extra) && top5[i].extra.length >= need) { return true; }
      }
      if (obj.primary_prediction_set && Array.isArray(obj.primary_prediction_set.extra) && obj.primary_prediction_set.extra.length >= need) {
        return true;
      }
    } catch (_) {}
    return false;
  }

  function _skaiSyncStandardExtraFields(form, extraArr) {
    if (!form || !_skaiIsStandardExtraLottery()) { return false; }
    var extras = _skaiNormalizeInts(extraArr || []);
    if (extras.length < 5) { return false; }
    extras = extras.slice(0, 5);

    try {
      var extraJsonFld = form.querySelector('input[name="extra_ball_numbers"]');
      var extraCsvFld = form.querySelector('input[name="extra_ball_numbers_csv"]') || form.querySelector('input[name="extra_numbers_csv"]');
      if (extraJsonFld) { extraJsonFld.value = JSON.stringify(extras.slice()); }
      if (extraCsvFld) { extraCsvFld.value = extras.join(','); }

      var numbersFld = form.querySelector('input[name="numbers_json"]');
