      if (numbersFld) {
        var nj = {};
        try { nj = numbersFld.value ? JSON.parse(numbersFld.value) : {}; } catch (_) { nj = {}; }
        if (!nj || typeof nj !== 'object') { nj = {}; }
        nj.extra_numbers = extras.slice();
        numbersFld.value = JSON.stringify(nj);
      }

      if (Array.isArray(window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS)) {
        var sf;
        for (sf = 0; sf < window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.length; sf++) {
          if (window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS[sf]) {
            window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS[sf].extra = extras.slice();
          }
        }
      }

      var topFld = form.querySelector('input[name="top_combos_json"]');
      var topRaw = (topFld && topFld.value) ? topFld.value : (window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ || '');
      if (topRaw) {
        try {
          var topObj = JSON.parse(topRaw);
          if (topObj && typeof topObj === 'object') {
            var i;
            var fps = Array.isArray(topObj.final_prediction_sets) ? topObj.final_prediction_sets : [];
            for (i = 0; i < fps.length; i++) {
              if (fps[i]) { fps[i].extra = extras.slice(); }
            }
            var top5 = Array.isArray(topObj.top_5_prediction_sets) ? topObj.top_5_prediction_sets : [];
            for (i = 0; i < top5.length; i++) {
              if (top5[i]) { top5[i].extra = extras.slice(); }
            }
            if (topObj.primary_prediction_set) {
              topObj.primary_prediction_set.extra = extras.slice();
            }
            topObj.extra_numbers = extras.slice();
            topRaw = JSON.stringify(topObj);
            window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ = topRaw;
            var allTop = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="top_combos_json"]');
            for (i = 0; i < allTop.length; i++) {
              allTop[i].value = topRaw;
            }
          }
        } catch (_) {}
      }
    } catch (_) {}

    return true;
  }

  function _skaiStandardExtraReadyState(form) {
    var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
    var gate = _skaiIsStandardExtraLottery();
    if (!gate) {
      return { gate: false, ready: true, extras: [] };
    }

    var extraLimit = parseInt(meta.extraCount || meta.extra_ball_count || meta.num_extra_balls_drawn || 5, 10) || 5;
    if (extraLimit <= 0) { extraLimit = 5; }

    var host = document.getElementById('aiExtraPredictionContainer');
    var markerReady = true;
    if (host) {
      var markerAttrs = ['data-ai-ready', 'data-skai-extra-ready', 'data-ready'];
      var mi;
      for (mi = 0; mi < markerAttrs.length; mi++) {
        if (host.hasAttribute(markerAttrs[mi])) {
          var mv = String(host.getAttribute(markerAttrs[mi]) || '').toLowerCase();
          markerReady = (mv === '1' || mv === 'true' || mv === 'yes' || mv === 'done' || mv === 'ready');
          break;
        }
      }
    }

    var finalSourceReady = false;
    if ((window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__.length) ||
        (window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA.length) ||
        (window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length) ||
        (window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length)) {
      finalSourceReady = true;
    }

    var extras = _skaiCollectLiveExtraNumbers(extraLimit);
    if (extras.length >= extraLimit) {
      _skaiSyncStandardExtraFields(form, extras);
    }

    var topFld = form ? form.querySelector('input[name="top_combos_json"]') : null;
    var payloadReady = _skaiPayloadHasExtras((topFld && topFld.value) ? topFld.value : (window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ || ''), extraLimit);

    return {
      gate: true,
      ready: !!(markerReady && finalSourceReady && extras.length >= extraLimit && payloadReady),
      extras: extras
    };
  }

  function interceptSaveForm(form) {
    if (!form || form.__skaiSaveIntercepted) { return; }
    form.__skaiSaveIntercepted = true;

    form.addEventListener("submit", function (ev) {
      try { ev.preventDefault(); } catch (_) {}
      try { ev.stopPropagation(); } catch (_) {}

      var submitBtn = form.querySelector("[type=submit]");
      if (submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = true; }

      var hint = form.querySelector("[id$=save-hint], [id$=-save-hint]");
      if (hint) { hint.textContent = "Saving..."; }

      var gateMaxAttempts = 18;
      var gateDelayMs = 150;
      var gateAttempt = 0;

      var sendSaveRequest = function() {
        // [FIX-INTERCEPT-POPULATE] Proactively populate prediction fields from SKAI globals.
        // The document-level bubble-phase submit handler (Block B / skaiPrepareAiSave) NEVER
        // fires because stopPropagation() above prevents the event from reaching the document
        // in the bubble phase.  Without this call, numbers_json / main_numbers /
        // daily_top_combos_json are always empty in the POST body and PHP returns
        // {"ok":false,"reason":"empty_main_numbers"} for every save.
        if (typeof window._skaiPopulateFormFields === 'function') {
          try { window._skaiPopulateFormFields(form); } catch (_ppErr) {}
        }

        var liveExtras = _skaiCollectLiveExtraNumbers(5);
        if (liveExtras.length) {
          _skaiSyncStandardExtraFields(form, liveExtras);
        }

        var data = [];
        var inputs = form.elements;
        for (var i = 0; i < inputs.length; i++) {
          var el = inputs[i];
          if (!el.name) { continue; }
          var tag = el.tagName.toUpperCase();
          if (tag === "INPUT") {
            if (el.type === "checkbox" || el.type === "radio") {
              if (!el.checked) { continue; }
            }
            data.push(encodeURIComponent(el.name) + "=" + encodeURIComponent(el.value || ""));
          } else if (tag === "TEXTAREA" || tag === "SELECT") {
            data.push(encodeURIComponent(el.name) + "=" + encodeURIComponent(el.value || ""));
          }
        }
        var body = data.join("&");
        var url = form.getAttribute("action") || (window.location.href.split("#")[0]);

        var xhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
        xhr.open("POST", url, true);
        xhr.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded");
        xhr.setRequestHeader("X-Requested-With", "XMLHttpRequest");
        xhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
          if (xhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
          if (submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = false; }

          var batchModeField = form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_mode"]');
          var batchIndexField = form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_index"]');
          var batchTotalField = form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_total"]');
          var batchLabelField = form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_label"]');
          var detail = {
            ok: false,
            http_status: xhr.status,
            batch_save_mode: !!(batchModeField && String(batchModeField.value) === '1'),
            batch_index: batchIndexField ? parseInt(batchIndexField.value || '0', 10) : 0,
            batch_total: batchTotalField ? parseInt(batchTotalField.value || '0', 10) : 0,
            batch_label: batchLabelField ? String(batchLabelField.value || '') : ''
          };

          try {
            console.log('[SKAI SAVE] BACKEND RESPONSE RECEIVED: http_status=' + xhr.status
              + ' batch_mode=' + detail.batch_save_mode
              + ' batch_index=' + detail.batch_index
              + ' resp_len=' + String(xhr.responseText || '').length);
          } catch(_) {}

          var ok = (xhr.status >= 200 && xhr.status < 400);
          var resp = ok ? String(xhr.responseText || '') : '';
          var parsed = null;
          if (resp) {
            try { parsed = JSON.parse(resp); } catch (_) { parsed = null; }
          }
          if (parsed && typeof parsed === 'object') {
            if (typeof parsed.ok !== 'undefined') { detail.ok = !!parsed.ok; }
            if (typeof parsed.reason !== 'undefined') { detail.reason = String(parsed.reason || ''); }
            if (typeof parsed.message !== 'undefined') { detail.message = String(parsed.message || ''); }
            if (typeof parsed.error !== 'undefined') { detail.error = String(parsed.error || ''); }
            if (typeof parsed.batch_index !== 'undefined') { detail.batch_index = parseInt(parsed.batch_index || '0', 10) || detail.batch_index; }
            if (typeof parsed.batch_total !== 'undefined') { detail.batch_total = parseInt(parsed.batch_total || '0', 10) || detail.batch_total; }
            if (typeof parsed.batch_label !== 'undefined') { detail.batch_label = String(parsed.batch_label || detail.batch_label || ''); }
            if (typeof parsed.row_id !== 'undefined') { detail.row_id = parseInt(parsed.row_id || '0', 10) || 0; }
          }

          var looksError = (
            !ok ||
            resp.indexOf("couldn") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("couldn't") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("alert-error") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("alert-warning") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("Please run SKAI") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("No main numbers") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("Save failed") >= 0
          );
          var looksOk = ok && !looksError && (
            resp.indexOf("saved") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("Saved") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("dashboard") >= 0 ||
            resp.indexOf("success") >= 0
          );
          if (!parsed || typeof parsed.ok === 'undefined') {
            detail.ok = looksOk;
            if (!detail.ok && looksError && !detail.reason) { detail.reason = 'response_error'; }
          }

          if (detail.ok) {
            showSaveToast("Saved OK");
            showInlineSaveStatus(form);
            if (hint) { hint.textContent = "Saved successfully."; }
          } else {
            var failText = String(detail.message || detail.reason || detail.error || 'Save failed');
            showSaveToast('Save failed: ' + failText);
            if (hint) { hint.textContent = 'Save failed: ' + failText; }
          }
          emitSkaiSaveStatus(detail);
        };
        try { xhr.send(body); } catch (e) {
          if (submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = false; }
          showSaveToast('Save failed: request_exception');
          if (hint) { hint.textContent = 'Save failed: request_exception'; }
          emitSkaiSaveStatus({
            ok: false,
            reason: 'request_exception',
            message: (e && e.message) ? String(e.message) : 'request_exception',
            batch_save_mode: !!(form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_mode"]') && String(form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_mode"]').value) === '1'),
            batch_index: form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_index"]') ? parseInt(form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_index"]').value || '0', 10) : 0,
            batch_total: form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_total"]') ? parseInt(form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_total"]').value || '0', 10) : 0,
            batch_label: form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_label"]') ? String(form.querySelector('input[name="batch_save_label"]').value || '') : ''
          });
        }
      };

      var waitAndSend = function() {
        var gateState = _skaiStandardExtraReadyState(form);
        if (!gateState.gate || gateState.ready) {
          sendSaveRequest();
          return;
        }
        gateAttempt++;
        if (gateAttempt <= gateMaxAttempts) {
          setTimeout(waitAndSend, gateDelayMs);
          return;
        }
        if (submitBtn) { submitBtn.disabled = false; }
        showSaveToast('Save failed: extras_not_ready');
        if (hint) { hint.textContent = 'Save failed: extras_not_ready'; }
        emitSkaiSaveStatus({ ok: false, reason: 'extras_not_ready' });
      };

      waitAndSend();
    }, true);
  }

  function wireSaveForms() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i++) {
      if (forms[i].querySelector("input[name='save_set']")) {
        interceptSaveForm(forms[i]);
      }
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", wireSaveForms, {once: true});
  } else {
    wireSaveForms();
  }

  window.skaiInterceptSaveForm = interceptSaveForm;
  window.skaiShowSaveToast = showSaveToast;
})();
</script>


<!-- SKAI Feature A: Generate 9-Run Batch (isolated run system) -->
<script>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  // Singleton guard: prevent double-initialization on multi-module pages.
  if (window.__SKAI_BATCH_RUNNER_INIT__) { return; }
  window.__SKAI_BATCH_RUNNER_INIT__ = true;

  // Local fallback for normalizeNumericArray.
  var normalizeNumericArray = (typeof window.normalizeNumericArray === 'function')
    ? window.normalizeNumericArray
    : function normalizeNumericArray(arr) {
        if (!arr || !arr.length) { return []; }
        var out = [];
        for (var _ni = 0; _ni < arr.length; _ni++) {
          var _nv = parseInt(arr[_ni], 10);
          if (!isNaN(_nv)) { out.push(_nv); }
        }
        return out;
      };


  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Constants
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  var BATCH_COMBOS = [
    { profile: "balanced",     strategy: "ai",    label: "Balanced x AI-focused" },
    { profile: "balanced",     strategy: "hybrid", label: "Balanced x Balanced" },
    { profile: "balanced",     strategy: "skip",   label: "Balanced x Pattern-focused" },
    { profile: "explorative",  strategy: "ai",    label: "Wider Search x AI-focused" },
    { profile: "explorative",  strategy: "hybrid", label: "Wider Search x Balanced" },
    { profile: "explorative",  strategy: "skip",   label: "Wider Search x Pattern-focused" },
    { profile: "conservative", strategy: "ai",    label: "Safer Range x AI-focused" },
    { profile: "conservative", strategy: "hybrid", label: "Safer Range x Balanced" },
    { profile: "conservative", strategy: "skip",   label: "Safer Range x Pattern-focused" }
  ];

  // [[MLE_SKAI_PRECISION_BRIDGE]] If MyLottoExpert opened SKAI with a
  // Precision Lock batch, replace the default 3x3 profile matrix with the
  // exact 9 saved settings from MyLottoExpert. SKAI still owns the visible
  // progress panel, isolated execution, and auto-save flow.
  var MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT = null;
  function normalizeMleProfile(v) {
    v = String(v || '').toLowerCase();
    if (v === 'explorative' || v === 'aggressive') { return 'explorative'; }
    if (v === 'conservative') { return 'conservative'; }
    return 'balanced';
  }
  function normalizeMleStrategy(v) {
    v = String(v || '').toLowerCase();
    if (v === 'ai' || v === 'ai-forward' || v === 'ai_forward') { return 'ai'; }
    if (v === 'skip' || v === 'skip-pattern' || v === 'skip_pattern' || v === 'skip_pattern_boost') { return 'skip'; }
    return 'hybrid';
  }
  function skaiMleGetUrlParam(name) {
    try {
      var params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || '');
      return params.get(name) || '';
    } catch (_) {
      var q = String(window.location.search || '').replace(/^\?/, '').split('&');
      for (var i = 0; i < q.length; i++) {
        var parts = q[i].split('=');
        if (decodeURIComponent(parts[0] || '') === name) {
          return decodeURIComponent((parts[1] || '').replace(/\+/g, ' '));
        }
      }
    }
    return '';
  }
  function skaiMleGetQueryIntFromUrl(urlLike, key) {
    var out = 0;
    try {
      if (!urlLike || !key) { return 0; }
      var qs = String(urlLike).split('?')[1] || '';
      if (!qs) { return 0; }
      var hashPos = qs.indexOf('#');
      if (hashPos >= 0) { qs = qs.substring(0, hashPos); }
      var params = new URLSearchParams(qs);
      out = parseInt(params.get(key) || '0', 10) || 0;
    } catch (_) { out = 0; }
    return out > 0 ? out : 0;
  }
  function skaiMleResolveBatchId(preferredId) {
    var id = parseInt(preferredId || 0, 10) || 0;
    if (id > 0) { return id; }
    try {
      id = parseInt((window.MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT && window.MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT.batch_id) || 0, 10) || 0;
      if (id > 0) { return id; }
    } catch (_) {}
    try {
      id = parseInt((window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD.batch_id) || 0, 10) || 0;
      if (id > 0) { return id; }
    } catch (_) {}
    try {
      id = parseInt((window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS.batch_id) || 0, 10) || 0;
      if (id > 0) { return id; }
    } catch (_) {}
    id = parseInt(skaiMleGetUrlParam('batch_id') || '0', 10) || 0;
    if (id > 0) { return id; }
    try {
      var saveForm = document.getElementById('skai-save-form') || document.getElementById('skai-ai-save-form');
      if (saveForm) {
        var formAction = String(saveForm.getAttribute('action') || '');
        id = skaiMleGetQueryIntFromUrl(formAction, 'batch_id');
        if (id > 0) { return id; }
      }
    } catch (_) {}
    return 0;
  }
  function skaiMleGuidedRequired() {
    return skaiMleGetUrlParam('mle_skai_batch') === '1'
      && (skaiMleGetUrlParam('mle_guided_mode') === 'required' || skaiMleGetUrlParam('mle_required_action') === 'precision_batch');
  }
  function skaiMleGuidedCancelKey() {
    var bid = skaiMleGetUrlParam('batch_id') || '0';
    var gid = skaiMleGetUrlParam('gameId') || skaiMleGetUrlParam('game_id') || skaiMleGetUrlParam('gid') || '';
    return 'skai_mle_guided_cancelled_v63_' + String(gid) + '_' + String(bid);
  }
  function skaiMleGuidedCancelled() {
    try { return sessionStorage.getItem(skaiMleGuidedCancelKey()) === '1'; } catch (_) { return false; }
  }
  function skaiMleSetGuidedCancelled() {
    try { sessionStorage.setItem(skaiMleGuidedCancelKey(), '1'); } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleShowGuidedRequiredNotice() {
    try {
      var banner = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-banner');
      var bannerText = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-text');
      if (banner) {
        banner.style.display = 'block';
        banner.style.background = '#eff6ff';
        banner.style.borderColor = '#bfdbfe';
        banner.style.color = '#1e3a8a';
        try { banner.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth', block:'center'}); } catch (_) {}
      }
      if (bannerText && window.__SKAI_MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_READY__) {
        bannerText.innerHTML = '<strong>MyLottoExpert needs this controlled 9-run batch to move the learning step forward.</strong> Run the Precision Focus batch, or cancel the guided batch if you intentionally want a single manual SKAI run instead.';
      }
      var guidedActions = document.getElementById('skai-mle-guided-actions');
      if (guidedActions) { guidedActions.style.display = 'flex'; }
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleApplyGuidedModeControls() {
    try {
      if (!skaiMleGuidedRequired()) { return; }
      var cancelled = skaiMleGuidedCancelled();
      var start = document.getElementById('startPrediction');
      if (start) {
        if (!cancelled) {
          start.setAttribute('data-mle-guided-disabled', '1');
          start.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
          start.title = 'MyLottoExpert loaded a required controlled batch. Run that batch first, or cancel guided mode to run a single SKAI analysis.';
          start.style.opacity = '0.55';
          start.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
        } else {
          start.removeAttribute('data-mle-guided-disabled');
          start.removeAttribute('aria-disabled');
          start.title = '';
          start.style.opacity = '';
          start.style.cursor = '';
        }
      }
      var defaultLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-batch-launch');
      if (defaultLaunch) {
        if (!cancelled && defaultLaunch.getAttribute('data-mle-batch-loaded') === '1') {
          defaultLaunch.style.display = 'none';
          defaultLaunch.setAttribute('data-mle-hidden-default', '1');
        } else if (cancelled && defaultLaunch.getAttribute('data-mle-hidden-default') === '1') {
          defaultLaunch.style.display = 'none';
        }
      }
      var mleLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-launch');
      var mleHeroLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-launch-hero');
      if (cancelled) {
        if (mleLaunch) { mleLaunch.style.display = 'none'; }
        if (mleHeroLaunch) { mleHeroLaunch.style.display = 'none'; }
      }
      skaiMleDisableGuidedManualControls();
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleWireGuidedCancel() {
    try {
      var cancelBtn = document.getElementById('skai-mle-guided-cancel');
      if (!cancelBtn || cancelBtn.getAttribute('data-mle-cancel-wired') === '1') { return; }
      cancelBtn.setAttribute('data-mle-cancel-wired', '1');
      cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
        if (ev && ev.preventDefault) { ev.preventDefault(); }
        skaiMleSetGuidedCancelled();
        try { window.__SKAI_MLE_ACTIVE_BATCH_RUN__ = false; window.__SKAI_MLE_ALLOW_INTERNAL_BATCH_LAUNCH__ = false; } catch (_) {}
        var bannerText = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-text');
        if (bannerText) {
          bannerText.innerHTML = '<strong>Guided MyLottoExpert batch cancelled for this session.</strong> You can now run a single manual SKAI analysis. MyLottoExpert will not treat this as the controlled batch it requested.';
        }
        var guidedActions = document.getElementById('skai-mle-guided-actions');
        if (guidedActions) { guidedActions.style.display = 'none'; }
        skaiMleApplyGuidedModeControls();
        skaiMleDisableGuidedManualControls();
        return false;
      }, false);
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  // [[SKAI_V81_MLE_GUIDED_BATCH_ENFORCEMENT]]
  // When MyLottoExpert sends a required 9-run command, SKAI must behave as
  // the execution engine for that command. Manual single-run and regular
  // default-batch launch controls are blocked until the user deliberately
  // cancels guided mode. The MyLottoExpert batch button is allowed to proxy
  // the internal batch launcher through a short-lived allow flag.
  function skaiMleIsGuidedBlockedRunControl(node) {
    try {
      while (node && node !== document) {
        if (node.id === 'startPrediction' ||
            node.id === 'runPrediction' ||
            node.id === 'startPredictionSidebar' ||
            node.id === 'btnRunAI' ||
            node.id === 'updateButton') {
          return true;
        }
        if (node.id === 'skai-batch-launch') {
          return !window.__SKAI_MLE_ALLOW_INTERNAL_BATCH_LAUNCH__;
        }
        if (node.getAttribute && node.getAttribute('data-skai-run') !== null) {
          return true;
        }
        node = node.parentNode;
      }
    } catch (_) {}
    return false;
  }
  function skaiMleInstallGuidedClickGuard() {
    try {
      if (window.__SKAI_MLE_GUIDED_CLICK_GUARD__) { return; }
      window.__SKAI_MLE_GUIDED_CLICK_GUARD__ = true;
      document.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
        try {
          if (!skaiMleGuidedRequired() || skaiMleGuidedCancelled()) { return; }
          var target = ev.target || null;
          if (!target || !skaiMleIsGuidedBlockedRunControl(target)) { return; }
          if (ev.preventDefault) { ev.preventDefault(); }
          if (ev.stopPropagation) { ev.stopPropagation(); }
          if (ev.stopImmediatePropagation) { ev.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
          ev.returnValue = false;
          ev.cancelBubble = true;
          skaiMleShowGuidedRequiredNotice();
          return false;
        } catch (_) {}
      }, true);
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleDisableGuidedManualControls() {
    try {
      if (!skaiMleGuidedRequired()) { return; }
      var cancelled = skaiMleGuidedCancelled();
      var selectors = ['#startPrediction', '#runPrediction', '#startPredictionSidebar', '#btnRunAI', '#updateButton', '[data-skai-run]'];
      var nodes = [];
      for (var si = 0; si < selectors.length; si++) {
        var found = document.querySelectorAll(selectors[si]);
        for (var fi = 0; fi < found.length; fi++) { nodes.push(found[fi]); }
      }
      for (var i = 0; i < nodes.length; i++) {
        var el = nodes[i];
        if (!el || el.id === 'skai-mle-batch-launch' || el.id === 'skai-mle-batch-launch-hero') { continue; }
        if (!cancelled) {
          el.setAttribute('data-mle-guided-disabled', '1');
          el.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
          el.title = 'MyLottoExpert loaded a required controlled 9-run batch. Run that batch first, or cancel guided mode to use manual SKAI.';
          el.style.opacity = '0.55';
          el.style.cursor = 'not-allowed';
          if (el.tagName && /^(BUTTON|INPUT)$/i.test(el.tagName)) { el.disabled = true; }
        } else if (el.getAttribute('data-mle-guided-disabled') === '1') {
          el.removeAttribute('data-mle-guided-disabled');
          el.removeAttribute('aria-disabled');
          el.title = '';
          el.style.opacity = '';
          el.style.cursor = '';
          if (el.tagName && /^(BUTTON|INPUT)$/i.test(el.tagName)) { el.disabled = false; }
        }
      }
      var defaultLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-batch-launch');
      if (defaultLaunch && !cancelled) {
        defaultLaunch.setAttribute('data-mle-guided-disabled', '1');
        defaultLaunch.setAttribute('aria-disabled', 'true');
        defaultLaunch.style.display = 'none';
      }
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleInstallFunctionGuards() {
    try {
      if (window.__SKAI_MLE_FUNCTION_GUARDS__) { return; }
      window.__SKAI_MLE_FUNCTION_GUARDS__ = true;
      var names = ['SKAI_startPredictionFlow', 'runSkaiML', 'SKAI_run', 'runSkaiClientOnce', 'startSkaiML'];
      var attempts = 0;
      var timer = window.setInterval(function() {
        attempts++;
        for (var i = 0; i < names.length; i++) {
          var n = names[i];
          var fn = window[n];
          if (typeof fn === 'function' && !fn.__mleGuidedWrapped) {
            (function(name, original) {
              var wrapped = function() {
                if (skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled() && !window.__SKAI_MLE_ALLOW_INTERNAL_BATCH_LAUNCH__ && !window.__SKAI_MLE_ACTIVE_BATCH_RUN__) {
                  skaiMleShowGuidedRequiredNotice();
                  return false;
                }
                return original.apply(this, arguments);
              };
              wrapped.__mleGuidedWrapped = true;
              window[name] = wrapped;
            })(n, fn);
          }
        }
        if (attempts > 30) { window.clearInterval(timer); }
      }, 250);
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  // [[SKAI_V83_MLE_GUIDED_BATCH_EXECUTION_FIX]]
  // Once the user starts the MyLottoExpert guided batch, keep the internal
  // execution path open for the full 9-run batch. A short-lived click allow
  // flag is not enough because the actual run starts after the confirmation
  // modal and batch queue begin executing.
  function skaiMleAllowGuidedBatchExecution() {
    try {
      window.__SKAI_MLE_ALLOW_INTERNAL_BATCH_LAUNCH__ = true;
      window.__SKAI_MLE_ACTIVE_BATCH_RUN__ = true;
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleWireGuidedConfirmExecution() {
    try {
      var confirmBtn = document.getElementById('skai-batch-confirm');
      if (!confirmBtn || confirmBtn.getAttribute('data-mle-exec-wired') === '1') { return; }
      confirmBtn.setAttribute('data-mle-exec-wired', '1');
      confirmBtn.addEventListener('click', function() {
        if (skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled() && window.__SKAI_MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_READY__) {
          skaiMleAllowGuidedBatchExecution();
        }
      }, true);
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function loadMlePrecisionBatchCombos() {
    try {
      if (window.location.search.indexOf('mle_skai_batch=1') === -1) { return null; }
      var urlBatchId = skaiMleResolveBatchId(0);
      if (urlBatchId <= 0) { return null; }
      var raw = sessionStorage.getItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1') || localStorage.getItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1') || '';
      var storagePayload = null;
      if (raw) {
        try { storagePayload = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (_) { storagePayload = null; }
      }
      var serverPayload = (window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD && typeof window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD === 'object') ? window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_PAYLOAD : null;
      var payload = null;
      if (serverPayload && serverPayload.runs && serverPayload.runs.length === 9) {
        payload = serverPayload;
      } else if (storagePayload && storagePayload.runs && storagePayload.runs.length === 9) {
        var storageBatchId = parseInt(storagePayload.batch_id || 0, 10) || 0;
        var storageLotteryId = parseInt(storagePayload.lottery_id || 0, 10) || 0;
        var storageGameId = String(storagePayload.game_id || '').toLowerCase();
        var urlLotteryId = 0;
        var urlGameId = '';
        try { urlLotteryId = parseInt(skaiMleGetUrlParam('lottery_id') || '0', 10) || 0; } catch (_) {}
        try { urlGameId = String(skaiMleGetUrlParam('game_id') || skaiMleGetUrlParam('gameId') || '').toLowerCase(); } catch (_) {}
        // [[MLE_STORAGE_LOTTERY_GUARD]] Reject stale storage payload when the lottery or
        // game context does not match the current page. This prevents a payload that was
        // stored for one lottery (e.g. Washington Hit 5, batch_id=59) from being applied
        // to a SKAI session for a different lottery (e.g. Florida Fantasy 5).
        var lotteryOk = !(urlLotteryId > 0 && storageLotteryId > 0 && storageLotteryId !== urlLotteryId);
        var gameOk = !(urlGameId !== '' && storageGameId !== '' && storageGameId !== urlGameId);
        if (lotteryOk && gameOk && (!urlBatchId || !storageBatchId || storageBatchId === urlBatchId)) {
          payload = storagePayload;
        } else {
          try {
            sessionStorage.removeItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1');
            localStorage.removeItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1');
          } catch (_) {}
        }
      }
      if (payload) {
        try {
          sessionStorage.setItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1', JSON.stringify(payload));
          localStorage.setItem('mle_precision_lock_batch_payload_v1', JSON.stringify(payload));
        } catch (_) {}
      }
      if (!payload || payload.schema !== 'mle_precision_lock_batch_v1' || !payload.runs || payload.runs.length !== 9) { return null; }
      var createdAt = parseInt(payload.created_at || 0, 10);
      if (createdAt > 0 && ((Date.now() / 1000) - createdAt) > 21600 && String(payload.source || '') !== 'mylottoexpert_server_bridge') { return null; }
      try {
        var activeBatchKey = 'mle:' + String(payload.batch_id || '') + ':' + String(payload.game_id || '');
        var prevBatchKey = sessionStorage.getItem('skai_active_batch_context_v1') || '';
        if (activeBatchKey !== prevBatchKey) {
          sessionStorage.removeItem('skai_batch_results_v1');
          localStorage.removeItem('skai_batch_state_v1');
          sessionStorage.setItem('skai_active_batch_context_v1', activeBatchKey);
        }
      } catch (_) {}
      var combos = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < payload.runs.length; i++) {
        var run = payload.runs[i] || {};
        var settings = (run.settings && typeof run.settings === 'object') ? run.settings : {};
        var p = normalizeMleProfile(run.profile || settings.profile || settings.risk_profile || settings.training_style);
        var st = normalizeMleStrategy(run.strategy || settings.strategy || settings.skai_mode_method);
        combos.push({
          profile: p,
          strategy: st,
          label: String(run.label || ('Precision Lock Run ' + (i + 1))),
          mlePrecisionLock: true,
          mleSettings: settings,
          mleBatch: {
            batch_id: parseInt(payload.batch_id || 0, 10) || 0,
            batch_run_id: parseInt(run.batch_run_id || 0, 10) || 0,
            batch_run_order: parseInt(run.run_order || (i + 1), 10) || (i + 1),
            batch_type: String(payload.batch_type || 'SKAI Precision Lock Batch'),
            is_control: run.is_control ? 1 : 0,
            test_variable: String(run.test_variable || payload.test_variable || ''),
            test_value: String(run.test_value || ''),
            lottery_id: parseInt(payload.lottery_id || 0, 10) || 0,
            game_id: String(payload.game_id || ''),
            lottery_name: String(payload.lottery_name || '')
          }
        });
      }
      MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT = payload;
      return combos;
    } catch (e) {
      try { console.warn('[SKAI Precision Bridge] Could not load MyLottoExpert batch payload', e); } catch (_) {}
      return null;
    }
  }
  function skaiMleEsc(v) {
    return String(v == null ? '' : v).replace(/[&<>"]/g, function(c) {
      return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;'}[c] || c;
    });
  }
  function skaiMleRunCellId(combo) {
    var order = combo && combo.mleBatch ? parseInt(combo.mleBatch.batch_run_order || 0, 10) : 0;
    if (!order) { order = 1; }
    return 'skai-cell-mle-' + order;
  }
  function skaiMleRenderBatchGrid(combos, payload) {
    try {
      var table = document.getElementById('skai-batch-grid');
      if (!table || !combos || combos.length !== 9) { return; }
      var testVariable = String((payload && payload.test_variable) || 'Setting');
      var thead = table.getElementsByTagName('thead')[0];
      var tbody = table.getElementsByTagName('tbody')[0];
      if (thead) {
        thead.innerHTML = '<tr>'
          + '<th style="padding:6px 8px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;text-align:left;">Run</th>'
          + '<th style="padding:6px 8px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;text-align:left;">MyLottoExpert recommended setting</th>'
          + '<th style="padding:6px 8px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;text-align:center;">Status</th>'
          + '</tr>';
      }
      if (tbody) {
        var html = '';
        for (var i = 0; i < combos.length; i++) {
          var c = combos[i] || {};
          var b = c.mleBatch || {};
          var order = parseInt(b.batch_run_order || (i + 1), 10) || (i + 1);
          var label = String(c.label || ('Recommended Run ' + order));
          var isControl = b.is_control ? true : false;
          var testVal = String(b.test_value || '');
          var detail = isControl
            ? 'Control run - current strongest settings'
            : (testVariable + (testVal !== '' ? ': ' + testVal : ' test point'));
          html += '<tr data-mle-batch-row="' + order + '">'
            + '<td style="padding:7px 8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;font-weight:700;background:#f8fafc;white-space:nowrap;">Run ' + order + (isControl ? ' <span style="font-size:0.72rem;color:#065f46;">Control</span>' : '') + '</td>'
            + '<td style="padding:7px 8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;text-align:left;"><strong>' + skaiMleEsc(label) + '</strong><br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:#64748b;">' + skaiMleEsc(detail) + '</span></td>'
            + '<td id="skai-cell-mle-' + order + '" style="padding:7px 8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;text-align:center;">Waiting</td>'
            + '</tr>';
        }
        tbody.innerHTML = html;
      }
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleUpdateBatchUi(combos, payload) {
    try {
      if (!combos || combos.length !== 9 || !payload) { return; }
      var batchName = String(payload.batch_name || payload.batch_type || 'MyLottoExpert recommended SKAI batch');
      var lotteryName = String(payload.lottery_name || 'this lottery');
      var testVariable = String(payload.test_variable || 'one setting');
      var rangeMin = String(payload.range_min || '');
      var rangeMax = String(payload.range_max || '');
      var recommendedValue = String(payload.recommended_value || '');
      var evidence = String(payload.evidence_summary || payload.recommendation_level || payload.precision_progress_level || 'Saved MyLottoExpert evidence');
      var rangeText = (rangeMin !== '' || rangeMax !== '') ? (' Range: ' + rangeMin + ' to ' + rangeMax + '.') : '';
      var launch = document.getElementById('skai-batch-launch');
      if (launch) {
        launch.setAttribute('data-mle-batch-loaded', '1');
        launch.setAttribute('aria-describedby', 'skai-mle-batch-context-text');
        if (skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled()) {
          launch.style.display = 'none';
          launch.setAttribute('data-mle-hidden-default', '1');
        }
      }
      var guidedActions = document.getElementById('skai-mle-guided-actions');
      if (guidedActions && skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled()) {
        guidedActions.style.display = 'flex';
      }
      skaiMleApplyGuidedModeControls();
      var mleLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-launch');
      if (mleLaunch) {
        mleLaunch.style.display = 'inline-block';
        mleLaunch.textContent = 'Run Recommended 9-Run Batch';
        mleLaunch.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Run the MyLottoExpert Precision Focus 9-run batch for this lottery');
      }
      var mleHeroLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-launch-hero');
      if (mleHeroLaunch) {
        mleHeroLaunch.style.display = 'inline-block';
        mleHeroLaunch.textContent = 'Run Recommended 9-Run Batch';
        mleHeroLaunch.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Run the MyLottoExpert Precision Focus 9-run batch for this lottery');
      }
      var banner = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-banner');
      var bannerText = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-text');
      if (banner) { banner.style.display = 'block'; }
      if (bannerText) {
        bannerText.innerHTML = '<strong>' + skaiMleEsc(batchName) + '</strong> for <strong>' + skaiMleEsc(lotteryName) + '</strong>. MyLottoExpert is asking SKAI for this controlled batch so the next learning step can move forward. The regular single-run path is paused for this guided session unless you cancel the guided batch. Testing focus: <strong>' + skaiMleEsc(testVariable) + '</strong>.' + skaiMleEsc(rangeText);
      }
      var title = document.getElementById('skai-batch-modal-title');
      if (title) { title.textContent = 'Run MyLottoExpert Precision Focus 9-run batch?'; }
      var intro = document.getElementById('skai-batch-modal-intro');
      if (intro) {
        intro.innerHTML = 'SKAI detected a MyLottoExpert Precision Focus batch for <strong>' + skaiMleEsc(lotteryName) + '</strong>. These 9 saved runs will <strong>replace the regular default 3x3 profile/strategy batch</strong> for this session.';
      }
      var list = document.getElementById('skai-batch-modal-list');
      if (list) {
        list.innerHTML = '<li><strong>Run 1:</strong> control / current strongest settings</li>'
          + '<li><strong>Runs 2-9:</strong> bracketed test points for ' + skaiMleEsc(testVariable) + '</li>'
          + '<li><strong>Recommended value:</strong> ' + skaiMleEsc(recommendedValue || 'included in the batch') + '</li>'
          + '<li><strong>Evidence:</strong> ' + skaiMleEsc(evidence) + '</li>';
      }
      var warning = document.getElementById('skai-batch-modal-warning');
      if (warning) {
        warning.innerHTML = '<strong>Recommended batch mode:</strong> this is not the regular default batch. SKAI will run the exact MyLottoExpert narrowing settings loaded for this lottery. You can stop the batch at any time.';
      }
      var saveNote = document.getElementById('skai-batch-modal-save-note');
      if (saveNote) {
        saveNote.innerHTML = '<strong>About saving:</strong> each recommended run saves automatically to your dashboard with its MyLottoExpert batch label, test variable, and test value so MyLottoExpert can score it after the draw.';
      }
      var panelTitle = document.getElementById('skai-batch-panel-title');
      if (panelTitle) { panelTitle.textContent = 'MyLottoExpert Recommended 9-Run Batch Progress'; }
      var savePanelNote = document.getElementById('skai-batch-save-note');
      if (savePanelNote) {
        savePanelNote.innerHTML = '<strong>Saving MyLottoExpert batch:</strong> each recommended run is saved automatically with its batch metadata. These are the narrowing test runs that override the regular default batch for this session.';
      }
      var help = document.querySelector('#skai-how-it-works div');
      if (help) {
        var extra = document.createElement('div');
        extra.id = 'skai-mle-batch-help-note';
        extra.style.cssText = 'margin:0 0 12px 0;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:10px;background:#eff6ff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:0.86rem;line-height:1.55;';
        extra.innerHTML = '<strong>Recommended batch loaded:</strong> this page is currently using the 9 saved settings from MyLottoExpert, not the regular default 3x3 batch. The grid below lists the exact control and bracketed narrowing runs.';
        if (!document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-help-note')) { help.insertBefore(extra, help.firstChild); }
      }
      skaiMleRenderBatchGrid(combos, payload);
    } catch (_) {}
  }
  function skaiMleWirePrecisionBatchButtons() {
    try {
      var defaultLaunch = document.getElementById('skai-batch-launch');
      var ids = ['skai-mle-batch-launch', 'skai-mle-batch-launch-hero'];
      for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
        var btn = document.getElementById(ids[i]);
        if (!btn || btn.getAttribute('data-mle-wired') === '1') { continue; }
        btn.setAttribute('data-mle-wired', '1');
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(ev) {
          if (ev && ev.preventDefault) { ev.preventDefault(); }
          if (!window.__SKAI_MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_READY__) {
            skaiMleShowMissingPayloadWarning();
            return false;
          }
          if (defaultLaunch) {
            try {
              skaiMleAllowGuidedBatchExecution();
              defaultLaunch.disabled = false;
              defaultLaunch.removeAttribute('disabled');
              defaultLaunch.removeAttribute('aria-disabled');
              defaultLaunch.click();
            } catch (_) {}
            window.setTimeout(function(){ window.__SKAI_MLE_ALLOW_INTERNAL_BATCH_LAUNCH__ = false; skaiMleApplyGuidedModeControls(); }, 350);
          }
          return false;
        }, false);
      }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function skaiMleShowMissingPayloadWarning() {
    try {
      var status = window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS || {};
      var hasGuidedRequest = window.location.search.indexOf('mle_skai_batch=1') !== -1 || window.location.search.indexOf('mle_guided_mode=required') !== -1 || !!status.requested;
      if (!hasGuidedRequest) { return; }
      var banner = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-banner');
      var bannerText = document.getElementById('skai-mle-batch-context-text');
      if (!banner || !bannerText) { return; }
      banner.style.display = 'block';
      banner.style.background = '#fffbeb';
      banner.style.borderColor = '#fde68a';
      banner.style.color = '#92400e';
      var reason = status.reason ? String(status.reason) : 'unknown';
      var rows = (typeof status.row_count !== 'undefined') ? String(status.row_count) : '0';
      var warningMessage = status.warning_message ? String(status.warning_message) : '';
      bannerText.innerHTML = '<strong>Batch link detected, but the requested guided MyLottoExpert batch was not loaded.</strong> SKAI looked for this batch and found ' + rows + ' runnable row(s). Reason: ' + skaiMleEsc(reason) + '. ' + (warningMessage ? skaiMleEsc(warningMessage) + ' ' : '') + 'Go back to MyLottoExpert and open a fresh tracked batch.';
      var guidedActions = document.getElementById('skai-mle-guided-actions');
      if (guidedActions && skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled()) { guidedActions.style.display = 'flex'; }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  // Register the command-mode click/function guards immediately so later
  // page-level warning modals or legacy handlers cannot intercept manual run
  // controls before the MyLottoExpert guard does.
  skaiMleInstallGuidedClickGuard();
  skaiMleInstallFunctionGuards();

  var __mleCombos = loadMlePrecisionBatchCombos();
  if (__mleCombos && __mleCombos.length === 9) {
    BATCH_COMBOS = __mleCombos;
    window.__SKAI_MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_READY__ = true;
    try {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        skaiMleInstallGuidedClickGuard();
        skaiMleUpdateBatchUi(__mleCombos, MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT);
        skaiMleWirePrecisionBatchButtons();
        skaiMleWireGuidedConfirmExecution();
        skaiMleWireGuidedCancel();
        skaiMleApplyGuidedModeControls();
        skaiMleDisableGuidedManualControls();
        var confirm = document.getElementById('skai-batch-confirm');
        if (confirm) { confirm.textContent = 'Start Precision Focus Batch'; }
        setTimeout(function() {
          var panel = document.getElementById('skai-batch-panel');
          var launch = document.getElementById('skai-batch-launch');
          if (launch && (!panel || panel.style.display === 'none') && (!skaiMleGuidedRequired() || !skaiMleGuidedCancelled())) {
            if (skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled()) { skaiMleAllowGuidedBatchExecution(); }
            try { launch.click(); } catch (_) {}
          }
        }, 700);
      }, false);
    } catch (_) {}
  } else {
    try {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
        skaiMleInstallGuidedClickGuard();
        skaiMleWirePrecisionBatchButtons();
        skaiMleWireGuidedCancel();
        skaiMleApplyGuidedModeControls();
        skaiMleDisableGuidedManualControls();
        skaiMleShowMissingPayloadWarning();
      }, false);
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  // sessionStorage: captured run results (large, session-scoped).
  var SESSION_KEY  = "skai_batch_results_v1";
  // localStorage: queue / progress state (lightweight, survives reload).
  var LS_STATE_KEY = "skai_batch_state_v1";

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Batch state  (strict separation: batch state | run state | UI state)
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  var batchState = {
    running:       false,
    paused:        false,
    stopped:       false,
    index:         0,
    doneCount:     0,
    failCount:     0,          // runs that completed but returned no main numbers
    saveFailCount: 0,          // runs that completed but whose auto-save failed
    token:         null,       // active run token -- changes each run
    pauseResume:   null        // stored callback for resume
  };
  var batchResults = [];

  // Back-compat aliases used by saveAllSequential and legacy paths.
  // These mirror batchState and are kept in sync on every write.
  var batchRunning   = false;
  var batchStopped   = false;
  var batchIndex     = 0;
  var batchDoneCount = 0;
  var batchFailCount = 0;

  function syncAliases() {
    batchRunning   = batchState.running;
    batchStopped   = batchState.stopped;
    batchIndex     = batchState.index;
    batchDoneCount = batchState.doneCount;
    batchFailCount = batchState.failCount;
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // [[skaiGenerateRunToken]]
  // Returns a unique token string for each run. All callbacks and saves
  // must validate against this token. Stale callbacks are silently ignored.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function skaiGenerateRunToken() {
    var rnd = '';
    try { rnd = Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9); } catch (_) { rnd = 'x'; }
    return 'skai_' + Date.now() + '_' + rnd;
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // [[skaiResetRunState]]
  // Hard-clears ALL per-run global state before a new run begins.
  // Clears: number arrays, candidate pools, predicted numbers, extra/bonus
  // numbers, hidden inputs, DOM containers, temporary variables, run locks.
  // Safe to call from manual runs as well (no batch-specific side effects).
  // Returns a status object for diagnostics.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function skaiResetRunState(runToken) {
    try {
      // --- Number arrays ---
      window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS = [];
      window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS   = [];
      window.SKAI_POS_COMBOS            = null;
      window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__          = null;
      window.skaiSaveMainOrdered        = [];
      window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered       = [];
      window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA             = null;
      window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__        = null;
      window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA            = null;
      window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN              = null;
      window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS    = [];
      window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS      = [];
      // Clear stale probs so epoch-callback SKAI_scoreAndRender calls (from
      // skai:ml:epoch -> render()) cannot use previous-run probs to produce a
      // skai:score:done event before this run's training has completed.
      // SKAI_lastProbs is set again by runSkaiML after all seeds finish.
      window.SKAI_lastProbs             = [];
      // --- Candidate pool ---
      window.SKAI_CANDIDATE_POOL = null;
      // --- Per-run blend tracking ---
      window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__  = null;
      window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__ = null;
      window.__SKAI_BLEND_OPTIMIZED__        = 0;
      window.__SKAI_ALLOW_BLEND_OPT__        = false;
      // --- reproKey / seed: prevent carryover between runs ---
      if (window.SKAI_SETTINGS) {
        window.SKAI_SETTINGS.reproKey = null;
        window.SKAI_SETTINGS.seed     = null;
      }
      // --- Stability score cache ---
      window.SKAI_lastScoreByNum = {};
      // --- DOM hidden inputs ---
      var _dtc = document.getElementById('skai-ai-daily-top-combos-json');
      if (_dtc) { _dtc.value = ''; }
      var _tcs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="top_combos_json"]');
      for (var _i = 0; _i < _tcs.length; _i++) {
        try { _tcs[_i].value = ''; } catch (_) {}
      }
      // --- Run locks ---
      window.__SKAI_RUNNING__    = false;
      window.__SKAI_RUN_ACTIVE__ = false;
      // [[SKAI_BATCH_SNAPSHOT_INTEGRITY_V1]]
      // A batch run uses per-combo settings and must not inherit a stale
      // authoritative/server-only result from a previous run.
      window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_ACTIVE__ = false;
      window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_TOKEN__  = '';
    } catch (_) {}
    return { reset: true, token: runToken || null, ts: Date.now() };
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // [[skaiExecuteIsolatedRun]]
  // Executes one run with complete isolation.
  // Accepts: combo {profile, strategy, label}, runToken, onComplete callback.
  // No dependency on prior state. Builds fresh execution context.
  // Calls onComplete(structuredResult) where structuredResult includes:
  //   success, runToken, lotteryKey, presetKey, predictedNumbers,
  //   extraNumbers, bonusNumbers, savePayload, errorMessage, timestamps.
  // DOM is NOT the source of truth -- per-run snapshots are used.
  // Token guard: stale callbacks from prior runs are silently dropped.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function skaiExecuteIsolatedRun(combo, runToken, onComplete) {
    var timestamps = { started: Date.now(), completed: null };

    if (!combo || !runToken || typeof onComplete !== 'function') {
      if (typeof onComplete === 'function') {
        onComplete({
          success: false, runToken: runToken || null,
          lotteryKey: '', presetKey: '',
          predictedNumbers: [], extraNumbers: [], bonusNumbers: [],
          savePayload: null, errorMessage: 'Invalid combo or run token.',
          timestamps: { started: Date.now(), completed: Date.now() }
        });
      }
      return;
    }

    // Step 1: Hard reset -- fresh execution context, no carryover.
    skaiResetRunState(runToken);
    // [[SKAI_BATCH_SNAPSHOT_INTEGRITY_V1]]
    // During a 9-run batch, each run must preserve the per-combo profile,
    // strategy, blend, temperature, and diversity values. This flag is read
    // by the SKAI2 integration so server-side support scores cannot collapse
    // all nine runs into the same authoritative ranking.
    try {
      window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_ACTIVE__ = true;
      window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_TOKEN__  = String(runToken || '');
    } catch (_) {}

    // Step 2: Apply combo settings cleanly.
    try {
      if (typeof window.skaiApplyCombo === 'function') {
        window.skaiApplyCombo(combo.profile, combo.strategy);
      } else {
        selectProfile(combo.profile);
        selectStrategy(combo.strategy);
      }
    } catch (_) {}
    if (combo && combo.mlePrecisionLock && combo.mleSettings) {
      if (typeof window.skaiApplySavedTemplate === 'function') {
        try { window.skaiApplySavedTemplate(combo.mleSettings); } catch (_) {}
      }
      try {
        if (window.SKAI_SETTINGS && typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS === 'object') {
          for (var __mk in combo.mleSettings) {
            if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(combo.mleSettings, __mk)) { window.SKAI_SETTINGS[__mk] = combo.mleSettings[__mk]; }
          }
        }
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    // Step 3: Closure-local snapshots (never shared across runs).
    var _snapMainNums            = null;
    var _snapExtraNums           = null;
    var _snapFpsJson             = null;
    var _snapDailyChosenCombos   = null;
    var _snapFinalPredictionSets = null;
    var _needsStandardExtraFinal = false;
    var _extraDoneFired          = true;
    var _extraWaitTick           = 0;

    var finished        = false;
    var _doneFired      = false;
    var _scoreDoneFired = false;
    var _onMlStart      = null;
    var safetyTimer     = null;

    function finish() {
      if (finished) { return; }
      // Token guard: reject stale callbacks from previous runs.
      // Only applied when a batch run is active (batchState.token !== null).
      // When batchState.token is null (no batch running, e.g. external/manual
      // caller of window.skaiExecuteIsolatedRun), the guard is bypassed so
      // onComplete fires correctly.
      if (batchState.token !== null && runToken !== batchState.token) { return; }
      finished = true;
      try { clearTimeout(safetyTimer); } catch (_) {}
      if (_onMlStart) {
        try { window.removeEventListener('skai:ml:start', _onMlStart, false); } catch (_) {}
        _onMlStart = null;
      }
      timestamps.completed = Date.now();

      // Capture results using closure-local snapshots (not shared globals).
      var res = captureResult(
        _snapMainNums, _snapExtraNums, _snapFpsJson,
        _snapDailyChosenCombos, _snapFinalPredictionSets
      );

      var lotteryKey = '';
      try {
        lotteryKey = String(
          (window.lottoConfig && window.lottoConfig.gameId) ||
          (window.SKAI_META   && window.SKAI_META.gameId)   || ''
        );
      } catch (_) {}

      // Structured result object -- DOM is not the source of truth.
      onComplete({
        success:          !!(res.mainNumbers && res.mainNumbers.length > 0),
        runToken:         runToken,
        lotteryKey:       lotteryKey,
        presetKey:        combo.profile + '_' + combo.strategy,
        predictedNumbers: res.mainNumbers  || [],
        extraNumbers:     res.extraNumbers || [],
        bonusNumbers:     (res.dailyExtraDigits && res.dailyExtraDigits.length)
                            ? res.dailyExtraDigits.slice()
                            : (res.extraNumbers || []),
        savePayload:      res,
        errorMessage:     (res.mainNumbers && res.mainNumbers.length)
                            ? '' : 'No main numbers captured.',
        timestamps:       timestamps
      });
    }

    function checkAllDone() {
      if (!_doneFired || !_scoreDoneFired || !_extraDoneFired) { return; }
      if (_needsStandardExtraFinal) {
        var _stdExtraNow = [];
        try {
          if (_snapExtraNums && _snapExtraNums.length) {
            _stdExtraNow = normalizeNumericArray(_snapExtraNums).slice(0, 5);
          }
          if (_stdExtraNow.length < 5 && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__.length) {
            _stdExtraNow = normalizeNumericArray(window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__).slice(0, 5);
          }
          if (_stdExtraNow.length < 5 && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA.length) {
            _stdExtraNow = normalizeNumericArray(window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA).slice(0, 5);
          }
          if (_stdExtraNow.length < 5 && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length) {
            _stdExtraNow = normalizeNumericArray(window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered).slice(0, 5);
          }
          if (_stdExtraNow.length < 5 && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length) {
            var _sx = [];
            for (var _sxi = 0; _sxi < window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length && _sx.length < 5; _sxi++) {
              var _sxn = parseInt(window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_sxi] && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_sxi].num, 10);
              if (isFinite(_sxn) && _sx.indexOf(_sxn) === -1) { _sx.push(_sxn); }
            }
            if (_sx.length) { _stdExtraNow = _sx.slice(0, 5); }
          }
        } catch (_) {}
        if (_stdExtraNow.length < 5 && !finished) {
          _extraWaitTick += 1;
          if (_extraWaitTick <= 80) {
            setTimeout(checkAllDone, 150);
            return;
          }
        }
        if (_stdExtraNow.length) {
          _snapExtraNums = _stdExtraNow.slice(0, 5);
        }
      }
      // Both gates satisfied. Guard: only call finish() if numbers are actually
      // available.  skai:score:done can fire during epoch callbacks (skai:ml:epoch
      // -> render() -> SKAI_scoreAndRender) with stale probs from a previous run
      // that produce an empty skaiSaveMainOrdered (e.g., domain mismatch).  In
      // that case _snapMainNums is null and skaiSaveMainOrdered is empty -- we
      // would save with no numbers.  Reset the score:done gate and re-arm so we
      // catch the next skai:score:done that carries valid picks from this run.
      var _hasNums = (_snapMainNums && _snapMainNums.length > 0)
          || (window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length > 0);
      if (!_hasNums && !finished) {
        _scoreDoneFired = false;
        window.addEventListener('skai:score:done', function _onScoreDoneRetry() {
          try { window.removeEventListener('skai:score:done', _onScoreDoneRetry, false); } catch (_) {}
          try { _snapMainNums = (window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length)
                  ? window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
          try { _snapExtraNums = (window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length)
                  ? window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
          try { _snapFpsJson = window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ || null; } catch (_) {}
          try { _snapDailyChosenCombos = (window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length)
                  ? window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
          try { _snapFinalPredictionSets = (window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS && window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.length)
                  ? window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
          _scoreDoneFired = true;
          checkAllDone();
        }, false);
        return;
      }
      finish();
    }

    // Register completion listeners only after skai:ml:start for THIS run.
    // Prevents stale events from a previous run's trailing callbacks from
    // satisfying the dual-gate before this run's training has started.
    function registerCompletionListeners() {
      if (finished) { return; }
      window.addEventListener('skai:done', function onSkaiDone() {
        try { window.removeEventListener('skai:done', onSkaiDone, false); } catch (_) {}
        _doneFired = true;
        checkAllDone();
      }, false);
      window.addEventListener('skai:score:done', function onScoreDone() {
        try { window.removeEventListener('skai:score:done', onScoreDone, false); } catch (_) {}
        // Snapshot at event time while values are guaranteed valid.
        try { _snapMainNums = (window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length)
                ? window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
        try { _snapExtraNums = (window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length)
                ? window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
        try { _snapFpsJson = window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ || null; } catch (_) {}
        try { _snapDailyChosenCombos = (window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length)
                ? window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
        try { _snapFinalPredictionSets = (window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS && window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.length)
                ? window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.slice() : null; } catch (_) {}
        _scoreDoneFired = true;
        checkAllDone();
      }, false);
      if (_needsStandardExtraFinal) {
        window.addEventListener('skai:extra:done', function onExtraDone(ev) {
          try { window.removeEventListener('skai:extra:done', onExtraDone, false); } catch (_) {}
          try {
            var _evtTop = (((ev || {}).detail || {}).top || []);
            var _evtExtra = [];
            for (var _ei = 0; _ei < _evtTop.length && _evtExtra.length < 5; _ei++) {
              var _en = parseInt((_evtTop[_ei] && _evtTop[_ei].num != null) ? _evtTop[_ei].num : _evtTop[_ei], 10);
              if (isFinite(_en) && _evtExtra.indexOf(_en) === -1) { _evtExtra.push(_en); }
            }
            if (_evtExtra.length) {
              _snapExtraNums = _evtExtra.slice(0, 5);
            }
          } catch (_) {}
          _extraDoneFired = true;
          checkAllDone();
        }, false);
      }
    }

    try {
      var _metaX = window.SKAI_META || {};
      _needsStandardExtraFinal = !!(_metaX && _metaX.isStandardLotteryGame && _metaX.hasExtraBall && !_metaX.isDaily && !_metaX.isDailyDigitGame);
      _extraDoneFired = !_needsStandardExtraFinal;
    } catch (_) {
      _needsStandardExtraFinal = false;
      _extraDoneFired = true;
    }

    // FIX: Register completion listeners immediately so they receive skai:done and
    // skai:score:done even when skai:ml:start is never delivered to our bubble-phase
    // listener.  The auto-tune capture-phase interceptor (line 27780) calls
    // stopImmediatePropagation() on every skai:ml:start, which prevents all
    // bubble-phase listeners -- including _onMlStart -- from firing.
    registerCompletionListeners();

    _onMlStart = function onMlStart() {
      try { window.removeEventListener('skai:ml:start', _onMlStart, false); } catch (_) {}
      _onMlStart = null;
      // registerCompletionListeners() was already called eagerly above.
    };
    window.addEventListener('skai:ml:start', _onMlStart, false);

    // 30-minute safety net in case skai:done never fires (e.g., training
    // takes very long, or skai:score:done never carries valid numbers).
    // The original 5-minute timer was too short for high epoch counts.
    safetyTimer = setTimeout(finish, 1800000);

    // Step 4: Trigger the ML runner directly (avoids arm() gating issues).
    var mlRunner = (typeof window.runSkaiML === 'function') ? window.runSkaiML : null;
    if (mlRunner) {
      try {
        window.__SKAI_RUNNING__    = false;
        // FIX: Keep __SKAI_RUN_ACTIVE__ = true so that the skai:ml:done bubble-phase
        // listener (line 31510: "if (!window.__SKAI_RUN_ACTIVE__) return;") does NOT
        // skip calling maybeAllDone().  The capture-phase interceptor at line 27780
        // (stopImmediatePropagation) prevents the skai:ml:start bubble listener at
        // line 31420 from ever setting __SKAI_RUN_ACTIVE__ = true, so we set it here
        // directly before invoking the ML runner.
        window.__SKAI_RUN_ACTIVE__ = true;
        mlRunner();
      } catch (_) { finish(); }
    } else {
      var runBtn = document.getElementById('startPrediction') ||
                  document.getElementById('runPrediction');
      if (!runBtn) {
        timestamps.completed = Date.now();
        onComplete({
          success: false, runToken: runToken,
          lotteryKey: '', presetKey: combo.profile + '_' + combo.strategy,
          predictedNumbers: [], extraNumbers: [], bonusNumbers: [],
          savePayload: null, errorMessage: 'Run button not found.',
          timestamps: timestamps
        });
        return;
      }
      try {
        if (typeof runBtn.click === 'function') { runBtn.click(); }
        else {
          var _ev = document.createEvent('MouseEvents');
          _ev.initEvent('click', true, true);
          runBtn.dispatchEvent(_ev);
        }
      } catch (_) { finish(); }
    }
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // Storage helpers
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function persistResults() {
    try {
      var slim = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < batchResults.length; i++) {
        var r = batchResults[i];
        slim.push({
          combo:               r.combo,
          text:                r.text || '',
          done:                !!r.done,
          status:              r.status || (r.done ? 'completed' : 'pending'),
          runToken:            r.runToken || '',
          lotteryKey:          r.lotteryKey || '',
          presetKey:           r.presetKey || '',
          mainNumbers:         r.mainNumbers  || [],
          extraNumbers:        r.extraNumbers || [],
          bonusNumbers:        r.bonusNumbers || [],
          finalPredictionSets: r.finalPredictionSets || [],
          fpsJson:             r.fpsJson || '',
          dailyChosenCombos:   r.dailyChosenCombos  || [],
          dailyExtraDigits:    r.dailyExtraDigits   || [],
          dailyTopExtras:      r.dailyTopExtras     || [],
          blendAiPct:          (typeof r.blendAiPct         === 'number') ? r.blendAiPct         : null,
          blendSkipPct:        null,
          blendLabel:          r.blendLabel || '',
          selectedBlendAiPct:  (typeof r.selectedBlendAiPct  === 'number') ? r.selectedBlendAiPct  : null,
          effectiveBlendAiPct: (typeof r.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number') ? r.effectiveBlendAiPct : null,
          blendOptimized:      r.blendOptimized ? 1 : 0,
          allowBlendOpt:       r.allowBlendOpt  ? 1 : 0,
          temperature:         (typeof r.temperature      === 'number') ? r.temperature      : null,
          diversityPenalty:    (typeof r.diversityPenalty === 'number') ? r.diversityPenalty : null,
          settingsSnapshot:    r.settingsSnapshot || null,
          timestamps:          r.timestamps || {}
        });
      }
      sessionStorage.setItem(SESSION_KEY, JSON.stringify(slim));
    } catch (_) {}
    saveBatchStateToLocalStorage();
  }

  function saveBatchStateToLocalStorage() {
    try {
      localStorage.setItem(LS_STATE_KEY, JSON.stringify({
        running:   batchState.running,
        paused:    batchState.paused,
        stopped:   batchState.stopped,
        index:     batchState.index,
        doneCount: batchState.doneCount,
        failCount: batchState.failCount,
        ts:        Date.now()
      }));
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function loadPersistedResults() {
    try {
      var raw = sessionStorage.getItem(SESSION_KEY);
      if (!raw) { return []; }
      return JSON.parse(raw) || [];
    } catch (_) { return []; }
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // DOM helpers
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function qs(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }

  function skaiApplyCellState(cell, content, className) {
    if (!cell) { return; }
    cell.innerHTML = content;
    cell.style.background =
      className === 'running' ? '#eff6ff' :
      className === 'done'    ? '#f0fdf4' :
      className === 'error'   ? '#fef2f2' : '';
  }

  function setCell(profile, strategy, content, className) {
    skaiApplyCellState(qs('skai-cell-' + profile + '-' + strategy), content, className);
  }

  function setCellForCombo(combo, content, className) {
    if (combo && combo.mlePrecisionLock) {
      skaiApplyCellState(qs(skaiMleRunCellId(combo)), content, className);
      return;
    }
    setCell(combo && combo.profile, combo && combo.strategy, content, className);
  }

  function updateProgress() {
    var pt = qs('skai-batch-progress-text');
    if (!pt) { return; }
    var total     = BATCH_COMBOS.length;
    var done      = batchState.doneCount;
    var failed    = batchState.failCount;
    var completed = done - failed;
    var failSuffix = failed > 0 ? ', ' + failed + ' failed' : '';
    if (done === 0 && !batchState.running && !batchState.paused) {
      pt.textContent = 'Ready';
    } else if (batchState.paused) {
      pt.textContent = 'Paused: ' + completed + ' completed' + failSuffix + ' of ' + total;
    } else if (batchState.running) {
      pt.textContent = 'Running: ' + completed + ' completed' + failSuffix + ' of ' + total;
    } else if (batchState.stopped && done < total) {
      pt.textContent = completed + ' completed' + failSuffix + ' of ' + total + ' (batch stopped)';
    } else {
      pt.textContent = completed + ' completed' + failSuffix + ' of ' + total + ' - ready to save';
    }
    saveBatchStateToLocalStorage();
  }

  function setPauseButtonLabel(paused) {
    var btn = qs('skai-batch-pause');
    if (btn) { btn.textContent = paused ? 'Resume' : 'Pause'; }
  }

  function setCurrentLabel(label) {
    var cl = qs('skai-batch-current-label');
    if (cl) { cl.textContent = label; }
  }

  function showPanel() {
    var p = qs('skai-batch-panel');
    if (p) { p.style.display = 'block'; }
  }

  function hideModal() {
    var m = qs('skai-batch-modal');
    if (m) { m.style.display = 'none'; }
  }

  function selectProfile(profile) {
    try {
      var btns = document.querySelectorAll('[data-profile]');
      for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) {
        var b = btns[i];
        var isTarget = (String(b.getAttribute('data-profile')).toLowerCase() === profile);
        b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', isTarget ? 'true' : 'false');
        if (isTarget) {
          b.className = (b.className || '').replace(/\bis-active\b/g, '').trim() + ' is-active';
        } else {
          b.className = (b.className || '').replace(/\bis-active\b/g, '').trim();
        }
      }
      var inp = qs('skai-risk-profile') || qs('skai-ai-risk-profile');
      if (inp) { inp.value = profile; }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function selectStrategy(strategy) {
    try {
      var btns = document.querySelectorAll('[data-strategy]');
      for (var i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) {
        var b = btns[i];
        var isTarget = (String(b.getAttribute('data-strategy')).toLowerCase() === strategy);
        b.setAttribute('aria-pressed', isTarget ? 'true' : 'false');
        if (isTarget) {
          b.className = (b.className || '').replace(/\bis-active\b/g, '').trim() + ' is-active';
        } else {
          b.className = (b.className || '').replace(/\bis-active\b/g, '').trim();
        }
      }
      var inp = qs('skai-strategy') || qs('skai-ai-strategy');
      if (inp) { inp.value = strategy; }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  function captureResult(_snapMainNums, _snapExtraNums, _snapFpsJson, _snapDailyChosenCombos, _snapFinalPredictionSets) {
    try {
      var containers = [
        "aiMainPredictionContainer",
        "aiExtraPredictionContainer",
        "skai-ai-results",
        "skai-results",
        "skaiResultsContainer",
        "skai-output"
      ];
      var html = "";
      var text = "";
      for (var i = 0; i < containers.length; i++) {
        var el = qs(containers[i]);
        if (el && el.innerHTML && el.innerHTML.trim().length > 20) {
          html += el.outerHTML;
          text += (el.textContent || el.innerText || "").trim().substring(0, 2000);
        }
      }
      if (!html) {
        var picks = document.querySelectorAll(".skai-number-ball, .skai-pick, [class*='ball'], [class*='pick-number']");
        if (picks.length > 0) {
          var tmp = document.createElement("div");
          for (var j = 0; j < picks.length && j < 30; j++) {
            tmp.appendChild(picks[j].cloneNode(true));
          }
          html = tmp.innerHTML;
          text = tmp.textContent || "";
        }
      }
      // Use per-run snapshot (captured at skai:score:done time) so a concurrent
      // module's runCombo() clearing the shared global cannot corrupt this result.
      var mainNums  = (_snapMainNums && _snapMainNums.length)
        ? _snapMainNums.slice()
        : ((window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length)
            ? window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.slice() : []);
      try {
        if ((window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.isDaily || window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)) && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS && window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length) {
          var _capDailyDisplays = [];
          for (var _cdx = 0; _cdx < window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS.length && _capDailyDisplays.length < 5; _cdx++) {
            var _capRow = window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS[_cdx] || {};
            var _capDisp = String(_capRow.display || _capRow.combo_display || _capRow.values || '');
            _capDisp = _capDisp.replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
            if (_capDisp) { _capDailyDisplays.push(_capDisp); }
          }
          if (_capDailyDisplays.length) {
            mainNums = _capDailyDisplays.slice(0);
          } else {
            var _capPrimaryRow = window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS[0] || {};
            var _capPrimaryCombo = Array.isArray(_capPrimaryRow.combo) ? _capPrimaryRow.combo.slice() : (Array.isArray(_capPrimaryRow.main) ? _capPrimaryRow.main.slice() : []);
            if (_capPrimaryCombo.length) {
              mainNums = normalizeNumericArray(_capPrimaryCombo).slice(0, (((window.SKAI_META && +window.SKAI_META.pick) || _capPrimaryCombo.length) || 3));
            } else {
              var _capDisplay = String(_capPrimaryRow.display || '');
              if (_capDisplay && typeof window.SKAI_dailyDigitsFromDisplay === 'function') {
                mainNums = window.SKAI_dailyDigitsFromDisplay(_capDisplay, ((window.SKAI_META && +window.SKAI_META.pick) || _capDisplay.length));
              }
            }
          }
        }
      } catch(_) {}
      var extraNums = [];
      if (window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.isDaily || window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)
          && !window.SKAI_META.isStandardLotteryGame) {
        extraNums = (_snapExtraNums && _snapExtraNums.length)
          ? _snapExtraNums.slice(0, 3)
          : ((window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length)
              ? window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.slice(0, 3) : []);
      } else {
        var _extraCandidates = [];
        var _pushExtraCandidate = function(list){
          if (!list || !list.length) { return; }
          var norm = normalizeNumericArray(list).slice(0, 5);
          if (norm.length) { _extraCandidates.push(norm); }
        };
        if (window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length) {
          var _topExtraCand = [];
          for (var _capEx = 0; _capEx < window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length && _topExtraCand.length < 5; _capEx++) {
            if (window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_capEx] && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_capEx].num != null) {
              _topExtraCand.push(window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_capEx].num);
            }
          }
          _pushExtraCandidate(_topExtraCand);
        }
        if (window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ && window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__.length) { _pushExtraCandidate(window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__); }
        if (window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA && window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA.length) { _pushExtraCandidate(window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA); }
        if (_snapExtraNums && _snapExtraNums.length) { _pushExtraCandidate(_snapExtraNums); }
        if (window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered && window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered.length) { _pushExtraCandidate(window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered); }
        if (window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS && window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS.length) {
          var _fpsExtra = window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS[0] && window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS[0].extra ? window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS[0].extra : [];
          _pushExtraCandidate(_fpsExtra);
        }
        for (var _eci = 0; _eci < _extraCandidates.length; _eci++) {
          if (_extraCandidates[_eci].length > extraNums.length) { extraNums = _extraCandidates[_eci].slice(0); }
        }
      }
      // Capture the canonical ranked final prediction sets so each batch result
      // carries its own complete top-5 set list (not a shared global snapshot).
      var capturedFps = [];
      try {
        var _cfps = (_snapFinalPredictionSets && _snapFinalPredictionSets.length) ? _snapFinalPredictionSets : window.SKAI_FINAL_PREDICTION_SETS;
        if (_cfps && _cfps.length) {
          for (var _ci = 0; _ci < _cfps.length; _ci++) {
            // CHG: main||values fallback -- batch-restored entries carry .values not .main
            var _cfMain = Array.isArray(_cfps[_ci].main) ? _cfps[_ci].main : (Array.isArray(_cfps[_ci].values) ? _cfps[_ci].values : []);
            capturedFps.push({
              rank:  _cfps[_ci].rank,
              main:  _cfMain.slice(),
              values: _cfMain.slice(),
              extra: (_cfps[_ci].extra && _cfps[_ci].extra.length) ? _cfps[_ci].extra.slice() : [],
              score: _cfps[_ci].score,
              source: _cfps[_ci].source || ''
            });
