          }
        }
      } catch(_) {}
      var capturedFpsJson = (_snapFpsJson !== null ? _snapFpsJson : null) || window.__SKAI_FPS_JSON__ || '';
      var capturedDaily = [];
      var capturedDailyExtraDigits = [];
      var capturedDailyTopExtras = [];
      try {
        var _dailyCombos = (_snapDailyChosenCombos && _snapDailyChosenCombos.length) ? _snapDailyChosenCombos : (window.SKAI_DAILY_CHOSEN_COMBOS || []);
        if (_dailyCombos && _dailyCombos.length) {
          for (var _dc = 0; _dc < _dailyCombos.length; _dc++) {
            var _dci = _dailyCombos[_dc];
            capturedDaily.push({
              rank: _dci.rank,
              combo: Array.isArray(_dci.combo) ? _dci.combo.slice() : [],
              values: Array.isArray(_dci.values) ? _dci.values.slice() : (Array.isArray(_dci.combo) ? _dci.combo.slice() : []),
              score: _dci.score,
              approxPct: _dci.approxPct,
              boxKey: _dci.boxKey || '',
              display: _dci.display || '',
              bonus_values: Array.isArray(_dci.bonus_values) ? _dci.bonus_values.slice() : [],
              bonus_display: Array.isArray(_dci.bonus_display) ? _dci.bonus_display.slice() : [],
              full_display: _dci.full_display || ''
            });
          }
        }
        if (window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS && window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.length) {
          capturedDailyExtraDigits = window.SKAI_DAILY_EXTRA_DIGITS.slice(0, 3);
        }
        if ((!capturedDailyExtraDigits || !capturedDailyExtraDigits.length) && window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS && window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS.length) {
          for (var _dtx = 0; _dtx < window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS.length && capturedDailyExtraDigits.length < 3; _dtx++) {
            var _dtr = window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS[_dtx] || {};
            var _dtn = (_dtr.num != null) ? parseInt(_dtr.num, 10) : NaN;
            if (isFinite(_dtn)) { capturedDailyExtraDigits.push(_dtn); }
          }
        }
        if (window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS && window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS.length) {
          for (var _dte = 0; _dte < window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS.length && _dte < 3; _dte++) {
            var _exRow = window.SKAI_DAILY_TOP_EXTRAS[_dte] || {};
            capturedDailyTopExtras.push({
              rank: (typeof _exRow.rank === 'number') ? _exRow.rank : (_dte + 1),
              num: (typeof _exRow.num === 'number') ? _exRow.num : parseInt(_exRow.num, 10),
              p: (typeof _exRow.p === 'number') ? _exRow.p : 0,
              approxPct: (typeof _exRow.approxPct === 'number') ? _exRow.approxPct : 0,
              display: (_exRow.display != null) ? String(_exRow.display) : String(_exRow.num || '')
            });
          }
        }
      } catch(_) {}
      var capturedAiPct = 55;
      var capturedTemperature = null;
      var capturedDiversityPenalty = null;
      var capturedSettings = null;
      try {
        // Capture the full SKAI_SETTINGS snapshot for this run
        if (window.SKAI_SETTINGS && typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS === 'object') {
          capturedSettings = {};
          var _skeys = ['epochs','batchSize','dropout','lr','layers','recencyDecay','blend',
                        'gapScale','laplaceK','skipGamma','windowSize','temperature',
                        'diversityPenalty','profile','strategy'];
          for (var _ski = 0; _ski < _skeys.length; _ski++) {
            var _skk = _skeys[_ski];
            if (typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS[_skk] !== 'undefined') {
              capturedSettings[_skk] = window.SKAI_SETTINGS[_skk];
            }
          }
          if (typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS.temperature === 'number') {
            capturedTemperature = window.SKAI_SETTINGS.temperature;
          }
          if (typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS.diversityPenalty === 'number') {
            capturedDiversityPenalty = window.SKAI_SETTINGS.diversityPenalty;
          }
        }
        var _blendSrc = (window.SKAI_SETTINGS && typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS.blend !== 'undefined') ? Number(window.SKAI_SETTINGS.blend) : null;
        if (!isFinite(_blendSrc)) {
          var _slider = document.getElementById('skai-blend-range');
          _blendSrc = _slider ? Number(_slider.value) : 55;
        }
        if (_blendSrc > 1) _blendSrc = _blendSrc / 100;
        if (!isFinite(_blendSrc)) _blendSrc = 0.55;
        capturedAiPct = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, Math.round(_blendSrc * 100)));
      } catch(_) {}
      // Derive the mode label text for this run's blend percentage
      var capturedBlendLabel = '';
      try {
        var _cbPct = capturedAiPct;
        var _cbMode = (_cbPct >= 70) ? 'AI-focused' : (_cbPct <= 30 ? 'Pattern-focused' : 'Balanced');
        capturedBlendLabel = _cbMode + ' ' + _cbPct + '%';
      } catch(_) { capturedBlendLabel = 'Balanced 55%'; }
      // Capture selected vs effective blend for the Locked/Optimized data model
      var capturedSelectedBlendPct = (typeof window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__ === 'number' && isFinite(window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__))
                                     ? window.__SKAI_SELECTED_BLEND_AI_PCT__ : capturedAiPct;
      var capturedEffectiveBlendPct = (typeof window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__ === 'number' && isFinite(window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__))
                                      ? window.__SKAI_EFFECTIVE_BLEND_AI_PCT__ : capturedAiPct;
      var capturedBlendOptimized  = window.__SKAI_BLEND_OPTIMIZED__  ? 1 : 0;
      var capturedAllowBlendOpt   = window.__SKAI_ALLOW_BLEND_OPT__  ? 1 : 0;
      return {
        html: html || "(no picks captured)",
        text: text || "(no picks captured)",
        mainNumbers:  mainNums,
        extraNumbers: extraNums,
        finalPredictionSets: capturedFps,
        fpsJson: capturedFpsJson,
        dailyChosenCombos: capturedDaily,
        dailyExtraDigits: capturedDailyExtraDigits,
        dailyTopExtras: capturedDailyTopExtras,
        blendAiPct: capturedAiPct,
        blendSkipPct: null,
        blendLabel: capturedBlendLabel,
        selectedBlendAiPct:  capturedSelectedBlendPct,
        effectiveBlendAiPct: capturedEffectiveBlendPct,
        blendOptimized:      capturedBlendOptimized,
        allowBlendOpt:       capturedAllowBlendOpt,
        temperature: capturedTemperature,
        diversityPenalty: capturedDiversityPenalty,
        settingsSnapshot: capturedSettings
      };
    } catch (_) {
      return { html: "(capture error)", text: "(capture error)", mainNumbers: [], extraNumbers: [] };
    }
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // runCombo -- retained for any legacy callers that may reference this name.
  // All run logic is now fully implemented in skaiExecuteIsolatedRun.
  // runNext calls skaiExecuteIsolatedRun directly and is the canonical path.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function runCombo(combo, onDone) {
    // Generate a fresh token for this call.  Set batchState.token so the
    // token guard inside skaiExecuteIsolatedRun.finish() passes correctly.
    var runToken = skaiGenerateRunToken();
    batchState.token = runToken;
    syncAliases();
    skaiExecuteIsolatedRun(combo, runToken, function(structured) {
      // Convert structured result back to the legacy shape expected by callers.
      var res = structured.savePayload || {};
      if (!res.mainNumbers) { res.mainNumbers  = structured.predictedNumbers || []; }
      if (!res.extraNumbers){ res.extraNumbers  = structured.extraNumbers     || []; }
      if (typeof onDone === 'function') { onDone(res); }
    });
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // runNext -- pulls the next combo from the queue and executes it.
  // Respects pause, stop, and token guards.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function runNext() {
    if (batchState.stopped || batchState.index >= BATCH_COMBOS.length) {
      onBatchEnd();
      return;
    }
    // Pause gate: hold execution until resume() is called.
    if (batchState.paused) {
      batchState.pauseResume = function() { runNext(); };
      return;
    }

    var combo = BATCH_COMBOS[batchState.index];
    setCellForCombo(combo, 'Running...', 'running');
    setCurrentLabel(combo.label);
    var idx = batchState.index;
    batchState.index += 1;
    syncAliases();

    // Generate unique run token -- one per combo, validated in all callbacks.
    var runToken = skaiGenerateRunToken();
    batchState.token = runToken;
    syncAliases();

    try {
      console.log('[SKAI batch] Starting combo:', combo.label,
        '| token=' + runToken,
        '| profile=' + combo.profile + ', strategy=' + combo.strategy);
    } catch (_) {}

    skaiExecuteIsolatedRun(combo, runToken, function(structured) {
      // Token guard: discard stale completions.
      if (structured.runToken !== runToken) { return; }

      if (batchState.stopped) {
        onBatchEnd();
        return;
      }

      var res = structured.savePayload || {};
      batchResults[idx] = {
        combo:               combo,
        html:                res.html  || '',
        text:                res.text  || '',
        done:                true,
        status:              structured.success ? 'completed' : 'failed',
        runToken:            runToken,
        lotteryKey:          structured.lotteryKey || '',
        presetKey:           structured.presetKey  || '',
        mainNumbers:         structured.predictedNumbers || [],
        extraNumbers:        structured.extraNumbers     || [],
        bonusNumbers:        structured.bonusNumbers     || [],
        finalPredictionSets: res.finalPredictionSets || [],
        fpsJson:             res.fpsJson || '',
        dailyChosenCombos:   res.dailyChosenCombos  || [],
        dailyExtraDigits:    res.dailyExtraDigits   || [],
        dailyTopExtras:      res.dailyTopExtras     || [],
        blendAiPct:          (typeof res.blendAiPct         === 'number') ? res.blendAiPct         : null,
        blendSkipPct:        null,
        blendLabel:          res.blendLabel || '',
        selectedBlendAiPct:  (typeof res.selectedBlendAiPct  === 'number') ? res.selectedBlendAiPct  : null,
        effectiveBlendAiPct: (typeof res.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number') ? res.effectiveBlendAiPct : null,
        blendOptimized:      res.blendOptimized ? 1 : 0,
        allowBlendOpt:       res.allowBlendOpt  ? 1 : 0,
        temperature:         (typeof res.temperature      === 'number') ? res.temperature      : null,
        diversityPenalty:    (typeof res.diversityPenalty === 'number') ? res.diversityPenalty : null,
        settingsSnapshot:    res.settingsSnapshot || null,
        timestamps:          structured.timestamps || {}
      };
      persistResults();
      batchState.doneCount += 1;
      if (!structured.success) { batchState.failCount += 1; }
      syncAliases();
      updateProgress();

      var _doneLabel = res.blendLabel || '';
      var viewHtml;
      if (!structured.success) {
        viewHtml = "<span style='color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;'>Failed</span>";
        viewHtml += " <a href='#' style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-left:4px;' data-batch-view='" + idx + "'>View</a>";
        setCellForCombo(combo, viewHtml, 'error');
      } else {
        viewHtml = "<span style='color:#16a34a;font-weight:600;'>Done</span>";
        if (_doneLabel) {
          var _doneOptimized = (res.blendOptimized && res.allowBlendOpt &&
            typeof res.selectedBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
            typeof res.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
            res.effectiveBlendAiPct !== res.selectedBlendAiPct);
          if (_doneOptimized) {
            viewHtml += " <span style='font-size:0.75rem;color:#475569;'>" + _doneLabel +
                        " <span style='color:#d97706;font-style:italic;'>*opt</span></span>";
          } else {
            viewHtml += " <span style='font-size:0.75rem;color:#475569;'>" + _doneLabel + "</span>";
          }
        }
        viewHtml += " <a href='#' style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-left:4px;' data-batch-view='" + idx + "'>View</a>";
        setCellForCombo(combo, viewHtml, 'done');
      }

      // Auto-save immediately before the next run starts.
      saveAllSequential([idx], function(_saveResult) {
        if (batchState.stopped) { onBatchEnd(); return; }
        if (_saveResult && _saveResult.ok === false) {
          // Save failed for this run -- mark the cell so the user can re-save later,
          // but DO NOT stop the batch.  The remaining combos should still run.
          try {
            var _sfReason = (_saveResult.detail && (_saveResult.detail.reason || _saveResult.detail.message))
              ? String(_saveResult.detail.reason || _saveResult.detail.message) : 'save_failed';
            batchState.saveFailCount += 1;
            syncAliases();
            var _sfHtml = "<span style='color:#d97706;font-weight:600;'>Done</span>"
              + " <span style='font-size:0.75rem;color:#dc2626;'>(save failed: " + _sfReason + ")</span>"
              + " <a href='#' style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-left:4px;' data-batch-view='" + idx + "'>View</a>";
            if (combo && combo.profile && combo.strategy) {
              setCellForCombo(combo, _sfHtml, 'error');
            }
            console.warn('[SKAI batch] Auto-save failed for combo ' + (idx + 1) + ' (' + (combo && combo.label) + '). Reason: ' + _sfReason + '. Continuing batch.');
          } catch (_) {}
        }
        setTimeout(runNext, 400);
      }, 1, 1);
    });
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // onBatchEnd -- called when queue is exhausted or batch is stopped.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function onBatchEnd() {
    try { window.__SKAI_MLE_ACTIVE_BATCH_RUN__ = false; window.__SKAI_MLE_ALLOW_INTERNAL_BATCH_LAUNCH__ = false; } catch (_) {}
    try {
      window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_ACTIVE__ = false;
      window.__SKAI_BATCH_VARIANT_RUN_TOKEN__  = '';
    } catch (_) {}
    batchState.running = false;
    batchState.paused  = false;
    syncAliases();
    setPauseButtonLabel(false);
    var _endCompleted  = batchState.doneCount - batchState.failCount;
    var _endFailed     = batchState.failCount;
    var _endSaveFailed = batchState.saveFailCount || 0;
    var _endTotal      = BATCH_COMBOS.length;
    var _endSummary    = _endCompleted + ' completed';
    if (_endFailed > 0) { _endSummary += ', ' + _endFailed + ' failed'; }
    if (_endSaveFailed > 0) { _endSummary += ', ' + _endSaveFailed + ' save failed'; }
    _endSummary += ' of ' + _endTotal;
    setCurrentLabel(batchState.stopped ? 'Batch stopped. ' + _endSummary + '.' : 'All runs complete. ' + _endSummary + '.');
    updateProgress();
    try {
      console.log('[SKAI batch] onBatchEnd: ' + batchState.doneCount + '/' + _endTotal +
        ' combos done (' + _endFailed + ' failed, ' + _endSaveFailed + ' save-failed), stopped=' + batchState.stopped);
    } catch (_) {}
    var saveRow = qs('skai-batch-save-row');
    if (saveRow && batchState.doneCount > 0 &&
        (batchState.stopped || batchState.doneCount >= BATCH_COMBOS.length)) {
      var saveNote = qs('skai-batch-save-completion-note');
      if (saveNote) {
        var _failNote     = _endFailed > 0     ? ' <strong>' + _endFailed     + ' run' + (_endFailed     === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' failed</strong> (no numbers captured).' : '';
        var _saveFailNote = _endSaveFailed > 0 ? ' <strong>' + _endSaveFailed + ' run' + (_endSaveFailed === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' could not be saved automatically</strong> &mdash; use <strong>Re-save Selected</strong> to retry those.' : '';
        if (batchState.stopped && batchState.doneCount < BATCH_COMBOS.length) {
          saveNote.innerHTML = '<strong>Batch was stopped early.</strong> <strong>' +
            _endCompleted + ' completed, ' + (batchState.doneCount) + ' of ' + _endTotal + '</strong> ran.' + _failNote + _saveFailNote + ' ' +
            'Completed runs were saved automatically. Use <strong>Re-save Selected</strong> if needed.';
          saveNote.style.color       = '#92400e';
          saveNote.style.background  = '#fffbeb';
          saveNote.style.borderColor = '#fcd34d';
        } else if (_endFailed > 0 || _endSaveFailed > 0) {
          saveNote.innerHTML = '<strong>' + _endCompleted + ' of ' + _endTotal + ' runs completed successfully.</strong>' +
            _failNote + _saveFailNote + ' Successful runs were saved automatically to your dashboard.';
          saveNote.style.color       = '#92400e';
          saveNote.style.background  = '#fffbeb';
          saveNote.style.borderColor = '#fcd34d';
        } else {
          saveNote.innerHTML = '<strong>All ' + _endTotal +
            ' runs completed and were saved automatically to your dashboard.</strong> ' +
            'Use <strong>Re-save All</strong> or <strong>Re-save Selected</strong> only if needed.';
          saveNote.style.color       = '#065f46';
          saveNote.style.background  = '#f0fdf4';
          saveNote.style.borderColor = '#bbf7d0';
        }
      }
      saveRow.style.display = 'flex';
      try {
        var _legend = qs('skai-blend-opt-legend');
        if (_legend) {
          var _anyOpt = false;
          for (var _oli = 0; _oli < batchResults.length; _oli++) {
            var _olr = batchResults[_oli];
            if (_olr && _olr.blendOptimized && _olr.allowBlendOpt &&
                typeof _olr.selectedBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                typeof _olr.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                _olr.effectiveBlendAiPct !== _olr.selectedBlendAiPct) {
              _anyOpt = true; break;
            }
          }
          _legend.style.display = _anyOpt ? 'block' : 'none';
        }
      } catch (_) {}
    }
    var stopBtn = qs('skai-batch-stop');
    if (stopBtn) { stopBtn.disabled = true; }
    var pauseBtn = qs('skai-batch-pause');
    if (pauseBtn) { pauseBtn.disabled = true; }
  }

  function resetGrid() {
    var cells = document.querySelectorAll("#skai-batch-grid td[data-profile]");
    for (var i = 0; i < cells.length; i++) {
      cells[i].innerHTML = "Waiting";
      cells[i].style.background = "";
    }
  }

  function openDetail(idx) {
    var r = batchResults[idx];
    if (!r) { return; }
    var detail = qs("skai-batch-detail");
    var title = qs("skai-batch-detail-title");
    var body = qs("skai-batch-detail-body");
    if (!detail || !body) { return; }
    var titleText = r.combo.label;
    if (r.blendLabel) {
      var _dtOptimized = (r.blendOptimized && r.allowBlendOpt &&
                          typeof r.selectedBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                          typeof r.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                          r.effectiveBlendAiPct !== r.selectedBlendAiPct);
      if (_dtOptimized) {
        titleText += '  \u2014  ' + r.blendLabel + ' *opt (Selected: ' + r.selectedBlendAiPct + '% \u2192 Optimized: ' + r.effectiveBlendAiPct + '%)';
      } else {
        titleText += '  \u2014  ' + r.blendLabel;
      }
    }
    if (title) { title.textContent = titleText; }
    body.textContent = r.text || "(no result text)";
    detail.style.display = "block";
    try { detail.scrollIntoView({ behavior: "smooth", block: "nearest" }); } catch (_) {}
  }

  function setBatchSaveStatus(msg) {
    var el = qs("skai-batch-save-status");
    if (!el) { return; }
    if (msg) {
      el.textContent = msg;
      el.style.display = "block";
    } else {
      el.textContent = "";
      el.style.display = "none";
    }
  }

  function setBatchSaveBtnsDisabled(disabled) {
    var saveAll = qs("skai-batch-save-all");
    var saveSel = qs("skai-batch-save-selected");
    if (saveAll) { saveAll.disabled = disabled; }
    if (saveSel) { saveSel.disabled = disabled; }
  }

  function saveAllSequential(indices, doneCallback, position, total) {
    if (position === undefined) { position = 1; }
    if (total === undefined) { total = indices ? indices.length : 0; }
    if (!indices || indices.length === 0) {
      setBatchSaveStatus("");
      setBatchSaveBtnsDisabled(false);
      // [[SKAI_V153_HIVE_RESEARCH_BATCH_SAVE_FIX]]
      // The normal 9-run batch path recursively calls saveAllSequential(rest,...)
      // after a confirmed save. When the last save finishes, rest is empty.
      // Older code called doneCallback() with no success object, which made the
      // admin Hive iframe runner interpret a completed save as failed. Return an
      // explicit ok:true result so research assignments inherit the proven 9-run
      // save behavior without changing user-facing batch logic.
      if (doneCallback) { doneCallback({ ok: true, batch_save_mode: true, reason: 'all_requested_saves_confirmed' }); }
      return;
    }
    var idx = indices[0];
    var rest = indices.slice(1);
    var r = batchResults[idx];
    if (!r || !r.done) {
      saveAllSequential(rest, doneCallback, position, total);
      return;
    }

    // Wait for main numbers if training is still in progress (finish() may have
    // been called by the safety timer or by an early skai:done+skai:score:done
    // pair before scoring completed).  Poll every 2 s for up to 15 minutes.
    // [[SKAI_BATCH_SNAPSHOT_INTEGRITY_V1]]
    // A saved batch row must use the captured per-run snapshot. Live globals are
    // allowed only when this exact run is still the active run; otherwise the
    // latest visible result can overwrite every saved row with the same numbers.
    var _canUseLiveForThisSave = !!(
      r && r.runToken && batchState && batchState.running && batchState.token === r.runToken
    );
    var _bfNumsReady = !!(
      (r.mainNumbers && r.mainNumbers.length > 0) ||
      (r.finalPredictionSets && r.finalPredictionSets.length > 0) ||
      (r.dailyChosenCombos && r.dailyChosenCombos.length > 0) ||
      (_canUseLiveForThisSave && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length > 0)
    );
    if (!_bfNumsReady) {
      r._bfPollTick = (r._bfPollTick || 0) + 1;
      if (r._bfPollTick <= 450) { // 450 x 2 s = 15 min
        setBatchSaveStatus('Waiting for predictions to complete... (' + (r._bfPollTick * 2) + 's)');
        setTimeout(function() { saveAllSequential(indices, doneCallback, position, total); }, 2000);
        return;
      }
      // 15-minute wait exhausted -- proceed anyway (server will return empty_main_numbers
      // but at least the attempt is made rather than hanging indefinitely).
    }

    var statusMsg = "Saving " + position + " of " + total + "...";
    setBatchSaveStatus(statusMsg);
    setCurrentLabel(statusMsg);
    setBatchSaveBtnsDisabled(true);

    try {
      if (typeof window.skaiApplyCombo === 'function') {
        window.skaiApplyCombo(r.combo.profile, r.combo.strategy);
      } else {
        selectProfile(r.combo.profile);
        selectStrategy(r.combo.strategy);
      }
    } catch (_) {}
    if (r && r.combo && r.combo.mlePrecisionLock && r.combo.mleSettings) {
      if (typeof window.skaiApplySavedTemplate === 'function') {
        try { window.skaiApplySavedTemplate(r.combo.mleSettings); } catch (_) {}
      }
      try {
        if (window.SKAI_SETTINGS && typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS === 'object') {
          for (var __mk2 in r.combo.mleSettings) {
            if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(r.combo.mleSettings, __mk2)) { window.SKAI_SETTINGS[__mk2] = r.combo.mleSettings[__mk2]; }
          }
        }
      } catch (_) {}
    }

    var form = qs("skai-ai-save-form");
    if (!form) {
      saveAllSequential(rest, doneCallback, position + 1, total);
      return;
    }

    // --- Build the save payload directly from the batch result (no form-field restoration) ---
    // This is the simplified "run -> capture -> save -> next" flow:
    // all prediction data comes from r.* (captured at skai:score:done time), and static
    // metadata (CSRF token, game_id, lottery_id, module_tag, etc.) is read once from the form.

    // 1. Resolve main and extra numbers from the batch result with fallbacks
    var _bfIsDaily = !!(window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.isDaily || window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame)
                        && !window.SKAI_META.isStandardLotteryGame);
    var _bfNeedsStdFive = !!(window.SKAI_META && window.SKAI_META.isStandardLotteryGame
                        && window.SKAI_META.hasExtraBall
                        && !window.SKAI_META.isDaily
                        && !window.SKAI_META.isDailyDigitGame);
    var _mainNums  = [];
    var _extraNums = [];
    var _dailyStrings = [];

    if (_bfIsDaily) {
      var _dcPrimary = [];
      if (r.dailyChosenCombos && r.dailyChosenCombos.length) {
        for (var _dci = 0; _dci < r.dailyChosenCombos.length && _dailyStrings.length < 5; _dci++) {
          var _dcRow = r.dailyChosenCombos[_dci] || {};
          var _dcDisp = String(_dcRow.display || '').replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
          if (!_dcDisp && Array.isArray(_dcRow.combo)) { _dcDisp = _dcRow.combo.join(''); }
          if (_dcDisp) { _dailyStrings.push(_dcDisp); }
          if (!_dcPrimary.length && Array.isArray(_dcRow.combo) && _dcRow.combo.length) {
            _dcPrimary = _dcRow.combo.slice();
          }
        }
      }
      if (!_dcPrimary.length && r.mainNumbers && r.mainNumbers.length) {
        var _dcSrc = Array.isArray(r.mainNumbers[0]) ? r.mainNumbers[0] : r.mainNumbers;
        _dcPrimary = (typeof _dcSrc[0] === 'string')
          ? ((typeof window.SKAI_dailyDigitsFromDisplay === 'function')
            ? window.SKAI_dailyDigitsFromDisplay(_dcSrc[0], ((window.SKAI_META && +window.SKAI_META.pick) || 0))
            : _dcSrc[0].replace(/[^0-9]/g, '').split('').map(function(d){ return parseInt(d,10); }))
          : normalizeNumericArray(_dcSrc);
      }
      // [FIX-BATCH-DAILY-SAVE] If r.dailyChosenCombos was empty, _dailyStrings was not
      // built in the loop above.  Derive display strings from r.mainNumbers (if they are
      // already formatted as display strings, e.g. ['012','345']) or by joining _dcPrimary
      // digits.  _dailyStrings drives daily_top_combos_json, which PHP checks first to set
      // $isDailyGamePosted = true.  Without it, $norm() strips digit 0 for non-daily games,
      // leaving $mainArr empty for all-zero combos (e.g. Pick 3 "000") and returning
      // {"ok":false,"reason":"empty_main_numbers"} for every batch save on daily games.
      if (!_dailyStrings.length) {
        if (r.mainNumbers && r.mainNumbers.length && typeof r.mainNumbers[0] === 'string') {
          for (var _bfMnIdx = 0; _bfMnIdx < r.mainNumbers.length && _dailyStrings.length < 5; _bfMnIdx++) {
            var _bfDsStr = r.mainNumbers[_bfMnIdx].replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
            if (_bfDsStr) { _dailyStrings.push(_bfDsStr); }
          }
        }
        if (!_dailyStrings.length && _dcPrimary.length >= 2) {
          _dailyStrings.push(_dcPrimary.join(''));
        }
      }
      _mainNums = _dcPrimary.slice();
    } else {
      var _bfCollectStandardExtras = function() {
        var _cand = [];
        var _add = function(_arr) {
          var _n = normalizeNumericArray(_arr || []);
          var _u = [];
          var _i;
          for (_i = 0; _i < _n.length; _i++) {
            if (_u.indexOf(_n[_i]) === -1) { _u.push(_n[_i]); }
          }
          if (_u.length) { _cand.push(_u.slice(0, 5)); }
        };
        _add(r.extraNumbers || []);
        if (r.finalPredictionSets && r.finalPredictionSets.length) {
          var _fps0xLocal = (r.finalPredictionSets[0] && r.finalPredictionSets[0].extra) ? r.finalPredictionSets[0].extra : [];
          _add(_fps0xLocal);
        }
        if (r.fpsJson) {
          try {
            var _rf = JSON.parse(r.fpsJson);
            if (_rf && Array.isArray(_rf.extra_numbers)) { _add(_rf.extra_numbers); }
            if (_rf && Array.isArray(_rf.final_prediction_sets) && _rf.final_prediction_sets.length) {
              _add((_rf.final_prediction_sets[0] && _rf.final_prediction_sets[0].extra) ? _rf.final_prediction_sets[0].extra : []);
            }
            if (_rf && Array.isArray(_rf.top_5_prediction_sets) && _rf.top_5_prediction_sets.length) {
              _add((_rf.top_5_prediction_sets[0] && _rf.top_5_prediction_sets[0].extra) ? _rf.top_5_prediction_sets[0].extra : []);
            }
            if (_rf && _rf.primary_prediction_set && Array.isArray(_rf.primary_prediction_set.extra)) {
              _add(_rf.primary_prediction_set.extra);
            }
          } catch(_) {}
        }
        if (_canUseLiveForThisSave) {
          _add(window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ || []);
          _add(window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA || []);
          _add(window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered || []);
        }
        if (_canUseLiveForThisSave && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length) {
          var _top5 = [];
          for (var _txi = 0; _txi < window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length && _top5.length < 5; _txi++) {
            var _txn = parseInt(window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_txi] && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_txi].num, 10);
            if (isFinite(_txn) && _top5.indexOf(_txn) === -1) { _top5.push(_txn); }
          }
          _add(_top5);
        }
        var _ci;
        for (_ci = 0; _ci < _cand.length; _ci++) {
          if (_cand[_ci].length >= 5) { return _cand[_ci].slice(0, 5); }
        }
        var _longest = [];
        for (_ci = 0; _ci < _cand.length; _ci++) {
          if (_cand[_ci].length > _longest.length) { _longest = _cand[_ci]; }
        }
        return _longest.slice(0, 5);
      };
      // [[SKAI_BATCH_SNAPSHOT_INTEGRITY_V1]]
      // In batch save mode, the per-run snapshot is the source of truth. Do not
      // read skaiSaveMainOrdered first; that global may contain the latest visible
      // result and can stamp the same prediction onto all nine saved rows.
      if (r.mainNumbers && r.mainNumbers.length) {
        _mainNums = normalizeNumericArray(r.mainNumbers).slice(0, 20);
      } else if (_canUseLiveForThisSave && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered && window.skaiSaveMainOrdered.length) {
        _mainNums = normalizeNumericArray(window.skaiSaveMainOrdered).slice(0, 20);
      }
      // Fallback 1: finalPredictionSets (snapshot)
      if (!_mainNums.length && r.finalPredictionSets && r.finalPredictionSets.length) {
        var _fps0 = r.finalPredictionSets[0] || {};
        var _fps0m = Array.isArray(_fps0.main) ? _fps0.main : (Array.isArray(_fps0.values) ? _fps0.values : []);
        if (_fps0m.length) { _mainNums = normalizeNumericArray(_fps0m); }
      }
      // Fallback 2: SKAI_TOP_MAIN global (still set from this run's scoring)
      if (!_mainNums.length && _canUseLiveForThisSave && window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN && window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN.length) {
        _mainNums = window.SKAI_TOP_MAIN.slice(0, 20).map(function(x){ return x.num; }).filter(function(n){ return isFinite(n); });
      }
      // Fallback 3: DOM .nball elements -- mirrors the mainsArrDom DOM fallback in the
      // regular save (lines 41784-41788 / 41813).  Last resort so batch saves never
      // fail with empty_main_numbers when all in-memory sources are unavailable.
      if (!_mainNums.length && _canUseLiveForThisSave) {
        try {
          var _domBalls = document.querySelectorAll(
            '#aiPredictedNumbers .nball, #skai-ai-panel .nball, .skai-ai-main .nball'
          );
          var _domNums = [];
          for (var _dbi = 0; _dbi < _domBalls.length && _dbi < 20; _dbi++) {
            var _dbt = (_domBalls[_dbi].textContent || '').replace(/\D/g, '').trim();
            if (_dbt && /^\d+$/.test(_dbt)) { _domNums.push(parseInt(_dbt, 10)); }
          }
          if (_domNums.length) { _mainNums = normalizeNumericArray(_domNums); }
        } catch (_) {}
      }
      // Fallback 4: Rank window.SKAI_lastProbs directly (raw ML output).
      // Used when SKAI_scoreAndRender returned early (dsOK/pOK gate) but training
      // still completed and stored per-number probabilities.  Produces the same
      // top-20 ordering the scoring engine would compute, without the skip-prior blend.
      if (!_mainNums.length && _canUseLiveForThisSave) {
        try {
          var _lpArr = window.SKAI_lastProbs;
          if (Array.isArray(_lpArr) && _lpArr.length) {
            var _lpRanked = [];
            for (var _lpi = 0; _lpi < _lpArr.length; _lpi++) {
              if (typeof _lpArr[_lpi] === 'number' && isFinite(_lpArr[_lpi])) {
                _lpRanked.push({ num: _lpi + 1, p: _lpArr[_lpi] });
              }
            }
            _lpRanked.sort(function(a, b) { return b.p - a.p; });
            for (var _lpk = 0; _lpk < Math.min(20, _lpRanked.length); _lpk++) {
              _mainNums.push(_lpRanked[_lpk].num);
            }
          }
        } catch (_) {}
      }
      _extraNums = _bfNeedsStdFive ? _bfCollectStandardExtras() : ((r.extraNumbers && r.extraNumbers.length) ? normalizeNumericArray(r.extraNumbers).slice(0, 5) : []);
      if (!_bfNeedsStdFive && !_extraNums.length && r.finalPredictionSets && r.finalPredictionSets.length) {
        var _fps0x = (r.finalPredictionSets[0] && r.finalPredictionSets[0].extra) ? r.finalPredictionSets[0].extra : [];
        _extraNums = normalizeNumericArray(_fps0x).slice(0, 5);
      }
      if (!_bfNeedsStdFive && !_extraNums.length && _canUseLiveForThisSave && window.SKAI_META && window.SKAI_META.hasExtraBall) {
        var _bfLiveExtra = window.__SKAI_LAST_EXTRA__ || window.SKAI_LAST_EXTRA || window.skaiSaveExtraOrdered || [];
        if (_bfLiveExtra && _bfLiveExtra.length) {
          _extraNums = normalizeNumericArray(_bfLiveExtra).slice(0, 5);
        }
        if (!_extraNums.length && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length) {
          var _bfTopX = [];
          for (var _bfti = 0; _bfti < window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA.length && _bfTopX.length < 5; _bfti++) {
            if (window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_bfti] && window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_bfti].num != null) {
              _bfTopX.push(window.SKAI_TOP_EXTRA[_bfti].num);
            }
          }
          if (_bfTopX.length) { _extraNums = normalizeNumericArray(_bfTopX).slice(0, 5); }
        }
      }
      // [FIX-BUG-B] No-extra-ball lottery must never carry an extra.
      // Mirrors skaiPrepareAiSave which explicitly zeros extras when hasExtraBall
      // is false. Prevents stale snapshot or FPS data from bleeding in.
      if (window.SKAI_META && !window.SKAI_META.hasExtraBall) {
        _extraNums = [];
      }
    }

    // [EXTRA-READY-GATE] For ANY lottery that has an extra ball (daily or regular),
    // do not save until the extra numbers are confirmed populated.
    // * Non-daily lotteries: extra readiness = _extraNums was populated above.
    // * Daily lotteries:     extra readiness = r.dailyExtraDigits (bonus digits)
    //                        was written by the daily extra ML run.
    // If extras are still absent, poll every 2 s for up to 5 minutes, then
    // proceed anyway so the save attempt is never lost.
    var _bfExtraReady = _bfIsDaily
      ? !!(r.dailyExtraDigits && r.dailyExtraDigits.length)
      : (_bfNeedsStdFive ? (_extraNums.length >= 5) : (_extraNums.length > 0));
    if (window.SKAI_META && window.SKAI_META.hasExtraBall && !_bfExtraReady) {
      r._bfExtraPollTick = (r._bfExtraPollTick || 0) + 1;
      if (r._bfExtraPollTick <= 150) { // 150 x 2 s = 5 min
        setBatchSaveStatus('Waiting for extra numbers to complete... (' + (r._bfExtraPollTick * 2) + 's)');
        setTimeout(function() { saveAllSequential(indices, doneCallback, position, total); }, 2000);
        return;
      }
      if (_bfNeedsStdFive) {
        setBatchSaveStatus('Save failed: standard extras not finalized for run ' + (idx + 1) + '.');
        setCurrentLabel('Save failed at run ' + (idx + 1) + '.');
        setBatchSaveBtnsDisabled(false);
        if (window.skaiShowSaveToast) { window.skaiShowSaveToast('Save failed at run ' + (idx + 1) + ': extras_not_ready'); }
        if (doneCallback) {
          doneCallback({ ok: false, failedIndex: idx, detail: { reason: 'extras_not_ready', message: 'Standard extra payload did not finalize to 5 numbers.' } });
        }
        return;
      }
      // 5-minute wait exhausted -- proceed anyway so the save attempt is not lost.
    }

    // 2. Build numbers_json payload
    var _njPayload = { main_numbers: _mainNums, extra_numbers: _extraNums };
    if (_bfIsDaily && _dailyStrings.length) {
      var _bfBonusDigits = (r.dailyExtraDigits && r.dailyExtraDigits.length) ? r.dailyExtraDigits.slice(0, 3) : [];
      _njPayload.main_numbers               = _dailyStrings.slice();
      // [FIX-BATCH-BONUS] Also place bonus digits in extra_numbers so PHP reads them
      // into $extraArr via $nums['extra_numbers'].  Previously they were only in
      // daily_bonus_digits (a key PHP never reads for $extraArr), so $extraArr was []
      // and daily_bonus_digits_json was never saved.
      _njPayload.extra_numbers              = _bfBonusDigits.slice();
      _njPayload.extra_ball_numbers         = _bfBonusDigits.slice();
      _njPayload.daily_top_combo_strings    = _dailyStrings.slice();
      _njPayload.daily_primary_combo_digits = _mainNums.slice();
      _njPayload.daily_bonus_digits         = _bfBonusDigits.slice();
    }
    var _numbersJsonStr = '';
    try { _numbersJsonStr = JSON.stringify(_njPayload); } catch(_) {}

    // 3. Read all form fields once (gets CSRF token, game_id, lottery_id, module_tag, etc.)
    var _payload = {};
    try {
      var _frmEls = form.elements;
      for (var _fei = 0; _fei < _frmEls.length; _fei++) {
        var _fel = _frmEls[_fei];
        if (!_fel.name) { continue; }
        if ((_fel.type === 'checkbox' || _fel.type === 'radio') && !_fel.checked) { continue; }
        _payload[_fel.name] = _fel.value || '';
      }
    } catch(_) {}

    // 4. Override prediction and per-run fields directly from the batch result
    var _s = r.settingsSnapshot || {};
    var _blendAi  = (typeof r.blendAiPct          === 'number' && isFinite(r.blendAiPct))          ? r.blendAiPct          : 0;
    var _selBlend = (typeof r.selectedBlendAiPct  === 'number' && isFinite(r.selectedBlendAiPct))  ? r.selectedBlendAiPct  : _blendAi;
    var _effBlend = (typeof r.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number' && isFinite(r.effectiveBlendAiPct)) ? r.effectiveBlendAiPct : _blendAi;
    var _profLabels  = { balanced: 'Balanced', explorative: 'Wider Search', conservative: 'Safer Range' };
    var _stratLabels = { ai: 'AI-focused', hybrid: 'Balanced', skip: 'Pattern-focused' };
    var _profVal  = String(r.combo.profile  || 'balanced');
    var _stratVal = String(r.combo.strategy || 'hybrid');
    var _runMode  = (_profLabels[_profVal]  || 'Balanced') + ' - ' + (_stratLabels[_stratVal] || 'Balanced');

    // Prediction data
    var _snapshotSig = '';
    try { _snapshotSig = JSON.stringify({main: _mainNums || [], extra: _extraNums || [], daily: _dailyStrings || []}); } catch (_) { _snapshotSig = ''; }
    _payload['skai_batch_snapshot_signature'] = _snapshotSig;
    _payload['skai_batch_snapshot_source']    = _canUseLiveForThisSave ? 'active_live_fallback_or_snapshot' : 'captured_run_snapshot';
    _payload['numbers_json']           = _numbersJsonStr;
    _payload['main_numbers']           = JSON.stringify(_mainNums);
    _payload['extra_ball_numbers']     = _extraNums.length ? JSON.stringify(_extraNums) : '';
    _payload['main_numbers_csv']       = _mainNums.join(',');
    _payload['extra_ball_numbers_csv'] = _extraNums.join(',');
    if (r.fpsJson) { _payload['top_combos_json'] = r.fpsJson; }
    if (_bfIsDaily && _dailyStrings.length) {
      _payload['main_numbers']     = JSON.stringify(_dailyStrings.slice());
      _payload['main_numbers_csv'] = _dailyStrings.join(',');
      if (r.dailyChosenCombos && r.dailyChosenCombos.length) {
        try { _payload['daily_top_combos_json'] = JSON.stringify(r.dailyChosenCombos); } catch(_) {}
      } else {
        // Derive a minimal daily_top_combos_json from _dailyStrings so that PHP's
        // direct check (!empty($dailyTopCombsStr)) sets $isDailyGamePosted = true
        // unconditionally -- regardless of lottery-config key names.
        var _dtcMin = [];
        for (var _dtmi = 0; _dtmi < _dailyStrings.length; _dtmi++) {
          var _dtmDigits = [];
          var _dtmStr = _dailyStrings[_dtmi];
          for (var _dtmc = 0; _dtmc < _dtmStr.length; _dtmc++) { _dtmDigits.push(parseInt(_dtmStr[_dtmc], 10)); }
          _dtcMin.push({ rank: _dtmi + 1, combo: _dtmDigits, display: _dtmStr, score: 0 });
        }
        try { _payload['daily_top_combos_json'] = JSON.stringify(_dtcMin); } catch(_) {}
      }
      // [FIX-BATCH-BONUS] Ensure bonus digits reach PHP $extraArr via extra_ball_numbers
      if (_bfBonusDigits && _bfBonusDigits.length) {
        _payload['extra_ball_numbers']     = JSON.stringify(_bfBonusDigits.slice());
        _payload['extra_ball_numbers_csv'] = _bfBonusDigits.join(',');
      }
    }
    // [FIX-BATCH-DAILY-META] Explicitly set pick_length and allow_zero for daily batch saves
    // so PHP can detect the game type even when form field was cleared between runs.
    if (_bfIsDaily) {
      var _bfPickLen = parseInt((window.SKAI_META && (window.SKAI_META.pick || window.SKAI_META.pickSize)) || 0, 10) || 0;
      if (_bfPickLen > 0) { _payload['pick_length'] = String(_bfPickLen); }
      _payload['allow_zero'] = '1';
    }
    // Per-run settings
    _payload['risk_profile']               = _profVal;
    _payload['strategy']                   = _stratVal;
    _payload['skai_mode_primary']          = _profVal;
    _payload['skai_mode_method']           = _stratVal;
    _payload['skai_mode_risk']             = _profVal;
    _payload['skai_run_mode']              = _runMode;
    _payload['skai_blend_ai_pct']          = String(_blendAi);
    _payload['skai_blend_skip_pct']        = '';
    _payload['skai_selected_blend_ai_pct'] = String(_selBlend);
    _payload['skai_effective_blend_ai_pct']= String(_effBlend);
    _payload['skai_blend_optimized']       = r.blendOptimized  ? '1' : '0';
    _payload['skai_allow_blend_opt']       = r.allowBlendOpt   ? '1' : '0';
    _payload['snapshot_run_uuid']          = '';
    if (typeof r.temperature       === 'number' && isFinite(r.temperature))       { _payload['sampling_temperature'] = String(r.temperature); }
    if (typeof r.diversityPenalty  === 'number' && isFinite(r.diversityPenalty))  { _payload['diversity_penalty']    = String(r.diversityPenalty); }
    if (typeof _s.epochs        !== 'undefined') { _payload['epochs']          = String(_s.epochs); }
    if (typeof _s.batchSize     !== 'undefined') { _payload['batch_size']      = String(_s.batchSize); }
    if (typeof _s.dropout       !== 'undefined') { _payload['dropout_rate']    = String(_s.dropout); }
    if (typeof _s.lr            !== 'undefined') { _payload['learning_rate']   = String(_s.lr); }
    if (typeof _s.recencyDecay  !== 'undefined') { _payload['recency_decay']   = String(_s.recencyDecay); }
    if (typeof _s.gapScale      !== 'undefined') { _payload['gap_scale']       = String(_s.gapScale); }
    if (typeof _s.laplaceK      !== 'undefined') { _payload['laplace_k']       = String(_s.laplaceK); }
    if (typeof _s.skipGamma     !== 'undefined') { _payload['skip_gamma']      = String(_s.skipGamma); }
    if (typeof _s.windowSize    !== 'undefined') { _payload['skai_window_size']= String(_s.windowSize); }
    // Batch-mode identity (always override to ensure PHP returns JSON)
    _payload['batch_save_mode']  = '1';
    _payload['batch_save_index'] = String(idx + 1);
    _payload['batch_save_total'] = String(total || indices.length || 1);
    _payload['batch_save_label'] = String((r.combo && r.combo.label) || '');
    // [[SKAI_V122_HIVE_LEARNING_CONTRACT]] Carry hive research metadata into every
    // batch-save POST. The URL fallback covers same-page guided mode; the per-run
    // settings cover server-loaded MyLottoExpert batch rows.
    function _bfUrlParam(name) {
      try { var p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || ''); return p.get(name) || ''; } catch (_) { return ''; }
    }
    var _hiveQueueId = (_s && typeof _s._mle_research_queue_id !== 'undefined') ? _s._mle_research_queue_id : _bfUrlParam('mle_research_queue_id');
    var _hiveAssignId = (_s && typeof _s._mle_research_assignment_id !== 'undefined') ? _s._mle_research_assignment_id : _bfUrlParam('mle_research_assignment_id');
    var _hiveType = (_s && typeof _s._mle_research_type !== 'undefined') ? _s._mle_research_type : _bfUrlParam('mle_research_type');
    var _hiveFingerprint = (_s && typeof _s._mle_research_settings_fingerprint !== 'undefined') ? _s._mle_research_settings_fingerprint : _bfUrlParam('mle_settings_fingerprint');
    var _hiveSettingKey = (_s && typeof _s._mle_global_learning_setting_key !== 'undefined') ? _s._mle_global_learning_setting_key : '';
    if (_hiveQueueId !== '' && _hiveQueueId !== null && typeof _hiveQueueId !== 'undefined') { _payload['mle_research_queue_id'] = String(_hiveQueueId); }
    if (_hiveAssignId !== '' && _hiveAssignId !== null && typeof _hiveAssignId !== 'undefined') { _payload['mle_research_assignment_id'] = String(_hiveAssignId); }
    if (_hiveType !== '' && _hiveType !== null && typeof _hiveType !== 'undefined') { _payload['mle_research_type'] = String(_hiveType); }
    if (_hiveFingerprint !== '' && _hiveFingerprint !== null && typeof _hiveFingerprint !== 'undefined') { _payload['mle_settings_fingerprint'] = String(_hiveFingerprint); }
    if (_hiveSettingKey !== '' && _hiveSettingKey !== null && typeof _hiveSettingKey !== 'undefined') { _payload['mle_research_setting_key'] = String(_hiveSettingKey); }
    if (_bfUrlParam('mle_guided_mode') !== '') { _payload['mle_guided_mode'] = _bfUrlParam('mle_guided_mode'); }
    if (_bfUrlParam('mle_command_source') !== '') { _payload['mle_command_source'] = _bfUrlParam('mle_command_source'); }

    var _mleBatch = (r.combo && r.combo.mleBatch) ? r.combo.mleBatch : null;
    var _ctxBatchId = (window.MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT && window.MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT.batch_id) ? window.MLE_PRECISION_BATCH_CONTEXT.batch_id : '';
    var _batchIdResolved = skaiMleResolveBatchId((_mleBatch && _mleBatch.batch_id) || _ctxBatchId || 0);
    var _batchOrderResolved = parseInt((_mleBatch && _mleBatch.batch_run_order) || _payload['batch_save_index'] || (idx + 1), 10) || (idx + 1);
    if (_batchIdResolved > 0 || (r.combo && r.combo.mlePrecisionLock)) {
      _payload['origin_source'] = 'mle_precision_lock_batch';
      if (_batchIdResolved > 0) { _payload['source_batch_id'] = String(_batchIdResolved); }
      if (_batchIdResolved > 0) { _payload['batch_id'] = String(_batchIdResolved); }
      if (_mleBatch && _mleBatch.batch_run_id) { _payload['source_batch_run_id'] = String(_mleBatch.batch_run_id); }
      _payload['source_batch_type'] = String((_mleBatch && _mleBatch.batch_type) || 'SKAI Precision Lock Batch');
      _payload['source_batch_run_order'] = String(_batchOrderResolved);
      _payload['source_batch_origin'] = 'mle_precision_lock_batch';
      _payload['batch_control_flag'] = (_mleBatch && _mleBatch.is_control) ? '1' : '0';
      _payload['source_batch_test_variable'] = String((_mleBatch && _mleBatch.test_variable) || '');
      _payload['source_batch_test_value'] = String((_mleBatch && _mleBatch.test_value) || '');
    }

    // 5. Serialize payload to POST body
    var _bfPostData = [];
    var _payloadKeys = Object.keys(_payload);
    for (var _pki = 0; _pki < _payloadKeys.length; _pki++) {
      var _pk = _payloadKeys[_pki];
      _bfPostData.push(encodeURIComponent(_pk) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(_payload[_pk] !== null && _payload[_pk] !== undefined ? _payload[_pk] : ''));
    }
    var _bfPostBody = _bfPostData.join('&');
    var _bfPostUrl  = form.getAttribute('action') || (window.location.href.split('#')[0]);

    var _saveResolved = false;
    var _saveTimeout  = null;
    var _onSaveComplete = function (_detail) {
      if (_saveResolved) { return; }
      _saveResolved = true;
      try { if (_saveTimeout) { clearTimeout(_saveTimeout); } } catch (_) {}
      if (_detail && _detail.ok) {
        try { console.log('[SKAI BATCH SAVE CONFIRMED]', _detail); } catch (_) {}
        setBatchSaveStatus('Saved ' + position + ' of ' + total + '.');
        if (window.skaiShowSaveToast) { window.skaiShowSaveToast('Saved \u2713'); }
        saveAllSequential(rest, doneCallback, position + 1, total);
      } else {
        var _msg = (_detail && (_detail.message || _detail.reason || _detail.error)) ? String(_detail.message || _detail.reason || _detail.error) : 'Unknown save failure';
        try {
          console.error('[SKAI BATCH SAVE FAILED]'
            + ' index=' + (idx + 1) + '/' + total
            + ' label="' + ((r.combo && r.combo.label) || '') + '"'
            + ' reason=' + String((_detail && _detail.reason) || 'unknown')
            + ' message="' + String((_detail && _detail.message) || '') + '"'
            + ' http_status=' + String((_detail && _detail.http_status) || '')
            + ((_detail && _detail.response_preview) ? (' response_preview="' + String(_detail.response_preview).substring(0, 300) + '"') : ''),
            _detail
          );
        } catch (_) {}
        setBatchSaveStatus('Save failed at run ' + (idx + 1) + ' of ' + total + '.');
        setCurrentLabel('Save failed at run ' + (idx + 1) + '.');
        setBatchSaveBtnsDisabled(false);
        if (window.skaiShowSaveToast) { window.skaiShowSaveToast('Save failed at run ' + (idx + 1) + '.'); }
        if (doneCallback) { doneCallback({ ok: false, failedIndex: idx, detail: _detail }); }
      }
    };
    if (skaiMleGuidedRequired() && !skaiMleGuidedCancelled() && _batchIdResolved <= 0) {
      _onSaveComplete({
        ok: false,
        batch_save_mode: true,
        batch_index: idx + 1,
        reason: 'batch_context_missing',
        message: 'Guided batch link is missing batch_id. Reopen SKAI from MyLottoExpert so this run can save with tracked batch context.'
      });
      return;
    }
    _saveTimeout = setTimeout(function () {
      _onSaveComplete({ ok: false, batch_save_mode: true, batch_index: idx + 1, reason: 'save_timeout', message: 'No save confirmation received within 180 seconds.' });
    }, 180000);
    try {
      console.log('[SKAI batch] PAYLOAD PREPARED FOR SAVE: run ' + (idx + 1) + ' of ' + total
        + ' | label=' + String((r.combo && r.combo.label) || '')
        + ' | mainNums=' + JSON.stringify(r.mainNumbers || [])
        + ' | extraNums=' + JSON.stringify(r.extraNumbers || []));
    } catch(_) {}

    var _bfXhr = new XMLHttpRequest();
    _bfXhr.open('POST', _bfPostUrl, true);
    _bfXhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
    _bfXhr.setRequestHeader('X-Requested-With', 'XMLHttpRequest');
    _bfXhr.onreadystatechange = function () {
      if (_bfXhr.readyState !== 4) { return; }
      try {
        var _bfRespPreviewLog = String(_bfXhr.responseText || '').substring(0, 400);
        console.log('[SKAI SAVE] BACKEND RESPONSE RECEIVED: http_status=' + _bfXhr.status
          + ' batch_index=' + (idx + 1)
          + ' resp_len=' + String(_bfXhr.responseText || '').length
          + ' preview="' + _bfRespPreviewLog + '"');
      } catch(_) {}
      var _bfHttpOk  = (_bfXhr.status >= 200 && _bfXhr.status < 400);
      var _bfResp    = String(_bfXhr.responseText || '');
      var _bfParsed  = null;
      if (_bfResp) {
        // First attempt: clean JSON
        try { _bfParsed = JSON.parse(_bfResp); } catch (_) {}
        // Second attempt: brace-match extraction -- handles cases where Joomla's
        // rendering pipeline appends HTML after the JSON (e.g. if $app->close()
        // triggered template output before exit()).  We look for '{"ok"' specifically
        // so we don't accidentally parse a { inside some HTML attribute.
        if (!_bfParsed) {
          var _bfOkPos = _bfResp.indexOf('{"ok"');
          if (_bfOkPos < 0) { _bfOkPos = _bfResp.indexOf('{ "ok"'); }
          if (_bfOkPos >= 0) {
            var _bfD = 0, _bfE = -1;
            for (var _bfI = _bfOkPos; _bfI < _bfResp.length; _bfI++) {
              if (_bfResp[_bfI] === '{') { _bfD++; }
              else if (_bfResp[_bfI] === '}') { if (--_bfD === 0) { _bfE = _bfI; break; } }
            }
            if (_bfE > _bfOkPos) { try { _bfParsed = JSON.parse(_bfResp.slice(_bfOkPos, _bfE + 1)); } catch (_) {} }
          }
        }
      }
      var _bfDetail  = {
        ok: false, http_status: _bfXhr.status,
        batch_save_mode: true, batch_index: idx + 1,
        batch_total: total, batch_label: (r.combo && r.combo.label) || ''
      };
      if (_bfParsed && typeof _bfParsed.ok !== 'undefined') {
        _bfDetail.ok = !!_bfParsed.ok;
        if (_bfParsed.reason)      { _bfDetail.reason      = String(_bfParsed.reason); }
        if (_bfParsed.message)     { _bfDetail.message     = String(_bfParsed.message); }
        if (_bfParsed.error)       { _bfDetail.error       = String(_bfParsed.error); }
        if (_bfParsed.row_id)      { _bfDetail.row_id      = parseInt(_bfParsed.row_id, 10) || 0; }
        if (_bfParsed.batch_index) { _bfDetail.batch_index = parseInt(_bfParsed.batch_index, 10) || (idx + 1); }
      } else {
        // Fallback heuristic for non-JSON responses (e.g. Joomla page redirect or HTML render)
        // Log the first 500 chars of the response to help diagnose what PHP returned.
        try {
          var _bfRespPreview = _bfResp.length > 0 ? _bfResp.substring(0, 500) : '(empty)';
          console.warn('[SKAI SAVE] Non-JSON response received for batch save. Preview:', _bfRespPreview);
        } catch (_) {}
        var _bfLooksError = !_bfHttpOk
          || _bfResp.indexOf("couldn") >= 0
          || _bfResp.indexOf("alert-error") >= 0
          || _bfResp.indexOf("alert-warning") >= 0
          || _bfResp.indexOf("No main numbers") >= 0
          || _bfResp.indexOf("Save failed") >= 0;
        var _bfLooksOk = _bfHttpOk && !_bfLooksError && (
          _bfResp.indexOf("saved") >= 0 || _bfResp.indexOf("Saved") >= 0 ||
          _bfResp.indexOf("dashboard") >= 0 || _bfResp.indexOf("success") >= 0
        );
        _bfDetail.ok = _bfLooksOk;
        if (!_bfDetail.ok) {
          _bfDetail.reason  = _bfLooksError ? 'response_error' : 'unrecognized_response';
          _bfDetail.message = 'Server response not recognized as save confirmation. HTTP '
            + _bfXhr.status + '. Check browser console.';
          _bfDetail.response_preview = _bfResp ? _bfResp.substring(0, 200) : '(empty)';
        }
      }
      _onSaveComplete(_bfDetail);
    };
    // Handle network errors and aborts so the batch never silently hangs
    _bfXhr.onerror = function () {
      _onSaveComplete({ ok: false, batch_save_mode: true, batch_index: idx + 1,
        reason: 'network_error', message: 'XHR network error (connection refused or CORS).' });
    };
    _bfXhr.onabort = function () {
      _onSaveComplete({ ok: false, batch_save_mode: true, batch_index: idx + 1,
        reason: 'xhr_aborted', message: 'XHR was aborted.' });
    };
    try {
      _bfXhr.send(_bfPostBody);
    } catch (_bfSendErr) {
      _onSaveComplete({
        ok: false, batch_save_mode: true, batch_index: idx + 1,
        reason: 'xhr_send_error',
        message: _bfSendErr ? String(_bfSendErr.message || _bfSendErr) : 'XHR send failed'
      });
    }
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // wireButtons -- event wiring for all batch panel controls.
  // Includes: launch, confirm, cancel, stop, pause/resume, clear, detail, save.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function wireButtons() {
    var launchBtn   = qs('skai-batch-launch');
    var modal       = qs('skai-batch-modal');
    var confirmBtn  = qs('skai-batch-confirm');
    var cancelBtn   = qs('skai-batch-cancel');
    var stopBtn     = qs('skai-batch-stop');
    var pauseBtn    = qs('skai-batch-pause');
    var clearBtn    = qs('skai-batch-clear');
    var detailClose = qs('skai-batch-detail-close');
    var saveAllBtn  = qs('skai-batch-save-all');
    var saveSelBtn  = qs('skai-batch-save-selected');

    if (launchBtn) {
      launchBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (launchBtn.disabled || launchBtn.getAttribute('aria-disabled') === 'true') { return; }
        if (modal) { modal.style.display = 'flex'; }
      }, false);
    }

    if (cancelBtn) {
      cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (modal) { modal.style.display = 'none'; }
      }, false);
    }

    if (modal) {
      modal.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        if (e.target === modal) { modal.style.display = 'none'; }
      }, false);
    }

    if (confirmBtn) {
      confirmBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        hideModal();
        // Guard: prevent duplicate batch start.
        if (batchState.running) { return; }
        // Reset batch state fully before starting.
        batchState.running       = true;
        batchState.paused        = false;
        batchState.stopped       = false;
        batchState.index         = 0;
        batchState.doneCount     = 0;
        batchState.failCount     = 0;
        batchState.saveFailCount = 0;
        batchState.token         = null;
        batchState.pauseResume   = null;
        batchResults = [];
        syncAliases();
        try {
          console.log('[SKAI batch] BATCH RUN START: ' + BATCH_COMBOS.length + ' combos queued');
        } catch (_) {}
        var saveRow = qs('skai-batch-save-row');
        if (saveRow) { saveRow.style.display = 'none'; }
        var stopBtn2 = qs('skai-batch-stop');
        if (stopBtn2) { stopBtn2.disabled = false; }
        if (pauseBtn) { pauseBtn.disabled = false; setPauseButtonLabel(false); }
        var detailEl = qs('skai-batch-detail');
        if (detailEl) { detailEl.style.display = 'none'; }
        resetGrid();
        showPanel();
        updateProgress();
        setCurrentLabel('Starting batch run...');
        setTimeout(runNext, 400);
      }, false);
    }

    if (stopBtn) {
      stopBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        var _wasPaused = batchState.paused;
        batchState.stopped = true;
        batchState.running = false;
        batchState.paused  = false;
        batchState.pauseResume = null;
        syncAliases();
        if (pauseBtn) { pauseBtn.disabled = true; setPauseButtonLabel(false); }
        setCurrentLabel('Stopping...');
        // If the batch was paused between runs (no active run in flight),
        // onBatchEnd() will never be called by a run-completion callback.
        // Call it directly here so the UI updates correctly (progress text,
        // save row, button states).
        if (_wasPaused) { onBatchEnd(); }
      }, false);
    }

    if (pauseBtn) {
      pauseBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (!batchState.running && !batchState.paused) { return; }
        if (batchState.paused) {
          // Resume: restore running state and continue queue.
          batchState.paused  = false;
          batchState.running = true;
          syncAliases();
          setPauseButtonLabel(false);
          setCurrentLabel('Resumed...');
          updateProgress();
          if (typeof batchState.pauseResume === 'function') {
            var resume = batchState.pauseResume;
            batchState.pauseResume = null;
            setTimeout(resume, 100);
          }
        } else {
          // Pause: stop queue after current run completes.
          batchState.paused  = true;
          batchState.running = true; // still "active", just paused between runs
          syncAliases();
          setPauseButtonLabel(true);
          setCurrentLabel('Pausing after current run...');
          updateProgress();
        }
      }, false);
    }

    if (clearBtn) {
      clearBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        batchState.stopped     = true;
        batchState.running     = false;
        batchState.paused      = false;
        batchState.index       = 0;
        batchState.doneCount   = 0;
        batchState.failCount   = 0;
        batchState.saveFailCount = 0;
        batchState.token       = null;
        batchState.pauseResume = null;
        batchResults = [];
        syncAliases();
        try { sessionStorage.removeItem(SESSION_KEY); } catch (_) {}
        try { localStorage.removeItem(LS_STATE_KEY); } catch (_) {}
        resetGrid();
        updateProgress();
        setCurrentLabel('Ready');
        if (pauseBtn) { pauseBtn.disabled = true; setPauseButtonLabel(false); }
        var detail2 = qs('skai-batch-detail');
        if (detail2) { detail2.style.display = 'none'; }
        var saveRow2 = qs('skai-batch-save-row');
        if (saveRow2) { saveRow2.style.display = 'none'; }
      }, false);
    }

    if (detailClose) {
      detailClose.addEventListener('click', function () {
        var d = qs('skai-batch-detail');
        if (d) { d.style.display = 'none'; }
      }, false);
    }

    var grid = qs('skai-batch-grid');
    if (grid) {
      grid.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        var t = e.target;
        if (t && t.getAttribute('data-batch-view') !== null) {
          try { e.preventDefault(); } catch (_) {}
          openDetail(parseInt(t.getAttribute('data-batch-view'), 10));
        }
      }, false);
    }

    if (saveAllBtn) {
      saveAllBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (!window.confirm('This will re-save each completed run to your dashboard. Runs that were already auto-saved will be saved again. Continue?')) { return; }
        var indices = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < batchResults.length; i++) {
          if (batchResults[i] && batchResults[i].done) { indices.push(i); }
        }
        if (indices.length === 0) { alert('No completed runs to save.'); return; }
        var saveAllTotal = indices.length;
        saveAllSequential(indices, function () {
          setBatchSaveStatus('All ' + saveAllTotal + ' runs saved.');
          setCurrentLabel('All ' + saveAllTotal + ' runs saved.');
          if (window.skaiShowSaveToast) { window.skaiShowSaveToast('All ' + saveAllTotal + ' runs saved.'); }
        }, 1, saveAllTotal);
      }, false);
    }

    if (saveSelBtn) {
      saveSelBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        var available = [];
        for (var i = 0; i < batchResults.length; i++) {
          if (batchResults[i] && batchResults[i].done) { available.push(i); }
        }
        if (available.length === 0) { alert('No completed runs to save.'); return; }
        var labels = [];
        for (var j = 0; j < available.length; j++) {
          labels.push((j + 1) + '. ' + batchResults[available[j]].combo.label);
        }
        var input = window.prompt(
          'Enter the numbers (comma-separated) of the runs you want to save:\n\n' + labels.join('\n'),
          '1'
        );
        if (!input) { return; }
        var chosen = [];
        var parts = input.split(',');
        for (var k = 0; k < parts.length; k++) {
          var n = parseInt(parts[k].trim(), 10);
          if (!isNaN(n) && n >= 1 && n <= available.length) {
            chosen.push(available[n - 1]);
          }
        }
        if (chosen.length === 0) { alert('No valid selections.'); return; }
        var saveSelTotal = chosen.length;
        saveAllSequential(chosen, function () {
          setBatchSaveStatus(saveSelTotal + ' run' + (saveSelTotal === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' saved.');
          setCurrentLabel(saveSelTotal + ' run' + (saveSelTotal === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' saved.');
          if (window.skaiShowSaveToast) { window.skaiShowSaveToast(saveSelTotal + ' run' + (saveSelTotal === 1 ? '' : 's') + ' saved.'); }
        }, 1, saveSelTotal);
      }, false);
    }
  }

  function restorePersistedResults() {
    try {
      var saved = loadPersistedResults();
      if (!saved || saved.length === 0) { return; }
      batchResults = saved;
      batchState.doneCount     = 0;
      batchState.failCount     = 0;
      batchState.saveFailCount = 0;
      var hasAny = false;
      for (var i = 0; i < saved.length; i++) {
        var r = saved[i];
        if (!r || !r.combo) { continue; }
        if (r.done) {
          hasAny = true;
          batchState.doneCount += 1;
          if (r.status === 'failed') { batchState.failCount += 1; }
          var _rlabel = r.blendLabel || '';
          var viewHtml;
          if (r.status === 'failed') {
            viewHtml = "<span style='color:#dc2626;font-weight:600;'>Failed</span>";
            viewHtml += " <a href='#' style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-left:4px;' data-batch-view='" + i + "'>View</a>";
            setCellForCombo(r.combo, viewHtml, 'error');
          } else {
            viewHtml = "<span style='color:#16a34a;font-weight:600;'>Done</span>";
            if (_rlabel) {
              var _rOptimized = (r.blendOptimized && r.allowBlendOpt &&
                                 typeof r.selectedBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                                 typeof r.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                                 r.effectiveBlendAiPct !== r.selectedBlendAiPct);
              if (_rOptimized) {
                viewHtml += " <span style='font-size:0.75rem;color:#475569;' title='Selected: " + r.selectedBlendAiPct + "% \u2014 Optimized: " + r.effectiveBlendAiPct + "%'>" + _rlabel + " <span style='color:#d97706;font-style:italic;'>*opt</span></span>";
              } else {
                viewHtml += " <span style='font-size:0.75rem;color:#475569;'>" + _rlabel + "</span>";
              }
            }
            viewHtml += " <a href='#' style='font-size:0.8rem;margin-left:4px;' data-batch-view='" + i + "'>View</a>";
            setCellForCombo(r.combo, viewHtml, 'done');
          }
        }
      }
      if (hasAny) {
        syncAliases();
        showPanel();
        updateProgress();
        setCurrentLabel('Restored from last session.');
        var saveRow = qs('skai-batch-save-row');
        if (saveRow) { saveRow.style.display = 'flex'; }
        try {
          var _rLegend = qs('skai-blend-opt-legend');
          if (_rLegend) {
            var _rAnyOpt = false;
            for (var _roi = 0; _roi < batchResults.length; _roi++) {
              var _ror = batchResults[_roi];
              if (_ror && _ror.blendOptimized && _ror.allowBlendOpt &&
                  typeof _ror.selectedBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                  typeof _ror.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number' &&
                  _ror.effectiveBlendAiPct !== _ror.selectedBlendAiPct) {
                _rAnyOpt = true; break;
              }
            }
            _rLegend.style.display = _rAnyOpt ? 'block' : 'none';
          }
        } catch (_) {}
      }
    } catch (_) {}
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // [[checkWaitingBatch]]
  // Called once on page load. Reads localStorage for an interrupted batch.
  // Validates structure and age. If valid, offers the user a confirm dialog:
  // accept restores the grid from sessionStorage; cancel clears both stores.
  // sessionStorage is only cleared here (not blindly in init) so that
  // a within-tab reload can still recover result data.
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function checkWaitingBatch() {
    // Restore prompt removed: silently discard any interrupted-batch state on load.
    try { localStorage.removeItem(LS_STATE_KEY); } catch (_) {}
    try { sessionStorage.removeItem(SESSION_KEY); } catch (_) {}
  }

  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  // init -- entry point. Wires buttons; checks for an interrupted batch and
  // offers resume/discard before touching any storage.
  // Exposes skaiResetRunState, skaiExecuteIsolatedRun, and skaiGenerateRunToken
  // on window for external callers (manual run compatibility).
  // -----------------------------------------------------------------------
  function init() {
    wireButtons();
    // Check for pending batch and offer resume/discard before clearing any storage.
    checkWaitingBatch();
    // [[SKAI_V150_ADMIN_HIVE_RESEARCH_RUNNER_EXPOSE]]
    // Admin research runner bridge. Exposes one isolated run + save cycle for
    // the integrated MyLottoExpert Hive Research Queue. Dormant unless called
    // by the admin-only hive_auto_research page mode.
    window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave = function skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave(combo, callback) {
      // [[SKAI_V153_HIVE_RESEARCH_BATCH_SAVE_FIX]]
      // This function intentionally routes admin research assignments through
      // the same capture -> batch save -> confirmation chain used by the working
      // SKAI 9-run batch. One research assignment is treated as one batch-style
      // save row, so SKAI waits for a real save confirmation instead of relying
      // on a fragile external timer.
      combo = combo || {};
      if (!combo.profile) { combo.profile = 'balanced'; }
      if (!combo.strategy) { combo.strategy = 'hybrid'; }
      if (!combo.label) { combo.label = 'Hive Research Assignment'; }
      var runToken = skaiGenerateRunToken();
      // [[SKAI_V160_HIVE_RESEARCH_REENTRANT_RUN_RESET]]
      // Admin Hive research queues call the SKAI run/save bridge repeatedly inside the
      // same page session. A normal human-triggered 9-run batch naturally moves through
      // the batch state machine, but the research runner calls this bridge as a compact
      // one-row batch over and over. Reset all per-run and compact-batch state before
      // every assignment so the second assignment cannot inherit locks, stale callbacks,
      // previous prediction arrays, old save status, or the prior run token.
      try { skaiResetRunState(runToken); } catch (_) {}
      try { batchResults = []; } catch (_) {}
      try {
        batchState.running       = false;
        batchState.paused        = false;
        batchState.stopped       = false;
        batchState.index         = 0;
        batchState.doneCount     = 0;
        batchState.failCount     = 0;
        batchState.saveFailCount = 0;
        batchState.pauseResume   = null;
        batchState.token         = runToken;
        syncAliases();
      } catch (_) {}
      var _hiveResearchCallbackFired = false;
      var _hiveResearchWatchdog = window.setTimeout(function(){
        if (_hiveResearchCallbackFired) { return; }
        _hiveResearchCallbackFired = true;
        if (typeof callback === 'function') {
          callback({
            ok: false,
            saveResult: { ok:false, error:'research_run_timeout', message:'SKAI did not complete/save this research assignment before the safety timeout. The run state was reset before starting, so this usually means the engine did not emit completion for this assignment.' },
            runResult: null,
            structured: null,
            message: 'SKAI research assignment timed out before save confirmation.'
          });
        }
      }, 20 * 60 * 1000);
      skaiExecuteIsolatedRun(combo, runToken, function(structured) {
        if (!structured || structured.runToken !== runToken) { return; }
        var res = structured.savePayload || {};
        var row = {
          combo: combo,
          html: res.html || '',
          text: res.text || '',
          done: true,
          status: structured.success ? 'completed' : 'failed',
          runToken: runToken,
          lotteryKey: structured.lotteryKey || '',
          presetKey: structured.presetKey || '',
          mainNumbers: structured.predictedNumbers || [],
          extraNumbers: structured.extraNumbers || [],
          bonusNumbers: structured.bonusNumbers || [],
          finalPredictionSets: res.finalPredictionSets || [],
          fpsJson: res.fpsJson || '',
          dailyChosenCombos: res.dailyChosenCombos || [],
          dailyExtraDigits: res.dailyExtraDigits || [],
          dailyTopExtras: res.dailyTopExtras || [],
          blendAiPct: (typeof res.blendAiPct === 'number') ? res.blendAiPct : null,
          blendSkipPct: null,
          blendLabel: res.blendLabel || '',
          selectedBlendAiPct: (typeof res.selectedBlendAiPct === 'number') ? res.selectedBlendAiPct : null,
          effectiveBlendAiPct: (typeof res.effectiveBlendAiPct === 'number') ? res.effectiveBlendAiPct : null,
          blendOptimized: res.blendOptimized ? 1 : 0,
          allowBlendOpt: res.allowBlendOpt ? 1 : 0,
          temperature: (typeof res.temperature === 'number') ? res.temperature : null,
          diversityPenalty: (typeof res.diversityPenalty === 'number') ? res.diversityPenalty : null,
          settingsSnapshot: res.settingsSnapshot || combo.mleSettings || null,
          timestamps: structured.timestamps || {}
        };
        batchResults[0] = row;
        try { persistResults(); } catch (_) {}
        saveAllSequential([0], function(saveResult) {
          if (_hiveResearchCallbackFired) { return; }
          _hiveResearchCallbackFired = true;
          try { window.clearTimeout(_hiveResearchWatchdog); } catch (_) {}
          if (typeof callback === 'function') {
            var _researchSaveOk = !!(saveResult && saveResult.ok);
            callback({
              ok: _researchSaveOk,
              saveResult: saveResult || null,
              runResult: row,
              structured: structured,
              message: _researchSaveOk ? 'SKAI 9-run batch save path confirmed this research assignment.' : 'SKAI run finished but the batch save path did not confirm the save.'
            });
          }
        }, 1, 1);
      });
    };

    // Expose required named functions to window for external callers.
    window.skaiResetRunState      = skaiResetRunState;
    window.skaiExecuteIsolatedRun = skaiExecuteIsolatedRun;
    window.skaiGenerateRunToken   = skaiGenerateRunToken;
    // Disable pause button initially (no batch running).
    var pauseBtn = qs('skai-batch-pause');
    if (pauseBtn) { pauseBtn.disabled = true; }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init, { once: true });
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
</script>

$skaiV158IsRunner = ((string)$in->getString('hive_research_runner', '') === '1');
$skaiV158Token = \Joomla\CMS\Session\Session::getFormToken();
?>

  <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;flex-wrap:wrap;">

      <div style="font-size:.78rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#1d4ed8;">Admin Only</div>

This panel auto-starts the selected queue when opened from MyLottoExpert; use this panel as the source of truth, not the normal SKAI batch area below.</p>

      <button type="button" id="skai-v158-retry" style="padding:10px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1px solid #94a3b8;background:#fff;color:#0f172a;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;">Retry Failed</button>
