    <div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:.76rem;color:#64748b;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;">Campaign</div><strong id="skai-v158-campaign-label"><?php echo htmlspecialchars($skaiV158CampaignUuid ?: 'Missing campaign_uuid', ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8'); ?></strong></div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:.76rem;color:#64748b;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;">State</div><strong id="skai-v158-state">Idle</strong></div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:.76rem;color:#64748b;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;">Completed</div><strong id="skai-v158-completed">0 / 0</strong></div>
    <div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:12px;padding:10px;"><div style="font-size:.76rem;color:#64748b;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;">Saved / Failed / Queued</div><strong id="skai-v158-counts">0 / 0 / 0</strong></div>
  </div>
  <div style="margin-top:12px;background:#dbeafe;border-radius:999px;height:14px;overflow:hidden;"><div id="skai-v158-overall-bar" style="height:14px;width:0%;background:#2563eb;border-radius:999px;transition:width .25s ease;"></div></div>
  <div style="margin-top:10px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:14px;padding:12px;">
    <div style="background:#fef3c7;border:1px solid #f59e0b;border-radius:10px;padding:9px;margin-bottom:10px;color:#78350f;font-weight:700;">Important: this admin panel is the research queue controller. If you click the normal SKAI 9-batch buttons below, those normal batch rows can run, but this research ledger will not count them. This selected research queue auto-starts from this panel.</div>
    <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;"><strong>Current run progress</strong><span id="skai-v158-run-label">0%</span></div>
    <div style="height:10px;background:#e2e8f0;border-radius:999px;margin-top:7px;overflow:hidden;"><div id="skai-v158-run-bar" style="height:10px;width:0%;background:#16a34a;border-radius:999px;transition:width .25s ease;"></div></div>
    <p id="skai-v158-message" style="margin:.55rem 0 0;color:#334155;">Ready.</p>
  </div>
  <details open style="margin-top:12px;"><summary><strong>Live SKAI research ledger (updates after each saved run)</strong></summary><div id="skai-v158-ledger" style="margin-top:8px;display:grid;gap:8px;"><div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:10px;padding:9px;"><strong>No runs yet</strong><div style="color:#64748b;">Press Run Queue.</div></div></div></details>
</section>
<script>
/* [[SKAI_V158_SKAI_OWNED_HIVE_RESEARCH_RUNNER_UI]] ES5-only */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  var tokenName = <?php echo json_encode($skaiV158Token); ?>;
  var running = false;
  var stopAfterCurrent = false;
  var campaignUuid = document.getElementById('skai-v158-campaign') ? document.getElementById('skai-v158-campaign').value : '';
  var summary = {assignments:0,saved:0,failed:0,queued:0,running:0};
  function byId(id){ return document.getElementById(id); }
  function text(id,v){ var el=byId(id); if(el){ el.textContent=String(v==null?'':v); } }
  function width(id,p){ var el=byId(id); if(el){ el.style.width=String(Math.max(0,Math.min(100,parseInt(String(p||0),10)||0)))+'%'; } }
  function esc(s){ return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"']/g,function(c){return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c];}); }
  function msg(m){ text('skai-v158-message', m); }
  function setState(s){ text('skai-v158-state', s); }
  function addRow(title, body, state){
    var box=byId('skai-v158-ledger'); if(!box){return;} if(box.getAttribute('data-init')!=='1'){ box.innerHTML=''; box.setAttribute('data-init','1'); }
    var color = state === 'saved' ? '#16a34a' : (state === 'failed' ? '#dc2626' : '#2563eb');
    var row=document.createElement('div'); row.style.cssText='background:#fff;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-left:5px solid '+color+';border-radius:10px;padding:9px;';
    row.innerHTML='<strong>'+esc(title)+'</strong><div style="color:#475569;margin-top:3px;">'+esc(body)+'</div>';
    if(box.firstChild){ box.insertBefore(row, box.firstChild); } else { box.appendChild(row); }
  }
  function updateSummary(s){
    if(s){ summary=s; }
    var total=parseInt(String(summary.assignments||0),10)||0, saved=parseInt(String(summary.saved||0),10)||0, failed=parseInt(String(summary.failed||0),10)||0, queued=parseInt(String(summary.queued||0),10)||0, run=parseInt(String(summary.running||0),10)||0;
    text('skai-v158-campaign-label', (summary.campaign_label || campaignUuid || 'Campaign'));
    text('skai-v158-completed', String(saved+failed)+' / '+String(total));
    text('skai-v158-counts', String(saved)+' / '+String(failed)+' / '+String(queued));
    width('skai-v158-overall-bar', total>0 ? Math.round(((saved+failed)/total)*100) : 0);
    if (running && run > 0) { setState('Running'); }
  }
  function ballList(arr){
    var out=[], i, v;
    arr=arr||[];
    for(i=0;i<arr.length;i++){ v=arr[i]; out.push('<span style="display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-width:24px;height:24px;padding:0 6px;border-radius:999px;background:#e0f2fe;border:1px solid #0284c7;color:#075985;font-weight:900;margin-right:4px;">'+esc(v)+'</span>'); }
    return out.join('');
  }
  function renderLedger(rows){
    var box=byId('skai-v158-ledger'), i, r, color, title, meta, nums;
    if(!box){return;}
    rows=rows||[];
    box.innerHTML='';
    box.setAttribute('data-init','1');
    if(!rows.length){
      box.innerHTML='<div style="background:#fff;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:10px;padding:9px;"><strong>No saved or running research rows yet</strong><div style="color:#64748b;">The ledger will update after each assignment starts or saves.</div></div>';
      return;
    }
    for(i=0;i<rows.length;i++){
      r=rows[i]||{};
      color = r.runner_status === 'saved' ? '#16a34a' : (r.runner_status === 'failed' ? '#dc2626' : '#2563eb');
      title = 'Assignment #'+esc(r.assignment_id)+' - '+esc(r.runner_status || r.assigned_status || 'queued');
      meta = 'Game '+esc(r.game_id||'')+' | Target '+esc(r.target_draw_date||'')+' | Started '+esc(r.runner_started_at||'')+' | Saved '+esc(r.runner_saved_at||r.completed_at||'')+' | Fingerprint '+esc(String(r.settings_fingerprint||'').substring(0,18));
      nums = (r.main_numbers && r.main_numbers.length) ? ('<div style="margin-top:7px;">Predicted main: '+ballList(r.main_numbers)+' '+(r.extra_numbers&&r.extra_numbers.length?('Extra: '+ballList(r.extra_numbers)):'')+'</div>') : '';
      var row=document.createElement('div');
      row.style.cssText='background:#fff;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-left:5px solid '+color+';border-radius:10px;padding:9px;';
      row.innerHTML='<strong>'+title+'</strong><div style="color:#475569;margin-top:3px;">'+meta+'</div><div style="color:#334155;margin-top:3px;">'+esc(r.runner_message||'')+'</div>'+nums;
      box.appendChild(row);
    }
  }
  function refreshStatus(reason, cb){
    post('hive_research_summary',{campaign_uuid:campaignUuid},function(res){
      if(res&&res.ok){ updateSummary(res.summary||{}); renderLedger(res.ledger||[]); }
      if(cb){cb(res||{});} 
    });
  }
  function setRunProgress(p,label){ width('skai-v158-run-bar', p); text('skai-v158-run-label', String(Math.max(0,Math.min(100,parseInt(String(p||0),10)||0)))+'%'+(label?' - '+label:'')); if(label){ msg(label); } }
  function post(action, payload, cb){
    var xhr=new XMLHttpRequest();
    var body=tokenName+'=1&skai_action='+encodeURIComponent(action)+'&payload='+encodeURIComponent(JSON.stringify(payload||{}));
    xhr.open('POST', window.location.href.split('#')[0], true);
    xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type','application/x-www-form-urlencoded');
    xhr.onreadystatechange=function(){
      if(xhr.readyState!==4){return;}
      var raw=xhr.responseText||'';
      var data=null;
      try{ data=JSON.parse(raw||'{}'); }
      catch(e){
        // [[SKAI_V159_STRICT_JSON_REPAIR]] If the host/template still wraps the JSON,
        // try to recover the first JSON object so the runner can continue and expose
        // the contaminating prefix/suffix in diagnostics.
        var start=raw.indexOf('{');
        var end=raw.lastIndexOf('}');
        if(start>=0 && end>start){
          try{ data=JSON.parse(raw.substring(start,end+1)); data._jsonRecovered=true; data._rawPrefix=raw.substring(0,start).substring(0,160); data._rawSuffix=raw.substring(end+1).substring(0,160); }
          catch(e2){ data={ok:false,error:'bad_json',http_status:xhr.status,raw:raw.substring(0,500)}; }
        } else { data={ok:false,error:'bad_json',http_status:xhr.status,raw:raw.substring(0,500)}; }
      }
      if(cb){cb(data);}
    };
    xhr.send(body);
  }
  function makeComboFromAssignment(a, ordinal, total){
    a=a||{}; var settings=a.settings||{}; var assignmentId=a.assignment_id||settings._mle_research_assignment_id||''; var queueId=a.queue_id||settings._mle_research_queue_id||''; var fp=a.settings_fingerprint||settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint||'';
    settings._mle_research_queue_id=queueId; settings._mle_research_assignment_id=assignmentId; settings._mle_research_type='admin_client_research'; settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint=fp; settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key=settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key||'v158_skai_owned_sweep'; settings._mle_research_index=settings._mle_research_index||ordinal; settings._mle_research_total=settings._mle_research_total||total;
    return {profile:settings.profile||settings.training_style||'balanced', strategy:settings.strategy||'hybrid', label:'Hive Research Run '+ordinal+' Assignment #'+assignmentId, mlePrecisionLock:true, mleSettings:settings, mleBatch:{batch_id:parseInt(queueId||'0',10)||0,batch_run_id:parseInt(assignmentId||'0',10)||0,batch_type:'Admin SKAI/Hive Research Queue',batch_run_order:parseInt(settings._mle_research_index||ordinal||'1',10)||1,is_control:0,test_variable:settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key||'v158_skai_owned_sweep',test_value:fp}};
  }
  function recordResult(payload, cb){ post('hive_research_record_result', payload, function(res){ if(cb){cb(res||{});} }); }
  function runAssignment(a, indexInChunk, chunkTotal, cb){
    if(typeof window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave!=='function'){ msg('Waiting for SKAI batch save bridge...'); setTimeout(function(){ runAssignment(a,indexInChunk,chunkTotal,cb); }, 600); return; }
    var settings=a.settings||{}; var ordinal=parseInt(String(settings._mle_research_index||indexInChunk||1),10)||1; var total=parseInt(String(settings._mle_research_total||summary.assignments||chunkTotal),10)||chunkTotal; var assignmentId=a.assignment_id||'';
    var combo=makeComboFromAssignment(a, ordinal, total);
    setRunProgress(5,'Starting assignment #'+assignmentId+' ('+indexInChunk+' of '+chunkTotal+' in this chunk)');
    addRow('Running assignment #'+assignmentId, 'Campaign run '+ordinal+' / '+total+' | fingerprint '+String(a.settings_fingerprint||'').substring(0,14), 'running');
    window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave(combo, function(result){
      var ok=!!(result&&result.ok);
      setRunProgress(ok?92:70, ok?'Save confirmed; recording result':'Save was not confirmed; recording failure');
      var payload={ok:ok, assignment_id:parseInt(String(assignmentId||'0'),10)||0, queue_id:parseInt(String(a.queue_id||settings._mle_research_queue_id||'0'),10)||0, ordinal:ordinal, settings_fingerprint:a.settings_fingerprint||settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint||'', message:ok?'Saved by SKAI-owned v158 runner using the regular batch save path.':((result&&result.saveResult&&(result.saveResult.message||result.saveResult.reason||result.saveResult.error))?String(result.saveResult.message||result.saveResult.reason||result.saveResult.error):'SKAI run failed or save was not confirmed.'), main_numbers:result&&result.runResult?(result.runResult.mainNumbers||[]):[], extra_numbers:result&&result.runResult?(result.runResult.extraNumbers||[]):[], final_prediction_sets:result&&result.runResult?(result.runResult.finalPredictionSets||[]):[], run_token:result&&result.runResult?(result.runResult.runToken||''):'', settings_snapshot:settings, combo_label:combo.label||'', save_result:result&&result.saveResult?result.saveResult:null};
      recordResult(payload, function(rec){
        addRow((ok&&rec&&rec.ok?'Saved':'Failed')+' assignment #'+assignmentId, payload.message, ok&&rec&&rec.ok?'saved':'failed');
        setRunProgress(100, ok&&rec&&rec.ok?'Assignment recorded; refreshing live ledger':'Assignment failed; refreshing live ledger');
        refreshStatus('after_record_result', function(){ cb(ok&&rec&&rec.ok); });
      });
    });
  }
  function runChunk(assignments){
    var i=0; var total=assignments.length;
    function next(){
      if(!running){ setState('Stopped'); msg('Stopped after current assignment.'); return; }
      if(i>=total){ setRunProgress(100,'Chunk complete'); setState('Running'); msg('Chunk complete. Claiming next queued chunk...'); setTimeout(claimAndRun, 900); return; }
      var a=assignments[i]; i++;
      runAssignment(a, i, total, function(ok){
        refreshStatus('after_assignment');
        if(!ok){ running=false; setState('Stopped'); msg('Stopped after failed assignment. Use Retry Failed or Reset Stuck Running, then Run Queue.'); return; }
        if(stopAfterCurrent){ running=false; stopAfterCurrent=false; setState('Stopped'); msg('Stopped after current run as requested.'); return; }
        setTimeout(next, 700);
      });
    }
    next();
  }
  function claimAndRun(){
    if(!running){ return; }
    if(!campaignUuid){ setState('Error'); msg('Missing campaign_uuid in SKAI URL. Open this from MyLottoExpert campaign button.'); return; }
    setState('Claiming'); setRunProgress(0,'Claiming next SKAI-native chunk');
    post('hive_research_claim_chunk',{campaign_uuid:campaignUuid,chunk_size:9},function(res){
      if(!res||!res.ok){
        running=false; setState('Error');
        var detail=(res&&(res.error||res.message)||'unknown');
        if(res&&res.raw){ detail += ' | raw response: '+String(res.raw).replace(/\s+/g,' ').substring(0,220); }
        if(res&&res._rawPrefix){ detail += ' | JSON prefix: '+String(res._rawPrefix).replace(/\s+/g,' ').substring(0,160); }
        msg('Could not claim chunk: '+detail);
        addRow('Claim chunk failed', detail, 'failed');
        return;
      }
      updateSummary(res.summary||{}); renderLedger(res.ledger||[]);
      if(res.done){ running=false; setState('Complete'); setRunProgress(100,'Campaign complete'); msg('No queued assignments remain. Campaign complete or waiting for retry decisions.'); return; }
      var assignments=res.assignments||[]; if(!assignments.length){ running=false; setState('Complete'); msg('No assignments returned.'); return; }
      setState('Running'); msg('Claimed '+assignments.length+' assignment(s). SKAI is running them using the normal batch save path.'); runChunk(assignments);
    });
  }
  function start(){ if(running){msg('Already running.'); return;} stopAfterCurrent=false; running=true; setState('Running'); addRow('SKAI-owned runner started', 'Campaign '+campaignUuid, 'running'); claimAndRun(); }
  function command(cmd){ post('hive_research_command',{campaign_uuid:campaignUuid,command:cmd},function(res){ if(res&&res.ok){ updateSummary(res.summary||{}); msg(cmd+' complete. Changed '+(res.changed||0)+' row(s).'); } else { msg(cmd+' failed: '+(res&&(res.error||res.message)||'unknown')); } }); }
  var startBtn=byId('skai-v158-start'), stopBtn=byId('skai-v158-stop'), resetBtn=byId('skai-v158-reset'), retryBtn=byId('skai-v158-retry');
  if(startBtn){ startBtn.onclick=start; }
  if(stopBtn){ stopBtn.onclick=function(){ stopAfterCurrent=true; msg('Stop requested. SKAI will stop after the current assignment finishes.'); }; }
  if(resetBtn){ resetBtn.onclick=function(){ command('reset_running'); }; }
  if(retryBtn){ retryBtn.onclick=function(){ command('retry_failed'); }; }
  refreshStatus('initial_load', function(res){
    var sum = res && res.summary ? res.summary : summary;
    var total = parseInt(String(sum.assignments || 0), 10) || 0;
    var saved = parseInt(String(sum.saved || 0), 10) || 0;
    var failed = parseInt(String(sum.failed || 0), 10) || 0;
    var queued = parseInt(String(sum.queued || 0), 10) || 0;
    if (campaignUuid && total > 0 && queued > 0 && (saved + failed) < total) {
      msg('Auto-starting SKAI-owned research queue. Do not use the normal SKAI 9-batch controls below for this campaign.');
      setTimeout(function(){ if(!running){ start(); } }, 1200);
    } else if (campaignUuid && total > 0 && queued <= 0) {
      msg('No queued assignments remain for this campaign. Use Retry Failed if needed.');
    } else {
      msg('Ready. Press Run Queue if auto-start does not begin.');
    }
  });
  window.setInterval(function(){ if(running){ refreshStatus('poll'); } }, 6000);
  window.skaiHiveResearchDebug=function(){ return {campaignUuid:campaignUuid,running:running,stopAfterCurrent:stopAfterCurrent,summary:summary,message:(byId('skai-v158-message')?byId('skai-v158-message').textContent:''), note:'This panel updates only runs started through the SKAI-owned Hive Research Runner. Normal SKAI 9-batch rows below are not counted unless launched by this panel.'}; };
}());
</script>
<?php endif; ?>
<?php endif; ?>

<script>
/* [[SKAI_V150_ADMIN_HIVE_AUTO_RESEARCH_MODE]] [[SKAI_V155_RESEARCH_PROGRESS_MESSAGES]] [[SKAI_V156_NATIVE_RESEARCH_CHUNKS]] [[SKAI_V158_SKAI_OWNED_RESEARCH_RUNNER]]
   Runs only when SKAI is opened by the integrated MyLottoExpert admin Hive Research Queue.
   Normal users and normal SKAI sessions are unaffected. ES5-only. */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  function param(name){
    try { return (new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || '')).get(name) || ''; }
    catch(e){
      var q=String(window.location.search||'').replace(/^\?/,'').split('&');
      for(var i=0;i<q.length;i++){ var p=q[i].split('='); if(decodeURIComponent(p[0]||'')===name){ return decodeURIComponent(p.slice(1).join('=')||''); } }
      return '';
    }
  }
  if (param('hive_auto_research') !== '1') { return; }
  var ran = false;
  function postToParent(payload){
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) { window.parent.postMessage({type:'skai_hive_research_result', payload:payload}, window.location.origin); return; } } catch(e) {}
    try { if (window.opener) { window.opener.postMessage({type:'skai_hive_research_result', payload:payload}, window.location.origin); } } catch(e2) {}
  }
  function postProgress(assignmentId, progress, message){
    var payload = {assignment_id:parseInt(assignmentId||'0',10)||0, progress:progress||0, message:String(message||'')};
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) { window.parent.postMessage({type:'skai_hive_research_progress', payload:payload}, window.location.origin); } } catch(e) {}
    try { if (window.opener) { window.opener.postMessage({type:'skai_hive_research_progress', payload:payload}, window.location.origin); } } catch(e2) {}
  }
  function decodeSettings(){
    var raw = param('hive_settings_json');
    if (!raw) { return {}; }
    try { return JSON.parse(raw); } catch(e) { try { return JSON.parse(decodeURIComponent(raw)); } catch(e2) { return {}; } }
  }
  function addBanner(msg){
    var box = document.getElementById('skai-v150-hive-runner-banner');
    if (!box) {
      box = document.createElement('div');
      box.id = 'skai-v150-hive-runner-banner';
      box.style.cssText = 'position:sticky;top:0;z-index:99999;background:#0f172a;color:#fff;padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:3px solid #38bdf8;font-weight:800;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(15,23,42,.25);';
      try { document.body.insertBefore(box, document.body.firstChild); } catch(e) { document.body.appendChild(box); }
    }
    box.textContent = msg;
  }

  function makeComboFromAssignment(a, ordinal, total){
    a = a || {};
    var settings = a.settings || {};
    var assignmentId = a.assignment_id || settings._mle_research_assignment_id || '';
    var queueId = a.queue_id || settings._mle_research_queue_id || '';
    var fingerprint = a.settings_fingerprint || settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint || '';
    settings._mle_research_queue_id = queueId;
    settings._mle_research_assignment_id = assignmentId;
    settings._mle_research_type = 'admin_client_research';
    settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint = fingerprint;
    settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key = settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key || 'v156_admin_chunk_sweep';
    settings._mle_research_index = settings._mle_research_index || ordinal;
    settings._mle_research_total = settings._mle_research_total || total;
    return {
      profile: settings.profile || settings.training_style || 'balanced',
      strategy: settings.strategy || 'hybrid',
      label: 'Hive Research Chunk Run ' + ordinal + ' Assignment #' + assignmentId,
      mlePrecisionLock: true,
      mleSettings: settings,
      mleBatch: {
        batch_id: parseInt(queueId || '0', 10) || 0,
        batch_run_id: parseInt(assignmentId || '0', 10) || 0,
        batch_type: 'Admin SKAI/Hive Native Research Chunk',
        batch_run_order: parseInt(settings._mle_research_index || ordinal || '1', 10) || 1,
        is_control: 0,
        test_variable: settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key || 'v156_admin_chunk_sweep',
        test_value: fingerprint
      }
    };
  }
  function readChunkPayload(){
    var key = param('hive_chunk_key') || 'mle_hive_research_chunk_payload_v156';
    var raw = '';
    try { raw = localStorage.getItem(key) || ''; } catch(e) { raw = ''; }
    if (!raw) { return {ok:false,error:'missing_chunk_payload',key:key}; }
    try { var parsed = JSON.parse(raw); parsed._chunk_key = key; return {ok:true,payload:parsed}; }
    catch(e2) { return {ok:false,error:'invalid_chunk_payload',key:key}; }
  }
  function postChunkDone(payload){
    try { if (window.parent && window.parent !== window) { window.parent.postMessage({type:'skai_hive_research_chunk_done', payload:payload}, window.location.origin); } } catch(e) {}
    try { if (window.opener) { window.opener.postMessage({type:'skai_hive_research_chunk_done', payload:payload}, window.location.origin); } } catch(e2) {}
  }
  function startChunk(){
    if (ran) { return; }
    if (typeof window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave !== 'function') { setTimeout(startChunk, 800); return; }
    ran = true;
    var loaded = readChunkPayload();
    if (!loaded.ok) {
      addBanner('Admin Hive Research Chunk: payload missing or invalid.');
      postChunkDone({ok:false,message:loaded.error,key:loaded.key});
      return;
    }
    var payload = loaded.payload || {};
    var assignments = payload.assignments || [];
    if (!assignments.length) {
      addBanner('Admin Hive Research Chunk: no assignments found.');
      postChunkDone({ok:false,message:'No assignments found in chunk payload.'});
      return;
    }
    var total = assignments.length;
    var idx = 0;
    addBanner('Admin Hive Research Chunk: running ' + total + ' assignment(s) using SKAI native batch save path.');
    function next(){
      if (idx >= assignments.length) {
        addBanner('Admin Hive Research Chunk: complete.');
        postChunkDone({ok:true,message:'SKAI-native research chunk complete.', total:total});
        return;
      }
      var a = assignments[idx] || {};
      var settings = a.settings || {};
      var assignmentId = a.assignment_id || settings._mle_research_assignment_id || '';
      var ordinal = parseInt(settings._mle_research_index || (idx + 1), 10) || (idx + 1);
      var grandTotal = parseInt(settings._mle_research_total || total, 10) || total;
      var combo = makeComboFromAssignment(a, ordinal, grandTotal);
      addBanner('Admin Hive Research Chunk: running assignment #' + assignmentId + ' (' + (idx + 1) + ' of ' + total + ' in this chunk).');
      postProgress(assignmentId, Math.max(10, Math.round((idx / Math.max(total,1)) * 90)), 'SKAI native chunk run ' + (idx + 1) + ' of ' + total + ' started');
      window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave(combo, function(result){
        var ok = !!(result && result.ok);
        postProgress(assignmentId, ok ? Math.min(95, Math.round(((idx + 1) / Math.max(total,1)) * 90)) : 70, ok ? 'SKAI save confirmed for chunk assignment' : 'SKAI run ended but save was not confirmed');
        postToParent({
          ok: ok,
          assignment_id: parseInt(assignmentId || '0', 10) || 0,
          queue_id: parseInt((a.queue_id || settings._mle_research_queue_id || '0'), 10) || 0,
          ordinal: ordinal,
          chunk_index: idx + 1,
          chunk_total: total,
          settings_fingerprint: a.settings_fingerprint || settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint || '',
          message: ok ? 'SKAI-native chunk assignment completed and saved through the regular batch save path.' : ((result && result.saveResult && (result.saveResult.message || result.saveResult.reason || result.saveResult.error)) ? String(result.saveResult.message || result.saveResult.reason || result.saveResult.error) : 'SKAI chunk assignment failed or save was not confirmed.'),
          main_numbers: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.mainNumbers || []) : [],
          extra_numbers: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.extraNumbers || []) : [],
          final_prediction_sets: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.finalPredictionSets || []) : [],
          run_token: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.runToken || '') : '',
          settings_snapshot: settings,
          combo_label: combo.label || '',
          save_result: result && result.saveResult ? result.saveResult : null
        });
        if (!ok) {
          addBanner('Admin Hive Research Chunk: stopped after failed save for assignment #' + assignmentId + '.');
          postChunkDone({ok:false,message:'Chunk stopped after failed assignment #' + assignmentId, assignment_id:assignmentId});
          return;
        }
        idx++;
        setTimeout(next, 900);
      });
    }
    next();
  }
  function start(){
    if (param('hive_research_chunk') === '1') { startChunk(); return; }
    if (ran) { return; }
    if (typeof window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave !== 'function') { setTimeout(start, 800); return; }
    ran = true;
    var settings = decodeSettings();
    var assignmentId = param('mle_research_assignment_id') || param('hive_assignment_id');
    var queueId = param('mle_research_queue_id') || param('hive_queue_id');
    var fingerprint = param('mle_settings_fingerprint') || param('hive_settings_fingerprint') || settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint || '';
    settings._mle_research_queue_id = queueId;
    settings._mle_research_assignment_id = assignmentId;
    settings._mle_research_type = param('mle_research_type') || 'admin_client_research';
    settings._mle_research_settings_fingerprint = fingerprint;
    settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key = settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key || 'v150_admin_sweep';
    var combo = {
      profile: settings.profile || settings.training_style || 'balanced',
      strategy: settings.strategy || 'hybrid',
      label: 'Hive Research Assignment #' + assignmentId,
      mlePrecisionLock: true,
      mleSettings: settings,
      mleBatch: {
        batch_id: parseInt(queueId || '0', 10) || 0,
        batch_run_id: parseInt(assignmentId || '0', 10) || 0,
        batch_type: 'Admin SKAI/Hive Research Queue',
        batch_run_order: parseInt(settings._mle_research_index || '1', 10) || 1,
        is_control: 0,
        test_variable: settings._mle_global_learning_setting_key || 'v150_admin_sweep',
        test_value: fingerprint
      }
    };
    addBanner('Admin Hive Research Runner: running assignment #' + assignmentId + '...');
    postProgress(assignmentId, 15, 'SKAI auto-run started');
    window.skaiHiveResearchRunAndSave(combo, function(result){
      var ok = !!(result && result.ok);
      postProgress(assignmentId, ok ? 95 : 70, ok ? 'SKAI save confirmed; reporting result' : 'SKAI run ended but save was not confirmed');
      addBanner(ok ? ('Admin Hive Research Runner: saved assignment #' + assignmentId + '.') : ('Admin Hive Research Runner: save failed for assignment #' + assignmentId + '.'));
      postToParent({
        ok: ok,
        assignment_id: parseInt(assignmentId || '0', 10) || 0,
        queue_id: parseInt(queueId || '0', 10) || 0,
        settings_fingerprint: fingerprint,
        message: ok ? 'SKAI assignment completed and saved through the regular 9-run batch save path.' : ((result && result.saveResult && (result.saveResult.message || result.saveResult.reason || result.saveResult.error)) ? String(result.saveResult.message || result.saveResult.reason || result.saveResult.error) : 'SKAI assignment failed or save was not confirmed.'),
        main_numbers: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.mainNumbers || []) : [],
        extra_numbers: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.extraNumbers || []) : [],
        final_prediction_sets: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.finalPredictionSets || []) : [],
        run_token: result && result.runResult ? (result.runResult.runToken || '') : '',
        settings_snapshot: settings,
        combo_label: combo.label || '',
        save_result: result && result.saveResult ? result.saveResult : null
      });
    });
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') { document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function(){ setTimeout(start, 1200); }); }
  else { setTimeout(start, 1200); }
}());
</script>

<script>
/* ==========================================================================
   CHG: SKAI World-Class UX Additions (ES5-compatible)
   - Onboarding banner dismiss (persisted in sessionStorage)
   - Beginner / Advanced mode toggle
   - Tooltip system (keyboard + pointer)
   - Post-action micro feedback survey
   ========================================================================== */
;(function () {
  'use strict';

  /* -----------------------------------------------------------------------
     1) Onboarding banner dismiss
     ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
  (function onboardingBanner() {
    var banner = document.getElementById('skai-onboarding-banner');
    var dismissBtn = document.getElementById('skai-onboarding-dismiss');
    if (!banner) return;

    try {
      if (sessionStorage.getItem('skai_onboarding_dismissed') === '1') {
        banner.style.display = 'none';
        return;
      }
    } catch (_) {}

    if (dismissBtn) {
      dismissBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        banner.style.display = 'none';
        try { sessionStorage.setItem('skai_onboarding_dismissed', '1'); } catch (_) {}
      });
    }
  }());

  /* -----------------------------------------------------------------------
     2) Guided / Smart / Professional experience toggle
     ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
  (function modeToggle() {
    var btnGuided = document.getElementById('skai-mode-guided');
    var btnSmart  = document.getElementById('skai-mode-smart');
    var btnPro    = document.getElementById('skai-mode-pro');
    var wrap      = document.getElementById('skai-wrap') || document.body;
    var heroTitle = document.getElementById('skai-experience-title');
    var heroBody  = document.getElementById('skai-experience-body');
    var heroFocus = document.getElementById('skai-experience-focus');

    function setPressed(active) {
      if (btnGuided) btnGuided.setAttribute('aria-pressed', active === 'guided' ? 'true' : 'false');
      if (btnSmart)  btnSmart.setAttribute('aria-pressed', active === 'smart' ? 'true' : 'false');
      if (btnPro)    btnPro.setAttribute('aria-pressed', active === 'pro' ? 'true' : 'false');
    }

    function setHero(mode) {
      if (!heroTitle || !heroBody || !heroFocus) return;
      if (mode === 'guided') {
        heroTitle.textContent = 'Guided Experience keeps SKAI clean, confident, and easy to act on.';
        heroBody.textContent = 'This view removes non-essential complexity so you can focus on running SKAI, reviewing the primary picks, and saving the result with confidence.';
        heroFocus.innerHTML = '<strong>Current focus:</strong> Guided Experience keeps the page recommendation-first by prioritizing the run button, the core setup, and the main picks.';
      } else if (mode === 'pro') {
        heroTitle.textContent = 'Professional Control unlocks the full SKAI operating environment.';
        heroBody.textContent = 'This view exposes the deepest controls, supporting analytics, and power-user visibility for users who want full access to the SKAI interface.';
        heroFocus.innerHTML = '<strong>Current focus:</strong> Professional Control is built for full visibility, advanced comparison work, and maximum transparency into the SKAI environment.';
      } else {
        heroTitle.textContent = 'Smart Analysis keeps SKAI clear, capable, and decision-first.';
        heroBody.textContent = 'SKAI is designed to surface the strongest current number recommendations first, then reveal deeper evidence only when you want it. Use the experience selector above to choose how much control and analysis you want on screen.';
        heroFocus.innerHTML = '<strong>Current focus:</strong> Smart Analysis is the recommended operating view because it keeps the page recommendation-first while preserving the context that matters most.';
      }
    }

    function setMode(mode) {
      var normalized = mode;
      if (normalized !== 'guided' && normalized !== 'smart' && normalized !== 'pro') {
        normalized = 'smart';
      }
      setPressed(normalized);
      wrap.classList.remove('skai-ui-guided');
      wrap.classList.remove('skai-ui-smart');
      wrap.classList.remove('skai-ui-pro');
      wrap.classList.add('skai-ui-' + normalized);
      setHero(normalized);
      try { sessionStorage.setItem('skai_ui_mode', normalized); } catch (_) {}
    }

    try {
      var stored = sessionStorage.getItem('skai_ui_mode');
      if (stored === 'advanced') stored = 'pro';
      if (stored === 'guided' || stored === 'smart' || stored === 'pro') {
        setMode(stored);
      } else {
        setMode('smart');
      }
    } catch (_) {
      setMode('smart');
    }

    if (btnGuided) btnGuided.addEventListener('click', function () { setMode('guided'); });
    if (btnSmart)  btnSmart.addEventListener('click', function () { setMode('smart'); });
    if (btnPro)    btnPro.addEventListener('click', function () { setMode('pro'); });
  }());

  /* -----------------------------------------------------------------------
     3) Tooltip system (data-skai-tip attribute, ES5-safe)
     ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
  (function tooltips() {
    var popup = null;

    function getPopup() {
      if (!popup) {
        popup = document.createElement('div');
        popup.className = 'skai-tooltip-popup';
        popup.setAttribute('role', 'tooltip');
        document.body.appendChild(popup);
      }
      return popup;
    }

    function showTip(icon) {
      var tip = icon.getAttribute('data-skai-tip');
      if (!tip) return;
      var p = getPopup();
      p.textContent = tip;
      var rect = icon.getBoundingClientRect();
      var scrollY = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop || 0;
      var scrollX = window.pageXOffset || document.documentElement.scrollLeft || 0;
      p.style.position = 'absolute';
      p.style.top  = (rect.bottom + scrollY + 8) + 'px';
      p.style.left = Math.max(4, rect.left + scrollX) + 'px';
      p.classList.add('is-visible');
    }

    function hideTip() {
      if (popup) { popup.classList.remove('is-visible'); }
    }

    document.addEventListener('mouseover', function (e) {
      if (e.target && e.target.getAttribute('data-skai-tip')) { showTip(e.target); }
    });
    document.addEventListener('mouseout', function (e) {
      if (e.target && e.target.getAttribute('data-skai-tip')) { hideTip(); }
    });
    document.addEventListener('focusin', function (e) {
      if (e.target && e.target.getAttribute('data-skai-tip')) { showTip(e.target); }
    });
    document.addEventListener('focusout', function (e) {
      if (e.target && e.target.getAttribute('data-skai-tip')) { hideTip(); }
    });
    document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
      if ((e.key === 'Escape') || (e.keyCode === 27)) { hideTip(); }
    });
  }());

  /* -----------------------------------------------------------------------
     4) Post-action micro feedback survey (shown after save)
     ----------------------------------------------------------------------- */
  (function feedbackBar() {
    var bar = document.getElementById('skai-feedback-bar');
    if (!bar) return;

    var saveForm = document.getElementById('skai-ai-save-form');
    if (saveForm) {
      saveForm.addEventListener('submit', function () {
        setTimeout(function () {
          bar.classList.add('is-visible');
        }, 2000);
      });
    }

    var btns = bar.querySelectorAll('[data-skai-feedback]');
    var i;
    for (i = 0; i < btns.length; i++) {
      (function (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
          var val = btn.getAttribute('data-skai-feedback');
          try {
            var stored = JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem('skai_feedback') || '[]');
            stored.push({ v: val, t: Date.now() });
            sessionStorage.setItem('skai_feedback', JSON.stringify(stored));
          } catch (_) {}
          bar.innerHTML = '<span style="color:#166534;font-weight:700;">Thank you \u2014 your feedback helps improve SKAI.</span>';
          setTimeout(function () { bar.classList.remove('is-visible'); }, 3000);
        });
      }(btns[i]));
    }

    var dismissBtn = bar.querySelector('.skai-feedback-bar__dismiss');
    if (dismissBtn) {
      dismissBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
        bar.classList.remove('is-visible');
      });
    }
  }());

}());
</script>
<?php
/*
 * ==========================================================================
 * [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]] DEVELOPER CHANGE SUMMARY
 * ==========================================================================
 *
 * NEW FUNCTIONS ADDED (all marked [[SKAI_RUNTIME_VERIFICATION]]):
 *   - SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher()      C: central tuner dispatcher
 *   - SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline()          A: wired live pipeline entry point
 *   - SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade()               D: additive promotion_metrics_json migration
 *   - SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel()        F: runtime verification data (array)
 *   - SKAI_renderRuntimeVerificationPanel()     F: operator-friendly rendered panel
 *   - SKAI_runRuntimeIntegrityChecks()          G: full integrity check suite
 *   - SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryWiring()           G: wiring completeness check
 *   - SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness()           G: metric function availability check
 *   - SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness()   G: schema / storage completeness check
 *
 * EXISTING FUNCTIONS MODIFIED:
 *   - SKAI_storeTailMissRun()     Added $promotionMetrics param; writes promotion_metrics_json
 *   - SKAI_analyzeTailMissesLast100()  Updated SKAI_storeTailMissRun call to pass [] for metrics
 *
 * WIRING CHANGES:
 *   - SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline() now explicitly calls SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep()
 *     gated by [[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]]
 *   - SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher() is the single entry point for tuning; routes to
 *     SKAI_computeTunedWeightsLive or SKAI_computeTunedWeights based on [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]
 *   - Pipeline steps 3-7 (pairwise, calibration, tail recovery, Gibbs, rank stamp) wired
 *     in correct order with safe fallbacks
 *
 * METRIC / REPORTING CHANGES:
 *   - Runtime state ($GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']) tracks per-run subsystem invocation status
 *   - Promoted candidates logged with baseline_rank, final_rank, score fields, reason codes
 *   - Promotion metrics (promotions_into_top20, candidates_reranked) now stored and reported
 *   - score_total updated to reflect canonical tail_score after recovery (score/rank consistency)
 *
 * STORAGE / SCHEMA CHANGES:
 *   - SKAI_storeTailMissRun() now writes promotion_metrics_json (was schema-present but unwritten)
 *   - SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade() adds promotion_metrics_json column if absent (additive only)
 *   - ?upgrade_skai_schema=1 trigger added for operator-initiated migration
 *   - Old rows unaffected (column is NULL-able; backward-compatible)
 *
 * CONFIG DEFAULTS (unchanged from existing):
 *   - [[SKAI_ENABLE_TAIL_MISS_RECOVERY]] defaults to 1 (enabled)
 *   - [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]] defaults to 0 (disabled; simplified tuner is default)
 *   - [[SKAI_TAIL_DEBUG_LOGGING]] defaults to 0 (verbose logging off in production)
 *   - All other tail config defaults preserved from SKAI_getTailRecoveryConfig()
 *
 * RUNTIME VERIFICATION ADDITIONS:
 *   - $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT'] per-request state tracker
 *   - SKAI_getRuntimeVerificationPanel() returns full structured status
 *   - SKAI_renderRuntimeVerificationPanel() produces operator-readable text output
 *   - Integrity checks cover: wiring, metrics, schema, config bounds, duplicate detection,
 *     score/rank consistency, runtime state tracking
 *   - ?upgrade_skai_schema=1 safe migration trigger
 *
 * ==========================================================================
 * [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]] POST-IMPLEMENTATION VERIFICATION SUMMARY
 * ==========================================================================
 *
 * VERIFIED: live pipeline wiring
 *   - SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline() is the wired entry point
 *   - It calls SKAI_runTailRecoveryPipelineStep() in step 5 when enabled
 *   - It sets live_pipeline_invoked=true via SKAI_postPipelineStateUpdate()
 *   - Tail recovery fallback returns $baselineRanked on error
 *   - Final order source tracked in $GLOBALS['SKAI_RT']['final_order_source']
 *
 * VERIFIED: live tuning dispatcher usage
 *   - SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher() routes by [[SKAI_USE_LIVE_TUNING]]
 *   - Sets dispatcher_used=true via SKAI_markDispatcherUsed() on both paths
 *   - Live tuning failure falls back to simplified tuner with error_log
 *
 * VERIFIED: score/rank consistency
 *   - score_total updated to tail_score for reranked borderline candidates
 *   - Final ranks re-stamped (rank = idx+1) after all pipeline steps
 *   - SKAI_verifyScoreRankConsistency() checks descending score order + no dups
 *   - [[score_rank_consistent]], [[duplicate_candidates_detected]], [[final_order_source]] reported
 *
 * VERIFIED: summary storage matches report reader
 *   - SKAI_storeTailMissRun() writes promotion_metrics_json (schema-reader-writer aligned)
 *   - SKAI_runSafeSchemaUpgrade() handles missing column additively
 *   - SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness() checks all 13 required columns at runtime
 *
 * VERIFIED: metric completeness
 *   - recall_at_20, mean_winner_rank, ndcg_at_20: SKAI_calculateBacktestMetrics
 *   - tail_recall_11_30, near_miss_promotion_rate, tail_miss_reduction_rate,
 *     mean_near_miss_rank, tail_gain_score: SKAI_computeTailFocusedMetrics
 *   - All metric functions verified callable; SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness() proves it
 *
 * VERIFIED: runtime verification panel
 *   - SKAI_getPostFixVerificationPanel() returns full extended panel
 *   - SKAI_renderPostFixVerificationPanel() renders operator-friendly output
 *   - Always-visible promoted_candidates_audit (not debug-gated)
 *   - [[final_order_source]] included
 *   - A/B summary included when SKAI_storeABSummaryInRuntime() called
 *   - ?skai_verify=1 trigger for panel view
 *
 * VERIFIED: self-check functions
 *   - SKAI_runPostFixVerificationChecks()     master entry point
 *   - SKAI_verifyLivePipelineWiring()         pipeline wiring
 *   - SKAI_verifyLiveTuningDispatcherUsage()  dispatcher usage
 *   - SKAI_verifyScoreRankConsistency()       score/rank integrity
 *   - SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryUsage()          tail recovery usage + config bounds
 *   - SKAI_verifyABComparisonIntegrity()      A/B comparison wiring
 *   - SKAI_verifyMetricCompleteness()         metric function availability
 *   - SKAI_verifySummaryStorageCompleteness() schema completeness
 *
 * NEW FUNCTIONS ADDED (all marked [[SKAI_POST_FIX_VERIFICATION]]):
 *   - SKAI_runPostFixVerificationChecks()     master post-fix check entry point
 *   - SKAI_verifyLivePipelineWiring()         live pipeline invocation verification
 *   - SKAI_verifyLiveTuningDispatcherUsage()  dispatcher sole-path verification
 *   - SKAI_verifyScoreRankConsistency()       score/rank consistency with status fields
 *   - SKAI_verifyTailRecoveryUsage()          tail recovery runtime + config bounds
 *   - SKAI_verifyABComparisonIntegrity()      A/B comparison integrity
 *   - SKAI_storeABSummaryInRuntime()          store A/B result in panel-visible state
 *   - SKAI_postPipelineStateUpdate()          post-pipeline state updater
 *   - SKAI_markDispatcherUsed()               mark dispatcher called
 *   - SKAI_getPostFixVerificationPanel()      full extended panel (array)
 *   - SKAI_renderPostFixVerificationPanel()   rendered text/HTML panel
 *
 * EXISTING FUNCTIONS MODIFIED (post-fix pass):
 *   - SKAI_runLivePredictionPipeline()        calls SKAI_postPipelineStateUpdate()
 *   - SKAI_computeTunedWeightsDispatcher()    calls SKAI_markDispatcherUsed()
 *
 * KNOWN LIMITATIONS:
 *   - live_pipeline_invoked and dispatcher_used are per-request; reset each page load
 *   - A/B summary is not auto-populated; caller must call SKAI_storeABSummaryInRuntime()
 *   - Static wiring checks verify function existence, not call-graph reachability
 *   - DB schema checks require DB connection; fail gracefully if no connection
 * ==========================================================================
 */

<script>
;(function(){
  'use strict';
  if (window.__SKAI_STATUS_PANEL_WIRED__) { return; }
  window.__SKAI_STATUS_PANEL_WIRED__ = 1;

  function initSkaiStatusPanel(){
    var toggle = document.getElementById('skai-system-status-toggle');
    var content = document.getElementById('skai-system-status-content');
    if (!toggle || !content) { return; }

    function getLabelNode(){
      var nodes = toggle.getElementsByTagName('span');
      return (nodes && nodes.length) ? nodes[0] : null;
    }

    function setExpandedState(expanded){
      toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', expanded ? 'true' : 'false');
      content.style.display = expanded ? 'block' : 'none';
      var labelNode = getLabelNode();
      if (labelNode) {
        labelNode.textContent = expanded ? 'Hide Details' : 'View Details';
      }
    }

    setExpandedState(toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') === 'true');

    if (!toggle.__skaiStatusBound__) {
      toggle.__skaiStatusBound__ = true;
      toggle.onclick = function(ev){
        if (ev && typeof ev.preventDefault === 'function') { ev.preventDefault(); }
        setExpandedState(toggle.getAttribute('aria-expanded') !== 'true');
        return false;
      };
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initSkaiStatusPanel, false);
  } else {
    initSkaiStatusPanel();
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  var meta = window.SKAI_META || {};
  var query = String(window.location.search || '');

  // [[SKAI_MLE_GUIDED_BATCH_DAILY_WARNING_BYPASS]]
  // MyLottoExpert is the command layer. If it opened SKAI with a required guided
  // batch, do not show the normal Daily SKAI notice and do not intercept the
  // guided 9-run batch button.
  var hasMleGuidedBatch =
    query.indexOf('mle_skai_batch=1') !== -1 ||
    query.indexOf('mle_guided_mode=required') !== -1 ||
    query.indexOf('mle_required_action=precision_batch') !== -1 ||
    !!(window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS && window.SKAI_MLE_SERVER_BATCH_STATUS.requested);

  if (hasMleGuidedBatch) { return; }

  var isDaily = !!(meta.isDaily || meta.isDailyDigitGame || meta.predictionMode === 'daily_digit');
  if (!isDaily) { return; }
  var modal = document.getElementById('skai-daily-warning-modal');
  var continueBtn = document.getElementById('skai-daily-warning-continue');
  var cancelBtn = document.getElementById('skai-daily-warning-cancel');
  var hideBox = document.getElementById('skai-daily-warning-hide-session');
  if (!modal || !continueBtn || !cancelBtn) { return; }

  var sessionKey = 'skaiDailyWarningAcknowledged';
  var bypassOnce = false;
  var pendingAction = null;
  var lastFocus = null;

  function sessionAcked(){
    try {
      return !!(window.sessionStorage && window.sessionStorage.getItem(sessionKey) === '1');
    } catch (e) {
      return false;
    }
  }

  function setSessionAcked(){
    try {
      if (hideBox && hideBox.checked && window.sessionStorage) {
        window.sessionStorage.setItem(sessionKey, '1');
      }
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  function lockScroll(){
    try {
      document.documentElement.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  function unlockScroll(){
    try {
      document.documentElement.style.overflow = '';
      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    } catch (e) {}
  }

  function openModal(action, triggerEl){
    pendingAction = action || null;
    lastFocus = triggerEl || null;
    modal.style.display = 'block';
    modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    lockScroll();
    window.setTimeout(function(){
      try { continueBtn.focus(); } catch (e) {}
    }, 0);
  }

  function closeModal(){
    modal.style.display = 'none';
    modal.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    unlockScroll();
    if (lastFocus && typeof lastFocus.focus === 'function') {
      try { lastFocus.focus(); } catch (e) {}
    }
  }

  function walkToActionEl(node){
    while (node && node !== document) {
      if (
        node.id === 'startPrediction' ||
        node.id === 'updateButton' ||
        node.id === 'skai-batch-launch'
      ) {
        return node;
      }
      node = node.parentNode;
    }
    return null;
  }

  continueBtn.onclick = function(){
    setSessionAcked();
    closeModal();

    if (typeof pendingAction === 'function') {
      var action = pendingAction;
      pendingAction = null;
      action();
    }
  };

  cancelBtn.onclick = function(){
    pendingAction = null;
    closeModal();
  };

  modal.onclick = function(ev){
    var t = ev && (ev.target || ev.srcElement);
    if (t === modal) {
      pendingAction = null;
      closeModal();
    }
  };

  document.addEventListener('keydown', function(ev){
    if (!modal || modal.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true') { return; }
    var key = ev.key || ev.keyCode;

    if (key === 'Escape' || key === 'Esc' || key === 27) {
      pendingAction = null;
      closeModal();
      return;
    }

    if (key === 'Tab' || key === 9) {
      var focusables = [cancelBtn, continueBtn].filter(function(el){ return !!el; });
      if (!focusables.length) { return; }

      var first = focusables[0];
      var last = focusables[focusables.length - 1];
      var active = document.activeElement;

      if (ev.shiftKey) {
        if (active === first || active === modal) {
          ev.preventDefault();
          try { last.focus(); } catch (e) {}
        }
      } else {
        if (active === last) {
          ev.preventDefault();
          try { first.focus(); } catch (e) {}
        }
      }
    }
  }, true);

  if (!document.__skaiDailyWarningBound__) {
    document.__skaiDailyWarningBound__ = true;

    document.addEventListener('click', function(ev){
      var e = ev || window.event;
      var target = walkToActionEl(e.target || e.srcElement);
      if (!target) { return; }

      if (target.id === 'skai-batch-launch' && (
        target.disabled ||
        target.getAttribute('disabled') !== null ||
        target.getAttribute('aria-disabled') === 'true'
      )) {
        return;
      }

      if (bypassOnce || sessionAcked()) { return; }

      if (e.preventDefault) { e.preventDefault(); }
      if (e.stopPropagation) { e.stopPropagation(); }
      if (e.stopImmediatePropagation) { e.stopImmediatePropagation(); }
      e.returnValue = false;
      e.cancelBubble = true;

      openModal(function(){
        bypassOnce = true;
        try { target.click(); } catch (err) {}
        window.setTimeout(function(){ bypassOnce = false; }, 0);
      }, target);

      return false;
    }, true);
  }
})();
</script>


<script>
/* ===================================================================
 * [[SKAI_V82_GLOBAL_LEARNING_SINGLE_RUN_BOOT]]
 * Labels the single-run button and applies best-known per-lottery global
 * settings before any normal single SKAI run starts. Guided MLE batches
 * remain locked to their commanded 9-run workflow.
 * =================================================================== */
;(function(){
  'use strict';
  if (window.__SKAI_V82_GLOBAL_SINGLE_RUN_BOOT__) { return; }
  window.__SKAI_V82_GLOBAL_SINGLE_RUN_BOOT__ = true;

  function getProfile(){ return window.SKAI_GLOBAL_LEARNING_SINGLE_RUN_PROFILE || {}; }
  function guidedRequired(){
    try {
      var p = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search || '');
      return p.get('mle_skai_batch') === '1' && (p.get('mle_guided_mode') === 'required' || p.get('mle_required_action') === 'precision_batch');
    } catch (_) { return false; }
  }
  function guidedCancelled(){
    try {
      if (typeof window.skaiMleGuidedCancelled === 'function') { return window.skaiMleGuidedCancelled(); }
    } catch (_) {}
    return false;
  }
  function esc(s){
    return String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, function(c){ return {'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c]; });
  }
  function applyToSettingsObject(settings){
    if (!settings || typeof settings !== 'object') { return; }
    if (!window.SKAI_SETTINGS || typeof window.SKAI_SETTINGS !== 'object') { window.SKAI_SETTINGS = {}; }
    for (var k in settings) {
      if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(settings, k)) { window.SKAI_SETTINGS[k] = settings[k]; }
    }
  }
  function applyGlobalSettings(reason){
    var prof = getProfile();
    if (!prof.available || !prof.settings) { return false; }
    try { applyToSettingsObject(prof.settings); } catch (_) {}
    try {
      if (typeof window.skaiApplySavedTemplate === 'function') {
        window.skaiApplySavedTemplate(prof.settings);
      }
    } catch (_) {}
    try {
      window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('skai:settings:applied', {
        detail: { source: 'global_learning_single_run', reason: reason || 'single_run', profile: prof },
        bubbles: true
      }));
    } catch (_) {}
    return true;
  }
  function updateLabel(){
    var btn = document.getElementById('startPrediction');
    var note = document.getElementById('skai-v82-single-run-explain');
    var prof = getProfile();
    if (!btn) { return; }
    if (prof.available) {
      btn.textContent = 'Generate Single Run';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Run SKAI using the best known global settings for this exact lottery');
      btn.setAttribute('data-skai-global-learning-single-run', '1');
      if (note) {
        var ev = prof.evidence || {};
        var bits = [];
        if (ev.learning_posture) { bits.push('status: ' + esc(ev.learning_posture)); }
        if (ev.updated_at) { bits.push('updated: ' + esc(ev.updated_at)); }
        note.style.display = 'block';
        note.innerHTML = '<strong>Single Run:</strong> SKAI will apply the strongest current global settings known for this exact lottery before running the single analysis. This is separate from a MyLottoExpert guided 9-run batch, which tests one setting across a bracketed range. ' + (bits.length ? '<span style="display:block;margin-top:4px;color:#1d4ed8;">' + bits.join(' | ') + '</span>' : '');
      }
    } else {
      btn.textContent = 'Run SKAI Single Analysis';
      btn.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Run a single SKAI analysis for this lottery');
      if (note) {
        note.style.display = 'block';
        note.innerHTML = '<strong>Single SKAI run:</strong> No proven global settings profile is available for this lottery yet, so SKAI will use the current visible settings. Saved and scored runs will help build the future global profile.';
      }
    }
  }
  function wire(){
    updateLabel();
    setTimeout(function(){ applyGlobalSettings('page_load'); }, 250);
    var btn = document.getElementById('startPrediction');
    if (btn && btn.getAttribute('data-skai-v82-global-wired') !== '1') {
      btn.setAttribute('data-skai-v82-global-wired', '1');
      btn.addEventListener('click', function(){
        if (guidedRequired() && !guidedCancelled()) { return; }
        applyGlobalSettings('start_prediction_click');
      }, true);
    }
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') { document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', wire); }
  else { wire(); }
})();
</script>

<style id="skai-qse-final-collapse-css">
/* [[SKAI_QSE_FINAL_COLLAPSE_2026_05_20]] Layout/wording only. Keeps engine/math untouched. */
/* Keep the deeper explanation/trust panels out of Quick and Strategy. They are available through Evidence/Advanced only. */
body.skai-view-quick #skai-run-powered-panel,
body.skai-view-strategy #skai-run-powered-panel,
body.skai-view-quick #skai-learning-explainer,
body.skai-view-strategy #skai-learning-explainer,
body.skai-view-quick #skai-mode-explainer,
body.skai-view-strategy #skai-mode-explainer,
body.skai-view-quick #skai-deterministic-card,
body.skai-view-strategy #skai-deterministic-card{
  display:none!important;
}
body.skai-view-evidence #skai-adv-body #skai-run-powered-panel.is-visible,
body.skai-view-evidence #skai-adv-body #skai-learning-explainer,
body.skai-view-evidence #skai-adv-body #skai-mode-explainer,
body.skai-view-evidence #skai-adv-body #skai-deterministic-card{
  display:block!important;
}
#skai-adv-body #skai-run-powered-panel{margin:12px 0 0 0!important;}
#skai-qse-advanced-note{margin-bottom:12px!important;}
</style>
<script id="skai-qse-final-collapse-js">
/* [[SKAI_QSE_FINAL_COLLAPSE_2026_05_20]] UI placement only. No prediction math, scoring, AJAX, or save behavior changed. */
(function(){
  'use strict';
  function q(id){return document.getElementById(id);}
  function append(parent,node){if(parent&&node&&node.parentNode!==parent){parent.appendChild(node);}}
  function setText(id,text){var el=q(id); if(el){el.textContent=text;}}
  function keepDeepPanelsAdvanced(){
    var advBody=q('skai-adv-body');
    if(!advBody){return;}
    var ids=['skai-run-powered-panel','skai-learning-explainer','skai-mode-explainer','skai-deterministic-card','skai-learn-how','skai-how-it-works'];
    for(var i=0;i<ids.length;i++){
      var el=q(ids[i]);
      if(el){append(advBody,el);}
    }
    if(!q('skai-qse-advanced-note')){
      var note=document.createElement('div');
      note.id='skai-qse-advanced-note';
      note.style.cssText='margin:0 0 12px 0;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:12px;background:#f8fafc;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;color:#334155;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.45;';
      note.innerHTML='<strong>Advanced details:</strong> deeper run logic, what powered the run, mode behavior, repeatable-run controls, and evidence panels are kept here so Quick stays focused.';
      advBody.insertBefore(note,advBody.firstChild);
    } else {
      q('skai-qse-advanced-note').innerHTML='<strong>Advanced details:</strong> deeper run logic, what powered the run, mode behavior, repeatable-run controls, and evidence panels are kept here so Quick stays focused.';
    }
  }
  function keepPlainRunLabels(){
    setText('startPrediction','Generate Single Run');
    setText('skai-batch-launch','Generate 9-Run Batch');
    setText('skai-mle-batch-launch','Run Recommended 9-Run Batch');
    setText('skai-mle-batch-launch-hero','Run Recommended 9-Run Batch');
    var hint=q('skai-qse-single-hint');
    if(hint){hint.textContent='Choose how SKAI should think first. Then run one focused recommendation or a full 9-run batch comparison.';}
  }
  function boot(){
    keepDeepPanelsAdvanced();
    keepPlainRunLabels();
  }
  if(document.readyState==='loading'){document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',boot,false);} else {boot();}
  var tries=0;
  var timer=window.setInterval(function(){tries++;boot();if(tries>=12){window.clearInterval(timer);}},500);
})();
</script>
